Exodus8:9 Mozisi akati kuna Faro, “Ndinopa ruremekedzo kwamuri kuti mureve nguva yokuti ndikunyengetererei imi navaranda venyu uye navanhu venyu kuti imi nedzimba dzenyu mubvisirwe matatya, kuti asare muNairi chete.”" 
Exodus8:10 Faro akati, “Mangwana.” Mozisi akapindura akati, “Zvichaitika sezvamareva, kuitira kuti mugoziva kuti hakuna mumwe akaita saJehovha Mwari wedu." 
Exodus8:11 Matatya achabva kwamuri nomudzimba dzenyu, machinda enyu nokuvanhu venyu; achasara muna Nairi chete.”" 
Exodus8:12 Ipapo Mozisi naAroni vakabva pana Faro, Mozisi akadana kuna Jehovha pamusoro pamatatya aakanga auyisa kuna Faro." 
Exodus8:13 Uye Jehovha akaita zvakanga zvakumbirwa naMozisi. Matatya akafa mudzimba, nomuruvazhe uye nomuminda." 
Exodus8:14 Akaunganidzwa akaita mirwi uye nyika yakanhuhwa nokuda kwawo. 
Exodus8:15 Asi Faro akati aona kuti rusununguko rwakanga rwavapo, akaomesa mwoyo wake uye akasada kuteerera Mozisi naAroni, sezvakanga zvarehwa naJehovha." 
Exodus8:16 Ipapo Jehovha akati kuna Mozisi, “Taurira Aroni uti, ‘Tambanudza tsvimbo yako ugorova guruva revhu,’ uye munyika yose yeIjipiti, guruva richava umhutu.”" 
Exodus8:17 Vakaita izvozvo uye Aroni akati atambanudza ruoko rwaiva netsvimbo uye akarova guruva umhutu hwakauya pamusoro pavanhu nezvipfuwo. Guruva rose munyika yose yeIjipiti rakava umhutu. 
Exodus8:18 Asi n'anga dzakakonewa, padzakaedza nouroyi hwadzo kubudisa umhutu." 
Exodus8:19 N'anga dzakati kuna Faro, “Uyu munwe waMwari.” Asi mwoyo waFaro wakava mukukutu uye haana kuda kuteerera, sezvakanga zvarehwa naJehovha." 
Exodus8:20 Ipapo Jehovha akati kuna Mozisi, “Muka mangwanani-ngwanani undosangana naFaro paanenge achienda kumvura ugoti kwaari, ‘Zvanzi naJehovha: Rega vanhu vangu vaende, kuti vanondinamata." 
Exodus8:21 Kana usingatenderi vanhu vangu kuti vaende, ndichatumira bute renhunzi pamusoro pako napamusoro pamachinda ako, napamusoro pavanhu vako uye nomudzimba dzenyu. Dzimba dzavaIjipita dzichazara nenhunzi, uye kunyange pavhu pavamire." 
Exodus8:22 “ ‘Asi pazuva iroro ndichatsaura nyika yeGosheni uko kunogara vanhu vangu; hakuna bute renhunzi richawanikwa ikoko kuitira kuti ugoziva kuti ini, Jehovha, ndiri munyika muno." 
Exodus8:23 Ndichaita mutsauko pakati pavanhu vangu navanhu vako. Chiratidzo ichi chichaitika mangwana.’ ” 
Exodus8:24 Uye Jehovha akaita izvozvo. Mabute enhunzi akapinda mumuzinda maFaro uye nomudzimba dzamachinda ake, uye muIjipiti yose, nyika yakaparadzwa namabute enhunzi." 
Exodus8:25 Ipapo Faro akadana Mozisi naAroni kati, “Endai mundobayira kuna Mwari wenyu munyika muno.”" 
Exodus8:26 Asi Mozisi akati, “Hazvina kunaka kuita saizvozvo. Zvipiriso zvatinoda kubayira kuna Jehovha Mwari wedu zvingazonyangadza vaIjipita. Uye kana tikapa zvibayiro zvinonyangadza pamberi pavo, havangazotitaki namabwe here?" 
Exodus8:27 Tinofanira kufamba rwendo rwamazuva matatu kuti tinobayira kuna Jehovha Mwari wedu murenje, sezvaakatirayira.”" 
Exodus8:28 Faro akati, “Ndichakutenderai kuenda kunobayira zvipiriso kuna Jehovha Mwari wenyu murenje, asi hamufaniri kuenda kure kure. Zvino chindinyengetererai.”" 
Exodus8:29 Mozisi akapindura akati, “Ndichangobva pauri, ndichanonyengetera kuna Jehovha, uye mangwana nhunzi dzichabva pana Faro namachinda ake uye napavanhu vake. Ivai nechokwadi chete kuti Faro haazonyengerizve achirambidza vanhu kuenda kundopa zvibayiro kuna Jehovha.”" 
Exodus8:30 Ipapo akabva pana Faro akandonyengetera kuna Jehovha," 
Exodus8:31 uye Jehovha akaita zvaakakumbirwa naMozisi. Nhunzi dzakabva pana Faro nokumachinda ake uye nokuvanhu vake; hakuna nhunzi yakasara. 
Exodus8:32 Asi panguva inozve, Faro akaomesa mwoyo wake uye akaramba kutendera vanhu kuti vaende." 
Exodus9:1 Ipapo Jehovha akati kuna Mozisi, “Enda kuna Faro undoti kwaari, ‘Zvanzi naJehovha, Mwari wavaHebheru: Rega vanhu vangu vaende, kuti vanondinamata." 
Exodus9:2 Kana uchiramba kuti vaende uye ukaramba uchivadzivisa," 
Exodus9:3 ruoko rwaJehovha ruchauyisa hosha yakaipa pakati pezvipfuwo zvako zviri muminda napamusoro pamabhiza ako nembongoro dzako nengamera napamusoro pemombe dzako uye napamusoro pamakwai nembudzi. 
Exodus9:4 Asi Jehovha achaisa mutsauko pakati pezvipfuwo zveIsraeri nezveIjipiti, kuitira kuti parege kuva nezvipfuwo zvavaIsraeri zvichafa.’ ”" 
Exodus9:5 Jehovha akatsaura nguva uye akati, “Mangwana Jehovha achaita izvi munyika.”" 
Exodus9:6 Uye chifumi chamangwana Jehovha akazviita: Zvipfuwo zvose zvavaIjipita zvakafa, asi hapana kana chipfuwo chimwe chete chavaIsraeri chakafa." 
Exodus9:7 Faro akatuma vanhu kundoferefeta uye akawana kuti pakanga pasina kunyange chipfuwo chimwe chete chavaIsraeri chakanga chafa. Asi mwoyo wake wakanga uri mukukutu uye haana kutendera vanhu kuenda. 
Exodus9:8 Ipapo Jehovha akati kuna Mozisi naAroni, “Torai tsama dzamadota kubva pachoto mugoita kuti Mozisi aakushe mumhepo pamberi paFaro." 
Exodus9:9 Richava guruva rakatsetseka pamusoro penyika yose yeIjipiti, uye mamota anoputika achamera pavanhu napazvipfuwo munyika yose.”" 
Exodus9:10 Saka vakatora madota pachoto uye vakandomira pamberi paFaro. Mozisi akaakusha mumhepo, uye mamota anoputika akamera pamusoro pavanhu napamusoro pezvipfuwo." 
Exodus9:11 N'anga hadzina kugona kumira pamberi paMozisi nokuda kwamamota akanga ari pavari uye napavaIjipita vose. 
Exodus9:12 Asi Jehovha akaomesa mwoyo waFaro uye haana kuda kuteerera kuna Mozisi naAroni, zvakanga zvarehwa naJehovha kuna Mozisi." 
Exodus9:13 Ipapo Jehovha akati kuna Mozisi, “Muka mangwanani-ngwanani undosangana naFaro ugoti kwaari, ‘Zvanzi naJehovha Mwari wavaHebheru: Rega vanhu vangu vaende, kuti vanondinamata," 
Exodus9:14 kana zvikasadaro nenguva ino ndichatuma matambudziko angu ose pamusoro pako napamusoro pavaranda vako uye pamusoro pavanhu vako, kuti ugoziva kuti hakuna mumwe akafanana neni munyika yose." 
Exodus9:15 Nokuti iye zvino ndingadai ndakatambanudza ruoko rwangu ndikakurova iwe navanhu vako nehosha yaigona kukuparadzai panyika. 
Exodus9:16 Asi ndakakumutsa nokuda kwechinangwa ichi, kuti ndikuratidze simba rangu uye kuti zita rangu riparidzwe munyika yose." 
Exodus9:17 Iwe wakazvigadzirira kurwa navanhu vangu uye haudi kuvatendera kuti vaende. 
Exodus9:18 Naizvozvo, nenguva ino mangwana ndichatuma chimvuramabwe chakaipisisa kwazvo chisina kumbovapo pamusoro peIjipiti, kubva pazuva rayakavambwa kusvikira zvino." 
Exodus9:19 Chirayira izvozvi kuti zvipfuwo zvako nezvose zviri musango zvipinde mumatanga, nokuti chimvuramabwe chichawira pamusoro pomunhu wose napamusoro pezvipfuwo zvisina kupfigirwa uye zvichiri musango, uye zvichafa.’ ”" 
Exodus9:20 Machinda aFaro ayo akanga achitya shoko raJehovha akakurumidza kupinza vatapwa vavo nezvipfuwo zvavo mukati. 
Exodus9:21 Asi vaya vakazvidza shoko raJehovha vakarega vatapwa vavo nezvipfuwo zviri musango. 
Exodus9:22 Ipapo Jehovha akati kuna Mozisi, “Tambanudzira ruoko rwako kudenga kuti chimvuramabwe chiwire pamusoro peIjipiti yose, pamusoro pavanhu napamusoro pezvipfuwo napamusoro pezvinhu zvose zvinomera muminda yeIjipiti.”" 
Exodus9:23 Mozisi akati atambanudzira tsvimbo yake kudenga, Jehovha akatuma mutinhimiro nechimvuramabwe, uye mheni ikapenya pasi. Saka Jehovha akanayisa chimvuramabwe pamusoro penyika yeIjipiti;" 
Exodus9:24 chimvuramabwe chakawa uye mheni yakapenya mberi neshure. Ndiro rakava dutu rakaipisisa kwazvo munyika yose yeIjipiti, kubva panguva yavakatanga kuva rudzi." 
Exodus9:25 Munyika yose yeIjipiti, chimvuramabwe chakarova zvinhu zvose zvakanga zviri musango, zvose vanhu nezvipfuwo; chakarovera pasi zvose zvaimera musango ndokuparadza miti yose." 
Exodus9:26 Nzvimbo yachisina kunaya chete inyika yeGosheni, uko kwaiva navaIsraeri." 
Exodus9:27 Ipapo Faro akadana Mozisi naAroni uye akati, “Nguva ino ndatadza. Jehovha ndiye akarurama asi ini navanhu vangu hatina kururama." 
Exodus9:28 Nyengeterai kuna Jehovha, nokuti mutinhiro nechimvuramabwe zvanyanya. Ndichakutenderai kuti muende; hamuchafaniri kuramba mugerezve pano.”" 
Exodus9:29 Mozisi akapindura akati, “Pandichabuda muguta, ndichatambanudza maoko angu ndichinyengetera kuna Jehovha. Mutinhiro uchapera uye hakuchazovizve nechimvuramabwe, kuti ugoziva kuti nyika ndeyaJehovha." 
Exodus9:30 Asi ndinoziva kuti iwe namachinda ako hamutyi Jehovha Mwari nazvino.” 
Exodus9:31 (Miti yeshinda nebhari zvakanga zvaparadzwa, sezvo bhari rakanga rava nehura uye miti yava namaruva." 
Exodus9:32 Kunyange zvakadaro gorosi nesipereketi, hazvina kuparadzwa, nokuti zvakanga zvisati zvaibva.)" 
Exodus9:33 Ipapo Mozisi akabva pana Faro akabuda muguta. Akatambanudzira maoko ake kuna Jehovha; mutinhiro nechimvuramabwe zvakamira, uye mvura haina kuzonayazve panyika." 
Exodus9:34 Faro akati aona kuti mvura nechimvuramabwe uye nomutinhiro zvapera, akatadzazve: Iye namachinda ake vakaomesa mwoyo yavo." 
Exodus9:35 Saka mwoyo waFaro wakaoma uye akasada kutendera vaIsraeri kuenda, sokutaura kwakanga kwaita Jehovha kubudikidza naMozisi." 
Exodus10:1 Ipapo Jehovha akati kuna Mozisi, “Enda kuna Faro nokuti ndaomesa mwoyo wake uye nemwoyo yamachinda ake kuitira kuti ndiite zviratidzo zvangu izvi pakati pavo," 
Exodus10:2 kuti mugoudza vana venyu navazukuru venyu mabatiro akaipa andakaitira vaIjipita uye kuti ndakaita zviratidzo zvangu sei pakati pavo, uye kuti imi mugoziva kuti ndini Jehovha.”" 
Exodus10:3 Saka Mozisi naAroni vakaenda kuna Faro vakandoti kwaari, “Zvanzi naJehovha, Mwari wavaHebheru, ‘Uchasvika riniko uchiramba kuzvininipisa pamberi pangu? Rega vanhu vangu vaende kuti vanondinamata." 
Exodus10:4 Kana uchiramba kuvatendera kuenda, ini ndichauyisa mhashu munyika yako mangwana." 
Exodus10:5 Dzichafukidza nyika yose zvokuti pasi hapangaonekwi. Dzichadya zvishoma zvawakanga wasiya shure kwechimvuramabwe, pamwe chete nemiti yose iri kumera muminda yako." 
Exodus10:6 Dzichazadza dzimba dzako nedzamachinda ako nedzavaIjipita vose, chinhu chisina kumboonekwa namadzibaba ako kana madzitateguru ako kubva pazuva ravakagara munyika ino kusvika zvino.’ ” Ipapo Mozisi akatendeuka akabva pana Faro." 
Exodus10:7 Machinda aFaro akati kwaari, “Munhu uyu acharamba ari musungo kwatiri kusvikira riniko? Regai vanhu vaende, kuti vagonamata Jehovha Mwari wavo. Ko, hamusi kuzviona here nazvino kuti Ijipiti yaparara?”" 
Exodus10:8 Ipapo Mozisi naAroni vakadzoswazve kuna Faro. Iye akati, “Endai mundonamata Jehovha Mwari wenyu. Asi vachaenda ndivanaaniko?”" 
Exodus10:9 Mozisi akapindura akati, “Tichaenda navaduku vedu uye navakuru, pamwe chete navanakomana vedu navanasikana vedu, uye namakwai edu nemombe dzedu, nokuti tinofanira kuita mutambo wokupemberera Jehovha.”" 
Exodus10:10 Faro akati, “Jehovha ngaave nemi, kana ndikakutenderai kuenda, pamwe chete navakadzi navana venyu! Zviri pachena kuti imi muri kuda kuita zvakaipa." 
Exodus10:11 Kwete! Varume chete ngavaende; uye vandonamata Jehovha, sezvo zviri izvo zvamanga muchikumbira.” Ipapo Mozisi naAroni vakadzingwa pamberi paFaro." 
Exodus10:12 Uye Jehovha akati kuna Mozisi, “Tambanudza ruoko rwako pamusoro peIjipiti kuitira kuti mhashu dzigoita bute pamusoro dzigodya zvose zvinomera muminda, zvose zvakasiyiwa nechimvuramabwe.”" 
Exodus10:13 Saka Mozisi akatambanudza tsvimbo yake pamusoro peIjipiti, uye Jehovha akaita kuti mhepo yokumabvazuva ivhuvhute munyika zuva rose nousiku hwose. Mangwanani, mhepo yakanga yauyisa mhashu;" 
Exodus10:14 dzakazadza Ijipiti yose uye dzikamhara munzvimbo dzose dzenyika dzakawanda zvikuru. Hakuna kutongova nedambudziko remhashu rakadai, uye harichazombovapozve." 
Exodus10:15 Dzakafukidza pasi pose kusvikira pasviba kuti svi-i. Dzakadya zvose zvakanga zvasara shure kwechimvuramabwe, zvinhu zvose zvaimera muminda uye michero yaiva pamiti. Hakuna chakasvibirira chakasara mumiti kana zvirimwa zvomunyika yose yeIjipiti." 
Exodus10:16 Faro akakurumidza kudana Mozisi naAroni akati, “Ndatadzira Jehovha Mwari wenyu uye nemi." 
Exodus10:17 Zvino ndiregerereizve chivi changu uye munyengetere kuna Jehovha Mwari wenyu kuti abvise kwandiri dambudziko rinouraya iri.” 
Exodus10:18 Ipapo Mozisi akabva pana Faro uye akanyengetera kuna Jehovha. 
Exodus10:19 Uye Jehovha akashandura mhepo ikava mhepo ine simba yokumavirira iyo ikasimudza mhashu ikadzikanda muGungwa Dzvuku. Hapana mhashu yakasara papi zvapo muIjipiti. 
Exodus10:20 Asi Jehovha akaomesa mwoyo waFaro, uye akasatendera vaIsraeri kuti vaende." 
Exodus10:21 Ipapo Jehovha akati kuna Mozisi, “Tambanudzira ruoko rwako kudenga kuti rima ripararire pamusoro peIjipiti, rima ringabatika.”" 
Exodus10:22 Saka Mozisi akatambanudzira ruoko rwake kudenga, uye rima guru rakafukidza Ijipiti yose kwamazuva matatu." 
Exodus10:23 Hapana aigona kuona mumwe munhu papi zvapo kana kubva panzvimbo yake kwamazuva matatu. Asi vaIsraeri vainge vane chiedza munzvimbo dzavaigara. 
Exodus10:24 Ipapo Faro akadana Mozisi akati, “Endai mundonamata Jehovha. Kunyange vakadzi venyu navana vangaenda havo nemi; musiye chete makwai enyu nemombe.”" 
Exodus10:25 Asi Mozisi akati, “Munofanira kutitendera kuti tive nezvibayiro uye zvipirisio zvinopiswa kuti tipe kuna Jehovha Mwari wedu." 
Exodus10:26 Zvipfuwo zvedu zvinofanira kuendawo nesu; hapana hwanda rinofanira kusara. Tinofanira kuzvishandisa zvimwe zvacho mukunamata Jehovha Mwari wedu, uye kusvikira tasvikako hatingazivi zvatingashandisa kuti tinamate Jehovha.”" 
Exodus10:27 Asi Jehovha akaomesa mwoyo waFaro, uye haana kuda kuvatendera kuti vaende." 
Exodus10:28 Faro akati kuna Mozisi, “Ibvai pano! Chenjerai kuti murege kuzoonekwazve pamberi pangu! Musi wamuchaona chiso changu muchafa.”" 
Exodus10:29 Mozisi akapindura akati, “Sezvamareva, handichazoonekwizve pamberi penyu.”" 
Exodus11:1 Zvino Jehovha akanga ati kuna Mozisi, “Ndichauyisa rimwezve dambudziko pamusoro paFaro napamusoro peIjipiti. Shure kwaizvozvo, achakutenderai kubva pano, uye paanozviita, achakudzingirai kunze zvachose." 
Exodus11:2 Udza vanhu kuti varume navakadzi, zvimwe chetezvo, vakumbire vavakidzani vavo zvishongo zvesirivha nezvegoridhe.”" 
Exodus11:3 Jehovha akaita kuti vanhu vawanirwe nyasha navaIjipita, uye Mozisi pachake akanga achikudzwa zvikuru muIjipiti namachinda aFaro uye navanhu." 
Exodus11:4 Saka Mozisi akati, “Zvanzi naJehovha: ‘Pakati pousiku ndichafamba napakati peIjipiti." 
Exodus11:5 Mwanakomana wose wedangwe ari muIjipiti achafa, kubva pamwanakomana wedangwe waFaro, iye agere pachigaro choushe, kusvikira kumwanakomana wedangwe womurandakadzi, ari paguyo rake, namatangwe ose emombewo." 
Exodus11:6 Pachava nokuchema kukuru muIjipiti yose, kwakadaro hakuna kumbovapo uye hakungavepozve." 
Exodus11:7 Asi pakati pavaIsraeri hapana kana imbwa ichahukura munhu zvake kana chipfuwo.’ Ipapo uchaziva kuti Jehovha anoita mutsauko pakati peIjipiti neIsraeri. 
Exodus11:8 Machinda ako ose aya achauya kwandiri, vachipfugama pamberi pangu vachiti, ‘Chiendai, imi navanhu vose vanokuteverai!’ Shure kwaizvozvo ndichaenda.” Ipapo Mozisi, atsamwa kwazvo, akabva pana Faro." 
Exodus11:9 Jehovha akanga ati kuna Mozisi, “Faro acharamba kukuteerera, kuitira kuti zvishamiso zvangu zviwande muIjipiti.”" 
Exodus11:10 Mozisi naAroni vakaita zvishamiso zvose izvi pamberi paFaro, asi Jehovha akaomesa mwoyo waFaro uye haana kuda kutendera vaIsraeri kuti vabude munyika yake." 
Exodus12:1 Jehovha akati kuna Mozisi naAroni vari muIjipiti," 
Exodus12:2 “Mwedzi uno unofanira kuva mwedzi wokutanga kwamuri, mwedzi wokutanga wegore renyu." 
Exodus12:3 Udzai ungano yose yeIsraeri kuti pazuva regumi romwedzi uno, murume mumwe nomumwe anofanira kutorera mhuri yake gwayana, rimwe chete paimba imwe neimwe." 
Exodus12:4 Kana imba ipi zvayo iri duku kwazvo pagwayana rose, vanofanira kugovana rimwe chete nomuvakidzani ari pedyo zvichienderana nouwandu hwavanhu varipo. Munofanira kuona mugove unodikanwa maererano nezvingadyiwa nomunhu mumwe nomuwe." 
Exodus12:5 Zvipfuwo zvamunosarudza zvinofanira kuva mikono yegore rimwe chete isina chainopomerwa, uye munogona kuzvitora kubva kumakwai kana kumbudzi." 
Exodus12:6 Muzvichengete kusvikira pazuva regumi namana romwedzi, ipapo ungano yose yeIsraeri inofanira kuzviuraya panguva yamadekwana." 
Exodus12:7 Ipapo vanofanira kutora rimwe ropa vagoriisa pamagwatidziro maviri egonhi napazvivivo zvedzimba dzavanodyira makwayana vari. 
Exodus12:8 Usiku ihwohwo vanofanira kudya nyama yakagochwa pamoto, pamwe chete nemiriwo inovava, nechingwa chisina mbiriso." 
Exodus12:9 Musadya nyama iri mbishi kana yakabikwa mumvura, asi mugoche pamoto, musoro, makumbo uye nezvomukati." 
Exodus12:10 Musasiya kana chimwe charo kusvikira mangwanani; kana zvimwe zvikasara kusvikira mangwanani, munofanira kuzvipisa." 
Exodus12:11 Aya ndiwo madyiro amunoriita: Majasi akasungwa nebhanire, makapfeka shangu mutsoka dzenyu, uye tsvimbo dzenyu dziri mumaoko enyu. Muridye nokukurumidza; ndiyo Pasika yaJehovha." 
Exodus12:12 “Nousiku ihwohwo ndichapfuura napakati peIjipiti ndigorova matangwe ose, zvose vanhu nezvipfuwo, uye ndichatonga vamwari vose veIjipiti. Ndini Jehovha." 
Exodus12:13 Ropa richava chiratidzo kwamuri mudzimba dzamunogara; uye ndikaona ropa, ndichapfuura pauri. Hapana hosha inoparadza ichakubatai pandicharova Ijipiti." 
Exodus12:14 “Iri ndiro zuva ramunofanira kurangarira; kumarudzi anotevera mucharipemberera somutambo kuna Jehovha, mutemo wokusingaperi." 
Exodus12:15 Kwamazuva manomwe, munofanira kudya chingwa chisina mbiriso. Pazuva rokutanga mubvise mbiriso mudzimba dzenyu, nokuti ani naani anodya chinhu chipi zvacho chine mbiriso mukati macho kubva pazuva rokutanga kusvikira pazuva rechinomwe anofanira kubviswa pakati pavaIsraeri." 
Exodus12:16 Pazuva rokutanga muite ungano tsvene, uye mugoitazve imwe ungano pazuva rechinomwe. Musatomboshanda pamazuva iwayo, kunze bedzi kwokugadzira zvokudya zvokuti munhu wose adye, ndizvo chete zvamungaita." 
Exodus12:17 “Mupemberere Mutambo weZvingwa Zvisina Mbiriso, nokuti pazuva irori ndipo pandakabudisa mapoka enyu kubva muIjipiti. Mupemberere zuva irori uve mutemo wokusingaperi kumarudzi anotevera." 
Exodus12:18 Mumwedzi wokutanga munofanira kudya chingwa chakabikwa chisina mbiriso, kubva pamadekwana ezuva regumi namana kusvikira madekwana ezuva ramakumi maviri nerimwe." 
Exodus12:19 Kwamazuva manomwe, mbiriso ngairege kuwanikwa mudzimba dzenyu. Uye ani naani anodya chinhu chipi zvacho chine mbiriso anofanira kubviswa pakati peungano yaIsraeri, angava mutorwa kana akaberekerwa munyika imomo." 
Exodus12:20 Musadya chinhu chakabikwa nembiriso. Pose pamunogara, munofanira kudya chingwa chisina mbiriso.”" 
Exodus12:21 Ipapo Mozisi akadana vakuru vose veIsraeri akati kwavari, “Endai izvozvi mundosarudza zvipfuwo zvemhuri dzenyu mugouraya gwayana rePasika." 
Exodus12:22 Mutore sumbu rehisopi, murinyike muropa riri mumudziyo uye mugoisa rimwe ropa nechapamusoro pechivivo uye napamativi maviri amagwatidziro egonhi. Parege kuva nomumwe wenyu anobuda pamukova weimba yake kusvikira mangwanani." 
Exodus12:23 Jehovha paanopinda napakati penyika kuti arove vaIjipita, achaona ropa pamusoro pechivivo nomumativi amagwatidziro egonhi uye achapfuura pamikova yenyu, uye haangatenderi muparadzi kuti apinde mudzimba dzenyu kuti akurovei." 
Exodus12:24 “Muteerere mirayiro iyi ive mitemo kwamuri nokuzvizvarwa zvenyu nokusingaperi. 
Exodus12:25 Pamunopinda munyika yamuchapiwa naJehovha sezvaakavimbisa, mucherechedze chirevo ichi." 
Exodus12:26 Uye pamuchabvunzwa navana venyu vachiti, ‘Zvinoreveiko izvi kwamuri?’" 
Exodus12:27 Ipapo muvaudze kuti, ‘Ndicho chibayiro chePasika yaJehovha, uyo akapfuura napadzimba dzavaIsraeri muIjipiti akaponesa dzimba dzedu paakarova vaIjipita.’ ” Ipapo vanhu vakapfugama vakanamata." 
Exodus12:28 VaIsraeri vakaita sezvakanga zvarayirwa naJehovha kuna Mozisi naAroni. 
Exodus12:29 Pakati pousiku Jehovha akarova matangwe ose omuIjipiti, kubva padangwe raFaro, iye aizogara pachigaro choushe, kusvika kudangwe romusungwa, akanga ari mutorongo, nedangwe rezvipfuwo zvosewo." 
Exodus12:30 Faro namachinda ake ose uye navaIjipita vose vakamuka usiku, uye kwakava nokuungudza kukuru muIjipiti, nokuti kwakanga kusina imba isina munhu akanga afa." 
Exodus12:31 Faro akadana Mozisi naAroni usiku akati, “Simukai, mubve pakati pavanhu vangu, imi navaIsraeri! Endai, mundonamata Jehovha sezvamakakumbira." 
Exodus12:32 Mutore makwai enyu nemombe, sezvamakareva, mugoenda. Uyewo mundiropafadze.”" 
Exodus12:33 VaIjipita vakakurudzira vanhu kuti vakurumidze kubva munyika. Nokuti vakati, “Zvimwe tingafa tose!”" 
Exodus12:34 Saka vanhu vakatora mukanyiwa wavo usati waiswa mbiriso, vakatakura pamapfudzi avo mumidziyo yokukanyira vakazviputira mumicheka." 
Exodus12:35 VaIsraeri vakaita sezvavakarayirwa naMozisi uye vakakumbira zvishongo zvesirivha, negoridhe uye nezvokupfeka." 
Exodus12:36 Jehovha akapa vanhu nyasha pamberi pavaIjipita, uye vakavapa zvavakakumbira; saka vakapamba vaIjipita." 
Exodus12:37 VaIsraeri vakafamba kubva paRamesesi kusvikira kuSukoti. Kwakanga kuna varume mazana matanhatu ezviuru vaifamba netsoka, pasingaverengwi vakadzi navana." 
Exodus12:38 Vamwe vanhu vazhinji vakaendawo navo, pamwe chete namapoka makuru ezvipfuwo, zvose makwai nemombe." 
Exodus12:39 Vakabika makeke ezvingwa zvisina kuviriswa nomukanyiwa wavakabva nawo kuIjipiti. Mukanyiwa uyu wakanga usina mbiriso nokuti vakanga vadzingwa kubva muIjipiti uye havana kuwana nguva yokuti vazvigadzirire zvokudya. 
Exodus12:40 Zvino nguva yakagara vanhu veIsraeri muIjipiti yakanga iri makore mazana mana namakumi matatu. 
Exodus12:41 Pakupera kwamakore mazana mana namakumi matatu, kusvikira pazuva racho iroro, ungano yose yavanhu vaJehovha yakabva muIjipiti." 
Exodus12:42 Usiku uhwo hunofanira kurangarirwa Jehovha, nokuti akavabudisa muIjipiti nahwo. Ndihwo usiku hwaJehovha, hunofanira kurangarirwa kwazvo navana vaIsraeri vose namarudzi avo ose." 
Exodus12:43 Jehovha akati kuna Mozisi naAroni, “Iyi ndiyo mitemo yePasika: “Mutorwa haafaniri kuidya." 
Exodus12:44 Nhapwa ipi zvayo yawakatenga ingadya hayo mushure mokunge wamudzingisa," 
Exodus12:45 asi mueni uye nomunhu anoshandira mari haafaniri kuidya. 
Exodus12:46 “Inofanira kudyirwa muimba imwe chete; musabuda neimwe nyama kunze kwemba. Musavhuna kana bvupa. 
Exodus12:47 Ungano yose yeIsraeri inofanira kuipemberera. 
Exodus12:48 “Mutorwa wose agere pakati penyu anoda kupemberera Pasika yaJehovha anofanira kudzingisa varume vose vari mumba make; ipapo achadya hake somunhu akaberekerwa munyika imomo. Murume asina kudzingiswa haafaniri kuidya. 
Exodus12:49 Murayiro mumwe chete iwoyo unobata kuna vose vakaberekerwa munyika imomo nokumutorwa agere pakati penyu.” 
Exodus12:50 VaIsraeri vose vakaita sezvakanga zvarayirwa naJehovha kuna Mozisi naAroni. 
Exodus12:51 Uye pazuva racho iroro Jehovha akabudisa vaIsraeri kubva muIjipiti namapoka avo. 
Exodus13:1 Jehovha akati kuna Mozisi," 
Exodus13:2 “Nditsaurire matangwe echirume ose. Chibereko chokutanga chechizvaro pakati pavaIsraeri ndechangu, chingava chomunhu kana chechipfuwo.”" 
Exodus13:3 Ipapo Mozisi akati kuvanhu, “Rangarirai zuva iri, iro zuva ramakabuda muIjipiti, munyika youtapwa, nokuti Jehovha akakubudisai mairi noruoko rune simba. Musadya chinhu chine mbiriso." 
Exodus13:4 Nhasi, mumwedzi waAbhibhi muri kubuda." 
Exodus13:5 Pamunosvitswa naJehovha munyika yavaKenani, vaHiti, vaAmori, vaHivhi, navaJebhusi, iyo nyika yaakapikira madzibaba enyu kuti vazokupai iyo, nyika inoyerera mukaka nouchi, munofanira kucherechedza chirevo ichi mumwedzi uno." 
Exodus13:6 Kwamazuva manomwe munofanira kuitira Jehovha mutambo. 
Exodus13:7 Mudye chingwa chisina mbiriso pamazuva manomwe iwayo; chinhu chine mbiriso hachifaniri kuonekwa pakati penyu, uye mbiriso zvayo haifaniri kuonekwa panzvimbo ipi zvayo pakati pemiganhu yenyu." 
Exodus13:8 Pazuva iroro uudze mwanakomana wako kuti, ‘Ndinoita izvi nokuda kwezvandakaitirwa naJehovha pandakabuda muIjipiti.’" 
Exodus13:9 Mucherechedzo uyu uchava kwauri sechiratidzo paruoko rwako uye sechirangaridzo pahuma yako chokuti murayiro waJehovha unofanira kuva pamiromo yako. Nokuti Jehovha akakubudisa muIjipiti noruoko rwake rune simba. 
Exodus13:10 Unofanira kuchengeta mutemo uyu panguva dzakatarwa gore negore. 
Exodus13:11 “Shure kwokunge Jehovha akusvitsa munyika yavaKenani uye aipa kwauri, sezvaakavimbisa nemhiko kwauri nokumadzitateguru ako," 
Exodus13:12 unofanira kupa kuna Jehovha chibereko chokutanga chezvizvaro zvose. Zvikono zvezvipfuwo zvako zvose zvinotanga kuzarura chibereko ndezvaJehovha. 
Exodus13:13 Udzikinure negwayana mwana wose wokutanga wembongoro, asi kana usingaudzikinuri, uvhune mutsipa wawo. Udzikinure matangwe ose pakati pavanakomana vako." 
Exodus13:14 “Mumazuva anouya, paunenge uchibvunzwa nomwanakomana wako kuti, ‘Zvinoreveiko izvi?’ uti kwaari, ‘Noruoko rune simba Jehovha akatibudisa muIjipiti, munyika youtapwa." 
Exodus13:15 Faro paakasindimara achiramba kuti tiende, Jehovha akauraya matangwe ose omuIjipiti, zvose vanhu nezvipfuwo. Ndokusaka ndichibayira kuna Jehovha mukono wokutanga wechibereko chechizvaro chose uye ndichidzikinura dangwe rimwe nerimwe ravanakomana vangu.’" 
Exodus13:16 Uye chichava chiratidzo paruoko rwako uye rundanyara pahuma yako kuti Jehovha akatibudisa kubva muIjipiti noruoko rune simba.” 
Exodus13:17 Faro akati atendera vanhu kuti vaende, Mwari haana kuvatungamirira nomumugwagwa waipinda nomunyika yavaFiristia, kunyange zvayo yakanga iri pfupi. Nokuti Mwari akati, “Kana vakasangana nehondo, vangashandura pfungwa dzavo vakadzokera kuIjipiti.”" 
Exodus13:18 Saka Mwari akatungamirira vanhu achipoterera nomumugwagwa womurenje vakananga kuGungwa Dzvuku. VaIsraeri vakabuda kubva muIjipiti vakapakata nhumbi dzehondo. 
Exodus13:19 Mozisi akatora mapfupa aJosefa nokuti Josefa akanga aita kuti vanakomana vaIsraeri vapike mhiko. Akanga ati, “Zvirokwazvo Mwari achakubatsirai, uye ipapo munofanira kutakura mapfupa angu kubva panzvimbo ino.”" 
Exodus13:20 Vakati vabva paSukoti vakadzika musasa paEtami pamucheto werenje. 
Exodus13:21 Masikati Jehovha aivatungamirira neshongwe yegore kuti avatungamirire munzira yavo uye usiku aivatungamirira neshongwe yomoto kuti vavhenekerwe, kuti vafambe masikati kana usiku." 
Exodus13:22 Shongwe yegore masikati kana shongwe yemoto usiku hazvina kubva panzvimbo yazvo pamberi pavanhu. 
Exodus14:1 Ipapo Jehovha akati kuna Mozisi," 
Exodus14:2 “Taurira vaIsraeri kuti vadzoke vagondodzika musasa pedyo nePi Hahiroti, pakati peMigidhori negungwa. Vanofanira kudzika misasa pedyo nepagungwa, pakatarisana neBhaari Zefoni." 
Exodus14:3 Faro achafunga kuti, ‘VaIsraeri vari kungodzungaira nenyika vakanganisika, vadzimira murenje.’" 
Exodus14:4 Uye ndichaomesa mwoyo waFaro, agovatevera. Asi ini ndichazviwanira kukudzwa kubudikidza naFaro nehondo yake yose, uye vaIjipita vachaziva kuti ndini Jehovha.” Saka vaIsraeri vakaita izvozvo." 
Exodus14:5 Mambo weIjipiti akati audzwa kuti vanhu vatiza, Faro namachinda ake vakapindura pfungwa dzavo pamusoro pavo uye vakati, “Ko, taitei? Tarega vaIsraeri vachienda uye havachatishandiri!”" 
Exodus14:6 Saka akaita ngoro dzake dzigadzirwe uye akatora hondo yake akaenda nayo. 
Exodus14:7 Akatora ngoro dzakanakisisa dzaisvika mazana matanhatu, pamwe chete nedzimwe ngoro dzeIjipiti dzina vatariri vadzo dzose." 
Exodus14:8 Jehovha akaomesa mwoyo waFaro mambo weIjipiti, kuti atevere vaIsraeri, avo vakanga vachifamba vakashinga kwazvo." 
Exodus14:9 VaIjipita, mabhiza ose aFaro nengoro dzake, vatasvi vamabhiza namauto, vakatevera vaIsraeri vakavabata pavakanga vadzika musasa pagungwa pedyo nePi Hahiroti, pakatarisana neBhaari Zefoni." 
Exodus14:10 Faro paakanga osvika, vaIsraeri vakasimudza meso avo, uye vakaona havo vaIjipita, vachifamba vachivatevera. Vakavhunduka uye vakachema kuna Jehovha." 
Exodus14:11 Vakati kuna Mozisi, “Zvinoreva kuti muIjipiti makanga musina makuva here zvawatiuyisa kurenje kuti tife? Chiiko chawaita kwatiri zvawatibudisa muIjipiti?" 
Exodus14:12 Ko, tiri muIjipiti hatina kuti, ‘Tisiye takadaro; rega tishandire vaIjipita here?’ Zvaiva nani kwatiri kuti tishandire vaIjipita pano kuti tifire murenje!”" 
Exodus14:13 Mozisi akapindura vanhu akati, “Musatya. Mirai nesimba uye muchaona rusununguro rwaJehovha rwaachakuitirai nhasi. VaIjipita vamunoona nhasi hamuchazovaonizve." 
Exodus14:14 Jehovha achakurwirai; imi ingonyararai bedzi.” 
Exodus14:15 Ipapo Jehovha akati kuna Mozisi, “Seiko uchidanidzira kwandiri? Taurira vaIsraeri kuti vapfuurire mberi." 
Exodus14:16 Simudza tsvimbo yako ugotambanudzira ruoko rwako pamusoro pegungwa kuti mvura iparadzane kuitira kuti vaIsraeri vapinde mugungwa napavhu rakaoma. 
Exodus14:17 Ndichaomesa mwoyo yavaIjipita zvokuti vachapinda vachivatevera. Uye ndichawana kukudzwa kubudikidza naFaro nehondo yake yose, nengoro dzake uye navatasvi vake vamabhiza." 
Exodus14:18 VaIjipita vachaziva kuti ndini Jehovha pandichawana kukudzwa kubudikidza naFaro, ngoro dzake navatasvi vake vamabhiza.”" 
Exodus14:19 Ipapo mutumwa waMwari, uyo akanga achifamba ari mberi kwehondo yavaIsraeri, akadzokera shure kwavo. Shongwe yegore yakabvawo mberi kwavo ikandomira shure kwavo," 
Exodus14:20 iri pakati pehondo dzeIjipiti nedzeIsraeri. Usiku hwose gore rakauyisa rima kuno rumwe rutivi uye chiedza kuno rumwe rutivi; saka hakuna akaswedera kuno mumwe usiku hwose. 
Exodus14:21 Ipapo Mozisi akatambanudzira ruoko rwake pamusoro pegungwa, uye usiku hwose ihwohwo Jehovha akasunda gungwa nemhepo ine simba yokumabvazuva rikashanduka rikava nyika yakaoma. Mvura yakakamurana," 
Exodus14:22 uye vaIsraeri vakapinda nomugungwa napavhu rakaoma uye madziro emvura ari kuruoko rworudyi uye nokuruboshwe rwavo. 
Exodus14:23 VaIjipita vakavatevera, uye mabhiza ose aFaro nengoro dzake navatasvi vamabhiza vakatevera mugungwa." 
Exodus14:24 Panguva yamangwanani Jehovha akatarira pasi nomushongwe yomoto uye nomugore raiva kurutivi rwehondo yavaIjipita, akainyonganisa." 
Exodus14:25 Akaita kuti mavhiri engoro dzavo abve zvokuti zvakanga zvaoma kudzifambisa. Uye vaIjipita vakati, “Ngatitizei kubva kuvaIsraeri. Jehovha ari kuvarwira achirwa navaIjipita.”" 
Exodus14:26 Ipapo Jehovha akati kuna Mozisi, “Tambanudzira ruoko rwako pamusoro pegungwa kuitira kuti mvura iyerere napamusoro pavaIjipita napamusoro pengoro dzavo napamusoro pavatasvi vavo vamabhiza.”" 
Exodus14:27 Mozisi akatambanudzira ruoko rwake pamusoro pegungwa, uye kwaedza, gungwa rakadzokera panzvimbo yaro. VaIjipita vakanga vachitizira kwariri, uye Jehovha akavakukurira mugungwa." 
Exodus14:28 Mvura yakadzokera pakare uye ikafukidza ngoro navatasvi vamabhiza, hondo yose yaFaro yakanga yatevera vaIsraeri ikanyura mugungwa. Hapana kana mumwe wavo akararama." 
Exodus14:29 Asi vaIsraeri vakapinda nomugungwa napavhu rakaoma uye madziro emvura ari kuruoko rwavo rworudyi nokuruboshwe. 
Exodus14:30 Zuva iroro Jehovha akaponesa vaIsraeri kubva mumaoko avaIjipita, uye vaIsraeri vakaona vaIjipita vakanga vafa pamahombekombe." 
Exodus14:31 Uye vaIsraeri pavakaona simba guru raJehovha richiratidzwa pamusoro pavaIjipita, vanhu vakatya Jehovha uye vakatenda kwaari naMozisi muranda wake." 
Exodus15:1 Ipapo Mozisi navaIsraeri vakaimba rwiyo urwu kuna Jehovha: “Ndichaimbira Jehovha, nokuti iye anokudzwa zvikurukuru. Bhiza nomutasvi waro akazvikanda mugungwa." 
Exodus15:2 Jehovha ndiye simba rangu norwiyo rwangu; iye ava ruponeso rwangu. Ndiye Mwari wangu, uye ndichamurumbidza, Mwari wababa vangu, uye ndichamukudza." 
Exodus15:3 Jehovha imhare; Jehovha ndiro zita rake. 
Exodus15:4 Ngoro dzaFaro nehondo yake akazvikanda mugungwa. Machinda aFaro akanakisisa akanyudzwa muGungwa Dzvuku. 
Exodus15:5 	Mvura yakadzika yakavafukidza; vakanyura kwakadzika sedombo. 
Exodus15:6 “Ruoko rwenyu rworudyi, imi Jehovha, rwakakudzwa nesimba. Ruoko rwenyu rworudyi, imi Jehovha, rwakaparadza muvengi.”" 
Exodus15:7 Muukuru hwoumambo hwenyu makakanda pasi vaya vaikupikisai. Makasunungura kutsamwa kwenyu kunopisa, kukavapisa sehundi." 
Exodus15:8 	Nokufema kwemhino dzenyu mvura zhinji yakaita murwi. Mvura yamasaisai yakamira yakasimba semadziro; mvura yakadzika yakagwamba mukati megungwa. 
Exodus15:9 “Muvengi akazvikudza achiti, ‘Ndichavatevera, ndichavabata. ndichagova zvakapambwa; ndichazvimbirwa navo. Ndichavhomora munondo wangu uye ruoko rwangu ruchavaparadza.’" 
Exodus15:10 	Asi makafuridza nokufema kwenyu, uye gungwa rikavafukidza. Vakanyura somutobvu mukati memvura ine simba." 
Exodus15:11 “Ndianiko pakati pavamwari akaita semi, imi Jehovha? Ndiani akaita semi, paumambo noutsvene, mukubwinya kunotyisa, anoita zvishamiso?" 
Exodus15:12 	Makatambanudza ruoko rwenyu rworudyi uye nyika ikavamedza. 
Exodus15:13 “Murudo rwenyu rusingaperi muchatungamirira vanhu vamakadzikinura. Musimba renyu imi muchavatungamirira kuugaro hwenyu hutsvene. 
Exodus15:14 Ndudzi dzichazvinzwa uye dzichadedera; kurwadziwa kuchabata vanhu vokuFiristia. 
Exodus15:15 Madzishe eEdhomu achavhundutswa, vatungamiri veMoabhu vachabatwa nokudedera, vanhu veKenani vachanyunguduka;" 
Exodus15:16 kutya nokuvhunduka zvichavawira. Nesimba roruoko rwenyu vachanyarara kunge dombo, kusvikira vanhu venyu vapfuura, imi Jehovha, kusvikira vanhu vamakatenga vapfuura." 
Exodus15:17 Muchaenda navomo uye mugovasima pagomo renhaka yenyu, nzvimbo tsvene yakasimbiswa namaoko enyu, imi Jehovha." 
Exodus15:18 Jehovha achatonga nokusingaperi-peri.” 
Exodus15:19 Mabhiza aFaro, ngoro navatasvi vamabhiza vakapinda mugungwa, Jehovha akauyisa mvura yomugungwa pamusoro pavo, asi vaIsraeri vakafamba napakati pegungwa pavhu rakaoma." 
Exodus15:20 Ipapo Miriamu muprofitakadzi, hanzvadzi yaAroni, akatora tambureni muruoko rwake, uye vakadzi vose vakamutevera, vana matambureni uye vachitamba." 
Exodus15:21 Miriamu akavaimbira akati: “Imbirai Jehovha, nokuti anokudzwa zvikuru kuru. Bhiza nomutasvi waro akazvikanda mugungwa.”" 
Exodus15:22 Ipapo Mozisi akatungamirira vaIsraeri kubva paGungwa Dzvuku uye vakapinda murenje reShuri. Vakafamba kwamazuva matatu murenje vachishayiwa mvura. 
Exodus15:23 Vakati vasvika paMara, havana kugona kunwa mvura yacho nokuti yaivava. (Ndokusaka nzvimbo yacho ichinzi Mara.)" 
Exodus15:24 Saka vanhu vakapopotera Mozisi vachiti, “Tonweiko?”" 
Exodus15:25 Ipapo Mozisi akachema kuna Jehovha, uye Jehovha akamuratidza danda. Akarikanda mumvura, uye mvura ikanaka. Jehovha akavaitirapo mutemo nomurayiro, uye akavaedza ipapo." 
Exodus15:26 Akati, “Kana mukanyatsoteerera inzwi raJehovha Mwari wenyu uye mukaita zvakarurama pamberi pake, kana mukarerekera nzeve dzenyu kumirayiro yake uye mukachengeta mitemo yose, haangauyisi pamusoro penyu zvirwere zvose zvandakauyisa pamusoro pavaIjipita, nokuti ndini Jehovha anokuporesai.”" 
Exodus15:27 Ipapo vakasvika paErimu, paiva namatsime gumi namaviri uye nemiti yemichindwe makumi manomwe, uye vakadzika misasa ipapo pedyo nemvura." 
Exodus16:1 Ungano yose yavaIsraeri yakasimuka kubva paErimu vakasvika kuRenje reSini, riri pakati peErimu neSinai, pazuva regumi namashanu romwedzi wechipiri shure kwokubuda kwavo muIjipiti." 
Exodus16:2 Murenje imomo ungano yose yavaIsraeri yakapopotera Mozisi naAroni. 
Exodus16:3 VaIsraeri vakati kwavari, “Dai chete takafa zvedu noruoko rwaJehovha tiri muIjipiti! Uko kwataikomba makate enyama uye tichidya zvokudya zvose zvataida, asi makatibudisa kurenje kuno kuti ungano ino yose iziye nenzara kusvikira pakufa.”" 
Exodus16:4 Ipapo Jehovha akati kuna Mozisi, “Ndichakunayisirai chingwa chichabva kudenga. Vanhu vanofanira kubuda zuva rimwe nerimwe uye vaunganidze zvinoringana nezuva iroro. Nenzira iyoyi ndichavaedza ndigoona kana vachitevera zvandinovarayira." 
Exodus16:5 Pazuva rechitanhatu vanofanira kugadzira zvavanouya nazvo, uye zvinofanira kuva zviyero zviviri kupfuura zvavanosiunganidza pana mamwe mazuva.”" 
Exodus16:6 Saka Mozisi naAroni vakati kuvaIsraeri vose, “Madekwana muchaziva kuti akanga ari Jehovha akakubudisai kubva muIjipiti," 
Exodus16:7 uye mangwanani muchaona kubwinya kwaJehovha, nokuti akanzwa kugunun'una kwenyu pamusoro pake. Tisu vanaaniko, zvamunotipopotera?”" 
Exodus16:8 Mozisi akatiwo, “Muchaziva kuti akanga ari Jehovha paachakupai nyama kuti mudye madekwana uye zvokudya zvose zvamunoda mangwanani nokuti akanzwa kugunun'una kwenyu pamusoro pake. Tisu vanaaniko? Hamusi kupopotera isu, asi Jehovha.”" 
Exodus16:9 Ipapo Mozisi akati kuna Aroni, “Udza ungano yose yaIsraeri kuti, ‘Uyai pamberi paJehovha, nokuti anzwa kupopota kwenyu.’ ”" 
Exodus16:10 Aroni achiri kutaura neungano yose yavaIsraeri vakatarisa kurenje uye vakaona kubwinya kwaJehovha kuchiratidzwa mugore. 
Exodus16:11 Jehovha akati kuna Mozisi," 
Exodus16:12 “Ndanzwa kupopota kwavaIsraeri. Vaudze kuti, ‘Panguva yorubvunzavaeni muchadya nyama, uye mangwanani muchaguta nechingwa. Ipapo muchaziva kuti ndini Jehovha Mwari wenyu.’ ”" 
Exodus16:13 Madekwana iwayo zvihuta zvakauya zvikafukidza musasa, uye mangwanani pakanga pane dova rakapoteredza musasa." 
Exodus16:14 Dova rakati rapera, mahwendefa matete akanga akaita samazaya echando akaonekwa pasi murenje." 
Exodus16:15 VaIsraeri vakati vazviona, vakati kuno mumwe nomumwe wavo, “Chiiko ichi?” Nokuti vakanga vasingazivi kuti chaiva chii. Mozisi akati kwavari, “Ndicho chingwa chamapiwa naJehovha kuti mudye." 
Exodus16:16 Izvi ndizvo zvakarayirwa naJehovha achiti, ‘Mumwe nomumwe anofanira kuunganidza zvinomukwanira. Utorere munhu mumwe nomumwe waunaye mutende rako omeria rimwe chete.’ ”" 
Exodus16:17 VaIsraeri vakaita sezvavakaudzwa; vamwe vakaunganidza zvakawanda, vamwe zvishoma." 
Exodus16:18 Uye pavakayera neomeri; uya akaunganidza zvizhinji haana kusara nezvakawanda, uye uya akaunganidza zvishoma haana kusara nezvishoma. Mumwe nomumwe akaunganidza zvaimukwanira." 
Exodus16:19 Ipapo Mozisi akati kwavari, “Hakuna munhu anofanira kusara nezvimwe kusvikira mangwanani.”" 
Exodus16:20 Kunyange zvakadaro hazvo, vamwe vavo havana kuteerera kuna Mozisi, vakachengeta zvimwe zvacho kusvikira mangwanani, asi zvakanga zvazara nehonye uye zvatanga kunhuwa. Saka Mozisi akavatsamwira." 
Exodus16:21 Mangwanani oga oga munhu mumwe nomumwe akaunganidza zvaimukwanira, uye zuva parakanga ropisa, zvakanyunguduka." 
Exodus16:22 Pazuva rechitanhatu, vakaunganidza zviyero zviviri, maomeri mavirib pamunhu mumwe nomumwe, uye vatungamiri veungano vakauya vakazivisa izvi kuna Mozisi." 
Exodus16:23 Iye akati kwavari, “Izvi ndizvo zvakarayirwa naJehovha: ‘Mangwana izuva rokuzorora, Sabata dzvene kuna Jehovha. Saka bikai zvamunofanira kubika uye muvidze zvamunofanira kuvidza. Chengetai zvose zvinenge zvasara, mugozvichengeta kusvikira mangwanani.’ ”" 
Exodus16:24 Saka vakazvichengeta kusvikira mangwanani, sezvavakarayirwa naMozisi, uye hazvina kunhuwa kana kuva namakonye mazviri." 
Exodus16:25 Mozisi akati, “Muzvidye iye nhasi, nokuti nhasi iSabata kuna Jehovha. Hamuzombowani chimwe chazvo pasi iye nhasi." 
Exodus16:26 Muzviunganidze kwamazuva matanhatu, asi pazuva rechinomwe, iSabata, hakuzombovi nechinhu.”" 
Exodus16:27 Kunyange zvakadaro hazvo, vamwe vanhu vakabuda kundounganidza nezuva rechinomwe, asi havana chavakawana." 
Exodus16:28 Ipapo Jehovha akati kuna Mozisi, “Muchasvika riniko muchiramba kuchengeta mirayiro yangu nezvandakurayira?" 
Exodus16:29 Rangarirai kuti Jehovha akakupai Sabata; ndokusaka pazuva rechitanhantu achikupai chingwa chamazuva maviri. Munhu mumwe nomumwe anofanira kuramba agere paari ipapo pazuva rechinomwe; hakuna anobuda kunze.” 
Exodus16:30 Saka vanhu vakazorora pazuva rechinomwe. 
Exodus16:31 Vanhu veIsraeri vakatumidza chingwa icho kuti mana. Chakanga chakachena semhodzi yekorianda uye chainaka sechingwa nouchi. 
Exodus16:32 Mozisi akati, “Izvi ndizvo zvakarayirwa naJehovha, ‘Mutore omeri yemana mugoichengetera marudzi anotevera, kuti vagoona chingwa chandakakupai kuti mudye muri murenje pandakakubudisai kubva munyika yeIjipiti.’ ”" 
Exodus16:33 Saka Mozisi akati kuna Aroni, “Tora mudziyo ugoisa omeri yemana imomo. Ipapo ugozviisa pamberi paJehovha kuti zvichengeterwe marudzi anotevera.”" 
Exodus16:34 Sokurayira kwaJehovha kuna Mozisi, Aroni akaisa mana pamberi peChipupuriro, kuti ichengetwepo." 
Exodus16:35 VaIsraeri vakadya mana kwamakore makumi mana, kusvikira vasvika kunyika yaiva navanhu; vakadya mana kusvikira vasvika pamuganhu weKenani." 
Exodus16:36 (Omeri ndiro chegumi cheefa.) 
Exodus17:1 Ungano yose yavaIsraeri yakasimuka kubva paRenje reSini, vachifamba nzvimbo nenzvimbo sokurayira kwaJehovha. Vakadzika musasa paRefidhimi, asi pakanga pasina mvura yokuti vanhu vanwe." 
Exodus17:2 Saka vanhu vakakavadzana naMozisi uye vakati, “Tipe mvura tinwe.” Mozisi akapindura akati, “Seiko muchikakavadzana neni? Seiko muchiedza Jehovha?”" 
Exodus17:3 Asi vanhu vakanga vane nyota yemvura ipapo, uye vakapopotedzana naMozisi. Vakati, “Seiko wakatibudisa muIjipiti kuti isu navana vedu nezvipfuwo zvedu tife nenyota?”" 
Exodus17:4 Ipapo Mozisi akachema kuna Jehovha akati, “Ndoiteiko navanhu ava? Votoda kunditaka namabwe.”" 
Exodus17:5 Jehovha akapindura Mozisi akati, “Famba pamberi pavanhu. Tora vamwe vavakuru vavaIsraeri uye ubate muruoko rwako tsvimbo yawakarova nayo mvura yeNairi, ugoenda." 
Exodus17:6 Ndichamira ipapo pamberi pako padombo riri paHorebhi. Urove dombo, uye mvura ichabuda pariri, kuti vanhu vanwe.” Saka Mozisi akaita izvi pamberi pavakuru vavaIsraeri." 
Exodus17:7 Uye akatumidza nzvimbo iyi kuti Masa neMeribha nokuti vaIsraeri vakakavadzana naye uye nokuti vakaedza Jehovha vachiti, “Ko, Jehovha ari pakati pedu here kana kuti kwete?”" 
Exodus17:8 VaAmareki vakuya vakarwa navaIsraeri paRefidhimu. 
Exodus17:9 Mozisi akati kuna Joshua, “Sarudza vamwe varume vokwedu ugobuda kundorwa navaAmareki. Mangwana ndichandomira pamusoro pechikomo ndine tsvimbo yaMwari mumaoko angu.”" 
Exodus17:9 Mozisi akati kuna Joshua, “Sarudza vamwe varume vokwedu ugobuda kundorwa navaAmareki. Mangwana ndichandomira pamusoro pechikomo ndine tsvimbo yaMwari mumaoko angu.”" 
Exodus17:10 Saka Joshua akarwa navaAmareki sokurayirwa kwaakaitwa naMozisi, uye Mozisi, Aroni naHuri vakakwira pamusoro pechikomo." 
Exodus17:10 Saka Joshua akarwa navaAmareki sokurayirwa kwaakaitwa naMozisi, uye Mozisi, Aroni naHuri vakakwira pamusoro pechikomo." 
Exodus17:11 Mozisi paainge akasimudza maoko ake, vaIsraeri vaikunda, asi paingoderedza maoko ake, vaAmareki vaikunda." 
Exodus17:12 Maoko aMozisi akati aneta, vakatora dombo ndokuriisa pasi pake iye akagara pamusoro paro. Aroni naHuri vakabata maoko ake vakamutsigira, mumwe kuno rumwe rutivi, mumwe kuno rumwe rutivi, kuitira kuti maoko ake arambe akatsiga kusvikira madekwena." 
Exodus17:13 Saka Joshua akakunda hondo yavaAmareki nomunondo. 
Exodus17:13 Saka Joshua akakunda hondo yavaAmareki nomunondo. 
Exodus17:14 Ipapo Jehovha akati kuna Mozisi, “Nyora izvi mubhuku chive chinhu chingarangarirwa uye uve nechokwadi kuti Joshua azvinzwa, nokuti ndichabvisa chirangaridzo chose cheAmareki pasi pedenga.”" 
Exodus17:14 Ipapo Jehovha akati kuna Mozisi, “Nyora izvi mubhuku chive chinhu chingarangarirwa uye uve nechokwadi kuti Joshua azvinzwa, nokuti ndichabvisa chirangaridzo chose cheAmareki pasi pedenga.”" 
Exodus17:15 Mozisi akavaka aritari akaitumidza kuti “Jehovha ndiye Mureza wangu.” 
Exodus17:16 Akati, “Nokuti maoko akasimudzirwa kumusoro kuchigaro choushe chaJehovha. Jehovha acharwa neAmareki kubva kumarudzi kusvika kumarudzi.”" 
Exodus18:1 Zvino Jeturo, muprista weMidhiani uye ari tezvara waMozisi, akanzwa zvinhu zvose zvakaitirwa Mozisi naMwari uye nokuvanhu vake ivo vaIsraeri, uye kuti Jehovha akanga abudisa vaIsraeri sei kubva muIjipiti." 
Exodus18:2 Shure kwokunge Mozisi adzosera Zipora mukadzi wake, tezvara wake Jeturo akagamuchira Zipora" 
Exodus18:3 navanakomana vake vaviri. Mumwe mwanakomana akatumidzwa kunzi Gerishomi nokuti akati, “Ndava mutorwa munyika yavamwe;”" 
Exodus18:4 uye mumwe akatumidzwa kunzi Eriezeri, nokuti akati, “Mwari wababa vangu akanga ari mubatsiri wangu; akandiponesa kubva pamunondo waFaro.”" 
Exodus18:5 Jeturo, tezvara waMozisi, pamwe chete navanakomana vaMozisi nomukadzi wake, vakauya kwaari kurenje, kwaakanga akadzika musasa pedyo negomo raMwari." 
Exodus18:6 Jeturo akanga atumira shoko kwaari achiti, “Ini, tezvara wako Jeturo, ndiri kuuya kwauri nomukadzi wako navanakomana vako vaviri.”" 
Exodus18:7 Saka Mozisi akabuda kundochingamidza tezvara wake uye akakotama pasi akamutsvoda. Vakakwazisana ndokubva vapinda mutende. 
Exodus18:8 Mozisi akataurira tezvara wake zvinhu zvose zvakaitwa naJehovha kuna Faro nokuvaIjipita nokuda kwavaIsraeri, uyewo nokutambudzika kwavakasangana nako munzira, uye kuti Jehovha akavaponesa sei." 
Exodus18:9 Jeturo akafara kunzwa nezvezvinhu zvose zvakanaka zvakaitirwa vaIsraeri naJehovha, mukuvanunura kubva muruoko rwavaIjipita." 
Exodus18:10 Akati, “Jehovha ngaarumbidzwe, iye akakununura kubva muruoko rwavaIjipita norwaFaro, uye iye akanunura vanhu kubva muruoko rwavaIjipita." 
Exodus18:11 Zvino ndava kuziva kuti Jehovha mukuru kupfuura vamwe vamwari vose, nokuti akaita izvi kuna avo vakabata vaIsraeri nokuzvikudza.”" 
Exodus18:12 Ipapo Jeturo, tezvara waMozisi, akauya nechipiriso chinopiswa nezvimwewo zvibayiro kuna Mwari, uye Aroni akauya navakuru vose veIsraeri kuti vazodya chingwa pamwe chete natezvara waMozisi pamberi paMwari." 
Exodus18:13 Fume mangwana, Mozisi akagara pachigaro chake kuti ashande somutongi wavanhu, uye ivo vakamira vakamupoteredza kubva mangwanani kusvikira madekwana." 
Exodus18:14 Tezvara wake akati aona zvose zvakanga zvichiitwa naMozisi kuvanhu, akati, “Chiiko ichi chauri kuitira vanhu? Seiko iwe uchitonga uri woga, asi vanhu vose ava vamire vakakupoteredza kubva mangwanani kusvikira madekwana?”" 
Exodus18:15 Mozisi akamupindura akati, “Nokuti vanhu vanouya kwandiri kuzotsvaka kuda kwaMwari." 
Exodus18:16 Pose pavanouya negakava vanouya kwandiri, uye ini ndotonga pakati pavo uye ndovazivisa mitemo nemirayiro yaMwari.”" 
Exodus18:17 Tezvara waMozisi akapindura akati, “Zvauri kuita hazvina kunaka." 
Exodus18:18 Iwe navanhu ava vanouya kwauri muchangozvinetsa chete. Basa iri rinorema kwazvo kwauri; haungagoni kuriita uri woga. 
Exodus18:19 Nditeerere iye zvino uye ndichakupa zano, uye Mwari ngaave newe. Iwe unofanira kuva mumiririri wavanhu pamberi paMwari uye iwe ugouyisa magakava avo kwaari." 
Exodus18:20 Uvadzidzise mitemo uye mirayiro, ugovaratidza nzira yokurarama namabasa avanofanira kuita." 
Exodus18:21 Asi sarudza varume vanokwanisa kubva pakati pavanhu vose, varume vanotya Mwari, varume vakatendeka vanovenga fufuro, ugovagadza samachinda pamusoro pezviuru, pamusoro pamazana, pamusoro pamakumi mashanu napamusoro pegumi." 
Exodus18:22 Uvaite kuti vashande savatongi vavanhu panguva dzose, asi uvaite kuti vauye kwauri nenyaya dzose dzakaoma; nyaya dzakareruka ngavatonge ivo pachavo. Izvozvo zvicharerutsa mutoro wako, nokuti vanenge vachigovana newe." 
Exodus18:23 Kana uchiita izvi uye Mwari achikurayira, uchagona kutakura mutoro uyu, uye vanhu vose ava vachaenda kudzimba vagutsikana.”" 
Exodus18:24 Mozisi akateerera tezvara wake akaita zvinhu zvose zvaakareva. 
Exodus18:25 Akasarudza varume vaikwanisa kubva pakati pavaIsraeri vose akavaita vatungamiriri vavanhu, akavaita vabati vezviuru, vabati vamazana, vabati vamakumi mashanu, navabati vegumi." 
Exodus18:26 Vakashanda savatongi vavanhu nguva dzose. Mhaka dzakaoma ndidzo dzavakauya nadzo kuna Mozisi, asi dzakareruka ndivo vaitonga ivo pachavo." 
Exodus18:27 Ipapo Mozisi akatendera tezvara wake kuti aende hake, uye Jeturo akadzokera kunyika yake." 
Exodus19:1 Mumwedzi wechitatu shure kwokunge vaIsraeri vabva kuIjipiti, pazuva racho iroro, vakasvika kuRenje reSinai." 
Exodus19:2 Shure kwokusimuka kwavo kubva paRefidhimu, vakapinda muRenje reSinai, uye vaIsraeri vakadzika misasa imomo murenje pamberi pegomo." 
Exodus19:3 Ipapo Mozisi akakwira kuna Mwari, uye Jehovha akadana kwaari ari mugomo akati, “Izvi ndizvo zvaunofanira kutaura kuimba yaJakobho uye zvaunofanira kuudza vanhu veIsraeri:" 
Exodus19:4 ‘Iwe pachako wakaona zvandakaita kuIjipiti, uye kuti ndakakutakurai sei pamapapiro egondo ndikakusvitsai kwandiri." 
Exodus19:5 Zvino kana muchinditeerera nomwoyo wose uye mukachengeta sungano yangu, ipapo muchava pfuma yangu chaiyo pakati pendudzi dzose. Kunyange hazvo nyika yose iri yangu," 
Exodus19:6 muchava kwandiri umambo hwavaprista uye rudzi rutsvene.’ Aya ndiwo mashoko aunofanira kutaura kuvaIsraeri.” 
Exodus19:7 Saka Mozisi akadzokera akadana vakuru vavanhu uye akaisa pamberi pavo mashoko ose aakanga arayirwa naJehovha kuti ataure. 
Exodus19:8 Vanhu vose vakapindura pamwe chete vachiti, “Tichaita zvose zvakarehwa naJehovha.” Saka Mozisi akadzosera mhinduro yavo kuna Jehovha." 
Exodus19:9 Jehovha akati kuna Mozisi, “Ndiri kuzouya kwauri ndiri mugore gobvu, kuitira kuti vanhu vagondinzwa ndichitaura newe uye vagoramba vachivimba newe.” Ipapo Mozisi akaudza Jehovha zvakanga zvarehwa navanhu." 
Exodus19:10 Uye Jehovha akati kuna Mozisi, “Enda kuvanhu undovanatsa nhasi namangwana. Uite kuti vashambidze nguo dzavo" 
Exodus19:11 uye vange vagadzirira nezuva rechitatu, nokuti nezuva iroro Jehovha achaburuka paGomo reSinai pamberi pavanhu vose." 
Exodus19:12 Uisire vanhu miganhu yakapoteredza gomo ugovaudza kuti, ‘Chenjerai kuti murege kukwira mugomo kana kubata mujinga maro. Ani naani achabata gomo achaurayiwa, zvirokwazvo." 
Exodus19:13 Zvirokwazvo achatakwa namabwe kana kubayiwa nemiseve; hakuna ruoko ruchamubata. Angava munhu kana chipfuwo, haangatenderwi kurarama.’ Vangakwira havo kugomo kana bedzi hwamanda yorunyanga rwegondohwe yaramba ichirira.”" 
Exodus19:14 Shure kwokuburuka kwaMozisi mugomo achienda kuvanhu, akavanatsa, uye ivo vakashambidza nguo dzavo." 
Exodus19:15 Ipapo akati kuvanhu, “Zvigadzirirei nezvezuva rechitatu. Murege kurara navakadzi venyu.”" 
Exodus19:16 Panguva yamangwanani yezuva rechitatu pakava nokutinhira uye nemheni, negore gobvu rakafukidza gomo, uye kurira kukuru kwehwamanda. Munhu wose aiva mumisasa akadedera." 
Exodus19:17 Ipapo Mozisi akatungamirira vanhu vachibuda mumisasa kuti vandosangana naMwari, uye vakandomira mujinga megomo." 
Exodus19:18 Gomo reSinai rakanga rakafukidzwa noutsi, nokuti Jehovha akanga aburukira pamusoro paro ari mumoto. Utsi hwakapfungaira huchikwira kumusoro soutsi hwakanga huchibva pavira romoto, gomo rose rakazungunuka nesimba guru," 
Exodus19:19 uye inzwi rehwamanda rakanyanya kurira nokurira kukuru. Ipapo Mozisi akataura uye inzwi raMwari rikamupindura. 
Exodus19:20 Jehovha akaburukira pamusoro peGomo reSinai uye akadana Mozisi kuti auye pamusoro pegomo. Saka Mozisi akakwirako 
Exodus19:21 uye Jehovha akati kwaari, “Buruka unoyambira vanhu kuti varege kumanikidzira kupinda kuti vandoona Jehovha vazhinji vavo vakazofa." 
Exodus19:22 Kunyange vaprista, vanoswedera kuna Jehovha, vanofanira kuzvinatsa, kuti Jehovha arege kuvaparadza.”" 
Exodus19:23 Mozisi akati kuna Jehovha, “Vanhu havangakwiri muGomo reSinai, nokuti imi pachenyu makatiyambira mukati, ‘Isai miganhu yakapoteredza gomo uye muritsaure kuti rive dzvene.’ ”" 
Exodus19:24 Jehovha akapindura akati, “Buruka undotora Aroni ukwire naye kuno. Asi vaprista navanhu havafaniri kumanikidzira kusvika kuno kuna Jehovha, nokuti angavaparadza.”" 
Exodus19:25 Saka Mozisi akaburuka akaenda kuvanhu akandovaudza. 
Exodus20:1 Uye Mwari akataura mashoko aya ose akati: 
Exodus20:2 “Ndini Jehovha Mwari wako, akakubudisa kubva muIjipiti, munyika youranda." 
Exodus20:3 “Usava navamwe vamwari kunze kwangu. 
Exodus20:4 “Usazviitira mufananidzo wechinhu chipi zvacho chiri kudenga kumusoro kana wechiri panyika pasi kana wechiri mumvura. 
Exodus20:5 Usazvipfugamira kana kuzvinamata, nokuti ini Jehovha Mwari wako, ndiri Mwari ane godo, ndinoranga vana nokuda kwechivi chamadzibaba kusvikira kurudzi rwechitatu norwechina rwaavo vanondivenga," 
Exodus20:6 asi ndicharatidza rudo kumarudzi ane chiuru, avo vanondida uye vanochengeta mirayiro yangu." 
Exodus20:7 “Usareva zita raJehovha Mwari wako pasina nokuti Jehovha haazoregi kupa mhosva munhu upi zvake anoreva zita rake pasina. 
Exodus20:8 “Rangarira zuva reSabata kuti urichengete riri dzvene. 
Exodus20:9 Uchashanda mazuva matanhatu nokuita basa rako rose," 
Exodus20:10 asi zuva rechinomwe iSabata kuna Jehovha Mwari wako. Pazuva iroro hamufaniri kuita basa ripi zvaro, iwe kana mwanakomana wako, kana mwanasikana wako, murandarume wako kana murandakadzi wako, uye zvipfuwo zvako kana mutorwa ari mukati mamasuo ako." 
Exodus20:11 Nokuti mumazuva matanhatu Jehovha akaita matenga nenyika, gungwa, nezvose zviri mariri, asi akazorora nomusi wechinomwe. Naizvozvo Jehovha akaropafadza zuva reSabata akariita dzvene." 
Exodus20:12 “Kudza baba vako namai vako, kuti ugorarama mazuva mazhinji munyika yaunopiwa naJehovha Mwari wako." 
Exodus20:13 “Usauraya. 
Exodus20:14 “Usaita upombwe. 
Exodus20:15 “Usaba. 
Exodus20:16 “Usapupurira muvakidzani wako nhema. 
Exodus20:17 “Usachiva imba yomuvakidzani wako. Usachiva mukadzi womuvakidzani wako, kana murandarume wake, kana murandakadzi wake, kana nzombe yake, kana mbongoro yake, kana chinhu chipi zvacho chomuvakidzani wako.”" 
Exodus20:18 Vanhu vakati vaona mheni nomutinhiro uye vanzwa hwamanda, uye vaona gomo richipfungaira utsi, vakadedera nokutya. Vakagara vari chinhambwe" 
Exodus20:19 vakati kuna Mozisi, “Taura iwe kwatiri uye tichakuteerera. Asi usarega Mwari achitaura nesu, kuti tirege kufa.”" 
Exodus20:20 Mozisi akati kuvanhu, “Musatya. Mwari auya kuzokuedzai, kuitira kuti kutya Mwari kugova nemi, kuti murege kutadza.”" 
Exodus20:21 Vanhu vakaramba vari chinhambwe, Mozisi paakanga achiswedera kurima gobvu kwakanga kuna Mwari." 
Exodus20:22 Ipapo Jehovha akati kuna Mozisi, “Taurira vaIsraeri kuti, ‘Mazvionera pachenyu kuti ndataura kwamuri ndiri kudenga ndikati:" 
Exodus20:23 Musaita vamwari vapi zvavo kunze kwangu; musazviitira vamwari vesirivha kana vamwari vegoridhe. 
Exodus20:24 “ ‘Mundiitire aritari yevhu mugobayira pamusoro payo zvipiriso zvinopiswa uye zvipiriso zvokuwadzana, makwai enyu, mbudzi dzenyu nemombe dzenyu. Pose pandichaita kuti zita rangu rikudzwe, ndichauya kwamuri ndigokuropafadzai." 
Exodus20:25 Kana muchindiitira aritari yamabwe, musaivaka namabwe akavezwa, nokuti mungazoisvibisa kana mukashandisa mbezo pairi." 
Exodus20:26 Uye musakwira kuaritari yangu namatanho, kuti kusasimira kwenyu kurege kuonekwa muri pairi.’" 
Exodus21:1 “Iyi ndiyo mirayiro yaunofanira kumisa pamberi pavo: 
Exodus21:2 “Kana ukatenga muranda wechiHebheru, anofanira kukushandira kwamakore matanhatu. Asi mugore rechinomwe, anofanira kusunungurwa aende, asina chinhu chaanoripa." 
Exodus21:3 Kana akauya ari oga, anofanira kusunungurwa aende ari oga; asi kana ano mukadzi pakuuya kwake, anofanira kuenda nomukadzi wake." 
Exodus21:4 Kana tenzi wake akamupa mukadzi uye akamuberekera vanakomana kana vanasikana, mukadzi navana vake vachava vatenzi wake, uye murume chete ndiye achasunungurwa kuti aende hake." 
Exodus21:5 “Asi muranda akati, ‘Ndinoda tenzi wangu uye mukadzi wangu navana uye handisi kuda kusunungurwa,’" 
Exodus21:6 ipapo tenzi wake anofanira kuenda naye pamberi pavatongi. Achaenda naye pamukova kana pagwatidziro romukova agomubvoora nzeve yake norunji. Ipapo achava muranda wake kwoupenyu hwake hwose. 
Exodus21:7 “Kana munhu akatengesa mwanasikana wake kuti ave murandakadzi, iyeye haafaniri kusunungurwa kuti aende sezvinoita varandarume." 
Exodus21:8 Kana asingafadzi tenzi akamusarudza kuti ave wake, anofanira kumurega kuti adzikinurwe. Haana mvumo yokumutengesa kuvatorwa, nokuti aputsa chitenderano naye." 
Exodus21:9 Kana akamusarudzira mwanakomana wake, anofanira kumupa kodzero dzomwanasikana." 
Exodus21:10 Kana akawana mumwe mukadzi, haafaniri kutapudza zvokudya zvowokutanga, nguo kana kodzero dzokuwanikwa." 
Exodus21:11 Kana asingamupi zvinhu zvitatu izvi, anofanira kuenda akasununguka pasina kana mari yaanoripa." 
Exodus21:12 “Ani naani anorova munhu uye akamuuraya, zvirokwazvo naiye achaurayiwa." 
Exodus21:13 Kunyange zvakadaro hazvo, kana asingazviiti nobwoni, asi Mwari atendera kuti zviitike, iye anofanira kutizira kunzvimbo yandichatsaura." 
Exodus21:14 Asi kana munhu akaronga uye akauraya mumwe munhu nobwoni, mumubvise paaritari yangu uye mumuuraye." 
Exodus21:15 “Ani naani anorova baba vake kana mai vake anofanira kuurayiwa. 
Exodus21:16 “Ani naani anoba mumwe munhu uye akamutengesa kana kuti akawanikwa achinaye paanenge abatwa, anofanira kuurayiwa." 
Exodus21:17 “Ani naani anotuka baba vake kana mai vake anofanira kuurayiwa. 
Exodus21:18 “Kana vanhu vakakakavadzana uye mumwe akarova mumwe nebwe kana nechibhakera chake uye akasafa asi akavata panhoo," 
Exodus21:19 munhu arova haazobatwi nemhosva kana mumwe wacho akamuka akafambafamba kunze nomudonzvo wake; kunyange zvakadaro hazvo, anofanira kuripa munhu akakuvara nokuda kwokurasikirwa kwake nenguva yake uye aone kuti apora zvachose." 
Exodus21:20 “Kana munhu akarova murandarume wake kana murandakadzi netsvimbo uye muranda akafa nokuda kwokurohwa, anofanira kurangwa," 
Exodus21:21 asi haafaniri kurangwa kana muranda akamuka shure kwezuva rimwe chete kana maviri, sezvo muranda ari mudziyo wake." 
Exodus21:22 “Kana varume vachirwa vakarova mukadzi ane mimba uye akabereka gavamwedzi asi asina kukuvara zvakanyanya, nyakupara mhosva anofanira kuripiswa zvose zvazvo zvinodiwa nomurume wacho uye zvinobvumirwa nedare remhosva." 
Exodus21:23 Asi kana pane kukuvara kwakaipisisa, unofanira kutora upenyu noupenyu," 
Exodus21:24 ziso neziso, zino nezino, ruoko noruoko, tsoka netsoka," 
Exodus21:25 kutsva nokutsva, ronda neronda, vanga nevanga." 
Exodus21:26 “Kana munhu akarova murandarume kana murandakadzi paziso uye akariparadza, anofanira kurega muranda achienda akasununguka kuti atsive ziso rake." 
Exodus21:27 Uye kana akabvisa zino romurandarume kana romurandakadzi, anofanira kurega muranda aende akasununguka kuti atsive zino rake." 
Exodus21:28 “Kana hando ikatunga murume kana mukadzi akafa, hando iyoyo inofanira kutakwa namambwe kusvika yafa, uye nyama yayo haifaniri kudyiwa." 
Exodus21:29 Kunyange zvakadaro hazvo, kana hando yanga ine tsika yokutunga uye muridzi wayo akamboyambirwa hake asi akasaipfigira mudanga uye ikauraya murume kana mukadzi, hando iyo inofanira kutakwa namabwe uyewo muridzi wayo anofanira kuurayiwa." 
Exodus21:30 Kunyange zvakadaro hazvo, kana pachidikanwa muripo unobva kwaari angadzikinura hake upenyu hwake nokuripa zvose zvazvo zvinodikanwa." 
Exodus21:31 Murayiro uyu unobatawo kana hando iyi yatunga mwanakomana kana mwanasikana. 
Exodus21:32 Kana hando ikatunga murandarume kana murandakadzi, muridzi wayo anofanira kuripa mashekeri esirivha makumi matatua kuna tenzi womuranda, uye hando inofanira kutakwa namabwe." 
Exodus21:33 “Kana munhu akafukunura gomba kana kuchera rimwe gomba uye akarega kurifusira uye nzombe kana mbongoro ikawira mariri," 
Exodus21:34 muridzi wegomba anofanira kuripa kurasikirwa uku; anofanira kuripira muridzi wayo, uye chipfuwo chafa chichava chake." 
Exodus21:35 “Kana hando yomumwe munhu ikakuvadza hando yomumwe uye ikafa, vanofanira kutengesa mhenyu yacho uye vagogovana zvakaenzana mari yacho vari vaviri, uye nemombe yakafawo." 
Exodus21:36 Kunyange zvakadaro, kana zvakanga zvichizivikanwa kuti hando iyi yagara ine tsika yokutunga, asi muridzi akasaipfigira mudanga, muridzi anofanira kuripa chipfuwo nechipfuwo, uye chipfuwo chafa chichava chake." 
Exodus22:1 “Kana munhu akaba nzombe kana gwai uye akauraya kana kutengesa anofanira kuripa mombe shanu nokuda kwenzombe uye makwai mana pagwai rimwe chete. 
Exodus22:2 “Kana mbavha ikabatwa ichipaza uye ikarohwa ikafa, nyakudzivirira haana mhosva yokuteura ropa;" 
Exodus22:3 asi kana zvikaitika shure kwokubuda kwezuva, anenge ane mhosva yokuteura ropa. “Mbavha inofanira kudzora zvayaba, asi kana asina chinhu, iye anofanira kutongeswa kuti aripe umbavha hwake." 
Exodus22:4 “Kana chipfuwo chakabiwa chikawanikwa chichiri chipenyu muruoko rwake, ingava nzombe kana mbongoro kana gwai, iye anofanira kuripa zvava zviviri." 
Exodus22:5 “Kana munhu akafudza zvipfuwo zvake mumunda kana mumunda womuzambiringa uye akarega zvipfuwo zvake zvichidya mumunda womunhu, anofanira kudzorera zvakaisvonaka zvinobva mumunda wake kana mumunda wake womuzambiringa." 
Exodus22:6 “Kana moto ukapfuta uye ukapararira muzvikwenzi zveminzwa zvokuti unopisa mirwi yezviyo kana zviyo zvimire, kana munda wose, munhu abatidza moto anofanira kudzorera nomuripo." 
Exodus22:7 “Kana munhu akapa muvakidzani wake sirivha kana zvinhu kuti achengete zvichibva zvabiwa kubva mumba momuvakidzani, mbavha yacho, kana ikabatwa, inofanira kuripa zvakapetwa kaviri." 
Exodus22:8 Asi kana mbavha isina kuwanikwa, muridzi wemba anofanira kumira pamberi pavatongi kuti zvionekwe kana akaisa ruoko rwake pazvinhu zvomumwe munhu." 
Exodus22:9 Panyaya dzose dzokuchengeta zvisiri pamutemo, nzombe, mbongoro, gwai, nguo kana chimwewo zvacho chakarasika chinonzi nomumwe munhu, ‘Ndechangu ichi’, vaviri ava vanofanira kuuya nenyaya dzavo pamberi pavatongi. Munhu uyo achanzi ane mhosva navatongi anofanira kuripira muvakidzani wake zvakapetwa kaviri." 
Exodus22:10 “Kana munhu akapa mbongoro, nzombe, gwai kana chipfuwo chipi zvacho kumuvakidzani wake kuti achengete chichibva chafa kana kukuvara kana kutorwa pasina anozviona," 
Exodus22:11 nyaya iri pakati pavo inofanira kugadziriswa nokuita mhiko pamberi paJehovha yokuti muvakidzani haana kuisa maoko ake pazvinhu zvomumwe munhu. Muridzi anofanira kugamuchira izvi, uye hapana muripo unodikanwa apa." 
Exodus22:12 Asi kana chipfuwo chakabiwa kubva kumuvakidzani, iye anofanira kudzorera kumuridzi nomuripo." 
Exodus22:13 Kana chakabvarurwabvarurwa nechikara chesango, iye achauyisa zvakasara zvacho zvive umboo uye haazosungirwi kuripa chipfuwo chakabvamburwa." 
Exodus22:14 “Kana munhu akakwereta chipfuwo kubva kumuvakidzani wake uye icho chikakuvara kana kufa, muridzi wacho asipo, iye anofanira kuripa." 
Exodus22:15 Asi kana muridzi ane chipfuwo chacho, akwereta haafaniri kuzoripa. Kana chipfuwo ichi changa chichiripirwa mari yokuchishandisa, mari yakaripwa yacho ndiyo inozozadzisa kurasikirwa kwake." 
Exodus22:16 “Kana murume akanyengera musikana anenge ari mhandara asina kutsidzira kuti awanikwe uye akavata naye, iye anofanira kubvisa roora, uye achava mukadzi wake." 
Exodus22:17 Kana baba vake vasingadi zvachose kuti vamupe kwaari, anofanira bedzi kubvisa roora rinobvisirwa mhandara." 
Exodus22:18 “Usatendera muroyikadzi kuti ararame. 
Exodus22:19 “Ani naani anoita chipfuwo mukadzi anofanira kuurayiwa. 
Exodus22:20 “Ani naani anobayira kuna mwari upi zvake kunze kwangu anofanira kuparadzwa. 
Exodus22:21 “Usabata mutorwa zvakaipa kana kumudzvinyirira, nokuti imi makanga muri vatorwa muIjipiti." 
Exodus22:22 “Musaitira zvakaipa chirikadzi nenherera. 
Exodus22:23 Kana mukaita izvozvo uye ivo vakachema kwandiri, zvirokwazvo ndichanzwa kuchema kwavo." 
Exodus22:24 Kutsamwa kwangu kuchamuka, uye ndichakuurayai nomunondo; vakadzi venyu vachava chirikadzi uye vana venyu vachava nherera." 
Exodus22:25 “Kana mukakweretesa mari kuno mumwe wavanhu vangu vari pakati penyu vanoshaya, musaita somunhu webasa rokukweretesa; musamuripisa yava nemhindu." 
Exodus22:26 Kana ukatora jasi romuvakidzani wako sechitsidzo, uridzorere kwaari zuva rodoka," 
Exodus22:27 nokuti jasi rake ndicho chifukidzo bedzi chaanacho chomuviri wake. Achavata akafukeiko. Paanochema kwandiri, ini ndichanzwa, nokuti ndine tsitsi." 
Exodus22:28 “Usamhura Mwari kana kutuka mutongi wavanhu vako. 
Exodus22:29 “Usarega kupa zvipiriso zvinobva mumatura ako kana muzvisviniro zvako. “Unofanira kundipa dangwe ravanakomana vako. 
Exodus22:30 Muite zvimwe chetezvo kumombe dzenyu nokumakwai enyu. Murege zvigare mazuva manomwe navanamai vazvo, asi muzvipe kwandiri pazuva rorusere." 
Exodus22:31 “Munofanira kuva vanhu vangu vatsvene. Saka musadya nyama yechipfuwo chakabvamburwa nezvikara zvesango, muikandire kumbwa." 
Exodus23:1 “Usaparadzira mashoko enhema. Usabatsira munhu akaipa nokuva chapupu chakaipa. 
Exodus23:2 “Usatevedzera vanhu vazhinji pakuita zvakaipa. Paunopa umboo mudare redzimhosva, usaminamisa kururamisira uchienda kurutivi rworuzhinji," 
Exodus23:3 uye usatsaura munhu murombo pamhaka yake. 
Exodus23:4 “Kana ukaona nzombe yomuvengi wako kana mbongoro yake yarasika, ona kuti waidzosera kwaari." 
Exodus23:5 Kana ukaona mbongoro yomunhu anokuvenga yawira pasi nokuda kwokuremerwa, usaisiya ipapo; iva nechokwadi kuti wamubatsira pairi." 
Exodus23:6 “Usaramba kururamisira varombo vavanhu vokwako pamatare edzimhosva. 
Exodus23:7 Usava nechokuita nokupomerwa kwemhosva yenhema uye usatongera rufu munhu asina mhosva, kana munhu akatendeka, nokuti ini handizopembedzi munhu ane mhosva." 
Exodus23:8 “Usagamuchira fufuro, nokuti fufuro inopofumadza vaya vanoona uye inomonyorora mashoko owakarurama." 
Exodus23:9 “Musadzvinyirira mutorwa; imi pachenyu munoziva kuti zvakaita sei kuva mutorwa, nokuti makanga muri vatorwa muIjipiti." 
Exodus23:10 “Makore matanhatu munofanira kudyara minda yenyu mugokohwa zvirimwa," 
Exodus23:11 asi pagore rechinomwe nyika ngairege kurimwa kana kushandiswa. Ipapo varombo vari pakati pavanhu venyu vangawanawo zvokudya kubva mairi, uye zvikara zvesango zvigodya zvavanenge vasiya. Muitewo zvimwe chetezvo kuminda yenyu yemizambiringa neyemiorivhi." 
Exodus23:12 “Muite basa renyu mazuva matanhatu, asi pazuva rechinomwe musashanda, kuitira kuti nzombe yako nembongoro yako zvizorore uye nhapwa yakaberekerwa mumba mako, nomutorwa, vazororewo." 
Exodus23:13 “Muchenjerere kuti muite zvose zvandakareva kwamuri. Musareva mazita avamwe vamwari; ngaarege kunzwikwa pamiromo yenyu. 
Exodus23:14 “Katatu pagore munofanira kepemberera mutambo kwandiri. 
Exodus23:15 “Mupemberere Mutambo weChingwa Chisina Mbiriso; mazuva manomwe, munofanira kudya chingwa chisina mbiriso, sezvandakakurayirai. Muite izvi panguva dzakatarwa mumwedzi waAbhibhi, nokuti mumwedzi iwoyo ndipo pamakabuda kubva muIjipiti. “Hakuna munhu anofanira kumira pamberi pangu asina chinhu." 
Exodus23:16 “Mupemberere Mutambo woKukohwa nezvibereko zvokutanga zvezvirimwa zvamakadyara muminda yenyu. “Mupemberere Mutambo woKuunganidza pakupera kwegore, pamunounganidza zvirimwa zvenyu kubva mumunda." 
Exodus23:17 “Vamwe vose vanofanira kumira pamberi paIshe Jehovha katatu pagore. 
Exodus23:18 “Musapa ropa rechibayiro kwandiri pamwe chete nechinhu chipi zvacho chine mbiriso. “Mafuta ezvipiriso zvangu zvomutambo haafaniri kuchengetwa kusvikira mangwana mangwanani. 
Exodus23:19 “Muuye nezvakanakisisa zvezvibereko zvokutanga zvevhu renyu kuimba yaJehovha Mwari wenyu. “Musabika mbudzana mumukaka wamai vayo. 
Exodus23:20 “Tarirai, ndiri kutumira mutumwa pamberi penyu kuti akuchengetei munzira uye kuti akusvitsei kunzvimbo yandakakugadzirirai." 
Exodus23:21 Murerekere nzeve dzenyu kwaari mugoteerera zvaanoreva. Musamumukira; iye haangazoregereri kumukira kwenyu, sezvo Zita rangu riri maari." 
Exodus23:22 Kana mukanyatsoteerera kune zvaanoreva nokuita zvose zvandinoreva, ini ndichava muvengi kuvavengi venyu uye ndichapikisa avo vanokupikisai." 
Exodus23:23 Mutumwa wangu achakutungamirirai uye agokupinzai munyika yavaAmori, vaHiti, vaPerezi, vaKenani, vaHivhi navaJebhusi, uye ndichavapedza chose." 
Exodus23:24 Musapfugamira vamwari vavo kana kuvanamata kana kuwadzana namabasa avo. Munofanira kuvaparadza uye mugoputsa matombo avo anoyera. 
Exodus23:25 Namatai Jehovha Mwari wenyu, uye maropafadzo ake achava pane zvokudya zvenyu nemvura yenyu. Ndichabvisa urwere kubva pakati penyu," 
Exodus23:26 uye hakuna achabva pamuviri kana asingabereki munyika yenyu. Ndichakupai upenyu huzere. 
Exodus23:27 “Ndichatuma kuvhundutsa kwangu pamberi penyu uye ndichauyisa nyonganiso pamusoro pendudzi dzose dzamunosangana nadzo. Ndichaita kuti vavengi venyu vose vatendeuke. Vagotiza. 
Exodus23:28 Ndichatuma mago pamberi penyu kuti adzinge vaHivhi, vaKenani navaHiti kuti vabve munzira yenyu." 
Exodus23:29 Asi handizovadzingi mugore rimwe chete, nokuti nyika ingazoita sango uye mhuka dzesango dzikakuwandirai." 
Exodus23:30 Ndichavabvisa pamberi penyu zvishoma zvishoma, kusvikira manyatsowanda kuti mutore nyika." 
Exodus23:31 “Ndichasimbisa miganhu yenyu kubva kuGungwa Dzvuku kusvikira kuGungwa ravaFiristia, uye kubva kuRenje kusvikira kuRwizi. Ndichaisa mumaoko enyu vanhu vagere munyika iyi uye imi muchavadzinga pamberi penyu." 
Exodus23:32 Musaita sungano navo kana navamwari vavo. 
Exodus23:33 Musavatendera kuti vagare munyika yenyu kuti varege kukuitai kuti munditadzire, nokuti kunamata vamwari vavo kuchava musungo kwamuri zvirokwazvo.”" 
Exodus24:1 Ipapo Iye akati kuna Mozisi, “Kwira kuna Jehovha, iwe naAroni, Nadhabhu naAbhihu, navakuru vavaIsraeri makumi manomwe. Munamate muri chinhambwe," 
Exodus24:2 asi Mozisi oga ndiye anofanira kuswedera kuna Jehovha; vamwe havafaniri kuswedera pedyo. Uye vanhu havangakwiri naye.” 
Exodus24:3 Mozisi akati aenda kundoudza vanhu mashoko ose nemirayiro yose yaJehovha, ivo vakati nenzwi rimwe chete, “Tichaita zvinhu zvose zvakarehwa naJehovha.”" 
Exodus24:4 Ipapo Mozisi akanyora zvinhu zvose zvakanga zvarehwa naJehovha. Akamuka mangwana acho mangwanani akavaka aritari mujinga megomo uye akamisa mbiru dzamabwe gumi nembiri dzichimirira marudzi gumi namaviri avaIsraeri. 
Exodus24:5 Ipapo akatuma majaya avaIsraeri, uye vakapa zvipiriso zvinopiswa uye vakabayira hando duku sezvipiriso zvokuwadzana kuna Jehovha." 
Exodus24:6 Mozisi akatora hafu yeropa akariisa mumidziyo, uye imwe hafu akaisasa paaritari." 
Exodus24:7 Ipapo akatora Bhuku reSungano akariverengera vanhu. Ivo vakati, “Tichaita zvinhu zvose zvakarehwa naJehovha; tichazviteerera.”" 
Exodus24:8 Ipapo Mozisi akatora ropa, akarisasa pamusoro pavanhu uye akati, “Iri iropa resungano yaitwa naJehovha nemi maererano namashoko aya ose.”" 
Exodus24:9 Mozisi naAroni, Nadhabhu naAbhihu uye navakuru makumi manomwe vavaIsraeri vakakwira" 
Exodus24:10 uye vakaona Mwari waIsraeri. Pasi petsoka dzake pakanga pane chimwe chinhu chakaita sechivakwa chesafiri, chakanga chichionekwa sedenga pacharo." 
Exodus24:11 Asi Mwari haana kusimudza ruoko rwake pamusoro pavatungamiri vavaIsraeri ava; vakaona Mwari, uye vakadya vakanwa." 
Exodus24:12 Jehovha akati kuna Mozisi, “Kwira kuno kwandiri pamusoro pegomo uye ugare pano, uye ndichakupa mahwendefa amabwe, ane mirayiro nemitemo zvandanyora kuti varayirwe.”" 
Exodus24:13 Ipapo Mozisi akasimuka naJoshua mubatsiri wake, uye Mozisi akakwira mugomo raMwari." 
Exodus24:13 Ipapo Mozisi akasimuka naJoshua mubatsiri wake, uye Mozisi akakwira mugomo raMwari." 
Exodus24:14 Akati kuvakuru, “Timirirei pano kusvikira tadzoka kwamuri. Aroni naHuri vanemi, uye ani naani zvake anopesana nomumwe anogona kuenda kwavari.”" 
Exodus24:15 Mozisi akati akwira mugomo, gore rakarifukidza," 
Exodus24:16 uye kubwinya kwaJehovha kwakagara pamusoro peGomo reSinai. Gore rakafukidza gomo iro kwamazuva matanhatu, uye pazuva rechinomwe, Jehovha akadana Mozisi ari mukati megore." 
Exodus24:17 KuvaIsraeri, kubwinya kwaJehovha kwaitaridzika somoto unoparadza uri pamusoro pegomo." 
Exodus24:18 Ipapo akapinda mugore paakanga achikwira mugomo. Uye akagara mugomo kwamazuva makumi mana nousiku huna makumi mana. 
Exodus25:1 Uye Jehovha akati kuna Mozisi," 
Exodus25:2 “Taurira vaIsraeri kuti vandivigire chipiriso. Unofanira kugamuchira chipiriso changu kubva kumunhu upi noupi anosundwa nomwoyo wake kuti ape. 
Exodus25:3 Izvi ndizvo zvipiriso zvaunofanira kugamuchira kubva kwavari: goridhe, sirivha, ndarira;" 
Exodus25:4 wuru yebhuruu, pepuru netsvuku uye nemicheka yakaisvonaka; makushe embudzi;" 
Exodus25:5 matehwe amakondohwe akapendwa zvitsvuku namatehwe emombe dzomugungwa; matanda omuakasia; 
Exodus25:6 mafuta omuorivhi emwenje; zvinonhuwira zvemafuta okuzodza anonhuwira uye nezvimwe zvinonhuwira; 
Exodus25:7 mabwe eonikisi nezvimwe zvinokosha zvinofanira kuiswa paefodhi napachidzitiro chechipfuva. 
Exodus25:8 “Ipapo uite kuti vaite nzvimbo yangu tsvene, uye ini ndichagara pakati pavo." 
Exodus25:9 Muite tabhenakeri iyi nemidziyo yayo yose nomufananidzo wandichakuratidza. 
Exodus25:10 “Uite kuti vaite bhokisi ramatanda omuakasia, rakareba makubhiti maviri nehafua, upamhi kubhiti nehafub, uye kubhiti nehafu pakukwira." 
Exodus25:11 Murifukidze negoridhe rakaisvonaka, mukati nokunze, uye muite hata yegoridhe yakaripoteredza." 
Exodus25:12 Muiumbire mhete dzegoridhe mugodzisungira pamakumbo aro mana, nemhete mbiri pano rumwe rutivi uye mhete mbiri kuno rumwe rutivi." 
Exodus25:13 Ipapo mugoita matanda omuakasia uye negoridhe. 
Exodus25:14 Muise matanda aya mukati memhete dziri parutivi rwebhokisi kuti mutakure bhokisi nawo. 
Exodus25:15 Matanda anofanira kugara ari mumhete dzebhokisi iri; haafaniri kubviswa. 
Exodus25:16 Ipapo mugoisa muareka chipupuriro, chandichakupai." 
Exodus25:17 “Muite chifunhiro chokuyananisa chegoridhe rakaisvonaka, makubhiti maviri nehafuc pakureba uye kubhiti nehafud paupamhi." 
Exodus25:18 Uye muite makerubhi maviri egoridhe rakapambadzirwa kumacheto echifunhiro. 
Exodus25:19 Muite kerubhi rimwe chete kuno rumwe rutivi uye kerubhi rechipiri kuno rumwe rutivi; muite bandi rimwe chete rekerubhi nechifukidzo, pamativi maviri." 
Exodus25:20 Mapapiro amakerubhi anofanira kutambanudzirwa kumusoro, akafukidzira chifunhiro. Makerubhi anofanira kutarisana, akatarira kuchifunhiro." 
Exodus25:21 Muise chifunhiro pamusoro peareka uye mugoisa muareka, Chipupuriro chandichakupai." 
Exodus25:22 Ipapo, pamusoro pechifunhiro chiri pakati pamakerubhi maviri ari pamusoro peareka yeChipupuriro, ndichasangana newe ndigokupa mirayiro yangu yose yavaIsraeri." 
Exodus25:23 “Uite tafura namatanda omuakasia yakareba makubhiti mavirie, kubhiti rimwe chetef paupamhi uye kubhiti nehafug pakukwirira." 
Exodus25:24 Muifukidzire negoridhe rakaisvonaka uye mugoipoteredza nezvakaumbwa zvegoridhe. 
Exodus25:25 Uyewo uite vhiri rinoipoteredza rino upamhi hwakaita sechanza choruokoh ugoisa goridhe rakaumbwa pamusoro pevhiri. 
Exodus25:26 Uite mhete ina dzegoridhe dzetafura ugodzisungira kumakona mana, pane makumbo ayo." 
Exodus25:27 Mhete idzi dzinofanira kuva pedyo nevhiri kuti dzibate matanda anoshandiswa kutakura tafura. 
Exodus25:28 Uite matanda omuakasia, uafukidze negoridhe uye mugotakura tafura nawo." 
Exodus25:29 Uye uite ndiro dzayo namadhishi negoridhe rakaisvonaka, uyewo namatende ayo nembiya dzokudirisa zvipiriso." 
Exodus25:30 Uise chingwa choKuvapo patafura iyi kuti chive pamberi pangu nguva dzose. 
Exodus25:31 “Uite chigadziko chomwenje chegoridhe rakaisvonaka uye ugoipambadzira pasi payo pamwe chete nerwiriko rwayo; mbiya dzayo, mabukira namaruva acho zvichava chinhu chimwe chete nacho." 
Exodus25:32 Matavi matanhatu anofanira kutambarara achibva mumativi echigadziko chomwenje, matatu kuno rumwe rutivi uye matatu kuno rumwezve." 
Exodus25:33 Mikombe mitatu yakaumbwa samaruva omuarimondi namabukira uye namaruva zvinofanira kuva padavi rimwe chete, matatu kune rimwe davi, uye zvimwe chetezvo kumativi matanhatu ose anotambarara kubva pachigadziko chomwenje." 
Exodus25:34 Uye pachigadziko chomwenje panofanira kuva nemikombe mina yakaumbwa samaruva omuarimondi ane mabukira namaruva. 
Exodus25:35 Bukira rimwe chete richava pasi pamatavi maviri okutanga anotambarara kubva pachigadziko chomwenje, bukira rechipiri riri pasi pamamwe matavi maviri, uye bukira rechitatu riri pasi pamamwezve pamatavi maviri, mativi ose ari matanhatu." 
Exodus25:36 Mabukira namatavi achava ebandi rimwe chete nechigadziko chomwenje, negoridhe rakaisvonaka rakapambadzirwa." 
Exodus25:37 “Ipapo ugoita mwenje yacho minomwe uye ugoigadzika pamusoro pacho kuitira kuti zvigovhenekera nzvimbo iri mberi kwacho. 
Exodus25:38 Mbato dzacho nendiro dzacho zvinofanira kuva zvegoridhe rakaisvonaka. 
Exodus25:39 Tarendai regoridhe rakaisvonaka rinofanira kushandiswa pachigadziko chomwenje nemimwe midziyo yose iyi. 
Exodus25:40 Uone kuti wazviita zvichienderana nomufananidzo wawakaratidzwa pagomo. 
Exodus26:1 “Uite tabhenakeri namachira gumi omucheka wakarukwa wakaisvonaka, nowebhuruu, pepuru nomutsvuku, namakerubhi akasonerwa mairi nemhizha dzamabasa amaoko." 
Exodus26:2 Machira ose anofanira kuva akaenzana, akareba makubhiti makumi maviri namaserea uye makubiti manab paupamhi." 
Exodus26:3 Ubatanidze machira mashanu pamwe chete, ugoita zvimwe chetezvo namamwe mashanu." 
Exodus26:4 Uite zvishwe zvomucheka webhuruu kurutivi rwokumucheto wejira zvakabatanidzwa pamwe chete, uye ugoita zvimwe chete nejira rokumucheto mune zvimwe zvakabatanidzwa." 
Exodus26:5 Uite zvishwe makumi mashanu pajira rimwe chete uye makumi mashanu ezvishwe pamucheto wejira rezvimwe zvakabatanidzwa, zvishwe zvitarisane chimwe nechimwe." 
Exodus26:6 Ipapo ugoita zvikoreko zvegoridhe makumi mashanu uye uzvishandise kubatanidza machira pamwe chete kuitira kuti tabhenakeri ive chinhu chimwe. 
Exodus26:7 “Uite machira amakushe embudzi etende riri pamusoro petabhenakeri, ose ave gumi nerimwe pamwe chete." 
Exodus26:8 Machira ose ari gumi nerimwe anofanira kuenzana, makubhiti makumi matatuc pakureba uye makubhiti manad paupamhi." 
Exodus26:9 Ubatanidze machira mashanu pamwe chete aite chinhu chimwe chete uye mamwe matanhatu avewo chinhu chimwe chete. Upete jira rechitanhatu kaviri pamberi petende. 
Exodus26:10 Uite zvishwe makumi mashanu pamupendero wejira rokumucheto zvakabatanidzwa uyewo pamupendero wejira rokumucheto kwamamwe akabatanidzwa. 
Exodus26:11 Ipapo ugoita zvikorekedzo zvendarira makumi mashanu ugozviisa muzvishwe kuti zvibatanidze tende pamwe chete chigova chinhu chimwe chete. 
Exodus26:12 Kana zviri zvokuwedzera urefu hwamachira etende, hafu yejira inenge yasara inofanira kurembera necheshure kwetabhenakeri." 
Exodus26:13 Machira etende anofanira kurebesa nekubhiti rimwe chetee pamativi ose ari maviri; anenge asara anofanira kurembera pamativi etabhenakeri kuti agoifukidza. 
Exodus26:14 Uite chifukidzo chetende chamatehwe amakondohwe akapendwa nezvitsvuku, uye pamusoro paizvozvo chifukidzo chamatehwe emombe dzomugungwa." 
Exodus26:15 “Uitire tabhenakeri mapuranga akati twi amatanda omuakasia. 
Exodus26:16 Puranga rimwe nerimwe rinofanira kureba makubhiti gumif uye kubhiti nehafug paupamhi," 
Exodus26:17 nembamba mbiri dzakamiswa dzakatarisana. Uite mapuranga ose etabhenakeri nenzira iyoyi. 
Exodus26:18 Uite mapuranga makumi maviri okurutivi rwezasi rwetabhenakeri 
Exodus26:19 uye uite zvigadzika zvesirivha makumi mana kuti zvive pasi pawo, zvigadziko zviviri papuranga rimwe nerimwe, chimwe chete pasi pembambo imwe neimwe." 
Exodus26:20 Kuno rumwe rutivi, rwokumusoro kwetabhenakeri, uite mapuranga makumi maviri," 
Exodus26:21 uye zvigadziko zvesirivha makumi mana. Zviviri zviri pasi pepuranga rimwe nerimwe. 
Exodus26:22 Uite mapuranga matanhatu kurutivi rwokumucheto cheto, ndiko kumavirira etabhenakeri," 
Exodus26:23 uye uite mapuranga maviri amakona okumucheto cheto. 
Exodus26:24 Pamakona maviri aya, anofanira kuva maviri maviri kubva pasi kusvikira kumusoro, uye agadzikwe mumhete imwe chete; ose ari maviri ngaava saizvozvo." 
Exodus26:25 Saka pachava namapuranga masere uye zvigadziko zvesirivha gumi nezvitanhatu, zviviri pasi pepuranga rimwe nerimwe." 
Exodus26:26 “Uyewo uite mbariro dzamatanda omuakasia: shanu dzamapuranga okuno rumwe rutivi rwetabhenakeri," 
Exodus26:27 shanu dzaaya ari pano rumwe rutivi, uye shanu dzamapuranga okumavirira, kumucheto cheto kwetabhenakeri." 
Exodus26:28 Mbariro yapakati inofanira kutandavara kubva kumucheto kusvikira kuno mumwe mucheto napakati pamapuranga. 
Exodus26:29 Ufukidze mapuranga negoridhe uye ugoita mhete dzegoridhe kuti dzigobata mbariro. Uyewo ufukidze mbariro negoridhe. 
Exodus26:30 “Umise tabhenakeri maererano nomufananidzo wawakaratidzwa mugomo. 
Exodus26:31 “Uite jira rebhuruu, nerepepuru nedzvuku nomucheka wakaisvonaka wakarukwa, namakerubhi akasonerwapo nemhizha yokusona." 
Exodus26:32 Urirembedze nezvikorekedzo zvegoridhe pamatanda mana omuakasia akafukidzwa negoridhe uye amire pamusoro pezvigadziko zvina zvesirivha. 
Exodus26:33 Urembedze jira pazvikorekedzo uye ugoisa areka yeChipupuriro shure kwechidzitiro. Chidzitiro ichi chichaparadzanisa NZVIMBO TSVENE neNZVIMBO TSVENE-TSVENE. 
Exodus26:34 Uise chifukidziro chokuyananisa pamusoro peareka yeChipupuriro iri muNZVIMBO TSVENE-TSVENE. 
Exodus26:35 Uise tafura kunze kwechidzitiro nechokumusoro kwetabhenakeri ugogadzika chigadziko chomwenje chakatarisana nayo nechezasi. 
Exodus26:36 “Pamukova wokupinda mutende uite chidzitiro chewuru yebhuruu, pepuru netsvuku uye nomucheka wakaisvonaka wakarukwa, basa romusoni anogona."
