Numbers25:8 uye akatevera muIsraeri uyo mutende. Akavabaya vose vari vaviri nepfumo kamwe chete, rikabaya muIsraeri rikapfuurira kundobaya muviri muMidhiani. Ipapo denda rakanga riri pamusoro pavaIsraeri rakaguma;" 
Numbers25:9 asi vose vakanga vafa nedenda vakasvika zviuru makumi maviri nezvina. 
Numbers25:10 Jehovha akati kuna Mozisi," 
Numbers25:11 “Finehasi mwanakomana waEreazari, mwanakomana waAroni, muprista adzora kutsamwa kwangu kubva pavaIsraeri; nokuti akanga ane shungu sedzangu nokuda kwokusakudzwa kwangu pakati pavo, saka handina kuzovaparadza neshungu dzangu." 
Numbers25:12 Naizvozvo umuudze kuti ndava kuita sungano yorugare naye. 
Numbers25:13 Iye nezvizvarwa zvake vachava nesungano youprista husingaperi, nokuti akanga ane shungu nokukudzwa kwaMwari wake, akayananisira vaIsraeri.”" 
Numbers25:14 Zita romuIsraeri akaurayiwa pamwe chete nomukadzi muMidhiani rainzi Zimuri mwanakomana waSaru, mutungamiri weimwe mhuri yaSimeoni." 
Numbers25:15 Uye zita romukadzi muMidhiani akaurayiwa rakanga richinzi Kozibhi, mwanasikana waZuri, mukuru weimwe mhuri yavaMidhiani." 
Numbers25:16 Jehovha akati kuna Mozisi," 
Numbers25:17 “Muone vaMidhiani savavengi uye mugovauraya," 
Numbers25:18 nokuti ivo vakakuonai savavengi pavakakunyengerai panyaya yePeori uye nehanzvadzi yavo Kozibhi, mwanasikana womutungamiri wavaMidhiani, iye mukadzi akaurayiwa pakauya denda nokuda kwePeori.”" 
Numbers26:1 Shure kwedenda Jehovha akati kuna Mozisi naEreazari mwanakomana waAroni, muprista," 
Numbers26:2 “Verengai ungano yose yavaIsraeri nemhuri dzavo, vose vana makore makumi maviri kana anodarika vanogona kurwa muhondo yaIsraeri.”" 
Numbers26:3 Saka Mozisi naEreazari muprista vakataura navo pamapani eMoabhu paJorodhani nechokumhiri kweJeriko vakati," 
Numbers26:4 “Verengai varume vana makore makumi maviri kana anodarika, sezvakarayirwa Mozisi naJehovha.” Ava ndivo vaIsraeri vakabuda kubva muIjipiti:" 
Numbers26:5 Zvizvarwa zvaRubheni mwanakomana wedangwe waIsraeri zvaiva: Hanoki, kwakabva mhuri yaHanoki; Paru, kwakabva mhuri yaParu;" 
Numbers26:6 Hezironi, kwakabva mhuri yaHezironi; Kami, kwakabva mhuri yaKami." 
Numbers26:7 Idzi ndidzo dzakanga dziri mhuri dzaRubheni; vakaverengwa vakanga vari zviuru makumi mana nezvitatu, namazana manomwe ana makumi matatu." 
Numbers26:8 Mwanakomana waParu akanga ari Eriabhu," 
Numbers26:9 uye vanakomana vaEriabhu vakanga vari Nemueri, Dhatani naAbhiramu. Dhatani naAbhiramu ndivo machinda eungano aya akamukira Mozisi naAroni uye vakanga vari pakati pavateveri vaKora pavakamukira Jehovha." 
Numbers26:10 Nyika yakashamisa muromo wayo ikavamedza pamwe chete naKora, chikwata ichocho pachakafa, moto pawakaparadza varume mazana maviri namakumi mashanu. Uye ivo vakava chiratidzo cheyambiro." 
Numbers26:11 Kunyange zvakadaro, rudzi rwaKora haruna kuparara." 
Numbers26:12 Zvizvarwa zvaSimeoni nemhuri dzavo zvaiva: Nemueri kwakabva mhuri yavaNemueri; Jamini, kwakabva mhuri yavaJamini; Jakini, kwakabva mhuri yavaJakini;" 
Numbers26:13 Zera, kwakabva mhuri yavaZera. Shauri kwakabva mhuri yavaShauri." 
Numbers26:14 Idzi ndidzo dzakanga dziri mhuri dzaSimeoni; pakanga pana varume zviuru makumi maviri nezviviri namazana maviri. 
Numbers26:15 Zvizvarwa zvaGadhi nemhuri dzavo zvaiva: Zofani, kwakabva mhuri yavaZofani; Hagi, kwakabva mhuri yavaHagi; Shumi, kwakabva mhuri yavaShumi;" 
Numbers26:16 Ozini, kwakabva mhuri yavaOzini; Eri, kwakabva mhuri yavaEri;" 
Numbers26:17 Arodhi, kwakabva mhuri yavaArodhi; Areri kwakabva mhuri yavaAreri." 
Numbers26:18 Idzi ndidzo dzakanga dziri mhuri dzaGadhi; vakaverengwa vakanga vari zviuru makumi mana, namazana mashanu." 
Numbers26:19 Eri naOnani vakanga vari vanakomana vaJudha, asi vakafira muKenani." 
Numbers26:20 Zvizvarwa zvaJudha nemhuri dzavo zvaiva: Shera, kwakabva mhuri yavaSherani; Perezi, kwakabva mhuri yavaPerezi; Zera, kwakabva mhuri yavaZera;" 
Numbers26:21 Zvizvarwa zvaPerezi zvaiva: Hezironi, kwakabva mhuri yavaHezironi; Hamuri, kwakabva mhuri yavaHamuri." 
Numbers26:22 Idzi ndidzo dzakanga dziri mhuri dzaJudha; vakaverengwa vakanga vari zviuru makumi manomwe nezvitanhatu, namazana mashanu." 
Numbers26:23 Zvizvarwa zvaIsakari nemhuri dzavo zvaiva: Tora, kwakabva mhuri yavaTora; Pua kwakabva mhuri yavaPua;" 
Numbers26:24 Jashubhi kwakabva mhuri yavaJashubhi; Shimironi kwakabva mhuri yavaShimironi. 
Numbers26:25 Idzi ndidzo dzakanga dziri mhuri dzaIsakari; vakaverengwa vakanga vari zviuru makumi matanhatu nezvina, namazana matatu." 
Numbers26:26 Zvizvarwa zvaZebhuruni nemhuri dzavo zvaiva: Seredhi, kwakabva mhuri yavaSeredhi; Eroni, kwakabva mhuri yavaEroni; Jareeri, kwakabva mhuri yavaJareeri." 
Numbers26:27 Idzi ndidzo dzakanga dziri mhuri dzaZebhuruni; vakaverengwa vakanga vari zviuru makumi matanhatu, namazana mashanu." 
Numbers26:28 Zvizvarwa zvaJosefa nemhuri dzavo kubudikidza naManase naEfuremu zvakanga zvakadai: 
Numbers26:29 Zvizvarwa zvaManase: Makiri kwakabva mhuri yavaMakiri (Makiri akanga ari baba vaGireadhi); Gireadhi kwakabva mhuri yavaGireadhi. 
Numbers26:30 Izvi ndizvo zvaiva zvizvarwa zvaGireadhi: Yezeri, kwakabva mhuri yaYezeri; Hereki, kwakabva mhuri yavaHereki;" 
Numbers26:31 Asirieri, kwakabva mhuri yavaAsirieri; Shekemu, kwakabva mhuri yavaShekemu;" 
Numbers26:32 Shemidha, kwakabva mhuri yavaShemidha; Heferi, kwakabva mhuri yavaHeferi." 
Numbers26:33 (Zerofehadhi mwanakomana waHeferi akanga asina vanakomana; akanga achingova navanasikana bedzi, mazita avo aiva: Mara, Noa, Hogira, Mirika naTiriza.)" 
Numbers26:34 Idzi ndidzo dzakanga dziri mhuri dzaManase; vakaverengwa vakanga vari zviuru makumi mashanu nezviviri, namazana manomwe." 
Numbers26:35 Izvi ndizvo zvaiva zvizvarwa zvaEfuremu nemhuri dzavo: Shutera, kwakabva mhuri yaShutera; Bhekeri, kwakabva mhuri yaBhekeri; Tahani, kwakabva mhuri yaTahani." 
Numbers26:36 Izvi ndizvo zvaiva zvizvarwa zvaShutera: Erani, kwakabva mhuri yaErani." 
Numbers26:37 Idzi ndidzo dzakanga dziri mhuri dzaEfuremu; vakaverengwa vakanga vari zviuru makumi matatu nezviviri, namazana mashanu. Izvi ndizvo zvaiva zvizvarwa zvaJosefa nemhuri dzavo." 
Numbers26:38 Zvizvarwa zvaBhenjamini nemhuri dzavo zvaiva: Bhera, kwakabva mhuri yavaBhera; Ashibheri, kwakabva mhuri yavaAshibheri; Ahiramu, kwakabva mhuri yaAhiramu;" 
Numbers26:39 Shufami, kwakabva mhuri yaShufami; Hufami, kwakabva mhuri yaHufami." 
Numbers26:40 Zvizvarwa zvaBhera kubudikidza naAradhi naNaamani zvaiva: Aradhi, kwakabva mhuri yavaAradhi; Naamani, kwakabva mhuri yavaNaamani." 
Numbers26:41 Idzi ndidzo dzakanga dziri mhuri dzaBhenjamini; vakaverengwa vakanga vari zviuru makumi mana nezvishanu, namazana matanhatu." 
Numbers26:42 Izvi ndizvo zvaiva zvizvarwa zvaDhani nemhuri dzavo: Shuhami, kwakabva mhuri yavaShuhami. Idzi ndidzo dzaiva mhuri dzaDhani:" 
Numbers26:43 Vose vakanga vari vemhuri yaShuhami; uye vakaverengwa vakanga vari zviuru makumi matanhatu nezvina, namazana mana." 
Numbers26:44 Zvizvarwa zvaAsheri nemhuri dzavo zvaiva: Imina, kwakabva mhuri yavaImina; Ishivhi, kwakabva mhuri yavaIshivhi; Bheria, kwakabva mhuri yavaBheria;" 
Numbers26:45 uye kubudikidza nezvizvarwa zvavaBheria: Hebheri, kwakabva mhuri yavaHebheri; Marikieri, kwakabva mhuri yavaMarikieri." 
Numbers26:46 (Asheri akanga ane mwanasikana ainzi Sera). 
Numbers26:47 Idzi ndidzo dzakanga dziri mhuri dzaAsheri; vakaverengwa vakanga vari zviuru makumi mashanu nezvitatu, namazana mana." 
Numbers26:48 Zvizvarwa zvaNafutari nemhuri dzavo zvaiva: Jazeeri, kwakabva mhuri yavaJazeeri; Guni, kwakabva mhuri yavaGuni;" 
Numbers26:49 Jezeri, kwakabva mhuri yavaJezeri; Shiremi, kwakabva mhuri yavaShiremi." 
Numbers26:50 Idzi ndidzo dzakanga dziri mhuri dzaNafutari; vakaverengwa vakanga vari zviuru makumi mana nezvishanu, namazana mana." 
Numbers26:51 Uwandu hwavanhu veIsraeri hwaisvika zviuru mazana matanhatu nechimwe, namazana manomwe ana makumi matatu." 
Numbers26:52 Jehovha akati kuna Mozisi," 
Numbers26:53 “Nyika inofanira kugoverwa kwavari senhaka zvichienderana namazita akaverengwa. 
Numbers26:54 Kuna vaya vanenge vakawanda, unofanira kuvapa nhaka huru, vashoma unovapa nhaka duku; mhuri imwe neimwe inofanira kupiwa zvakaenzana nouwandu hwokuverengwa kwavo." 
Numbers26:55 Unofanira kuona kuti nyika yagoverwa nemijenya. Nhaka ichagoverwa mhuri imwe neimwe ichange iri maererano namazita orudzi rwamadzitateguru avo. 
Numbers26:56 Nhaka imwe neimwe inofanira kugoverwa nemijenya pakati pemhuri huru nemhuri duku.” 
Numbers26:57 Ava ndivo vaRevhi vakaverengwa nemhuri dzavo: Gerishoni, kwakabva mhuri yavaGerishoni; Kohati, kwakabva mhuri yavaKohati; Merari, kwakabva mhuri yavaMerari." 
Numbers26:58 Ava ndivo vakanga vari mhuri dzaRevhi: mhuri yavaRibhini, mhuri yavaHebhuroni, mhuri yavaMari, mhuri yavaMushi, mhuri yavaKora. (Kohati akanga ari baba vaAmurami;" 
Numbers26:59 zita romukadzi waAmurami rainzi Jokebhedhi, chizvarwa chaRevhi, akaberekwa kuvaRevhi muIjipiti. Akaberekera Amurami Aroni, Mozisi nehanzvadzi yake Miriamu." 
Numbers26:60 Aroni ndiye akanga ari baba vaNadhabhi naAbhihu, Ereazari naItamari." 
Numbers26:61 Asi Nadhabhi naAbhihu vakafa pavakaita chipiriso nomoto usina kufanira pamberi paJehovha.) 
Numbers26:62 Varume vose pakati pavaRevhi, vaiva nomwedzi mumwe chete kana kupfuura pakuberekwa vaisvika zviuru makumi maviri nezvitatu. Havana kuverengwa pamwe chete navamwe vaIsraeri nokuti havana kupiwa nhaka pakati pavo." 
Numbers26:63 Ava ndivo vakaverengwa naMozisi naEreazari muprista pavakaverenga vaIsraeri pamapani eMoabhu paJorodhani uchibva mhiri kuJeriko. 
Numbers26:64 Hapana kana mumwe wavo akanga ari pakati pavaya vakaverengwa naMozisi naAroni muprista, pavakaverenga vaIsraeri murenje reSinai." 
Numbers26:65 Nokuti Jehovha akanga audza vaIsraeri avo kuti zvirokwazvo vaizofira murenje, uye hakuna kana mumwe wavo akasara kunze kwaKarebhu mwanakomana waJefune naJoshua mwanakomana waNuni." 
Numbers26:65 Nokuti Jehovha akanga audza vaIsraeri avo kuti zvirokwazvo vaizofira murenje, uye hakuna kana mumwe wavo akasara kunze kwaKarebhu mwanakomana waJefune naJoshua mwanakomana waNuni." 
Numbers27:1 Vanasikana vaZerofehadhi, mwanakomana waHeferi, mwanakomana waGireadhi, mwanakomana waMakiri, mwanakomana waManase, akanga ari wemhuri dzaManase mwanakomana waJosefa. Mazita avanasikana akanga ari: Mara, Noa, Hogira, Mirika naTiza." 
Numbers27:2 Vakasvika pamukova weTende Rokusangana vakamira pamberi paMozisi, naEreazari muprista, vatungamiri, neungano yose, vakati," 
Numbers27:3 “Baba vedu vakafira murenje. Vakanga vasiri pakati pavateveri vaKora, avo vakabatana pamwe chete kuti vamukire Jehovha, asi vakafira chivi chavowo vakasasiya vanakomana." 
Numbers27:4 Ko, zita rababa vedu ragoshayikwa seiko pamhuri yavo, nemhaka yokuti vakanga vasina mwanakomana here? Tipeiwo nhaka pakati pehama dzababa vedu.”" 
Numbers27:5 Saka Mozisi akasvitsa nyaya yavo pamberi paJehovha 
Numbers27:6 Uye Jehovha akati kwaari," 
Numbers27:7 “Zvinorehwa navanasikana vaZerofehadhi ndezvechokwadi. Zvirokwazvo unofanira kuvapa nhaka pakati pehama dzababa vavo ugodzorera nhaka yababa vavo kwavari. 
Numbers27:8 “Uti kuvaIsraeri, ‘Kana munhu akafa akasasiya mwanakomana, munofanira kudzorera nhaka yake kumwanasikana wake." 
Numbers27:9 Kana asina mwanasikana, mupe nhaka yake kumadzikoma ake kana vanun'una vake." 
Numbers27:10 Kana asina madzikoma kana vanun'una, mupe nhaka yake kuvanun'una kana madzikoma ababa vake." 
Numbers27:11 Kana baba vake vasina madzikoma kana vanun'una, mupe nhaka yake kuhama yepedyo yomumhuri yake, kuti ive yake. Uyu unofanira kuva mutemo kuvaIsraeri, sezvakarayirwa Mozisi naJehovha.’ ”" 
Numbers27:12 Ipapo Jehovha akati kuna Mozisi, “Kwira pamusoro pegomo iri romuAbharimi ugoona nyika yandakapa vaIsraeri." 
Numbers27:13 Mushure mokunge waona, newewo uchasanganiswa navanhu vokwako, sezvakaita Aroni mukoma wako," 
Numbers27:14 nokuti ungano payakandimukira pamvura yomuRenje reZini, mose muri vaviri hamuna kuteerera murayiro wangu kuti mundiremekedze somutsvene pamberi pavo.” (Iyi ndiyo mvura yapaMeribha Kadheshi, muRenje reZini.)" 
Numbers27:15 Mozisi akati kuna Jehovha," 
Numbers27:16 “Jehovha, Mwari wemweya yamarudzi ose avanhu, ngaagadze murume pamusoro peungano iyi" 
Numbers27:17 kuti abude nokupinda pamberi pavo, uyo achavabudisa nokuvapinza, kuti vanhu vaJehovha varege kuva samakwai asina mufudzi.”" 
Numbers27:18 Saka Jehovha akati kuna Mozisi, “Tora Joshua mwanakomana waNuni, murume ano mweya maari, ugoisa ruoko rwako pamusoro pake." 
Numbers27:18 Saka Jehovha akati kuna Mozisi, “Tora Joshua mwanakomana waNuni, murume ano mweya maari, ugoisa ruoko rwako pamusoro pake." 
Numbers27:19 Unofanira kumumisa pamberi paEreazari muprista napamberi peungano yose ugomurayira pamberi pavo. 
Numbers27:20 Umupe rimwe simba rako kuti ungano yose yavaIsraeri igomuteerera. 
Numbers27:21 Anofanira kumira pamberi paEreazari muprista, ndiye achamubvunzira pamberi paJehovha nokutonga kweUrimi. Pakurayira kwake, vanofanira kubuda iye neungano yose yavaIsraeri uye pakurayira kwake ivo vachapinda.”" 
Numbers27:22 Mozisi akaita sezvaakarayirwa naJehovha. Akatora Joshua akamumisa pamberi paEreazari muprista napamberi peungano yose. 
Numbers27:22 Mozisi akaita sezvaakarayirwa naJehovha. Akatora Joshua akamumisa pamberi paEreazari muprista napamberi peungano yose. 
Numbers27:23 Ipapo akaisa maoko ake pamusoro pake akamurayira, sezvakanga zvarayirwa Mozisi naJehovha." 
Numbers28:1 Jehovha akati kuna Mozisi," 
Numbers28:2 “Upe murayiro uyu kuvaIsraeri, uti kwavari, ‘Onai kuti maisa pamberi pangu panguva yakatarwa, zvokudya zvangu zvezvipiriso zvinoitwa nomoto, sezvinonhuwira zvinondifadza.’" 
Numbers28:3 Uti kwavari: ‘Ichi ndicho chipiriso chakaitwa nomoto chamunofanira kupa kuna Jehovha: makwayana maviri egore rimwe chete asina kuremara, sechipiriso chinopiswa chamazuva ose nezuva rimwe nerimwe." 
Numbers28:4 Ugadzire gwayana rimwe chete mangwanani uye rimwe racho panguva yamadekwana," 
Numbers28:5 pamwe chete nechipiriso chezviyo, chegumi cheefaa youpfu hwakatsetseka hwakavhenganiswa nechikamu chimwe chete muzvina chehinib yamafuta omuorivhi akasvinwa." 
Numbers28:6 Ichi ndicho chipiriso chinopiswa chamazuva ose chakatarwa paGomo reSinai kuti chive munhuwi unonhuwira zvinofadza, chipiriso chinoitirwa Jehovha nomoto." 
Numbers28:7 Panobayirwa gwayana rimwe nerimwe, chipiriso chokunwa chinopiwa panguva imwe cheteyo chinofanira kuva chikamu chimwe chete muzvina chehini, chezvinonhuwira zvakaviriswa. Udurure chipiriso chinonwiwa kuna Jehovha panzvimbo tsvene." 
Numbers28:8 Ugadzire gwayana rechipiri panguva dzamadekwana, pamwe chete nechipiriso chezviyo nechipiriso chinonwiwa, zvakafanana nezvamangwanani. Ichi ndicho chipiriso chinoitwa nomoto, chinonhuwira zvinofadza kuna Jehovha." 
Numbers28:9 “ ‘Nomusi weSabata, muite chipiriso chamakwayana maviri egore rimwe chete asina kuremara, pamwe chete nechipiriso chacho chokunwa, uye nechipiriso chezviyo chezvegumi zviviri zveefac youpfu hwakatsetseka, hwakavhenganiswa namafuta." 
Numbers28:10 Ichi ndicho chipiriso chinopiswa cheSabata rimwe nerimwe, pamusoro pechipiriso chinopiswa chamazuva ose uye nechipiriso chacho chinonwiwa." 
Numbers28:11 “ ‘Nomusi wokutanga womwedzi woga woga, mupe kuna Jehovha chipiriso chehando duku mbiri, gondohwe rimwe chete namakwayana makono manomwe egore rimwe chete, ose asina kuremara." 
Numbers28:12 Pamwe chete nehando imwe neimwe, panofanira kuva nechipiriso chezviyo chezvegumi zviviri zveefad yeupfu hwakatsetseka, hwakavhenganiswa namafuta;" 
Numbers28:13 uye negwayana rimwe nerimwe, chipiriso chezviyo chechegumi cheefa yeupfu hwakatsetseka, hwakavhenganiswa namafuta. Izvi ndizvo zvinoitwa pachipiriso chinopiswa, chinonhuwira chinofadza, chipiriso chinoitirwa Jehovha nomoto." 
Numbers28:14 Pamwe chete nehando imwe neimwe, panofanira kuva nechipiriso chokunwa chehafu yehini yewaini; pamwe chete negondohwe, chetatu chehinie; uye pamwe chete negwayana rimwe nerimwe, chikamu chimwe chete muzvina chehinif. Ichi ndicho chipiriso chinopiswa chomwedzi mumwe nomumwe chinofanira kupiwa pakugara kwomwedzi mumwe nomumwe pagore." 
Numbers28:15 Pamusoro pechipiriso chinopiswa chamazuva ose nechipiriso chacho chokunwa, nhongo imwe chete inofanira kupiwa sechipiriso chechivi kuna Jehovha." 
Numbers28:16 “ ‘Pazuva regumi romwedzi wokutanga munofanira kuita Pasika yaJehovha. 
Numbers28:17 Pazuva regumi namana romwedzi uyu, munofanira kuita mutambo; kwamazuva manomwe munofanira kudya chingwa chisina mbiriso." 
Numbers28:18 Pazuva rokutanga munofanira kuita ungano tsvene uye murege kuita mabasa amazuva ose. 
Numbers28:19 Mupe kuna Jehovha chipiriso chakaitwa nomoto, chipiriso chinopiswa chehando duku mbiri, gondohwe rimwe chete uye makwayana makono manomwe ane gore rimwe chete, ose asina kuremara." 
Numbers28:20 Pamwe chete nehando imwe neimwe mugadzire chipiriso chezviyo, chezvikamu zvitatu mugumi zveefa yeupfu hwakatsetseka, hwakavhenganiswa namafuta; pamwe chete negondohwe, zvikamu zviviri mugumi;" 
Numbers28:21 uye pamwe chete nerimwe nerimwe ramakwayana manomwe, chikamu chimwe chete mugumi;" 
Numbers28:22 uisewo nhongo imwe chete yembudzi sechipiriso chechivi kuti iwe uzviyananisire. 
Numbers28:23 Mugadzire izvi pamwe chete nezvipiriso zvinopiswa zvamangwanani zvamazuva ose. 
Numbers28:24 Nenzira iyi mugadzire zvokudya zvezvipiriso zvinoitwa nomoto mazuva ose kwamazuva manomwe sezvinonhuwira zvinofadza kuna Jehovha; zvinofanira kugadzirwa pamwe chete nezvipiriso zvinopiswa nechipiriso chacho chinonwiwa. 
Numbers28:25 Pazuva rechinomwe muite ungano tsvene uye murege kuita basa ramazuva ose. 
Numbers28:26 “ ‘Pazuva rezvibereko zvokutanga, pamunopa zvipiriso zvenyu kuna Jehovha, zvezvitsva zvezviyo panguva yoMutambo weMavhiki, muite ungano tsvene uye murege kuita basa ramazuva ose." 
Numbers28:27 Mupe chipiriso chinopiswa chehando duku mbiri, gondohwe rimwe chete uye makwayana manomwe makono egore rimwe chete, chive chipiriso chinofadza kuna Jehovha." 
Numbers28:28 Pamwe chete nehando imwe neimwe, panofanira kuva nechipiriso chezviyo chezvikamu zvitatu mugumi zveefa yeupfu hwakatsetseka. hwakavhenganiswa namafuta; pamwe chete negondohwe, zvikamu zviviri mugumi;" 
Numbers28:29 uye nerimwe nerimwe ramakwayana manomwe, chikamu chimwe chete mugumi." 
Numbers28:30 Muisewo nhongo imwe chete kuti muzviyananisire. 
Numbers28:31 Mugadzire izvi pamwe chete nezvipiriso zvazvo zvokunwa, pamusoro pezvipiriso zvinopiswa zvamazuva ose uye nechipiriso chacho chezviyo. Munofanira kuva nechokwadi kuti zvipfuwo zvacho hazvina kuremara." 
Numbers29:1 “ ‘Pazuva rokutanga romwedzi wechinomwe, muite ungano tsvene uye murege kubata basa ramazuva ose. Izuva rokuti muridze hwamanda." 
Numbers29:2 Munofanira kugadzirira Jehovha chipiriso chinopiswa chehando imwe chete duku, gondohwe rimwe chete uye makwayana makono manomwe egore rimwe chete, ose asina kuremara, zvive zvinonhuwira zvinofadza pamberi paJehovha." 
Numbers29:3 Mugadzire pamwe chete nehando duku chipiriso chezviyo chezvikamu zvitatu mugumi zveefaa yeupfu hwakatsetseka hwakavhenganiswa pamwe chete namafuta, negondohwe, zvikamu zviviri mugumib;" 
Numbers29:4 pamwe chete nerimwe nerimwe ramakwayana manomwe, chikamu chimwe chete mugumic." 
Numbers29:5 Muisewo nhongo imwe chete yembudzi sechipiriso chechivi kuti muzviyananisire. 
Numbers29:6 Izvi zviri kupamhidzirwa pamusoro pezvipiriso zvinopiswa zvomwedzi nomwedzi, nezvezuva nezuva uye nezvipiriso zvezviyo nezvipiriso zvokunwa sokurongwa kwazvo. Ndizvo zvipiriso zvinoitirwa Jehovha nomoto, zvinonhuwira zvinofadza." 
Numbers29:7 “ ‘Pazuva regumi romwedzi wechinomwe munofanira kuita ungano tsvene. Munofanira kuzviramba uye murege kubata basa. 
Numbers29:8 Mupe chibayiro chinopiswa chehando duku yegore rimwe chete kuna Jehovha sezvinonhuwira zvinofadza: hando imwe chete negondohwe rimwe chete uye namakwayana makono manomwe egore rimwe chete, zvisina kuremara." 
Numbers29:9 Mugadzire pamwe chete nehando, chipiriso chezviyo chezvikamu zvitatu mugumi zveefa youpfu hwakatsetseka, hwakavhenganiswa namafuta; pamwe chete negondohwe, zvikamu zviviri mugumi;" 
Numbers29:10 uye parimwe nerimwe ramakwayana manomwe, chikamu chimwe chete mugumi." 
Numbers29:11 Muisewo nhongo yembudzi sechipiriso chechivi, muchipamhidzira kuchipiriso chechivi chokuyananisira uye nechibayiro chinopiswa chamazuva ose nechipiriso chacho chezviyo, uye nezvipiriso zvazvo zvokunwa." 
Numbers29:12 “ ‘Pazuva regumi namashanu romwedzi wechinomwe, muite ungano tsvene uye musaita basa ramazuva ose. Muite mutambo wokupemberera Jehovha kwamazuva manomwe." 
Numbers29:13 Muuye nechibayiro chinopiswa kuti chive chinonhuwira zvinofadza kuna Jehovha, chibayiro chinopiswa chehando duku gumi nenhatu, makondohwe maviri namakwayana makono gumi namana egore rimwe chete, ose asina kuremara." 
Numbers29:14 Mugadzire chipiriso chezvikamu zvitatu mugumi zveefa youpfu hwakatsetseka, hwakavhenganiswa namafuta pamwe chete neimwe neimwe yehando duku gumi nenhatu; pamwe chete nerimwe nerimwe ramakondohwe maviri, zvikamu zviviri mugumi," 
Numbers29:15 uye pamwe chete nerimwe nerimwe ramakwayana gumi namana, chikamu chimwe chete mugumi." 
Numbers29:16 Muisewo nhongo yembudzi imwe chete sechipiriso chechivi, pamusoro pechipiriso chinopiswa nechipiriso chacho chezviyo nechipiriso chokunwa." 
Numbers29:17 “ ‘Pazuva rechipiri mugadzire hando duku gumi nembiri, makondohwe maviri uye makwayana makono gumi namana egore rimwe, zvose zvisina kuremara." 
Numbers29:18 Mugadzire nehando, namakondohwe uye namakwayana, zvipiriso zvezviyo nezvipiriso zvinonwiwa maererano nouwandu hwakarayirwa." 
Numbers29:19 Muisewo nhongo yembudzi imwe chete sechipiriso chechivi, muchipamhidzira kuchipiriso chamazuva ose pamwe chete nechipiriso chacho uye nezvipiriso zvazvo zvokunwa." 
Numbers29:20 “ ‘Pazuva rechitatu, mugadzire hando gumi neimwe, makondohwe maviri uye namakwayana makono gumi namana egore rimwe chete, zvose zvisina kuremara." 
Numbers29:21 Mugadzire pamwe chete nehando, makondohwe, uye namakwayana, zvipiriso zvazvo zvezviyo nezvipiriso zvokunwa maererano nouwandu hwakarayirwa." 
Numbers29:22 Muisewo nhongo yembudzi imwe chete sechipiriso chechivi, muchipamhidzira kuchipiriso chinopiswa chamazuva ose pamwe chete nechipiriso chacho chezviyo uye nechipiriso chokunwa." 
Numbers29:23 “ ‘Pazuva rechina, mugadzire hando gumi, makondohwe uye makwayana gumi namana egore rimwe chete, zvose zvisina kuremara." 
Numbers29:24 Pamwe chete nehando, namakondohwe, namakwayana, mugadzire zvipiriso zvazvo nezvipiriso zvokunwa maererano nouwandu hwakarayirwa." 
Numbers29:25 Muisewo nhongo yembudzi imwe chete sechipiriso chechivi, muchipamhidzira kuchipiriso chinopiswa chamazuva ose nechipiriso chacho chezviyo, uye nechipiriso chokunwa." 
Numbers29:26 “ ‘Pazuva rechishanu, mugadzire hando pfumbamwe, makondohwe maviri uye namakwayana makono gumi namana egore rimwe chete, zvose zvisina kuremara." 
Numbers29:27 Pamwe chete nehando, makondohwe namakwayana, mugadzire zvipiriso zvazvo zvezviyo nezvipiriso zvokunwa maererano nouwandu hwakarayirwa." 
Numbers29:28 Muisewo nhongo yembudzi imwe chete sechipiriso chechivi muchipamhidzira kuchipiriso chinopiswa chamazuva ose nechipiriso chacho chezviyo uye nechipiriso chokunwa. 
Numbers29:29 “ ‘Pazuva rechitanhatu, mugadzire hando sere, makondohwe maviri uye makwayana makono egore rimwe chete, gumi namana, zvose zvisina kuremara." 
Numbers29:30 Pamwe chete nehando, namakondohwe uye namakwayana mugadzire zvipiriso zvazvo zvezviyo nezvipiriso zvokunwa maererano nouwandu hwakarayirwa." 
Numbers29:31 Muisewo nhongo yembudzi imwe chete sechipiriso chechivi, muchipamhidzira kuchipiriso chinopiswa chamazuva ose pamwe chete nechipiriso chacho chezviyo uye nechipiriso chokunwa." 
Numbers29:32 “ ‘Pazuva rechinomwe, mugadzire hando nomwe, makondohwe maviri uye makwayana makono gumi namana egore rimwe chete, zvose zvisina kuremara." 
Numbers29:33 Pamwe chete nehando, makondohwe namakwayana mugadzire zvipiriso zvazvo zvezviyo nezvipiriso zvokunwa maererano nouwandu hwakarayirwa." 
Numbers29:34 Muisewo nhongo yembudzi imwe chete sechipiriso chechivi, muchipamhidzira kuchipiriso chinopiswa chamazuva ose pamwe chete nechipiriso chacho chezviyo uye chipiriso chokunwa." 
Numbers29:35 “ ‘Pazuva rorusere, unganai uye murege kuita basa ramazuva ose." 
Numbers29:36 Mupe chibayiro chinopiswa nomoto chive chinonhuwira zvinofadza kuna Jehovha, chibayiro chinopiswa chehando imwe chete, gondohwe rimwe chete namakwayana makono manomwe egore rimwe chete, zvose zvisina kuremara." 
Numbers29:37 Mugadzire hando, gondohwe namakwayana, zvipiriso zvezviyo nezvipiriso zvinonwiwa, maererano nouwandu hwakarayirwa." 
Numbers29:38 Muisewo nhongo imwe chete yembudzi sechipiriso chechivi, muchipamhidzira kuchipiriso chinopiswa chamazuva ose pamwe chete nechipiriso chacho chezviyo uye nechipiriso chokunwa." 
Numbers29:39 “ ‘Kupamhidzira pamusoro pezvamakapika uye zvipo zvokungopa, mugadzirire Jehovha izvi pamitambo yenyu yakatarwa: zvipiriso zvenyu zvinopiswa, zvipiriso zvezviyo, zvipiriso zvokunwa uye nezvipiriso zvokuwadzana.’ ”" 
Numbers29:40 Mozisi akataurira vaIsraeri zvose zvaakarayirwa naJehovha. 
Numbers30:1 Mozisi akati kuvakuru vamarudzi avaIsraeri, “Izvi ndizvo zvarayirwa naJehovha:" 
Numbers30:2 Kana munhu akaita mhiko kuna Jehovha kana kuzvisunga nokupika, haafaniri kuputsa shoko rake asi anofanira kuita zvose zvaakareva." 
Numbers30:3 “Kana mukadzi achiri kugara mumba mababa vake akaita mhiko kuna Jehovha kana kuti akazvisunga nokupika," 
Numbers30:4 uye baba vake vakanzwa pamusoro pezvaapika, vakasataura chinhu kwaari, ipapo zvose zvaapika uye zvose zvaazvisunga kupika zvichasimbiswa." 
Numbers30:5 Asi kana baba vake vakamudzivisa pavanonzwa nezvazvo, zvaapika zvose nezvaazvisunga nazvo achipika hazvingavi nesimba; Jehovha achamusunungura nokuti baba vake vamudzivisa." 
Numbers30:6 “Kana akawanikwa mushure mokunge aita mhiko, kana mushure mokunge muromo wake wakurumidza kutaura achivimbisa nokuzvisunga," 
Numbers30:7 uye murume wake akazvinzwa asi akasataura chinhu kwaari, ipapo mhiko dzake kana zvaakazvisunga nazvo zvichasimbiswa." 
Numbers30:8 Asi kana murume wake amudzivisa paanenge anzwa nezvazvo, anokonesa mhiko iya inomusunga, kana vimbiso yaangazvisunga nayo, uye ipapo Jehovha achamusunungura." 
Numbers30:9 “Mhiko ipi zvayo kana chisungo chaitwa nechirikadzi kana mukadzi akarambwa chichava nesimba kwaari. 
Numbers30:10 “Kana mukadzi agere nomurume akaita mhiko kana kuti akazvisunga nemhiko 
Numbers30:11 uye murume wake akanzwa nezvazvo asi akasataura chinhu kwaari uye asingamudzivisi, ipapo mhiko dzake kana zvaakazvisunga pakupika zvichava nesimba." 
Numbers30:12 Asi kana murume wake akazvikonesa paanenge anzwa nezvazvo, ipapo hapana chaakapika kana zvaakazvisunga nazvo nemhiko nezvaakataura nomuromo wake zvichava nesimba. Murume wake azvikonesa, uye Jehovha achamusunungura." 
Numbers30:13 Murume wake anogona kutsigira kana kukonesa mhiko ipi zvayo yaanopika kuti azvininipise nayo. 
Numbers30:14 Asi kana murume wake akashaya chaanotaura kwaari zuva nezuva, ipapo ari kusimbisa mhiko dzake uye zvaakapika zvinomusunga. Anozvisimbisa nokusataura kwake chinhu kwaari paanenge anzwa nezvazvo." 
Numbers30:15 Kana zvakadaro, akazozvikonesa pane dzimwe nguva, mushure mokunge azvinzwa, ipapo iye achatakura mhosva yomukadzi wake.”" 
Numbers30:16 Iyi ndiyo mitemo yakapiwa Mozisi naJehovha pamusoro poukama pakati pomurume nomukadzi wake, uye pakati pababa nomwanasikana wavo muduku agere mumba mavo." 
Numbers31:1 Jehovha akati kuna Mozisi," 
Numbers31:2 “Tsiva kuvaMidhiani zvavakaitira vaIsraeri. Shure kwaizvozvo uchandosanganiswa navanhu vako.” 
Numbers31:3 Saka Mozisi akati kuvanhu, “Shongedzai vamwe varume vokwenyu nhumbi dzokurwa kuti vaende kundorwa navaMidhiani kuti vazadzise kutsiva kwaJehovha pamusoro pavo." 
Numbers31:4 Endesai kuhondo varume chiuru kubva kurudzi rumwe norumwe rwavaIsraeri.” 
Numbers31:5 Saka varume zviuru gumi nezviviri vakashongedzerwa kundorwa, chiuru chimwe kubva kurudzi rumwe norumwe, vakauyiswa vachibva kumhuri dzavaIsraeri." 
Numbers31:6 Mozisi akavatuma kundorwa, chiuru kubva kurudzi rumwe norumwe, pamwe chete naFinehasi mwanakomana waEreazari muprista, uyo akatorawo nhumbi dzomunzvimbo tsvene nehwamanda dzokuridza pakutungamirira." 
Numbers31:7 Vakarwisa vaMidhiani, sezvakanga zvarayirwa Mozisi naJehovha, vakauraya varume vose." 
Numbers31:8 Vakaurayiwa pakati pavo ndiEvhi, Rekemu, Zuri, Huri naRebha, madzimambo mashanu avaMidhiani. Vakaurayawo nomunondo Bharamu mwanakomana waBheori." 
Numbers31:9 VaIsraeri vakatapa vakadzi vavaMidhiani navana vavo uye vakatora mombe dzose dzavaMidhiani, makwai nepfuma sezvinhu zvavakapamba." 
Numbers31:10 Vakapisa maguta ose avaMidhiani, pamwe chete nemisasa yavo yose." 
Numbers31:11 Vakatora zvose zvavakapamba, nepfuma, pamwe chete navanhu uye nezvipfuwo," 
Numbers31:12 vakauya nenhapwa, nepfuma uye nezvavakapamba kuna Mozisi naEreazari muprista, uye vaIsraeri vakaungana pamisasa yavo pamapani eMoabhu, paJorodhani uchibva mhiri kuJeriko." 
Numbers31:13 Mozisi, Ereazari navatungamiri vose veungano vakabuda kuti vandosangana navo kunze kwomusasa." 
Numbers31:14 Mozisi akatsamwira machinda ehondo, vatungamiri vezviuru navatungamiri vamazana, vakadzoka kuhondo." 
Numbers31:15 Akavabvunza akati, “Ko, makatendera vakadzi vose kuti vararame here?" 
Numbers31:16 Ndivo vakanga vachitevera zano raBharamu uye ndivo vakatsausa vaIsraeri kubva kuna Jehovha pane zvakaitika paPeori, naizvozvo denda rikauya pamusoro pavanhu vaJehovha." 
Numbers31:17 Zvino chiurayai vakomana vose. Uye muuraye mukadzi mumwe nomumwe akavata nomurume," 
Numbers31:18 asi muzvisiyire musikana mumwe nomumwe asina kuvata nomurume. 
Numbers31:19 “Imi mose makauraya ani zvake kana kubata ani zvake akaurayiwa, munofanira kugara kunze kwomusasa kwamazuva manomwe. Pazuva rechitanhatu nezuva rechinomwe, munofanira kuzvinatsa imi nenhapwa dzenyu." 
Numbers31:20 Munatse nguo imwe neimwe pamwe chete nezvose zvakaitwa namatehwe, mvere dzembudzi kana makushe ehwai.”" 
Numbers31:21 Ipapo Ereazari muprista akati kuvarwi vakanga vaenda kuhondo, “Hezvino zvinodikanwa" 
Numbers31:22 pamurayiro wakapiwa Mozisi naJehovha: goridhe, sirivha, ndarira, simbi, tini, mutobvu" 
Numbers31:23 nezvimwewo zvisingaparadzwi nomoto; zvinofanira kuiswa mumoto, ipapo zvichava zvakanaka. Asi zvinofanirawo kucheneswa nemvura yokunatsa. Uye zvose zvisingagoni kukunda moto zvinofanira kupinzwa nomumvura imomo." 
Numbers31:24 Pazuva rechinomwe musuke nguo dzenyu, ipapo muchava vakachena. Ipapo mungazochipinda henyu mumusasa.”" 
Numbers31:25 Jehovha akati kuna Mozisi," 
Numbers31:26 “Iwe naEreazari muprista navakuru vemhuri veungano munofanira kuverenga vanhu vose nezvipfuwo zvakapambwa. 
Numbers31:27 Mugovere zvakapambwa pakati pavarwi vakaenda kuhondo uye navakasara muungano. 
Numbers31:28 Kubva kuvarwi vakanga vandorwa kuhondo, utsaure somutero waJehovha chinhu chimwe chete pazvinhu mazana mashanu, vangava vanhu, mombe, mbongoro, makwai kana mbudzi." 
Numbers31:29 Utore mutero uyu kubva pahafu yavo yomugove wavo ugopa kuna Ereazari muprista somugove waJehovha. 
Numbers31:30 Kubva kuhafu inova yavaIsraeri, utsaure chinhu chimwe chete kubva pamakumi mashanu oga oga, vangava vanhu, mombe, mbongoro, makwai, mbudzi kana zvimwe zvipfuwo. Uzvipe kuvaRevhi, ivo vane basa rokuchengeta tabhenakeri yaJehovha.”" 
Numbers31:31 Saka Mozisi naEreazari muprista vakaita sezvakarayirwa Mozisi naJehovha. 
Numbers31:32 Zvakatapwa zvakasara pane zvavakapamba zvakanga zvatorwa navarwi zvaisvika zviuru mazana matanhatu namakumi manomwe nezvishanu zvamakwai," 
Numbers31:33 mombe zviuru makumi manomwe nezviviri," 
Numbers31:34 mbongoro zviuru makumi matanhatu nechiuru chimwe chete 
Numbers31:35 uye vakadzi zviuru makumi matatu nezviviri vakanga vasina kumbovata navarume. 
Numbers31:36 Hafu yomugove wavaya vakarwa muhondo yaiva: makwai zviuru mazana matatu namakumi matatu nezvinomwe, namazana mashanu," 
Numbers31:37 	mutero waJehovha paari wakanga uri makwai mazana matanhatu namakwai manomwe namashanu; 
Numbers31:38 	mombe, dzaisvika zviuru makumi matatu nezvitanhatu, mutero waJehovha padziri waiva mombe makumi manomwe nembiri;" 
Numbers31:39 	mbongoro, dzaiva zviuru makumi matatu namazana mashanu, mutero waJehovha padziri wakanga uri mbongoro makumi matanhatu neimwe chete;" 
Numbers31:40 vanhu vaisvika zviuru gumi nezvitanhatu, mutero waJehovha pavari waiva vanhu makumi matatu navaviri." 
Numbers31:41 Mozisi akapa mutero kuna Ereazari muprista somugove waJehovha, sezvakarayirwa Mozisi naJehovha." 
Numbers31:42 Hafu yakanga iri yavaIsraeri, yakatsaurwa naMozisi kubva kuvarume vehondo," 
Numbers31:43 hafu yeungano, yaiva makwai zviuru mazana matatu namakumi matatu namanomwe, namazana mashanu," 
Numbers31:44 mombe zviuru makumi matatu, nezvitanhatu," 
Numbers31:45 mbongoro dzaiva zviuru makumi matatu, namazana mashanu" 
Numbers31:46 uye vanhu vaiva zviuru gumi nezvitanhatu. 
Numbers31:47 Kubva pahafu yaiva yavaIsraeri, Mozisi akatsaura munhu mumwe chete kubva pavanhu makumi mashanu, chipfuwo chimwe chete kubva pazvipfuwo makumi mashanu, sezvakarayirwa naJehovha, akazvipa kuvaRevhi, vakanga vane basa rokuchengeta tabhenakeri yaJehovha." 
Numbers31:48 Ipapo machinda akanga ari vatariri vamapoka ehondo, vatungamiri vezviuru navatungamiri vamazana vakaenda kuna Mozisi" 
Numbers31:49 vakati kwaari, “Varanda venyu vaverenga varwi vari pasi pedu, hapana kana mumwe chete asipo." 
Numbers31:50 Saka tauya nechipo kuna Jehovha chezvishongo zvegoridhe zvakawanikwa nomumwe nomumwe wedu, zvishongo zvegoridhe, mhete dzomumaoko, mhete dzomunzeve nouketani hwomumutsipa kuti tizviyananisire pamberi paJehovha.”" 
Numbers31:51 Mozisi naEreazari muprista vakagamuchira kubva kwavari goridhe, zvinhu zvose zvakanga zvakaitwa noumhizha." 
Numbers31:52 Goridhe rose rakabva kuvatungamiri vezviuru navatungamiri vamazana rakapiwa kuna Jehovha naMozisi naEreazari muprista rairema mashekeri zviuru gumi nezvitanhatu, namazana manomwe namakumi mashanua." 
Numbers31:53 Murwi mumwe nomumwe akanga azvitorera zvake zvakapambwa. 
Numbers31:54 Mozisi naEreazari muprista vakagamuchira goridhe rakabva kuvatungamiri vezviuru nokuvatungamiri vamazana vakariisa muTende Rokusangana kuti chive chirangaridzo chavaIsraeri pamberi paJehovha. 
Numbers32:1 VaRubheni navaGadhi, vakanga vane mombe zhinji uye namakwai akawanda kwazvo, vakaona nyika yaJazeri neGireadhi kuti yakanga yanakira zvipfuwo." 
Numbers32:2 Saka vakauya kuna Mozisi naEreazari muprista nokuvatungamiri veungano, vakati," 
Numbers32:3 “Ataroti, Dhibhoni, Jazeri, Nimira, Heshibhoni, Ereare, Sebhami, Nebho neBheoni," 
Numbers32:4 nyika yakakundwa naJehovha pamberi pavanhu vaIsraeri, yakanakira zvipfuwo, uye varanda venyu vane zvipfuwo.”" 
Numbers32:5 Vakati, “Kana tawana nyasha pamberi penyu, nyika iyi ngaipiwe kuvaranda venyu ive yedu. Musatiyambutsa Jorodhani.”" 
Numbers32:6 Mozisi akati kuvaGadhi nokuvaRubheni, “Ko, vanhu venyika yokwenyu vangaenda kuhondo imi makagara henyu pano?" 
Numbers32:7 Ko, munoodzerei mwoyo wavaIsraeri kuti vasayambuka vachienda kunyika yavakapiwa naJehovha?" 
Numbers32:8 Izvi ndizvo zvakaitwa namadzibaba enyu pandakavatuma kubva paKadheshi Bharinea kuti vandosora nyika. 
Numbers32:9 Shure kwokukwira kwavo kuMupata weEshikori vakandoona nyika, vakaodza mwoyo yavaIsraeri kuti varege kupinda munyika yavakanga vapiwa naJehovha." 
Numbers32:10 Kutsamwa kwaJehovha kwakamutswa nomusi uyo uye akapika mhiko iyi: 
Numbers32:11 ‘Nokuda kwokuti havana kunditevera nomwoyo wose, hakuna mumwe wavo ane makore makumi maviri kana anodarika akabuda munyika yeIjipiti achaona nyika yandakanga ndavimbisa nemhiko kuna Abhurahama, Isaka naJakobho," 
Numbers32:12 hakuna mumwe wavo kunze kwaKarebhu mwanakomana waJefune muKenizi naJoshua mwanakomana waNuni nokuti vakatevera Jehovha nomwoyo wose.’ 
Numbers32:12 hakuna mumwe wavo kunze kwaKarebhu mwanakomana waJefune muKenizi naJoshua mwanakomana waNuni nokuti vakatevera Jehovha nomwoyo wose.’ 
Numbers32:13 Kutsamwa kwaJehovha kwakapfuta pamusoro pavaIsraeri akavaita kuti vadzungaire murenje kwamakore makumi mana, kusvikira zera rose ravaya vakaita zvakaipa pamberi pake rapera." 
Numbers32:14 “Hezvino muri pano, imi chibereko chavatadzi, mumire panzvimbo yamadzibaba enyu muchiwedzera kutsamwa kwaJehovha kukuru pamusoro pavaIsraeri." 
Numbers32:15 Kana mukatsauka pakumutevera, achasiyazve vanhu ava vose murenje, uye imi ndimi muchauyisa kuparadzwa kwavo.”" 
Numbers32:16 Ipapo vakakwira kwaari vakati, “Tinoda kuvaka matanga ezvipfuwo zvedu kuno namaguta avakadzi vedu navana." 
Numbers32:17 Asi takagadzirira kurwa nokuenda mberi navaIsraeri kusvikira tavasvitsa kunzvimbo yavo. Pari zvino vakadzi vedu navana vedu vachagara mumaguta akakomberedzwa, kuti vadzivirirwe pavagari venyika ino." 
Numbers32:18 Hatizodzokeri kumisha yedu kusvikira vaIsraeri vose vagamuchira nhaka yavo. 
Numbers32:19 Hatizogamuchiri nhaka ipi zvayo pamwe chete navo mhiri kweJorodhani, nokuti nhaka yedu tava nayo kumabvazuva kwaJorodhani.”" 
Numbers32:20 Ipapo Mozisi akati kwavari, “Kana mukaita izvi, kana mukazvishongedza nhumbi dzokurwa pamberi paJehovha kuti mundorwa," 
Numbers32:21 uye kana imi mose mukaenda makashonga nhumbi dzokurwa mhiri kwaJorodhani pamberi paJehovha kusvikira adzinga vavengi vake pamberi pake," 
Numbers32:22 ipapo kana nyika ichinge yakundwa pamberi paJehovha, mungadzokera henyu uye musununguke pabasa renyu pamberi paJehovha napamberi pavaIsraeri. Uye nyika iyi ichava yenyu pamberi paJehovha." 
Numbers32:23 “Asi kana mukakoniwa kuita izvi, muchange matadzira Jehovha; uye zvirokwazvo chivi chenyu chichakuwanai." 
Numbers32:24 Vakai maguta avakadzi navana venyu, uye matanga amakwai enyu, asi muite zvamakavimbisa.”" 
Numbers32:25 VaGadhi navaRubheni vakati kuna Mozisi, “Isu varanda venyu tichaita sezvarayirwa naishe wedu." 
Numbers32:26 Vana vedu navakadzi vedu, makwai edu nemombe dzedu zvichasara kuno mumaguta eGireadhi." 
Numbers32:27 Asi varanda venyu, varume vose vakazvigadzirira kundorwa, vachayambuka kundorwa pamberi paJehovha sezvataurwa naishe wedu.”" 
Numbers32:28 Ipapo Mozisi akarayira pamusoro pavo kuna Ereazari muprista nokuna Joshua mwanakomana waNuni nokuvakuru vemhuri dzamarudzi avaIsraeri. 
Numbers32:28 Ipapo Mozisi akarayira pamusoro pavo kuna Ereazari muprista nokuna Joshua mwanakomana waNuni nokuvakuru vemhuri dzamarudzi avaIsraeri. 
Numbers32:29 Akati kwavari, “Kana vaGadhi navaRubheni, murume mumwe nomumwe akazvigadzirira kundorwa, vakayambuka Jorodhani nemi pamberi paJehovha, ipapo kana nyika ikakundwa pamberi pako, uvape nyika yeGireadhi ive yavo." 
Numbers32:30 Asi kana vakasayambuka nemi vakashonga zvokurwa, vanofanira kupiwa nhaka yavo pamwe chete nemi muKenani.”" 
Numbers32:31 VaGadhi navaRubheni vakapindura vakati, “Varanda venyu vachaita zvarehwa naJehovha." 
Numbers32:32 Tichayambuka mhiri pamberi paJehovha tigopinda muKenani, takashonga nhumbi dzokurwa nadzo, asi nhaka yatichawana ichava kudivi rino reJorodhani.”" 
Numbers32:33 Ipapo Mozisi akapa kuvaGadhi, navaRubheni nerudzi rwehafu rwaManase, mwanakomana waJosefa, umambo hwaSihoni mambo wavaAmori noumambo hwaOgi mambo weBhashani, nyika yose namaguta ayo uye nenyika dzose dzakavapoteredza." 
Numbers32:34 VaGadhi vakavaka Dhibhoni, Ataroti, Aroeri," 
Numbers32:35 Ataroti Shafani, Jazeri, Jogubheha," 
Numbers32:36 Bheti Nimura neBheti Harani samaguta akakomberedzwa, uye vakavaka matanga amakwai avo." 
Numbers32:37 Uye vaRubheni vakavakazve Heshibhoni, Ereare Kiriatihaimi," 
Numbers32:38 pamwe chete neNebho neBhaari Meoni (mazita aya akashandurwa) neSibhima. Vakapa mazita kumaguta avakavaka. 
Numbers32:39 Zvizvarwa zvaMakiri mwanakomana waManase vakaenda kuGireadhi, vakaritapa vakadzinga vaAmori vakanga varimo." 
Numbers32:40 Saka Mozisi akapa Gireadhi kuvaMakiri, zvizvarwa zvaManase, ivo vakagara ikoko." 
Numbers32:41 Jairi, chizvarwa chaManase, akakunda misha yaro akaitumidza kuti Havhoti Jairi." 
Numbers32:42 Uye Nobha akakunda Kenati nenzvimbo dzakaripoteredza akaritumidza kuti Nobha zita rake. 
Numbers33:1 Hezvino zvinhanho zvorwendo rwavaIsraeri pavakabuda muIjipiti namapoka avo vachitungamirirwa naMozisi naAroni. 
Numbers33:2 Mozisi akanyora zvinhanho zvorwendo rwavo. Urwu ndirwo rwendo rwavo nezvinhanho zvarwo: 
Numbers33:3 VaIsraeri vakasimuka kubva paRamesesi nezuva regumi namashanu romwedzi wokutanga, zuva rakatevera Pasika. Vakafamba vakabuda vasingatyi pamberi pavaIjipita vose," 
Numbers33:4 avo vakanga vachiviga matangwe avo ose, akanga aurayiwa naJehovha pakati pavo; nokuti Jehovha akanga atonga vamwari vavo." 
Numbers33:5 VaIsraeri vakabva paRamesesi vakandodzika misasa yavo paSukoti. 
Numbers33:6 Vakabva paSukoti vakandodzika misasa yavo paEtamu, mujinga megwenga." 
Numbers33:7 Vakabva paEtamu, vakadzokera shure kuPi Hahiroti, nechokumabvazuva kweBhaari Zefoni, vakandodzika misasa yavo pedyo neMigidhori." 
Numbers33:8 Vakabva paPi Hahiroti vakapinda nomugungwa vakaenda murenje, uye vakati vafamba mazuva matatu murenje reEtamu, vakadzika misasa paMara." 
Numbers33:9 Vakabva paMara vakaenda kuErimu, pakanga pane matsime gumi namaviri nemiti yemichindwe makumi manomwe, uye vakadzika misasa ipapo." 
Numbers33:10 Vakabva paErimu vakandodzika misasa paGungwa Dzvuku. 
Numbers33:11 Vakabva paGungwa Dzvuku vakandodzika misasa muGwenga reSini. 
Numbers33:12 Vakabva muGwenga reSini vakandodzika misasa paDhofika. 
Numbers33:13 Vakabva paDhofika vakandodzika misasa paArushi. 
Numbers33:14 Vakabva paArushi vakandodzika misasa paRefidhimu, apo pakanga pasina mvura yokuti vanhu vanwe." 
Numbers33:15 Vakabva paRefidhimu vakandodzika misasa muGwenga reSinai. 
Numbers33:16 Vakabva muGwenga reSinai vakandodzika misasa paKibhuroti Hatava. 
Numbers33:17 Vakabva paKibhuroti Hatava vakandodzika misasa paHazeroti. 
Numbers33:18 Vakabva paHazeroti vakandodzika misasa paRitima. 
Numbers33:19 Vakabva paRitima vakandodzika misasa paRimoni Perezi. 
Numbers33:20 Vakabva paRimoni Perezi vakandodzika misasa paRibhina. 
Numbers33:21 Vakabva paRibhina vakandodzika misasa paRisa. 
Numbers33:22 Vakabva paRisa vakandodzika misasa paKeherata. 
Numbers33:23 Vakabva paKeherata vakandodzika misasa paGomo reSheferi. 
Numbers33:24 Vakabva paGomo reSheferi vakandodzika misasa paHaradha. 
Numbers33:25 Vakabva paHaradha vakandodzika misasa paMakeroti. 
Numbers33:26 Vakabva paMakeroti vakandodzika misasa paTahati. 
Numbers33:27 Vakabva paTahati vakandodzika misasa paTera. 
Numbers33:28 Vakabva paTera vakandodzika misasa paMitika. 
Numbers33:29 Vakabva paMitika vakandodzika misasa paHashimona. 
Numbers33:30 Vakabva paHashimona vakandodzika misasa paMoseroti. 
Numbers33:31 Vakabva paMoseroti vakandodzika misasa paBhene Jaakani. 
Numbers33:32 Vakabva paBhene Jaakani vakandodzika misasa paHori Hagidhigadhi. 
Numbers33:33 Vakabva paHori Hagidhigadhi vakandodzika misasa paJotibhata. 
Numbers33:34 Vakabva paJotibhata vakandodzika misasa paAbhurona. 
Numbers33:35 Vakabva paAbhurona vakandodzika misasa paEzioni Gebheri. 
Numbers33:36 Vakabva paEzioni Gebheri vakandodzika misasa paKadheshi, murenje reZini." 
Numbers33:37 Vakabva paKadheshi vakandodzika misasa paGomo reHori, kumuganhu weEdhomu." 
Numbers33:38 Aroni muprista akakwira muGomo reHori sezvakarayirwa naJehovha, akandofira imomo pazuva rokutanga romwedzi wechishanu wegore ramakumi mana shure kwokubuda kwavaIsraeri muIjipiti." 
Numbers33:39 Aroni akanga ava namakore zana namakumi maviri namatatu pakufa kwake paGomo reHori. 
Numbers33:40 Mambo weAradhi muKenani, aigara kuNegevhi kweKenani, akanzwa kuti vaIsraeri vari kuuya." 
Numbers33:41 Vakabva kuGomo reHori vakandodzika misasa paZarimona. 
Numbers33:42 Vakabva paZarimona vakandodzika misasa paPunoni. 
Numbers33:43 Vakabva paPunoni vakandodzika misasa paObhiti. 
Numbers33:44 Vakabva paObhiti vakandodzika misasa paIye Abharimi, pamuganhu weMoabhu." 
Numbers33:45 Vakabva paIyimi vakandodzika misasa paDhibhoni Gadhi. 
Numbers33:46 Vakabva paDhibhoni Gadhi vakandodzika misasa paArimoni Dhibhurataimi. 
Numbers33:47 Vakabva paArimoni Dhibhurataimi vakandodzika misasa mumakomo eAbharimi, pedyo neNebho." 
Numbers33:48 Vakabva pamakomo eAbharimi vakandodzika misasa pamapani eMoabhu pedyo neJorodhani uchibva kuJeriko. 
Numbers33:49 Pamapani eMoabhu ipapo vakadzika misasa vakatevedza Jorodhani kubva kuBheti Jeshimoti kusvikira kuAbheri Shitimu. 
Numbers33:50 Pamapani eMoabhu pedyo neJorodhani uchibva kuJeriko, Jehovha akati kuna Mozisi," 
Numbers33:51 “Taura kuvaIsraeri uti kwavari: ‘Kana mayambuka Jorodhani mapinda muKenani," 
Numbers33:52 mudzinge vose vanogara munyika imomo pamberi penyu. Muparadze zvifananidzo zvavo zvose zvakavezwa nezvifananidzo zvavo zvakaumbwa, uye muputse nzvimbo dzose dzakakwirira." 
Numbers33:53 Mutore nyika iyo mugaremo, nokuti ndakupai nyika iyi kuti ive yenyu." 
Numbers33:54 Mugovere nyika nomujenya, maererano nemhuri dzenyu. Mupe vakawanda nhaka huru, uye vashoma muvapewo nhaka duku. Zvose zvichawira kwavari nomujenya zvinofanira kuva zvavo. Muigove zviri maererano namarudzi amadzitateguru enyu." 
Numbers33:55 “ ‘Asi kana mukasadzinga vagere munyika iyi, vamunotendera kusara ivavo vachava rukato pamberi penyu neminzwa pamativi enyu. Vachakutambudzai munyika mamugere." 
Numbers33:56 Ipapo ndichakuitirai imi zvandakaronga kuvaitira ivo.’ ” 
Numbers34:1 Jehovha akati kuna Mozisi," 
Numbers34:2 “Rayira vaIsraeri uti kwavari: ‘Kana mapinda muKenani, nyika ichagoverwa kwamuri senhaka, ichava nemiganhu iyi:" 
Numbers34:3 “ ‘Rutivi rwenyu rwezasi ruchasanganisira chikamu cheGwenga reZini chinotevedzana nomuganhu weEdhomu. Muganhu wenyu wezasi, uchatangira kumagumo eGungwa roMunyu nechokumabvazuva," 
Numbers34:4 uchiyambukira zasi kweAkirabhimu, uchipfuurira nokuZini uye uchienda nezasi kweKadheshi Bharinea. Ipapo uchazoenda nokuHazari Adhari uchindosvika kuAzimoni," 
Numbers34:5 kwaunondopota, wobatana noRukova rweIjipiti uchindogumira paGungwa." 
Numbers34:6 “ ‘Muganhu wenyu wokumavirira uchange uri mahombekombe eGungwa Guru. Ndiwo uchava muganhu wenyu nechokumavirira. 
Numbers34:7 “ ‘Pamuganhu wenyu wokumusoro, munofanira kutara mutaro unobva kuGungwa Guru uchisvika kuGomo reHori" 
Numbers34:8 uye kubva paGomo reHori uchisvika kuRebho Hamati. Ipapo muganhu uchaenda kuZedhadhi," 
Numbers34:9 wopfuurira kuZifurani uchindogumira paHazari Enani. Ndiwo uchava muganhu wenyu nechokumusoro. 
Numbers34:10 “ ‘Pamuganhu wenyu wokumabvazuva, munofanira kutara mutaro unobva kuHazari Enani uchisvika kuShefani." 
Numbers34:11 Muganhu uchadzika uchibva nokuShefani uchisvika kuRibhura nechokumabvazuva kweZini ugopfuurira wakatevedza materu ari kumabvazuva kweGungwa reKinereti. 
Numbers34:12 Ipapo muganhu uchadzika uchitevedza Jorodhani uchindoguma paGungwa roMunyu. “ ‘Iyi ndiyo ichava nyika yenyu, nemiganhu yayo kumativi ose.’ ”" 
Numbers34:13 Mozisi akarayira vaIsraeri akati, “Goverai nyika iyi nomujenya wenhaka yenyu. Jehovha akarayira kuti ipiwe kumarudzi mapfumbamwe nehafu," 
Numbers34:14 nokuti mhuri dzorudzi rwaRubheni, norudzi rwaGadhi uye rwehafu rwaManase vakagamuchira nhaka yavo." 
Numbers34:15 Marudzi maviri aya nehafu vakagamuchira nhaka yavo kumabvazuva kweJorodhani reJeriko, kwakatarisana nokumabudazuva.”" 
Numbers34:16 Jehovha akati kuna Mozisi," 
Numbers34:17 “Aya ndiwo mazita avarume vanofanira kukugoverai nyika senhaka yenyu: Ereazari muprista naJoshua mwanakomana waNuni. 
Numbers34:17 “Aya ndiwo mazita avarume vanofanira kukugoverai nyika senhaka yenyu: Ereazari muprista naJoshua mwanakomana waNuni. 
Numbers34:18 Uye ugadze mutungamiri mumwe chete kubva kurudzi rumwe norumwe kuti vabatsire pakugova nyika. 
Numbers34:19 Aya ndiwo mazita avo: Karebhu mwanakomana waJefune, kubva kurudzi rwaJudha;" 
Numbers34:20 	Kubva kurudzi rwaSimeoni, Shemueri mwanakomana waAmihudhi;" 
Numbers34:21 	Kubva kurudzi rwaBhenjamini, Eridhadhi mwanakomana waKisironi;" 
Numbers34:22 	Kubva kurudzi rwaDhani mutungamiri Bhuki mwanakomana waJogiri; 
Numbers34:23 	Mutungamiri kubva kurudzi rwaManase mwanakomana waJosefa, Hanieri mwanakomana waEfodhi;" 
Numbers34:24 	Mutungamiri kubva kurudzi rwaEfuremu mwanakomana waJosefa, Kemueri mwanakomana waShifutani;" 
Numbers34:25 	Mutungamiri kubva kurudzi rwaZebhuruni, Erizafani mwanakomana waParanaki;" 
Numbers34:26 	Mutungamiri kubva kurudzi rwaIsakari, Paritieri mwanakomana waAzani;" 
Numbers34:27 	Mutungamiri kubva kurudzi rwaAsheri, Ahihudhi mwanakomana waSheromi;" 
Numbers34:28 Mutungamiri kubva kurudzi rwaNafutari, Pedhaheri mwanakomana waAmihudhi.”" 
Numbers34:29 Ava ndivo varume vakarayirwa naJehovha kuti vagovere nhaka kuvaIsraeri munyika yeKenani. 
Numbers35:1 Pamapani eMoabhu pedyo neJorodhani uchibva mhiri kuJeriko, Jehovha akati kuna Mozisi," 
Numbers35:2 “Rayira vaIsraeri kuti vape vaRevhi maguta okuti vagare kubva panhaka ichatorwa navaIsraeri. Uye muvape mafuro akapoteredza maguta avo. 
Numbers35:3 Ipapo vachava namaguta okugara uye namafuro emombe dzavo, makwai nezvimwe zvipfuwo zvavo zvose." 
Numbers35:4 “Mafuro akapoteredza maguta amunopa vaRevhi achasvitsa makubhiti chiuru chimwe chetea kubva pamasvingo eguta. 
Numbers35:5 Uyere makubhiti zviuru zvivirib nechokunze kweguta, kurutivi rwokumabvazuva, kurutivi rwezasi uyere makubhiti zviuru zviviri, uye kurutivi rwokumavirira makubhiti zviuru zviviri, uye nechokumusoro, makubhiti zviuru zviviri, guta riri pakati. Nzvimbo iyi ichava mafuro amaguta." 
Numbers35:6 “Maguta matanhatu pane auchapa vaRevhi achava outiziro, kuti munhu anenge auraya mumwe atizireko. Pamusoro paiwayo, muvape mamwe maguta makumi mana namaviri." 
Numbers35:7 Maguta ose amunopa vaRevhi anofanira kuva makumi mana namasere, pamwe chete namafuro avo." 
Numbers35:8 Maguta amunopa vaRevhi kubva munyika inotorwa navaIsraeri anofanira kupiwa zvakaenzanirana nenhaka yorudzi rumwe norumwe: Utore maguta akawanda kubva kurudzi rune akawanda, asi utore mashoma kubva kurudzi rune mashoma.”" 
Numbers35:9 Ipapo Jehovha akati kuna Mozisi," 
Numbers35:10 “Taura kuvaIsraeri uti kwavari: ‘Kana mayambuka Jorodhani mapinda muKenani," 
Numbers35:11 musarudze mamwe maguta kuti ave outiziro, okuti munhu anenge auraya mumwe asingaiti nobwoni atizireko." 
Numbers35:12 Achava nzvimbo dzoutiziro kubva kumutsivi, kuitira kuti munhu anopomerwa mhosva yokuuraya arege kufa asati atongwa pamberi peungano." 
Numbers35:13 Maguta matanhatu amunopa aya achava maguta enyu outiziro. 
Numbers35:14 Mupe maguta matatu mhiri kwaJorodhani uye mamwe matatu muKenani kuti ave maguta outiziro. 
Numbers35:15 Maguta matanhatu aya achava nzvimbo youtiziro yavaIsraeri, vatorwa kana vamwe vanhu vagere pakati pavo, kuitira kuti ani naani anenge auraya mumwe asingaiti nobwoni atizireko." 
Numbers35:16 “ ‘Kana munhu akarova mumwe nesimbi akafa, iye imhondi; mhondi ichafanira kuurayiwa." 
Numbers35:17 Uye kana ani naani aine dombo muruoko rwake rinogona kuuraya, akarova mumwe munhu naro akafa, iye imhondi; mhondi inofanira kuurayiwa." 
Numbers35:18 Uye kana ani naani akange ane danda muruoko rwake rinogona kuuraya, uye akarova mumwe munhu akafa, iye imhondi; mhondi ichaurayiwa." 
Numbers35:19 Mutsivi weropa achauraya mhondi iyo; paanosangana naye, achamuuraya." 
Numbers35:20 Kana ani zvake anga ane ruvengo kare akasundidzira mumwe kana kupotsera chimwe chinhu kwaari nobwoni iye akafa," 
Numbers35:21 uye kana akamurova nechibhakera achimuvenga munhu uyo akafa, munhu iyeye anofanira kuurayiwa; munhu iyeye imhondi. Mutsivi weropa achauraya mhondi iyo paanosangana naye." 
Numbers35:22 “ ‘Asi kana panga pasina ruvengo mumwe akakaruka asundidzira mumwe kana kupotsera chimwe chinhu kwaari asingaiti nobwoni," 
Numbers35:23 kana anga asingamuoni, akapotsera dombo kwaari rinogona kumuuraya, uye iye akafa, ipapo sezvo anga asiri muvengi wake uye anga asingafungi kumukuvadza," 
Numbers35:24 ungano inofanira kutonga pakati pake nomutsivi weropa maererano nemitemo iyi. 
Numbers35:25 Ungano inofanira kudzivirira munhu anopomerwa umhondi kubva pamutsivi weropa uye vachamudzosera kuguta routiziro uko kwaakanga atizira. Anofanira kugara ikoko kusvikira muprista mukuru afa, uyo akanga akazodzwa namafuta matsvene." 
Numbers35:26 “ ‘Asi kana uyo anopomerwa akangobuda kunze akadarika muganhu weguta routiziro, uko kwaakatizira," 
Numbers35:27 uye mutsivi weropa akamuwana ari kunze kweguta, mutsivi weropa achauraya muurayi uyu akasapiwa mhosva youmhondi." 
Numbers35:28 Muurayi anofanira kugara muguta rake routiziro kusvikira pakufa kwomuprista mukuru; anofanira kudzokera chete kunzvimbo yake kana muprista mukuru afa. 
Numbers35:29 “ ‘Izvi zvinofanira kuva murayiro wokutonga nawo kusvikira kumarudzi enyu ose anotevera, kwose kwamunogara." 
Numbers35:30 “ ‘Ani naani anouraya munhu anofanira kuurayiwa semhondi kana chete pane zvapupu. Asi hapafaniri kuva nomunhu anourayiwa kana pachingova nechapupu chimwe chete. 
Numbers35:31 “ ‘Murege kugamuchira dzikinuro youpenyu hwemhondi, inofanira kufa. Iye anofanira kufa zvirokwazvo." 
Numbers35:32 “ ‘Murege kugamuchira dzikinuro yomunhu upi zvake akatiza kuguta routiziro nokudaro muchimutendera kudzokera kuti akandogarazve munyika yake muprista mukuru asati afa. 
Numbers35:33 “ ‘Murege kusvibisa nyika yamunogara. Kuteura ropa kunosvibisa nyika, uye nyika haingayananisirwi pamusoro peropa rakateurirwamo, asi chete neropa romunhu akariteura." 
Numbers35:34 Musasvibisa nyika yamugere uye yandinogara, nokuti ini Jehovha, ndigere pakati pavaIsraeri.’ ”" 
Numbers36:1 Vakuru vemhuri yeimba yaGireadhi mwanakomana waMakiri, mwanakomana waManase, vaibva kudzimba dzezvizvarwa zvaJosefa, vakauya vakataura pamberi paMozisi navatungamiri, ivo vakuru vemhuri dzavaIsraeri." 
Numbers36:2 Vakati, “Jehovha paakarayira ishe wangu kuti ape nyika kuvaIsraeri nomujenya ive nhaka yavo, akakurayirai kuti mupe nhaka yehama yedu Zerofehadhi kuvanasikana vake." 
Numbers36:3 Zvino ivo kana vakawanikwa navarume vanobva kuna mamwe marudzi aIsraeri, ipapo nhaka yavo ichabviswa panhaka yamadzitateguru edu ikawedzerwa kurudzi urwo rwavawanikwa narwo. Nokudaro chikamu chenhaka yakagoverwa kwatiri nemijenya chichabviswa." 
Numbers36:4 Gore reJubhiri ravaIsraeri parinosvika, nhaka yavo ichawedzerwa kunhaka yorudzi urwo rwavakawanikwa kwarwuri, uye pfuma yavo ichatorwa kubva kunhaka yorudzi rwamadzibaba edu.”" 
Numbers36:5 Ipapo Mozisi akarayira murayiro uyu kuvaIsraeri sezvaakarayirwa naJehovha achiti, “Zvinotaurwa norudzi rwezvizvarwa zvaJosefa ndizvo." 
Numbers36:6 Uku ndiko kurayira kwaJehovha kuvanasikana vaZerofehadhi: Vangawanikwa havo naani zvake anovafadza kana chete ari worudzi rweimba yamadzibaba avo. 
Numbers36:7 Hakuna nhaka muvaIsraeri inofanira kubva kuno rumwe rudzi ichienda kuno rumwe rudzi, nokuti muIsraeri wose anofanira kuchengeta nyika yorudzi rwake iri nhaka inobva kumadzibaba avo." 
Numbers36:8 Mwanasikana mumwe nomumwe anogara nhaka yenyika murudzi rupi zvarwo rwavaIsraeri anofanira kuwanikwa nomunhu anobva muimba yorudzi rwababa vake, kuitira kuti muIsraeri wose awane nhaka yamadzibaba ake." 
Numbers36:9 Hakuna nhaka inobva kuno rumwe rudzi ichienda kuno rumwe rudzi, nokuti rudzi rwose rwavaIsraeri runofanira kuchengeta nyika yavakapiwa senhaka.”" 
Numbers36:10 Saka vanasikana vaZerofehadhi vakaita sezvakarayirwa Mozisi naJehovha. 
Numbers36:11 Vanasikana vaZerofehadhi, Mara, Tiza, Hogira, Mirika naNoa vakawanikwa navanakomana vababamunini vavo." 
Numbers36:12 Vakawanikwa mukati medzimba dzezvizvarwa zvaManase mwanakomana waJosefa, uye nhaka yavo yakaramba iri mumba yorudzi rwababa vavo." 
Numbers36:13 Iyi ndiyo mirayiro nemitemo yakapiwa kuvaIsraeri naJehovha kubudikidza naMozisi pamapani eMoabhu pedyo neJorodhani uchibva mhiri kuJeriko. 
Deuteronomy1:1 Aya ndiwo mashoko akataurwa naMozisi kuvaIsraeri vose murenje kumabvazuva kweJorodhani, mumupata weArabha wakatarisana neSufi, pakati peParani neToferi, Rabhani, Hazeroti neDhizahabhi." 
Deuteronomy1:2 (Zvinotora mazuva gumi nerimwe kubva paHorebhu kuenda kuKadheshi Bharinea nenzira yokuGomo reSeiri.) 
Deuteronomy1:3 Mugore ramakumi mana, nezuva rokutanga romwedzi wegumi nomumwe, Mozisi akazivisa vaIsraeri zvose izvo Jehovha akamurayira pamusoro pavo." 
Deuteronomy1:4 Izvi zvakaitika mushure mokunge akunda Sihoni mambo wavaAmori, akanga achitonga paHeshibhoni, uye paEdhirei akanga akunda Ogi mambo weBhashani, akanga achitonga muAshitaroti." 
Deuteronomy1:5 Mozisi akatanga kududzira murayiro uyu, vari nechokumabvazuva kweJorodhani munzvimbo yeMoabhu, achiti:" 
Deuteronomy1:6 Jehovha Mwari wedu akataura kwatiri paHorebhu akati, “Magara nguva yakakwana pagomo rino." 
Deuteronomy1:7 Putsai musasa mugoenda kunyika yezvikomo yavaAmori; muende kumarudzi ose akavakidzana muArabha, mumakomo, nemuzasi mezvikomo zvokumadokero, nomuNegevhi uye kumahombekombe egungwa, nokunyika yavaKenani uye nokuRebhanoni, kusvikira kurwizi rukuru, irwo Yufuratesi." 
Deuteronomy1:8 Tarirai, ndakupai nyika iyi. Endaimo mundotora nyika iyo Jehovha akapika kuti achaipa kumadzibaba enyu, kuna Abhurahamu, naIsaka, naJakobho, uye nokuzvizvarwa zvavo zvaizovatevera.”" 
Deuteronomy1:9 Panguva iyoyo ndakati kwamuri, “Mava mutoro unorema kwazvo kuti ndikutakurei ndiri ndoga." 
Deuteronomy1:10 Jehovha Mwari wenyu akawedzera kuwanda kwenyu zvokuti nhasi mawanda senyeredzi dzokudenga. 
Deuteronomy1:11 Jehovha Mwari wamadzibaba enyu, ngaakuwedzerei rune chiuru uye ngaakuropafadzei sezvaakavimbisa!" 
Deuteronomy1:12 Asi ini ndingatakure seiko matambudziko enyu nemitoro yenyu uye nokupokana kwenyu ndiri ndoga? 
Deuteronomy1:13 Zvisarudzirei varume vakachenjera, vanonzwisisa uye vanokudzwa kubva kurudzi rumwe norumwe rwamarudzi enyu, ndingovagadza pamusoro penyu.”" 
Deuteronomy1:14 Makandipindura muchiti, “Izvo zvamaronga kuti zviitwe zvakanaka.”" 
Deuteronomy1:15 Ipapo ndakatora varume vaitungamirira marudzi enyu, varume vakachenjera uye vaikudzwa, ndikavagadza kuti vave vakuru pamusoro penyu, vave vakuru vezviuru, navakuru vamazana, navakuru vamakumi mashanu, navakuru vevane gumi uye navatariri vamarudzi." 
Deuteronomy1:16 Zvino panguva iyoyo ndakarayira vatongi venyu, ndikati: Inzwai kupokana kuri pakati pehama dzenyu mugovatonga zvakanaka, ingava mhaka iri pakati pavaIsraeri voga kana pakati pomumwe wavo nomutorwa." 
Deuteronomy1:17 Musaita rusarura pakutonga; inzwai vose muduku kana mukuru zvakaenzanirana. Musatya munhu upi zvake, nokuti kutonga ndokwaMwari. Uyisai kwandiri mhaka yakanyanya kukuomerai, ndigoinzwa." 
Deuteronomy1:18 Uye panguva iyoyo ndakakurayirai zvose zvamaifanira kuita. 
Deuteronomy1:19 Ipapo takasimuka kubva paHorebhu tikafamba takananga kunyika yamakomo yavaAmori tikapfuura nomurenje iro rose guru rinotyisa ramakaona, uye tikasvika paKadheshi Bharinea, sezvatakarayirwa naJehovha Mwari wedu." 
Deuteronomy1:20 Ipapo ndakati kwamuri, “Masvika munyika yamakomo yavaAmori, yatinopiwa naJehovha Mwari wedu." 
Deuteronomy1:21 Tarirai, Jehovha Mwari wenyu akupai nyika iyo. Kwirai munoitora, sezvamakaudzwa naJehovha, Mwari wamadzibaba enyu. Musatya; musaora mwoyo.”" 
Deuteronomy1:22 Ipapo imi mose makauya kwandiri mukati, “Ngatitumei varume vanofanotungamira kuti vatishorere nyika vagodzoka kuzotiudza pamusoro penzira yatingafamba nayo uye namaguta atichandosvika kwaari.”" 
Deuteronomy1:23 Pfungwa iyoyo yakange yakandinakira; nokudaro ndakasarudza varume vane gumi navaviri pakati penyu, murume mumwe kubva kurudzi rumwe norumwe." 
Deuteronomy1:24 Ivo vakabva vakaenda munyika yamakomo, vakasvika kumupata weEshikori vakaishora." 
Deuteronomy1:25 Vakatora mimwe yemichero yenyika iyoyo, vakauya nayo kwatiri, vakati, “Inyika yakanaka yatiri kupiwa naJehovha Mwari wedu.”" 
Deuteronomy1:26 Asi makanga musingadi kuenda; mukamukira kurayira kwaJehovha Mwari wenyu. 
Deuteronomy1:27 Makanyunyuta muri mumatende enyu, mukati, “Jehovha anotivenga; naizvozvo akatibudisa muIjipiti kuti azotiisa mumaoko avaAmori kuti vatiparadze." 
Deuteronomy1:28 Tichaendepiko? Hama dzedu dzatiita kuti tiore mwoyo. Dzinoti, ‘Vanhu vacho vanotikunda pasimba napakureba; maguta acho makuru uye ane masvingo akareba zvokusvika kudenga. Takaona kunyange navaAnaki ikoko.’ ”" 
Deuteronomy1:29 Ipapo ini ndakati kwamuri, “Musavhunduka; musavatya." 
Deuteronomy1:30 Jehovha Mwari wenyu, iye anokutungamirirai, achakurwirai, sezvaakakuitirai muIjipiti, pamberi penyu chaipo," 
Deuteronomy1:31 uye nomurenje. Imomo makaona kuti Jehovha Mwari wenyu akakutakurai sei, sezvinoita baba kana vachitakura mwanakomana wavo, nzira dzose dzamakafamba nadzo kudzamara muchisvika panzvimbo ino.”" 
Deuteronomy1:32 Kunyange zvakadaro, hamuna kuvimba naJehovha Mwari wenyu," 
Deuteronomy1:33 iye akakutungamirirai parwendo rwenyu, uye mugore pamasikati kuti akutsvagirei nzvimbo dzokudzika matende enyu uye kuti akuratidzei nzira yamunofanira kufamba nayo." 
Deuteronomy1:34 Jehovha paakanzwa zvamakataura, akatsamwa akapika, achiti," 
Deuteronomy1:35 “Hakungavi nomunhu mumwe worudzi urwu achaona nyika yakanaka yandakapika ndichiti ndichaipa kumadzibaba enyu," 
Deuteronomy1:36 kunze kwaKarebhu mwanakomana waJefune achaiona, uye ndichamupa iye navana vake nyika yaakatsika netsoka dzake nokuti akateerera Jehovha nomwoyo wose.”" 
Deuteronomy1:37 Nokuda kwenyu Jehovha akanditsamwira neniwo, akati, “Newewo hauchazoipindi." 
Deuteronomy1:38 Asi mutevedzeri wako, Joshua, mwanakomana waNuni, ndiye achapindamo." 
Deuteronomy1:38 Asi mutevedzeri wako, Joshua, mwanakomana waNuni, ndiye achapindamo." 
Deuteronomy1:39 Asi vaduku venyu avo vamakati vachatapwa, vana venyu vasati vaziva zvakanaka kubva pane zvakaipa ndivo vachapinda munyika iyi. Ndichaipa kwavari uye vachaitora." 
Deuteronomy1:40 Asi kana murimi, dzokai mufambe makananga kurenje nenzira yokuGungwa Dzvuku.”" 
Deuteronomy1:41 Ipapo imi makapindura mukati, “Takatadzira Jehovha. Tichaenda tigondorwa, sezvatakarayirwa naJehovha Mwari wedu.” Nokudaro makashonga mumwe nomumwe nhumbi dzokurwa, muchifunga kuti zvaiva nyore kukwira kunyika yamakomo." 
Deuteronomy1:42 Asi Jehovha akataura kwandiri, akati, “Vaudze kuti, ‘Musakwira kundorwa, nokuti handiendi nemi. Muchakundwa navavengi venyu.’ ”" 
Deuteronomy1:43 Naizvozvo ndakakutaurirai, asi imi hamuna kuda kuteerera. Makamukira murayiro waJehovha uye mukuzvikudza kwenyu makafamba mukapinda munyika yamakomo." 
Deuteronomy1:44 VaAmori vakanga vagere mumakomo iwayo vakauya kuzokurwisai; vakakudzinganisai sezvinoita nyuchi uye vakakurovai kubva paSeiri kusvikira paHoma. 
Deuteronomy1:45 Makadzoka mukachema pamberi paJehovha, asi iye haana kuteerera kuchema kwenyu uye haana kurerekera nzeve yake kwamuri." 
Deuteronomy1:46 Naizvozvo makagara paKadheshi mazuva mazhinji, nguva yose yamakagarapo." 
Deuteronomy2:1 Zvino takadzoka tikafamba takananga kurenje nenzira inoenda kuGungwa Dzvuku, sezvandakanga ndarayirwa naJehovha. Kwenguva yakareba takafamba nenzira yaipoterera nenyika yamakomo yeSeiri." 
Deuteronomy2:2 Ipapo Jehovha akati kwandiri," 
Deuteronomy2:3 “Mafamba nenzira yokupoterera nyika iyi yamakomo kwenguva yakakwana, zvino chidzokai muende nechokumusoro." 
Deuteronomy2:4 Rayira vanhu uti, ‘Mava pedyo kuti mupfuure nomunyika yehama dzenyu vana vaEsau, vagere paSeiri. Ivo vachakutyai, asi muchenjere kwazvo." 
Deuteronomy2:5 Musavatanga kuti murwe, handingakupei chikamu chipi zvacho chenyika yavo, kunyange pangakwana kuisa rutsoka rwenyu. Ndakapa Esau nyika yamakomo yeSeiri kuti ive yake." 
Deuteronomy2:6 Munofanira kuvaripa nesirivha zvokudya zvamuchadya nemvura yamuchanwa.’ ” 
Deuteronomy2:7 Jehovha Mwari wenyu akakuropafadzai pamabasa ose amaoko enyu. Iye akakutarirai parwendo rwenyu murenje iri guru. Jehovha Mwari wenyu akava nemi, makore makumi mana aya, uye hapana chinhu chamakashayiwa." 
Deuteronomy2:8 Naizvozvo takapfuura hama dzedu vana vaEsau, vanogara muSeiri. Takasiya nzira inoenda kuArabha, yeArabha, inobva kuErati neEzioni Gebheri, ndokufamba nenzira yomurenje reMoabhu." 
Deuteronomy2:9 Ipapo Jehovha akataura kwandiri, akati, “Musafurusa vaMoabhu kana kuvadenha, nokuti handizokupai chikamu chipi zvacho chenyika yavo. Ndakapa Ari kuvana vaRoti kuti ive yavo.”" 
Deuteronomy2:10 (VaEmi vaisigarako vaiva vanhu vakasimba, vakawanda uye vakareba savaAnaki." 
Deuteronomy2:11 SavaAnaki ivowo vaionekwa savaRefaimu, asi vaMoabhu vaivadana nezita rokuti vaEmi." 
Deuteronomy2:12 VaHori vaimbogarawo muSeiri, asi vana vaEsau vakavadzinga kubva imomo. Vakaparadza vaHori vakanga varimo ivo vasati vavamo vakagara munzvimbo yavo, sezvakangoitawo Israeri munyika yavakapiwa naJehovha kuti ive yavo)." 
Deuteronomy2:13 Uye Jehovha akati, “Zvino chisimukai muyambuke Mupata weZeredhi.” Saka akayambuka mupata." 
Deuteronomy2:14 Makore makumi matatu namasere akanga apfuura kubva panguva yatakabva paKadheshi Bharinea kusvikira patakazoyambuka Mupata weZeredhi. Panguva iyoyi rudzi rwose rwavarume vezera rokurwa rwakanga rwaparara kubva pamisasa, sezvakanga zvapikirwa naJehovha kwavari." 
Deuteronomy2:15 Ruoko rwaJehovha rwakaramba ruchivarwisa kusvikira rwavaparadza zvachose. 
Deuteronomy2:16 Zvino wokupedzisira pakati pavarume ava vokurwa akati afa," 
Deuteronomy2:17 Jehovha akati kwandiri," 
Deuteronomy2:18 “Nhasi unofanira kupfuura nomunyika yeMoabhu, paAri." 
Deuteronomy2:19 Kana woswedera pedyo navaAmoni, usavafurusa kana kuvadenha kuti murwisane, nokuti handingakupei kuti mutore nyika ipi zvayo yavaAmori. Ndakaipa kuti ive yezvizvarwa zvaRoti.”" 
Deuteronomy2:20 (Naiyowo yainzi inyika yevaRafaimu, vaisimbogaramo; asi vaAmoni vaivadaidza kuti vaZamuzumi." 
Deuteronomy2:21 Vaiva vanhu vakasimba, vakawanda, uye vakareba savaAnaki. Jehovha akavaparadza pamberi pavaAmoni, avo vakavadzinga ndokugara munzvimbo yavo." 
Deuteronomy2:22 Jehovha akanga aitira zvimwe chetezvo kuzvizvarwa zvaEsau, vaigara muSeiri, paakaparadza vaHori pamberi pavo. Vakavadzinga ndokugara munzvimbo yavo kusvikira nhasi." 
Deuteronomy2:23 Uye kana vari vaAvhi vakange vagere mumisha kusvikira Gaza, vaKafitori vaibva Kafitori vakavaparadza ndokugara munzvimbo yavo.)" 
Deuteronomy2:24 Budai zvino muende, muyambuke mupata weArinoni. Tarirai ndakaisa muruoko rwenyu Sihoni muAmori, mambo weHeshibhoni, nenyika yake. Tangai kuitora mugorwa naye." 
Deuteronomy2:25 Nhasi chaiye ndichatanga kuvhundutsa nokutyisa ndudzi dzose dziri pasi pedenga nokuda kwenyu. Ivo vachanzwa guhu pamusoro penyu vagodedera nokutya kwazvo pamusoro penyu. 
Deuteronomy2:26 Ndakatuma nhume kubva murenje reKedhemoti kuna Sihoni mambo weHeshibhoni ndichikumbira rugare, uye ndikati," 
Deuteronomy2:27 “Titenderei kuti tipfuure nomunyika yenyu. Tichafamba nenzira huru; hatizotsauki kurudyi kana kuruboshwe. 
Deuteronomy2:28 Mutitengesere zvokudya nemvura yokunwa nomutengo wazvo wesirivha. Chingotitenderai henyu kuti tipfuure netsoka," 
Deuteronomy2:29 sezvatakaitirwa navana vaEsau vagere muSeiri, nevana vaMoabhu, vagere muAri. Kusvikira tayambuka Jorodhani tichipinda munyika iyo yatinopiwa naJehovha Mwari wedu.”" 
Deuteronomy2:30 Asi Sihoni mambo weHeshibhoni akaramba kutitendera kuti tipfuure namo. Nokuti Jehovha Mwari wenyu akanga aomesa mweya wake uye akanga arambidza mwoyo wake, kuti agomuisa mumaoko enyu, sezvaaita iye zvino." 
Deuteronomy2:31 Jehovha akati kwandiri, “Tarira ndatanga kuisa Sihoni nenyika yake kwauri. Zvino chitanga kuikunda ugotora nyika yake.”" 
Deuteronomy2:32 Sihoni nehondo yake yose akati auya kuzorwa nesu paJahazi," 
Deuteronomy2:33 Jehovha Mwari wedu akamuisa kwatiri uye takamuparadza, iye pamwe chete navanakomana vake nehondo yake yose." 
Deuteronomy2:34 Panguva iyoyo takatora maguta ake ose tikaaparadza chose, varume navakadzi uye navana. Hapana watakasiya ari mupenyu." 
Deuteronomy2:35 Asi zvipfuwo nezvatakapamba kubva mumaguta takazvitora kuti zvive zvedu. 
Deuteronomy2:36 Kubva paAroeri pamahombekombe oMupata weArinoni, nokubva kuguta rokumupata, kunyange kusvikira kuGireadhi, hakuna kumbova kana neguta rimwe chete rakatikunda. Jehovha Mwari wedu akatipa vose." 
Deuteronomy2:37 Asi maererano nokurayira kwaJehovha Mwari wedu hamuna kuswedera kunyika ipi zvayo yavaAmoni, kunyange kunyika iri kurutivi rweJabhoki kana kunyika yakapoteredza maguta ari mumakomo." 
Deuteronomy3:1 Mushure maizvozvo takadzoka tikakwira nenzira inoenda kuBhashani, uye Ogi mambo weBhashani nehondo yake yose vakauya kuzorwa nesu paEdhirei." 
Deuteronomy3:2 Jehovha akati kwandiri, “Usatya nokuda kwake, nokuti ndakamuisa kwauri uye nenyika yake. Muitire sezvamakaita kuna Sihani mambo wavaAmoni, akanga achitonga muHeshibhoni.”" 
Deuteronomy3:3 Naizvozvo Jehovha Mwari wedu akaisawo Ogi mambo weBhashani nehondo yake yose mumaoko edu. Takavaparadza tikasasiya kana mumwe chete mupenyu. 
Deuteronomy3:4 Panguva iyoyo takatora maguta ake ose. Hapana kana guta rimwe chete ratisina kuvatorera pamaguta makumi matanhatu, nyika yose yeArigobhu, noushe hwaOgi muBhashani." 
Deuteronomy3:5 Maguta ose iwaya akanga akapoteredzwa namasvingo marefu namasuo namazariro, uye kwakanga kunewo misha mizhinji kwazvo yakanga isina kukomberedzwa namasvingo." 
Deuteronomy3:6 Takaaparadza zvachose, sezvatakaitira Sihoni mambo weHeshibhoni, takaparadza guta rimwe nerimwe, varume, navakadzi uye navana." 
Deuteronomy3:7 Asi zvipfuwo zvose nezvatakapamba kubva mumaguta avo takazvitora zvikava zvedu. 
Deuteronomy3:8 Saka nenguva iyoyo takatorera madzimambo maviri aya avaAmoni nyika yokumabvazuva kweJorodhani, kubva paMupata weArinoni kusvikira kuGomo reHerimoni." 
Deuteronomy3:9 (Herimoni rinonzi Sirioni navaSidhoni; vaAmori vanoriti Seniri). 
Deuteronomy3:10 Takatora maguta ose enzvimbo yakakwirira neGireadhi yose, uye neBhashani yose kusvikira paSareka neEdhirei, maguta oushe hwaOgi muBhashani." 
Deuteronomy3:11 (Ogi mambo weBhashani ndiye chete akasara pane vakasara vevaRefaiti. Mubhedha wake wakanga wakagadzirwa nesimbi uye wakanga wakareba makubhiti mapfumbamwea uye makubhiti manab paupamhi. Uchiriko muRabha ravaAmoni.) 
Deuteronomy3:12 Panyika yatakatora panguva iyoyo, ndakapa vaRubheni navaGadhi nyika yokumusoro kweAroeri Mupata weArimoni, kusanganisira nehafu yenyika yamakomo yeGireadhi, pamwe chete namaguta ayo." 
Deuteronomy3:13 Imwe nyika yose yeGireadhi uyewo neBhashani yose, muumambo hwaOgi ndakapa kurudzi rwehafu rwaManase. (Nyika yose yeArigobhu muBhashani yaimbozivikanwa senyika yavaRefaimu." 
Deuteronomy3:14 Jairi mwana waManase, akatora nyika yose yeArigobhu, kusvikira kumuganhu wavaGeshuri navaMaakati, akaitumidza zita rake zvokuti nanhasi Bhashani inonzi Havhoti Jairi.)" 
Deuteronomy3:15 Uye ndakapa Gireadhi kuna Makiri. 
Deuteronomy3:16 Asi vaRubheni navaGadhi ndakavapa nyika inobva paGireadhi zvichidzika kusvikira paMupata weArinoni (pakati pemupata uriwo muganhu) uye kubuda kusvikira kuRwizi Jabhoki, unova ndiwo muganhu wavaAmoni." 
Deuteronomy3:17 Muganhu wayo wokumavirira waiva Jorodhani muArabha, kubva Kinereti kusvika kuGungwa reArabha (Gungwa roMunyu), mujinga mamawere ePisiga." 
Deuteronomy3:18 Panguva iyo ndakakurayirai, ndikati, “Jehovha Mwari wenyu akakupai nyika iyi kuti ive yenyu. Asi varume vose vakasimba vanofanira kuyambuka pamberi pehama dzenyu vaIsraeri, vakashonga nhumbi dzokurwa." 
Deuteronomy3:19 Asi, vakadzi venyu navana venyu uye nezvipfuwo zvenyu (ndinoziva kuti mune zvipfuwo zvakawanda) zvinosara mumaguta andakakupai," 
Deuteronomy3:20 kusvikira Jehovha apa hama dzenyu zororo sezvaakarayira kwamuri, uye naivowo vatora nyika yavanopiwa naJehovha Mwari wenyu mhiri kwaJorodhani. Shure kwaizvozvo mumwe nomumwe wenyu achadzoka kunhaka yandakakupai.”" 
Deuteronomy3:21 Panguva iyo ndakarayira Joshua, ndikati, “Wakaona nameso ako zvose zvakaitwa naJehovha Mwari wako kumadzimambo maviri aya. Jehovha achaita zvimwe chetezvo kuushe hwose mhiri uko kwamunoenda." 
Deuteronomy3:21 Panguva iyo ndakarayira Joshua, ndikati, “Wakaona nameso ako zvose zvakaitwa naJehovha Mwari wako kumadzimambo maviri aya. Jehovha achaita zvimwe chetezvo kuushe hwose mhiri uko kwamunoenda." 
Deuteronomy3:22 Usavatya; Jehovha Mwari wako pachake achakurwira.” 
Deuteronomy3:23 Zvino ndakanyengetera kuna Jehovha panguva iyo, ndikati," 
Deuteronomy3:24 “Imi Ishe Jehovha, makatanga kuratidza muranda wenyu ukuru hwenyu noruoko rwenyu rune simba. Nokuti ndoupiko Mwari kudenga kana panyika angaita zvakafanana namabasa enyu uye namabasa makuru amunoita?" 
Deuteronomy3:25 Nditenderei henyu kuti ndiyambuke ndinoona nyika yakanaka iri mhiri kwaJorodhani, iyo nyika yamakomo yakanaka neRebhanoni.”" 
Deuteronomy3:26 Asi nokuda kwenyu, Jehovha akanditsamwira akasandinzwa Jehovha akati kwandiri, “Zvaringana. Usataurazve kwandiri pamusoro peshoko iri." 
Deuteronomy3:27 Kwira pamusoro pegomo rePisiga ugotarisa kumadokero nokumusoro nezasi nokumabvazuva, uone nyika yacho nameso ako, sezvo usingazoyambuki Jorodhani urwu." 
Deuteronomy3:28 Asi rayira Joshua, ugomukurudzira nokumusimbisa nokuti achatungamirira vanhu ava pakuyambuka uye achaita kuti vagare nhaka yenyika yauchaona.”" 
Deuteronomy3:28 Asi rayira Joshua, ugomukurudzira nokumusimbisa nokuti achatungamirira vanhu ava pakuyambuka uye achaita kuti vagare nhaka yenyika yauchaona.”" 
Deuteronomy3:29 Saka takagara mumupata uri pedyo neBheti Peori. 
Deuteronomy4:1 Teererai zvino, imi vaIsraeri, mitemo nemirayiro yandava kukudzidzisai. Muitevere kuti murarame uye mugopinda mugotora nyika iyo munopiwa naJehovha, Mwari wamadzibaba enyu." 
Deuteronomy4:2 Musawedzera kana kutapudza kubva pane zvandinokurayirai, asi chengetai mirayiro yaJehovha Mwari wenyu yandinokupai." 
Deuteronomy4:3 Makaona nameso enyu zvakaitwa naJehovha paBhaari Peori, Jehovha Mwari wenyu akaparadza mumwe nomumwe pakati penyu aitevera Bhaari Peori." 
Deuteronomy4:4 Asi imi mose makanamatira pana Jehovha Mwari wenyu muchiri vapenyu nhasi. 
Deuteronomy4:5 Tarirai, ndakudzidzisai mitemo nemirayiro sezvandakarayirwa naJehovha Mwari wangu, kuti muitevere munyika yamuri kupinda kuti muitore ive yenyu." 
Deuteronomy4:6 Muichengete zvakanaka, nokuti izvi zvicharatidza uchenjeri nokunzwisisa kwenyu kundudzi dzichanzwa pamusoro pemitemo iyi yose uye vachati, “Zvirokwazvo rudzi urwu rukuru, vanhu vakachenjera uye vanonzwisisa.”" 
Deuteronomy4:7 Ndorupi rumwe rudzi rukuru runa vamwari varwo vari pedyo navo saJehovha Mwari wedu ari pedyo nesu nguva ipi neipi zvayo yatinonyengetera kwaari? 
Deuteronomy4:8 Uye ndorupiko rudzi rukuru rune mitemo nemirayiro yakarurama semirayiro iyi yandiri kuisa pamberi penyu nhasi? 
Deuteronomy4:9 Asi zvichenjererei, mugonyatsozvichengetedza kuitira kuti murege kukanganwa zvinhu zvakaonekwa nameso enyu kana kuzvirega zvichibuda mumwoyo menyu mazuva ose oupenyu hwenyu. Muzvidzidzise nokuvana venyu." 
Deuteronomy4:10 Murangarire zuva ramakamira pamberi paJehovha Mwari wenyu paHorebhu, paakati kwandiri, “Unganidza vanhu pamberi pangu kuti vanzwe mashoko angu vagodzidza kunditya mazuva ose avachagara panyika uye kuti vagozoadzidzisa kuvana vavo.”" 
Deuteronomy4:11 Makaswedera mukamira pajinga pegomo, gomo paraipfuta nomoto waisvika kumatenga chaiko, pamwe chete nemakore matema nerima guru." 
Deuteronomy4:12 Ipapo Jehovha akataura kwamuri ari mukati memoto. Makanzwa inzwi ramashoko asi hamuna kuona kuti ndiani; kwaingova nenzwi roga. 
Deuteronomy4:13 Iye akataura sungano yake kwamuri, Mirayiro Gumi, iyo akakurayirai kuti muitevere uye ipapo akainyora pamahwendefa maviri amabwe." 
Deuteronomy4:14 Zvino Jehovha akanditungamirira panguva iyo kuti ndikudzidzisei mitemo nemirayiro yamunofanira kundotevera munyika iyo yamunoyambukira Jorodhani kuti ive yenyu. 
Deuteronomy4:15 Nokuti hamuna kuona zvaakanga akaita nezuva iro Jehovha akataura kwamuri paHorebhu ari mumoto. Naizvozvo zvichenjererei zvikuru," 
Deuteronomy4:16 kuita kuti murege kuzvishatisa muchizvigadzirira chifananidzo, chifananidzo chechinhu chipi zvacho, chingave chakaitwa somurume kana somukadzi," 
Deuteronomy4:17 kana semhuka ipi zvayo panyika kana seshiri ipi zvayo inobhururuka mudenga," 
Deuteronomy4:18 kana sechisikwa chipi zvacho chinofamba pasi kana hove ipi zvayo iri pasi mumvura. 
Deuteronomy4:19 Uye kuti kana muchitarisa kudenga mukaona zuva, nomwedzi nenyeredzi, zvose zviri kudenga, musatsauswa kuti muzvipfugamire nokunamata zvinhu izvo Jehovha Mwari wenyu akagovera ndudzi dzose dziri pasi pedenga." 
Deuteronomy4:20 Asi kana muri imi, Jehovha akakutorai akakubudisai muchoto chamatare, akakubudisai muIjipiti, kuti muve vanhu venhaka yake, sezvamuri nhasi." 
Deuteronomy4:21 Jehovha akanditsamwira nokuda kwenyu, uye akapika kuti handingayambuki Jorodhani nokupinda munyika yakanaka iyo munopiwa naJehovha Mwari wenyu kuti ive nhaka yenyu." 
Deuteronomy4:22 Ndichafira munyika ino; handichayambuki Jorodhani; asi imi mava kuzoyambuka nokutora nyika yakanaka. 
Deuteronomy4:23 Muzvichenjerere kuti murege kukanganwa sungano yaJehovha Mwari wenyu yaakaita nemi; musazviitira chifananidzo chorudzi rwechinhu chipi zvakadziviswa naJehovha Mwari wenyu. 
Deuteronomy4:24 Nokuti Jehovha Mwari wenyu moto unoparadza, ndiMwari ane godo." 
Deuteronomy4:25 Mushure mokunge mava navana navazukuru uye magara nguva refu munyika, kana mukazvishatisa nokugadzira chifananidzo chorudzi rupi zvarwo, mukaita zvakaipa pamberi paJehovha Mwari wenyu muchimuita kuti ashatirwe," 
Deuteronomy4:26 ndinodana denga napasi sezvapupu pamusoro penyu nhasi, kuti muchakurumidza kuparara kubva panyika yamuri kuyambukira Jorodhani kuti ive yenyu. Hamungagarimo nguva refu asi muchaparadzwa zvirokwazvo." 
Deuteronomy4:27 Jehovha achakuparadzirai pakati pamarudzi, uye vashoma venyu chete ndivo vachapona pakati pendudzi uko kwamuchadzingirwa naJehovha." 
Deuteronomy4:28 Ikoko muchanamata vamwari vakaitwa navanhu, vamatanda navamabwe, vasingagoni kana kunzwa kana kudya kana kunhuhwidza." 
Deuteronomy4:29 Asi kana mava ikoko mukatsvaka Jehovha Mwari wenyu, muchamuwana kana mukamutsvaka nomwoyo wenyu wose nomweya wenyu wose." 
Deuteronomy4:30 Kana muchinge matambudzika uye zvinhu zvose izvi zvaitika kwamuri, ipapo pamazuva achatevera muchadzoka kuna Jehovha Mwari wenyu mugomuteerera." 
Deuteronomy4:31 Nokuti Jehovha Mwari wenyu ndiMwari ane ngoni, haangakusiyei kana kukuparadzai, kana kukanganwa sungano yamadzibaba enyu, yaakasimbisa kwavari nemhiko." 
Deuteronomy4:32 Bvunzai zvino pamusoro pamazuva akapfuura kare imi musati mavapo, kubva nezuva iro Mwari akasika munhu panyika; bvunzai kubva kuno rumwe rutivi rwedenga kusvikira kuno rumwe. Kune chinhu chakamboitika chakakura seichi here, kana chimwe chakafanana nacho chakambonzwika?" 
Deuteronomy4:33 Kune vamwe vanhu vakambonzwa inzwi raMwari achitaura ari mukati momoto here, sezvamakanzwa imi uye vakararama?" 
Deuteronomy4:34 Kune mumwe mwari here akaedza kundozvitsaurira rudzi pakati porumwe rudzi, nemiedzo, nezviratidzo, nezvishamiso, nehondo, noruoko rune simba, noruoko rwakatambanudzwa, kana namabasa makuru anotyisa, sezvinhu zvose zvakaitwa naJehovha Mwari wenyu pamberi penyu muIjipiti?" 
Deuteronomy4:35 Makaratidzwa zvinhu zvose izvi kuti muzive kuti Jehovha ndiMwari; kunze kwake hakuna mumwe. 
Deuteronomy4:36 Kubva kudenga akaita kuti munzwe inzwi rake kuti akudzidzisei. Panyika akakuratidzai moto wake mukuru, uye makanzwa mashoko ake kubva mukati momoto." 
Deuteronomy4:37 Nokuti akada madzibaba enyu uye akazvitsaurira zvizvarwa zvavo zvakavatevera shure kwavo, akakubudisai muIjipiti noKuvapo kwake nesimba rake guru," 
Deuteronomy4:38 kuti adzinge pamberi penyu ndudzi dzinokupfuurai pakukura napasimba uye nokukuuyisai munyika yavo kuti aipe kwamuri senhaka sezvazviri nhasi. 
Deuteronomy4:39 Zvizivei nokuzvichengeta mumwoyo nhasi kuti Jehovha ndiMwari ari kudenga kumusoro uye napanyika pasi. Hakunazve mumwe. 
Deuteronomy4:40 Chengetai mitemo nemirayiro yake yandinokupai nhasi, kuitira kuti zvigokuitirai zvakanaka imi navana venyu vanokuteverai uye kuti mugogara mazuva mazhinji panyika yamunopiwa naJehovha Mwari wenyu nokusingaperi." 
Deuteronomy4:41 Zvino Mozisi akatsaura maguta matatu kumabvazuva mhiri kwaJorodhani," 
Deuteronomy4:42 uko ani naani anenge auraya munhu aitizira kana achinge auraya muvakidzani wake asingaiti nobwoni uye asingazvifungiri. Aigona kutizira mune rimwe ramaguta aya kuti ararame. 
Deuteronomy4:43 Maguta aya aiti: Bhezeri munzvimbo yakakwirira yomurenje raiva ravaRubheni; Ramoti paGireadhi, raiva ravaGadhi; neGorani paBhashani, raiva ravaManase." 
Deuteronomy4:44 Uyu ndiwo murayiro wakaiswa naMozisi pamberi pavaIsraeri:
