2Kings19:7 Tarira, ndichaisa mweya maari wokuti paanonzwa mamwe mashoko, achadzokera kunyika yake, uye ndichaita kuti aurayiwe nomunondo ikoko.’ ”" 
2Kings19:8 Mukuru wavatariri paakanzwa kuti mambo weAsiria akanga abva kuRakishi, akadzoka akabva akaenda akandowana mambo achirwa neRibhina." 
2Kings19:9 Zvino Senakeribhi akagamuchira chiziviso chaiti Tirihaka, mambo weEtiopia akanga achifamba achiuya kuzorwa naye. Saka akatumazve nhume kuna Hezekia neshoko iri rokuti:" 
2Kings19:10 “Muti kuna Hezekia mambo weJudha: Musarega Mwari wamunovimba naye achikunyengedzai paanoti, ‘Jerusarema harizopiwa mumaoko amambo weAsiria.’" 
2Kings19:11 Zvirokwazvo makanzwa zvakaitwa namadzimambo eAsiria kunyika dzose, vachidziparadza zvachose. Zvino imi mucharwirwa here?" 
2Kings19:12 Ko, vamwari vedzimwe ndudzi dzakaparadzwa namadzitateguru angu: vamwari veGozani, neHarani, neRezefi navanhu veEdheni vakanga vari muTera Asari, vakavarwira here?" 
2Kings19:13 Ko, mambo weHamati aripi, namambo weAripadhi, namambo weguta reSefavhaimi, weHena kana neIvha?”" 
2Kings19:14 Hezekia akagamuchira tsamba kubva kunhume uye akaiverenga. Ipapo akaenda kutemberi yaJehovha akaipetenura pamberi paJehovha. 
2Kings19:15 Uye Hezekia akanyengetera kuna Jehovha achiti, “Haiwa Jehovha, Mwari waIsraeri, imi mugere pakati pamakerubhi, imi moga ndimi Mwari pamusoro poushe hwose hwapasi." 
2Kings19:16 Rerekerai nzeve, imi Jehovha, munzwe; svinudzai meso enyu, imi Jehovha, muone; inzwai mashoko Senakeribhi aakatuma kuti azozvidza nawo Mwari mupenyu." 
2Kings19:17 “Haiwa Jehovha, ichokwadi kuti madzimambo eAsiria akaparadza chose ndudzi idzi nenyika dzavo." 
2Kings19:18 Vakakanda vamwari vavo mumoto vakavaparadza, nokuti vakanga vasiri vamwari asi matanda chete namatombo, akaumbwa namaoko avanhu." 
2Kings19:19 Haiwa Jehovha Mwari wedu, zvino chitirwirai kubva muruoko rwake, kuitira kuti umambo hwose hwapanyika huzive kuti imi moga, ndimi Mwari.”" 
2Kings19:20 Ipapo Isaya mwanakomana waAmozi akatuma shoko kuna Hezekia akati, “Zvanzi naJehovha, Mwari waIsraeri: Ndanzwa munyengetero wako pamusoro paSenakeribhi mambo weAsiria." 
2Kings19:21 Iri ndiro shoko rakataurwa naJehovha pamusoro pake: “Mhandara Mwanasikana weZioni anokushora uye anokuseka. Mwanasikana weJerusarema anokudzungudzira musoro uchitiza. 
2Kings19:22 Ndianiko wawakazvidza uye ukamhura? Wakasimudzira inzwi rako kuna aniko uye ukasimudza meso ako mukuzvikudza? Ndiye Mutsvene waIsraeri! 
2Kings19:23 Nenhume dzako wakaunganidza zvituko kuna Jehovha. Uye wakati, “Nengoro dzangu zhinji ndakakwira makomo marefu, nzvimbo refu refu dzeRebhanoni. Ndakatemera pasi misidhari yayo yakareba, nemipaini yayo yakaisvonaka. Ndakasvika kumasango ayo kure kure, masango ayo akanakisisa." 
2Kings19:24 Ndakachera matsime munyika yavatorwa, uye ndikanwa mvura ikoko. Netsoka dzangu ndakaomesa hova dzose dzeIjipiti.”" 
2Kings19:25 “ ‘Hauna kunzwa here? Ndakazviita kare kare. Mumazuva akare ndakazvironga; zvino ndaita kuti zviitike, kuti wakashandura maguta akakomberedzwa akava murwi wamatombo." 
2Kings19:26 Vanhu vawo, vakapedzwa simba, vakavhundutswa uye vakanyadziswa. Vakafanana nembesa dziri muminda, samabukirwa omuriwo mutete akasvibira, souswa huri pamusoro pemba, hwakatsva husati hwakura." 
2Kings19:27 “ ‘Asi ndinoziva paunogara, uye kwaunobva nokwaunoenda, uye kuti wakanditsamwira sei." 
2Kings19:28 Nokuti wakanditsamwira uye kuzvikudza kwako kwasvika munzeve dzangu, ndichaisa chiredzo changu mumhino dzako, nematomhu angu mumuromo mako, uye ndichakuita kuti udzokere nenzira yawakauya nayo.’" 
2Kings19:29 “Ichi ndicho chichava chiratidzo chako, iwe Hezekia: “Gore rino uchadya zvinongomera zvoga, uye mugore rechipiri zvinobva muna izvozvo. Asi mugore rechitatu mudyare mugokohwa, mudyare mizambiringa uye mugodya michero yawo." 
2Kings19:30 Uyezve vakasara veimba yaJudha vachadzika midzi pasi vagobereka michero pamusoro. 
2Kings19:31 Nokuti muJerusarema muchabuda vakasara, uye muGomo reZioni muchabuda chikwata chavachapunyuka. Kushingaira kwaJehovha Wamasimba Ose kuchazviita." 
2Kings19:32 “Naizvozvo, zvanzi naJehovha pamusoro pamambo weAsiria: “Haazopindi muguta iri kana kupfura museve pano. Haangauyi mberi kwaro nenhoo, kana kurikomberedza negomo revhu;" 
2Kings19:33 Nenzira yaakauya nayo achadzokera, haazopindi muguta rino, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
2Kings19:34 Ndichadzivirira guta rino uye ndichariponesa, nokuda kwangu uye nokuda kwaDhavhidhi muranda wangu.”" 
2Kings19:35 Usiku ihwohwo mutumwa waJehovha akaenda akauraya varume zviuru zana namakumi masere nezvishanu mumusasa wavaAsiria. Vanhu pavakati vachimuka mangwana acho, wanei heyo mitumbi yavakafa!" 
2Kings19:36 Saka Senakeribhi mambo weAsiria akaparadza musasa akadzokera kuNinevhe akandogarako. 
2Kings19:37 Rimwe zuva, paakanga achinamata mutemberi yamwari wake Nisiroki, vanakomana vake, Adhiramereki naSharezeri vakamuuraya nomunondo, vakatizira kunyika yeArarati. Esarihadhoni mwanakomana wake akamutevera paumambo." 
2Kings20:1 Mumazuva iwayo Hezekia akarwara zvokuda kufa. Muprofita Isaya mwanakomana waAmozi akaenda kwaari akati, “Zvanzi naJehovha: Gadzira imba yako, nokuti uchafa, hausi kuzorarama.”" 
2Kings20:2 Hezekia akatendeukira kumadziro uye akanyengetera kuna Jehovha akati," 
2Kings20:3 “Haiwa Jehovha, rangarirai kuti ndakafamba sei pamberi penyu nokutendeka uye nomwoyo wose uye ndikaita zvakanaka pamberi penyu.” Hezekia akachema zvikuru." 
2Kings20:4 Isaya asati abva paruvanze rwapakati, shoko raJehovha rakauya kwaari richiti," 
2Kings20:5 “Dzokera undoudza Hezekia, mutungamiri wavanhu vangu kuti, “Zvanzi naJehovha, Mwari wababa vako Dhavhidhi, ‘Ndanzwa munyengetero wako uye ndaona misodzi yako; ndichakuporesa. Nezuva retatu kubva zvino uchakwira kutemberi yaJehovha." 
2Kings20:6 Ndichawedzera paupenyu hwako makore gumi namashanu. Uye ndichakurwira iwe neguta rino. Ndicharwira guta iri kubva muruoko rwamambo weAsiria nokuda kwangu uye nokuda kwomuranda wangu Dhavhidhi.’ ” 
2Kings20:7 Ipapo Isaya akati, “Gadzirai bundu ramaonde.” Vakaita saizvozvo vakariisa pamota, uye akapora." 
2Kings20:8 Hezekia akanga abvunza Isaya achiti, “Chiratidzo chichava chei chokuti Jehovha achandiporesa uye kuti ndichakwira kutemberi yaJehovha pazuva retatu kubva zvino?”" 
2Kings20:9 Isaya akapindura akati, “Ichi ndicho chiratidzo chaJehovha kwauri kuti Jehovha achaita zvaavimbisa: Ko, ungada kuti mumvuri uende nhambwe gumi mberi here kana kudzoka mushure nhambwe gumi?”" 
2Kings20:10 Hezekia akati, “Zvakareruka kuti mumvuri uende mberi nhambwe gumi. Saka ngaudzoke nhambwe gumi mushure.”" 
2Kings20:11 Ipapo muprofita Isaya akadana kuna Jehovha, Jehovha akadzorera mumvuri shure nhambwe gumi pamanera aAhazia." 
2Kings20:12 Panguva iyo yaMerodhaki-Bharadhani mwanakomana waBharadhani mambo weBhabhironi akatumira tsamba nechipo kuna Hezekia, nokuti akanga anzwa nezvokurwara kwaHezekia." 
2Kings20:13 Hezekia akagamuchira nhume akadziratidza zvose zvakanga zviri mumatura rake, sirivha negoridhe, nezvinonhuwira, namafuta anokosha, nedura rezvombo nezvose zvaiwanikwa pakati pepfuma yake. Hezekia haana chaasina kuvaratidza mumuzinda make kana muushe hwake hwose." 
2Kings20:14 Ipapo muprofita Isaya akaenda kuna Mambo Hezekia akamubvunza akati, “Zvanzi kudini navarume avo, uye vabvepi?” Hezekia akapindura akati, “Vabva kunyika iri kure. Vabva kuBhabhironi.”" 
2Kings20:15 Muprofita akamubvunza akati, “Chii chavaona mumuzinda mako?” Hezekia akapindura akati, “Vaona zvose zviri mumuzinda mangu. Hapana chinhu chiri pakati pepfuma yangu chandisina kuvaratidza.”" 
2Kings20:16 Ipapo Isaya akati kuna Hezekia, “Chinzwa shoko raJehovha:" 
2Kings20:17 Zvirokwazvo nguva ichasvika yokuti zvose zviri mumuzinda mako, nezvose zvakaunganidzwa nababa vako kusvikira pazuva ranhasi, zvichatakurwa zvichiendeswa kuBhabhironi. Hapana chichasara, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
2Kings20:18 Uye vamwe vavanakomana vako, venyama yako chaivo neropa rako, vauchabereka, vachatorwa kubva kwauri, uye vachava varanda mumuzinda wamambo weBhabhironi.”" 
2Kings20:19 Hezekia akapindura akati, “Shoko raJehovha rawataura rakanaka.” Nokuti akafungawo akati, “Hakuchavi here norugare nokudzivirirwa munguva youpenyu hwangu?”" 
2Kings20:20 Kana zviri zvimwe zvakaitika panguva yokutonga kwaHezekia, nezvose zvaakaita uye namavakiro aakaita dziva nomugero waakauyisa nawo mvura muguta, hazvina kunyorwa here mubhuku renhoroondo dzamadzimambo eJudha?" 
2Kings20:21 Hezekia akazorora namadzibaba ake. Manase mwanakomana wake akamutevera paumambo. 
2Kings21:1 Manase akanga ava namakore gumi namaviri paakava mambo, uye akatonga muJerusarema kwamakore makumi mashanu namashanu. Zita ramai vake rainzi Hefizibha." 
2Kings21:2 Akaita zvakaipa pamberi paJehovha, achitevera zvinonyangadza zvendudzi dzakadzingwa pamberi pavaIsraeri naJehovha." 
2Kings21:3 Akavakazve matunhu akakwirira akanga aparadzwa nababa vake Hezekia; uye akavaka aritari dzaBhaari akaita danda raAshera, sezvakanga zvaitwa naAhabhu mambo weIsraeri. Akapfugamira nyeredzi dzose dzedenga akadzinamata." 
2Kings21:4 Akavaka aritari mutemberi yaJehovha, makanga manzi naJehovha, “Ndichaisa zita rangu muJerusarema.”" 
2Kings21:5 Muzvivanze zvose zviri zviviri zvetemberi yaJehovha, akavakira nyeredzi dzose dzokudenga aritari." 
2Kings21:6 Akabayira mwanakomana wake mumoto, akaita uroyi nokuvuka, akabvunza masvikiro navavuki. Akaita zvakaipa zvakawanda pamberi paJehovha, akamutsa hasha dzake." 
2Kings21:7 Akatora mufananidzo waAshera wakavezwa waakanga aita akauisa mutemberi, yakanga yanzi naJehovha kuna Dhavhidhi nokumwanakomana wake Soromoni, “Mutemberi iyi nomuJerusarema, mandakasarudza pakati pamarudzi ose aIsraeri, ndichaisamo Zita rangu nokusingaperi." 
2Kings21:8 Handichaitizve kuti tsoka dzavaIsraeri dzidzungaire kubva munyika yandakapa madzitateguru avo, kana vakangochenjera chete kuita zvose zvandakavarayira uye vakachengeta Murayiro wose wavakapiwa nomuranda wangu Mozisi.”" 
2Kings21:9 Asi vanhu havana kuteerera. Manase akavatsausa, zvokuti vakanyanya kuita zvakaipa kupfuura dzimwe ndudzi dzakaparadzwa pamberi pavaIsraeri naJehovha." 
2Kings21:10 Jehovha akataura kubudikidza navaranda vake ivo vaprofita akati," 
2Kings21:11 “Manase mambo weJudha aita zvivi zvinonyangadza izvi. Aita zvakaipa zvakawanda kupfuura vaAmori vakamutangira uye atungamirira Judha muzvivi nezvifananidzo zvake. 
2Kings21:12 Naizvozvo zvanzi naJehovha, Mwari waIsraeri: Ndichauyisa dambudziko pamusoro peJerusarema neJudha zvokuti nzeve dzomumwe nomumwe achanzwa nezvazvo dzichaunga." 
2Kings21:13 Ndichatambanudzira kuJerusarema tambo yokuyeresa yandakayera nayo Samaria nerwodzi rwandakashandisa kuyera narwo imba yaAhabhu. Ndichapukuta Jerusarema somunhu anonopukuta ndiro, anoipukuta uye anogoitsindikira." 
2Kings21:14 Ndichafuratira vakasara venhaka yangu uye ndichavapa kuvavengi vavo. Vachabirwa uye vachapambwa navavengi vavo," 
2Kings21:15 nokuti vakaita zvakaipa pamberi pangu vakanditsamwisa kubva pazuva rakabuda madzitateguru avo kubva muIjipiti kusvikira zuva ranhasi.” 
2Kings21:16 Pamusoro pezvo, Manase akateura ropa risina mhosva rakawanda zvokuti akazadza Jerusarema kubva kuno rumwe rutivi kusvika kuno rumwe, zvisiri izvozvo chete, asi nezvivi zvaakaita kuti Judha iite, zvokuti vakaita zvakaipa pamberi paJehovha." 
2Kings21:17 Kana zviri zvimwe zvakaitika panguva yokutonga kwaManase, nezvose zvaakaita, pamwe chete nechivi chaakaita, hazvina kunyorwa here mubhuku renhoroondo dzamadzimambo eJudha?" 
2Kings21:18 Manase akazorora namadzibaba ake akavigwa mubindu romumuzinda wake, bindu raUza. Uye Amoni mwanakomana wake akamutevera paumambo." 
2Kings21:19 Amoni akanga ava namakore makumi maviri namaviri paakava mambo, uye akatonga muJerusarema kwamakore maviri. Zita ramai vake rainzi Meshuremeti mwanasikana waHaruzi; akanga achibva kuJotibha." 
2Kings21:20 Akaita zvakaipa pamberi paJehovha, sezvakanga zvaita Manase baba vake." 
2Kings21:21 Akafamba munzira dzose dzababa vake; akanamata zvifananidzo zvakanga zvanamatwa nababa vake, akazvipfugamira." 
2Kings21:22 Akafuratira Jehovha, Mwari wamadzibaba ake, haana kufamba munzira yaJehovha." 
2Kings21:23 Vabati vaAmoni vakamumukira vakauraya mambo mumuzinda wake. 
2Kings21:24 Ipapo vanhu venyika vakauraya vose vakanga vamukira Mambo Amoni, vakagadza mwanakomana wake Josia kuti ave mambo panzvimbo yake." 
2Kings21:25 Kana zviri zvimwe zvakaitika panguva yokutonga kwaAmoni, nezvaakaita, hazvina kunyorwa here mubhuku renhoroondo dzamadzimambo eJudha?" 
2Kings21:26 Akavigwa muguva rake mubindu raUza. Josia mwanakomana wake akamutevera paumambo. 
2Kings22:1 Josia akanga ava namakore masere paakava mambo, uye akatonga muJerusarema kwamakore makumi matatu nerimwe. Zita ramai vake rainzi Jedhidha mwanasikana waAdhaya; aibva kuBhozikati." 
2Kings22:2 Akaita zvakanaka pamberi paJehovha uye akafamba munzira dzose dzababa vake Dhavhidhi, akasatsaukira kurudyi kana kuruboshwe." 
2Kings22:3 Mugore regumi namasere rokutonga kwake, Mambo Josia akatuma munyori, Shafani mwanakomana waAzaria, mwanakomana waMeshurami, kutemberi yaJehovha. Akati kwaari," 
2Kings22:4 “Enda kuna Hirikia muprista mukuru umuudze kuti averenge mari yakauyiswa mutemberi yaJehovha, iya yakaunganidzwa navarindi vomukova ichibva kuvanhu." 
2Kings22:5 Uite kuti vaipe kuvarume vakagadzwa kuti vatarire basa rapatemberi. Uye varume ava vanofanira kuripa vabati vanogadzira temberi yaJehovha," 
2Kings22:6 vavezi, navavaki navavezi vamatombo. Uyezve uite kuti vatenge matanda namatombo akavezwa kuti vagadzirise temberi." 
2Kings22:7 Asi havafaniri kubvunzwa pamusoro pemari yakaiswa mumaoko avo, nokuti ivo vakatendeka pakubata kwavo.”" 
2Kings22:8 Hirikia muprista mukuru akati kuna Shafani munyori, “Ndawana Bhuku roMurayiro mutemberi yaJehovha.” Akaripa kuna Shafani, uyo akariverenga." 
2Kings22:9 Ipapo Shafani munyori akaenda kuna mambo akandomuzivisa kuti: “Vabati venyu varipa mari iya yakanga iri mutemberi yaJehovha vakaipa kuvashandi navatariri vapatemberi.” 
2Kings22:10 Ipapo Shafani munyori akazivisa mambo achiti, “Hirikia muprista andipa bhuku.” Uye Shafani akariverenga pamberi pamambo." 
2Kings22:11 Mambo akati anzwa mashoko eBhuku roMurayiro, akabvarura nguo dzake." 
2Kings22:12 Akarayira Hirikia muprista, naAhikami mwanakomana waShafani, naAkibhori mwanakomana waMikaya, naShafani munyori, naAsaya muranda wamambo achiti," 
2Kings22:13 “Endai munondibvunzirawo Jehovha, ini navanhu ava, uye navanhu vose veJudha, pamusoro pezvakanyorwa mubhuku rakawanikwa iri. Nokuti kutsamwa kwaJehovha kwaakatitsamwira nako kukuru nokuda kwamadzibaba edu asina kuteerera mashoko ebhuku iri; havana kuita zvose zvakafanira zvakanyorwa pamusoro pedu.”" 
2Kings22:14 Hirikia muprista, naAhikami, naAkibhori, naShafani naAsaya vakaenda kundotaura naHuridha muprofitakadzi, akanga ari mukadzi waSharumi mwanakomana waTikivha, mwanakomana waHarihasi, muchengeti wenguo. Aigara muJerusarema, muDunhu reChipiri." 
2Kings22:15 Akati kwavari, “Zvanzi naJehovha, Mwari weIsraeri: Udzai murume akutumai kwandiri kuti," 
2Kings22:16 ‘Zvanzi naJehovha: Ndichauyisa dambudziko pamusoro penzvimbo ino navanhu vayo, zvichienderana nezvose zvakanyorwa mubhuku rakaverengwa namambo weJudha." 
2Kings22:17 Nokuti vakandirasa, vakapisira zvinonhuwira kuna vamwe vamwari, vakanditsamwisa nokuda kwezvifananidzo zvose zvavakaita namaoko avo, kutsamwa kwangu kuchapfuta pamusoro penzvimbo ino uye hakungadzimwi.’" 
2Kings22:18 Udzai mambo weJudha, akutumai kuzobvunza Jehovha, kuti, ‘Zvanzi naJehovha, Mwari waIsraeri, pamusoro pamashoko amakanzwa:" 
2Kings22:19 Nokuti mwoyo wako wakanga uri munyoro uye ukazvininipisa pamberi paJehovha pawakanzwa zvandakataura pamusoro penzvimbo ino navanhu vayo, kuti vachatukwa uye kuti vachaitwa dongo, uye nokuti wakabvarura nguo dzako ukachema pamberi pangu, ndakunzwa, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha." 
2Kings22:20 Naizvozvo ndichakurongedza kumadzibaba ako, uye uchavigwa murugare. Meso ako haachazooni matambudziko ose andichauyisa panzvimbo ino.” Naizvozvo vakaendesa mhinduro yake kuna mambo." 
2Kings23:1 Ipapo mambo akaunganidza vakuru vose veJudha neJerusarema pamwe chete. 
2Kings23:2 Akakwidza achienda kutemberi yaJehovha navarume veJudha, navanhu veJerusarema, vaprista navaprofita, navanhu vose kubva kuvaduku kusvikira kuvakuru. Akaverenga vachinzwa mashoko ose eBhuku reSungano, rakanga rawanikwa mutemberi yaJehovha." 
2Kings23:3 Mambo akamira pambiru akavandudza sungano pamberi paJehovha, kuti atevere Jehovha uye achengete zvaakarayira, nezvaakatema nemitemo yake nomwoyo wake wose, nomweya wake wose nokudaro achisimbisa mashoko esungano akanyorwa mubhuku iri. Ipapo vanhu vose vakazvipira kusungano." 
2Kings23:4 Zvino mambo akarayira Hirikia muprista mukuru, navaprista vaimutevera paukuru navarindi vemikova kuti vabvise mutemberi yaJehovha zvose zvakanga zvaitirwa Bhaari naAshera nenyeredzi dzose dzokudenga. Akazvipisira kunze kweJerusarema muminda yoMupata weKidhironi, akaendesa madota azvo kuBheteri." 
2Kings23:5 Akabvisa vaprista vezvifananidzo vakanga vagadzwa namadzimambo eJudha kuti vapisire zvinonhuwira pamatunhu akakwirira amaguta eJudha napamusoro penzvimbo dzakapoteredza Jerusarema, vaya vaipisira zvinonhuwira kuna Bhaari, nokuzuva nomwedzi nokunyeredzi dzose dzokudenga." 
2Kings23:6 Akabvisa danda raAshera mutemberi yaJehovha akariisa kuMupata weKidhironi kunze kweJerusarema akaripisirako. Akarikuya rikava madota, akaparadzira madota acho pamusoro pamarinda avanhuwo zvavo." 
2Kings23:7 Akaputsawo dzimba dzezvifeve zvavarume zvapatemberi dzaiva mutemberi yaJehovha mairukira vakadzi machira aAshera. 
2Kings23:8 Josia akabudisa vaprista vose vaibva mumaguta eJudha akashatisa matunhu akakwirira, kubva kuGebha kusvikira kuBheerishebha, kwaipisirwa zvinonhuwira navaprista. Akaputsa matunhu akakwirira apamasuo apamukova weSuo raJoshua, mutongi weguta, raiva kuruboshwe rwesuo reguta." 
2Kings23:8 Josia akabudisa vaprista vose vaibva mumaguta eJudha akashatisa matunhu akakwirira, kubva kuGebha kusvikira kuBheerishebha, kwaipisirwa zvinonhuwira navaprista. Akaputsa matunhu akakwirira apamasuo apamukova weSuo raJoshua, mutongi weguta, raiva kuruboshwe rwesuo reguta." 
2Kings23:9 Kunyange zvazvo vaprista vamatunhu akakwirira vakanga vasingashumiri paaritari yaJehovha muJerusarema, vakadya zvingwa zvisina mbiriso pamwe chete nehama dzavo vaprista." 
2Kings23:10 Akashatisa Tofeti iri muMupata weBheni Hinomi, kuitira kuti pasava nomunhu angapashandisa kubayira mwanakomana wake kana mwanasikana wake mumoto kuna Moreki." 
2Kings23:11 Akabvisa pasuo retemberi yaJehovha mabhiza akanga akumikidzwa kuzuva namadzimambo eJudha, akanga ari muchivanze pedyo nekamuri romubati ainzi Natani-Mereki. Ipapo Josia akapisa ngoro dzakanga dzakakumikidzwa kuzuva." 
2Kings23:12 Akaputsira pasi aritari dzakanga dzavakwa namadzimambo eJudha pamusoro pedenga, pedyo nekamuri rapamusoro raAhazia, nearitari dzakanga dzavakwa naManase muzvivanze zviviri zvetemberi yaJehovha. Akadzibvisapo, akadziputsaputsa uye akakanda marara acho muMupata weKidhironi." 
2Kings23:13 Mambo akashatisawo matunhu akakwirira akanga ari kumabvazuva kweJerusarema nechezasi kweChikomo choUori, izvo zvakanga zvavakwa naSoromoni mambo weIsraeri achivakira Ashitoreti mwari anonyangadza wavaSidhoni naKemoshi mwari anonyangadza wavaMoabhu, naMoreki mwari anonyangadza wavaAmoni." 
2Kings23:14 Josia akaputsa-putsa shongwe dzamatombo vakatema matanda aAshera uye akafukidza nzvimbo dzacho namapfupa avanhu. 
2Kings23:15 Pamusoro paizvozvo, akaparadza aritari paBheteri nenzvimbo yakakwirira yakaitwa naJerobhoamu mwanakomana waNebhati, uyo akaita kuti Israeri itadze, kunyange aritari iyoyo nenzvimbo yakakwirira akazviputsa. Akapisa nzvimbo yakakwirira akaikuya kuita upfu, uye akapisawo danda raAshera." 
2Kings23:16 Ipapo Josia akatariratarira uye paakaona makuva akanga aripo pamusoro pechikomo, akarayira kuti mapfupa abviswe maari uye apiswe paaritari kuti aishatise aisvibise, maererano neshoko raJehovha rakaparidzwa nomunhu waMwari akaprofita zvinhu izvi." 
2Kings23:17 Mambo akabvunza akati, “Ko, shongwe yeguva yandinoona iyo ndeyaani?” Varume vomuguta vakati, “Ndiyo inoratidza rinda romunhu waMwari akabva kuJudha akaprofita pamusoro pearitari yeBheteri nezvinhu izvi zvamaita kwairi.”" 
2Kings23:18 Iye akati, “Regai azorore. Ngakurege kuva nomunhu anokanganisa mapfupa ake.” Naizvozvo vakarega mapfupa ake pamwe nemuprofita akanga abva kuSamaria." 
2Kings23:19 Josia akaita zvimwe chetezvo sezvaakanga aita paBheteri akabvisa uye akashatisa temberi dzose dzapamatunhu akakwirira dzakanga dzavakwa namadzimambo eIsraeri mumaguta eSamaria, akanga atsamwisa Jehovha," 
2Kings23:20 Josia akauraya vaprista vose vokumatunhu akakwirira pamusoro pearitari uye akapisirapo mapfupa avanhu. Ipapo akabva adzokera kuJerusarema. 
2Kings23:21 Mambo akarayira vanhu vose akati, “Itirai Jehovha Mwari wenyu Pasika sezvazvakanyorwa muBhuku iri reSungano.”" 
2Kings23:22 Hakuna kumbova nepasika yakadai kubvira pamazuva avatongi vakatungamirira Israeri kana pamazuva amadzimambo avaIsraeri, namadzimambo eJudha." 
2Kings23:23 Asi mugore regumi namasere raMambo Josia, pasika iyi yakaitirwa Jehovha muJerusarema." 
2Kings23:24 Pamusoro paizvozvo, Josia akabvisa masvikiro ose navavuki, navamwari vomudzimu, nezvifananidzo nezvimwe zvose zvinonyangadza zvaionekwa muJudha neJerusarema. Akaita izvi kuti azadzise zvaidikanwa nomurayiro wakanga wakanyorwa mubhuku rakanga rakawanikwa nomuprista Hirikia mutemberi yaJehovha." 
2Kings23:25 Hapana kumbova namambo akaita saJosia kuna vakamutangira kana vakamutevera, akatendeukira kuna Jehovha nomwoyo wake wose, nomweya wake wose, uye nesimba rake rose, sezvaakaita achitevera Murayiro wose waMozisi." 
2Kings23:26 Kunyange zvakadaro, Jehovha haana kushanduka pakupisa kwehasha dzake dzinotyisa, dzaipisira Judha nokuda kwezvose zvakaitwa naManase achimutsamwisa." 
2Kings23:27 Naizvozvo Jehovha akati, “Ndichabvisawo Judha pamberi pangu sokubvisa kwandakaita Israeri, uye ndicharamba Jerusarema, guta randakasarudza, netemberi iyi, yandakataura pamusoro payo ndichiti, ‘Zita rangu richagarapo.’ ”" 
2Kings23:28 Kana zviri zvimwe, zvakaitika pakutonga kwaJosia, nezvose zvaakaita, hazvina kunyorwa here mubhuku renhoroondo dzamadzimambo eJudha?" 
2Kings23:29 Josia paakanga ari mambo, Faro Neko mambo weIjipiti akaenda kuRwizi Yufuratesi kuti andobatsira mambo weAsiria. Mambo Josia akaenda kundorwisana naye, asi Neko akamuona akamuuraya paMegidho." 
2Kings23:30 Varanda vaJosia vakatakura mutumbi wake mungoro kubva kuMegidho kusvika kuJerusarema vakamuviga muguva rake. Vanhu vomunyika imomo vakatora Jehoahazi mwanakomana waJosia vakamuzodza uye vakamuita mambo panzvimbo yababa vake. 
2Kings23:31 Jehoahazi akanga ava namakore makumi maviri namatatu paakava mambo, akatonga mwedzi mitatu muJerusarema. Zita ramai vake rainzi Hamutari mwanasikana waJeremia, vaibva kuRibhina." 
2Kings23:32 Akaita zvakaipa pamberi paJehovha, sezvakanga zvaitwa namadzibaba ake." 
2Kings23:33 Faro Neko akamusunga nengetani paRibhira munyika yeHamati kuti asatonga muJerusarema, uye akaisa mutero pamusoro peJudha wamatarenda zanaa esirivha netarendab regoridhe." 
2Kings23:34 Faro Neko akagadza Eriakimi mwanakomana waJosia kuti ave mambo panzvimbo yababa vake uye Josia akashandura zita raEriakimi kuti rive Jehoyakimi. Asi akatora Jehoahazi akaenda naye kuIjipiti, uye ndiko kwaakafira." 
2Kings23:35 Jehoyakimi akapa Faro Neko sirivha negoridhe sezvaakanga areva. Kuti aite izvozvo, akaripisa vanhu vomunyika imomo mutero achitora sirivha negoridhe kubva kuvanhu venyika maererano nezvavakanga vatarirwa." 
2Kings23:36 Jehoyakimi akanga ava namakore makumi maviri namashanu paakava mambo, uye akatonga kwamakore gumi nerimwe muJerusarema. Zita ramai vake rainzi Zebhidha mwanasikana waPedhaya; vaibva kuRuma." 
2Kings23:37 Akaita zvakaipa pamberi paJehovha, sezvakanga zvaitwa namadzibaba ake." 
2Kings24:1 Mumazuva okutonga kwaJehoyakimi Nebhukadhinezari mambo weBhabhironi akakunda nyika, Jehoyakimi akava muranda wake kwamakore matatu. Asi akazoshandura pfungwa dzake akamukira Nebhukadhinezari." 
2Kings24:2 Jehovha akatuma vaBhabhironi navaAramu navaMoabhu uye navaAmoni kuti vazorwisa. Akavatuma kunoparadza Judha, sezvakarehwa neshoko raJehovha rakataurwa navaranda vake navaprofita." 
2Kings24:3 Zvirokwazvo zvinhu izvi zvakaitika kuna Judha sezvazvakarayirwa naJehovha, kuitira kuti avabvise pamberi pake nokuda kwezvivi zvaManase nezvose zvaakaita," 
2Kings24:4 zvinosanganisira kuteura ropa risina mhosva. Nokuti akanga azadza Jerusarema neropa risina mhosva, uye Jehovha akanga asingadi kumukanganwira." 
2Kings24:5 Kana zviri zvimwe zvakaitika pakutonga kwaJehoyakimi, nezvose zvaakaita, hazvina kunyorwa here mubhuku renhoroondo dzamadzimambo eJudha?" 
2Kings24:6 Jehoyakimi akazorora namadzibaba ake. Uye Jehoyakini, mwanakomana wake akamutevera paumambo." 
2Kings24:7 Mambo weIjipiti haana kuzobudazve kubva munyika yake nokuti mambo weBhabhironi akanga atora nyika yake yose, kubva kuRwizi rweIjipiti kusvikira kuRwizi Yufuratesi." 
2Kings24:8 Jehoyakini akanga ava namakore gumi namasere paakava mambo, uye akatonga kwemwedzi mitatu muJerusarema. Zita ramai vake rainzi Nehushita mwanasikana waErinatani; vaibva muJerusarema." 
2Kings24:9 Akaita zvakaipa pamberi paJehovha, sezvakanga zvaitwa nababa vake." 
2Kings24:10 Panguva iyoyo varanda vaNebhukadhinezari mambo weBhabhironi vakaenda kuJerusarema vakarikomba," 
2Kings24:11 uye Nebhukadhinezari pachake akasvika kuguta, varanda vake pavakanga vakarikomba." 
2Kings24:12 Jehoyakini mambo weJudha, namai vake, navaranda vake, namakurukota ake, navabati vake vakazvipira vose kwaari. Mugore regumi namasere rokutonga kwamambo weBhabhironi, akatora Jehoyakini akamuita musungwa." 
2Kings24:13 Sezvakanga zvarehwa naJehovha, Nebhukadhinezari akabvisa pfuma yose mutemberi yaJehovha nomumuzinda wamambo, uye akatora midziyo yose yegoridhe yakanga yaitirwa temberi yaJehovha naSoromoni mambo weJudha." 
2Kings24:14 Akatapa Jerusarema rose: vabati vose navarume vehondo vose, navarume voumhizha vose, navapfuri vesimbi—vaiva vanhu zviuru gumi. Varombo vokupedzisira ndivo vakasara chete munyika imomo." 
2Kings24:15 Nebhukadhinezari akatora Jehoyakini akamuita nhapwa kuBhabhironi. Akatorawo mai vamambo, navakadzi vake, navabati vake navarume vaitungamirira nyika muJerusarema akavaendesa kuBhabhironi." 
2Kings24:16 Mambo weBhabhironi akabudisawo hondo yose yavarume zviuru zvinomwe, vakasimba pakurwa, nechiuru chimwe chete chavarume voumhizha navapfuri vesimbi akavaendesa kuBhabhironi." 
2Kings24:17 Akaita Matania babamunini vaJehoyakini, mambo panzvimbo yaJehoyakini uye akashandura zita rake akamutumidza kuti Zedhekia." 
2Kings24:18 Zedhekia akanga ana makore makumi maviri nerimwe chete paakava mambo, uye akatonga muJerusarema kwamakore gumi nerimwe. Zita ramai vake rainzi Hamutari mwanasikana waJeremia; vaibva kuRibhina." 
2Kings24:19 Akaita zvakaipa pamberi paJehovha, sezvakanga zvaita Jehoyakini." 
2Kings24:20 Izvi zvakaitika kuJerusarema neJudha nokuda kwehasha dzaJehovha, uye pakupedzisira akavabvisa pamberi pake. Zvino Zedhekia akamukira mambo weBhabhironi." 
2Kings25:1 Naizvozvo mugore repfumbamwe rokutonga kwaZedhekia, pazuva regumi romwedzi wegumi, Nebhukadhinezari mambo weBhabhironi akaenda kundorwisana neJerusarema nehondo yake yose. Akavaka misasa akakomberedza guta uye akavakawo nhare dzakanga dzakarikomberedza." 
2Kings25:2 Guta rakaramba rakakombwa kusvikira pagore regumi nerimwe chete raMambo Zedhekia. 
2Kings25:3 Pazuva repfumbamwe romwedzi wechina nzara yakanyanya muguta zvokuti makanga musisina zvokudya zvavanhu. 
2Kings25:4 Ipapo rusvingo rweguta rwakapwanyiwa, hondo yose ikatiza usiku napasuo raiva pakati pamasvingo maviri pedyo nebindu ramambo, kunyange veBhabhironi vakanga vakakomba guta. Vakatiza vakananga kuArabha," 
2Kings25:5 asi hondo yavaBhabhironi yakadzinganisa mambo ikamubatira mumapani eJeriko. Varwi vake vose vakaparadzaniswa naye uye vakapararira. 
2Kings25:6 Iye akabatwa. akaendeswa kuna mambo weBhabhironi paRibhira, kwaakandotongwa." 
2Kings25:7 Vakauraya vanakomana vaZedhekia pamberi pake achizviona. Ipapo vakamutushura meso ake, vakamusunga nezvisungo zvamatare vakamutora vakaenda naye kuBhabhironi." 
2Kings25:8 Pazuva rechinomwe romwedzi wechishanu, mugore regumi nepfumbamwe raNebhukadhinezari mambo weBhabhironi, Nebhuzaradhani mukuru wehondo yavachengeti vamambo, muranda wamambo weBhabhironi, akauya kuJerusarema." 
2Kings25:9 Akapisa temberi yaJehovha, nomuzinda wamambo nedzimba dzose dzeJerusarema. Akapisa, dzimba dzose dzaikosha." 
2Kings25:10 Hondo yose yeBhabhironi yaiva pasi pomukuru wavarindi vamambo yakaputsa masvingo aipoteredza Jerusarema. 
2Kings25:11 Nebhuzaradhani mukuru wavarindi akaendesa kuutapwa vanhu vakanga vasara muguta, pamwe chete navamwe vanhu vose zvavo navaya vakanga vaenda kuna mambo weBhabhironi." 
2Kings25:12 Asi mukuru wavarindi akasiya vanhu vakanga vari varombo vokupedzisira munyika kuti vashande muminda yemizambiringa nemimwe minda. 
2Kings25:13 Vanhu veBhabhironi vakaputsa mbiru dzendarira, nengoro neGungwa rendarira zvakanga zviri mutemberi yaJehovha vakatakura ndarira vakaenda nayo kuBhabhironi." 
2Kings25:14 Vakatorawo hari, nefoshoro, nezvidzimiso zvemwenje, nemadhishi uye nemidziyo yose yendarira yaishandiswa mutemberi." 
2Kings25:15 Mukuru wehondo yavarindi vamambo akatora zvaenga zvezvinonhuwira namadhishi okusasa nawo, nezvose zvakanga zvakagadzirwa negoridhe rakaisvonaka kana sirivha." 
2Kings25:16 Ndarira yakabva pambiru mbiri, Gungwa nengoro, zvakanga zvagadzirirwa temberi yaJehovha naSoromoni, zvakanga zvakawanda zvokuti zvaisagona kuyerwa." 
2Kings25:17 Mbiru imwe neimwe yaiva yakareba makubhiti gumi namaserea. Musoro wendarira waiva pamusoro pembiru wakanga wakareba makubhiti matatub uye wakanga wakashongedzwa nomumbure uye namatamba endarira akanga akaupoteredza. Imwe mbiru nomumbure wayo yakanga yakadarowo. 
2Kings25:18 Mukuru wavarindi akatora Seraya muprista mukuru naZefania muprista aimutevera paukuru navachengeti vomukova vatatu akavaita vasungwa. 
2Kings25:19 Pane avo vakanga vasara muguta, akatora mutariri wavarume vokurwa navapi vamazano vamambo vashanu. Akatorawo munyori akanga ari mubati mukuru ainyoresa vanhu venyika uye navamwe vanhu vake vaisvika makumi matanhatu vakawanikwa muguta." 
2Kings25:20 Nebhuzaradhani mukuru wavarindi akavatora vose akavaendesa kuna mambo weBhabhironi paRibhura. 
2Kings25:21 Ipapo paRibhura munyika yeHamati, mambo akarayira kuti vaurayiwe. Saka Judha yakaenda kuutapwa, kure nenyika yayo." 
2Kings25:22 Nebhukadhinezari mambo weBhabhironi akagadza Gedharia mwanakomana waAhikami, mwanakomana waShafani, kuti atonge vanhu vaakanga asiya muJudha." 
2Kings25:23 Vakuru vose vehondo navanhu vavo pavakanzwa kuti mambo weBhabhironi akanga agadza Gedharia kuti ave mutongi, vakauya kuna Gedharia paMizipa, Ishumaeri mwanakomana waNetania, naJohanani mwanakomana waKarea, naSeraya mwanakomana waTanhumeti muNetofati, naJaazania mwanakomana womuMaakati, navanhu vavo." 
2Kings25:24 Gedharia akaita mhiko kuti avasimbise, ivo navanhu vavo. Akati kwavari, “Musatya vabati vomuBhabhironi. Garai munyika mushandire mambo weBhabhironi zvigokunakirai.”" 
2Kings25:25 Kunyange zvakadaro, mumwedzi wechinomwe Ishumaeri mwanakomana waNetania, mwanakomana waErishama, akanga ari weropa roushe, akauya navarume gumi akauraya Gedharia navarume veJudha neveBhabhironi vaiva naye paMizipa." 
2Kings25:26 Zvadai, vanhu vose kubva kuvadiki kusvika kuvakuru navakuru vehondo pamwe chete vakatizira kuIjipiti, vachitya vaBhabhironi." 
2Kings25:27 Mugore ramakumi matatu namanomwe rokutapwa kwaJehoyakini mambo weJudha, mugore rakatanga Evhiri Merodhaki mambo weBhabhironi kutonga, akasunungura Jehoyakini kubva muusungwa pazuva ramakumi manomwe romwedzi wegumi nemiviri." 
2Kings25:28 Akataura zvakanaka kwaari akamupa chigaro chokukudzwa chakapfuura chamamwe madzimambo akanga anaye muBhabhironi. 
2Kings25:29 Naizvozvo Jehoyakini akabvisa nguo dzake dzousungwa uye akadya patafura yamambo nguva nenguva pamazuva ose oupenyu hwake. 
2Kings25:30 Zuva nezuva mambo akapa Jehoyakini mugove wezuva rimwe nerimwe mazuva ose oupenyu hwake. 
1Chronicles1:1 Adhamu, Seti, Enoshi," 
1Chronicles1:2 Kenani, Maharareri, Jaredhi," 
1Chronicles1:3 Inoki, Metusera, Rameki, Noa." 
1Chronicles1:4 Vanakomana vaNoa vaiva: Shemu, Hamu, naJafeti." 
1Chronicles1:5 Vanakomana vaJafeti vaiva: Gomeri, Magogi, Madhai, Javhani, Tubhari, Mesheki naTirasi." 
1Chronicles1:6 Vanakomana vaGomeri vaiva: Ashikenazi, Rifati naTogama." 
1Chronicles1:7 Vanakomana vaJavhani vaiva: Erisha, Tashishi, muKitimi nomuRodhanimi." 
1Chronicles1:8 Vanakomana vaHamu vaiva: Kushi, Miziraimi, Puti naKenani." 
1Chronicles1:9 Vanakomana vaKushi vaiva: Sebha, Havhira, Sabata, Raama naSabhiteka. Vanakomana vaRaama vaiva: Shebha naDedhani." 
1Chronicles1:10 Kushi aiva baba vaNimurodhi; uyo akakura akava murwi mukuru panyika. 
1Chronicles1:11 Miziraimi aiva baba vavaRudhi, vaAnami, vaRehabhi, vaNafutuhi," 
1Chronicles1:12 vaPataini, vaKasiruhi (umo makazobvawo vaFiristia) navaKafitori." 
1Chronicles1:13 Kenani aiva baba vaSidhoni dangwe rake, nevaHiti," 
1Chronicles1:14 vaJebhusi vaAmori, vaGirigashi," 
1Chronicles1:15 vaHivhi, vaAriki, vaSini," 
1Chronicles1:16 vaArivhadhi, vaZemari nevaHamati." 
1Chronicles1:17 Vanakomana vaShemu vaiva: Eramu, Ashua, Arifakadhi, Rudhi naAramu. Vanakomana vaAramu vaiva: Uzi, Huri, Geteri naMesheki." 
1Chronicles1:18 Arifakadhi aiva baba vaShera uye aiva baba vaEbheri. 
1Chronicles1:19 Vanakomana vaviri vakaberekerwa Ebheri: mumwe ainzi Peregi, nokuti panguva yake nyika yakanga yakakamurana; munun'una wake ainzi Jokitani." 
1Chronicles1:20 Jokitani aiva baba vaArimodhadhi, Sherefi, Hazarimavheti, Jera," 
1Chronicles1:21 Hadhorami, Uzari, Dhikira," 
1Chronicles1:22 Obhari, Abhimaeri, Shebha," 
1Chronicles1:23 Ofiri, Havhira, naJobhabhi. Ava vose vaiva vanakomana vaJokitani." 
1Chronicles1:23 Ofiri, Havhira, naJobhabhi. Ava vose vaiva vanakomana vaJokitani." 
1Chronicles1:24 Shemu, Arifakisadhi, Shera," 
1Chronicles1:25 Ebheri, Peregi, Reu," 
1Chronicles1:26 Serugi, Nahori, Tera" 
1Chronicles1:27 naAbhuramu (iye Abhurahama). 
1Chronicles1:28 Vanakomana vaAbhurahama vaiva: Isaka naIshumaeri. 
1Chronicles1:29 Izvi ndizvo zvaiva zvizvarwa zvavo: Nebhayoti dangwe raIshumaeri, Kedhari, Adhibheeri, Mibhisani," 
1Chronicles1:30 Mishima, Dhuma, Masa, Hadhadhi, Tema," 
1Chronicles1:31 Jeturi, Nafishi, naKedhema. Ava ndivo vaiva vanakomana vaIshumaeri." 
1Chronicles1:32 Vanakomana vakaberekwa naKetura, murongo waAbhurahama vaiva: Zimirani, Jokishani, Medhani, Midhiani, Ishibhaki naShua. Vanakomana vaJokishani vaiva: Shebha naDhedhani." 
1Chronicles1:33 Vanakomana vaMidhiani vaiva: Efa, Eferi, Hanoki, Abhidha naEridha. Ava vose vaiva zvizvarwa zvaKetura." 
1Chronicles1:34 Abhurahama aiva baba vaIsaka. Vanakomana vaIsaka vaiva: Esau naIsraeri. 
1Chronicles1:35 Vanakomana vaSeiri vaiva: Erifazi, Reueri, Jeushi, Jaramu, naKora." 
1Chronicles1:36 Vana vaErifazi vaiva: Temani, Omari, Zefa, Gatami, naKenazi; naTimina, vakabereka Amareki." 
1Chronicles1:37 Vanakomana vaReueri vaiva: Nahati, Zera, Shama naMiza." 
1Chronicles1:38 Vanakomana vaSeiri vaiva: Rotani, Shobhari, Zibheoni, Ana, Dhishoni, Ezeri naDhishani." 
1Chronicles1:39 Vanakomana vaRotani vaiva: Hori naHomami, Timina aiva hanzvadzi yaRotani." 
1Chronicles1:40 Vanakomana vaShobhari vaiva: Arivhani, Manahati, Ebhari, Shefo naOnami. Vanakomana vaZibheoni vaiva: Aya naAna." 
1Chronicles1:41 Mwanakomana waAna ainzi Dhishoni. Vanakomana vaDhishoni vaiva: Hemidhani, Eshibhani, Itirani naKerani." 
1Chronicles1:42 Vanakomana vaEzeri vaiva: Bhirihani, Zaavhani naAkani. Vanakomana vaDhishani vaiva: Uzi naArani." 
1Chronicles1:43 Aya ndiwo aiva madzimambo aitonga muEdhomu kusati kwava namambo upi zvake aitonga muIsraeri vaiva: Bhera mwanakomana waBheori, guta rake rainzi Dhinihabha." 
1Chronicles1:44 Bhera paakafa, Jobhabhu mwanakomana waZera aibva kuBhozira akamutevera paumambo." 
1Chronicles1:44 Bhera paakafa, Jobhabhu mwanakomana waZera aibva kuBhozira akamutevera paumambo." 
1Chronicles1:45 Jobhabhu paakafa, Hushami aibva kunyika yevaTemani akamutevera paumambo." 
1Chronicles1:45 Jobhabhu paakafa, Hushami aibva kunyika yevaTemani akamutevera paumambo." 
1Chronicles1:46 Hushami paakafa, Hadhadhi mwanakomana waBedhadhi uyo akakunda Midhiani munyika yaMoabhu akamutevera paumambo. Guta rake rainzi Avhiti." 
1Chronicles1:47 Hadhadhi paakafa Samira aibva kuMasireka akamutevera paumambo. 
1Chronicles1:48 Samira paakafa, Shauri aibva kuRehobhoti parwizi akamutevera paumambo." 
1Chronicles1:49 Shauri paakafa Bhaari Hanani mwanakomana waAkibhoni akamutevera paumambo. 
1Chronicles1:50 Bhaari Hanani paakafa, Hadhadhi akamutevera paumambo. Guta rake rainzi Pau uye mudzimai wake ainzi Mehetabheri mwanasikana waMezahabhi." 
1Chronicles1:51 Hadhadhi akafawo. Madzishe eEdhomu aiva: Timina, Arivha, Jeteti" 
1Chronicles1:52 Ohoribhama, Era, Pinoni," 
1Chronicles1:53 Kenazi, Temani, Mibhizari," 
1Chronicles1:54 Magidhieri naIrami. Aya ndiwo aiva madzishe eEdhomu. 
1Chronicles2:1 Ava ndivo vaiva vanakomana vaIsraeri: Rubheni, Simeoni, Revhi, Judha, Isakari, Zebhuruni," 
1Chronicles2:2 Dhani, Josefa, Benjamini, Nafutari, Gadhi naAsheri." 
1Chronicles2:3 Vanakomana vaJudha vaiva: Eri, Onani naShera. Vatatu ava akavaberekerwa naShua mudzimai wechiKenani. Eri dangwe raJudha, akanga akaipa pamberi paJehovha. Saka Jehovha akamuuraya." 
1Chronicles2:4 Tamari muroora waJudha akamuberekera Perezi naZera. Judha aiva navanakomana vashanu vose pamwe chete. 
1Chronicles2:5 Vanakomana vaPerezi vaiva: Hezironi naHamuri. 
1Chronicles2:6 Vanakomana vaZera vaiva: Zimuri, Etani, Hemani, Karikori naDharidha; vose vaiva vashanu." 
1Chronicles2:7 Mwanakomana waKarimi aiva: Akari, uyo akauyisa matambudziko pamusoro peIsraeri nokutyora murayiro wokusatora zvinhu zvakaereswa." 
1Chronicles2:8 Mwanakomana waEtani ainzi Azaria. 
1Chronicles2:9 Vanakomana vaHezironi vaiva: Jerameeri, Rami naKarebhu." 
1Chronicles2:10 Rami aiva baba vaAminadhabhi, uye Aminadhabhi aiva baba vaNashoni mutungamiri wavanhu veJudha." 
1Chronicles2:11 Nashoni aiva baba vaSarimoni, Sarimoni ari baba vaBhoazi," 
1Chronicles2:12 Bhoazi aiva baba vaObhedhi uye Obhedhi aiva baba vaJese. 
1Chronicles2:13 Jese aiva baba vaEriabhi dangwe rake; mwanakomana wake wechipiri ainzi Abhinadhabhi, wechitatu ainzi Shimea," 
1Chronicles2:14 wechina ainzi Netaneri, wechishanu ainzi Radhai," 
1Chronicles2:15 wechitanhatu ainzi Ozemi uye wechinomwe ainzi Dhavhidhi. 
1Chronicles2:16 Hanzvadzi dzavo dzaiva Zeruya naAbhigairi. Vanakomana vatatu vaZeruya vaiva Abhishai, Joabhu naAsaheri." 
1Chronicles2:17 Abhigairi aiva amai vaAmasa, baba vaAmasa vainzi Jeteri muIshumaeri." 
1Chronicles2:18 Karebhu mwanakomana waHezironi akabereka vana nomudzimai wake Azubha (uye naJerioti). Ava ndivo vaiva vanakomana vake: Jesheri Shobhabhi naAridhoni. 
1Chronicles2:19 Azubha paakafa Karebhu akaroora Efurati uyo akamuberekera Huri. 
1Chronicles2:20 Huri aiva baba vaUri uye Uri aiva baba vaBhezareri. 
1Chronicles2:21 Shure kwaizvozvo, Hezironi akavata nomwanasikana waMakiri baba vaGireadhi; akanga amuwana paakanga ava namakore makumi matanhatu; akamuberekera Segubhi." 
1Chronicles2:22 Segubhi aiva baba vaJairi, uyo aitonga maguta makumi maviri namatatu muGireadhi." 
1Chronicles2:23 Asi Geshuri naAramu vakatapa Habhoti Jairi pamwe chete neKenoti namaguta akaripoteredza, maguta makumi matanhatu. Ava vose vaiva vorudzi rwaMakiri baba vaGireadhi." 
1Chronicles2:24 Mushure mokunge Hezironi afira muKarebhu Efurata, Abhija mudzimai waHezironi akamuberekera Ashuri baba vaTekoa." 
1Chronicles2:25 Vanakomana vaJerameeri dangwe raHezironi vaiva: Rami dangwe rake, Bhuna, Oreni, Ozemi naAhija." 
1Chronicles2:26 Jerameeri akanga ane mumwe mukadzi, zita rake ainzi Atara. Akanga ari amai vaOnami." 
1Chronicles2:27 Vanakomana vaRami dangwe raJerameeri vaiva: Maazi, Jamini naEkeri." 
1Chronicles2:28 Vanakomana vaOnami vaiva: Shamai naJadha. Vanakomana vaShamai vaiva: Nadhabhi naAbhishuri. 
1Chronicles2:29 Mukadzi waAbhishuri ainzi Abhihairi akamuberekera Abhani naMoridhi. 
1Chronicles2:30 Vanakomana vaNadhabhi vaiva: Seredhi naApaimi. Seredhi akafa asina vana. 
1Chronicles2:31 Mwanakomana waApaimi ainzi Ishi uyo aiva baba vaSheshani. Sheshani aiva baba vaArai. 
1Chronicles2:32 Vanakomana vaJadha, munun'una waShamai vaiva: Jeteri naJonatani. Jeteri akafa asina vana." 
1Chronicles2:33 Vanakomana vaJonatani vaiva: Pereti naZaza. Ava ndivo vaiva zvizvarwa zvorudzi zvaJerameeri. 
1Chronicles2:34 Sheshani aiva asina vanakomana, aiva navanasikana chete. Aiva nomuranda wechiIjipita ainzi Jara." 
1Chronicles2:35 Sheshani akapa mwanasikana wake kuti ave mukadzi womuranda wake. Jara akamuberekera Atai. 
1Chronicles2:36 Atai aiva baba vaNatani, Natani aiva baba vaZabadhi," 
1Chronicles2:37 Zabadhi baba vaEfirari, Efirari baba vaObedhi," 
1Chronicles2:38 Obedhi baba vaJehu, Jehu baba vaAzaria," 
1Chronicles2:39 Azaria baba vaHerezi, Herezi baba vaEreasa," 
1Chronicles2:40 Ereasa baba vaSisimai, Sisimai baba vaSharumi," 
1Chronicles2:41 Sharumi baba vaJekamia, uye Jekamia aiva baba vaErishama." 
1Chronicles2:42 Vanakomana vaKarebhu munun'una waJerameeri vaiva: Mesha dangwe rake, uyo aiva baba vaZifi uye nomwanakomana wake Maresha, uyo aiva baba vaHebhuroni." 
1Chronicles2:43 Vanakomana vaHebhuroni vaiva: Kora, Tapuwa, Rekemu naShema." 
1Chronicles2:44 Shema aiva baba vaRahamu, uye Rahamu baba vaJorikeami. Rekemu aiva baba vaShamai." 
1Chronicles2:45 Mwanakomana waShamai ainzi Maoni, uye Maoni aiva baba vaBheti Zuri." 
1Chronicles2:46 Mumwe murongo waKarebhu ainzi Efa ndiye aiva amai vaHarani, Moza naGazezi. Harani aiva baba vaGazezi." 
1Chronicles2:47 Vanakomana vaJadhai vaiva: Regemu, Jotamu, Geshani, Pereti, Efa naShaafi." 
1Chronicles2:48 Mumwe murongo waKarebhu ainzi Maaka ndiye aiva amai vaShebheri naTirana. 
1Chronicles2:49 Akaberekawo Shaafi baba vaMadhimana naShevha baba vaMakibhena naGibhea. Mwanasikana waKarebhu ainzi Akisa. 
1Chronicles2:50 Izvi ndizvo zvizvarwa zvaKarebhu. Vanakomana vaHuri dangwe raEfurata: Shobhari baba vaKiriati Jearimi," 
1Chronicles2:51 Sarima baba vaBheterehema, naHarefi baba vaBheti Gadheri." 
1Chronicles2:52 Zvizvarwa zvaShobhari baba vaKiriati Jearimi zvaiva: Haroe, hafu yavaManahati," 
1Chronicles2:53 uye dzimba dzaKiriati Jearimi dzaiva: vaItiri, vaPuti, vaShumati navaMishirai. Kuna ivava kwakabva vaZorati navaEshitaori." 
1Chronicles2:54 Zvizvarwa zvaSarima zvaiva: Bheterehema, vaNetofati, Atiroti Bheti Joabhu, hafu yavaManahati, vaZori," 
1Chronicles2:55 uye dzimba dzavanyori vaigara paJabhezi dzaiva: vaTirati, vaShimeati navaSukati. Ava ndivo vaKeni vakabva kuna Hamati baba veimba yaRekabhi." 
1Chronicles3:1 Ava ndivo vanakomana vaDhavhidhi vaakaberekerwa ari kuHebhuroni: Dangwe rake rainzi Amunoni mwanakomana waAhinoami weJezireeri. Wechipiri ainzi Dhanieri, mwanakomana waAbhigairi weKarimeri;" 
1Chronicles3:2 wechitatu, Abhusaromu mwanakomana waMaaka mwanasikana waTarimai mambo weGeshuri; wechina, Adhoniya mwanakomana waHagiti," 
1Chronicles3:3 wechishanu, Shefatia mwanakomana waAbhitari uye wechitanhatu Itireami nomukadzi wake Egira." 
1Chronicles3:4 Ava vatanhatu vakaberekerwa Dhavhidhi muHebhuroni umo maakatonga kwamakore manomwe nemwedzi mitanhatu. Dhavhidhi akazotonga muJerusarema kwamakore makumi matatu namatatu 
1Chronicles3:5 uye ava ndivo vana vaakaberekerwa ikoko. Vaiva: Shamua, Shobhabhi, Natani naSoromoni. Ava vana vakaberekwa naBhatishebha mwanasikana waAmieri." 
1Chronicles3:6 Kwaivawo naIbhari, Erisua, Erifereti" 
1Chronicles3:7 Noga, Nefegi, Jafia," 
1Chronicles3:8 Erishama, Eriadha naErifereti, vose vaiva vapfumbamwe." 
1Chronicles3:9 Ava vose vaiva vanakomana vaDhavhidhi, tisingaverengi vanakomana vake vaakaita navarongo vake. Uye Tamari aiva hanzvadzi yavo." 
1Chronicles3:10 Mwanakomana waSoromoni ainzi Rehobhoamu, Abhija mwanakomana wake, Asa mwanakomana wake, Jehoshafati mwanakomana wake," 
1Chronicles3:11 Jehoramu mwanakomana wake, Ahazia mwanakomana wake, Joashi mwanakomana wake," 
1Chronicles3:12 Amazia mwanakomana wake, Azaria mwanakomana wake, Jotamu mwanakomana wake," 
1Chronicles3:13 Ahazi mwanakomana wake, Hezekia mwanakomana wake, Manase mwanakomana wake," 
1Chronicles3:14 Amani mwanakomana wake Josia mwanakomana wake. 
1Chronicles3:15 Vanakomana vaJosia vaiva: Johanani dangwe, Jehoyakimi wechipiri, Zedhekia wechitatu naSharumi wechina." 
1Chronicles3:16 Vakatevera Jehoyakimi vaiva: Jehoyakini mwanakomana wake naZedhekia. 
1Chronicles3:17 Zvizvarwa zvaJehoyakini mutapwa zvaiva: Shearitieri mwanakomana wake," 
1Chronicles3:18 Marikirami, Pedhaya, Shenazari, Jekamia, Hoshama naNedhabhia." 
1Chronicles3:19 Vanakomana vaPedhaya vaiva: Zerubhabheri naShimei. Vanakomana vaZerubhabheri vaiva: Meshurami naHanania. Sheromiti aiva hanzvadzi yavo. 
1Chronicles3:20 Kwaivawo navamwe vashanu vaiti: Hashubha, Oheri, Bherekia, Hasadhia naJushabhi-Hesedhi." 
1Chronicles3:21 Zvizvarwa zvaHanania zvaiva: Peratia naJeshaya, navanakomana vaRefaya, vaArinani vaObhadhia navaShekania." 
1Chronicles3:22 Zvizvarwa zvaShekania zvaiva: Shemaya navanakomana vake vaiti: Hatushi, Igari, Bharia, Nearia naShafati, vatanhatu vose pamwe chete." 
1Chronicles3:23 Vanakomana vaNearia vaiva: Erioenai, Hizikia naAzirikamu, vatatu pamwe chete." 
1Chronicles3:24 Vanakomana vaErioenai vaiva: Hodhavhia, Eriashibhi, Peraya, Akubhi, Johanani, Dheraya naAnani, vanomwe pamwe chete." 
1Chronicles4:1 Zvizvarwa zvaJudha zvaiva: Perezi, Hezironi, Karimi, Huri naShobhari." 
1Chronicles4:2 Reaya mwanakomana waShobhari aiva baba vaJahati, uye Jahati ari baba vaAhumai naRahadhi. Idzi ndidzo dzaiva dzimba dzavaZorati." 
1Chronicles4:3 Ava ndivo vaiva vanakomana vaEtami: Jezireeri, Ishima naIdhibashi. Hanzvadzi yavo yainzi Hazereriponi." 
1Chronicles4:4 Penueri aiva baba vaGedhori uye Ezeri aiva baba vaHusha. Izvi ndizvo zvaiva zvizvarwa zvaHuri dangwe raEfurata baba vaBheterehema. 
1Chronicles4:5 Ashuri baba vaTekoa vaiva navakadzi vaviri, Hera naNaara." 
1Chronicles4:6 Naara akamuberekera Ahuzami, Heferi, Temeni naHaashashitari. Izvi ndizvo zvaiva zvizvarwa zvaNaara." 
1Chronicles4:7 Vanakomana vaHera vaiva: Zareti, Zonani, Etinani" 
1Chronicles4:8 naKozi uyo aiva baba vaAnubhi naHazobhebha nevedzimba dzaAhareri mwanakomana waHaruni. 
1Chronicles4:9 Jabhezi aikudzwa zvikuru kukunda vanun'una vake. Mai vake vakamutumidza kuti Jabhezi vachiti, “Ndakamubereka mukurwadziwa.”" 
1Chronicles4:10 Jabhezi akachema kuna Mwari waIsraeri achiti, “Haiwa, dai mandiropafadza mukakurisa nyika yangu! Ruoko rwenyu ngaruve neni uye rundichengete kune zvinokuvadza kuitira kuti ndisarwadziwa.” Uye Mwari akamupa zvaakakumbira." 
1Chronicles4:11 Kerubhi, munun'una waShuha aiva baba vaMehiri uyo aiva baba vaEshitoni." 
1Chronicles4:12 Eshitoni aiva baba vaBheti Rafa, Pasea naTehina baba vaIri Nahashi. Ava ndivo vaiva varume veReka." 
1Chronicles4:13 Vanakomana vaKenazi vaiva: Otinieri naSeraya. Vanakomana vaOtinieri vaiva: Hatati naMeonotai. 
1Chronicles4:14 Meonotai aiva baba vaOfira. Seraya aiva baba vaJoabhu, baba vaGeharashimi. Vakapiwa zita iri nokuti vaiva mhizha." 
1Chronicles4:15 Vanakomana vaKarebhu mwanakomana waJefune vaiva: Iru, Era naNaami. Mwanakomana waEra ainzi Kenazi." 
1Chronicles4:16 Vanakomana vaJehareri vaiva: Zifi, Zifa, Tiria naAsareri." 
1Chronicles4:17 Vanakomana vaEzira vaiva: Jeteri, Meredhi, Eferi, naJaroni. Mumwe wavakadzi vaMeredhi akavaberekera Miriamu, Shamai naIshibha baba vaEshitemoa." 
1Chronicles4:18 Mukadzi wake wechiJudha akabereka Jeredhi baba vaGedhori, Hebheri baba vaSoko, naJekutiri baba vaZanoa. Ava ndivo vaiva vana vomwanasikana waFaro ainzi Bhitia akanga aroorwa naMeredhi." 
1Chronicles4:19 Vanakomana vomukadzi waHodhia, hanzvadzi yaNahamu vaiva: baba vaKeira muGarimi naEshitemoa muMaakati." 
1Chronicles4:20 Vanakomana vaShimoni vaiva: Amunoni, Rina, Bheni, Hanani naTironi. Zvizvarwa zvaIshi zvaiva: Zoheti naBheni Zoheti." 
1Chronicles4:21 Vanakomana vaShera mwanakomana waJudha vaiva: Eri baba vaReka, Raadha baba vaMaresha nedzimba dzavairuka mucheka wakaisvonaka paBheti Ashibea." 
1Chronicles4:22 Jokimi, varume veKezebha naJoashi naSarafi vaitonga muMoabhu naJashubhi Rehemi. (Zvinyorwa izvi ndezvakare.)" 
1Chronicles4:23 Vaiva vaumbi vehari vaigara paNetaimi nepaGedhera; vaigarapo vachishandira mambo. 
1Chronicles4:24 Zvizvarwa zvaSimeoni zvaiva: Nemueri, Jamini, Jaribhi, Zera naShauri;" 
1Chronicles4:25 Sharumi aiva mwanakomana waShauri, Mibhisami ari mwanakomana wake naMishima mwanakomana wake." 
1Chronicles4:26 Zvizvarwa zvaMishima zvaiva: Hamueri mwanakomana wake, Zakuri mwanakomana wake naShimei mwanakomana wake." 
1Chronicles4:27 Shimei aiva navanakomana gumi navatanhatu navanasikana vatanhatu, asi vanun'una vake vaiva vasina vana vakawanda; saka rudzi rwavo haruna kuwanda sokuwanda kwavanhu vavaJudha." 
1Chronicles4:28 Vaigara muBheerishebha Moradha, Hazari Shuari," 
1Chronicles4:29 Bhiriha, Ezemi, Toradhi," 
1Chronicles4:30 Bhehieri, Horima, Zikiragi," 
1Chronicles4:31 Bheti Makabhoti, Hazari Susimi, Bheti Bhiri naShaaraimi. Aya ndiwo aiva maguta avo kusvikira pakutonga kwaDhavhidhi." 
1Chronicles4:32 Misha yaiva yakaapoteredza yaiva: Etami, Aini, Rimini, Tokeni neAshani, maguta mashanu" 
1Chronicles4:33 nemisha yose yakanga yakaapoteredza kusvika kuBhaarati. Idzi ndidzo nzvimbo dzavaigara. Uye vaichengeta zvinyorwa zvenhoroondo yavo. 
1Chronicles4:34 Meshobhabhi, Jamireki, Josha mwanakomana waAmazia," 
1Chronicles4:35 Joere, Jehu mwanakomana waAsieri," 
1Chronicles4:36 uye Erioenai, Jaakobha, Jeshohaya, Asaya, Adhieri, Jesimieri, Bhenaya," 
1Chronicles4:37 naZiza mwanakomana waSifi, mwanakomana waAroni mwanakomana waJedhaya, mwanakomana waShimiri, mwanakomana waShemaya." 
1Chronicles4:38 Varume vakanyorwa pamusoro namazita avo vaiva vatungamiri vedzimba dzavo. Mhuri dzavo dzakakura kwazvo 
1Chronicles4:39 uye vakaenda kumucheto kweGedhori kurutivi rwokumabvazuva nomupata vachitsvakira makwai avo mafuro. 
1Chronicles4:40 Vakawana mafuro akanaka kwazvo akapfuma, uye nyika yakanaka ine nzvimbo huru ine runyararo norugare. VaHamu ndivo vakanga vachimbogaramo kare." 
1Chronicles4:41 Varume vane mazita akanyorwa vakauya pamazuva aHezekia mambo waJudha. Vakarwisa vaHamu mumatende avo navaMeuniwo vaivapo vakavaparadza zvachose kusvikira nhasi. Ipapo vakazogarapo munzvimbo yavo nokuti paiva namafuro amakwai avo. 
1Chronicles4:42 Uye mazana mashanu avo vaiva vaSimeoni vachitungamirirwa naPeratia, Nearia, Refaya naUzieri, vanakomana vaIshi, vakandorwisa nyika yamakomo yeSeiri." 
1Chronicles4:43 Vakauraya vaAmareki vakanga vasara avo vakanga vapunyuka, uye vakagarapo kusvikira nhasi." 
1Chronicles5:1 Vanakomana vaRubheni dangwe raIsraeri. (Ndiye aiva dangwe, asi paakasvibisa nhoo yewaniso yababa vake, kodzero dzoudangwe hwake dzakapiwa kuvanakomana vaJosefa mwanakomana waIsraeri; saka haana kuzoverengerwawo munhoroondo dzamadzitateguru ake maererano nekodzero yokuberekwa kwake." 
1Chronicles5:2 Uye kunyange zvazvo Judha aiva akasimba kwazvo kupfuura vana vababa vake vose, uye kunyange zvazvo mutongi akazobuda maari, kodzero youdangwe yaiva yaJosefa.)" 
1Chronicles5:3 Vanakomana vaRubheni dangwe raIsraeri vaiva: Hanoki, Paru, Hezironi naKarimi." 
1Chronicles5:4 Zvizvarwa zvaJoere zvaiva: Shemaya mwanakomana wake," 
1Chronicles5:5 naMika mwanakomana wake, naReaya mwanakomana wake, naBhaari mwanakomana wake." 
1Chronicles5:6 Uye naBheera mwanakomana wake uyo akatorwa akaiswa muutapwa naTigirati-Pireseri mambo weAsiria. Bheera akanga ari mutungamiri wavaRubheni. 
1Chronicles5:7 Hama dzavo nedzimba dzavo dzakanyorwa munhoroondo dzamadzitateguru avo dzaiva: Jeyeri aiva Ishe, naZekaria uye" 
1Chronicles5:8 Bhera mwanakomana waAzazi, mwanakomana waShema, mwanakomana waJoere. Vakagara munzvimbo yaibva kuAroeri kusvikira kuNebho neBhaari Meoni." 
1Chronicles5:9 Kumabvazuva vakatora nyika kusvikira pamuganhu wegwenga rinosvika kuRwizi Yufuratesi nokuti zvipfuwo zvavo zvakanga zvawanda muGireadhi. 
1Chronicles5:10 Panguva yokutonga kwaSauro vakarwa naHagiri vakavakunda vakagara mumatende avaHagiri mudunhu rose rokumabvazuva eGireadhi. 
1Chronicles5:11 VaGadhi vakanga vakavakidzana navo muBhashani kusvikira kuSareka: 
1Chronicles5:12 Joere ndiye aiva ishe, Shafami ari wechipiri, kuchizotevera Janai naShafati, muBhashani." 
1Chronicles5:13 Hama dzavo, tichiverenga mhuri dzavo, dzaiva: Mikaeri, Meshurami, Shobha, Jorai, Jakani, Zia naEbheri, vanomwe pamwe chete." 
1Chronicles5:14 Ava ndivo vaiva vanakomana vaAbhihairi mwanakomana waHuri, mwanakomana waJarowa, mwanakomana Gireadhi, mwanakomana waMikaeri, mwanakomana waJeshishai, mwanakomana waJadho, mwanakomana waBhuzi." 
1Chronicles5:15 Ahi mwanakomana waAbhidhieri, mwanakomana waGuni, ndiye aiva mukuru wemhuri yavo." 
1Chronicles5:16 VaGadhi vaigara muGireadhi, muBhashani nomumisha yaro yakaripoteredza, uye nomumafuro ose eSharoni kusvikira kwaanogumira." 
1Chronicles5:17 Izvi zvose zvakanyorwa munhoroondo dzamadzitateguru avo munguva yokutonga kwaJotamu mambo weJudha naJerobhoamu mambo weIsraeri. 
1Chronicles5:18 VaRubheni, vaGadhi norudzi rwehafu rwaManase vaiva navarume zviuru makumi mana nezvina namazana manomwe namakumi matanhatu vakanga vakagadzirira kundorwa, varume vakasimba vaigona kushandisa nhoo nomunondo, uye vaigona kushandisa uta, uye vakanga vakadzidziswa kurwa." 
1Chronicles5:19 Vakarwa navaHagiri, vaJeturi, vaNafishi navaNodhabhi." 
1Chronicles5:20 Vakabatsirwa pakurwa navo, uye Mwari akaisa vaHagiri, navose vaiva kurutivi rwavo, mumaoko avo, nokuti vakanga vachema kwaari vari pakurwa. Iye akapindura minyengetero yavo nokuti vakavimba naye." 
1Chronicles5:21 Vakapamba zvipfuwo zvavaHagiri zvaiti: ngamera zviuru makumi mashanu zvengamera, zviuru mazana maviri ane makumi mashanu zvamakwai nezviuru zviviri zvembongoro. Vakatapawo zviuru zana zvavanhu," 
1Chronicles5:22 uye vamwe vazhinji vakaurayiwa nokuti kurwa uku kwaiva kwaMwari. Uye vakagara munyika iyoyi kusvikira pakutapwa. 
1Chronicles5:23 Vanhu verudzi rwehafu rwaManase vaiva vazhinji vakagara munyika yaibva kuBhashani ichisvika kuBhari Hemoni ndiko kuSeniri (Gomo reHemoni). 
1Chronicles5:24 Ava ndivo vaiva vakuru vedzimba dzavo: Eferi, Erieri, Azireri, Jeremia, Hadhavhia naJadhieri. Ava vaiva varwi vakashinga, varume vembiri uye vari vakuru vedzimba dzavo." 
1Chronicles5:25 Asi vakanga vasina kutendeka kuna Mwari wamadzibaba avo, vakaita ufeve hwokunamata vamwari vavanhu venyika iyi avo vakanga vaparadzwa naMwari pamberi pavo." 
1Chronicles5:26 Saka Mwari waIsraeri akamutsa mweya waPuri mambo weAsiria iwo mweya waTigirati-Pireseri mambo weAsiria, akatapa vaRubheni, vaGadhi norudzi rwehafu rwaManase. Akavatora akandovaisa kuHarahi, Habhori, Hara nokurwizi Gozani uko kwavari kusvikira zuva ranhasi." 
1Chronicles6:1 Vanakomana vaRevhi vaiva Gerishoni, Kohati naMerari." 
1Chronicles6:2 Vanakomana vaKohati vaiva: Amiramu, Izhari, Hebhuroni naUzieri." 
1Chronicles6:3 Vana vaAmiramu vaiva: Aroni, Mozisi naMiriamu. Vanakomana vaAroni vaiva: Nadhabhi, Abhihu, Ereazari naItamari." 
1Chronicles6:4 Ereazari aiva baba vaFinehasi, Finehasi baba vaAbhishua." 
1Chronicles6:5 Abhishua baba vaBhuki, Bhuki baba vaUzi," 
1Chronicles6:6 Uzi baba vaZerahia, Zerahia baba vaMerayoti," 
1Chronicles6:7 Merayoti baba vaAmaria, Amaria baba vaAhitubhi," 
1Chronicles6:8 Ahitubhi baba vaZadhoki, Zadhoki baba vaAhimaazi," 
1Chronicles6:9 Ahimaazi baba vaAzaria, Azaria baba vaJohanani," 
1Chronicles6:10 Johanani baba vaAzaria (ndiye aibata basa somuprista mutemberi yakavakwa naSoromoni muJerusarema). 
1Chronicles6:11 Azaria baba vaAmaria, Amaria baba vaAhitubhi." 
1Chronicles6:12 Ahitubhi baba vaZadhoki, Zadhoki baba vaSharumi," 
1Chronicles6:13 Sharumi baba vaHirikia, Hirikia baba vaAzaria," 
1Chronicles6:14 Azaria baba vaSeraya uye Seraya baba vaJehozadhaki. 
1Chronicles6:15 Jehozadhaki akadzingwa apo Jehovha akaendesa Judha neJerusarema kuutapwa noruoko rwaNebhukadhinezari. 
1Chronicles6:16 Vanakomana vaRevhi vaiva: Gerishoni, Kohati naMerari." 
1Chronicles6:17 Aya ndiwo mazita avanakomana vaGerishoni: Ribhini naShimei. 
1Chronicles6:18 Vanakomana vaKohati vaiva: Amiramu, Izhari, Hebhuroni naUzieri." 
1Chronicles6:19 Vanakomana vaMerari vaiva: Mairi naMushi. Idzi ndidzo dzimba dzavaRevhi dzakanyorwa maererano namazita amadzibaba avo: 
1Chronicles6:20 VaGerishoni: Ribhini mwanakomana wake, Jehati mwanakomana wake naZima mwanakomana wake," 
1Chronicles6:21 Joa mwanakomana wake Idho mwanakomana wake, Zera mwanakomana wake naJaterai mwanakomana wake." 
1Chronicles6:22 Zvizvarwa zvaKohati zvaiva: Aminadhabhi mwanakomana wake, Kora mwanakomana wake, Asiri mwanakomana wake," 
1Chronicles6:23 Erikana mwanakomana wake, naEbhiasafi mwanakomana wake, Asiri mwanakomana wake," 
1Chronicles6:24 naTahati mwanakomana wake, Urieri mwanakomana wake, Uzia mwanakomana wake naShauri mwanakomana wake." 
1Chronicles6:25 Zvizvarwa zvaErikana zvaiva: Amasai, Ahimoti," 
1Chronicles6:26 Erikana mwanakomana wake Zofai mwanakomana wake, naNahati mwanakomana wake," 
1Chronicles6:27 naEriabhi mwanakomana wake, naErikana mwanakomana wake, naSamueri mwanakomana wake," 
1Chronicles6:28 Vanakomana vaSamueri vaiva: Joere dangwe rake naAbhija mwanakomana wake wechipiri. 
1Chronicles6:29 Zvizvarwa zvaMerari zvaiva: Mari, Ribhini mwanakomana wake, Uza mwanakomana wake," 
1Chronicles6:30 Shimea mwanakomana wake, Hagia mwanakomana wake naAsaya mwanakomana wake." 
1Chronicles6:31 Ava ndivo varume vakagadzwa naDhavhidhi kuti vafambise basa rokuimba muimba yaJehovha mushure mokunge areka yawana pokuzorora imomo. 
1Chronicles6:32 Vaishumira nokuimba pamberi petabhenakeri, muTende Rokusangana, kusvikira Soromoni avaka temberi yaJehovha muJerusarema. Vaibata basa ravo maererano nemitemo yavakanga vakadzikirwa." 
1Chronicles6:33 Ava ndivo varume vaibata basa pamwe chete navanakomana vavo: kubva kuvaKohati: Hemani muimbi, mwanakomana waJoere, mwanakomana waSamueri," 
1Chronicles6:34 mwanakomana waErikana, mwanakomana waJerohamu, mwanakomana waErieri, mwanakomana waToa," 
1Chronicles6:35 mwanakomana waZufi, mwanakomana waErikana, mwanakomana waMahati, mwanakomana waAmasi," 
1Chronicles6:36 mwanakomana waErikana, mwanakomana waJoere, mwanakomana waAzaria, mwanakomana waZefania." 
1Chronicles6:37 mwanakomana waTahati, mwanakomana waAsiri, mwanakomana waEbhiasafi; mwanakomana waKora," 
1Chronicles6:38 mwanakomana waIzhari, mwanakomana waKohati, mwanakomana waRevhi mwanakomana waIsraeri." 
1Chronicles6:39 Uye mubatsiri waHemani pabasa ainzi Asafi akanga amire kurudyi rwake: Asafi mwanakomana waBherekia mwanakomana waShimea," 
1Chronicles6:40 mwanakomana waMikaeri, mwanakomana Bhaaseya, mwanakomana waMarikia," 
1Chronicles6:41 mwanakomana waEtini, mwanakomana waZera, mwanakomana waAdhaya," 
1Chronicles6:42 mwanakomana waEtani, mwanakomana waZima, mwanakomana waShimei," 
1Chronicles6:43 mwanakomana waJahati, mwanakomana waGerishoni, mwanakomana waRevhi;" 
1Chronicles6:44 uye kubva kuvabatsiri vavo, vaMerari, kuruboshwe rwake, vaiva: Etani mwanakomana waKishi, mwanakomana waAbhidhi, mwanakomana waMaruki," 
1Chronicles6:45 mwanakomana waHashabhia, mwanakomana waAmazia, mwanakomana waHirikia," 
1Chronicles6:46 mwanakomana waAmuzi, mwanakomana waBhani, mwanakomana waShemeri, x" 
1Chronicles6:47 mwanakomana waMari, mwanakomana waMushi, mwanakomana waMerari, mwanakomana waRevhi." 
1Chronicles6:48 Vamwe vavo vaRevhi vakapiwa mamwe mabasa ose omutabhenakeri, imba yaMwari." 
1Chronicles6:49 Asi Aroni nezvizvarwa zvake ndivo vaiisa zvipiriso paaritari yezvipiriso zvinopiswa uye nepaaritari yezvinonhuwira maererano nezvose zvaiitwa paNzvimbo Tsvene-tsvene, vachiyananisira Israeri maererano nazvose zvakanga zvarayirwa Mozisi muranda waMwari." 
1Chronicles6:50 Izvi ndizvo zvizvarwa zvaAroni: Ereazari mwanakomana wake, Finehasi mwanakomana wake, Abhishua mwanakomana wake" 
1Chronicles6:51 Bhuki mwanakomana wake, Uzi mwanakomana wake naZerahia mwanakomana wake," 
1Chronicles6:52 Merayoti mwanakomana wake, Amaria mwanakomana wake, Ahitubhi mwanakomana wake," 
1Chronicles6:53 Zadhoki mwanakomana wake naAhimazi mwanakomana wake. 
1Chronicles6:54 Idzi ndidzo dzakanga dziri nzvimbo dzavo dzavakagoverwa dzokugara senyika yavo (dzakapiwa kuzvizvarwa zvaAroni, avo vaibva kuimba yaKohati, nokuti mugove wokutanga wakanga uri wavo)." 
1Chronicles6:55 Vakapiwa Hebhuroni iri muJudha namafuro ose akaipoteredza. 
1Chronicles6:56 Asi minda nemisha yose yakapoteredza guta iri yakapiwa kuna Karebhu mwanakomana waJefune. 
1Chronicles6:57 Saka zvizvarwa zvaAroni zvakapiwa Hebhuroni (Guta routiziro) uye Ribhina, Jatiri, Eshitemoa," 
1Chronicles6:58 Hireni, Debhiri," 
1Chronicles6:59 Ashani, Juta, Bheti Shemeshi pamwe chete namafuro awo." 
1Chronicles6:60 Uye kubva kurudzi rwaBenjamini vakapiwa Gibheoni, Gebha Aremeti neAnatoti pamwe chete namafuro awo. Maguta aya, akagoverwa pakati pedzimba dzavaKohati akanga ari gumi namatatu pamwe chete." 
1Chronicles6:61 Zvimwe zvizvarwa zvaKohati zvakagoverwa maguta gumi kubva kudzimba dzorudzi rwehafu rwaManase. 
1Chronicles6:62 Zvizvarwa zvaGerishoni imba neimba zvakagoverwawo maguta gumi namatatu kubva kumarudzi aIsakari, Asheri naNafutari uye nokubva kuchikamu chorudzi rwaManase chiri muBhashani." 
1Chronicles6:63 Zvizvarwa zvaMerari, imba neimba zvakagoverwa maguta gumi namaviri kubva kumarudzi aRubheni, Gadhi naZebhuruni." 
1Chronicles6:64 Saka vaIsraeri vakapa vaRevhi maguta aya namafuro awo. 
1Chronicles6:65 Kubva kurudzi rwaJudha, rwaSimeoni norwaBenjamini vakagoverwa maguta ayo akanga arehwa namazita." 
1Chronicles6:66 Vamwe vedzimba dzaKohati vakapiwa kuti ive nyika yavo, maguta kubva kurudzi rwaEfuremu." 
1Chronicles6:67 Munyika yamakomo yaEfuremu vakapiwa Shekemu (guta routiziro) neGezeri," 
1Chronicles6:68 neJokimeami, neBheti Horoni," 
1Chronicles6:69 Aijaroni, neGati Rimoni pamwe chete namafuro awo." 
1Chronicles6:70 Uye kubva kurudzi rwehafu rwaManase vaIsraeri vakapawo Aneri neBhireamu pamwe chete namafuro awo kuvaKohati vakanga vasara. 
1Chronicles6:71 VaGerishoni vakagamuchirawo zvinotevera: Kubva kuimba yorudzi rwehafu rwaManase vakagamuchira Gorani muBhashani neAshitarotiwo pamwe chete namafuro awo: 
1Chronicles6:72 kubva kurudzi rwaIsakari vakagamuchira Kedheshi neDhabherati," 
1Chronicles6:73 Ramoti, neAnemi, pamwe chete namafuro awo;" 
1Chronicles6:74 kubva kurudzi rwaAsheri vakagamuchira Mashari, neAbhidhoni," 
1Chronicles6:75 Hukoki neRehobhi pamwe chete namafuro awo; 
1Chronicles6:76 uye kubva kurudzi rwaNafutari vakagamuchira Kedheshi muGarirea, neHamoni neKirataimi pamwe chete namafuro awo." 
1Chronicles6:77 VaMerari (vaRevhi vose vakanga vasara) vakagamuchira zvinotevera: Kubva kurudzi rwaZebhuruni vakagamuchira Jokineami, Karita Rimono, neTabhori pamwe chete namafuro awo;" 
1Chronicles6:78 kubva kurudzi rwaRubheni mhiri kworwizi Jorodhani kumabvazuva kweJeriko vakagamuchirwawo Bhezeri murenje, Jaza," 
1Chronicles6:79 Kedhemoti neMefaati pamwe chete namafuro awo; 
1Chronicles6:80 uye kubva kurudzi rwaGadhi vakagamuchira Ramoti muGireadhi, Mahanaimi," 
1Chronicles6:81 Heshibhoni neJazeri pamwe chete namafuro awo. 
1Chronicles7:1 Vanakomana vaIsakari vaiva: Tora, Puwa, Jashubhi, naShimironi; vose vaiva vana." 
1Chronicles7:2 Vanakomana vaTora vaiva: Uzi, Refaya, Jerieri, Jamai, Ibhisami naSamueri, vakuru vedzimba dzavo. Pamazuva okutonga kwaDhavhidhi, zvizvarwa zvaTora zvakaverengwa savarwi munhoroondo yavo zvakasvika zviuru zvina makumi maviri nezviviri namazana matanhatu." 
1Chronicles7:3 Mwanakomana waUzi aiva: Izirahia. Vanakomana vaIzirahia vaiva: Mikaeri, Obhadhia, Joere naIshia. Vose vari vashanu vaiva madzishe." 
1Chronicles7:4 Munhoroondo yemhuri yavo, vakanga vaine varume zviuru makumi matatu nezvitanhatu vakanga vakagadzirira kurwa, nokuti vakanga vaine vakadzi vazhinji navanakomana vazhinji." 
1Chronicles7:5 Hama dzavo vakanga vari varume vokurwa vari vedzimba dzose dzaIsakari, sokunyorwa kwazvakanga zvakaita munhoroondo yavo, vose vaisvika zviuru makumi masere nezvinomwe." 
1Chronicles7:6 Vanakomana vaBenjamini vatatu vaiva: Bhera, Bhekeri, naJedhiaeri." 
1Chronicles7:7 Vanakomana vaBhera vaiva: Ezibhoni, Uzi, Uzieri, Jerimoti naIri, vese vakuru vedzimba vashanu pamwe chete. Munhoroondo yavo varwi vakanyorwa vaiva varume zviuru makumi maviri nezviviri namakumi matatu navana." 
1Chronicles7:8 Vanakomana vaBhekeri vaiva: Zemira, Joashi, Eriezeri, Erioenai, Omiri, Jeremoti, Abhija, Anatoti naAremeti. Vose ava vaiva vakomana vaBhekeri." 
1Chronicles7:9 Munhoroondo yavo, vakuru vemhuri vakanyorwa uye vari varwi vaiva zviuru makumi maviri namazana maviri." 
1Chronicles7:10 Mwanakomana waJedhiaeri ainzi Bhirihani. Vanakomana vaBhirihani vaiva: Jehushi, Benjamini, Ehudhi, Kenana, Zetani, Tashishi naAhishahari." 
1Chronicles7:11 Vanakomana ava vose vaJedhiaeri vaiva vakuru vemhuri. Paiva nezviuru gumi nezvinomwe namazana maviri avarume vokurwa vakanga vakagadzirira kuenda kuhondo. 
1Chronicles7:12 VaShupi navaHupi vaiva zvizvarwa zvaIri, uye vaHushi vaiva zvizvarwa zvaAheri." 
1Chronicles7:13 Vanakomana vaNafutari vaiva: Jazieri, Guni, Jezeri naShiremi, zvizvarwa zvaBhiriha." 
1Chronicles7:14 Zvizvarwa zvaManase zvaiva: Asirieri chizvarwa chake kubudikidza nomurongo wake muAramu. Iye akaberekawo Makiri baba vaGireadhi. 
1Chronicles7:15 Makiri akatora mukadzi kubva pakati pavaHupi navaShupi. Zita rehanzvadzi yake rainzi Maaka. Chimwezve chizvarwa chainzi Zerofehadhi, akanga aine vanasikana chete." 
1Chronicles7:16 Mukadzi waMakiri Maaka akabereka mwanakomana akamutumidza zita rokuti Pereshi. Munun'una wake ainzi Shereshi, uye vanakomana vake vaiva Uramu naRakemu." 
1Chronicles7:17 Mwanakomana waUramu ainzi Bhedhani. Ava ndivo vaiva vanakomana vaGireadhi mwanakomana waMakiri mwanakomana waManase. 
1Chronicles7:18 Hanzvadzi yake Hamoreketi akabereka Ishodhi, Abhiezeri naMara." 
1Chronicles7:19 Vanakomana vaShimidha vaiva: Ahiani, Shekemu, Riki naAniami." 
1Chronicles7:20 Zvizvarwa zvaEfuremu zvaiva: Shutera, Bheredhi mwanakomana wake, Tahati mwanakomana wake, Ereadha mwanakomana wake, Tahati mwanakomana wake," 
1Chronicles7:21 Zabhadhi mwanakomana wake naShutera mwanakomana wake. Ezeri naEreadha vakaurayiwa navarume veGati vakanga vakaberekerwa munyika iyi pavakaburikira kundopamba zvipfuwo zvavo. 
1Chronicles7:22 Baba wavo Efuremu akavachema kwamazuva mazhinji uye hama dzake dzakauya kuzomunyaradza. 
1Chronicles7:23 Ipapo akarara nomukadzi wake zvakare akava nemimba uye akabereka mwanakomana. Akamutumidza zita rokuti Bheria nokuti mumhuri yake makanga maita dambudziko. 
1Chronicles7:24 Mwanasikana wake ainzi Sheera, uye akavaka Bheti Horoni, yeZasi neyokumusoro uyewo neUzeni Sheera." 
1Chronicles7:25 Refa aiva mwanakomana wake, Reshefi mwanakomana wake, Tera mwanakomana wake, Tahani mwanakomana wake," 
1Chronicles7:26 Radhani mwanakomana wake, Amihudhi mwanakomana wake, Erishama mwanakomana wake," 
1Chronicles7:27 Nuni mwanakomana wake naJoshua mwanakomana wake. 
1Chronicles7:27 Nuni mwanakomana wake naJoshua mwanakomana wake. 
1Chronicles7:28 Nyika dzavo nemisha yavo zvaisanganisira Bheteri nemisha yose yakaripoteredza, Naarani kumabvazuva, Gezeri nemisha yaro, kumavirira neShekemu nemisha yaro kuenda kunosvika kuAya nemisha yaro." 
1Chronicles7:29 Pamiganhu yaManase paiva neBheti Shani, Taanaki, Megidho neDhori pamwe chete nemisha yawo. Zvizvarwa zvaJosefa mwanakomana waIsraeri zvaigara mumaguta aya." 
1Chronicles7:30 Vanakomana vaAsheri vaiva: Imina, Ishivha, Ishivhi naBheria. Hanzvadzi yavo yainzi Sera." 
1Chronicles7:31 Vanakomana vaBheria vaiva: Hebheri naMarikieri, uyo aiva baba vaBhirizaiti." 
1Chronicles7:32 Hebheri aiva baba vaJafireti, Shomeri naHotami uye nehanzvadzi yavo Shua." 
1Chronicles7:33 Vanakomana vaJafireti vaiva: Pasaki, Bhimari naAshivhati. Ava ndivo vaiva vanakomana vaJafireti." 
1Chronicles7:34 Vanakomana vaShomeri vaiva: Ahi, Roga, Hubhai naAramu." 
1Chronicles7:35 Vanakomana vomunun'una wake Heremu vaiva: Zofa, Imina, Shereshi, naAmari." 
1Chronicles7:36 Vanakomana vaZofa vaiva: Sua, Haneferi, Shuari, Bheri, Imira," 
1Chronicles7:37 Bhezeri, Hodhi, Shama Shirisha, Itirani, naBheera." 
1Chronicles7:38 Vanakomana vaJeteri vaiva: Jefune, Pisipa naAra." 
1Chronicles7:39 Vanakomana vaUra vaiva: Ara, Hanieri, naRizia." 
1Chronicles7:40 Vose ava vaiva zvizvarwa zvaAsheri vakuru vemhuri yavo, varume vakanga vakasarudzika, varwi vakanga vakashinga uye vari vatungamiri vakasanangurika. Uwandu hwavarume vakanga vakagadzirira kurwa sezvazvakanyorwa munhoroondo yavo hwaiva zviuru makumi maviri nezvitanhatu." 
1Chronicles8:1 Benjamini aiva baba vaBhera dangwe rake, Ashibheri mwanakomana wechipiri, Ahara wechitatu," 
1Chronicles8:2 Noha wechina naRafa wechishanu. 
1Chronicles8:3 Vanakomana vaBhera vaiva: Adha, Gera, Abhihudhi," 
1Chronicles8:4 Abhishua, Naamani Ahoa," 
1Chronicles8:5 Gera, Shefufani naHurami." 
1Chronicles8:6 Izvi ndizvo zvaiva zvizvarwa zvaEhudhi vakanga vari vakuru vemhuri yeavo vaigara muGebha vakazodzingwa vakaendeswa kuManahati: 
1Chronicles8:7 Naamani, Ahifa naGera, uyo akavadzinga uya aiva baba vaUza naArihudhi." 
1Chronicles8:8 Vanakomana vakaberekerwa Shaharaimi muMoabhu mushure mokunge arambana navakadzi vake Hushini naBhaara. 
1Chronicles8:9 Nomukadzi wake Hodheshi akabereka Johabhi, Zibhia, Mesha Marikami," 
1Chronicles8:10 Jeuzi, Sakia naMirima. Ava ndivo vaiva vanakomana vake, vakuru vemhuri." 
1Chronicles8:11 NaHushimi akabereka Abhitubhi naEripaari. 
1Chronicles8:12 Vanakomana vaEripaari vaiva: Ebheri, Mishamu, Shemedhi (uyo akavaka Ono neRodhi pamwe chete nemisha yakaapoteredza)" 
1Chronicles8:13 naBheria naShema, avo vakanga vari vakuru vemhuri dzaavo vaigara muAijaroni uye vakadzinga vagari veGati." 
1Chronicles8:14 Ahiyo, Shashaki, Jeremoti," 
1Chronicles8:15 Zebhabhia, Aradhi, Edheri," 
1Chronicles8:16 Mikaeri, Ishipa naJoha vaiva vanakomana vaBeria." 
1Chronicles8:17 Zebhadhia, Meshurami, Hiziki, Hebheri," 
1Chronicles8:18 Ishimerai, Iziria naJobhabhi vaiva vanakomana vaEripaari." 
1Chronicles8:18 Ishimerai, Iziria naJobhabhi vaiva vanakomana vaEripaari." 
1Chronicles8:19 Jakimi, Zikiri, Zabhidhi," 
1Chronicles8:20 Erienai, Ziretai, Erieri," 
1Chronicles8:21 Adhaya, Bheraya naShimirati vaiva vanakomana vaShimei." 
1Chronicles8:22 Ishipani, Ebheri, Erieri," 
1Chronicles8:23 Abhidhoni, Zikiri, Hanani," 
1Chronicles8:24 Hanania, Eramu Anitotiya," 
1Chronicles8:25 Ifidheya naPenueri vaiva vanakomana vaShashaki. 
1Chronicles8:26 Shamisherai, Sheharia, Ataria," 
1Chronicles8:27 Jaareshia, Eria, naZikiri vaiva vanakomana vaJerohamu." 
1Chronicles8:28 Vose ava vaiva vakuru vemhuri, vari madzishe sezvazvakanyorwa munhoroondo dzavo. Uye vaigara muJerusarema." 
1Chronicles8:29 Jeyeri, baba vaGibheoni vaigara muGibheoni. Zita romukadzi wake rainzi Maaka," 
1Chronicles8:30 uye mwanakomana wake wedangwe ainzi Abhidhoni, achiteverwa naZuri, Kishi, Bhaari, Neri, Nadhabhi," 
1Chronicles8:31 Gedhori, Ahio, Zekeri," 
1Chronicles8:32 uye Mikiroti, uyo aiva baba vaShimea. Ivo vaigarawo pedyo nehama dzavo muJerusarema." 
1Chronicles8:33 Neri aiva baba vaKishi, Kishi aiva baba vaSauro, uye Sauro aiva baba vaJonatani, Mariki-Shua, Abinadhabhi, naEshibhaari." 
1Chronicles8:34 Mwanakomana waJonatani ainzi MeriBhaari uyo aiva baba vaMika. 
1Chronicles8:35 Vanakomana vaMika vaiva: Pitoni, Mereki Tarea, naAhazi." 
1Chronicles8:36 Ahazi aiva baba vaJehoadha, Jehoadha aiva baba vaAremeti, Azimavheti naZimiri uye Zimiri aiva baba vaMoza." 
1Chronicles8:37 Moza aiva baba vaBhinea Rafa aiva mwanakomana wake, Ereasa mwanakomana wake naAzeri mwanakomana wake." 
1Chronicles8:38 Azeri aiva navanakomana vatanhatu, uye aya ndiwo mazita avo: Arizakami, Bhokeru, Ishumaeri, Shearia, Obhadhia naHanani. Vose ava vaiva vanakomana vaAzeri." 
1Chronicles8:39 Vanakomana vomunun'una wake Esheki vaiva: Uramu dangwe rake, Jeushi mwanakomana wake wechipiri naErifereti wechitatu." 
1Chronicles8:40 Vanakomana vaUramu vaiva varwi voumhare vaigona kushandisa uta. Vaiva navanakomana navazukuru vazhinji vaisvika zana namakumi mashanu pamwe chete. Vose ava vaiva zvizvarwa zvaBhenjamini. 
1Chronicles9:1 VaIsraeri vose vakanyorwa munhoroondo dzakanyorwa mubhuku ramadzimambo eIsraeri. VaJudha vakatapwa vakaendeswa kuBhabhironi nokuda kwokusatendeka kwavo. 
1Chronicles9:2 Zvino vakatanga kugara panyika yavo mumaguta avo vaiva vamwe vaIsraeri, vaprista, vaRevhi navaranda vomutemberi." 
1Chronicles9:3 Avo vaibva kuJudha, nevaibva kwaBhenjamini nevaibva kwaEfuremu naManase vaigara muJerusarema vaiva:" 
1Chronicles9:4 Utai mwanakomana waAmihudhi, mwanakomana waOmiri, mwanakomana waImiri, mwanakomana waBhani, chizvarwa chaPerezi mwanakomana waJudha." 
1Chronicles9:5 VaShiro: Asaya uyo aiva dangwe navanakomana vake. 
1Chronicles9:6 VaZerahi: Jeueri. Vanhu vaibva kuJudha vaiva mazana matanhatu namakumi mapfumbamwe. 
1Chronicles9:7 VaBhenjamini: Saru mwanakomana waMeshurami, mwanakomana waHodhavhia, mwanakomana waHasenua;" 
1Chronicles9:8 Ibhineya mwanakomana waJerohami; Era mwanakomana waUzi, mwanakomana waMikiri naMeshurami mwanakomana waShefatia, mwanakomana waReueri, mwanakomana waIbhiniya." 
1Chronicles9:9 Vanhu vorudzi rwaBhenjamini sezvazvakanyorwa munhoroondo yavo, vaisvika mazana mapfumbamwe namakumi mashanu navatanhatu. Varume ava vose vakanga vari vakuru vemhuri." 
1Chronicles9:10 Vaprista: Jedhaya, naJehoyaribhi naJakini;" 
1Chronicles9:11 Azaria mwanakomana waHirikia, mwanakomana waMeshurami, mwanakomana waZadhoki, mwanakomana waMerayoti, mwanakomana waAhitubhi, mubati mukuru muimba yaMwari." 
1Chronicles9:12 Adhaya mwanakomana waJerohami, mwanakomana waPashuri, mwanakomana waMarikia, naMaasai mwanakomana waAdhieri, mwanakomana waJahazera, mwanakomana waMeshurami, mwanakomana waMeshiremiti, mwanakomana waIma." 
1Chronicles9:13 Vaprista, vaiva vakuru vemhuri, vaisvika chiuru namazana manomwe namakumi matanhatu. Vose vaiva varume vaikwanisa uye vaibata basa rokushumira muimba yaMwari." 
1Chronicles9:14 VaRevhi: Shemaya mwanakomana waHashubhi, mwanakomana waAzirikami, mwanakomana waHashabhia, muMerari;" 
1Chronicles9:15 Bhakibhaka, Hereshi, Garari naMatania mwanakomana waMika, mwanakomana waZikiri, mwanakomana waAsafi;" 
1Chronicles9:16 Obhadhia mwanakomana waShemaya, mwanakomana waGarari, mwanakomana waJedhutuni; naBherekia mwanakomana waAsa, mwanakomana waErikana, vaigara mumisha yavaNetofati." 
1Chronicles9:17 Vatariri vamasuo: Sharumi, Akubhi, Tarimoni, Ahimani navanun'una vavo, Sharumi ari mukuru wavo," 
1Chronicles9:18 vakaiswa paSuo raMambo kumabvazuva, kusvikira nanhasi. Ava ndivo vaiva vatariri vamasuwo, okumusasa wavaRevhi." 
1Chronicles9:19 Sharumi mwanakomana waKore mwanakomana waEbhiasafi, mwanakomana waKora navamwe vatariri vamasuo vokumhuri yake, vaKora, vaiva nebasa rokuchengetedza mikova yeTende sezvaingoitwa namadzibaba avo vakanga vane basa rokurinda suo rokupinda kuugaro hwaJehovha." 
1Chronicles9:20 Panguva dzapakutanga Finehasi mwanakomana waEreazari ndiye aiva mukuru wavatariri vamasuo, uye Jehovha aiva naye." 
1Chronicles9:21 Zekaria mwanakomana waMesheremia aiva mutariri wesuo pamukova weTende Rokusangana. 
1Chronicles9:22 Vose pamwe chete vakanga vasarudzwa kuti vave vatariri vamasuo pamikova vaisvika mazana maviri negumi navaviri. Vakanga vakanyorwa munhoroondo dzokuberekwa dzemisha yavo. Vatariri vamasuo vakapiwa mabasa avo nenzvimbo dzavo naDhavhidhi naSamueri muoni. 
1Chronicles9:23 Ivo nezvizvarwa zvavo vaiva nebasa rokurinda masuo eimba yaJehovha, imba yainzi Tende." 
1Chronicles9:24 Vatariri vamasuo vaiva kumativi mana, kumabvazuva, kumavirira, kumusoro nezasi." 
1Chronicles9:25 Vanun'una vavo mumisha yavo vaiuya nguva nenguva vachizogoverana mabasa avo vachiita madzoro amazuva manomwe. 
1Chronicles9:26 Asi vakuru vana pakati pavatariri vamasuo, vaiva vaRevhi, vakapiwa basa rokuchengetedza makamuri namatura epfuma muimba yaMwari." 
1Chronicles9:27 Vaipedza usiku hwose vari panzvimbo dzavo vakapoteredza imba yaMwari, nokuti vaifanira kuichengetedza; uye vaiva nebasa rokuizarura mangwanani oga oga." 
1Chronicles9:28 Vamwe vavo vaiva nebasa rokuchengetedza midziyo yaishandiswa muTemberi; vaiiverenga ichibuda voiverengazve yodzorerwa. 
1Chronicles9:29 Vamwe vakapiwa basa rokuti vachengetedze nhumbi nemimwe midziyo yose yapanzvimbo tsvene pamwe chete noupfu hwakatsetseka newaini, namafuta, nezvinonhuwira nemiti inonhuwira." 
1Chronicles9:30 Asi vamwe vavaprista vaiitawo basa rokusanganisa miti inonhuwira. 
1Chronicles9:31 MuRevhi ainzi Matitia, dangwe raSharumi muKora, akagadzwa basa rokubika chingwa chechipiriso." 
1Chronicles9:32 Vamwe vehama dzavo vaKohati vakapiwa basa rokubika chingwa chaizoiswa patafura pamaSabata ose. 
1Chronicles9:33 Avo vaiva vaimbi, vakuru vemhuri dzavaRevhi, vaigara mumakamuri omuTemberi uye vaisaita mamwe mabasa ose nokuti vaifanira kuita basa iri masikati nousiku." 
1Chronicles9:34 Ava vose vaiva vakuru vemhuri dzavaRevhi, vakuru sezvavakanyorwa munhoroondo dzokuberekwa kwavo. Uye vaigara muJerusarema." 
1Chronicles9:35 Jeyeri baba vaGibheoni aigara muGibheoni. Mukadzi wake ainzi Maaka," 
1Chronicles9:36 uye dangwe rake raivawo Abhidhoni, achiteverwa naZuri, Kishi, Bhaari, Neri, Nadhabhi," 
1Chronicles9:37 Gedhori, Ahio, Zekaria naMikiroti." 
1Chronicles9:38 Mikiroti aiva baba vaShimeamu. Ivowo vaigara pedyo nehama dzavo muJerusarema. 
1Chronicles9:39 Neri aiva baba vaKishi, Kishi ari baba vaSauro, uye Sauro aiva baba vaJonatani, Mariki-Shua, Abhinadhabhi naEshi-Bhaari." 
1Chronicles9:40 Mwanakomana waJonatani ainzi Meribhi-Bhaari uye aiva baba vaMika. 
1Chronicles9:41 Vanakomana vaMika vaiva Pitoni: Mereki, Tahirea naAhazi." 
1Chronicles9:42 Ahazi aiva baba vaJadha, Jadha aiva baba vaAremeti, Azimavheti naZimiri, uye Zimiri aiva baba vaMoza." 
1Chronicles9:43 Moza aiva baba vaBhinea; Refaya aiva mwanakomana wake, Ereasa mwanakomana wake naAzeri mwanakomana wake." 
1Chronicles9:44 Azeri aiva navanakomana vatanhatu, uye aya ndiwo mazita avo: Azirikami, Bhokeru, Ishumaeri, Sheariya, Obhadhia naHanani. Ava ndivo vaiva vana vaAzeri." 
1Chronicles10:1 Zvino vaFiristia vakarwisa vaIsraeri; vaIsraeri vakatiza pamberi pavo, vazhinji vakaurayiwa paGomo reGiribhoa." 
1Chronicles10:2 VaFiristia vakatevera Sauro navanakomana vake kwazvo uyezve vakauraya vanakomana vake Jonatani, Abhinadhabhi naMariki-Shua." 
1Chronicles10:3 Hondo yakarwiwa zvinotyisa kumativi ose aSauro uye vapfuri vouta pavakamubata, vakamukuvadza." 
1Chronicles10:4 Sauro akati kumubati wenhumbi dzake dzokurwa, “Vhomora munondo wako undibaye nawo kuti varume ava vasina kudzingiswa varege kuuya vakanditambudza.” Asi mubati wenhumbi dzake dzokurwa akatya kwazvo akasada kuzviita; saka Sauro akatora munondo wake akazviwisira pauri." 
1Chronicles10:5 Mubati wenhumbi dzake dzokurwa paakaona kuti Sauro afa, iyewo akazviwisira pamunondo wake akafa." 
1Chronicles10:6 Saka Sauro navanakomana vake vatatu neimba yake yose vakafa pamwe chete. 
1Chronicles10:7 Zvino vaIsraeri vose vakanga vagere pamupata vakati vaona kuti varwi vose vatiza uyezve Sauro navanakomana vake vatatu vafa, vakasiya maguta avo vakatiza. Uye vaFiristia vakauya vakagara maari." 
1Chronicles10:8 Zuva raitevera, vaFiristia pavakauya kuzokutunura nhumbi dzavakanga vafa; vakawana Sauro navanakomana vake vakafa pagomo reGiribhoa." 
1Chronicles10:9 Vakamukutunura nhumbi dzake uye vakatora musoro wake nezvombo zvake vakatuma nhume munyika yose yavaFiristia kuti vandoparidzira shoko iri pakati pavamwari vavo uye navanhu vavo. 
1Chronicles10:10 Vakaisa zvombo zvake mutemberi yavamwari vavo vakaturika musoro wake mutemberi yaDhagoni. 
1Chronicles10:11 Vagari vose vomuJabheshi Gireadhi pavakanzwa zvose zvakanga zvaitwa navaFiristia kuna Sauro," 
1Chronicles10:12 mhare dzose dzakasimuka dzikandotora zvitunha zvaSauro, navanakomana vake vakauya nazvo kuJabheshi vakaviga mapfupa avo pamuti mukuru weJabheshi uye vakatsanya kwamazuva manomwe." 
1Chronicles10:13 Sauro akafa nokuti akanga asina kutendeka kuna Jehovha, haana kuchengeta shoko raJehovha uyezve akandobvunzira kumasvikiro kuti atungamirirwe."
