1Chronicles10:14 Haana kubvunza kuna Jehovha. Saka Jehovha akamuuraya uye akapa umambo kuna Dhavhidhi mwanakomana waJese. 
1Chronicles11:1 VaIsraeri vose vakaungana kuna Dhavhidhi paHebhuroni vakati, “Isu tiri nyama yenyu neropa renyu." 
1Chronicles11:2 Kare kunyange Sauro paaiva mambo ndimi maitungamirira Israeri kundorwa. Uye Jehovha Mwari wenyu akati kwamuri, ‘Uchafudza vanhu vangu vaIsraeri uye uchava mutongi wavo.’ ”" 
1Chronicles11:3 Vakuru vose veIsraeri pavakauya kuna mambo Dhavhidhi paHebhuroni iye akaita sungano navo paHebhuroni pamberi paJehovha, uye vakazodza Dhavhidhi kuti ave mambo weIsraeri sezvakanga zvavimbiswa naJehovha kubudikidza naSamueri." 
1Chronicles11:4 Dhavhidhi navaIsraeri vose vakaenda kuJerusarema (ndiro Jebhusi). VaJebhusi vaigaramo 
1Chronicles11:5 vakati kuna Dhavhidhi, “Hamuzopindi muno.” Kunyange zvakadaro Dhavhidhi akatapa nhare yeZioni, Guta raDhavhidhi." 
1Chronicles11:6 Dhavhidhi akanga ati, “Achatungamirira kundorwisa vaJebhusi ndiye achava mukuru wavarwi.” Joabhu mwanakomana waZeruya ndiye akatanga kuenda saka akapiwa utungamiri hwacho." 
1Chronicles11:7 Dhavhidhi akagara munhare yeZioni, saka rakazodaidzwa kuti Guta raDhavhidhi." 
1Chronicles11:8 Akavaka guta richipoteredza, kubva pamihomba yokutsigira kusvikira kurusvingo rwakanga rwakapoteredza, Joabhu achivaka patsva chimwe chikamu chose cheguta." 
1Chronicles11:9 Uye Dhavhidhi akaramba achiva nesimba guru nokuti Jehovha Wamasimba Ose aiva naye. 
1Chronicles11:10 Ava ndivo vaiva vakuru pakati pavarume voumhare vaiva naDhavhidhi, avo pamwe chete neIsraeri yose, vakatsigira umambo hwake zvakasimba kuti husvike munyika yose sokuvimbisa kwakanga kwaita Jehovha." 
1Chronicles11:11 Aya ndiwo mazita avarume voumhare vaiva naDhavhidhi: Jashobheami, muHakimoni, aiva mukuru wamachinda ehondo; akasimudza pfumo rake akarwa navarume mazana matatu, avo vaakauraya pakurwisana panguva imwe chete." 
1Chronicles11:12 Aimutevera ainzi Ereazari mwanakomana waDhodhai muAhohi mumwe wavarume voumhare vatatu. 
1Chronicles11:13 Aiva naDhavhidhi paPasi Dhamimi vaFiristia pavakaungana ipapo kuzorwa. Pane imwe nzvimbo paiva nomunda wakanga uzere nebhari, varwi vakatiza vaFiristia." 
1Chronicles11:14 Asi ivo vakaramba vamire pakati pomunda vakaurwira vakauraya vaFiristia uye Jehovha akaita kuti vakunde nokukunda kukuru. 
1Chronicles11:15 Vatatu pakati pamakumi matatu avakuru vakaburukira kuna Dhavhidhi kuDombo pabako reAdhurami, uye hondo yavaFiristia yakanga yadzika matende muMupata weRefaimi." 
1Chronicles11:16 Panguva iyoyo Dhavhidhi akanga ari munhare, uye boka rehondo yavaFiristia rakanga riri paBheterehema." 
1Chronicles11:17 Dhavhidhi akanzwa nyota uye akati, “Haiwa, dai mumwe munhu ainondicherera mvura yokunwa kubva mutsime riri pedyo nesuo reBheterehema!”" 
1Chronicles11:18 Saka Vatatu ava vakapinda napakati pehondo dzavaFiristia, vakachera mvura kubva mutsime raiva pedyo nesuo reBheterehema uye vakaenda nayo kuna Dhavhidhi. Asi akaramba kuinwa akaidururira pasi pamberi paJehovha." 
1Chronicles11:19 Dhavhidhi akati, “Mwari ngaandidzivise ndiregere kunwa izvi! Ndinganwa here ropa ravarume ava vaenda vachiisa upenyu hwavo panjodzi?” Nokuti vakaisa upenyu hwavo panjodzi kuti vadzoke vanayo, Dhavhidhi akaramba kuinwa. Aya ndiwo mamwe amabasa okukunda akaitwa navarume voumhare vatatu." 
1Chronicles11:20 Abhishai munun'una waJoabhu akanga ari mukuru waVatatu Ava. Akasimudza pfumo rake kuti arwise varume mazana matatu, akavauraya, uye akava nomukurumbira saVatatu Vaya." 
1Chronicles11:21 Akaremekedzwa zvakapetwa kaviri pamusoro paVatatu Vaya uye akaitwa mutungamiri wavo, kunyange zvazvo akanga asina kuverengerwa pakati pavo." 
1Chronicles11:22 Bhenaya mwanakomana waJehoyadha aiva murwi woumhare aibva kuKabhizeeri, akaita mabasa, makuru. Akauraya mhare mbiri dzapamusoro dzavaMoabhu. Akapindawo mugomba mumwe musi kuine chando akauraya shumba." 
1Chronicles11:23 Uye akauraya muIjipita akanga akareba makubhiti mashanua. Kunyange zvazvo muIjipita akanga akapakata pfumo rainge tsvimbo yomuruki muruoko rwake, Bhenaya akamurwisa netsvimbo. Akabvuta pfumo kubva muruoko rwomuIjipita akamuuraya nepfumo rake." 
1Chronicles11:24 Aya ndiwo aiva mabasa aBhenaya mwanakomana waJehoyadha; naiyewo akaita mukurumbira savarume vatatu voumhare. 
1Chronicles11:25 Akakudzwa nokuremekedzwa kukuru kupfuura Vaya Makumi Matatu, akanga asiri pakati paVatatu Vaya. Uye Dhavhidhi akamuita mutariri wavarindi vake." 
1Chronicles11:26 Varume voumhare vaiva: Asaheri munun'una waJoabhu, Erihanani mwanakomana waDhodho aibva kuBheterehema." 
1Chronicles11:27 Shamoti muHarori, Herezi muPeroni," 
1Chronicles11:28 Ira mwanakomana waIkeshi aibva kuTekoa, Abhiezeri aibva kuAnatoti," 
1Chronicles11:29 Sibhekai muHushati, Irai muAhohi," 
1Chronicles11:30 Maharai muNetofati, Heredhi mwanakomana waBhaana muNetofati," 
1Chronicles11:31 Itai mwanakomana waRibhai aibva kuGibhea muBenjamini, Bhenaya muPiratoni," 
1Chronicles11:32 Hurai aibva kuhova dzeGaashi, Abhieri muAribhati," 
1Chronicles11:33 Azimavheti muBhaharumi, Eriabha muShaaribhoni," 
1Chronicles11:34 vanakomana vaHashemi muGizoni, Jonatani mwanakomana waShage muHarari," 
1Chronicles11:35 Ahiami mwanakomana waSaka muHarari, Erifari mwanakomana waUri," 
1Chronicles11:36 Heferi muMekerati, Ahija muPeroni," 
1Chronicles11:37 Heziro muKarimeri, Naarai mwanakomana waEzibhai," 
1Chronicles11:38 Joere munun'una waNatani, Mibha mwanakomana waHagiri," 
1Chronicles11:39 Zereki muAmoni, naHarai muBheroti, mubati wenhumbi dzokurwa nadzo dzaJoabhi mwanakomana waZeruya," 
1Chronicles11:40 Ira muItiri, Garebhi muItiri," 
1Chronicles11:41 Uria muHiti, Zabhadhi mwanakomana waArai," 
1Chronicles11:42 Adhina mwanakomana waShiza muRubheni iye aiva mukuru wavaRubheni, navaya makumi matatu, vaaiva navo," 
1Chronicles11:43 Hanani mwanakomana waMaaka, Joshafati muMitini," 
1Chronicles11:44 Uzia muAshiterati, Shama naJeyeri vanakomana vaHotamu muAroeri," 
1Chronicles11:45 Jedhieri mwanakonama waShimiri, munun'una wake Joha muTizi," 
1Chronicles11:46 Erieri muMahavhi, Jeribhai naJoshavia vanakomana vaErinaami, muMoabhu," 
1Chronicles11:47 Erieri, Obhedhi naJaasieri muMezobhai." 
1Chronicles12:1 Ava ndivo varume vakauya kuna Dhavhidhi paZikiragi achakavanda nokuda kwaSauro mwanakomana waKishi; uye ndivo vamwe vavarwi vakamubatsira muhondo. 
1Chronicles12:2 Vakanga vapakata uta uye vaigona kupfura miseve nezvipfuramabwe noruoko rworudyi kana rworuboshwe; vaiva hama dzaSauro dzokurudzi rwaBenjamini. 
1Chronicles12:3 Ahiezeri, mukuru wavo, naJoashi, vanakomana vaShemaya muGibheati; Jezieri naPereti vanakomana vaAzimavheti; Bheraka, Jehu muAnatoti," 
1Chronicles12:4 naIshimaya muGibheoni, aiva mhare pakati paMakumi Matatu; aiva mutungamiri waMakumi Matatu; Jeremia, Jahazieri, Johanani; Jozabadhi muGedherati," 
1Chronicles12:5 Eruzai, Jerimoti, Bhearia, Shemaria naShafatia muHarufi;" 
1Chronicles12:6 Erikana, Ishiya, Azareri, Joezeri naJashobheami vaKorahi;" 
1Chronicles12:7 naJoera naZebhadhia vanakomana vaJehorami vaibva kuGedhori. 
1Chronicles12:8 Vamwe vaGadhi vakazvitsaurawo vakaenda kwaiva naDhavhidhi kunhare yake kurenje. Vaiva varwi vakashinga, vakagadzirira kurwa uye vaigona kubata nhoo nepfumo. Zviso zvavo zvaiva zviso zveshumba, uye vaimhanya semharapara mumakomo." 
1Chronicles12:9 Ezeri ndiye aiva mukuru, Obhadhia ari wechipiri, aiva Erizabhadhi wechipfumbamwe, Eriabhi ari wechitatu," 
1Chronicles12:10 Mishimana wechina, Jeremia wechishanu," 
1Chronicles12:11 Atai wechitanhatu, Erieri wechinomwe," 
1Chronicles12:12 Johanani worusere, Erizabhadhi wechipfumbamwe," 
1Chronicles12:13 Jeremia wegumi naMakibhanai wegumi nomumwe. 
1Chronicles12:14 VaGadhi ava ndivo vaiva vatungamiriri vamauto, mudiki ainge akaenzana nezana, uye mukuru ainge akaenzana nechiuru." 
1Chronicles12:15 Ivava ndivo vaya vakayambuka Jorodhani mumwedzi wokutanga parwainge rwakazara nokumahombekombe uye vakaita kuti vanhu vose vaigara mumipata, kumabvazuva nokumavirira, vatize." 
1Chronicles12:16 Vamwe vaBenjamini navamwe varume vaibva kuJudha vakauyawo kuna Dhavhidhi munhare yake. 
1Chronicles12:17 Dhavhidhi akaenda kundosangana navo akati kwavari, “Kana mauya kwandiri norugare, kuzondibatsira, ndakagadzirira kuti mubatane neni. Asi kana mauya kuzonditengesa kuvavengi vangu iwo maoko angu asina kuita zvechisimba, Mwari wamadzibaba edu ngaazvione uye akutongei.”" 
1Chronicles12:18 Ipapo Mweya wakauya pana Amasi mukuru waMakumi Matatu akati, “Haiwa Dhavhidhi, tiri vako! Haiwa mwanakomana waJese, tinewe! Kubudirira, kubudirira ngakuve kwauri, uye kubudirira ngakuve kuna vanokubatsira nokuti Mwari wako achakubatsira.” Saka Dhavhidhi akavagamuchira akavaita vatungamiri veboka ravarwi vake." 
1Chronicles12:19 Vamwe varume vokwaManase vakabatana naDhavhidhi paakaenda navaFiristia kundorwisa Sauro. Iye navanhu vake havana kubatsira vaFiristia nokuti, vapedza kubvunzana, vatongi vavo vakamudzosa vakati, “Zvichatiurayisa kana akazotitiza akandobatana namambo wake Sauro.”" 
1Chronicles12:20 Dhavhidhi paakaenda kuZikiragi, ava ndivo vaiva varume vokwaManase vakabatana naye: Adhina, Jozabhadhi, Jedhieri, Mikaeri, Jozabhadhi, Erihu naZiretai, vatungamiri vezvikwata zvechiuru muna Manase." 
1Chronicles12:21 Vakabatsira Dhavhidhi paairwisana namapoka amakororo, nokuti vose vakanga vari varwi vakashinga uye vaiva vatungamiri muhondo yake." 
1Chronicles12:22 Zuva nezuva varume vakauya kuzobatsira Dhavhidhi kusvikira ava nehondo huru kwazvo, sehondo yaMwari." 
1Chronicles12:23 Uku ndiko kuwanda kwavarume vakapakata zvombo kuti vandorwa, vakauya kuna Dhavhidhi paHebhuroni kuti vatore umambo hwaSauro vahupe kwaari, sezvazvakanga zvarehwa naJehovha:" 
1Chronicles12:24 Varume vokwaJudha vakanga vakatakura nhoo namapfumo vaiva zviuru zvitanhatu namazana masere uye akapakata zvombo kuti vandorwa; 
1Chronicles12:25 varume vokwaSimeoni, varwi vakanga vakagadzirira kundorwa vaiva zviuru zvinomwe nezana;" 
1Chronicles12:26 varume vokwaRevhi zviuru zvina namazana matanhatu," 
1Chronicles12:27 pamwe chete naJehoyadha, mutungamiri wemhuri yaAroni aiva navarume zviuru zvitatu namazana manomwe," 
1Chronicles12:28 naZadhoki, murwi wechidiki aiva akashinga, navakuru vamapoka makumi maviri navaviri kubva kumhuri yake;" 
1Chronicles12:29 varume vokwaBenjamini, hama dzaSauro vaiva zviuru zvitatu vazhinji vavo vakanga vamboramba vachitevera Sauro kusvikira musi uyu;" 
1Chronicles12:30 varume vokwaEfuremu varwi vakashinga vaiva nomukurumbira kwazvo kumhuri dzavo vaiva zviuru makumi maviri namazana masere; 
1Chronicles12:31 varume vokurudzi rwehafu rwaManase vakadanwa namazita avo kuti vauye vazogadza Dhavhidhi umambo vaiva zviuru gumi nezvisere; 
1Chronicles12:32 varume vokwaIsakari vainzwisisa nguva uye vaiziva kuti Israeri yaifanira kuitei, vaiva vakuru mazana maviri nehama dzavo dzose dzaiva pasi pavo;" 
1Chronicles12:33 varume vokwaZebhuruni, varwi vaiziva, vakanga vakagadzirira kurwa nezvombo zvemhando dzose, vakauya kuzobatsira Dhavhidhi nomwoyo wakaperera, vaiva zviuru makumi mashanu;" 
1Chronicles12:34 varume vokwaNafutari vaiva chiuru chavakuru vamapoka, pamwe chete nezviuru makumi matatu nezvinomwe zvavarume vakanga vakatakura nhoo namapfumo;" 
1Chronicles12:35 varume vokwaDhani, vakanga vakagadzirira kurwa, zviuru makumi maviri nezvisere namazana matanhatu;" 
1Chronicles12:36 varume vokwaAsheri, vakanga vane unyanzvi hwokurwa uye vakagadzirira kurwa, vaiva zviuru makumi matanhatu;" 
1Chronicles12:37 uye kubva kumabvazuva aJorodhani, varume vokwaRubheni, Gadhi norudzi rwehafu rwaManase vakanga vakapakata zvombo zvemhando dzose, vaiva zviuru zana namakumi maviri." 
1Chronicles12:38 Ava vose vaiva varume vokurwa vakazvipira kundorwa. Vakauya paHebhuroni vakagadzirira zvizere kuzogadza Dhavhidhi kuti ave mambo weIsraeri. Vamwe vaIsraeri vose vaiva nomwoyo mumwe chete wokuti vaite Dhavhidhi mambo. 
1Chronicles12:39 Varume vakagara mazuva matatu ipapo vaina Dhavhidhi vachidya nokunwa nokuti mhuri dzavo dzainge dzavavigira zvokudya. 
1Chronicles12:40 Uyewo, vavakidzani vavo vokure kwazvo kunyange kwaIsakari, kwaZebhuruni nokwaNafutari vakauya nezvokudya zviri pambongoro, ngamera, mahesera nenzombe. Pakanga paine zvokudya zvizhinji kwazvo zvaiti upfu, makeke amaonde, makeke amazambiringa akaoma, waini, mafuta, nzombe, namakwai nokuti mufaro wakanga uripo pakati peIsraeri." 
1Chronicles13:1 Dhavhidhi akataurirana nomumwe nomumwe wavabati vake vose, vatungamiri vezviuru, navatungamiri vamazana." 
1Chronicles13:2 Akati kuungano yose yeIsraeri, “Kana zvichiita sezvakakunakirai uye kana kuri kuda kwaJehovha Mwari wedu, ngatitumirei shoko kwose kwose kuhama dzedu dzakasara munyika yose yeIsraeri, nokuvaprista navaRevhi vavagere navo mumaguta avo nokumafuro avo kuti vauye vazobatana nesu." 
1Chronicles13:3 “Ngatidzorei areka yaMwari wedu kwatiri zvakare, nokuti izvi hatina kuzvibvunza panguva yokutonga kwaSauro.”" 
1Chronicles13:4 Ungano yose yakabvuma kuita izvi, nokuti zvairatidzika kunge zvakanaka kuvanhu vose." 
1Chronicles13:5 Saka Dhavhidhi akaunganidza vaIsraeri vose kubva kuRwizi Shihori muIjipiti kusvika kuRebho Hamati, kuti vatore areka yaMwari kubva kuKiriati Jearimi." 
1Chronicles13:6 Dhavhidhi navaIsraeri vose vaiva naye vakaenda kuBhaara reJudha (Kiriati Jearimi) kuti vandotora areka yaMwari Jehovha, agere pakati pamakerubhi, iyo areka inodaidzwa neZita irori." 
1Chronicles13:7 Vakatakura areka yaMwari kubva muimba yaAbhinadhabhi iri mungoro itsva, Uza naAhio vakaitungamirira." 
1Chronicles13:8 Dhavhidhi navaIsraeri vose vakanga vachipembera nesimba ravo rose pamberi paMwari, nenziyo, nembira, nemitengeranwa, netambureni, nemakandira nehwamanda." 
1Chronicles13:9 Pavakasvika paburiro raKidhoni, Uza akatambanudza ruoko rwake kuti atsigire areka nokuti nzombe dzakanga dzagumburwa." 
1Chronicles13:10 Kutsamwa kwaJehovha kwakamukira Uza akamuuraya nokuti akanga atambanudza ruoko rwake akabata areka. Saka akafa pakarepo pamberi paMwari. 
1Chronicles13:11 Ipapo Dhavhidhi akatsamwa nokuti kutsamwa kwaJehovha kwakanga kwawira pana Uza, uye kusvikira nhasi nzvimbo iyoyo inonzi Perezi Uza." 
1Chronicles13:12 Dhavhidhi akatya Mwari zuva iroro uye akabvunza achiti, “Ko, ndingadzosa areka yaMwari kwandiri seiko?”" 
1Chronicles13:13 Haana kutora areka kuti ive naye muguta raDhavhidhi. Asi akaenda nayo kuimba yaObhedhi-Edhomu muGiti. 
1Chronicles13:14 Areka yaMwari yakasara mumhuri yaObhedhi-Edhomu muimba yake kwemwedzi mitatu, uye Jehovha akaropafadza imba yake nezvose zvaakanga anazvo." 
1Chronicles14:1 Zvino Hiramu mambo weTire akatuma nhume kuna Dhavhidhi namatanda emisidari navavaki, navavezi, kuti vamuvakire imba youmambo." 
1Chronicles14:2 Uye Dhavhidhi akaziva kuti Jehovha akamusimbisa samambo pamusoro peIsraeri uye kuti umambo hwake hwakanga hwakudzwa kwazvo nokuda kwavanhu vake Israeri. 
1Chronicles14:3 MuJerusarema, Dhavhidhi akazvitorerazve vamwe vakadzi akava baba vavanakomana navanasikana vazhinji." 
1Chronicles14:4 Aya ndiwo mazita avana vaakaberekerwa ikoko: Shamua, Shobhabhi, Natani, Soromoni," 
1Chronicles14:5 Ibhari, Erishua, Eriperati," 
1Chronicles14:6 Noga, Nefegi, Jafia," 
1Chronicles14:7 Erishama, Bheeriyadha naErifereti." 
1Chronicles14:8 VaFiristia pavakanzwa kuti Dhavhidhi akanga agadzwa kuti ave mambo weIsraeri, vakaenda nehondo yose kundomutsvaga, asi Dhavhidhi akazvinzwa akabuda kundosangana navo." 
1Chronicles14:9 Zvino vaFiristia vakanga vauya kuzopamba mupata weRefaimi; 
1Chronicles14:10 saka Dhavhidhi akabvunza kuna Mwari akati, “Ndingaenda here kundorwisa vaFiristia? Mungavaisa mumaoko angu here?” Jehovha akapindura akati, “Enda ndichavaisa mumaoko ako.”" 
1Chronicles14:11 Saka Dhavhidhi navanhu vake vakakwira kuPerazimi uye ikoko akavakunda akati, “Sokupwanya kunoita mvura, Mwari akapwanya vavengi vangu noruoko rwangu.” Saka nzvimbo iyoyo yakatumidzwa kunzi Bhaari Perazimi." 
1Chronicles14:12 VaFiristia vakasiya vamwari vavo ipapo, uye Dhavhidhi akarayira kuti vapiswe mumoto." 
1Chronicles14:13 VaFiristia vakarwisa zvakare mupata uya. 
1Chronicles14:14 Saka Dhavhidhi akabvunza Mwari zvakare, uye Mwari akamupindura akati, “Usangonanga ikoko asi vakomberedze wozovarwisa wava pamberi pemiti yemibharisamu." 
1Chronicles14:15 Pamunotanga kunzwa kutinhira kwokufamba pamisoro yemiti yemibharisamu, unofanira kubuda kundorwa, nokuti zvichange zvichireva kuti Mwari akutungamirira kundoparadza hondo yavaFiristia.”" 
1Chronicles14:16 Saka Dhavhidhi akaita sokurayirwa kwaakanga aitwa naMwari, uye vakaparadza hondo yavaFiristia, kubva kuGibheoni, kusvika kuGezeri." 
1Chronicles14:17 Saka mukurumbira waDhavhidhi wakapararira nenyika yose uye Jehovha akaita kuti marudzi ose amutye. 
1Chronicles15:1 Dhavhidhi paakapedza kuzvivakira dzimba muguta raDhavhidhi, akagadzira nzvimbo yainogara areka yaMwari uye akaidzikira tende." 
1Chronicles15:2 Ipapo Dhavhidhi akati, “Hakuna munhu kunze kwavaRevhi anofanira kutakura areka yaMwari, nokuti Jehovha akavasarudza kuti vatakure areka yaJehovha uye kuti vashumire pamberi pake nokusingaperi.”" 
1Chronicles15:3 Dhavhidhi akaunganidza Israeri yose muJerusarema kuti vatore areka yaJehovha vagoiisa kunzvimbo yaakanga aigadzirira. 
1Chronicles15:4 Akaunganidza zvizvarwa zvaAroni navaRevhi: 
1Chronicles15:5 	kubva kuzvizvarwa zvaKohati, Urieri mutungamiri nehama dzake zana namakumi maviri;" 
1Chronicles15:6 	kubva kuzvizvarwa zvaMerari, Asaya mutungamiri nehama dzake mazana maviri namakumi maviri;" 
1Chronicles15:7 	kubva kuzvizvarwa zvaGerishoni, Joere mutungamiri nehama dzake zana namakumi matatu;" 
1Chronicles15:8 	kubva kuzvizvarwa zvaErizafani, Shemaya mutungamiri nehama dzake mazana maviri;" 
1Chronicles15:9 	kubva kuzvizvarwa zvaHebhuroni, Erieri mutungamiri nehama dzake makumi masere;" 
1Chronicles15:10 	kubva kuzvizvarwa zvaUzieri, Aminadhabhi mutungamiri nehama dzake zana negumi navaviri." 
1Chronicles15:11 Ipapo Dhavhidhi akadana Zadhoki naAbhiatari vaprista, naUrieri, Asaya, Joere, Shemaya, Erieri naAminadhabhi vaRevhi." 
1Chronicles15:12 Akati kwavari, “Imi muri vakuru vemhuri dzava Revhi, imi navamwe vaRevhi vose munofanira kuzvinatsa kuti mukwire neareka yaJehovha Mwari weIsraeri kunzvimbo yandakaigadzirira." 
1Chronicles15:13 Izvi zvakaitika nokuti imi vaRevhi hamuna kukwira neareka pakutanga paya Jehovha Mwari wedu paakatiratidza kutsamwa kukuru. Hatina kunge tabvunza kwaari kuti tingazviite sei nenzira yakarayirwa.” 
1Chronicles15:14 Saka vaprista navaRevhi vakazvinatsa kuti vakwire neareka yaJehovha Mwari waIsraeri. 
1Chronicles15:15 Uye vaRevhi vakatakura areka yaMwari namatanda pamapfudzi avo, sezvakanga zvarayirwa naMozisi maererano neshoko raJehovha." 
1Chronicles15:16 Dhavhidhi akataurira vatungamiri vavaRevhi kuti vagadze hama dzavo kuti vave vaimbi kuti vazonoimba dzimbo dzomufaro nezviridzwa zvaiti: mitengeranwa, mbira, namakandira." 
1Chronicles15:17 Saka vaRevhi vakagadza Hemani mwanakomana waJoere; kubva kuhama dzake Asafi mwanakomana waBherekia; uye kubva kuhama dzavo vaMerari, Etani mwanakomana waKushaya;" 
1Chronicles15:18 uye pamwe chete navo hama dzavo dzaitevera paukuru dzaiti: Zekaria, Jaazieri, Shemiramoti, Jehieri, Uni, Eriabhi, Bhenaya, Maaseya, Matitia, Eriferehu, Mikineya, Obhedhi-Edhomu, Jeyeri varindi vemikova." 
1Chronicles15:19 Vaimbi vaiti Hemani, Asafi naEtani vakagadzwa kuti varidze makandira endarira." 
1Chronicles15:20 Zekaria, Azieri, Shemiramoti, Jehieri, Uni, Eriabhi, Maaseya, naBhenaya vaizoridza mitengeranwa, maererano nearamoti," 
1Chronicles15:21 uye Matitia, Eriferehu, Mikineya, Obedhi-Edhomu, Jeyeri, naAzazia vaizoridza mbira maererano neshiminiti." 
1Chronicles15:22 Kenania mukuru wavaRevhi ndiye aitungamirira kuimba; ndiro rakanga riri basa rake nokuti aiva nyanzvi pariri. 
1Chronicles15:23 Bherekia naErikana ndivo vaizova varindi vemikova weareka. 
1Chronicles15:24 Shebhania, Joshafeti, Netaneri, Amasai, Zekaria, Bhenaya naErieza vaprista vaizoridza hwamanda pamberi peareka yaMwari. Obhedhi-Edhomu naJehia vaizovawo vatariri vomusuwo weareka." 
1Chronicles15:25 Dhavhidhi navakuru veIsraeri navakuru vamapoka ane chiuru vakaenda kundotora areka yesungano yaMwari kubva kumba kwaObhedhiEdhomu, vachifara." 
1Chronicles15:26 Nokuti Mwari akanga abatsira vaRevhi avo vainge vatakura areka yesungano yaMwari, vakabayira Mwari hando nomwe namakondohwe manomwe." 
1Chronicles15:27 Zvino Dhavhidhi akanga akapfeka nguo yomucheka wakanaka sezvakanga zvakaita vaimbi, naKenania akanga ari mutungamiri wokuimba kuvaimbi. Dhavhidhi akanga akapfekawo efodhi yomucheka." 
1Chronicles15:28 Saizvozvo vaIsraeri vose vakakwira neareka yesungano yaJehovha vachidanidzira, nokuridza mimhanzi yenyanga dzamakondohwe nehwamanda namakandira, uye vachiridza mitengeranwa nembira." 
1Chronicles15:29 Zvino areka yesungano yaJehovha yakati yasvika muguta raDhavhidhi, Mikaeri mwanasikana waSauro akatarira napawindo. Uye akaona Mambo Dhavhidhi achipembera nokutamba, akamushora mumwoyo make." 
1Chronicles16:1 Vakauya neareka yaMwari vakaiisa mukati metende rayakanga yagadzirirwa naDhavhidhi, vakapa zvipiriso zvinopiswa nezvipiriso zvokuwadzana pamberi paMwari." 
1Chronicles16:2 Dhavhidhi akati apedza kubayira zvipiriso zvinopiswa, akaropafadza vanhu muzita raJehovha." 
1Chronicles16:3 Ipapo akapa mumwe nomumwe womudzimai nomurume wechiIsraeri rofu rechingwa, keke romuchero womuchindwi nekeke ramazambiringa akaoma." 
1Chronicles16:4 Akagadza vamwe vavaRevhi kuti vashumire pamberi peareka yaJehovha, vakumbirire, vavonge uye kuti varumbidze Jehovha, Mwari waIsraeri:" 
1Chronicles16:5 Asafi ndiye aiva mukuru wavo, Zekaria wechipiri, kuchitevera Jeyeri Shemiramoti, Jehieri, Matitia, Eriabhi, Bhenaya, Obhedhi-Edhomu naJeyeri. Vaizoridza mitengeranwa nembira; Asafi aizoridza makandira" 
1Chronicles16:6 uye Bhenaya naJahazieri vaprista vaizoridza hwamanda nguva dzose pamberi peareka yesungano yaMwari. 
1Chronicles16:7 Zuva iroro Dhavhidhi akapa kwokutanga Asafi navamwe vake pisarema iri rokuvonga Jehovha: 
1Chronicles16:8 Vongai Jehovha, danai kuzita rake; zivisai pakati pendudzi dzose zvaakaita." 
1Chronicles16:9 Muimbirei, muimbirei nziyo dzokurumbidza; taurai zvose zvamabasa ake anoshamisa." 
1Chronicles16:10 Zvirumbidzei muzita rake dzvene; mwoyo yaavo vanotsvaka Jehovha ngaifare. 
1Chronicles16:11 Tarisai kuna Jehovha nokusimba rake; tsvakai chiso chake nguva dzose. 
1Chronicles16:12 Rangarirai zvishamiso zvaakaita, zviratidzo zvake uye nemitongo yaakareva." 
1Chronicles16:13 Haiwa, imi zvizvarwa zvaIsraeri muranda wake, haiwa imi vanakomana vaJakobho vasanangurwa vake." 
1Chronicles16:14 Ndiye Jehovha Mwari wedu; mitongo yake iri munyika yose. 
1Chronicles16:15 Anorangarira sungano yake nokusingaperi, shoko raakarayira, kwechiuru chamarudzi." 
1Chronicles16:16 Sungano yaakaita naAbhurahama, mhiko yaakapika kuna Isaka." 
1Chronicles16:17 Akasimbisa kuna Jakobho somutemo, kuna Israeri sesungano isingaperi, achiti:" 
1Chronicles16:18 “Kwauri ndichapa nyika yeKenani, sechikamu chenhaka yako.”" 
1Chronicles16:19 Pavakanga vari vashoma, vari vashoma kwazvo, vari vatorwa mairi," 
1Chronicles16:20 vakadzungaira kubva kuno rumwe rudzi kusvika kuno rumwe, kubva kuno humwe umambo kusvika kuno humwe." 
1Chronicles16:21 Haana kutendera munhu kuti avadzvinyirire; nokuda kwavo akatuka madzimambo. 
1Chronicles16:22 “Musabata vazodziwa vangu; musaitira vaprofita vangu zvakaipa.” 
1Chronicles16:23 Imbirai Jehovha, pasi pose; paridzai ruponeso rwake zuva nezuva." 
1Chronicles16:24 Zivisai kubwinya kwake pakati pendudzi, mabasa ake anoshamisa pakati pavanhu vose." 
1Chronicles16:25 Nokuti Jehovha mukuru uye anofanira kwazvo kurumbidzwa; anofanira kutyiwa pamusoro pavamwari vose. 
1Chronicles16:26 Nokuti vamwari vose vendudzi zvifananidzo, asi Jehovha akasika matenga." 
1Chronicles16:27 Kubwinya nokukudzwa zviri pamberi pake; simba nomufaro zviri munzvimbo yougaro hwake. 
1Chronicles16:28 Ipai kuna Jehovha, imi mhuri dzendudzi, i pai Jehovha kukudzwa nesimba," 
1Chronicles16:29 ipai Jehovha kukudzwa kunofanira zita rake. Uyai nezvipiriso uye muuye pamberi pake; namatai Jehovha mukubwinya kwoutsvene hwake. 
1Chronicles16:30 Dederai pamberi pake, imi nyika yose! Nyika yakasimbiswa kwazvo; haingazungunutswi." 
1Chronicles16:31 Matenga ngaafare, nyika ngaifare; ngavati pakati pamarudzi, “Jehovha anotonga!”" 
1Chronicles16:32 Gungwa ngaritinhire nezvose zviri mariri; minda ngaifarisise nezvose zviri mairi. 
1Chronicles16:33 Ipapo miti yesango ichaimba, ichaimba nomufaro pamberi paJehovha, nokuti anouya kuzotonga nyika." 
1Chronicles16:34 Vongai Jehovha nokuti akanaka; rudo rwake runogara nokusingaperi. 
1Chronicles16:35 Danidzirai muchiti, “Tiponesei, imi Mwari Muponesi wedu; tiunganidzei uye mutirwire pandudzi, kuti tigovonga zita renyu dzvene kuti tifarisise mukukurumbidzai.”" 
1Chronicles16:36 Rumbidzai Jehovha, Mwari waIsraeri, kubva pakusingaperi kusvikira pakusingaperi. Ipapo vanhu vose vakati, “Ameni” uye vakarumbidza Jehovha." 
1Chronicles16:37 Dhavhidhi akasiya Asafi navamwe vake pamberi peareka yesungano yaJehovha kuti ashumirepo nguva dzose maererano nezvaidiwa zuva rimwe nerimwe. 
1Chronicles16:38 Akasiya Obhedhi-Edhomu navamwe vake makumi matanhatu navasere kuti vashumire navo. Obhedhi-Edhomu mwanakomana waJedhuruni naHosa vaiva vatariri vamasuo. 
1Chronicles16:39 Dhavhidhi akasiya Zadhoki muprista navamwe vaprista pamberi petabhenakeri yaJehovha panzvimbo yakakwirira muGibheoni 
1Chronicles16:40 kuti vape zvipiriso zvinopiswa, kuna Jehovha paaritari yezvipiriso zvinopiswa, nguva dzose, mangwanani namanheru maererano nezvose zvakanga zvakanyorwa muMurayiro waJehovha waakanga apa Israeri." 
1Chronicles16:41 Pakati pavo paiva naHemani naJedhutuni navamwe vose vaiva vakasarudzwa namazita kuti vavonge Jehovha, “Nokuti rudo rwake runogara nokusingaperi.”" 
1Chronicles16:42 Hemani naJedhutuni vaiva nebasa rokuridza hwamanda namakandira uye nokuridza zvimwe zviridzwa parwiyo rutsvene. Vanakomana vaJedhutuni vakaitwa vatariri vamasuo. 
1Chronicles16:43 Ipapo vanhu vose vakabvapo, mumwe nomumwe akaenda kumba kwake, uye Dhavhidhi akadzokera kumba kwake kundoropafadza mhuri yake." 
1Chronicles17:1 Shure kwokunge Dhavhidhi agara mumuzinda wake akati kuna Natani muprofita, “Ndiri pano zvangu ndigere mumuzinda womusidhari, asi areka yesungano yaJehovha iri pasi peTende.”" 
1Chronicles17:2 Natani akapindura kuna Dhavhidhi akati, “Zvose zvamunazvo mupfungwa itai nokuti Mwari anemi.”" 
1Chronicles17:3 Usiku ihwohwo shoko raMwari rakasvika kuna Natani richiti: 
1Chronicles17:4 “Enda undotaurira muranda wangu Dhavhidhi kuti, ‘Zvanzi naJehovha: Hausiwe uchandivakira imba yokugara." 
1Chronicles17:5 Handina kumbogara mumba kubvira zuva randakaburitsa Israeri kubva muIjipiti kusvikira zuva ranhasi. Ndaifamba kubva mutende ndichienda mune rimwe, kubva pane imwe nzvimbo yokugara ndichienda pane imwe." 
1Chronicles17:6 Kwose kwose kwandakafamba navaIsraeri vose, ndakamboti here kuno mumwe zvake wavatungamiri vavo, wandairayira kuti afudze vanhu vangu, “Seiko usina kundivakira imba yomusidhari?”’" 
1Chronicles17:7 “Zvino naizvozvo udza muranda wangu Dhavhidhi kuti, ‘Zvanzi naJehovha Wamasimba Ose: Ndakakutora kubva kumafuro kumafuro kwawakanga uchifudza makwai, kuti uve mutongi wavanhu vangu Israeri." 
1Chronicles17:8 Ndakanga ndinewe kwose kwawaienda uye ndakauraya vavengi vako vose pamberi pako. Zvino ndichaita kuti zita rako rive samazita avarume vakuru kwazvo panyika. 
1Chronicles17:9 Uye ndichapa nzvimbo kuvanhu vangu Israeri uye ndichavadyara kuti vave nomusha wavo pachavo uye kuti vasazokanganiswa. Vanhu vakaipa havangazovadzvinyiriri zvakare sazvaakavaita pakutanga 
1Chronicles17:10 uye sezvavakaita kubvira panguva yandakagadza vatungamiri vavanhu vangu Israeri. Ndichakundawo vavengi venyu vose. Ndinokuudza kuti Jehovha achakuvakira imba: 
1Chronicles17:11 Kana mazuva ako akwana uye pauchaenda kundova namadzibaba ako, ndichasimudza mwana wako achakutevera paumambo, mumwe wavanakomana vako pachako uye ndichasimbisa umambo hwake." 
1Chronicles17:12 Iyeye ndiye achandivakira imba, uye ndichasimbisa chigaro chake choumambo nokusingaperi." 
1Chronicles17:13 Ndichava baba vake uye iye achava mwanakomana wangu. Handizobvisi rudo rwangu kwaari zvakare sokurubvisa kwandakaita kune akakutangira. 
1Chronicles17:14 Ndichamugadza kuti atonge imba yangu noumambo hwangu nokusingaperi; chigaro chake chichasimbiswa nokusingaperi.’ ” 
1Chronicles17:15 Natani akandotaura kuna Dhavhidhi mashoko ose echiratidzo chose ichi. 
1Chronicles17:16 Ipapo mambo Dhavhidhi akapinda akagara pamberi paMwari akati: “Ndini aniko, nhai Jehovha Mwari, uye mhuri yangu chiiko, kuti mandisvitsawo pano?" 
1Chronicles17:17 Uye sokuti izvi hazvina kukwana pamberi penyu, haiwa Mwari, mataurazve nezveramangwana reimba yomuranda wenyu. Mandiona sokunge ndini ndinokudzwa kupinda vanhu vose, imi Jehovha Mwari." 
1Chronicles17:18 “Chiizve chimwe chingataurwa naDhavhidhi kwamuri nokuda kwokuti maremekedza muranda wenyu kudai? Nokuti munoziva muranda wenyu," 
1Chronicles17:19 imi Jehovha, nokuda kwomuranda wenyu uye maererano nokuda kwenyu maita chinhu chikuru ichi mukaita kuti zvivimbiso izvi zvikuru zviziviswe." 
1Chronicles17:20 “Hakuna mumwe akaita semi, imi Jehovha, uye hakuna Mwari kunze kwenyu, sezvatakanzwa nenzeve dzedu pachedu." 
1Chronicles17:21 Uye ndiani akaita savanhu venyu Israeri, rudzi rumwe chete panyika runa Mwari warwo akaenda kundozvidzikinurira vanhu, kuti azviitire zita, uye kuti aite zvishamiso zvikuru zvinotyisa, nokudzinga ndudzi kubva pamberi pavanhu venyu vamakadzikinura kubva kuIjipiti?" 
1Chronicles17:22 Makazvigadzirira vanhu venyu Israeri kuti vave venyu pachenyu nokusingaperi, uye imi, imi Jehovha, mava Mwari wavo." 
1Chronicles17:23 “Uye zvino, Jehovha, itai kuti chivimbiso chamaita kumuranda wenyu neimba yake chisimbiswe nokusingaperi. Itai sezvamakavimbisa," 
1Chronicles17:24 kuitira kuti chisimbiswe uye kuti zita renyu rive guru nokusingaperi. Ipapo vanhu vachati, ‘Jehovha Wamasimba Ose, Mwari waIsraeri, ndiye Mwari waIsraeri.’ Uye imba yomuranda wenyu Dhavhidhi ichasimbiswa pamberi penyu." 
1Chronicles17:25 “Imi Mwari wangu, mazivisa muranda wenyu kuti muchamuvakira imba. Saka muranda wenyu atsunga kuti anyengetere kwamuri." 
1Chronicles17:26 Haiwa Jehovha, muri Mwari! Mavimbisawo zvinhu izvi zvakanaka kumuranda wenyu." 
1Chronicles17:27 Zvino makafadzwa kuti muropafadze imba yomuranda wenyu kuti ienderere mberi nokusingaperi pamberi penyu, nokuti imi, imi Jehovha, mairopafadza uye ichava yakaropafadzwa nokusingaperi.”" 
1Chronicles18:1 Nokufamba kwenguva, Dhavhidhi akakunda vaFiristia akavaisa pasi pake, uye akavatorera Gati nemisha yakaripoteredza kuti ribve pasi poruoko rwavaFiristia." 
1Chronicles18:2 Dhavhidhi akakundawo vaMoabhu, uye vakava pasi pake, vakamuvigira mutero." 
1Chronicles18:3 Pamusoro pezvo Dhavhidhi akarwisa Hadhadhezeri mambo weZobha kusvikira kuHamati, paakaenda kundosimbisa kutonga kwake achitevedza Rwizi Yufuratesi." 
1Chronicles18:4 Dhavhidhi akapamba chiuru chengoro dzake, vachairi vengoro zviuru zvinomwe navarwi vetsoka zviuru makumi maviri. Akadimbura marunda amakumbo amabhiza ose kusara kwezana ramabhiza engoro." 
1Chronicles18:5 VaAramu veDhamasiko pavakauya kuzobatsira Hadhadhezeri mambo weZobha, Dhavhidhi akauraya zviuru makumi maviri nezviviri zvavo." 
1Chronicles18:6 Akaisa mapoka avarwi vake muumambo hwavaAramu veDhamasiko, uye vaAramu vakava pasi pake uye vakamuvigira mutero. Jehovha akapa Dhavhidhi kukunda kwose kwose kwaakaenda." 
1Chronicles18:7 Dhavhidhi akatora nhoo dzegoridhe dzaiva dzakatakurwa navatungamiri vehondo yaHadhadhezeri akaenda nadzo kuJerusarema. 
1Chronicles18:8 Kubva kuTebha nokuKuni, maguta aHadhadhezeri, Dhavhidhi akatora ndarira zhinji, yakazoshandiswa naSoromoni kugadzira gungwa rendarira, nembiru uye nezvimwe zvinhu zvakasiyana-siyana zvakazogadzirwa nendarira." 
1Chronicles18:9 Tou mambo weHamati paakanzwa kuti Dhavhidhi akanga akunda hondo yose yaHadhadhezeri mambo weZobha," 
1Chronicles18:10 akatuma mwanakomana wake Hadhorami akauya nezvinhu zvamarudzi ose zvegoridhe nesirivha nendarira. 
1Chronicles18:11 Mambo Dhavhidhi akakumikidza zvipo izvi kuna Jehovha sezvaakanga aita nesirivha negoridhe, zvaakanga atora kubva kundudzi idzi dzose dzaiti: Edhomu, Moabhu, vaAmoni, vaFiristia neAmareki." 
1Chronicles18:12 Abhishai mwanakomana waZeruya akauraya vaEdhomu zviuru gumi nezvisere muMupata weMunyu. 
1Chronicles18:13 Akaisa mapoka avarwi muEdhomu uye vaEdhomu vose vakava pasi poutongi hwaDhavhidhi. Jehovha akapa Dhavhidhi kukunda kwose kwose kwaakaenda. 
1Chronicles18:14 Dhavhidhi akatonga Israeri achiita zvose zvakarurama uye zvakanaka kuvanhu vake vose. 
1Chronicles18:15 Joabhu mwanakomana waZeruya aitungamirira hondo; Jehoshafati mwanakomana waAhirudhi aiva munyori wenhoroondo; 
1Chronicles18:16 Zadhoki mwanakomana waAhitubhi naAhimereki mwanakomana waAbhiatari vaiva vaprista; Shavhisha akanga ari munyori; 
1Chronicles18:17 Bhenaya mwanakomana waJehoyada aitungamirira vaKereti navaPereti; uye vanakomana vaDhavhidhi vaiva machinda makuru parutivi pamambo. 
1Chronicles19:1 Mukufamba kwenguva, Nahashi mambo wavaAmoni akafa uye mwanakomana wake akamutevera paumambo." 
1Chronicles19:2 Dhavhidhi akafunga akati, “Ndicharatidza mwoyo wakanaka kuna Hanuni mwanakomana waNahashi nokuti baba vake vakaratidza mwoyo wakanaka kwandiri.” Saka Dhavhidhi akatuma nhume kundonyaradza Hanuni pamusoro pababa vake. Vanhu vaDhavhidhi pavakasvika kuna Hanuni munyika yavaAmoni kuzomunyaradza," 
1Chronicles19:3 machinda avaAmoni akati kuna Hanuni, “Unofunga here kuti Dhavhidhi ari kukudza baba vako nokutuma vanhu vake kuti vauye kuzokunyaradza? Vanhu vake havana kuuya kuzoshora nyika yedu here kuti vaitore?”" 
1Chronicles19:4 Saka Hanuni akabata vanhu vaDhavhidhi, akavagera ndebvu dzavo, akacheka nguo dzavo napakati kumagaro, akavadzinga." 
1Chronicles19:5 Mumwe munhu akauya akaudza Dhavhidhi pamusoro pavarume ava, Dhavhidhi akatuma nhume kuti dzindosangana navo nokuti vakanga vanyadziswa kwazvo. Mambo akati, “Garai paJeriko kusvikira ndebvu dzenyu dzakura, mugozodzoka.”" 
1Chronicles19:6 VaAmoni vakati vaziva kuti vakanga vava chinhu chinonhuwa mumhino dzaDhavhidhi, Hanuni navaAmoni vakatumira chiuru chamatarendaa esirivha kuti vandokumbira ngoro navachairi vadzo kubva kuAramu Naharaimu, Aramu Maaka nokuZobha." 
1Chronicles19:7 Vakakumbira ngoro zviuru makumi matatu nezviviri navachairi vadzo, pamwe chete namambo weMaaka navarwi vake, uye akauya akadzika musasa pedyo neMedebha, ukuwo vaAmoni vachiungana kubva mumaguta avo, uye vakabuda kundorwa." 
1Chronicles19:8 Paakanzwa izvi, Dhavhidhi akatuma Joabhu kuti abude nehondo yose yavarume vokurwa." 
1Chronicles19:9 VaAmoni vakabudawo vakagadzirira kurwa uye vakamira vari mumitsetse yokurwa pasuo reguta ravo, uye madzimambo akanga auya akanga ari pachawo musango." 
1Chronicles19:10 Joabhu akaona kuti kwaiva nemitsetse yavanhu vakagadzirira kurwa mberi kwake neshure kwake; saka akasarudza mamwe wamapoka avarwi vapamusoro muIsraeri akavaendesa kuti vandorwa navaAramu. 
1Chronicles19:11 Akaisa vamwe varume vose pasi paAbhishai munun'una wake uye vakaendeswa kuti vandorwa navaAmoni. 
1Chronicles19:12 Joabhu akati, “Kana vaAramu vandikundaka, ipapo iwe unofanira kuzondinunura; asi kana vaAmoni vakakukunda, ipapo ini ndichakununura." 
1Chronicles19:13 Simba uye ngatirwirei vanhu vedu namaguta aMwari wedu takashinga. Jehovha achaita zvakanaka pamberi pake.” 
1Chronicles19:14 Ipapo Joabhu navarwi vaiva naye vakaenda kundorwa navaAramu, ivo vakatiza pamberi pavo." 
1Chronicles19:15 VaAmoni pavakaona kuti vaAramu vakanga vava kutiza, ivo vakatizawo pamberi pomunun'una wake Abhishai vakamhanyira mukati meguta. Ipapo Joabhu akadzokera kuJerusarema." 
1Chronicles19:16 Mushure mokunge vaAramu vaona kuti vakanga vakundwa neIsraeri vakatumira nhume kundokokorodza vamwe vaAramu mberi kweRwizi, Shofaki mutungamiri wehondo yaHadhadhezeri achivatungamirira." 
1Chronicles19:17 Dhavhidhi paakaudzwa izvi, akaunganidza Israeri yose ndokuyambuka Jorodhani; akaswedera kwavari kundovarwisa uye akaronga mitsetse yehondo akatarisana navo. Dhavhidhi akaita kuti mitsetse yake isangane navaAramu muhondo uye ivo vakarwa naye." 
1Chronicles19:18 Asi vakatiza pamberi paIsraeri, uye Dhavhidhi akauraya zviuru zvinomwe zvavachairi vengoro, nezviuru makumi mana zvavarwi vetsoka. Akaurayawo Shofaki mutungamiri wehondo yavo." 
1Chronicles19:19 Varanda vaHadhadhezeri pavakaona kuti vakanga vakundwa neIsraeri, vakayanana naDhavhidhi uye vakava pasi pake. Saka vaAramu havana kuzoda kubatsira vaAmoni zvakare." 
1Chronicles20:1 Munguva yechirimo, panguva iyo madzimambo anoenda kuhondo, Joabhu, akatungamirira mauto akashonga zvombo zvokurwa. Akaparadza nyika yavaAmoni uye akaenda kuRabha akandorikomba, asi Dhavhidhi akasara muJerusarema. Joabhu akarwisa Rabha akarisiya raparara." 
1Chronicles20:2 Dhavhidhi akatora korona kubva pamusoro wamambo wavo, uremu hwayo hwakaonekwa kuti hwaiva tarendaa regoridhe uye yakanga ina mabwe anokosha uye yakaiswa pamusoro paDhavhidhi. Akapamba zvinhu zvizhinji kwazvo muguta iri" 
1Chronicles20:3 uye akabudisa vanhu vakanga varimo, akavatongera kuti vashande namajeko namapiki namatemo. Dhavhidhi akaita saizvozvi kumaguta ose avaAmoni. Ipapo Dhavhidhi nehondo yake yose akadzokera kuJerusarema." 
1Chronicles20:4 Nokufamba kwenguva, hondo yakatanga navaFiristia paGezeri. Panguva iyoyi Sibhekai muHushati akauraya Sipai, mumwe wezvizvarwa zvavaRefa, vaFiristia vakakundwa." 
1Chronicles20:5 Mune kumwe kurwisana navaFiristia, Erihanani mwanakomana waJairi akauraya Rami munun'una waGoriati muGiti, aiva nepfumo raiva nomubato wakafanana nedanda romuruki." 
1Chronicles20:6 Mune kumwe kurwisana zvakare, kwakaitika paGati paiva nomumwe murume mukuru kwazvo aiva neminwe mitanhatu muruoko rumwe norumwe nezvigunwe zvitanhatu kugumbo rimwe nerimwe, zvose pamwe chete zvaiva makumi maviri nezvina. Aivawo worudzi rwaRafa." 
1Chronicles20:7 Paakatuka Israeri, Jonatani mwanakomana waShimea, munun'una waDhavhidhi akamuuraya." 
1Chronicles20:8 Izvi ndizvo zvizvarwa zvaRafa muGati, uye vakaurayiwa naDhavhidhi navanhu vake." 
1Chronicles21:1 Satani akamukira Israeri akakurudzira Dhavhidhi kuti averenge vaIsraeri. 
1Chronicles21:2 Saka Dhavhidhi akati kuna Joabhu navatungamiri vamapoka avarwi, “Endai mundoverenga vaIsraeri vose kubva kuBheerishebha kusvikira kuDhani. Uye mugozondiudza kuitira kuti ndizive kuti vangani variko.”" 
1Chronicles21:3 Asi Joabhu akapindura akati, “Jehovha ngavawedzere uwandu hwavarwi vake kakapetwa kazana. Ishe wangu mambo, ava vose havasi pasi petsoka dzenyu here? Seiko ishe wangu muchida kuita izvi? Sei muchida kuuyisa mhosva kuna Israeri?”" 
1Chronicles21:4 Zvisinei, shoko ramambo rakakunda raJoabhu, saka Joabhu akabvapo akaenda muIsraeri yose uye akadzokera kuJerusarema." 
1Chronicles21:5 Joabhu akataurira Dhavhidhi uwandu hwavarwi achiti muIsraeri yose maiva navanhu vaigona kubata munondo vaisvika miriyoni nezana rezviuru zvavarume, vachisanganisira zviuru makumi manomwe muJudha." 
1Chronicles21:6 Asi Joabhu haana kusanganisira Revhi naBenjamini mukuverenga uku, nokuti kurayira kwamambo kwakanga kwakaipa kwazvo kwaari." 
1Chronicles21:7 Kurayira uku kwakanga kwakaipawo pamberi paMwari, saka akaranga Israeri." 
1Chronicles21:8 Ipapo Dhavhidhi akati kuna Mwari, “Ndakatadza zvikuru pandakaita chinhu ichi. Zvino ndokumbirawo kuti mubvise kuipa kwomuranda wenyu. Ndakaita sebenzi kwazvo.”" 
1Chronicles21:9 Jehovha akati kuna Gadhi muoni waDhavhidhi," 
1Chronicles21:10 “Enda undotaurira Dhavhidhi kuti, ‘Zvanzi naJehovha: Ndinokupa zvinhu zvitatu zvokusarudza. Zvisarudzire chaunoda kuti ndikuitire ndichikuranga.’ ”" 
1Chronicles21:11 Saka Gadhi akaenda kuna Dhavhidhi akati kwaari, “Zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Sarudza pakati peizvi:" 
1Chronicles21:12 Makore matatu enzara, mwedzi mitatu yokutsvairwa pamberi pavavengi vako, minondo yavo ichikuparadzai, kana kuti mazuva matatu omunondo waJehovha, mazuva edenda munyika mutumwa waJehovha achiparadza panyika yose yaIsraeri. Zvino saka zvisarudzirei kuti ndinganopindura sei uyo akandituma.”" 
1Chronicles21:13 Dhavhidhi akati kuna Gadhi, “Ndiri mukutambudzika kukuru kwazvo. Rega hako ndiwire mumaoko aJehovha nokuti tsitsi dzake dzakakura kwazvo, asi musandirega ndichiwira mumaoko avanhu.”" 
1Chronicles21:14 Saka Jehovha akatumira denda muIsraeri uye zviuru makumi manomwe zvavarume veIsraeri zvakawira pasi zvikafa. 
1Chronicles21:15 Uye Jehovha akatuma mutumwa kuti aparadze Jerusarema, asi mutumwa uya paakanga achiita izvi Jehovha akazviona uye akazvidemba nokuda kwedambudziko iri akati kumutumwa aiparadza vanhu, “Zvakwana! Dzosa ruoko rwako.’ ” Mutumwa waJehovha ipapo akanga akamira paburiro raArauna muJebhusi." 
1Chronicles21:16 Dhavhidhi akatarisa kumusoro akaona mutumwa waJehovha akamira pakati pedenga nenyika, aine munondo muruoko rwake akarutambanudzira pamusoro peJerusarema. Ipapo Dhavhidhi navakuru vose vakapfeka masaga, vakawira pasi vakatsikitsira zviso zvavo." 
1Chronicles21:17 Dhavhidhi akati kuna Mwari, “Handisini here ndakarayira kuti varwi vose vaverengwe? Ndini ndakatadza ndikaita zvakaipa, ava vanongova makwai chete. Vakaiteiko? Haiwa Jehovha, Mwari wangu, regai ruoko rwenyu ruwire pandiri ini nemhuri yangu, asi musarega denda iri riri pamusoro pavanhu venyu.”" 
1Chronicles21:18 Ipapo mutumwa waJehovha akarayira Gadhi kuti ataurire Dhavhidhi kuti akwire andovakira Jehovha aritari muburiro raArauna muJebhusi. 
1Chronicles21:19 Saka Dhavhidhi akakwira mukuteerera shoko rakanga rataurwa naGadhi muzita raJehovha. 
1Chronicles21:20 Arauna paakanga achipura zviyo, akacheuka akaona mutumwa; vanakomana vake vana vaaiva navo vakandohwanda." 
1Chronicles21:21 Ipapo Dhavhidhi akaswedera, uye Arauna paakatarisa akamuona, akasiya buriro akakotamira pasi pamberi paDhavhidhi akaisa chiso chake pasi." 
1Chronicles21:22 Dhavhidhi akati kwaari, “Ndipeiwo nzvimbo yeburiro rako kuti ndigovakira Jehovha aritari, kuti denda riri pavanhu rimiswe. Nditengeserewo nomutengo waro wakazara." 
1Chronicles21:23 Arauna akati kuna Dhavhidhi, “Ritorei henyu! Ishe wangu mambo ngavaite zvinovafadza. Tarirai ndichakupai nzombe yezvibayiro zvinopiswa, matanda okupurisa dzive huni, uye zviyo zvive zvipiriso zvoupfu. Ndichakupai zvose izvi.”" 
1Chronicles21:24 Asi mambo Dhavhidhi akapindura Arauna akati, “Kwete, ndinoda kutenga nomutengo wakazara. Handingatori ndichipa Jehovha zvinhu zvako iwe kana kubayira chipiriso chinopiswa chandisina kuripira.”" 
1Chronicles21:25 Saka Dhavhidhi akaripira Arauna mashekeri mazana matanhatua egoridhe kuti apiwe nzvimbo iyi. 
1Chronicles21:26 Dhavhidhi akavaka aritari kuna Jehovha ipapo uye akapa zvipiriso zvinopiswa nezvipiriso zvokuyanana. Akadana kuna Jehovha uye Jehovha akamupindura nomoto wakabva kudenga ukaenda paaritari, yezvipiriso zvinopiswa." 
1Chronicles21:27 Ipapo Jehovha akataurira mutumwa iye akadzorera munondo wake mumuhara wawo. 
1Chronicles21:28 Panguva iyoyo Dhavhidhi paakaona kuti Jehovha akanga amupindura paburiro raArauna muJebhusi, akapa zvipiriso ipapo." 
1Chronicles21:29 Tabhenakeri yaJehovha yakanga yagadzirwa naMozisi murenje. Nearitari yezvipiriso zvinopiswa zvakanga zviri panzvimbo yakakwirira paGibheoni panguva iyoyo. 
1Chronicles21:30 Asi Dhavhidhi haaikwanisa kuenda pamberi payo kundobvunza nezvaMwari nokuti aitya munondo womutumwa waJehovha. 
1Chronicles22:1 Ipapo Dhavhidhi akati, “Imba yaJehovha Mwari inofanira kuva pano, pamwe chete nearitari yezvipiriso zvinopisirwa Israeri.”" 
1Chronicles22:2 Saka Dhavhidhi akarayira kuti vatorwa vose vaigara muIsraeri vaungane pamwe chete, uye kubva mukati mavo akasarudza vacheki vamatombo kuti vagadzire matombo akavezwa zvakanaka okuvakisa imba yaMwari." 
1Chronicles22:3 Akapa simbi dzakawanda kwazvo kuti dzigoshandiswa kugadzirisa zvipikiri zvamagonhi apamasuo nezvikorekedzo uye ndarira yakawanda kupfuura yaigona kuiswa pachikero. 
1Chronicles22:4 Akapawo zvakare matanda emisidhari akawanda kupfuura aigona kuverengwa, nokuti vaSidhoni nevaTire vakanga vavigira Dhavhidhi matanda akawanda." 
1Chronicles22:5 Dhavhidhi akati, “Mwanakomana wangu Soromoni mudiki kwazvo uye haasati ava noruzivo, uye imba ichavakirwa Jehovha inofanira kuva huru kwazvo, inorumbidzwa nokukudzwa kwazvo pamberi pamarudzi ose. Saka ndichaigadzirira.” Saka Dhavhidhi akagadzirira zvikuru kwazvo asati afa." 
1Chronicles22:6 Ipapo akadana mwanakomana wake Soromoni akamurayira kuti avake imba yaJehovha, Mwari weIsraeri." 
1Chronicles22:7 Dhavhidhi akati kuna Soromoni, “Mwanakomana wangu zvaiva mumwoyo mangu kuti ndivakire Zita raJehovha Mwari wangu imba." 
1Chronicles22:8 Asi shoko iri raJehovha rakauya kwandiri richiti, ‘Wakadeura ropa zhinji uye ukarwa hondo dzakawanda. Iwe haungavakiri Zita rangu imba, nokuti wakadeura ropa rakawanda kwazvo pamberi pouso hwangu." 
1Chronicles22:9 Asi uchava nomwanakomana achava murume worugare nokuzorora, uye ndichamupa zororo kubva kuvavengi vake kumativi ose. Zita rake achanzi Soromoni uye ndichapa Israeri runyararo norugare panguva yokutonga kwake." 
1Chronicles22:10 Iyeye ndiye achavakira Zita rangu imba. Achava mwanakomana wangu uye ini ndichava baba vake. Uye ndichasimbisa chigaro choumambo hwake pamusoro peIsraeri nokusingaperi.” 
1Chronicles22:11 “Zvino mwanakomana wangu, Jehovha ave newe, uye uve nokubudirira uye uvake imba yaJehovha Mwari wako sezvaakati uchaita." 
1Chronicles22:12 Jehovha ngaakupe uchenjeri nokunzwisisa paachakuisa pakutonga pamusoro peIsraeri, kuitira kuti uchengete murayiro waJehovha Mwari wako." 
1Chronicles22:13 Ipapo uchava nokubudirira kana ukachenjerera kuchengetedza mitemo nemirayiro yakapiwa Mozisi naJehovha kuti ape Israeri. Iva nesimba utsunge mwoyo. Usatya uye usaora mwoyo.’ 
1Chronicles22:14 “Ndakatambura zvikuru kwazvo kuti ndipe kutemberi yaJehovha matarenda zviuru zanaa zvegoridhe, matarenda miriyonib esirivha, ndarira nesimbi yakawanda zvokuti haangayerwe pachikero, namatanda namatombo. Uye unogona kuwedzera pamusoro pazvo." 
1Chronicles22:15 Une varume vebasa vazhinji kwazvo: vacheki vamatombo, vavezi vamatanda navamwe varume vane unyanzvi mumabasa ose akasiyanasiyana" 
1Chronicles22:16 mune zvegoridhe nesirivha, ndarira nesimbi navarume voumhizha vasingaverengeki. Zvino chitanga basa uye Jehovha ave newe.”" 
1Chronicles22:17 Ipapo Dhavhidhi akarayira vatungamiri vose veIsraeri kuti vabatsire mwanakomana wake Soromoni. 
1Chronicles22:18 Akati kwavari, “Ko, Jehovha Mwari wenyu haasi nemi here? Uye haana kukupai zororo kumativi ose here? Nokuti akaisa vagari venyika iyi muruoko rwangu, uye nyika iri pasi paJehovha uye nepasi pavanhu vake." 
1Chronicles22:19 Zvino zvipirei mwoyo nemweya kutsvaka Jehovha Mwari wenyu. Tangai kuvaka nzvimbo tsvene yaJehovha Mwari, kuitira kuti mugouyisa areka yesungano yaJehovha nemidziyo mitsvene yaMwari mutemberi ichavakirwa Zita raJehovha.”" 
1Chronicles23:1 Dhavhidhi paakanga akwegura ava namakore mazhinji, akaita mwanakomana wake Soromoni mambo pamusoro peIsraeri." 
1Chronicles23:2 Akaunganidzawo vatungamiri vose veIsraeri pamwe chete navaprista navaRevhi. 
1Chronicles23:3 VaRevhi vose vana makore makumi matatu zvichienda mberi vakaverengwa, uye varume vose vakasvika zviuru makumi matatu nezvisere." 
1Chronicles23:4 Dhavhidhi akati, “Pane ava, zviuru makumi maviri nezvina vachava vatariri vebasa rokuvakwa kwetemberi yaJehovha uye zviuru zvitanhatu vachava vakuru navatongi." 
1Chronicles23:5 Zviuru zvina vachava vachengeti vamasuo uye zviuru zvina vacharumbidza Jehovha nezviridzwa zvandakapa nokuda kwechikonzero ichi.” 
1Chronicles23:6 Dhavhidhi akapatsanura vaRevhi akavaisa mumapoka zvichienderana navanakomana vaRevhi vaiti: Gerishoni, Kohati naMerari." 
1Chronicles23:7 VokwaGerishoni vaiva: Radhani naShimai. 
1Chronicles23:8 Vanakomana vaRudhani vaiva: Jehieri dangwe, Zetami naJoere, vatatu pamwe chete." 
1Chronicles23:9 Vanakomana vaShimei vaiva: Sheromoti, Hazieri naHarani, vatatu pamwe chete. Ava ndivo vaiva vakuru vemhuri dzaRadhani." 
1Chronicles23:10 Uye vanakomana vaShimei vaiva: Jahati, Ziza, Jeushi naBheria. Ava ndivo vaiva vanakomana vaShimei, vana pamwe chete." 
1Chronicles23:11 Jahati aiva wokutanga, Ziza ari wechipiri, asi Jeushi naBheria vakanga vasina vanakomana vakawanda; saka vakaverengwa semhuri imwe chete ine basa rimwe chete." 
1Chronicles23:12 Vanakomana vaKohati vaiva: Amiramu, Izhari, Hebhuroni naUzieri, vana pamwe chete." 
1Chronicles23:13 Vanakomana vaAmiramu vaiva: Aroni naMozisi. Aroni akatsaurwa iye nezvizvarwa zvake nokusingaperi, kuti anatse zvinhu zvaiva zvitsvene tsvene, kuti vape zvipiriso pamberi paJehovha, kushumira pamberi pake uye kutaura maropafadzo muzita rake nokusingaperi." 
1Chronicles23:14 Vanakomana vaMozisi munhu waMwari vakaverengwa sechikamu chorudzi rwaRevhi. 
1Chronicles23:15 Vanakomana vaMozisi vaiva: Gerishomi naEriezeri. 
1Chronicles23:16 Zvizvarwa zvaGerishomi: Shubhaeri ndiye aiva wokutanga. 
1Chronicles23:17 Zvizvarwa zvaEriezeri zvaiva: Rahabhia ndiye aiva wokutanga. Eriezeri haana kuzoita vamwe vanakomana, asi Rahabhia akaita vanakomana vakawanda kwazvo." 
1Chronicles23:18 Vanakomana vaIzhari: Sheromiti ndiye aiva wokutanga. 
1Chronicles23:19 Vanakomana vaHebhuroni: Jeria ndiye wokutanga, Amaria wechipiri, Jahazieri wechitatu naJekameami wechina." 
1Chronicles23:20 Vanakomana vaUzieri: Mika wokutanga naIshia wechipiri. 
1Chronicles23:21 Vanakomana vaMerari, vaiva: Mari naMushi. Vanakomana vaMari vaiva: Ereazari naKishi." 
1Chronicles23:22 Ereazari akafa asina vanakomana: aingova navanasikana chete. Hama dzavo, vanakomana vaKishi vakavaroora." 
1Chronicles23:23 Vanakomana vaMushi vaiva: Mari, Edheri, naJerimoti, vatatu pamwe chete." 
1Chronicles23:24 Ava ndivo vaiva zvizvarwa zvaRevhi nemhuri dzavo, vakuru vemhuri sezvazvakanga vakanyorwa pasi pamazita avo uye vachiverengwa mumwe nomumwe, zvichireva vashandi vaiva namakore makumi maviri naanopfuura vaishanda mutemberi yaJehovha." 
1Chronicles23:25 Nokuti Dhavhidhi akanga ati, “Sezvo Jehovha, Mwari waIsraeri apa zororo kuvanhu vake uye akauya kuzogara muJerusarema nokusingaperi," 
1Chronicles23:26 vaRevhi havachafaniri kuramba vachitakura tabhenakeri kana mimwe midziyo yose yaishandiswa pabasa rayo.” 
1Chronicles23:27 Maererano nokurayira kwaDhavhidhi kwokupedzisira, vaRevhi vakaverengwa kubva pana vana makore makumi maviri anopfuura ipapo." 
1Chronicles23:28 Basa ravaRevhi raiva rokubatsira zvizvarwa zvaAroni, mukubata basa romutemberi yaJehovha: kuvatariri voruvanze, makamuri omumativi, kunatsa zvinhu zvose zvaiera, nokuita mamwe mabasa paimba yaMwari." 
1Chronicles23:29 Vaiva vachengeti vechingwa chaiiswa patafura, upfu hwakatsetseka hwezvipiriso zvezviyo, zvingwa zvitete zvisina mbiriso, kubika nokusanganisa, uye zviero zvose zvouwandu noukuru." 
1Chronicles23:30 Vaifanirawo zvakare kumira mangwanani oga oga vachitenda nokurumbidza Jehovha. Vaifanira kuita zvimwe chetezvo manheru 
1Chronicles23:31 uye napose paipiwa zvipiriso zvinopiswa kuna Jehovha pamaSabata uye napamitambo yokugara kwoMwedzi napane mimwe mitambo yakarairwa. Vaifanira kushanda pamberi paJehovha nguva dzose nouwandu hwaidiwa uye nenzira yavakanga varayirwa kuti vaiite. 
1Chronicles23:32 Nokudaro vaRevhi vakaita mabasa omuTende Rokusangana, romuNzvimbo Tsvene uye vari pasi pehama dzavo zvizvarwa zvaAroni, mubasa roushumiri mutemberi yaJehovha." 
1Chronicles24:1 Aya ndiwo aiva mapoka avanakomana vaAroni: Vanakomana vaAroni vaiva: Nadhabhi, Abhihu, Ereazari naIthamari." 
1Chronicles24:2 Asi Nadhabhi naAbhihu vakafa baba vavo vasati vafa, uye vakanga vasina vanakomana; saka Ereazari naItamari vakashumira savaprista." 
1Chronicles24:3 Achibatsirwa naZadhoki chizvarwa chaEreazari naAhimereki chizvarwa chaItamari, Dhavhidhi akavapatsanura akavaisa mumapoka kuti vaite basa ravo roushumiri ravakanga varayirwa." 
1Chronicles24:4 Vatungamiri vazhinji vakanyanyowanikwa pane zvizvarwa zvaEreazari kupfuura pakati pezvizvarwa zvaItamari uye vakaiswa mumapoka zvakakodzerana: vakuru gumi navatanhatu kubva kuzvizvarwa zvaEreazari uye vakuru vasere kubva kuzvizvarwa zvaItamari. 
1Chronicles24:5 Vakavaisa mumapoka zvakakodzerana, nokukanda mijenya nokuti paiva navabati venzvimbo tsvene navabati vaMwari pakati pezvizvarwa zvaEreazari nezvizvarwa zvaItamari." 
1Chronicles24:6 Munyori Shemaya mwanakomana waNetaneri, muRevhi, akanyora mazita avo pamberi pamambo, napamberi pavabati vaiti: Zadhoki muprista, Ahimereki mwanakomana waAbhiatari navakuru vemhuri dzavaprista navaRevhi mhuri imwe chete ichitorwa kubva kuna Ereazari uye imwe chete kubva kuna Itamari." 
1Chronicles24:7 Mujenya wokutanga wakawira pana Jehoyaribhi, wechipiri pana Jedhaya," 
1Chronicles24:8 wechitatu kuna Harimi, wechina kuna Seorimi," 
1Chronicles24:9 wechishanu kuna Marikia, wechitanhatu kuna Miyamini," 
1Chronicles24:10 wechinomwe kuna Jakozi, wechisere kuna Abhija," 
1Chronicles24:11 wepfumbamwe kuna Jeshua, wegumi kuna Shekania," 
1Chronicles24:12 wegumi nomumwe kuna Eriashibhi, wegumi nembiri kuna Jakimi," 
1Chronicles24:13 wegumi nenhatu kuna Hupa, wegumi neina kuna Jeshebheabhi," 
1Chronicles24:14 wegumi neshanu kuna Bhiriga, wegumi nenhanhatu kunaImeri," 
1Chronicles24:15 wegumi nenomwe kuna Heziri, wegumi nesere kuna Hapizezi," 
1Chronicles24:16 wegumi nepfumbamwe kuna Petahia, wemakumi maviri kuna Jehezikeri," 
1Chronicles24:17 wemakumi maviri nomumwe kuna Jakini, wemakumi maviri nembiri kuna Gamuri," 
1Chronicles24:18 wemakumi maviri nenhatu kuna Dheraya uye wemakumi maviri neina kuna Maazia. 
1Chronicles24:19 Iri ndiro raiva basa ravo roushumiri ravakanga varayirwa pavakapinda mutemberi yaJehovha, maererano nemitemo yavakanga vapiwa nababa wavo Aroni sokurayirwa kwaakanga aitwa naJehovha, Mwari waIsraeri." 
1Chronicles24:20 Kana zviri zvimwe zvizvarwa zvaRevhi: kubva kuvanakomana vaAmiramu, Shubhaeri; kubva kuvanakomana vaShubhaeri: Jedheya." 
1Chronicles24:21 Kana ari Rehabhia, kuvanakomana vake: Ishia aiva wokutanga." 
1Chronicles24:22 Kubva kuva Izhari: Sheromoti; kubva kuvanakomana vaSheromoti: Jahati. 
1Chronicles24:23 Vanakomana vaHebhuroni vaiva: Jeria wokutanga, Amaria wechipiri, Jehazieri wechitatu naJekameami wechina." 
1Chronicles24:24 Mwanakomana waUzieri aiva: Mika; kubva kuvanakomana vaMika: Shamiri. 
1Chronicles24:25 Munun'una waMika: Ishi; kubva kuvanakomana vaIshia: Zekaria. 
1Chronicles24:26 Vanakomana vaMerari vaiva: Mari naMushi. Mwanakomana waJaazia aiva: Bheno. 
1Chronicles24:27 Vanakomana vaMerari vaiva: kubva kuna Jaazia: Bheno, Shoshami, Zakuri, naIbhiri." 
1Chronicles24:28 Kubva kuna Mari: Ereazari, uye akanga asina vanakomana." 
1Chronicles24:29 Kubva kuna Kishi mwanakomana waKishi aiva: Jerameeri. 
1Chronicles24:30 Uye vanakomana vaMushi vaiti: Mari, Edheri naJerimoti. Ava ndivo vaiva vaRevhi maererano nemhuri dzavo." 
1Chronicles24:31 Vakakandawo mijenya sezvaingoita hama dzavo zvizvarwa zvaAroni, pamberi paMambo Dhavhidhi naZadhoki, Ahimereki navakuru vemhuri dzavaprista navaRevhi. Mhuri dzomukoma pane vose dzaingoverengwa zvimwe chetezvo sedzomudiki pane vose." 
1Chronicles25:1 Dhavhidhi, pamwe chete navatungamiri vehondo: vakatsaura vamwe vavanakomana vaAsafi, Hemari naJedhutuni kuti vaite ushumiri hwokuprofita kuchiridzwa mbira, mitengeranwa namakandira. Aya ndiwo mazita avarume vaiita basa iri." 
1Chronicles25:2 Kubva kuvanakomana vaAsafi: Zakuri, Josefa, Netania naAsarera. Vanakomana vaAsafi vaitungamirirwa naAsafi uyo aiprofita achitungamirirwa namambo." 
1Chronicles25:3 Kana ari Jedhutuni, kuvanakomana vake: Gedharia, Zeri, Jeshaya, Shimei, Hashabhia naMatitia, vatanhatu pamwe chete, vachitungamirirwa nababa vavo Jedhutuni uyo aiprofita achishandisa mbira mukuvonga nokurumbidza Jehovha." 
1Chronicles25:4 Kana ari Hemani, kubva kuvanakomana vake: Bhukia, Matania, Uzieri, Shubhaeri naJerimoti; Hanania, Hanani, Eriata, Gidhariti naRomamitiEzeri; Joshibhekasha, Maroti, Hotiri naMahazioti." 
1Chronicles25:5 Vose ava vaiva vanakomana vaHemani muoni wamambo. Akavapiwa kubudikidza nezvivimbiso zvaMwari kuti amukudze. Mwari akapa Hemani vanakomana gumi navana, navanasikana vatatu." 
1Chronicles25:6 Varume vose ava vaitungamirirwa namadzibaba avo, mukuimba mutemberi yaJehovha, namakandira nemitengeranwa nembira, kuti vaite ushumiri paimba yaMwari. Asafi, Jedhutuni naHemani vaiva pasi pamambo." 
1Chronicles25:7 Pamwe chete nehama dzavo, vose vakadzidzira uye vakava nyanzvi mukuimbira Jehovha, vaisvika mazana maviri amakumi masere ana vasere." 
1Chronicles25:8 Vaduku navakuru pamwe chete, mudzidzisi pamwe chete nomudzidzi, vakakanda mijenya pakupiwa mabasa avo." 
1Chronicles25:9 Mujenya wokutanga waiva waAsafi, wakawira pana Josefa, vanakomana vake nehama dzake, gumi navaviri; wechipiri kuna Gedharia, iye nehama dzake navanakomana vake— gumi navaviri;" 
1Chronicles25:10 wechitatu kuna Zakari, vanakomana vake nehama dzake— gumi navaviri;" 
1Chronicles25:11 wechina kuna Iziri, vanakomana vake nehama dzake— gumi navaviri;" 
1Chronicles25:12 wechishanu kuna Netania, vanakomana vake nehama dzake— gumi navaviri;" 
1Chronicles25:13 wechitanhatu kuna Bhukia, vanakomana vake nehama dzake— gumi navaviri;" 
1Chronicles25:14 wechinomwe kuna Jesarera, vanakomana vake nehama dzake— gumi navaviri;" 
1Chronicles25:15 worusere kuna Jeshaya, vanakomana vake nehama dzake— navaviri;" 
1Chronicles25:16 wepfumbamwe kuna Matania, vanakomana vake nehama dzake— gumi navaviri;" 
1Chronicles25:17 wegumi kuna Shimei, vanakomana vake nehama dzake— gumi navaviri;" 
1Chronicles25:18 wegumi nomumwe kuna Azareri, vanakomana vake nehama dzake— gumi navaviri;" 
1Chronicles25:19 wegumi nemiviri kuna Hashabhia, vanakomana vake nehama dzake— gumi navaviri;" 
1Chronicles25:20 wegumi nemitatu kuna Shubhaeri, vanakomana vake nehama dzake— gumi navaviri;" 
1Chronicles25:21 wegumi nemina kuna Matitia, vanakomana vake nehama dzake— gumi navaviri;" 
1Chronicles25:22 wegumi nemishanu kuna Jerimoti, vanakomana vake nehama dzake— gumi navaviri;" 
1Chronicles25:23 wegumi nemitanhatu kuna Hanania, vanakomana vake nehama dzake— gumi navaviri;" 
1Chronicles25:24 wegumi nemisere kuna Joshibhekasha, vanakomana vake nehama dzake— gumi navaviri;" 
1Chronicles25:25 wegumi nemisere kuna Hanani, vanakomana vake nehama dzake— gumi navaviri;" 
1Chronicles25:26 wegumi nemipfumbamwe kuna Maroti, vanakomana vake nehama dzake— gumi navaviri;" 
1Chronicles25:27 wamakumi maviri kuna Eriata, vanakomana vake nehama dzake— gumi navaviri;" 
1Chronicles25:28 wamakumi maviri nomumwe kuna Hotiri, vanakomana vake nehama dzake— gumi navaviri;" 
1Chronicles25:29 wamakumi maviri nemitatu kuna Gidhariti, vanakomana vake nehama dzake— gumi navaviri;" 
1Chronicles25:30 wamakumi maviri nemitatu kuna Mahazioti, vanakomana vake nehama dzake— gumi navaviri;" 
1Chronicles25:31 wamakumi maviri nemina kuna Romamiti-Ezeri, vanakomana vake nehama dzake— gumi navaviri." 
1Chronicles26:1 Mapoka avachengeti vemikova aiva: Kubva kuvaKorati: Mesheremia mwanakomana waKore, mumwe wavanakomana vaAsafi." 
1Chronicles26:2 Mesheremia aiva navanakomana vaiti: Zekaria dangwe, Jedhiaeri wechipiri Zebhadhia wechitatu, Jatinieri wechina," 
1Chronicles26:3 Eramu wechishanu, Jehoanani wechitanhatu, naEriehoenai wechinomwe." 
1Chronicles26:4 Obedhi-Edhomu aivawo navanakomana vaiti: Shemaya dangwe, Jehozabhadhi wechipiri, Joa wechitatu, Sakari wechina, Netaneri wechishanu," 
1Chronicles26:5 Amieri wechitanhatu, Isakari wechinomwe naPeuretai wechisere (Nokuti Mwari akanga aropafadza Obedhi-Edhomu.)" 
1Chronicles26:6 Mwanakomana wake Shemaya aivawo navanakomana vaiva: vatungamiri mumhuri yababa vavo nokuti vaiva varume vaikwanisa. 
1Chronicles26:7 Vanakomana vaShemaya vaiti: Otini, Refaeri, Obedhi naErizabhadhi; hama dzake Erihu naSemakia vaivawo varume vaikwanisa." 
1Chronicles26:8 Vose ava vaiva zvizvarwa zvaObedhi-Edhomu, Ivo navanakomana vavo nehama dzavo vaiva varume vaikwanisa vaine simba rokuita basa, zvizvarwa zvaObhedhi-Edhomu, vaisvika makumi matanhatu navaviri pamwe chete." 
1Chronicles26:9 Mesheremia aiva navanakomana nehama vakanga vari varume voumhare vaisvika gumi navasere pamwe chete. 
1Chronicles26:10 Hosa muMerati aiva navanakomana vaiti: Shimiri wokutanga (kunyange zvake akanga asiri dangwe baba vake vakamuita wokutanga.) 
1Chronicles26:11 Hirikia wechipiri, Tabharia wechitatu naZakaria wechina. Vanakomana nehama dzaHosa vaiva gumi navatatu vose pamwe chete." 
1Chronicles26:12 Aya mapoka avachengeti vamasuo, kubudikidza navakuru vavo, vaiva nemabasa okushumira mutemberi yaJehovha, sezvaingoitawo hama dzavo." 
1Chronicles26:13 Mijenya yakakandwa nokuda kwesuo rime nerimwe, maererano nemhuri dzavo, vadiki nevakuru pamwe chete." 
1Chronicles26:14 Mijenya weSuo Rokumabvazuva wakawira pana Sheremia. Zvino mujenya yakakandwa nokuda kwomwanakomana wake Zekaria, mupi wamazano akachenjera uye mujenya weSuo Rokumusoro wakawira paari." 
1Chronicles26:15 Mujenya weSuo Rezasi wakawira pana Obedhi-Edhomu, uye mujenya wedura wakawira kuvanakomana vake." 
1Chronicles26:16 Mijenya yeSuo Rokumadokero neSuo reSharebeti kunzira yokumusoro yakawira kuna Shupimi naHosa. Murindi aimira parutivi rwomumwe murindi. 
1Chronicles26:17 Kumabvazuva kwainge kuine vaRevhi vatanhatu pazuva, kurutivi rwokumusoro kuine vana pazuva, zasi kuine vana pazuva uye vaviri panguva imwe chete padura." 
1Chronicles26:18 Kana rwuri ruvanze rwokumadokero kwaiva navana kunzira navaviri paruvanze chaipo. 
1Chronicles26:19 Aya ndiwo aiva mapoka avachengeti vemasuo avo vaiva zvizvarwa zvaKora naMerari. 
1Chronicles26:20 Hama dzavo vaRevhi vaiva vachengeti vepfuma yomumba yaMwari nepfuma yezvinhu zvakakumikidzwa. 
1Chronicles26:21 Zvizvarwa zvaRadhani, avo vaiva vaGerishoni kubudikidza naRadhani uye vaiva vatungamiri vemhuri dzaRadhani muGerishoni vaiti: Jehieri," 
1Chronicles26:22 vanakomana vaJeheri, Zetami, nomunun'una wake Joere. Vaiva nebasa rokuchengeta pfuma yetemberi yaJehovha." 
1Chronicles26:23 Kubva kuvaAmiramu, vaIzhari, vaHebhuroni navaUzieri:" 
1Chronicles26:24 Shubhaeri chizvarwa chaGerishoni mwanakomana waMozisi, ndiye aiva mukuru pakuchengetwa kwepfuma." 
1Chronicles26:25 Hama dzake kubudikidza naEriezeri dzaiva: Rehabhia mwanakomana wake, Jeshaya mwanakomana wake, Joramu mwanakomana wake, Zikiri mwanakomana wake naSheromiti mwanakomana wake." 
1Chronicles26:26 Sheromiti nehama dzake vaiva nebasa rokuchengetedza pfuma yose yezvinhu zvakakumikidzwa naMambo Dhavhidhi, navakuru vemhuri dzavo vaiva vatungamiri vezviuru navatungamiri vamazana uye navamwe vatungamiri." 
1Chronicles26:27 Zvimwe zvezvakapambwa muhondo vakazvikumikidza kuti zvishandiswe pakugadziridza temberi yaJehovha. 
1Chronicles26:28 Uye zvose zvakakumikidzwa naSamueri muoni naSauro naJoabhu mwanakomana waZeruya, nezvimwe zvinhu zvose zvakakumikidzwa zvaichengetwa naSheromiti nehama dzake." 
1Chronicles26:29 Kubva kuvaIzhari: Kenania navanakomana vake vakapiwa mabasa ekure netemberi vari machinda navatongi muIsraeri. 
1Chronicles26:30 Kubva kuvaHebhuroni: Hashabhia nehama dzake, varume chiuru namazana manomwe vaikwanisa ndivo vaiva vakuru muIsraeri kumadokero kweJorodhani pabasa rose raJehovha napabasa rose ramambo." 
1Chronicles26:31 Kana vari vaHebhuroni, Jeria ndiye aiva mukuru wavo maererano nezvinyorwa zvenhoroondo dzemhuri dzavo maererano nezvinyorwa zvenhoroondo, uye varume pakatsvakwa muzvinyorwa zvenhoroondo, uye varume vaikwanisa vakawanikwa pakati pavaHebhuroni vakawanikwa paJazeri muGireadhi." 
1Chronicles26:32 Jeria aiva nehama zviuru zviviri namazana manomwe vaiva varume vaikwanisa uye vari vakuru vemhuri dzavo, uye Mambo Dhavhidhi akavaita kuti vave vatariri vavaRubheni, vaGhadhi, norudzi rwehafu rwaManase kuti vagadzirise nyaya dzose dzezvaMwari uye nyaya dzose dzamambo." 
1Chronicles27:1 Aya ndiwo mazita avaIsraeri, vakuru vemhuri, vatungamiri vezviuru navatungamiri vamazana, namachinda avo, vaishandira mambo mune zvose pamusoro pamapoka avarwi ainge ari pabasa mwedzi nomwedzi mugore rose. Boka rimwe nerimwe raiva navarume zviuru makumi maviri nezvina." 
1Chronicles27:2 Aitungamirira boka rokutanga mwedzi wokutanga, aiva Jashobheami mwanakomana waZabhidhieri. Muboka rake maiva navarume zviuru makumi maviri nezvina." 
1Chronicles27:3 Aiva chizvarwa chaPerezi nomukuru wavakuru vavavarwi vose mumwedzi wokutanga. 
1Chronicles27:4 Aitungamirira boka remwedzi wechipiri ainzi Dhavhidhi muAhohi; Mikiroti ndiye aiva mutungamiri weboka rake. Muboka rake maiva nezviuru makumi maviri nezvina. 
1Chronicles27:5 Mukuru wavarwi wechitatu mumwedzi wechitatu ainzi Bhenaya mwanakomana waJehoyadha muprista. Ndiye aiva mukuru uye muboka maiva navarume zviuru makumi maviri nezvina. 
1Chronicles27:6 Uyu ndiye Bhenaya uya aiva mumwe woumhare pakati paMakumi Matatu uye aiva pamusoro paMakumi Matatu vacho. Mwanakomana wake Amizabhadhi ndiye aitungamirira boka rake. 
1Chronicles27:7 Wechina pamwedzi wechina, aiva Asaheri munun'una waJoabhu; mwanakomana wake Zebhadia ndiye akamutevera pakutungamirira boka iri. Muboka rake maiva navarume zviuru makumi maviri nezvina." 
1Chronicles27:8 Wechishanu pamwedzi wechishanu, aiva mutungamiri Shamihuti muIzirahi. Muboka rake maiva navarume zviuru makumi maviri nezvina." 
1Chronicles27:9 Wechitanhatu pamwedzi wechitanhatu, aiva Ira mwanakomana waIkeshi muTekoi. Muboka rake maiva navarume zviuru makumi maviri nezvina." 
1Chronicles27:10 Wechinomwe pamwedzi wechinomwe, aiva Herezi muPeroni, muEfuremu. Muboka rake maiva navarume zviuru makumi maviri nezvina." 
1Chronicles27:11 Worusere, pamwedzi worusere, aiva Sibhekai muHushati muZerahi. Muboka rake maiva navarume zviuru makumi maviri nezvina." 
1Chronicles27:12 Wechipfumbamwe, mumwedzi wechipfumbamwe, aiva Abhiezeri muAnatoti, muBenjamini. Muboka rake maiva navarume zviuru makumi maviri nezvina." 
1Chronicles27:13 Wegumi, mumwedzi wegumi, aiva Maharai muNetofati, muZerahi. Muboka rake maiva navarume zviuru makumi maviri nezvina." 
1Chronicles27:14 Wegumi nomumwe, mumwedzi wegumi nomumwe, aiva Benaya muPiratoni, muEfuremu. Muboka rake maiva navarume zviuru makumi maviri nezvina." 
1Chronicles27:15 Wegumi navaviri, mumwedzi wegumi nemiviri, aiva Heridhai muNetofati, aibva mumhuri yaOtinieri. Muboka rake maiva navarume zviuru makumi maviri nezvina." 
1Chronicles27:16 Machinda pamusoro pamarudzi aIsraeri aiti: pamusoro pavaRubheni: Eriezeri mwanakomana waZikiri; pamusoro pavaSimeoni: Shefatia mwanakomana waMaaka; 
1Chronicles27:17 pamusoro paRaiti: Hashabhia mwanakomana waKemueri; pamusoro paAroni: Zadhoki; 
1Chronicles27:18 pamusoro paJudha: Erihu, munun'una waDhavhidhi; pamusoro paIsakari: Omiri mwanakomana waMikaeri;" 
1Chronicles27:19 pamusoro paZebhuruni: Ishimaya mwanakomana waObhadhia; pamusoro paNafutari: Jerimoti mwanakomana waAzirieri; 
1Chronicles27:20 pamusoro pavaEfuremu: Hoshea mwanako-mana waAzazia; pamusoro porudzi rwehafu rwaManase: Joere mwanakomana waPedhaya; 
1Chronicles27:21 pamusoro porudzi rwehafu rwaManase muGireadhi: Idho mwanakomana waZekaria; pamusoro paBenjamini: Jaashaeri mwanakomana waAbhineri; 
1Chronicles27:22 pamusoro paDhani: Azareri mwanakomana waJerohami. Ava ndivo vaiva machinda pamusoro pamarudzi avaIsraeri. 
1Chronicles27:23 Dhavhidhi haana kuverenga varume vaiva namakore makumi maviri zvichidzika, nokuti Jehovha akanga avimbisa kuti vaIsraeri vaizowanda senyeredzi dziri mudenga." 
1Chronicles27:24 Joabhu mwanakomana waZeruya akatanga kuverenga varume ava asi haana kuzopedza. Kutsamwa kwakauya pamusoro peIsraeri nokuda kwokuverengwa uku, saka uwandu uhu hauna kuiswa mubhuku renhoroondo dzegore negore raMambo Dhavhidhi." 
1Chronicles27:25 Azimavheti mwanakomana waAdhieri aiva muchengeti wamatura amambo. Jonatani mwanakomana waUzia aiva muchengeti wamatura kumaruwa okure, mumaguta, mumisha neshongwe dzavarindi." 
1Chronicles27:26 Eziri mwanakomana waKerubhi aiva mutariri pamusoro wavashandi vomuminda vairima minda. 
1Chronicles27:27 Shimei muRamati aiva mutariri weminda yemizambiringa. Zabhidhi muShifimi aiva mutariri wezvibereko zveminda yemizambiringa zvokuzoisa muzvirongo zvewaini. 
1Chronicles27:28 Bhaari-Hanani muGedheri aiva mutariri wemiorivhi nemionde yakanga iri mujinga mezvikomo zvokumadokero. Joashi aiva mutariri wamafuta omuorivhi. 
1Chronicles27:29 Shitirai muSharoni, aiva mutariri wemombe dzaiva mumipata." 
1Chronicles27:30 Obhiri muIshumaeri aiva mutariri wengamera Jedheya muMeronoti aiva mutariri wembongoro. 
1Chronicles27:31 Jazizi muHagiri aiva mutariri wamakwai. Ava ndivo vaiva vabati vaichengeta zvinhu zvamambo Dhavhidhi. 
1Chronicles27:32 Jonatani, babamunini vaDhavhidhi vaiva mupi wamazano, murume woruzivo nomunyori. Jehieri mwanakomana waHakimoni aiva muchengeti wavanakomana vamambo." 
1Chronicles27:33 Ahitoferi aiva mupi wamazano kuna mambo. Hushai muAriki aiva shamwari yamambo. 
1Chronicles27:34 Ahitoferi akazoteverwa pachinzvimbo naJehoyadha mwanakomana waBhenaya uye naAbhiatari. Joabhu ndiye aiva mutungamiri wehondo yamambo. 
1Chronicles28:1 Dhavhidhi akarayira vabati veIsraeri vose kuti vaungane paJerusarema: vabati pamusoro pamarudzi, vatungamiri vamapoka aishandira mambo, vatungamiri vezviuru navatungamiri vamazana, navabati vaichengeta zvinhu nezvipfuwo zvamambo uye navanakomana vake, pamwe chete navabati vomumuzinda wamambo, varume vane simba nemhare dzose dzakashinga." 
1Chronicles28:2 Mambo Dhavhidhi akasimuka akamira akati, “Teererai kwandiri, hama dzangu navanhu vangu. Zvakanga zviri mumwoyo mangu kuti ndivake imba senzvimbo yokuzororera yeareka yesungano yaJehovha, kuti zvive chitsikiro chetsoka dzaMwari wedu, uye ndakaita urongwa hwokuivaka." 
1Chronicles28:3 Asi Mwari akati kwandiri, ‘Iwe hausi kuzovakira Zita rangu imba, nokuti uri murwi uye wakateura ropa.’" 
1Chronicles28:4 “Asi Jehovha, Mwari waIsraeri, akandisarudza kubva kumhuri yangu yose kuti ndive mambo pamusoro paIsraeri nokusingaperi. Akasarudza Judha kuti ave mhuri yangu, uye kubva muvanakomana vababa vangu akafadzwa nokundiita mambo pamusoro peIsraeri." 
1Chronicles28:5 Pavanakomana vangu vose, uye Jehovha akandipa vakawanda kwazvo, iye akasarudza mwanakomana wangu Soromoni kuti agare pachigaro choumambo hwaJehovha pamusoro paIsraeri." 
1Chronicles28:6 Akati kwandiri, ‘Soromoni mwanakomana wako ndiye achavaka imba yangu nezvivanze zvangu, ndichava baba vake." 
1Chronicles28:7 Ndichasimbisa umambo hwake nokusingaperi kana iye akatsungirira mukuita zvandakarayira panguva ino.’ 
1Chronicles28:8 “Saka zvino ndinokurayira pamberi peIsraeri yose uye napamberi peungano yaJehovha, uye Mwari wedu achinzwa: Chenjerera kuti utevere kurayira kwose kwaJehovha senhaka kuvana vako nokusingaperi." 
1Chronicles28:9 “Newewo mwanakomana wangu Soromoni, ziva Mwari wababa vako, uye umushumire nomwoyo wose uye nepfungwa dzako dzose, nokuti Jehovha anonzvera mwoyo uye anonzwisisa chinangwa chipi nechipi chiri mupfungwa. Ukamutsvaga achawanikwa newe, asi kana ukamurasa, iye achakuramba nokusingaperi." 
1Chronicles28:10 Funga zvino, senzvimbo tsvene. Iva nesimba uye uite basa iri.”" 
1Chronicles28:11 Ipapo Dhavhidhi akapa mwanakomana wake Soromoni urongwa hwebiravira retemberi dzimba dzayo, matura ayo, makamuri ayo okumusoro, makamuri ayo omukati uye nenzvimbo yokuyananisira." 
1Chronicles28:12 Akamupa urongwa hwazvose zvakanga zvaiswa noMweya mupfungwa make pamusoro pezvivanze zvetemberi yaJehovha namakamuri ose akapoteredza, pamusoro pamatura epfuma yetemberi yaMwari napamusoro pamatura ezvinhu zvakakumikidzwa." 
1Chronicles28:13 Akamurayira zvokuita pamusoro pamapoka avaprista navaRevhi uye napamusoro pebasa rose rokushumira mutemberi yaJehovha, uyewo napamusoro pemidziyo yaizoshandiswa mubasa rayo." 
1Chronicles28:14 Akarayira uremu hwegoridhe remidziyo yose yaizoshandiswa mumhando dzose dzokushumira, nouremu hwesirivha yemidziyo yose yaizoshandiswa mumhando dzose dzokushumira:" 
1Chronicles28:15 Uremu hwegoridhe rezvigadziko zvemwenje zvegoridhe nemwenje yazvo, nouremu hwechigadziko chomwenje chimwe nechimwe, nemwenje yacho, maererano nokushandiswa kwechigadziko chemwenje chimwe nechimwe." 
1Chronicles28:16 Uremu hwegoridhe retafura imwe neimwe yechingwa chakatsaurwa; uremu hwesirivha yetafura dzesirivha; 
1Chronicles28:17 uremu hwegoridhe rakanatswa reforogo, ndiro dzokusasa nemikombe; uremu hwegoridhe nedhishi rimwe nerimwe regoridhe; uremu hwesirivha yedhishi rimwe nerimwe resirivha;" 
1Chronicles28:18 uye uremu hwegoridhe rakanatswa nearitari yezvinonhuwira. Akamupawo mufananidzo wengoro iyo ina makerubhi egoridhe akatambanudza mapapiro awo achifukidza areka yesungano yaJehovha. 
1Chronicles28:19 Dhavhidhi akati, “Zvose izvi ndakazviziviswa zvanyorwa noruoko rwaJehovha, urongwa hwamabasa ake ose.”" 
1Chronicles28:20 Dhavhidhi akatiwo kumwanakomana wake Soromoni, “Simba utsunge mwoyo, uye uite basa iri. Usatya kana kuora mwoyo, nokuti Jehovha Mwari, Mwari wangu anewe. Haachazokusiyi kana kukurasa, kusvikira basa rose rokushandira temberi yaJehovha rapera." 
1Chronicles28:21 Mapoka avaprista navaRevhi akagadzirira kuisa basa rose rapatemberi yaMwari, uye murume wose anoda uye ane umhizha hupi nehupi pamabasa amaoko achakubatsira pabasa iri rose. Vabati vose navanhu vose vachateerera kurayira kwako kwose.”" 
1Chronicles29:1 Ipapo Mambo Dhavhidhi akati kuungano yose, “Mwanakomana wangu Soromoni uyo asarudzwa naMwari mudiki uye haasati ava kunyatsogona. Basa iri iguru kwazvo nokuti muzinda uyu hausi womunhu asi ndowaJehovha Mwari." 
1Chronicles29:2 Nokuwana kwangu kwose ndapa kutemberi yaMwari wangu, goridhe pabasa regoridhe, sirivha pabasa resirivha, ndarira pabasa rendarira, simbi pabasa resimbi uye matanda pabasa ramatanda, pamwe chete neonikisi, namabwe okuisa mukati namatombo amavara akasiyana-siyana, namamwe mabwe akaurungana amarudzi ose namamwe machena, zvose izvi zvakawanda kwazvo." 
1Chronicles29:3 Pamusoro pezvo mukuzvipira, kwangu kutemberi yaMwari wangu zvino ndava kupa upfumi hwangu pachangu hwegoridhe nesirivha kutemberi yaMwari wangu, ndichiwedzera pamusoro pezvose zvandakapa kutemberi iyi tsvene zvinoti:" 
1Chronicles29:4 Matarenda zviuru zvitatua egoridhe (goridhe reOfiri) namatarenda zviuru zvinomweb esirivha yakanatswa yokufukidza madziro edzimba," 
1Chronicles29:5 kuitira basa regoridhe, nebasa resirivha uye kuti basa rose riitwe navarume voumhizha. Zvino ndiani anoda kuzvitsaurira kuna Jehovha nhasi!”" 
1Chronicles29:6 Ipapo vatungamiri vemhuri, vakuru vamarudzi eIsraeri, vatungamiri vezviuru, vatungamiri vamazana namachinda aitungamirira basa ramambo vakapa nomwoyo unoda." 
1Chronicles29:7 Vakapa kubasa rapatemberi matarenda zviuru zvishanuc namadhariki zviuru gumid egoridhe, matarenda zviuru gumie esirivha, matarenda zviuru gumi nezviseref endarira, namatarenda zviuru zanag esimbi." 
1Chronicles29:8 Ani naani akanga ane matombo anokosha akapa ose kuimba yokuchengeta pfuma yetemberi yaJehovha zvichichengetwa naJehieri muGerishoni. 
1Chronicles29:9 Vanhu vakapembera nomufaro pavakaona kuti vatungamiri vavo vakanga vapa nomwoyo unoda, nokuti vakanga vapa kuna Jehovha vakasununguka uye nomwoyo wose. Mambo Dhavhidhi akafarawo zvikuru." 
1Chronicles29:10 Dhavhidhi akarumbidza Jehovha pamberi peungano yose achiti: “Rumbidzwai imi Jehovha, Mwari wababa vedu Israeri, kubva kusingaperi kusvika kusingaperi." 
1Chronicles29:11 Ukuru nesimba ndezvenyu, imi Jehovha nokukudzwa noushe nokubwinya, nokuti zvose zviri kudenga napasi ndezvenyu. Umambo ndohwenyu, imi Jehovha munokudzwa somusoro wezvose." 
1Chronicles29:12 Upfumi nokuremekedzwa zvinobva kwamuri; ndimi mutongi wezvinhu zvose. Mumaoko enyu mune simba noushe kuti musimudzire uye musimbise vanhu vose. 
1Chronicles29:13 Zvino, Mwari wedu, tinokuvongai, uye tinorumbidza zita renyu rakanakisa." 
1Chronicles29:14 “Asi ini ndini aniko, uye vanhu vangu ndivananiko, kuti tingakwanisa kupa zvakawanda kudai? Zvose zvinobva kwamuri, uye tangokupai chete zvinobva mumaoko enyu." 
1Chronicles29:15 Tiri vatorwa navapfuuri pamberi penyu, sezvakanga zvakaita madzibaba edu ose. Mazuva edu panyika akaita somumvuri, asina tariro." 
1Chronicles29:16 Imi Jehovha, Mwari wedu, izvi zvose zvakawanda kudai zvatapa kuti temberi yenyu ivakwe nokuda kweZita renyu Dzvene zvinobva muruoko rwenyu uye zvose ndezvenyu." 
1Chronicles29:17 Ndinoziva, Mwari wangu, kuti munoedza mwoyo uye munofadzwa nokururama. Zvinhu zvose izvi ndakupai ndichida uye nomwoyo wakatendeka. Uye zvino ndaona ndikafadzwa namapiro aita vanhu venyu vari pano kwamuri nomwoyo unoda." 
1Chronicles29:18 Imi Jehovha, Mwari wamadzibaba edu Abhurahama, Isaka, naIsraeri, chengetedzai kudokwairira kwakadai mumwoyo yavanhu venyu nokusingaperi, uye muite kuti mwoyo yavo irambe yakazvipira kwamuri." 
1Chronicles29:19 Uye ipai mwanakomana wangu Soromoni mwoyo wakaperera kuti achengete mirayiro yenyu, zvose zvamunoda nemitemo yenyu uye kuti aite zvose kuti avake muzinda wandagadzirira zvose izvi.”" 
1Chronicles29:20 Ipapo Dhavhidhi akati kuungano yose, “Rumbidzai Jehovha Mwari wenyu.” Saka vose vakarumbidza Jehovha, Mwari wamadzibaba avo; vakakotamira pasi vakawira pasi nezviso pamberi paJehovha naMambo." 
1Chronicles29:21 Zuva raitevera vakapa zvipiriso kuna Jehovha vakapa zvipiriso zvinopiswa kwaari zvinoti: hando chiuru, makondohwe chiuru, namakwayana makono chiuru, pamwe chete nezvipiriso zvazvo zvokunwa, nezvimwe zvibayiro zvakawanda zveIsraeri." 
1Chronicles29:22 Vakadya nokunwa nomufaro mukuru pamberi paJehovha zuva iroro. Ipapo vakazogamuchira Soromoni mwanakomana waDhavhidhi samambo kechipiri, vakamuzodza pamberi paJehovha kuti ave mutongi, uye Zadhoki ave muprista." 
1Chronicles29:23 Saka Soromoni akagara pachigaro choushe chaJehovha samambo panzvimbo yababa vake Dhavhidhi. Akabudirira uye Israeri yose yakamuteerera. 
1Chronicles29:24 Vatungamiri vose pamwe chete navarume voumhare, pamwe chete navanakomana vose vaMambo vaDhavhidhi vakavimbisa kuzviisa pasi paMambo Soromoni." 
1Chronicles29:25 Jehovha akasimudzira Soromoni kwazvo pamberi peIsraeri yose akaisa paari kukudzwa kwoumambo kusina kumbopiwa mumwe mambo weIsraeri akamutangira. 
1Chronicles29:26 Dhavhidhi mwanakomana waJese aiva mambo pamusoro peIsraeri yose. 
1Chronicles29:27 Akatonga Israeri kwamakore makumi mana, manomwe muHebhuroni uye makumi matatu namatatu muJerusarema." 
1Chronicles29:28 Akafa akwegura zvikuru ararama upenyu hurefu, hune upfumi nokukudzwa. Mwanakomana wake Soromoni akamutevera paumambo." 
1Chronicles29:29 Kana zviri zvinhu zvakaitika panguva yokutonga kwaMambo Dhavhidhi kubva pakutanga kusvika kumagumo, zvakanyorwa muzvinyorwa zvaSamueri muoni, zvinyorwa zvaNatani muprofita, uye nomuzvinyorwa zvaGadhi muoni," 
1Chronicles29:30 pamwe chete nenhoroondo dzokutonga kwake, uye nesimba, nezvinhu zvakaitika kwaari iye neIsraeri noumambo hwedzimwe nyika dzose." 
2Chronicles1:1 Soromoni mwanakomana waDhavhidhi akasimbisa kwazvo ushe hwake, nokuti Jehovha Mwari wake akanga anaye akamuita kuti ave mukuru kwazvo." 
2Chronicles1:2 Ipapo Soromoni akataura kuIsraeri yose, kuvatungamiri vezviuru nokuvatungamiri vamazana, kuvatongi nokuvatungamiri vose muIsraeri, vakuru vemhuri," 
2Chronicles1:3 uye Soromoni neungano yose vakaenda kunzvimbo yakakwirira yeGibheoni, nokuti Tende Rokusangana raMwari rakanga ririko, iro rakanga ragadzirwa naMozisi muranda waMwari murenje." 
2Chronicles1:4 Zvino Dhavhidhi akanga auyisa areka yaMwari kubva kuKiriati Jearimi kunzvimbo yaakanga aigadzirira nokuti akanga aidzikira tende muJerusarema. 
2Chronicles1:5 Asi aritari yendarira yakanga yagadzirwa naBhezareri mwanakomana waUri, mwanakomana waHuri, yakanga iri muGibheoni pamberi peTabhenakeri yaJehovha; saka Soromoni neungano vakandomubvunza ipapo." 
2Chronicles1:6 Soromoni akakwira kuaritari yendarira pamberi paJehovha muTende Rokusangana akandobayira zvipiriso zvinopiswa zvinokwana chiuru pairi. 
2Chronicles1:7 Usiku ihwohwo Mwari akazviratidza kuna Soromoni akati kwaari, “Kumbira chose chaungada kuti ndikupe.”" 
2Chronicles1:8 Soromoni akapindura Mwari akati, “Makaratidza unyoro hwenyu hukuru kwazvo kuna Dhavhidhi baba vangu uye mukandiita mambo pachinzvimbo chavo." 
2Chronicles1:9 Zvino, Jehovha Mwari, itai henyu kuti chivimbiso chenyu kuna baba vangu Dhavhidhi chizadzikiswe, nokuti makandiita mambo pamusoro pavanhu vakawanda seguruva renyika."
