Nehemiah13:4 Zvino zvisati zvaitika izvi, Eriashibhi muprista akanga agadzwa kuti ave mutariri wamatura okuvigira eimba yaMwari wedu. Akanga ane ukama hwepedyo naTobhia," 
Nehemiah13:5 uye akanga amugadzirira kamuri guru raimbochengeterwa zvipiriso zvezviyo nezvinonhuwira uye midziyo yetemberi, nezvegumi zvezviyo, waini itsva namafuta akarayirwa kuti apiwe vaRevhi, vaimbi navachengeti vamasuo, uyewo nemigove yavaprista." 
Nehemiah13:6 Asi pazvaiitika zvose izvi, ndakanga ndisiri muJerusarema, nokuti mugore ramakumi matatu namaviri raAtazekisesi mambo weBhabhironi ndakanga ndadzokera kuna mambo. Mumashure menguva yakati ndakakumbira mvumo" 
Nehemiah13:7 ndokudzokera kuJerusarema. Ipapo ndakanzwa pamusoro pechinhu chakaipa chakanga chaitwa naEriashibhi chokuti akagadzirira Tobhia kamuri muruvazhe rweimba yaMwari. 
Nehemiah13:8 Ndakashatirwa zvikuru ndokurasira kunze kwemba, midziyo yose yaTobhia." 
Nehemiah13:9 Ndakarayira kuti makamuri acheneswe, ndokubva ndadzorera imomo midziyo yose yeimba yaMwari, pamwe chete nezvipiriso zvezviyo nezvinonhuwira." 
Nehemiah13:10 Ndakaonawo kuti vaRevhi vakanga vasina kupiwa migove yavo, uye kuti vaRevhi vose navaimbi vaiva nebasa rokushumira vakanga vadzokera kuminda yavo." 
Nehemiah13:11 Saka ndakatsiura vabati ndikavabvunza ndikati, “Imba yaMwari yashayirwa hanya neiko?” Ipapo ndakavaunganidza pamwe chete akavadzosera kunzvimbo dzavo." 
Nehemiah13:12 VaJudha vose vakauya nezvegumi zvezviyo, newaini itsva namafuta vakazviisa mumatura." 
Nehemiah13:13 Ndakaisa Sheremia muprista, Zadhoki munyori, nomuRevhi ainzi Pedhaya kuti vave vatariri vamatura uye ndikaita kuti Hanania, mwanakomana waZakuri, mwanakomana waMatania, ave mubatsiri wavo, nokuti varume ava vakaonekwa kuti vaiva vakavimbika. Vaiva nebasa rokugovera hama dzavo migove yavo." 
Nehemiah13:14 Haiwa Mwari wangu, ndirangarireiwo nokuda kwaizvozvi, uye musadzima zvandakaita nokutendeka kuimba yaMwari wangu, neshumiro yayo." 
Nehemiah13:15 Mumazuva iwayo ndakaona varume muJudha vachitsika zvisviniro zvewaini nomusi weSabata vachiuya nezviyo vachizvikwidza pambongoro, pamwe chete newaini, mazambiringa, maonde namarudzi ose emitoro. Vaiuya nezvinhu zvose izvi muJerusarema nomusi weSabata. Naizvozvo ndakavayambira kuti vasatengesa zvokudya pazuva iroro." 
Nehemiah13:16 Varume vaibva kuTire vaigara muJerusarema vaiuya nehove nemhando dzose dzezvokutengesa vachizvitengesa muJerusarema kuvanhu veJudha nomusi weSabata. 
Nehemiah13:17 Ndakatsiura vakuru veJudha ndikati kwavari, “Chiiko ichi chinhu chakaipa chamunoita muchizvidza zuva reSabata?" 
Nehemiah13:18 Ko, madzitateguru enyu haana kuita zvimwe chetezvo here, zvokuti Mwari wedu akazouyisa dambudziko iri pamusoro pedu napamusoro peguta rino? Zvino muri kumutsa hasha dzakawanda pamusoro paIsraeri nokuzvidza Sabata.”" 
Nehemiah13:19 Zvino mimvuri yezuva rovira yakati yafukidza masuo eJerusarema, Sabata risati rasvika, ndakarayira kuti mikova ipfigwe uye kuti isazarurwa kusvikira Sabata rapfuura. Ndakaisa vamwe vavaranda vangu pamasuo kuti kurege kuva nomutoro ungauyiswa mukati nomusi weSabata." 
Nehemiah13:20 Naizvozvo kamwe chete kana kaviri, vashambadziri navatengesi vemhando dzose vakarara usiku hwose kunze kweJerusarema." 
Nehemiah13:21 Asi ndakavayambira ndikati, “Seiko muchirara usiku hwose parusvingo? Kana mukazviitazve, ndichakusungai.” Kubva panguva iyoyo zvichienda mberi havana kuzouuyazve nomusi weSabata." 
Nehemiah13:22 Ipapo ndakarayira vaRevhi kuti vazvinatse uye kuti vaende kundorinda masuo kuitira kuti zuva reSabata richengetwe riri dzvene. Haiwa Mwari wangu ndirangarireiwo pachinhu ichi, Mwari wangu, mugoratidza tsitsi kwandiri maererano norudo rwenyu rukuru." 
Nehemiah13:23 Pamusoro pezvo, mumazuva iwayo, ndakaona varume vokwaJudha vakanga vawana vakadzi vaibva kuAshidhodhi, neAmoni neMoabhu." 
Nehemiah13:24 Hafu yavana vavo vaitaura mutauro nechiAshidhodhi kana mutauro mumwewo wavamwe vanhu, uye vakanga vasingazivi mutauro wechiJudha." 
Nehemiah13:25 Ndakavatsiura ndikavatuka. Ndakarova vamwe varume uye ndikadzura bvudzi ravo. Ndakaita kuti vapike nezita raMwari uye ndikati kwavari, “Hamufaniri kupa vanasikana venyu kuti vawanikwe navanakomana vavo, kana kuzvitorera imi." 
Nehemiah13:26 Ko, Soromoni mambo weIsraeri haana kutadza here nokuda kwavakadzi vakadai? Pakati pendudzi zhinji hapana kumbova namambo akaita saye. Aidikanwa naMwari wake, uye Mwari akamuita mambo pamusoro pavaIsraeri vose, asi kunyange zvakadaro akapinzwa muchivi navakadzi vatorwa." 
Nehemiah13:27 Ko, isu zvino tingazvinzwawo here kuti nemiwo zvakare muri kuita zvinhu zvakaipa kudai uye kuti hamuna kutendeka kuna Mwari wedu, muchiwana vakadzi vatorwa?”" 
Nehemiah13:28 Mumwe wavanakomana vaJoyadha mwanakomana waEriashibhi muprista mukuru akanga ari mukuwasha waSanibharati muHoroni. Zvino ndakamudzinga kure neni. 
Nehemiah13:29 Haiwa Mwari wangu, varangarirei nokuti vakasvibisa basa rouprista uye nesungano youprista neyavaRevhi." 
Nehemiah13:30 Saka ndakanatsa vaprista navaRevhi pazvinhu zvose zvavatorwa, ndikavapa madzoro avo, mumwe nomumwe pabasa rake." 
Nehemiah13:31 Ndakapawo zvipo zvehuni panguva dzakatarwa nezvezvibereko zvokutanga. Mundirangarirewo, Mwari wangu, mundiitire zvakanaka." 
Esther1:1 Izvi ndizvo zvakaitika panguva yaZekisesi, uya Zekisesi akatonga nyika zana namakumi maviri nenomwe kubva kuIndia kusvika kuEtiopia:" 
Esther1:2 Panguva iyo mambo Zekisesi akatonga ari pachigaro chake choumambo munhare yeShushani 
Esther1:3 uye mugore rake rechitatu akapa makurukota ake ose navabati vake mabiko. Vakuru vehondo yePezhia neMedhia, machinda namakurukota enyika aivapo." 
Esther1:4 Akaratidza kuwanda kwepfuma youmambo hwake uye nokuyevedza nokubwinya kwoumambo hwake kwamazuva zana namakumi masere akazara. 
Esther1:5 Mazuva aya akati apera, mambo akaita mabiko akapedza mazuva manomwe, mumunhanga webindu romuzinda wamambo achiitira vanhu vose kubva kuvadiki kusvikira kuvakuru, vaigara munhare yeShushani." 
Esther1:6 Bindu raiva nezvakarembedzwa zvichena nezvebhuruu zvomucheka, zvakanga zvakasungirirwa nezvisungo zvomucheka muchena nowepepuru, kuzvikochekedzo zvesirivha pamusoro pembiru dzamatombo akanga akavezwa. Paiva nezvigaro zvegoridhe nezvesirivha pamusoro penzira yamatombo mashava, machena namamwewo anokosha." 
Esther1:7 Waini yaipiwa vanhu mumidziyo yegoridhe, yakasiyana-siyana, uye waini yamambo yakanga yakawanda, asingavanyimi napaduku." 
Esther1:8 Vakakokwa vakabvumirwa kunwa pamadiro, nokuti mambo akarayira vatariri vewaini vose kuti vagovere mumwe nomumwe sezvaaida." 
Esther1:9 VaHosi Vhashiti vakaitawo mabiko amadzimai mumuzinda waMambo Zekisesi. 
Esther1:10 Pazuva rechinomwe, Mambo Zekisesi afara kwazvo mumwoyo make nokuda kwewaini, akarayira varanda vanomwe vaimushumira, Mehumani, Bhizita, Habhona, Bhigita, Abhagita, Zeta naKakasi," 
Esther1:11 kuti vauye navaHosi Vhashiti, vakapfeka korona youmambo, kuti aratidze runako rwavo kuvanhu nokumakurukota, nokuti vakanga vakanaka pakuonekwa." 
Esther1:12 Asi pakasvika shoko rakanga rarayirwa namambo, vaHosi Vhashiti vakaramba kuuya. Ipapo mambo akashatirwa zvikuru uye akatsva nehasha." 
Esther1:13 Ipapo mambo akabvunza vachenjeri vaiziva murayiro uye vainzwisisa zvenguva sezvo yaiva tsika yamadzimambo kubvunza nyanzvi dzezvomurayiro nokururamisira," 
Esther1:14 uye vaiva pedyo kwazvo namambo vaiti: Kashena, Sheta, Adhumata, Tashishi, Meresi, Masena naMemukani, makurukota manomwe ePezhia neMedhia avo vaiva nekodzero yokupinda kuna mambo uye vaikudzwa muumambo." 
Esther1:15 Akabvunza achiti, “Pamurayiro chii chinofanira kuitwa kuna vaHosi Vhashiti? Havana kuteerera kurayira kwaMambo Zekisesi sokuudzwa kwavaitwa navaranda.”" 
Esther1:16 Ipapo Memukani akapindura pamberi pamambo namakurukota akati, “VaHosi Vhashiti vaita zvakaipa, kwete kuna mambo chete asi nokumakurukota ose nokuvanhu vose venyika dzose dzamambo Zekisesi." 
Esther1:17 Nokuti zvaitwa navahosi zvichazivikanwa navakadzi vose, nokudaro vachazvidza varume vavo vachiti, ‘Inga wani Mambo Zekisesi vakarayira vaHosi Vhashiti kuti vauye vamire pamberi pavo, asi vakaramba kuuya.’" 
Esther1:18 Iye nhasi uno vakadzi vamakurukota ePezhia neveMedhia vanzwa zvaitwa navahosi vachaitawo saizvozvo kumakurukota amambo. Kusakudzana nenyonganyonga hazvimbozoperi. 
Esther1:19 “Naizvozvo, kana mambo achifara nazvo, ngaateme chirevo chamambo uye ngachinyorwe mumirayiro yavaPezhia navaMedhia, isingagoni kushandurwa kuti Vhashiti haachazosvikizve pamberi paMambo Zekisesi. Uyezve mambo ngaape chinzvimbo chake muumambo kuno mumwe ari nani kupinda iye." 
Esther1:20 Ipapo kana chirevo chamambo chaziviswa muumambo hwake hwose, vakadzi vose vachakudza varume vavo, kubva kumudiki kusvikira kumukuru.”" 
Esther1:21 Mambo namakurukota ake vakafadzwa nezano iri, saka mambo akaita sezvakanga zvarehwa naMemukani." 
Esther1:22 Akatumira matsamba kumativi ose oumambo hwake, kunyika imwe neimwe norunyoro rwayo nokumunhu mumwe nomumwe nomutauro wake achizivisa norurimi rwavanhu kuti murume mumwe nomumwe ave nesimba pamusoro peimba yake." 
Esther2:1 Mushure mezvinhu izvi kutsamwa kwamambo Zekisesi kwapera, akarangarira Vhashiti nezvaakanga aita uye nezvaakanga atema pamusoro pake." 
Esther2:2 Ipapo varanda vamambo vaimushandira vakati," 
Esther2:3 “Mambo ngaatsvakirwe mhandara dzakanaka. Mambo ngaagadze nhume munyika dzose dzoumambo hwake kuti vauye navasikana vakanaka munzvimbo inogara vakadzi panhare yeShushani. Ngavachengetwe naHegai, muranda wamambo anoona nezvamadzimai, uye zvinopa runako ngazvipiwe kwavari." 
Esther2:4 Zvino musikana uyo anofadza mambo ngaave vahosi pachinzvimbo chaVhashiti.” Zano iri rakafadza mambo, uye akaita saizvozvo." 
Esther2:5 Zvino munhare yeShushani maiva nomuJudha worudzi rwaBenjamini, ainzi Modhekai mwanakomana waJairi, mwanakomana waShimei, mwanakomana waKishi," 
Esther2:6 akanga atapwa kubva kuJerusarema naNebhukadhinezari mambo weBhabhironi, ari pakati paavo vakatapwa pamwe chete naJehoyakini mambo weJudha." 
Esther2:7 Modhekai aiva nomwanasikana wasekuru vake ainzi Hadhasa, waakanga arera nokuti akanga asina mai kana baba. Musikana uyu ainziwo Esteri, akanga akanaka kwazvo pachimiro napaunhu, uye Modhekai akanga amutora somwanasikana wake pakufa kwakaita mai vake nababa vake." 
Esther2:8 Zvino murayiro nomutemo wamambo zvakati zvaziviswa, vasikana vazhinji vakauyiswa kunhare yeShushani ndokuiswa pasi paHegai kuti avachengete. NaEsteriwo akatorwa akaiswa mumuzinda wamambo akachengetwa naHegai, aiva muchengeti wenzvimbo yaigara madzimai." 
Esther2:9 Musikana akamufadza akawana nyasha kwaari. Pakarepo akamupa zvinonhuwira zvinowedzera runako uye nezvokudya zvakatsaurwa. Akamupa vasikana vanomwe vakanga vasarudzwa kubva munhare yamambo ndokumuendesa iye navasikana vake kunzvimbo yakanga yakanakisisa muimba yavakadzi. 
Esther2:10 Esteri akanga asina kutaura rudzi rwake nemhuri yake, kana kwaaibva, nokuti Modhekai akanga amurambidza kuita izvozvo." 
Esther2:11 Zuva rimwe nerimwe aitenderera ari pedyo noruvazhe rwenzvimbo yaigariswa vanhukadzi achida kuona kuti Esteri akadini uye kuti chii chaiitika kwaari. 
Esther2:12 Musikana aifanira kupedza mwedzi gumi nemiviri achizvinatsa nezvinonhuwira dzoro rake risati rasvika rokupinda kuna mambo Zekisesi sokurongerwa kwaiitirwa vanhukadzi, mwedzi mitanhatu yamafuta emura uye mwedzi mitanhatu yezvinonhuwira nezvizoro." 
Esther2:13 Zvino aya ndiwo aiva maindiro ake kuna mambo: Aipiwa chinhu chipi nechipi chaaida kutora kuti aende nacho kumuzinda wamambo paainge achibva kwaigara vanhukadzi. 
Esther2:14 Ava manheru aipota achiendako uye mangwanani achidzokera kune rimwe kamuri raigara vanhukadzi kunochengetwa naShaashigazi, muranda wamambo aiva muchengeti wavarongo. Aisadzokerazve kuna mambo kunze kwokunge mambo afadzwa naye akamudaidza nezita." 
Esther2:15 Dzoro raEsteri rakati rasvika (musikana akanga atorwa kuti ave mwana naModhekai, mwanasikana wasekuru vake Abhihairi) rokuenda kuna Mambo, haana chaakakumbira kunze kwezvaakaudzwa naHegai, muranda wamambo aiva mutariri wenzvimbo yaigarwa navanhukadzi. Zvino Esteri akawana nyasha kuna vose vakamuona." 
Esther2:16 Akaendeswa kuna Mambo Zekisesi muimba youmambo mumwedzi wegumi, mwedzi waTibheti, mugore rechinomwe rokutonga kwake." 
Esther2:17 Zvino mambo akayevedzwa naEsteri kupfuura ani naani zvake wavamwe vakadzi, uye akawana nyasha kwaari akagamuchirwa kupfuura ani zvake pakati pedzimwe mhandara. Saka akagadza korona youmambo pamusoro wake akamuita vahosi panzvimbo yaVhashiti." 
Esther2:18 Zvino mambo akaita mabiko makuru, mabiko aEsteri, achiitira makurukota ake ose navabati. Akadaidzira zuva rezororo munyika dzose akagovera zvipo, mambo asinganyimi napaduku." 
Esther2:19 Mhandara dzakati dzaungana kechipiri, Modhekai akanga akagara pasuo ramambo." 
Esther2:20 Asi Esteri akanga avanza nhoroondo yemhuri yake norudzi rwake sezvaakanga audzwa naModhekai, nokuti akaramba achitevera kurayira kwaModhekai nezvaaisiita acharerwa naye." 
Esther2:21 Panguva iyo Modhekai akanga akagara pasuo ramambo, Bhigitana naTereshi, vabati vaviri vamambo vairinda mukova vakatsamwa ndokubva varangana kuuraya Mambo Zekisesi." 
Esther2:22 Asi Modhekai akazviziva ndokubva audza Esteri nezverangano iyi, iye ndokuzvizivisa kuna mambo, achiti akanga anzwa naModhekai." 
Esther2:23 Zvino shoko iri rakati raferefetwa uye rikawanikwa riri rechokwadi, vabati vaviri ava vakasungirwa pamatanda vakafa. Zvose izvi zvakanyorwa mubhuku renhoroondo pamberi pamambo." 
Esther3:1 Shure kwaizvozvo, Mambo Zekisesi akaremekedza Hamani mwanakomana waHamedhata, muAgagi, akamukwidziridza nokumupa chigaro chinokudzwa chakanga chiri pamusorosoro kupfuura zvamamwe makurukota ose." 
Esther3:2 Vabati vose vomuumambo vaimira pamusuo vakamupfugamira vakapa rukudzo kuna Hamani, nokuti mambo akanga arayira kuti aitirwe izvi. Asi Modhekai akanga asingamupfugamiri kana kumukudza." 
Esther3:3 Ipapo vabati vaimira pasuo ramambo vakabvunza Modhekai vakati, “Sei usingateereri murayiro wamambo?”" 
Esther3:4 Zuva nezuva vaitaura naye asi iye akaramba kuvanzwa. Naizvozvo vakaudza Hamani izvozvo kuti vaone kuti maitiro aModhekai angangoregererwa here, nokuti iye akanga avaudza kuti aiva muJudha." 
Esther3:5 Hamani akati aona kuti Modhekai akanga asingamupfugamiri kana kumuremekedza, akatsamwa kwazvo." 
Esther3:6 Asi paakanzwa kuti vanhu vaModhekai vaiva vapi akafunga zvokusauraya Modhekai chete. Panzvimbo yokuita izvi Hamani akatsvaka nzira yokuuraya vanhu vose vaModhekai, vaJudha vose vaiva muumambo hwaZekisesi." 
Esther3:7 Mugore regumi namaviri raMambo Zekisesi mumwedzi wokutanga, mwedzi waNisani, vakakanda puri (ndiwo mujenya) pamberi paHamani kuti vasarudze zuva nomwedzi. Mujenya wakawira pamwedzi wegumi nemiviri, mwedzi waAdha." 
Esther3:8 Ipapo Hamani akati kuna Mambo Zekisesi, “Kuna vamwe vanhu vakapararira nokutekeshera vari pakati pamarudzi mumatunhu oushe hwenyu vane tsika yakasiyana navamwe vanhu vose uye havateereri mirayiro yamambo; hazvinganakiri mambo kuti muvaregerere." 
Esther3:9 Kana mambo achifara nazvo, ngapaiswe chirevo chokuti vaparadzwe, uye ini ndicharipa matarenda zviuru gumia esirivha mudura repfuma yamambo kuti igoshandiswa kuripira avo vachabata basa iri ramambo." 
Esther3:10 Naizvozvo mambo akatora mhete yechindori kubva pamunwe wake akaipa kuna Hamani mwanakomana waHamedhata, muAgagi, muvengi wavaJudha." 
Esther3:11 Mambo akati kuna Hamani, “Chengeta mari uye ita zvaunoda navanhu.”" 
Esther3:12 Zvino pazuva regumi namatatu romwedzi wokutanga vanyori vamambo vakadaidzwa. Vakanyora namanyorero enyika imwe neimwe uye nomutauro worudzi rumwe norumwe zvose zvakarayirwa naHamani kumakurukota ehurumende, navabati venyika dzakasiyana-siyana namakurukota amarudzi akasiyana-siyana. Tsamba idzi dzakanyorwa muzita raMambo Zekisesi pachake uye dzikasimbiswa nemhete yake." 
Esther3:13 Matsamba aya akatumirwa navatakuri vamatsamba kunyika dzose dzamambo Zekisesi dziine murayiro wokuparadza, kuuraya, nokupedza vaJudha vose, vadiki navakuru, vakadzi navana vadiki, nokupamba zvinhu zvavo, nezuva rimwe chete, pazuva regumi namatatu romwedzi wegumi nemiviri, iwo mwedzi waAdha." 
Esther3:14 Rimwe gwaro rechirevo ichi raizodzikwa somutemo mudunhu rimwe nerimwe, vanhu vendudzi dzose vachizoziviswa kuti vagare vakagadzirira zuva iroro." 
Esther3:15 Vatakuri vamatsamba vakabuda nokukasika sokurayira kwamambo, vakandozivisa chirevo panhare yeShushani. Mambo naHamani vakagara pasi kuti vanwe, asi guta reShushani rakanyonganiswa." 
Esther4:1 Modhekai paakanzwa zvose zvakanga zvaitwa, akabvarura nguo dzake, akapfeka masaga akazvizora madota, uye akapinda muguta achiungudza neshungu kwazvo." 
Esther4:2 Asi akangosvika pasuo ramambo chete, nokuti munhu akapfeka masaga akanga asingabvumirwi kupinda." 
Esther4:3 Munyika ipi neipi makasvika chirevo nomurayiro wamambo, maiva nokuchema kukuru pakati pavaJudha, nokutsanya, kuchema, nokuungudza. Vazhinji vakapfeka masaga vakarara mumadota." 
Esther4:4 Varandakadzi vaEsteri navaranda vake pavakasvika vakamuudza nezvaModhekai, akatambudzika zvikuru. Akamutumira mbatya kuti apfeke panzvimbo yamasaga ake, asi haana kuzvigamuchira." 
Esther4:5 Ipapo Esteri akatuma Hataki, mumwe wavaranda vamambo vaimushandira, akamurayira kuti atsvake kuti dambudziko raModhekai raiva rei uye kuti seiko." 
Esther4:6 Saka Hataki akabuda akaenda kuna Modhekai pachivara cheguta pamberi pesuo ramambo. 
Esther4:7 Modhekai akamuudza zvose zvakanga zvaitika kwaari, pamwe chete nemari chaiyoiyo yakanga yavimbiswa naHamani kuti achaisa mudura ramambo kuti vaJudha vaparadzwe." 
Esther4:8 Akamupawo gwaro rechirevo chezvokuparadzwa zvachose kwavo, rakanga raparadzirwa muShushani, kuti andoratidza Esteri uye amutsanangurire nezvaro, uye akamuudza kuti amukurudzire kuti aende andomira pamberi pamambo akumbire kuti vanzwirwe ngoni uye agoreverera vanhu vake kwaari." 
Esther4:9 Hataki akadzokerazve akandozivisa Esteri zvakanga zvarehwa naModhekai. 
Esther4:10 Ipapo akamurayira kuti andoti kuna Modhekai," 
Esther4:11 “Vabati vose vamambo navanhu vomunyika dzamambo vanoziva kuti mambo vanongova nomurayiro mumwe wokuti, murume upi zvake kana mukadzi anosvika pana mambo muruvazhe rwomukati asina kudaidzwa anofanira kuurayiwa. Anongoraramiswa chete kana mambo atambanudzira tsvimbo yake yegoridhe kwaari. Asi mazuva makumi matatu atopfuura mushure mokunge ndadaidzwa kuti ndiende kuna mambo.”" 
Esther4:12 Mashoko aEsteri akati aziviswa kuna Modhekai," 
Esther4:13 iye akapindura achiti, “Usafunga kuti zvauri mumba mamambo iwe woga pakati pavaJudha uchapunyuka." 
Esther4:14 Nokuti kana iwe ukanyarara panguva ino, kusunungurwa nokurwirwa kwavaJudha zvichabva kune imwe nzvimbo, asi iwe nemhuri yababa vako muchaparara. Zvino ndiani angaziva zvakaita kuti uve muimba youmambo nenguva yakaita seino?”" 
Esther4:15 Ipapo Esteri akatumira mhinduro kuna Modhekai achiti," 
Esther4:16 “Enda unounganidza vaJudha vose vari muShushani, muzvinyime zvokudya nokuda kwangu. Musadya kana kunwa kwamazuva matatu, usiku namasikati. Ini navarandakadzi vangu tichazvinyima zvokudya sezvamunoita imi. Kana izvi zvaitwa, ndichaenda kuna mambo, kunyange zvisingatenderwi nomurayiro. Uye kana ndichifa, ndichafa hangu.”" 
Esther4:17 Saka Modhekai akaenda akaita zvose zvakanga zvarayirwa naEsteri. 
Esther5:1 Pazuva rechitatu Esteri akapfeka nguo dzake dzouhosi ndokumira muruvazhe rwomukati momuzinda, pamberi peimba yamambo. Mambo akanga akagara pachigaro chake choushe mumba, akatarisana nomukova." 
Esther5:2 Paakaona vaHosi Esteri vakamira muruvanze, akafadzwa naye ndokumutambanudzira tsvimbo yake yegoridhe yaiva muruoko rwake. Naizvozvo Esteri akaswedera ndokubata muromo wetsvimbo." 
Esther5:3 Ipapo mambo akamubvunza achiti, “Uri kureveiko, vaHosi Esteri? Chikumbiro chako ndecheiko? Kunyange hafu youshe uchaipiwa.”" 
Esther5:4 Esteri akati, “Kana zvichifadza mambo, mambo ngaauye nhasi pamwe chete naHamani, kumabiko andakugadzirirai.”" 
Esther5:5 Mambo akati, “Hamani ngaauye nokuchimbidza, kuti tiite zvinokumbirwa naEsteri.” Naizvozvo mambo naHamani vakaenda kumabiko akaitwa naEsteri." 
Esther5:6 Pavakanga vachinwa waini, mambo akabvunzazve Esteri achiti, “Zvino, chikumbiro chako ndechei? Uchachipiwa. Uye unokumbireiko? Kunyange hafu youshe, uchapiwa.”" 
Esther5:7 Esteri akapindura akati, “Chichemo changu nechikumbiro changu ndeichi:" 
Esther5:8 Kana ndanzwirwa nyasha namambo uye kana zvichifadza mambo kupedza chichemo changu nokuzadzisa chikumbiro changu, mambo ngaauye mangwana naHamani kumabiko andichavagadzirira. Ipapo ndichapindura mubvunzo wamambo.”" 
Esther5:9 Pazuva iro, Hamani akaenda achifara nomufaro mukuru mumwoyo make. Asi paakaona Modhekai pasuo ramambo uye akaona kuti akanga asingasimuki kana kuratidza kutya pamberi pake, akazara nehasha nokuda kwaModhekai." 
Esther5:10 Zvakadaro hazvo, Hamani akazvidzora ndokubva aenda kumba. Adana shamwari dzake pamwe chete naZereshi, mukadzi wake," 
Esther5:11 Hamani akavarondedzera nezvepfuma yake zhinji, zvokuwanda kwavanakomana vake, uye nenzira dzose dzaakaremekedzwa nadzo namambo nokuti akakwidziridzwa sei pamusoro pamamwe makurukota navabati." 
Esther5:12 Hamani akatizve, “Hazvisi izvozvo chete, ndini chete munhu akakokwa navahosi Esteri kuti ndiperekedze mambo kumabiko aakatiitira. Zvino andikokazve mangwana pamwe namambo." 
Esther5:13 Asi zvose izvi handigutsikani nazvo kana ndichiona muJudha uyu Modhekai agere pasuo ramambo.” 
Esther5:14 Mukadzi wake Zereshi neshamwari dzake dzose vakati kwaari, “Misa matanda akareba makubhiti makumi mashanua, ugokumbira mambo panguva dzamangwanani kuti Modhekai asungirirwepo. Ipapo ugoenda namambo kumabiko nomufaro.” Shoko iri rakafadza Hamani, ndokubva aita kuti matanda amiswe." 
Esther6:1 Usiku ihwohwo mambo akashaya hope; saka akarayira kuti mabhuku enhoroondo nezvinyorwa zvokutonga kwake zviuyiswe uye agozviverengerwa. 
Esther6:2 Vakawana zvakanyorwamo kuti Modhekai akaburitsa pachena kuti Bhigitana naTereshi, vabati vaviri vamambo vaichengeta mukova, vakanga varangana kuuraya Mambo Zekisesi." 
Esther6:3 Mambo akabvunza akati, “Modhekai akagamuchira kukudzwa nerumbidzo yei nokuda kwaizvozvi.” Varanda vake vakati, “Hapana chaakaitirwa.”" 
Esther6:4 Mambo akati, “Ndiani ari muruvazhe?” Zvino Hamani akanga achangopinda muruvazhe rwokunze rwapamuzinda kuti azotaura kuna mambo maererano nokusungirira Modhekai pamatanda aakanga amisa." 
Esther6:5 Varanda vake vakati, “Hamani amire paruvazhe?” Mambo akarayira achiti, “Uyai naye muno.”" 
Esther6:6 Hamani paakapinda, mambo akamubvunza achiti, “Chii chingaitwa namambo kumunhu waangafarira kukudza?” Ipapo Hamani akati mumwoyo make, “Ndiani aripo angada kukudzwa namambo kunze kwangu?”" 
Esther6:7 Naizvozvo akapindura mambo akati, “Iye munhu, mambo waanofarira kukudza," 
Esther6:8 ngavamutorere nguo youshe yakambopfekwa namambo nebhiza rakambotasvwa namambo, rine korona youshe yakaiswa pamusoro paro." 
Esther6:9 Ipapo nguo youshe nebhiza ngazviiswe kuno mumwe wamakurukota amambo anokudzwa kwazvo. Ngavapfekedze munhu uyo mambo waanofarira kukudza, vamutungamirire ari pabhiza vachipinda nomumigwagwa iri pakati peguta, vachidanidzira pamberi pake vachiti, ‘Izvi ndizvo zvinoitirwa munhu uyo mambo anofarira kukudza!’ ”" 
Esther6:10 Mambo akarayira Hamani achiti, “Enda nokukurumidza, utore nguo nebhiza uitire Modhekai muJudha, sezvawareva, uyo anogara pasuo ramambo. Usambosiya kana chinhu chimwe chezvawareva.”" 
Esther6:11 Saka Hamani akatora nguo nebhiza, akapfekedza Modhekai, uye akamutungamirira ari pamusoro pebhiza napakati pemigwagwa yeguta, achidanidzira pamberi pake achiti, “Izvi ndizvo zvinoitwa namambo kumunhu waanofarira kukudza!”" 
Esther6:12 Mushure mezvo Modhekai akadzokera pasuo ramambo. Asi Hamani akakurumidza kudzokera kumba, achichema akafukidza musoro wake," 
Esther6:13 uye akandoudza Zereshi mukadzi wake neshamwari dzake dzose zvose zvakanga zvaitika kwaari. Varayiri vake nomukadzi wake Zereshi vakati kwaari, “Sezvo Modhekai, uyo aita kuti uwe pamberi pake, ari wechiJudha, haugoni kumirisana naye, zvirokwazvo uchaparara!”" 
Esther6:14 Vakati vachiri kutaura naye, varanda vamambo vakasvika ndokuita kuti Hamani aende kumabiko akanga agadzirwa naEsteri." 
Esther7:1 Naizvozvo mambo naHamani vakaenda kundodya navaHosi Esteri," 
Esther7:2 uye pavakanga vachinwa waini pazuva rechipiri, mambo akabvunzazve akati, “VaHosi Esteri, muri kukumbireiko? Muchapiwa. Chikumbiro chenyu ndechei? Kunyange kusvika pahafu youshe, muchazviitirwa.”" 
Esther7:3 Ipapo vaHosi Esteri vakapindura vakati, “Kana ndawana nyasha kwamuri, imi Mambo, uye kana zvichifadza mambo, ndinokumbira kuti ndipiwe upenyu hwangu, ndicho chichemo changu, uye navanhu vangu, ndicho chikumbiro changu." 
Esther7:4 Nokuti ini navanhu vangu takatengeswa kuti tiurayiwe tiparadzwe zvachose. Kana dai takanga tangotengeswa senhapwa dzavarume navakadzi, ndingadai ndaingonyarara, nokuti hakuna kutambudzika kwakadai kungasvika pakurwadza mambo.”" 
Esther7:5 Mambo Zekisesi akabvunza vahosi Esteri akati, “Ndiani iyeye? Aripi munhu iyeye afunga kuita chinhu chakadai?”" 
Esther7:6 Esteri akati, “Mudzivisi nomuvengi ndiyeyu Hamani ane utsinye.” Ipapo Hamani akatya pamberi pamambo navahosi." 
Esther7:7 Mambo akaviruka nehasha, akasiya waini yake ndokuenda kubindu romuzinda. Asi Hamani, achiona kuti mambo akanga atoronga magumo ake, akasara achiti akumbire upenyu hwake kuna vahosi Esteri." 
Esther7:8 Mambo paakadzoka kubva kubindu romuzinda achidzokera kuimba yamabiko, Hamani akanga azviwisira pachigaro chakanga chigere Esteri. Mambo akati, “Asi otoda kuchinyira mambokadzi muno mumba ndinaye here?” Pakarepo shoko parakangobuda mumuromo wamambo, vakafukidza uso hwaHamani." 
Esther7:9 Ipapo Habhona, mumwe wavaranda vaishandira mambo akati, “Pane danda rakareba makubhiti makumi mashanua rakamiswa paimba yaHamani. Akanga akarigadzirira Modhekai, uyo akataura zvakanaka kuti mambo abatsirwe.” Mambo akati, “Musungirirei iye ipapo!”" 
Esther7:10 Naizvozvo vakasungirira Hamani pamatanda aakanga agadzirira Modhekai. Ipapo kutsamwa kwamambo kwakadzikira. 
Esther8:1 Pazuva iroro Mambo Zekisesi akapa imba yaHamani muvengi wavaJudha kuna vaHosi Esteri. Uye Modhekai akauya pamberi pamambo, nokuti Esteri akanga amuudza nezvoukama hwake naye." 
Esther8:2 Mambo akabvisa mhete yake yechindori, yaakanga atorazve kubva kuna Hamani, ndokuipa Modhekai. Uye Esteri akamugadza kuti ave mutariri weimba yaHamani." 
Esther8:3 Ipapo Esteri akakumbirisa zvakare akawira patsoka dzake achichema. Akakumbirisa kuti amise urongwa hwakaipa hwaHamani muAgagi, hwaakanga arongera vaJudha." 
Esther8:4 Ipapo mambo akatambanudzira tsvimbo yake yegoridhe kuna Esteri iye akasimuka akamira pamberi pake. 
Esther8:5 Akati, “Kana zvichifadza mambo, uye kana achinditarisa nenyasha nokufunga kuti chinhu chakanaka kuita, uye kana achindifarira, murayiro ngaunyorwe unodzima tsamba dzakanga dzanyorwa naHamani mwanakomana waHamedhata, muAgagi, dzokuparadza vaJudha mumatunhu ose amambo." 
Esther8:6 Ndingagona seiko kuona kuparadzwa kuchiwira kuvanhu vangu? Ndingashinga sei ndichiona kuparadzwa kworudzi rwangu?” 
Esther8:7 Ipapo Mambo Zekisesi akapindura vaHosii Esteri naModhekai muJudha achiti, “Nokuti Hamani akarwisa vaJudha, ndapa imba yake kuna Esteri, uye ivo vamuturika padanda." 
Esther8:8 Zvino chinyorai chimwe chirevo muzita ramambo sezvamunoona zvakakunakirai mugochisimbisa nemhete yamambo, nokuti hakuna gwaro rakanyorwa muzita ramambo rikasimbiswa nemhete yake ringashandurwa.”" 
Esther8:9 Pakarepo vanyori vamambo vakadaidzwa, pazuva ramakumi maviri namatatu romwedzi wechitatu, mumwedzi waSivhana. Vakapa zvose zvakarayirwa naModhekai kuvaJudha, nokuvakuru vehondo, navabati uye namakurukota enyika dzaiva zana namakumi maviri nenomwe kubva kuIndia kusvika kuEtiopia. Zvakarayirwa izvi zvakanyorwa namanyorerwo enyika imwe neimwe nomutauro wenyika imwe neimwe." 
Esther8:10 Modhekai akanyora muzita raMambo Zekisesi, uye akasimbisa tsamba dzacho nemhete yamambo, uye akadzitumira navatakuri vetsamba vainge vakatasva mabhiza aimhanya kwazvo akanga akapfuwirwa mambo." 
Esther8:11 Chirevo chamambo chakapa vaJudha vaiva muguta rimwe nerimwe mvumo yokuungana nokuzvidzivirira; kuuraya nokuparadza zvachose varwi vapi zvavo vakapakata zvombo, vorudzi rupi norupi, kana nyika ipi yaigona kuzovarwisa ivo navakadzi vavo navana vavo; uye kupamba midziyo yavavengi vavo." 
Esther8:12 Zuva regumi namatatu romwedzi waAdhari ndiro zuva rakanga rakatsaurirwa vaJudha kuti vaite izvi munyika yose yaMambo Zekisesi. 
Esther8:13 Chinyorwa chechirevo ichi chaifanira kupiwa somutemo mudunhu rimwe nerimwe nokuziviswa kuvanhu vamarudzi ose kuitira kuti pazuva iroro vaJudha vange vakagadzirira kutsiva vavengi vavo. 
Esther8:14 Vatakuri vetsamba vakatasva mabhiza ashe vakaamhanyisa kwazvo, vachisundwa nokurayira kwamambo. Uye chirevo chakaziviswawo munhare yeShushani." 
Esther8:15 Modhekai akabva pamberi pamambo akapfeka nhumbi dzoumambo dzaiva namavara ebhuruu namachena, korona huru yegoridhe nenguo yepepuru yomucheka wakaisvonaka. Guta reShushani rakaita mhemberero nomufaro mukuru." 
Esther8:16 KuvaJudha kwaiva nechiedza, nomufaro nokufarisisa nokukudzwa." 
Esther8:17 Munyika imwe neimwe, uye mumaguta ose, makasvika chirevo chamambo, maiva nomufaro nokufarisisa pakati pavaJudha, vachiita mabiko nokupembera. Uye vanhu vazhinji vedzimwe ndudzi vakava vaJudha nokuda kwokutya kwakanga kwavabata." 
Esther9:1 Zvino mumwedzi wegumi nemiviri nezuva regumi namatatu romwedzi waAdhari, chirevo chakanga charayirwa namambo chaifanira kuzadziswa. Pazuva iri, vavengi vavaJudha vakanga vatarisira kuvakunda, asi zvino zvinhu zvakavapindukira, vaJudha vakava noruoko rune simba pamusoro paavo vaivavenga." 
Esther9:2 VaJudha vakaungana mumaguta avo munyika dzose dzaMambo Zekisesi kuti varwise avo vaitsvaka kuparadzwa kwavo. 
Esther9:3 Uye makurukota ose enyika, navakuru vehondo, vabati namachinda amambo vakabatsira vaJudha, nokuti vakanga vava kutya Modhekai." 
Esther9:4 Modhekai akanga ari mukuru mukuru mumuzinda; mbiri yake yakapararira munyika yose, uye akava nesimba rakaramba richikura." 
Esther9:5 VaJudha vakabaya vavengi vavo vose nomunondo, vakavauraya vakavaparadza, uye vakaita zvavaida kune avo vaivavenga." 
Esther9:6 VaJudha vakauraya uye vakaparadza varume vanokwana mazana mashanu munhare yeShushani. 
Esther9:7 Vakaurayawo Parishandota, Dharifona, Asipata," 
Esther9:8 Porata, Adharia, Aridhata," 
Esther9:9 Pamashita, Arisai, Aridhai naVhaizata," 
Esther9:10 vanakomana gumi vaHamani mwanakomana waHamedhata, muvengi wavaJudha. Asi havana kubata zvakapambwa." 
Esther9:11 Vakaurayiwa munhare yeShushani vakaziviswa kuna mambo zuva iroro. 
Esther9:12 Mambo akati kuna Esteri, “VaJudha vauraya nokuparadza mazana mashanu avarume uye vanakomana gumi vaHamani munhare yeShushani. Vaitei kune dzimwe nzvimbo dzenyika yamambo? Zvino chikumbiro chako ndechei? Uchapiwa. Chichemo chako ndechei? Uchachiitirwawo.”" 
Esther9:13 Esteri akapindura akati, “Kana mambo achifara nazvo, ipai vaJudha vari muShushani mvumo yokuendererazve mberi mangwana nechirevo chezuva ranhasi, uye ngazviitike kuti vanakomana gumi vaHamani vasungirirwe pamatanda.”" 
Esther9:14 Saka mambo akarayira kuti izvi zviitwe. Chirevo chakapiwa muShushani, ndokubva vasungirira vanakomana gumi vaHamani." 
Esther9:15 VaJudha vaiva muShushani vakaungana pamwe chete pazuva regumi namana romwedzi waAdhari, uye vakauraya mazana matatu avarume muShushani, asi havana kubata zvakapambwa." 
Esther9:16 Zvichakadaro, vakasara vavaJudha vaiva munyika yamambo vakaunganawo kuti vazvidzivirire uye kuti vanunurwe kubva kuvavengi vavo. Vakauraya zviuru makumi manomwe nezvishanu asi havana kubata zvakapambwa." 
Esther9:17 Izvi zvakaitika pazuva regumi namatatu romwedzi waAdhari, ndokubva vazorora pazuva regumi namana, vakariita zuva ramabiko nomufaro." 
Esther9:18 Kunyange zvakadaro, vaJudha vaiva muShushani vakanga vaungana pazuva regumi namatatu, neregumi namana, uyezve nezuva regumi namashanu, vakazorora ndokuriita zuva ramabiko nomufaro." 
Esther9:19 Ndokusaka vaJudha vomumaruwa, vanogara mumisha, vachicherechedza zuva regumi namana romwedzi waAdhari sezuva romufaro namabiko, zuva rokupana zvipo." 
Esther9:20 Modhekai akanyora zvakaitika izvi, ndokutuma matsamba kuvaJudha vose vaiva munyika yose yaMambo Zekisesi, vaiva pedyo nevaiva kure," 
Esther9:21 achivaudza kuti vapemberere gore negore zuva regumi namana neregumi namashanu romwedzi waAdhari," 
Esther9:22 senguva yakawanikwa rusununguko navaJudha kubva kuvavengi vavo, uye somwedzi uyo kusuruvara kwavo kwakashandurwa kukava mufaro, uye kuchema kwavo kukashandurwa kukava zuva rokupembera. Akavanyorera kuti vacherechedze mazuva aya samazuva amabiko nomufaro vachipana zvipo zvezvokudya, mumwe nomumwe, uyewo nokuvarombo." 
Esther9:23 Naizvozvo vaJudha vakabvumirana kuita zvavakanga vatanga, nokuita zvavakanga vanyorerwa naModhekai." 
Esther9:24 Nokuti Hamani mwanakomana waHamadhata, muAgagi, muvengi wavaJudha vose, akanga aronga kuparadza vaJudha uye akanga akanda puri, ndiwo mujenya, kuti vaparadzwe nokupedzwa zvachose." 
Esther9:25 Asi zano iri rakati rasvika munzeve dzamambo, akanyora achirayira kuti zano rakaipa iri rakanga rarongwa naHamani rokurwisa vaJudha ridzokere pamusoro pake iye uye kuti iye navanakomana vake vasungirirwe pamatanda." 
Esther9:26 (Naizvozvo mazuva aya akadaidzwa kuti Purimu, kubva pavara rokuti puri.) Nokuda kwezvakanyorwa zvose mutsamba uye nokuda kwezvavakanga vaona, nezvakaitika kwavari," 
Esther9:27 vaJudha vakasarudza kusimbisa tsika yokuti ivo navana vavo navose vaizobatana navo vaifanira kucherechedza mazuva maviri aya gore negore vasingatongoregi, sezvazvakanga zvakanyorwa uye nenguva dzakatarwa." 
Esther9:28 Mazuva aya anofanira kurangarirwa nokucherechedzwa murudzi rumwe norumwe uye nemhuri imwe neimwe, uye nomunyika imwe neimwe nomuguta rimwe nerimwe. Uye mazuva aya ePurimu haafaniri kutongoregwa kupembererwa navaJudha, uye kurangarirwa kwawo hakufaniri kuparara pakati pavana vavo." 
Esther9:29 Saka vaHosi Esteri, mwanasikana waAbhihairi, pamwe chete naModhekai muJudha, vakanyora nesimba rizere vachisimbisa tsamba iyi yechipiri maererano nePurimu." 
Esther9:30 Uye Modhekai akatumira tsamba kuvaJudha vose vaiva munyika zana namakumi maviri nenomwe dzoumambo hwaZekisesi, mashoko orugare nezvokwadi," 
Esther9:31 kuti asimbise mazuva aya ePurimu panguva dzaakatsaurirwa, sokurayirwa kwazvakaitwa naModhekai muJudha navaHosi Esteri, uye sezvavakanga vazvimisira ivo navana vavo munguva dzavo dzokutsanya nokuchema." 
Esther9:32 Chirevo chaEsteri chakasimbisa mitemo yePurimu, uye chakanyorwa mubhuku." 
Esther10:1 Mambo Zekisesi akadzika mutemo munyika yose, kusvika kumahombekombe egungwa." 
Esther10:2 Uye mabasa ake ose esimba noukuru nerondedzero youkuru hwaModhekai hwaakanga asimudzirwa namambo, haana kunyorwa here mubhuku renhoroondo dzegore negore dzamadzimambo eMedhia nePezhia?" 
Esther10:3 Modhekai muJudha aiva wechipiri kubva kuna Mambo Zekisesi, mukuru pakati pavaJudha, uye airemekedzwa zvikuru noruzhinji rwehama dzake dzechiJudha, nokuti akatsvakira vanhu vake zvakanaka uye akakumbirira vaJudha vose kuti vagare zvakanaka." 
Job1:1 Munyika yeUzi maiva nomumwe murume ainzi Jobho. Murume uyu akanga asina chaangapomerwa uye akarurama; aitya Mwari uye ainzvenga zvakaipa. 
Job1:2 Akanga ana vanakomana vanomwe navanasikana vatatu," 
Job1:3 uye akanga ana makwai zviuru zvinomwe, ngamera zviuru zvitatu, nenzombe dzairingana majoko mazana mashanu, uye mazana mashanu embongoro hadzi, navaranda vakawanda kwazvo. Akanga ari munhu mukuru kuna vose pakati pavanhu vokumabvazuva." 
Job1:4 Vanakomana vake vaisiita madzoro okuita mutambo mudzimba dzavo, uye vaikokawo hanzvadzi dzavo nhatu kuzodya nokunwa pamwe chete navo." 
Job1:5 Nguva yomutambo yapera, Jobho aituma nhume kundovadana kuti vazonatswa. Aimuka mangwanani-ngwanani achivabayira chipiriso chinopiswa, mumwe nomumwe wavo achiti, “Zvichida vana vangu vakatadza uye vakatuka Mwari mumwoyo yavo.” Aya ndiwo aiva maitiro aJobho nguva dzose." 
Job1:6 Zvino rimwe zuva vatumwa vakauya kuzomira pamberi paJehovha, naSataniwo akasvika pamwe chete navo." 
Job1:7 Jehovha akati kuna Satani, “Wabvepiko?” Satani akapindura Jehovha akati, “Ndabva pakupota-pota nenyika napakukwira nokudzika mairi.”" 
Job1:8 Ipapo Jehovha akati kuna Satani, “Warangarira muranda wangu Jobho here? Hakuna munhu akafanana naye panyika, haana chaanopomerwa uye akarurama, munhu anotya Mwari uye anonzvenga chakaipa.”" 
Job1:9 Satani akati, “Ko, Jobho anongotya Mwari pasina here?" 
Job1:10 Ko, hamuna kumupoteredza noruzhowa iye neimba yake nezvose zvaanazvo here? Makaropafadza basa ramaoko ake, uye pfuma yakatekeshera munyika yose." 
Job1:11 Asi tambanudzai henyu ruoko rwenyu murove zvose zvaanazvo, zvirokwazvo achakutukai pachena.”" 
Job1:12 Jehovha akati kuna Satani, “Saka zvakanaka, zvose zvaanazvo zviri mumaoko ako, asi iye usamubata.” Ipapo Satani akabva pamberi paJehovha." 
Job1:13 Rimwe zuva vanakomana vaJobho navanasikana vake vakati vachidya nokunwa waini vari paimba yomukoma wavo mukuru," 
Job1:14 nhume yakasvika kuna Jobho ikati, “Nzombe dzanga dzichirima uye mbongoro dzanga dzichifura nechapedo," 
Job1:15 vaSebhia vakarwisa vakazvitora vakaenda nazvo. Vauraya varanda nomunondo ini ndoga ndini ndapunyuka kuti ndizokuzivisai!” 
Job1:16 Achiri kutaura kudaro, imwe nhume yakasvika ikati, “Moto waMwari waburuka kudenga ukapisa makwai navaranda, uye ini ndoga ndini ndapunyuka kuti ndizokuzivisai!”" 
Job1:17 Achiri kutaura kudaro, imwe nhume yakasvika ikati, “VaKaradhea vaita mapoka matatu okupamba vakatora ngamera dzenyu vakaenda nadzo. Vauraya varanda venyu nomunondo, uye ini ndoga ndini ndapunyuka kuti ndizokuzivisai!”" 
Job1:18 Achiri kutaura kudaro, imwezve nhume yakasvika ikati, “Vanakomana venyu navanasikana venyu vanga vachidya nokunwa waini vari mumba momukoma wavo mukuru," 
Job1:19 pakarepo mhepo huru yavhuvhuta ichibva kugwenga ikarova makona mana eimba. Yawira pamusoro pavo uye vafa, uye ini ndoga ndini ndasara kuti ndizokuzivisai!”" 
Job1:20 Ipapo Jobho akasimuka ndokubvarura nguo dzake akaveura musoro wake. Ipapo akawira pasi 
Job1:21 akanamata achiti: “Ndakabuda mudumbu ramai vangu ndiri mushwi, uye ndichadzokera ndiri mushwi. Jehovha akapa uye Jehovha akatora, Zita raJehovha ngarirumbidzwe.”" 
Job1:22 Pazvinhu izvi zvose, Jobho haana kutadza kana kupa Mwari mhosva." 
Job2:1 Rimwe zuvazve vatumwa vakauya kuzomira pamberi paJehovha, uye Satani akasvika pamwe chete navo kuti andomirawo pamberi pake." 
Job2:2 Zvino Jehovha akati kuna Satani, “Wabvepiko?” Satani akapindura Jehovha akati, “Ndabva pakupota-pota nenyika napakukwira nokudzika mairi.”" 
Job2:3 Ipapo Jehovha akati kuna Satani, “Warangarira here muranda wangu Jobho? Hakuna munhu akafanana naye panyika, haana chaanopomerwa uye akarurama, munhu anotya Mwari uye anonzvenga chakaipa. Uye anoramba amire pakururama kwake, kunyange iwe wakandikurudzira pamusoro pake kuti ndimuparadze pasina chikonzero.”" 
Job2:4 Satani akapindura achiti, “Ganda neganda! Munhu angapa zvose zvaanazvo nokuda kwoupenyu hwake." 
Job2:5 Asi tambanudzai ruoko murove muviri wake namapfupa ake, uye zvirokwazvo achakutukai pachena.”" 
Job2:6 Jehovha akati kuna Satani, “Saka zvakanaka, ari mumaoko ako, asi haufaniri kubata upenyu hwake.”" 
Job2:7 Saka Satani akabva pamberi paJehovha akandorova Jobho namaronda anorwadza kubva pasi petsoka dzake kusvikira panhongonya yomusoro wake. 
Job2:8 Ipapo Jobho akatora chaenga akazvikwenya nacho paakanga agere pakati pamadota. 
Job2:9 Mukadzi wake akati, “Ucharambira pakururama kwako kusvikira riniko? Tuka Mwari ufe!”" 
Job2:10 Iye akapindura akati, “Iwe unotaura somukadzi benzi. Ko, tichagamuchira zvakanaka kubva kuna Mwari, tikashayiwa zvakaipa here?” Pazvinhu izvi zvose, Jobho haana kutadza pane zvaakataura." 
Job2:11 Shamwari nhatu dzaJobho, Erifazi muTemani, Bhiridhadhi muShuhi naZofari muNamati dzakati dzanzwa pamusoro pokutambudzika kwakanga kwawira pamusoro pake, vakabva kumisha yavo vakaungana pamwe chete vatenderana kuti vaende kundomudemba nokumunyaradza." 
Job2:12 Vakati vamuona ari chinambo, havana kugona kumuziva, vakatanga kuchema zvikuru, uye vakabvarura nguo dzavo uye vakazvimwaya guruva pamisoro yavo." 
Job2:13 Ipapo vakagara pasi naye kwamazuva manomwe nousiku hunomwe. Hakuna munhu akagona kutaura kana shoko kwaari, nokuti vakaona kukura kwokutambudzika kwake." 
Job3:1 Shure kwaizvozvo, Jobho akashamisa muromo wake ndokutuka zuva rokuberekwa kwake." 
Job3:2 Akati: 
Job3:3 “Zuva rokuberekwa kwangu ngariparare, uye nousiku hwakanzi, ‘Kwaberekwa mwanakomana!’" 
Job3:4 Zuva iroro ngarishanduke rive rima; Mwari wokudenga ngaarege kuva nehanya naro; Chiedza ngachirege kuvhenekera pamusoro paro. 
Job3:5 Rima nomumvuri wakasviba ngazviritore zvakare; gore ngarigare pamusoro paro; kusviba ngakufukidze chiedza charo. 
Job3:6 Usiku uhwo rima guru ngaribate; ngahurege kuverengwa pakati pamazuva egore kana kunyorwa pamwedzi ipi zvayo. 
Job3:7 Usiku uhwo ngahushaye zvibereko; ngaparege kunzwika kupembera kwomufaro mahuri. 
Job3:8 Vanotuka mazuva ngavatuke zuva iro, vaya vakagadzirira kumutsa Chikara Chikuru cheGungwa." 
Job3:9 Nyeredzi dzahwo dzamangwanani ngadzisvibe; ngahumirire chiedza chamasikati pasina uye ngahurege kuona hwerazuva hwamambakwedza; 
Job3:10 nokuti hahuna kundipfigira mikova yechizvaro kuti huvanze dambudziko pamberi pangu. 
Job3:11 “Ko, ndakaregererei kufa pakuberekwa kwangu, nokufa pandaibuda mudumbu?" 
Job3:12 Mabvi akavapo seiko kuti andigamuchire namazamu kuti ndinwe? 
Job3:13 Nokuti zvino ndingadai ndakavata murugare; ndingadai ndivete uye ndakazorora 
Job3:14 namadzimambo namakurukota enyika, vakazvivakira nzvimbo dzava matongo zvino," 
Job3:15 navatongi vakanga vane goridhe, vakazadza dzimba dzavo nesirivha." 
Job3:16 Kana kuti sei ndisina kuvigwa muvhu somwana asina kusvika, somucheche asina kumboona chiedza chezuva?" 
Job3:17 Ikoko vakaipa vanorega kutambudza, uye ikoko vakaneta vakazorora." 
Job3:18 Nhapwa dzinofariravo rugare rwadzo; havachanzwizve kudanidzira kwomutyairi wenhapwa. 
Job3:19 Vaduku navakuru variko, uye nhapwa yakasunungurwa kubva pana tenzi wayo." 
Job3:20 “Chiedza chinopirweiko vaya vari kusurukirwa, uye upenyu kune ane shungu pamwoyo," 
Job3:21 kuna vaya vanoshuva kufa irwo rusingauyi, vanorutsvaka kupfuura pfuma yakavanzika," 
Job3:22 vazere nomufaro uye vanofara pavanosvika muguva? 
Job3:23 Upenyu hunopirweiko munhu ane nzira yakavanzika, iye akakomberedzwa naMwari noruzhowa?" 
Job3:24 Nokuti mafemo anosvika kwandiri pachinzvimbo chezvokudya, kugomera kwangu kunodururwa semvura." 
Job3:25 Zvandaitya zvakandivinga; zvandaizeza zvaitika kwandiri. 
Job3:26 Handina rugare, handina runyararo; handina zororo, asi nhamo chete.”" 
Job4:1 Ipapo Erifazi muTemani akapindura achiti: 
Job4:2 “Kana mumwe munhu akava neshoko newe, iwe uchashayiwa mwoyo murefu here? Asi ndiani angarega kutaura?" 
Job4:3 Funga kuti wakadzidzisa vazhinji sei, uye kuti wakasimbisa sei maoko asina simba." 
Job4:4 Mashoko ako akatsigira vaya vakagumburwa; wakasimbisa mabvi akaneta. 
Job4:5 Asi zvino nhamo yasvika kwauri, uye iwe waora mwoyo; inokurova, iwe ndokuvhunduka." 
Job4:6 Ko, kutya kwako Mwari hakuzi chivimbo chako, uye nzira dzako dzakarurama tariro yako here?" 
Job4:7 “Rangarira iye zvino: Ndianiko, asina mhaka, akamboparadzwa? Ndokupiko kwakatongoparadzwa vakarurama?" 
Job4:8 Sezvandakaona, vaya vanodyara zvakaipa navaya vanokusha nhamo ndizvo zvavanokohwa." 
Job4:9 Vanoparadzwa nokufema kwaMwari; vanoparara nokuputika kwehasha dzake. 
Job4:10 Shumba dzingaomba nokunguruma, nyamba meno eshumba huru akaguduka." 
Job4:11 Shumba inoparara nokuda kwokushaya nyama, uye vana veshumbakadzi vanopararira." 
Job4:12 “Shoko rakauyiswa kwandiri muchivande, nzeve dzangu dzakanzwa zevezeve raro." 
Job4:13 Pakati pokurota hope dzinovhundutsa usiku, hope huru padzinenge dzabata vanhu," 
Job4:14 kutya nokudedera zvakandibata zvikaita kuti mapfupa angu ose abvunde. 
Job4:15 Mweya wakapfuura pamberi pechiso changu, uye vhudzi romusoro wangu rikamira." 
Job4:16 Wakamira, asi ndakatadza kuziva kuti chaiva chii. Chinhu chakamira pamberi pameso angu, uye ndakanzwa inzwi rakanyarara richiti:" 
Job4:17 “Ko, munhu anofa, angava akarurama kupfuura Mwari here? Ko, munhu angagona kuchena kukunda Muiti wake here?" 
Job4:18 Kana Mwari akasavimba navaranda vake, kana akakanganisa kutonga vatumwa vake," 
Job4:19 zvikuru sei kuna avo vanogara mudzimba dzevhu, nheyo dzavo dziri muguruva, dzinopwanyiwa nyore kupfuura chipfukuto!" 
Job4:20 Dzinoputsanyiwa pakati pamambakwedza namadekwana; dzinoparara dzisingazoonekwi nokusingaperi. 
Job4:21 Ko, mabote etende ravo haana kubviswa here kuti vagofa vasina njere?" 
Job5:1 “Chidana zvino kana uchida, asi ndianiko achadavira? Uchadzokera kuno upiko wavatsvene?" 
Job5:2 Kutsamwa kunouraya benzi, uye godo rinouraya asina mano." 
Job5:3 Ini pachangu ndakaona benzi richidzika midzi, asi pakarepo imba yake yakatukwa." 
Job5:4 Vana vake havana kuchengetedzeka, vanopwanyiwa padare vasina anovarwira." 
Job5:5 Vane nzara vanodya zvaakacheka, vachizvitora kunyange pakati peminzwa, uye vane nyota vanodokwairira pfuma yake." 
Job5:6 Nokuti kutambudzika hakubudi muvhu, uye nhamo haimeri muvhu." 
Job5:7 Asi munhu anoberekerwa nhamo, zvirokwazvo sokubarika kwomoto kunokwira kumusoro." 
Job5:8 “Asi dai ndakanga ndirini, ndaiturira mhosva yangu kuna Mwari; ndaiisa mhaka yangu pamberi pake." 
Job5:9 Anoita minana isingagoni kuyerwa, zvishamiso zvisingagoni kuverengwa." 
Job5:10 Anopa mvura panyika; anotuma mvura pamusoro penyika. 
Job5:11 Vanozvininipisa anovaisa pakakwirira, uye vaya vanochema vanosimudzirwa kurugare." 
Job5:12 Anokonesa zvirongwa zvavanyengeri, kuitira kuti maoko avo abate pasina." 
Job5:13 Anobata vakachenjera muunyengeri hwavo, uye zvirongwa zvenhubu zvinokukurwa." 
Job5:14 Rima rinosvika pamusoro pavo masikati; vanotsvanzvadzira masikati makuru sapausiku. 
Job5:15 Anoponesa vanoshayiwa kubva pamunondo uri pamiromo yavo; anovaponesa pakudzvinya kwavane simba. 
Job5:16 Saka varombo vane tariro, uye kusaruramisira kunopfumbira muromo wayo." 
Job5:17 “Akaropafadzwa munhu anorangwa naMwari; saka usazvidza kuranga kwoWamasimba Ose. 
Job5:18 Nokuti anokuvadza, asi achisungazve; anokuvadza, asi maoko ake anorapazve." 
Job5:19 Achakurwira kubva panjodzi nhanhatu; kunyange panomwe hakuna kukuvadzwa kuchakuwira. 
Job5:20 Munzara achakudzikinura kubva parufu, uye muhondo kubva pakubaya kwomunondo." 
Job5:21 Uchadzivirirwa kubva pakurova kworurimi, uye haungatyi panosvika kuparadza." 
Job5:22 Uchaseka kuparadza nenzara, uye haufaniri kutya zvikara zvenyika." 
Job5:23 Nokuti uchaita sungano namabwe esango, uye zvikara zvesango zvichava norugare newe." 
Job5:24 Uchaziva kuti tende rako rakasimba, uchaverenga zvinhu zvako ugowana zvakakwana." 
Job5:25 Uchaziva kuti vana vako vachava vazhinji, uye zvizvarwa zvako zvichaita souswa hwenyika." 
Job5:26 Uchasvika paguva une simba guru, sezvisote zvakaunganidzwa panguva yazvo." 
Job5:27 “Takazviedza izvi, uye ichokwadi. Saka chizvinzwa ugozviita iwe pachako.”" 
Job6:1 Ipapo Jobho akapindura akati: 
Job6:2 “Dai chete kurwadziwa kwangu kwaigona kuyerwa uye kusuwa kwangu kwaiiswa pachiyero! 
Job6:3 Zvirokwazvo zvairema kupfuura jecha ramakungwa, hazvishamisi kana mashoko angu aiva okuvhurumuka." 
Job6:4 Miseve yoWamasimba Ose iri mandiri, mweya wangu unonwa muchetura wayo; kutyisa kwaMwari kwagadzirira kurwa neni." 
Job6:5 Ko, mbizi ingachema kana ine bundo here? Ko, nzombe inokuma kana ine zvokudya here?" 
Job6:6 Ko, chokudya chisinganaki chingadyiwa chisina munyu here? Ko, chichena chezai chinonaka here?" 
Job6:7 Ndinoramba kuzvibata; zvokudya zvakadai zvinondirwarisa. 
Job6:8 “Haiwa, dai ndapiwa hangu zvandinokumbira kuti Mwari andipe zvandinotarisira," 
Job6:9 kuti dai Mwari aida hake kundipwanya, kuti aregere ruoko rwake rundiuraye!" 
Job6:10 Ipapo ndaizova hangu nokunyaradzwa uku, mufaro wangu mukurwadziwa kusingagumi, kuti handina kunge ndamboramba mashoko aiye Mutsvene." 
Job6:11 “Ndinaro here simba, rokuti ndirambe ndine tariro? Tariro yacho ndeyeiko kuti nditsungirire?" 
Job6:12 Ko, ndine simba rebwe here? Ko, nyama yangu indarira here?" 
Job6:13 Ko, ndine simba ripi zvaro kuti ndizvibatsire, sezvo zvino kubudirira kwakabviswa kwandiri?" 
Job6:14 “Munhu asina tariro anofanira kuwana rudo rweshamwari dzake, kunyange iye arega kutya Wamasimba Ose." 
Job6:15 Asi hama dzangu hadzivimbike sezvinongoita hova dzava kudira. Sezvinongoita hova dzopfachukira," 
Job6:16 dzinosviba pakunyungudika kwamagwada echando, uye dzinozadzwa nechando," 
Job6:17 asi dzinoguma kuyerera mumwaka wokupisa, uye mihoronga yadzo inopwa mukupisa." 
Job6:18 Vafambi vanotsauka munzira dzavo; vanoenda kumakura ndokuparara. 
Job6:19 Vafambi veTema vanotsvaka mvura, vashambadziri veShebha vanomirira netariro." 
Job6:20 Vakanyadziswa, nokuti vaivimba nesimba ravo; vakasvikapo, ndokuora mwoyo." 
Job6:21 Zvino nemiwo maratidza kusabatsira; munoti mukaona chinhu chinotyisa mobva matya. 
Job6:22 Ko, ndakamboti, ‘Ndipeiwo chipo, ndipei fufuro rinobva papfuma yenyu," 
Job6:23 ndirwirei muruoko rwomuvengi, ndidzikinurei mumaoko avanhu vano utsinye’ here?" 
Job6:24 “Ndidzidzisei, uye ndichanyarara hangu; ndiratidzei pandakakanganisa." 
Job6:25 Mashoko echokwadi anorwadza sei! Asi gakava renyu rinoratidzeiko? 
Job6:26 Munoda kutsiura zvandareva, nokutora mashoko omunhu arasa tariro semhepo here?" 
Job6:27 Muchada kana kukanda mijenya pamusoro penherera nokutengesa shamwari yenyu. 
Job6:28 “Asi zvino chinditarirai netsitsi. Ko, ndingareva nhema pamberi penyu here?" 
Job6:29 Musadaro, musava vasakarurama; fungai zvakare, nokuti kururama kwangu kwava parumananzombe." 
Job6:30 Ko, pamiromo yangu pane zvakaipa here? Ko, muromo wangu haugoni kunzvera zvakaipa here?" 
Job7:1 “Ko, munhu haabati zvakaoma panyika here? Ko, mazuva ake haana kuita soomushandi here?" 
Job7:2 Senhapwa inoshuva mimvuri yamadekwana, kana mubati akamirira kwazvo mubayiro wake," 
Job7:3 saizvozvo ndakagoverwa mwedzi isina maturo, uye usiku hwokutambudzika hwakagoverwa kwandiri." 
Job7:4 Pandinovata pasi ndinofunga kuti, ‘Ndichamuka riniko?’ Usiku hunononoka, uye ndinoshandukashanduka kusvikira mambakwedza." 
Job7:5 Muviri wangu wakafukidzwa nehonye uye nemhezi, ganda rangu rakatsemuka uye raora." 
Job7:6 “Mazuva angu ari kukurumidza kufamba kukunda chokurukisa chomuruki, uye anosvika kumagumo asina tariro." 
Job7:7 Rangarirai henyu, imi Mwari kuti upenyu hwangu hunongova mweya zvawo; meso angu haachazoonizve mufaro." 
Job7:8 Ziso rinondiona zvino harichazondionizve; muchanditsvaka, asi handichazovapozve." 
Job7:9 Sokunyangarika kunoita gore ndokuenda, saizvozvo uyo anoburikira kubwiro haadzokizve." 
Job7:10 Haachazouyi kumba kwakezve; nzvimbo yake haichazomuzivizve. 
Job7:11 “Naizvozvo handinganyarari; ndichataura pakurwadza kwomweya wangu, ndichanyunyuta mushungu dzomwoyo wangu," 
Job7:12 Ko, ndiri gungwa kanhi, kana chikara chokwakadzika, zvamunondiisa pasi pomurindi?" 
Job7:13 Pandinofunga, mubhedha wangu unondivaraidza, uye mubhedha wangu uchadzikamisa kunyunyuta kwangu," 
Job7:14 kunyange zvino imi muchindityisidzira nezviroto nokundivhundutsa nezviratidzo," 
Job7:15 zvokuti ndinosarudza kuti ndidzipwe ndife hangu, pachinzvimbo chomuviri wangu uno." 
Job7:16 Ndinozvidza upenyu hwangu, handidi kurarama nokusingaperi. Ndiregei nokuti mazuva angu haana zvaanoreva." 
Job7:17 “Munhu chiiko zvamunomukudza kudai, zvamunomurangarira zvakadai," 
Job7:18 zvamunomunzvera mangwanani ose nokumuedza nguva dzose? 
Job7:19 Hamusi kuzombotarirawo kudivi here, kana kumbondisiyawo ndakadaro kwechinguva?" 
Job7:20 Kana ndakatadza, ndakaiteiko kwamuri, imi mutariri wavanhu? Makaitireiko kuti ini ndive munhu wamunovavarira? Ko, ini ndava mutoro kwamuri here?" 
Job7:21 Nemhaka yeiko musingandikanganwiri mhaka dzangu nokundiregerera zvivi zvangu? Nokuti ndichavata muguruva nokukurumidza. Muchanditsvaka, asi handichazovipozve.”" 
Job8:1 Ipapo Bhiridhadhi muShuhi akapindura akati: 
Job8:2 “Uchasvika riini uchitaura zvinhu zvakadai? Mashoko ako imhepo inovhuvhuta. 
Job8:3 Ko, Mwari angaminamisa zvakarurama here?" 
Job8:4 Vana vako pavakamutadzira, akavapa kurangwa kwechivi chavo." 
Job8:5 Asi kana ukatarisa kuna Mwari uye ukademba kuna Wamasimba Ose," 
Job8:6 kana uri mutsvene uye wakarurama, kunyange izvozvi achasimuka kuti akurwire, agokudzoserazve panzvimbo yako chaiyo." 
Job8:7 Kunyange mavambo ako akanga ari maduku, magumo ako achava makuru." 
Job8:8 “Bvunza marudzi akare ugocherechedza zvakadzidzwa namadzibaba avo," 
Job8:9 nokuti isu takaberekwa zuro uye hatina chatinoziva, uye mazuva edu panyika akangoita somumvuri." 
Job8:10 Ko, havangakudzidzisi nokukuudza here? Ko, havangakuvigiri mashoko anobva pakunzwisisa kwavo here?" 
Job8:11 Ko, nhokwe dzingamera pasina nhope here? Ko, tsanga dzingararama pasina mvura here?" 
Job8:12 Dzichiri kumera uye dzisati dzatemwa, dzinokurumidza kuoma kupinda uswa." 
Job8:13 Ndizvo zvakaita magumo avose vanokanganwa Mwari; saizvozvo tariro yavasina Mwari inoparara. 
Job8:14 Zvaanovimba nazvo hazvina simba, zvaanovimba nazvo mambure edandemutande." 
Job8:15 Anosendamira padandemutande rake, asi rinobvaruka; anobatirira pariri, asi harimiri." 
Job8:16 Akafanana nomuti wakanyatsodiridzwa pamushana, unotandavadza mabukira awo pamusoro pebindu;" 
Job8:17 unomonera midzi yawo pamurwi wamatombo, uye unotsvaka nzvimbo pakati pamatombo." 
Job8:18 Asi kana ukatsemuka ukabva panzvimbo yawo, nzvimbo iyo ichauramba igoti, ‘Handina kumbokuona.’" 
Job8:19 Zvirokwazvo upenyu hwawo, hunooma, uye mimwe miti inomera ichibuda muvhu." 
Job8:20 “Zvirokwazvo Mwari haarambi munhu asina mhaka kana kusimbisa maoko avaiti vezvakaipa. 
Job8:21 Iye achazadza muromo wako nokuseka uye miromo yako nokupururudza. 
Job8:22 Vavengi vako vachashongedzwa nenyadzi, uye matende avakaipa haachazovapozve.”" 
Job9:1 Ipapo Jobho akapindura akati: 
Job9:2 “Zvirokwazvo ndinoziva kuti ichokwadi. Asi munhu anofa angava akarurama pamberi paMwari seiko? 
Job9:3 Kunyange dai mumwe aida kuita nharo naye, haaizogona kumupindura kamwe chete panguva ine chiuru." 
Job9:4 Uchenjeri hwake hwakadzika, simba rake iguru. Ndianiko akamudzivisa akabuda asina vanga?" 
Job9:5 Anobvisa makomo iwo asingazivi ndokuapidigura pakutsamwa kwake kukuru. 
Job9:6 Anozungunusa nyika ikabva panzvimbo yayo uye anoita kuti mbiru dzayo dzidengenyeke. 
Job9:7 Anotaura kuzuva iro ndokurega kuvhenekera; anodzivira chiedza chenyeredzi. 
Job9:8 Iye oga anotambanudza matenga uye anofamba pamusoro pamafungu egungwa. 
Job9:9 Ndiye Muiti weNyeredzi dzeAkutiro neOrioni nedzeChimunomwe namapoka enyeredzi dzenyasi. 
Job9:10 Anoita minana isingagoni kuyerwa, nezvishamiso zvisingagoni kuverengwa." 
Job9:11 Paanondipfuura, handigoni kumuona; paanoenda napo handingamuoni." 
Job9:12 Kana achibvuta, ndiani angamudzivisa? Ndiani angati kwaari, ‘Unoiteiko?’" 
Job9:13 Mwari haadzori kutsamwa kwake; kunyange boka ravarwi raRahabhi rikawira patsoka dzake. 
Job9:14 “Zvino ndingakakavadzana naye seiko? Ndingawana seiko mashoko okuita nharo naye? 
Job9:15 Kunyange ndakanga ndisina mhaka, handaigona kumupindura; ndaingokumbira hangu nyasha kuMutongi wangu." 
Job9:16 Kunyange dai ndikamudana hangu uye iye akandipindura, handitendi kuti aizonditeerera." 
Job9:17 Aizondipwanya nedutu uye achizowedzera maronda angu pasina mhosva. 
Job9:18 Haaizonditenderazve kuti ndiwane upenyu, asi aizondizadza namatambudziko." 
Job9:19 Kana zviri zvesimba, iye ane simba! Uye kana zviri zvokururamisira, ndianiko angamudana kuti amutonge?" 
Job9:20 Kunyange dai ndisina mhosva, muromo wangu waizongondipa mhaka; dai zvangu ndakarurama, iwo waizongondipa mhaka." 
Job9:21 “Kunyange ndakarurama, handina hangu hanya nazvo; ndinozvidza upenyu hwangu pachangu." 
Job9:22 Zvakangofanana; ndokusaka ndichiti, ‘Iye anoparadza vakarurama navakaipa.’" 
Job9:23 Kana dambudziko rikauyisa rufu nokukurumidza, achaseka kushaya tariro kwavasina mhosva." 
Job9:24 Panowira nyika mumaoko avakaipa, vatongi vayo anovapofumadza. Kana asiri iye, zvino ndianiko?" 
Job9:25 “Mazuva angu anokurumidza kupfuura mumhanyi; anobhururuka asina kumboona mufaro. 
Job9:26 Anopfuura sezvikepe zvenhokwe, kufanana namakondo anomhanyira nyama yawo." 
Job9:27 Kana ndikati, ‘Ndichakanganwa kunyunyuta kwangu, ndichashandura chiso changu, nokunyemwerera kwangu,’" 
Job9:28 ndinongotya kutambura kwangu, nokuti ndinoziva kuti imi hamuregi kundipa mhosva." 
Job9:29 Sezvo ndakatopiwa hangu mhosva, ko, ndichagotamburirei pasina?" 
Job9:30 Kunyange dai ndikazvishambidza nesipo uye ndikashamba maoko angu nesoda," 
Job9:31 imi muchandinyudza mugomba renhope zvokuti nenguo dzangu dzichandisema. 
Job9:32 “Iye haasi munhu akafanana neni kuti ndimupindure, kuti zvimwe iye neni tisangane mudare redzimhosva." 
Job9:33 Dai chete paingova nomumwe angamira pakati pedu, kuti aise ruoko rwake patiri tose," 
Job9:34 mumwe zvake angabvise shamhu yaMwari kwandiri, kuti kutyisa kwake kurege kundivhundutsazve." 
Job9:35 Ipapo ndichataura ndisingamutyi, asi sezvazvakaita kwandiri iye zvino, handingakwanisi." 
Job10:1 “Ndinosema upenyu hwangu chaihwo, naizvozvo ndicharega kunyarara pakunyunyuta kwangu ndigotaura neshungu dzomwoyo wangu." 
Job10:2 Ndichati kuna Mwari: Musandipa mhosva asi mundiudze mhaka yangu nemi. 
Job10:3 Ko, kundimanikidza kunokufadzai, kuti muzvidze basa ramaoko enyu, muchinyemwerera kurangano dzavakaipa here?" 
Job10:4 Ko, imi muna meso enyama here? Munoona sokuona kunoita munhu anofa here?" 
Job10:5 Ko, mazuva enyu akaita saavaya vanofa, kana makore enyu samakore omunhu," 
Job10:6 kuti munzvere mhosva dzangu nokuongorora chivi changu," 
Job10:7 kunyange muchiziva kuti handina mhosva, uye kuti hakuna anogona kundinunura paruoko rwenyu here?" 
Job10:8 “Maoko enyu akandiumba nokundiita. Ko, zvino modzoka kuzondiparadza here?" 
Job10:9 Rangarirai kuti makandiumba sevhu. Ko, zvino mondidzoserazve kuvhu here?" 
Job10:10 Ko, hamuna kundidurura somukaka here nokundigwambisa sechizi," 
Job10:11 mukandifukidza neganda nenyama mukandisonanidza pamwe chete namapfupa namarunda here? 
Job10:12 Makandipa upenyu mukandinzwira ngoni, uye nehanya yenyu mukachengeta mweya wangu." 
Job10:13 “Asi izvi ndizvo zvamakaviga mumwoyo menyu, uye ndinoziva kuti izvi zvaiva mupfungwa dzenyu." 
Job10:14 Kana ndakatadza, imi maizenge makanditarisa, uye hamaizotendera kudarika kwangu kuti kurege kurangwa." 
Job10:15 Kana ndine mhosva, ndine nhamo! Kunyange dai ndisina mhosva, handingasimudzi musoro wangu, nokuti ndizere nenyadzi uye ndakanyura mukutambudzika kwangu." 
Job10:16 Kana ndikazvikudza, imi munondironda sezvinoita shumba, uyezve munoratidza simba renyu rinotyisa pamusoro pangu." 
Job10:17 Munouya nezvapupu zvenyu zvitsva kuzondipomera mhosva uye munowedzera hasha dzenyu pamusoro pangu, hondo dzenyu dzinondirwisa, mapoka namapoka." 
Job10:18 Ko, zvino makandibudisirei mudumbu? Ndinoshuva kuti dai ndakafa hangu pasati pava neziso randiona." 
Job10:19 Dai chete ndakanga ndisina kumbovapo hangu, kana kutakurwa ndichiendeswa kubwiro ndichangobva mudumbu ramai vangu!" 
Job10:20 Ko, mazuva angu haasi ava mashoma kutopera here? Ibvai kwandiri kuti ndimbofara hangu kwakanguva," 
Job10:21 ndisati ndaenda kusingadzokwi, kunyika yerima nomumvuri worufu," 
Job10:22 kunyika yerima guru, yomumvuri mukuru worufu nenyonganyonga, iko kunoti kunyange chiedza chakangofanana nerima.”" 
Job11:1 Ipapo Zofari muNaamati akapindura akati: 
Job11:2 “Mashoko aya ose haangapindurwi here? Ko, mutauri uyu anofanira kururamisirwa here?" 
Job11:3 Ko, kubvotomoka kwako kunganyaradza vanhu here? Ko, pangashaya anokutsiura paunenge uchihomera here?" 
Job11:4 Iwe unoti kuna Mwari, ‘Zvandinotenda zvakarurama uye ndakachena pamberi penyu.’" 
Job11:5 Haiwa, ndinoda sei kuti dai Mwari ataura, kuti dai ashamisa hake muromo wake pamusoro pako," 
Job11:6 uye akuzarurire zvakavanzika zvouchenjeri, nokuti uchenjeri hwechokwadi huri paviri Uzive izvi: Mwari akatokanganwa kare zvimwe zvivi zvako." 
Job11:7 “Ko, unganzwisisa zvakavanzika zvaMwari here?" 
Job11:8 Zvakakwirira kupfuura matenga, iwe ungaiteiko? Zvakadzika kupfuura kudzika kwebwiro, iwe ungaziveiko?" 
Job11:9 Chiero chazvo chakareba kupfuura nyika uye zvakapamhamha kupfuura gungwa. 
Job11:10 “Kana iye akasvika akakupfigira mujeri uye akakoka dare remhosva, ndianiko angapikisana naye?" 
Job11:11 Zvirokwazvo anoziva vanhu vanonyengera; uye paanoona chakaipa, anoshaya hanya here?" 
Job11:12 Asi munhu asina kuchenjera haangagoni kuva akangwara kupfuura kuti mwana wembizi angaberekwa nomunhu. 
Job11:13 “Asi kana mwoyo wako ukanamatira kwaari, uye iwe ukatambanudzira maoko ako kwaari," 
Job11:14 kana ukaisa kure zvivi zviri muruoko rwako, uye ukasatendera chakaipa kugara mutende rako," 
Job11:15 ipapo uchasimudza chiso chako usina nyadzi, uchamira wakasimba uye usingatyi." 
Job11:16 Zvirokwazvo uchakanganwa nhamo yako, uchangoirangarira semvura yakapfuura." 
Job11:17 Upenyu huchajeka kupfuura masikati makuru, uye rima richaita samangwanani." 
Job11:18 Iwe uchagara zvakanaka, nokuti tariro iriko; ucharingaringa ugozorora murugare." 
Job11:19 Uchavata hako pasi, pasina munhu anokuvhundutsa, uye vazhinji vachakumbira nyasha dzako." 
Job11:20 Asi meso avakaipa achaneta, uye vachashayiwa pokuvanda; tariro yavo ichava yokufa.”" 
Job12:1 Ipapo Jobho akapindura akati: 
Job12:2 “Zvirokwazvo imi muri vanhu, uye kungwara kuchafa nemi!" 
Job12:3 Asi neni ndinonzwisisa semi; handisi muduku kwamuri. Ndianiko asingazivi zvinhu zvose izvi? 
Job12:4 “Ndava chiseko kushamwari dzangu, kunyange ndakadana kuna Mwari akapindura, ndava chiseko zvacho, kunyange ndakarurama uye ndisina chandingapomerwa!" 
Job12:5 Vanhu vagere zvakanaka vanoshora vane nhamo, vachiti ndiwo magumo avaya vane tsoka dzinotedzemuka." 
Job12:6 Matende amakororo haakanganiswe, uye vaya vanotsamwisa Mwari vagere zvakanaka, ivo vanotakura vamwari vavo mumaoko avo." 
Job12:7 “Asi bvunzai mhuka, uye dzichakudzidzisai, kana shiri dzedenga, idzo dzichakuudzai;" 
Job12:8 kana taurai kunyika, ichakudzidzisai, kana hove dzegungwa ngadzikuzivisei." 
Job12:9 Ndechipiko pane zvose izvi chisingazivi kuti ruoko rwaJehovha rwakaita izvi? 
Job12:10 Upenyu hwezvisikwa zvose huri muruoko rwake, nokufema kwavanhu vamarudzi ose." 
Job12:11 Ko, nzeve haiedzi mashoko sorurimi runoravira chokudya here?" 
Job12:12 Ko, uchenjeri hahuwanikwi pakati pavatana here? Ko, kuwanda kwoupenyu hakuuyisi kunzwisisa here?" 
Job12:13 “Uchenjeri nesimba ndezvaMwari; mano nokunzwisisa ndezvake. 
Job12:14 Zvaanenge akoromora hakuna anozvivakazve; munhu waanenge apfigira mujeri haangasunungurwi. 
Job12:15 Kana akadzivisa kunaya kwemvura, kuoma kunovapo; kana akairegedzera, nyika inoparadzwa." 
Job12:16 Simba nokukunda ndezvake; akanyengerwa nomunyengeri vose ndevake. 
Job12:17 Anodzinga makurukota asina nguo nokuita kuti vatongi vave mapenzi. 
Job12:18 Anobvisa zvisungo zvakaiswa namadzimambo ndokusunga zviuno zvavo nomucheka. 
Job12:19 Anodzinga vaprista vasina nguo uye anobvisa pachigaro vanhu vakanguri vadzika midzi. 
Job12:20 Anofumbira miromo yavapi vamazano vavanovimba navo, uye anobvisa kunzwisisa kwavakuru." 
Job12:21 Anodurura kushorwa pamakurukota uye anokutunura zvombo zvavane simba. 
Job12:22 Iye anobudisa pachena zvinhu zvakadzama zverima, uye anouyisa mimvuri mikuru kuchiedza." 
Job12:23 Iye anokurisa ndudzi, uye anodziparadza; anowanza ndudzi, anodziparadzira." 
Job12:24 Anotorera vatungamiriri venyika kunzwisisa kwavo; anovaendesa vachingodzungaira pasina nzira. 
Job12:25 Vanotsvanzvadzira murima vasina chiedza; anoita kuti vadzedzereke sezvidhakwa. 
Job13:1 “Meso angu akaona izvi zvose, nzeve dzangu dzakanzwa dzikazvinzwisisa." 
Job13:2 Zvamunoziva imi, neniwo ndinozviziva handisi muduku kwamuri." 
Job13:3 Asi ndinoshuva kutaura naWamasimba Ose nokuzvidavirira mhaka yangu kuna Mwari. 
Job13:4 Kunyange zvakadaro, imi munondizora nhema; muri varapi vasina maturo, imi mose!" 
Job13:5 Haiwa, dai bedzi mainyarara henyu! Nokuti kungava kungwara kwamuri." 
Job13:6 Chinzwai zvino kuzvidavirira kwangu; teererai munzwe kudemba kwemiromo yangu. 
Job13:7 Ko, mungataura, zvakaipa pachinzvimbo chaMwari here? Ko, mungataura zvinonyengera nokuda kwake here?" 
Job13:8 Mungamuitira rusaruro here? Mungarwira Mwari here? 
Job13:9 Ko, zvingava zvakanaka here kana akakuedzai? Ko, mungamunyengera sokunyengera kwamunoita vanhu here?" 
Job13:10 Zvirokwazvo iye angakutsiurai kana mukaratidza rusaruro muchivande. 
Job13:11 Ko, kubwinya kwake hakungakutyisei here? Ko, kutyisa kwake hakungawiri pamusoro penyu here?" 
Job13:12 Mashoko enyu anotendwa itsumo dzamadota; nhare dzenyu inhare dzevhu. 
Job13:13 “Nyararai uye regai nditaure; ipapo chinouya kwandiri ngachiuye hacho. 
Job13:14 Ko, ndinozviisirei mungozi ndichibatira upenyu hwangu mumaoko angu?" 
Job13:15 Kunyange akandiuraya hake, asi ini ndichavimba naye, zvirokwazvo ndichadzivirira nzira dzangu pamberi pake." 
Job13:16 Zvirokwazvo, uku ndiko kuchava kuponeswa kwangu, nokuti hakuna munhu asingatendi Mwari achasvika pamberi pake!" 
Job13:17 Teereresai kumashoko angu, nzeve dzenyu ngadzigamuchire zvandinoreva." 
Job13:18 Zvino ndagadzirisa mhaka yangu, ndinoziva kuti ndicharuramisirwa." 
Job13:19 Pana angagona kundipa mhaka here? Kana aripo, ndichanyarara ndigofa hangu," 
Job13:20 “Haiwa Mwari, nditsidzirei hangu zvinhu zviviri izvi. Uye ipapo handingavandi pamberi penyu." 
Job13:21 Bvisai ruoko rwenyu kure neni, uye murege kundivhundutsa nokutyisa kwenyu." 
Job13:22 Ipapo mugondidana ndigodavira. Kana kuti murege nditaure, imi mugopindura." 
Job13:23 Zvivi zvandakaita nezvikanganiso zvangu zvinganiko? Ndiratidzei kudarika kwangu nechivi changu. 
Job13:24 Munovanzireiko chiso chenyu muchindiita muvengi wenyu? 
Job13:25 Ko, muchatambudza shizha rinopeperetswa nemhepo here? Ko, muchadzingana nehundi yakaoma here?" 
Job13:26 Nokuti munonyora zvinhu zvinovava pamusoro pangu, uye munondigarisa nhaka yezvivi zvoujaya hwangu." 
Job13:27 Munosunga tsoka dzangu nezvisungo; munocherechedza nzira dzangu dzose nokuisa mutaro panotsika tsoka dzangu. 
Job13:28 “Saizvozvo munhu anopera kufanana nechinhu chakaora, senguo yakadyiwa nezvipfukuto." 
Job14:1 “Munhu akazvarwa nomukadzi ane mazuva mashoma azere nokutambudzika. 
Job14:2 Anobuda seruva agosvava; anotiza somumvuri, haagari." 
Job14:3 Ko, munotarira nameso enyu kumunhu wakadai here? Ko, muchamuuyisa kuzotongwa pamberi penyu here?" 
Job14:4 Ndianiko angabudisa chinhu chakanaka kubva pane chakaipa? Hakuna! 
Job14:5 Mazuva omunhu akatarwa; makatema kuwanda kwemwedzi yake, mukamutarira miganhu yaasingagoni kudarika." 
Job14:6 Naizvozvo regai kumutarisa uye musiye ari oga, kusvikira apedza nguva yake somunhu anoshanda." 
Job14:7 “Asi kumuti kune tariro: Kana ukatemwa, unobukirazve, uye mabukira awo matsva haasvavi." 
Job14:8 Midzi yawo ingava yakwegura hayo muvhu nehunde yawo yafa muvhu," 
Job14:9 asi uchabukira pakunhuwira kwemvura ugobudisa matavi somuti uchangomera. 
Job14:10 Asi munhu anofa agoradzikwa pasi; anofema kokupedzisira uye haazovipozve. 
Job14:11 Sokupera kunoita mvura mugungwa, kana kupwa nokuoma kworwizi," 
Job14:12 saizvozvo munhu anovata pasi asingazomuki; kusvikira matenga asisikozve, vanhu havazomukizve kana kumutswa pakuvata kwavo." 
Job14:13 “Haiwa, dai mandiviga henyu muguva chete, uye mandiviga kusvikira kutsamwa kwenyu kwapfuura! Dai chete manditarira nguva, uye ipapo mugondirangarira!" 
Job14:14 Kana munhu akafa, angazoraramazve here? Mazuva ose okushanda kwangu kwakaoma, ndicharindira kusvikira kuvandudzwa kwangu kwasvika." 
Job14:15 Muchadana uye ini ndichakupindurai; muchashuva chisikwa chamakaita namaoko enyu. 
Job14:16 Zvirokwazvo muchaverenga nhambwe dzangu ipapo, asi musingarondi chivi changu." 
Job14:17 Kudarika kwangu kuchasungirwa musaga; muchafukidzira chivi changu. 
Job14:18 “Asi sokupfupfunyuka kunoita gomo rigoondomoka, uye sokubviswa kwedombo panzvimbo yaro," 
Job14:19 semvura inochera mabwe, uye sokuyerera kwemvura zhinji inokukura ivhu, saizvozvo munoparadza tariro yomunhu." 
Job14:20 Munomukunda kamwe chete zvachose, uye akasazovapo; munoshandura chiso chake mobva mamudzinga." 
Job14:21 Kana vanakomana vake vachikudzwa, iye haazvizivi; kana vakamuninipisa, iye haazvioni." 
Job14:22 Anongonzwa kurwadza kwomuviri wake chete, agozvichema iye pachake bedzi.”" 
Job15:1 Ipapo Erifazi muTemani akapindura akati: 
Job15:2 “Ko, munhu akangwara angapindura zvisina njere here, kana kuzadza dumbu rake nemhepo inopisa yokumabvazuva?" 
Job15:3 Ko, angakakavara namashoko asina maturo, nokutaura mashoko asina basa here?" 
Job15:4 Asi munotorwisa kururuma uye munodzivisa kunamata Mwari. 
Job15:5 Chivi chako chinorunzira muromo wako; uye unotevera rurimi rwavanyengeri. 
Job15:6 Muromo wako pachako ndiwo unokupa mhosva, kwete wangu, miromo yako pachako inokupupurira zvakaipa." 
Job15:7 “Ko, ndiwe munhu wakatanga kuzvarwa here? Ko, iwe wakazvarwa makomo asati avapo here?" 
Job15:8 Unoteererawo here panokurukurwa mazano aMwari? Unoti uchenjeri ndohwako woga kanhi? 
Job15:9 Chiiko chaunoziva chatisingazivi isu? Kunzwisisa kwaunako ndokweiko kwatisinawo isu? 
Job15:10 Vane bvudzi rakachena navatana vakwegura vari kudivi redu, varume vatochembera kupinda baba vako." 
Job15:11 Ko, kunyaradza kwaMwari hakuna kukukwanira here, iwo mashoko manyoro akataurwa kwauri?" 
Job15:12 Ko, mwoyo wako wakurasireiko. uye meso ako, anobwairireiko," 
Job15:13 zvokuti unoitira Mwari hasha ugobudisa mashoko akadai kubva mumuromo mako? 
Job15:14 “Munhu chiiko, zvokuti angava akanaka, kana munhu akazvarwa nomukadzi, kuti ave akarurama?" 
Job15:15 Kana Mwari akasavimba navatsvene vake, kunyange dai matenga akasava akachena pamberi pake," 
Job15:16 ko, kuzoti munhu, anosemesa uye akaora, anonwa zvakaipa semvura!" 
Job15:17 “Nditeerere ndigokutsanangurira; rega ndikuudze zvandakaona," 
Job15:18 zvakataurwa navanhu vakachenjera, vasingavanzi chinhu chavakagamuchira kubva kumadzibaba avo," 
Job15:19 ivo voga vakapiwa nyika pasina mutorwa akapfuura napakati pavo: 
Job15:20 Munhu akaipa anotambudzika nokurwadziwa pamazuva ake ose, makore ose outsinye akachengeterwa iye." 
Job15:21 Maungira anotyisa anozadza nzeve dzake; pazvinenge zvaita sezvakanaka, udyi hunomurwisa." 
Job15:22 Anorasikirwa netariro yokupunyuka parima; munondo ndiwo waakatarirwa. 
Job15:23 Anofamba-famba achitsvaka zvokudya zvamagora; anoziva kuti zuva rerima raswedera. 
Job15:24 Kutambudzika nokurwadziwa zvinomuzadza nokutya; zvinomukunda, samambo amirira kurwisa," 
Job15:25 nokuti anokungira Mwari chibhakera chake nokuzvikudza pamusoro paWamasimba Ose," 
Job15:26 achimhanyira kwaari achimuzvidza ane nhoo hobvu, yakasimba." 
Job15:27 “Kunyange chiso chake chakafukidzwa namafuta uye chiuno chake chakafuta nenyama," 
Job15:28 iye achagara mumaguta akaparadzwa nomudzimba dzisingagarwi nomunhu, dzimba dzokoromoka kuva marara." 
Job15:29 Haachazovizve mupfumi uye pfuma yake haingagari, kana nepfuma yake haingazadzi nyika." 
Job15:30 Haangapunyuki rima; murazvo uchasvavisa mabukira ake, uye kufema kwomuromo waMwari kuchamurasira kure." 
Job15:31 Ngaarege kuzvinyengera nokuvimba nezvisina maturo, nokuti haana chaachawana pakupedzisira." 
Job15:32 Acharipirwa zvakazara nguva yake isati yasvika, uye matavi ake haangawandi." 
Job15:33 Achafanana nomuzambiringa wabvisirwa mazambiringa asati aibva, kufanana nomuti womuorivhi wotunga maruva awo." 
Job15:34 Nokuti ungano yavasingadi Mwari ichashaya zvibereko, uye moto uchaparadza matende avaya vanofarira fufuro." 
Job15:35 Vanobata mimba yokutambudzika vagozvara zvakaipa; dumbu ravo rinogadzira kunyengera.” 
Job16:1 Ipapo Jobho akapindura akati: 
Job16:2 “Ndakanzwa zvinhu zvakawanda sezvizvi; mose muri vanyaradzi pasina! 
Job16:3 Ko, kutaura kwenyu kwamadzokorora kwenguva refu hakuperiwo here? Chii chinokurwadzai kuti murambe muchiita nharo?" 
Job16:4 Neniwo ndaigona kutaura semi, dai imi manga muri panzvimbo yangu; Ndaigona kutaura mashoko okukupikisai nokukudzungudzirai musoro wangu." 
Job16:5 Asi muromo wangu waizokukurudzirai: kunyaradza kunobva pamuromo wangu kwaizokuvigirai zororo. 
Job16:6 “Asi kana ndikatura, kurwadziwa kwangu hakuperi; uye kana ndikataura, iko hakubvi." 
Job16:7 Zvirokwazvo, imi Mwari, mandipedza simba; maparadza imba yangu yose." 
Job16:8 Makandisunga ini, uye zvava chapupu; kuonda kunondimukira uye kunondipupurira zvakaipa." 
Job16:9 Mwari anondirova nokundibvambura mukutsamwa kwake, uye anondirumanyira meno ake; mudzivisi wangu anondidzvokorera meso ake anobaya." 
Job16:10 Vanhu vanoshamisa miromo yavo kuti vandiseke; vanondirova padama pakundimhura kwavo, uye vanobatana pamwe chete kuzondirwisa." 
Job16:11 Mwari akandidzorera mumaoko avanhu vakaipa, uye akandikanda mumaoko avakashata." 
Job16:12 Zvose zvakanga zvakanaka hazvo kwandiri, asi iye akandivhuna; akandibata napahuro akandipwanya-pwanya. Akandivavarira;" 
Job16:13 vapfuri vake vemiseve vakandikomba. Anobaya itsvo dzangu asina tsitsi, uye anodururira nduru yangu pasi." 
Job16:14 Nguva nenguva anondirwisa; anomhanyira kwandiri somurwi. 
Job16:15 “Ndasonera ganda rangu nguo dzamasaga, uye ndaviga huma yangu muguruva." 
Job16:16 Chiso changu chatsvuka nokuchema, rima guru rakomberedza meso angu;" 
Job16:17 asi zvazvo maoko angu haadi kuita chisimba, uye munyengetero wangu wakachena." 
Job16:18 “Iwe nyika, rega kufukidza ropa rangu; kuchema kwangu ngakurege kuwana zororo!" 
Job16:19 Kunyange iko zvino chapupu changu chiri kudenga; murevereri wangu ari kumusoro. 
Job16:20 Murevereri wangu ndiye shamwari yangu, meso angu paanodurura misodzi kuna Mwari;" 
Job16:21 anomira pachinzvimbo chomunhu achikumbira kuna Mwari, somunhu anokumbirira shamwari yake." 
Job16:22 “Makore mashoma bedzi achapfuura, ndisati ndaenda parwendo rusingadzokwi." 
Job17:1 Mweya wangu waputsika, mazuva angu aitwa mashoma, guva rakandimirira." 
Job17:2 Zvirokwazvo vaseki vakandipoteredza; meso angu anofanira kuramba akatarisa kutsamwa kwavo. 
Job17:3 “Ndipei, imi Mwari chitsidzo chamunoda. Ndianiko achandiisira rubatso?" 
Job17:4 Makapofumadza ndangariro dzavo pakunzwisisa; naizvozvo hamungavatenderi kukunda. 
Job17:5 Kana munhu akaramba shamwari dzake nokuda kwomubayiro, meso avana vake achaneta." 
Job17:6 “Mwari akandiita shumo kuvanhu vose, munhu anopfirwa mate kumeso kwake navanhu." 
Job17:7 Meso angu aneta nokuchema; muviri wangu wose wangova mumvuri zvawo. 
Job17:8 Vanhu vakarurama vanokatyamadzwa nazvo; vasina mhaka vachamukira vasingadi Mwari. 
Job17:9 Kunyange zvakadaro, vakarurama vachabatirira panzira dzavo, uye vana maoko akachena vachanyanya kusimba." 
Job17:10 “Asi uyai, imi mose, edzaizve! Handingawani munhu akangwara pakati penyu." 
Job17:11 Mazuva angu apfuura, urongwa hwangu hwaparadzwa, saizvozvowo zvishuvo zvomwoyo wangu." 
Job17:12 Vanhu ava vanoshandura usiku kuti huve masikati; mukati merima ivo vanoti, ‘Chiedza chiri pedyo.’" 
Job17:13 Kana musha wandinotarisira uri guva chete, kana ndikawaridzira mubhedha wangu murima," 
Job17:14 kana ndikati kukuora, ‘Ndiwe baba vangu,’ nokuhonye ndikati, ‘Ndiwe mai vangu’ kana ‘Hanzvadzi yangu,’" 
Job17:15 ko, tariro yangu iripi zvino? Ndianiko angandionera tariro yangu?" 
Job17:16 Ichaburukira kumasuo orufu here? Tichaburukira muguruva pamwe chete here?” 
Job18:1 Ipapo Bhiridhadhi muShuhi akapindura akati: 
Job18:2 “Muchapedza kutaura uku riiniko? Chimbofungai, ipapo tigotaurirana hedu." 
Job18:3 Tinotorerweiko semombe nokurangarirwa samapenzi pamberi penyu? 
Job18:4 Iyemi munozvibvamburanya mukutsamwa kwenyu, ko, nyika ingasiyiwa nokuda kwenyu here? Kana matombo angafanira kubviswa panzvimbo yawo here?" 
Job18:5 “Mwenje wavakaipa unodzimwa; murazvo womoto wake unopera kupisa. 
Job18:6 Chiedza chiri mutende rake chinova rima; mwenje uri parutivi rwake unodzima. 
Job18:7 Simba renhambwe dzake rinorukutika; mano ake pachake anomuwisira pasi. 
Job18:8 Tsoka dzake dzinomuwisira mumumbure, uye anodzungaira ari mumaburi awo." 
Job18:9 Musungo unomubata chitsitsinho; rugombe runomubatisisa. 
Job18:10 Chishwe chakavanzwa muvhu nokuda kwake; musungo wakaradzikwa munzira yake. 
Job18:11 Kutyisa kunomuvhundutsa kumativi ose, uye kunomuteverera panhambwe dzake dzose." 
Job18:12 Pfumvu inomudokwairira; njodzi yakamugaririra paanowa. 
Job18:13 Inodya zvikamu zveganda rake; dangwe rorufu rinopedza mitezo yake. 
Job18:14 Anodzurwa kubva patende raanovimba naro agoendeswa kuna mambo anotyisa. 
Job18:15 Moto unogara mutende rake; safuri inopisa inoparadzirwa pamusoro pougaro hwake. 
Job18:16 Moto unogara mutende rake; uye matavi ake anosvava kumusoro. 
Job18:17 Kurangarirwa kwake kunopera panyika; haana zita munyika. 
Job18:18 Anobviswa pachiedza achiendeswa murima, uye anodzingwa panyika." 
Job18:19 Haana mwana kana chizvarwa chinotevera pakati pavanhu vokwake, hakuna akasara kwaaimbogara." 
Job18:20 Vanhu vokumavirira vakakatyamara namagumo ake; vanhu vokumabvazuva vakabatwa nokutya. 
Job18:21 Zvirokwazvo, ndizvo zvakaita ugaro hwomunhu akaipa; iyoyi ndiyo nzvimbo yomunhu asingazivi Mwari.”" 
Job19:1 Ipapo Jobho akapindura akati: 
Job19:2 “Mucharamba muchinditambudza nokundipwanya namashoko kusvikira riiniko? 
Job19:3 Zvino kava kagumi kose muchingonditsoropodza; munondirwisa musina nenyadzi dzose. 
Job19:4 Kana chiri chokwadi kuti ndakatsauka, kukanganisa kwangu kuchagara neni ndoga." 
Job19:5 Kana zvechokwadi mungada henyu kuzvikudza pamusoro pangu mukashandisa kuripiswa kuri pamusoro pangu," 
Job19:6 zvino muzive imi kuti Mwari akandikanganisira uye akakundikomberedza nomumbure wake. 
Job19:7 “Kunyange ndikachema ndichiti, ‘Ndakakanganisirwa we-e!’ handiwani mhinduro; kunyange ndikadanidzira kuti ndibatsirwe, kururamisirwa hakupo." 
Job19:8 Akadzivira nzira yangu kuti ndikonewe kupfuura; akaisa rima munzira dzangu. 
Job19:9 Akandibvisira kukudzwa kwangu, uye akabvisa korona mumusoro mangu." 
Job19:10 Anondibvamburanya kumativi ose kusvikira ndapera; anodzura tariro yangu kunge muti," 
Job19:11 Kutsamwa kwake kunopfuta pamusoro pangu; anondiverenga pakati pavavengi vake. 
Job19:12 Mauto ake anouya nesimba; anovaka muchinjiziri wokurwa neni, anokomba tende rangu." 
Job19:13 “Akaisa hama dzangu kure neni; vazikani vangu vakaparadzaniswa neni zvachose. 
Job19:14 Hama dzangu dzepedyo dzakaenda kure neni; shamwari dzangu dzandikanganwa. 
Job19:15 Vaenzi vangu navarandakadzi vangu vava kundiita mubvakure; vanondiona somutorwa. 
Job19:16 Ndinodana muranda wangu, asi haapinduri, kunyange ndikamunyengetedza nomuromo wangu chaiwo." 
Job19:17 Kufema kwangu kunonyangadza kumukadzi wangu; ndinosemesa kuhama dzangu chaidzo. 
Job19:18 Kunyange nezvikomana zviduku zvinondiseka; pandinosvika vanondituka. 
Job19:19 Shamwari dzangu dzepedyo dzinondisema; vaya vandinoda vandishandukira. 
Job19:20 Handisati ndichiri chinhu asi ndangova hangu ganda; ndangopunyuka namatadza amazino angu chete. 
Job19:21 “Ndinzwirei urombo, shamwari dzangu, ndinzwirei urombo nokuti ruoko rwaMwari rwandirova." 
Job19:22 Munonditeverereiko sezvinoita Mwari? Ko, hamungaguti nenyama yangu here?" 
Job19:23 “Haiwa, dai mashoko angu ainyorwa hawo, dai ainyorwa hawo pabhuku," 
Job19:24 dai ainyorwa nechinyoreso chesimbi pamutobvu, kana ainyorwa padombo nokusingaperi!" 
Job19:25 Ndinoziva kuti mudzikinuri wangu mupenyu, uye kuti pakupedzisira achamira pamusoro penyika." 
Job19:26 Uye shure kwokunge ganda rangu raparara, kunyange zvakadaro ndichaona Mwari munyama yangu;" 
Job19:27 ini pachangu ndichamuona nameso angu pachangu, iyeni kwete mumwe. Haiwa mwoyo wangu unopanga sei mukati mangu!" 
Job19:28 “Kana muchiti, ‘Haiwa tichamutambudza sei, sezvo mudzi wenhamo uri maari,’" 
Job19:29 munofanira kutya munondo imi pachenyu, nokuti hasha dzichauyisa kurangwa nomunondo, ipapo muchaziva kuti pano kutongwa.”" 
Job20:1 Ipapo Zofari muNaamati akapindura akati: 
Job20:2 “Ndangariro dzangu dzokutambudzika dzinondikurumidzisa kuti ndipindure nokuti ndakanganisika kwazvo. 
Job20:3 Ndiri kunzwa kutsiura kunondizvidza, uye kunzwisisa kwangu kunondikurudzira kuti ndipindure." 
Job20:4 “Zvirokwazvo unoziva zvazvakanga zvakaita kubva kare, kubvira pakaiswa munhu panyika," 
Job20:5 kuti kufara kwavakaipa kupfupi, mufaro wavasina Mwari ndowenguva duku."
