Job20:6 Kunyange kuzvikudza kwake kuchisvika kudenga, uye musoro wake uchindobata makore," 
Job20:7 achaparara nokusingaperi, sendove yake pachake; vaya vakamuona vachati, ‘Aripiko?’" 
Job20:8 Anobhururuka sokurota, haachawanikwizve, adzingwa sechiratidzo chousiku." 
Job20:9 Ziso rakamuona harichazomuonizve; nzvimbo yake haichazomutsvakizve. 
Job20:10 Vana vake vanofanira kutsvaka nyasha kuvarombo; maoko ake chaiwo anofanira kudzorera pfuma yake. 
Job20:11 Simba roujaya rakazadza mapfupa ake richaumburuka naye muguruva. 
Job20:12 “Kunyange chakaipa chichitapira mumukanwa, uye achichiviga pasi porurimi rwake," 
Job20:13 kunyange asingagoni kuchiregedza achichichengeta mumukanwa make," 
Job20:14 asi chokudya chake chichashanduka chikavava mudumbu make; chichava uturu hwenyika mukati make. 
Job20:15 Achapfira upfumi hwaakamedza; Mwari achaita kuti dumbu rake rizvirutse. 
Job20:16 Achasveta uturu hwenyoka; rurimi rwemvumbi ruchamuuraya. 
Job20:17 Haangafadzwi nehova, idzo nzizi dzinoyerera uchi noruomba." 
Job20:18 Zvaakatamburira anofanira kuzvidzosazve zvisina kudyiwa; haangafadzwi nezvaakawana pakutengesa kwake. 
Job20:19 Nokuti akamanikidza varombo akavasiya vava vachena; akatora dzimba dzaasina kuvaka. 
Job20:20 “Zvirokwazvo haangamiri kubva pahavi yake; haangazviponesi nepfuma yake. 
Job20:21 Hapana chaakasiyirwa kuti adye; upfumi hwake hahungagari nokusingaperi. 
Job20:22 Pakati pezvakawanda zvake, nhamo ichamukunda; kuzara kwenjodzi kuchauya pamusoro pake." 
Job20:23 Paanenge agutsa dumbu rake, Mwari achatuma kutsamwa kwake kunopisa pamusoro pake, uye achanayisa kurova kwake pamusoro pake." 
Job20:24 Kunyange akatiza chombo chesimbi, museve unopinza wendarira unomubaya." 
Job20:25 Anoutumbura kubva kumusana kwake, muromo wawo unovaima uchibva pachiropa chake. Kutya kuzhinji kuchauya pamusoro pake;" 
Job20:26 rima guru richavandira pfuma yake. Moto usina kupfutidzwa uchamuparadza uye uchapedza zvakasara mutende rake. 
Job20:27 Matenga achaisa pachena kuipa kwake; nyika ichamumukira. 
Job20:28 Mafashamu achakukura imba yake, mvura zhinji inoerera pazuva rehasha dzaMwari." 
Job20:29 Aya ndiwo magumo anogoverwa vakaipa naMwari, iyo nhaka yavakatemerwa naMwari.”" 
Job21:1 Ipapo Jobho akapindura akati: 
Job21:2 “Teereresai mashoko angu; uku ngakuve kunyaradza kwamunondipa. 
Job21:3 Ndiitirei mwoyo murefu ndichitaura hangu, uye kana ndapedza kutaura, murambe muchiseka henyu." 
Job21:4 “Ko, kunyunyuta kwangu kwakanangana navanhu here? Ndingatadza seiko kuora mwoyo?" 
Job21:5 Nditarirei mushamiswe; mufumbire muromo wenyu noruoko. 
Job21:6 Ndinotya, pandinofunga izvi; kudedera kunobata muviri wangu." 
Job21:7 Nemhaka yeiko vakaipa vachirarama, vachikwegura uye vachiwedzerwa simba?" 
Job21:8 Vanoona vana vavo vachisimbiswa vari pavari, navazukuru vavo pamberi pavo." 
Job21:9 Misha yavo igere zvakanaka uye haina chainotya; shamhu yaMwari haisi pamusoro pavo. 
Job21:10 Hando dzavo hadzikonewi kubereka, mhou dzavo dzinobereka mhuru dzisingasvodzi." 
Job21:11 Vanobudisa vana vavo seboka ramakwai; vapwere vavo vanopembera vachitamba. 
Job21:12 Vanoimba vachiridzirwa tambureni nembira; vanofarira kurira kwenyere. 
Job21:13 Vanopedza makore avo mukubudirira uye vanopinda muguva murugare. 
Job21:14 Kunyange zvakadaro vanoti kuna Mwari, ‘Tisiyei takadaro! Hatina hanya nokuziva nzira dzenyu." 
Job21:15 Wamasimba Ose ndianiko, kuti timushumire? Tinowaneiko kana tikamunamata?’" 
Job21:16 Asi kubudirira kwavo hakusi mumaoko avo, naizvozvo ndinomira kure nerangano yavakaipa." 
Job21:17 “Kunyange zvakadaro, kanganiko kanodzimwa mwenje wavakaipa? Vanowirwa nenjodzi kanganiko?" 
Job21:18 Vanofanana namakoto anopepereswa nemhepo runganiko, sehundi inokukurwa nedutu?" 
Job21:19 Zvinonzi, “Mwari anochengetera vana vomunhu kutongwa.” Ngaamutsive iye amene, kuitira kuti agozviziva!" 
Job21:20 Meso ake pachake ngaaone kuparadzwa kwake; iye ngaanwe kutsamwa kwoWamasimba Ose. 
Job21:21 Nokuti ane hanya yeiko nemhuri yaanosiya shure, mwedzi yaakagoverwa zvoyopera?" 
Job21:22 “Ko, pane munhu angagona kudzidzisa ruzivo kuna Mwari, sezvo iye achitonga kunyange vari pamusoro-soro here?" 
Job21:23 Mumwe munhu anofa achine simba rake rizere, akanyatsogadzikana" 
Job21:24 mapfupa ake azere nomwongo. 
Job21:25 Mumwe munhu anofa ane shungu dzomwoyo, asina kumbonakidzwa nezvipi zvazvo zvakanaka." 
Job21:26 Vanovata muguruva pamwe chete, uye honye dzinovafukidza vose." 
Job21:27 “Ndinoziva chose zvamunofunga, iwo mano amunondikanganisa nawo." 
Job21:28 Imi munoti, ‘Imba yomunhu mukuru iripiko zvino, iwo matende aigarwa navanhu vakaipa?’" 
Job21:29 Hauna kumbobvunza vafambi vaya here? Hauna kuva nehanya nokuzvidavirira kwavo here," 
Job21:30 zvokuti munhu akaipa anodarikwa pazuva renjodzi, kuti anorwirwa pazuva rokutsamwa?" 
Job21:31 Ndianiko anotsoropodza mafambiro ake pachena? Ndianiko ano muripira pane zvaakaita? 
Job21:32 Iye anotakurwa achiendeswa kuguva, uye rinda rake rinorindwa." 
Job21:33 Ivhu romumupata rinotapira kwaari; vanhu vose vanomutevera, uye anotungamirirwa navazhinji vasingaverengeki." 
Job21:34 “Saka mungandinyaradza sei nezvisina maturo? Hapana chasara pakupindura kwenyu asi nhema dzoga!” 
Job22:1 Ipapo Erifazi muTemani akapindura akati: 
Job22:2 “Ko, munhu angabatsira Mwari here?" 
Job22:3 Wamasimba Ose angawana mufaro weiko dai iwe wakarurama? Aibatsirwa neiko dai nzira dzako dzaiva dzakarurama? 
Job22:4 “Imhaka yokumutya kwako here zvaanokutsiura nokukupa mhosva? 
Job22:5 Zvakaipa zvako hazvina kukura here? Handiti zvivi zvako hazviperi? 
Job22:6 Wakakumbira rubatso kuhama dzako pasina; wakatorera vanhu nguo dzavo, uchivasiya vasina kupfeka." 
Job22:7 Wakanyima mvura vasina simba uye wakanyima vane nzara zvokudya," 
Job22:8 kunyange wakanga uri munhu ane simba, ane nyika yake, uri munhu anokudzwa, agere pairi." 
Job22:9 Wakadzinga chirikadzi dzisina chinhu uye wakavhuna maoko enherera. 
Job22:10 Ndokusaka misungo yakakukomberedza, sei kutambudzika pakarepo kuchivhundutsa," 
Job22:11 sei kuine rima usingakwanisi kuona, uye sei mafashamu emvura achikufukidza." 
Job22:12 “Ko, Mwari haazi kumusoro kwokudenga here? Uye anoona kukurira kwakaita nyeredzi dzokumusoro-soro!" 
Job22:13 Asi imi munoti, “Mwari anoziveiko? Ko, anotonga pakati perima rakadai here?" 
Job22:14 Makore matema anomufukidza, saka haationi sezvaanofamba-famba pakutenderera kwedenga." 
Job22:15 Ko, iwe ucharambira munzira yakare iya yakatsikwa navanhu vakaipa here?" 
Job22:16 Ivo vakabvutwa nguva yavo isati yasvika, hwaro hwavo hwakakukurwa namafashamu." 
Job22:17 Vakati kuna Mwari, ‘Tisiyei takadaro! Wamasimba Ose angaiteiko kwatiri?’" 
Job22:18 Asi ndiye akazadza dzimba dzavo nezvinhu zvakanaka, saka ndinomira kure namano avakaipa." 
Job22:19 “Vakarurama vanoona kuparadzwa kwavo vagofara, vasina mhaka vanovaseka vachiti," 
Job22:20 ‘Zvirokwazvo vadzivisi vedu vaparadzwa, uye moto unopedza pfuma yavo.’" 
Job22:21 “Zviise pasi paMwari ugova norugare naye, nenzira iyi kubudirira kuchasvika kwauri." 
Job22:22 Gamuchira kurayira kunobva mumuromo make uye uise mashoko ake pamwoyo wako. 
Job22:23 Kana ukadzokera kuna Wamasimba Ose, uchavandudzwa: Kana ukabvisa zvakaipa uchizviisa kure netende rako," 
Job22:24 uye ukaisa goridhe rako paguruva, iro goridhe rako rokuOfiri kumatombo okunzizi," 
Job22:25 ipapo Wamasimba Ose achava goridhe rako, iyo sirivha yako yakanyatsosanangurwa." 
Job22:26 Zvirokwazvo ipapo uchawana mufaro muna Wamasimba Ose, uye uchasimudzira chiso chako kuna Mwari." 
Job22:27 Uchanyengetera kwaari, uye achakunzwa, uye iwe uchazadzisa zvawakapika." 
Job22:28 Zvaunofunga zvichaitwa, uye chiedza chichavhenekera panzira dzako." 
Job22:29 Vanhu pavanodzikiswa imi mugoti, ‘Vasimudzei!’ ipapo achaponesa vakaraswa." 
Job22:30 Iye achadzikinura kunyange iye zvake ane mhosva, iye acharwirwa kubudikidza nokuchena kwamaoko ako.”" 
Job23:1 Ipapo Jobho akapindura akati: 
Job23:2 “Kunyange nanhasi ndonyunyuta ndine shungu; ruoko rwake runondiremera kunyange ndiri pakugomera kwangu. 
Job23:3 Dai chete ndaiziva kwandingamuwana; dai chete ndaigona kuenda kwaanogara! 
Job23:4 Ndaitaura hangu mhaka yangu pamberi pake, uye ndaizadza muromo wangu nenharo." 
Job23:5 Ndaizoziva hangu zvaaizondipindura, uye ndaizocherechedza zvaaizoreva." 
Job23:6 Kuti aizondidzivisa nesimba guru here? Kwete, haaizondipomera mhaka." 
Job23:7 Ipapo munhu akarurama aigona kuzotura mhaka yake pamberi pake, uye ndaizosunungurwa kubva pamutongi wangu nokusingaperi." 
Job23:8 “Asi kana ndikaenda kumabvazuva, iye haako; kana ndikaenda kumavirira, handimuwani." 
Job23:9 Paanenge ari pabasa nechokumusoro, handimuoni; paanotsaukira zasi, handikwanisi kumuona." 
Job23:10 Asi iye anoziva nzira yandinofamba nayo; 
Job23:11 tsoka dzangu dzakanyatsotevera paakatsika; ndakarambira panzira dzake ndisingambotsaukiri parutivi. 
Job23:12 Handina kumbobva pamirayiro yemiromo yake; ndakachengetedza mashoko omuromo wake kupfuura chingwa changu chamazuva ose. 
Job23:13 “Asi iye anomira ega, uye ndiani angapikisana naye? Iye anoita zvaanoda." 
Job23:14 Anoita zvaakatema pamusoro pangu, uye urongwa huzhinji hwakadai achinahwo mudura rake." 
Job23:15 Ndokusaka ndichitya pamberi pake; pandinofunga nezvose izvi, ndomutya." 
Job23:16 Mwari akaita kuti mwoyo wangu uziye; Wamasimba Ose akandivhundutsa. 
Job23:17 Kunyange zvakadaro rima harina kuita kuti ndinyarare, rima guru rakafukidza chiso changu." 
Job24:1 “Seiko Wamasimba Ose asingatari nguva dzokutonga? Seiko avo vanomuziva vachitarisira mazuva akadai pasina? 
Job24:2 Vanhu vanobvisa mabwe omuganhu; vanofudza makwai avakaba. 
Job24:3 Vanotinha mbongoro dzenherera, uye vanotora nzombe yechirikadzi vachiita rubatso." 
Job24:4 Vanodzinga vanoshayiwa kubva panzira, uye vanomanikidza varombo vose venyika kundovanda." 
Job24:5 Sezvinoita mbizi murenje, varombo vanobuda vachienda kumabasa avo, okukwara-kwara zvokudya; chirasiro chamarara chinopa vana vavo zvokudya." 
Job24:6 Vanosunganidza uswa mumasango, uye vanononga mazambiringa muminda yavakaipa." 
Job24:7 Vanovata usiku hwose vasina zvavakapfeka uye vanoshayiwa zvokufuka muchando. 
Job24:8 Vanonyorovedzwa nemvura inonaya mumakomo, uye vanombundikira matombo nokuda kwokushayiwa pokugara." 
Job24:9 Mwana nherera anobvutwa kubva pazamu; mwana mucheche womurombo anotorwa nokuda kwechikwereti. 
Job24:10 Nokushayiwa zvokufuka, vanongofamba-famba havo vasina kupfeka; vanotakura zvisote, asi vane nzara." 
Job24:11 Vanopwanya maorivhi pakati pemihoronga; vanotsika zvisviniro zvewaini, asi vanofa nenyota." 
Job24:12 Kugomera kwavanhu vanofa kunonzwika muguta, uye mweya yavakakuvadzwa inochema kuti ibatsirwe. Asi Mwari haana munhu waanopa mhosva." 
Job24:13 “Varipo vanomukira chiedza, vasingambozivi nzira dzacho kana kugara mumakwara acho." 
Job24:14 Panongovira zuva, muurayi anobva amuka, uye anouraya varombo navanoshayiwa; panguva dzousiku anonyahwaira sembavha." 
Job24:15 Ziso remhombwe rinomirira rubvunza vaeni; anofunga achiti, ‘Hakuna ziso richandiona,’ uye anogara akavanza chiso chake." 
Job24:16 Vanhu vanopaza dzimba murima, asi masikati vanozvipfigira mukati madzo; havana chokuita nechiedza." 
Job24:17 Kwavari vose zvavo, rima guru ndiwo mangwanani avo; vanoita ushamwari nokutyisa kwerima." 
Job24:18 “Nyamba ivo ifuro riri pamusoro pemvura; mugove wavo wenyika wakatukwa, zvokuti hakuna munhu achaenda kuminda yemizambiringa." 
Job24:19 Kupisa nokuoma sezvakunobvisa chando chanyauka, saizvozvo guva rinobvuta vaya vakatadza." 
Job24:20 Chizvaro chinovakanganwa, honye inovadya; vanhu vakaipa havacharangarirwizve asi vakavhunwa somuti." 
Job24:21 Ivo vanodya nyama yomukadzi asingabereki, uye havaitiri chirikadzi tsitsi." 
Job24:22 Asi Mwari anokwekweredza vane simba nesimba rake; kunyange vakasimbiswa, havana chokwadi noupenyu hwavo." 
Job24:23 Angavarega zvavo vakazorora vachifungidzira kuti vakachengetedzwa; asi meso ake ari panzira dzavo. 
Job24:24 Vanokudzwa kwechinguva chiduku, gare gare vaenda; vanodukupiswa ndokuunganidzwa savamwe vose, vanochekwa sehura dzezviyo." 
Job24:25 Kana zvisina kudaro, ndiani anganditi ndinoreva nhema, agoshayisa mashoko angu simba?”" 
Job25:1 Ipapo Bhiridhadhi muShuhi akapindura akati: 
Job25:2 “Kubata ushe nokutyiwa ndezvaMwari; uye anosimbisa rugare kumusorosoro kudenga. 
Job25:3 Mauto ake angaverengwa here? Ndianiko asingavhenekerwi nechiedza chake? 
Job25:4 Zvino munhu angava akarurama seiko pamberi paMwari? Ko, munhu akazvarwa nomukadzi angava akachena sei?" 
Job25:5 Kunyange dai mwedzi ukasachena, uye nyeredzi dzikasava dzakachena pamberi pake," 
Job25:6 ndoda munhu zvake, iro gonye zvaro, iye mwanakomana womunhu, anongova gonye zvaro!”" 
Job26:1 Ipapo Jobho akapindura akati: 
Job26:2 “Iwe wakavabatsira sei vasina simba! Wakaponesa sei ruoko rwakarukutika! 
Job26:3 Izanoiko rawakapa asina uchenjeri! Uye wakaratidza njere dzakakura sei! 
Job26:4 Ndianiko akakubatsira kutaura mashoko aya? Uye mweya waaniko wakataura kubva pamuromo wako? 
Job26:5 “Vakafa vari pakurwadziwa kukuru, ivo vari pasi pemvura zhinji navose vanogara mairi." 
Job26:6 Rufu rwakashama pamberi paMwari; kuparadza hakuna kufukidza. 
Job26:7 Anotambanudza matenga nechokumusoro panzvimbo isina chinhu; anorembedza nyika pasina chinhu. 
Job26:8 Anoputira mvura zhinji mumakore ake; asi makore acho haabvaruki nokuda kwokuremerwa. 
Job26:9 Anofukidza chiso chomwedzi uzere, achiwarira makore ake pamusoro pawo." 
Job26:10 Anotara muganhu pamberi pemvura zhinji, kuti ugova muganhu pakati pechiedza nerima." 
Job26:11 Mbiri dzokudenga dzinodengenyeka, dzichivhunduswa nokutuka kwake." 
Job26:12 Akabvongodza gungwa nesimba rake; akagura-gura Rahabhi nenjere dzake. 
Job26:13 Matenga akashongedzwa nokufema kwake; ruoko rwake rwakabaya nyoka inobhururuka. 
Job26:14 Uye izvi ndiwo macheto oga ebasa rake; haiwa tinonzwa kuzevezera kwake seiko! Zvino ndianiko anganzwisisa kutinhira kwesimba rake?” 
Job27:1 Zvino Jobho akapfuurira mberi nokutaura achiti: 
Job27:2 “Zvirokwazvo naMwari mupenyu, iye akaramba kundiruramisira, iye Wamasimba Ose, akaita kuti ndinzwe shungu pamwoyo wangu," 
Job27:3 sezvo ndichine upenyu mandiri, iko kufema kwaMwari mumhino dzangu," 
Job27:4 miromo yangu haingatauri zvakashata, uye rurimi rwangu harungatauri nokunyengera." 
Job27:5 Handingambobvumi kuti muri kutaura chokwadi; kusvikira ndafa, handizorambi kururama kwangu." 
Job27:6 Ndichachengetedza kururama kwangu uye handingakuregedzi; hana yangu haingandipi mhosva ndichiri mupenyu. 
Job27:7 “Vavengi vangu ngavaite savakaipa, navadzivisi vangu savasakarurama!" 
Job27:8 Ko, munhu asina Mwari ane tariro yeiko kana afa, Mwari paanotora upenyu hwake?" 
Job27:9 Ko, Mwari anoteerera kuchema kwake paanowirwa nenhamo here?" 
Job27:10 Iye angawana mufaro muna Wamasimba Ose here? Ko, achadana kuna Mwari panguva dzose here?" 
Job27:11 “Ndichakudzidzisai nezvesimba raMwari; nzira dzaWamasimba Ose handingadzivanzi. 
Job27:12 Imi mose makazviona izvi pachenyu. Zvino munotaurireiko zvisina maturo? 
Job27:13 “Haano magumo anogoverwa vakaipa naMwari, iyo nhaka inogamuchirwa navanhu vano utsinye, kubva kuna Wamasimba Ose." 
Job27:14 Hazvinei kuti vana vake vakawanda sei, magumo avo munondo; vazukuru vake havazombowani zvokudya zvinovaringana." 
Job27:15 Denda richaviga vaya vanenge vasara, uye chirikadzi dzavo hadzingavachemi." 
Job27:16 Kunyange akaunganidza sirivha seguruva, uye zvokufuka zvikaita somurwi wevhu," 
Job27:17 zvaanowana zvichafukwa navakarurama, uye vasina mhaka vachigovana sirivha yake." 
Job27:18 Imba yaanovaka yakaita sedende rechipfukuto, sechirindo chakaitwa nomurindi." 
Job27:19 Anovata pasi akapfuma, asi haachazvipamhizve; paanosvinura meso ake, wanei zvose zvaenda." 
Job27:20 Zvinotyisa zvinomubata kufanana namafashamu; dutu rinomubvutira kure panguva yousiku. 
Job27:21 Mhepo yokumabvazuva inomutakura ichimuendesa kure, zvino aenda hake. Inomukukura kubva panzvimbo yake." 
Job27:22 Inovhuvhuta paari isingamunzwiri ngoni, paanenge achitiza akati tande achitiza simba rayo." 
Job27:23 Inomuomberera maoko ichimuseka, ichishinyira ichiita kuti abve panzvimbo yake." 
Job28:1 “Mugodhi wesirivha uripo, nenzvimbo inonatswa goridhe." 
Job28:2 Simbi inocherwa pasi, uye ndarira inonyautswa ichibva pamhangura." 
Job28:3 Munhu anoita kuti rima ripere; anotsvakisisa kusvikira kumucheto chaiko, mhangura iri murima rakasviba kwazvo." 
Job28:4 Anovhura mugodhi kure nokunogara vanhu, kunzvimbo dzakakanganikwa norutsoka rwomunhu; kure navanhu anorezuka ndokuzeya uku nokuku." 
Job28:5 Iyo nyika, zvokudya zvichibva mairi, inoshandurwa nechapasi seinoshandurwa," 
Job28:6 safiri inobva mumatombo ayo, uye guruva rayo rine upfu hwegoridhe," 
Job28:7 Hakuna gondo rinoziva nzira iyo yakavanzika, hakuna ziso rorukodzi rakaiona." 
Job28:8 Mhuka dzinozvikudza hadziisi rutsokapo, uye hakuna shumba inofambapo." 
Job28:9 Ruoko rwomunhu runorova dombo romusarasara nokuisa midzi yamakomo pachena. 
Job28:10 Anochera mugero nomumatombo; meso ake anoona pfuma yawo yose. 
Job28:11 Anotsvakisisa panotangira nzizi nokubudisa zvinhu zvakavanzika pachena. 
Job28:12 “Asi uchenjeri hungawanikwepiko? Kunzwisisa kunogarepiko? 
Job28:13 Munhu haanzwisisi kukosha kwahwo; hahungawanikwi munyika yavapenyu. 
Job28:14 Pakadzika panoti, ‘Hahuzi mandiri.’ gungwa rinoti, ‘Hahuzi pandiri.’" 
Job28:15 Hahungatengwi negoridhe yakaisvonaka, uye mutengo wahwo haungayerwi nesirivha." 
Job28:16 Hahungatengwi negoridhe reOfiri, namatombo anokosha eonikisi kana esafire." 
Job28:17 Hahungaenzaniswi negoridhe kana kristari, uye hahungatsinhaniswi nezvishongo zvegoridhe." 
Job28:18 Korari nejasipa hazvingatongorehwi; mutengo wouchenjeri unokunda maparera. 
Job28:19 Topazi yeEtiopia haingaenzaniswi nahwo; hahungatongotengwi negoridhe rakaisvonaka. 
Job28:20 Zvino uchenjeri hunobvepiko? Kunzwisisa kunogarepiko? 
Job28:21 Kwakavanzirwa meso ezvipenyu zvose, zvakavigwa kunyange kushiri dzedenga." 
Job28:22 Kuparadza noRufu zvinoti, ‘Runyerekupe rwahwo chete ndirwo rwakasvika munzeve dzedu.’" 
Job28:23 Mwari oga ndiye anonzwisisa nzira inoenda kwahuri, uye ndiye oga anoziva kwahunogara," 
Job28:24 nokuti anoona magumo enyika, uye anoona zvinhu zvose zviri pasi pamatenga." 
Job28:25 Paanosimbisa simba remhepo uye nokuyera mvura," 
Job28:26 paanoita chirevo chemvura negwara romutinhiro wemheni," 
Job28:27 ipapo akatarira kuuchenjeri akahunzvera; akahusimbisa uye akahuedza. 
Job28:28 Zvino akati kumunhu, ‘Kutya Ishe, ndihwo uchenjeri, uye kusiya zvakaipa ndiko kunzwisisa.’ ”" 
Job29:1 Jobho akapfuurira mberi nokutaura kwake achiti: 
Job29:2 “Haiwa ndinoshuva sei mwedzi yakapfuura, iwo mazuva andairindira naMwari," 
Job29:3 mwenje wake pawaivhenekera pamusoro pangu uye ndaivhenekerwa nechiedza chake ndichifamba murima! 
Job29:4 Haiwa, iwo mazuva andakanga ndichine simba, ushamwari hwaMwari chaihwo huchiropafadza imba yangu," 
Job29:5 Wamasimba Ose paakanga achineni uye vana vangu pavakanga vakandipoteredza," 
Job29:6 painyorovedzwa nzira yangu noruomba, uye dombo richindidururira hova dzamafuta omuorivhi." 
Job29:7 “Pandakaenda kusuo reguta ndikandogara muchivara," 
Job29:8 majaya akandiona akatsaukira parutivi uye vatana vakasimuka; 
Job29:9 makurukota akaramba kutaura akafumbira miromo yavo namaoko avo; 
Job29:10 manzwi amakurukota akanyararidzwa, uye ndimi dzavo dzikanamira kumusoro kwemiromo yavo." 
Job29:11 Vose vakandinzwa vakataura zvakanaka pamusoro pangu, uye vose vakandiona vakandirumbidza," 
Job29:12 nokuti ndakarwira varombo vaichemera rubatsiro, uye nherera dzakanga dzisina anobatsira." 
Job29:13 Munhu akanga afa akandiropafadza; ndakaita kuti mwoyo wechirikadzi uimbe. 
Job29:14 Ndakafuka kururama sechipfeko changu; kururamisira kwaiva nguo yangu nenguwani yangu. 
Job29:15 Ndakanga ndiri meso kumapofu namakumbo kuzvirema. 
Job29:16 Ndakanga ndiri baba kuna vanoshayiwa; ndaitamba mhaka yomutorwa. 
Job29:17 Ndakavhuna meno avakaipa, uye ndakabata chaakanga abata pamazino ake." 
Job29:18 Ndakafunga kuti, ‘Ndichafira mumba mangu, mazuva angu awanda sejecha." 
Job29:19 Midzi yangu ichasvika kumvura, uye dova richava pamatavi angu usiku hwose.’" 
Job29:20 Kukudzwa kwangu kucharamba kuri kutsva mandiri, uta hucharamba huri hutsva muruoko rwangu.”" 
Job29:21 “Vanhu vakanditeerera vachitarisira kwazvo, vanyerere vakamirira kurayira kwangu." 
Job29:22 Shure kwokutaura kwangu, ivo havana kuzotaurazve; mashoko angu akawira panzeve dzavo zvinyoronyoro." 
Job29:23 Vakandimirira kunge vakamirira mvura yomupfunhambuya, uye vakanwa mashoko angu kunge mvura yechirimo." 
Job29:24 Pandakanyemwerera kwavari havana kuzvitenda; chiedza chechiso changu chaikosha kwavari. 
Job29:25 Ndakavasarudzira nzira ini ndokugara saishe wavo; ndakagara samambo pakati pamauto ake; ndakanga ndakaita somunhu anonyaradza vanochema. 
Job30:1 “Asi zvino vanondiseka, varume vaduku kwandiri, madzibaba avo ndaiashora zvokuti handaivaisa pakati pembwa dzinofudza makwai angu." 
Job30:2 Ko, simba ramaoko avo rakanga rine basa rei kwandiri, sezvo simba ravo rakanga rapera?" 
Job30:3 Vaiponda nokuda kwokushayiwa uye nenzara, vakadzivaira usiku munyika yakaoma mumatongo nomunyika yakaparara." 
Job30:4 Vakaunganidza miriwo inovava kubva mumakwenzi, uye zvokudya zvavo zvakanga zviri mudzi womuti womurara." 
Job30:5 Vakabviswa pakati pavanhu vokwavo, vachitukwa kunge vakanga vari mbavha." 
Job30:6 Vakamanikidzwa kuti vagare mukati mehova dzakaoma, pakati pamatombo nomumakomba, muvhu." 
Job30:7 Vakarira pakati pamakwenzi, uye vakamanikidzana pasi porukato." 
Job30:8 Vakanga vari vanhu vakazvidzika vasina zita, vakadzingwa kubva munyika." 
Job30:9 “Uye zvino vanakomana vavo vanondiseka munziyo; ndava shumo pakati pavo. 
Job30:10 Vanondisema uye vanomira kure neni; havazezi kundipfira kumeso. 
Job30:11 Sezvo zvino Mwari akatsudunura uta hwangu uye akanditambudza, havazvidzori pamberi pangu." 
Job30:12 Kurudyi rwangu rudzi runondirwisa; vanoisira makumbo angu misungo, vanovaka michinjiziri yokurwa neni." 
Job30:13 Vanoparadza mugwagwa wangu; vanobudirira pakundiparadza, pasina munhu anovabatsira." 
Job30:14 Vanofamba zvavo kunge vanopinda napakakoromoka; pakati pamatongo vanongopinda zvavo. 
Job30:15 Zvinotyisa zvinondibata; kukudzwa kwangu kwabviswa sokunge nemhepo, kuchengetedzeka kwangu kwapera segore." 
Job30:16 “Uye zvino upenyu hwangu hwava kure kure; mazuva okutambudzika anondibata. 
Job30:17 Usiku hunobaya mapfupa angu; kurwadza kwokurumwa kwangu hakuzorori. 
Job30:18 Nesimba rake guru Mwari anobva afanana nechipfeko kwandiri; anondisunga somutsipa wenguo yangu. 
Job30:19 Anondikanda mumatope, uye ndava seguruva namadota." 
Job30:20 “Ndinochema kwamuri, imi Mwari, asi hamundipinduri; ndinosimuka, asi munongonditarisa zvenyu." 
Job30:21 Munondishandukira noutsinye; munondirova nesimba roruoko rwenyu. 
Job30:22 Munondibvuta mondidzingira pamberi pemhepo; munonditenderedza mudutu. 
Job30:23 Ndinoziva kuti muchandiburutsa muchindiendesa kurufu, kunzvimbo yakatsaurirwa vapenyu vose." 
Job30:24 “Zvirokwazvo, hakuna munhu anobata munhu ari kushushikana paanochemera rubatsiro pakutambudzika kwake." 
Job30:25 Ko, handina kuchema avo vaitambura here? Ko, mweya wangu hauna kuva neshungu pamusoro pavarombo here?" 
Job30:26 Kunyange zvakadaro, pandakanga ndakarindira zvakanaka, zvakaipa zvakasvika; pandakatarisira chiedza, ipapo rima rakasvika." 
Job30:27 Kumonyoroka kwoura hwangu hakumbomiri; mazuva okutambudzika anondivinga. 
Job30:28 Ndinodzungaira ndichisvibiswa, asi kwete nezuva; ndinosimuka pakati peungano ndichichemera rubatsiro." 
Job30:29 Ndava hama yamakava, neshamwari yamazizi." 
Job30:30 Ganda rangu riri kusviba uye riri kufunuka; muviri wangu unopisa nefivha. 
Job30:31 Mbira dzangu dzashanduka dzikava kuchema, uye nyere yangu yava inzwi rokuungudza." 
Job31:1 “Ndakaita sungano nameso angu kuti ndirege kutarisa musikana noruchiva. 
Job31:2 Nokuti mugove womunhu unobva kumusoro kuna Mwari ndoweiko, iyo nhaka yake inobva kuna Wamasimba Ose?" 
Job31:3 Ko, hakuzi kuparadzwa kwavakaipa, nenjodzi kuna avo vanoita zvakaipa here?" 
Job31:4 Ko, iye haaoni nzira dzangu nokuverenga nhambwe dzangu dzose here?" 
Job31:5 “Kana ndichinge ndofamba nenzira yenhema kana tsoka dzangu dzamhanyira kunyengera," 
Job31:6 Mwari ngaandiyere pachiyero chakatendeka uye achaziva kuti handina mhosva," 
Job31:7 kana tsoka dzangu dzatsauka pagwara, kana mwoyo wangu ukatevera meso angu, kana dai maoko angu asvibiswa," 
Job31:8 ipapo vamwe ngavadye zvandakadyara, uye mbesa dzangu ngadzidzurwe." 
Job31:9 “Kana mwoyo wangu wakanyengerwa nomukadzi, kana dai ndaivandira pamusuo wewandigere naye," 
Job31:10 ipapo mukadzi wangu ngaakuye zviyo zvomumwe murume, uye vamwe varume ngavavate naye." 
Job31:11 Nokuti chingadai chiri chinhu chinonyadzisa, chivi chinofanira kutongwa." 
Job31:12 Ndiwo moto unopfuta kusvikira pakuparadzwa; ungadai wakadzura mukohwo wangu. 
Job31:13 “Kana ndichinge ndaramba kururamisira varanda vangu, pavanoshushikana neni," 
Job31:14 ndichaita sei pandichasangana naMwari? Ndichatiiko ndikanzi ndizvidavirire? 
Job31:15 Ko, iye akandiisa muchizvaro haazi iye akavaita here? Ko, haazi iye mumwe chete akatiumba tose muna vanaamai vedu here?" 
Job31:16 “Kana ndakaramba zvido zvevarombo kana kurega meso echirikadzi achineta," 
Job31:17 kana ndakazvichengetera chingwa, ndisingachigoveri nherera," 
Job31:18 asi kubva paujaya hwangu ndakamurera sezvinoitwa nababa, uye kubva pakuberekwa kwangu ndakatungamirira chirikadzi," 
Job31:19 kana ndakaona mumwe achiparara nokuda kwokushaya zvokufuka, kana munhu anoshayiwa asina nguo," 
Job31:20 uye mwoyo wake ukasandiropafadza kuti adziyirwe namakushe amakwai angu," 
Job31:21 kana ndasimudzira nherera ruoko rwangu ndichiziva kuti ndinozivikanwa padare redzimhosva," 
Job31:22 ipapo ruoko rwangu ngaruve papfudzi rangu, ngaruvhunike napafundo." 
Job31:23 Nokuti ndaitya kuparadza kunobva kuna Mwari, uye handina kuita zvinhu zvakadaro nokuti ndaitya kubwinya kwake." 
Job31:24 “Kana ndakaisa chivimbo changu pagoridhe, kana kuti kugoridhe rakaisvonaka, ‘Ndiwe chivimbo changu,’" 
Job31:25 kana ndakafadzwa nepfuma yangu huru, mukomborero wakabva mumaoko angu," 
Job31:26 kana ndakava nehanya nezuva pakubwinya kwaro, kana mwedzi uchifamba mukubwinya," 
Job31:27 zvokuti mwoyo wangu wakanyengereka pakavanda, uye ruoko rwangu rukazviremekedza nokuzvisveta," 
Job31:28 zvino izvozviwo zvingangova zvivi zvinofanira kutongwa, nokuti ndainge ndisina kutendeka kuna Mwari wokumusoro." 
Job31:29 “Kana ndakafadzwa nokurasikirwa kwomuvengi wangu, kana kufara zvikuru pamusoro penhamo yakamuwira," 
Job31:30 handina kutendera muromo wangu kutadza, nokudana chituko pamusoro poupenyu hwavo," 
Job31:31 kana vanhu veimba yangu vasina kumboti, ‘Ndianiko asina kumbogutswa nenyama yaJobho?’" 
Job31:32 Hapana mutorwa akavata usiku hwose munzira dzomumusha, nokuti musuo wangu wakaramba wakazarurirwa vashanyi." 
Job31:33 Kana ndakavanza chivi changu saAdhamu, nokuviga mhosva yangu mumwoyo mangu," 
Job31:34 nokuda kwokuti ndaitya kwazvo vanhu vazhinji, uye ndakatya kwazvo kuzvidza kwevemhuri, zvokuti ndakaramba ndinyerere ndikasabuda kunze," 
Job31:35 “Haiwa, dai ndaiva nomumwe angandinzwa! Ndinonyora runyoro rwangu ndichizvidzivirira iye zvino, Wamasimba Ose ngaandipindure; muponesi wangu ngaanyore rugwaro rwezvaanondipomera." 
Job31:36 Zvirokwazvo ndaimutakura pamapfudzi angu, ndairupfeka sekorana." 
Job31:37 Ndaimupa kuzvidavirira kwangu kwenhambwe imwe neimwe; ndaiswedera kwaari somuchinda. 
Job31:38 “Kana munda wangu ukadanidzira kwandiri uchindipa mhosva, uye miforo yose ikanyorova nemisodzi," 
Job31:39 kana ndakadya zvibereko zvawo ndisingaripi, kana ndakaparadza upenyu hwavanourinda," 
Job31:40 ipapo rukato ngarumere pachinzvimbo chegorosi, nesora pachinzvimbo chebhari.” Mashoko aJobho apera." 
Job32:1 Saka varume vatatu ava vakarega kupindura Jobho, nokuti akanga akarurama pakuona kwake." 
Job32:2 Asi Erihu mwanakomana waBharakeri muBhuzi, wemhuri yaRami, akatsamwira Jobho zvikuru nokuda kwokuzviruramisira kwake panzvimbo yokuti zviitwe naMwari." 
Job32:3 Akatsamwirawo kwazvo shamwari nhatu idzi, nokuti vakanga vashayiwa nzira yokupikisa Jobho, kunyange vakanga vambomupa mhosva." 
Job32:4 Zvino Erihu akanga ambomira kutaura naJobho nokuti ivo vaiva vakuru kwaari. 
Job32:5 Asi paakaona kuti varume vatatu ava vakanga vasisinazve chokureva, hasha dzake dzakamuka." 
Job32:6 Saka Erihu mwanakomana waBharakeri muBhuzi akati: “Ndiri muduku pamakore, uye imi muri vakuru; ndokusaka ndanga ndichitya, ndisingadi kukuudzai zvandinoziva." 
Job32:7 Ndakafunga kuti, ‘Zera rinofanira kutaura; makore mazhinji anofanira kudzidzisa uchenjeri.’" 
Job32:8 Asi ndiwo mweya uri mumunhu, kufema kwaWamasimba Ose, kunomupa kunzwisisa." 
Job32:9 Havazi vakuru bedzi vakachenjera, kana vatana chete vanganzwisisa zvakanaka." 
Job32:10 “Naizvozvo ndinoti: Nditeererei; nemiwo ndichakuudzai zvandinoziva. 
Job32:11 Ndakambomirira pamaitaura, ndakateerera pfungwa dzenyu; pamakanga muchitsvaka mashoko," 
Job32:12 ndakanyatsokuteererai. Asi hakuna mumwe wenyu akapwisa Jobho; hakuna pamuri akapindura mashoko ake. 
Job32:13 Regai kuti, ‘Tawana uchenjeri; regai Mwari amukonese, kwete munhu.’" 
Job32:14 Asi Jobho haana kunongedza mashoko ake kwandiri, uye handingamupinduri pakukakavadzana kwenyu." 
Job32:15 “Vashamiswa uye havachina rokureva; vapererwa namashoko. 
Job32:16 Ko, zvino ini ndingamirira here ivo zvavangonyarara, zvino zvavangomira ipapo vasina mhinduro?" 
Job32:17 Neniwo ndichava nechokutaura; neniwo ndichareva zvandinoziva. 
Job32:18 Nokuti ndizere namashoko, uye mweya uri mandiri unondimanikidza;" 
Job32:19 mukati mangu ndafanana newaini iri mubhodhoro rakadzivirwa, sehomwe itsva dzewaini dzoda kuparuka." 
Job32:20 Ndinofanira kutaura kuti ndisununguke; ndinofanira kushamisa muromo wangu ndigopindura. 
Job32:21 Handina munhu wandinofanira kutsaura, uye handingabati kumeso munhu upi zvake;" 
Job32:22 nokuti dai ndaiva nyanzvi yokubata kumeso, muiti wangu aizokurumidza kunditora." 
Job33:1 “Asi zvino, Jobho, chinzwa mashoko angu; rerekera nzeve yako pane zvose zvandinoreva." 
Job33:2 Ndava kuchizoshamisa muromo wangu; mashoko angu ari pamuromo worurimi rwangu. 
Job33:3 Mashoko angu anobva pamwoyo wakarurama; muromo wangu uchataura chokwadi chandinoziva. 
Job33:4 Mweya waMwari wakandiita; kufema kwaWamasimba Ose kunondipa upenyu. 
Job33:5 Ndipindure zvino, kana uchigona; zvigadzirire ugotarisana neni." 
Job33:6 Ini ndakangoita sewe pamberi paMwari; neniwo ndakatorwa muvhu. 
Job33:7 Kutyisa kwangu hakungakuvhundutsi, uye ruoko rwangu harungakuremeri." 
Job33:8 “Asi wakati ini ndichizvinzwa, ndakanzwa mashoko acho chaiwo," 
Job33:9 ‘Ndakachena uye handina chivi; ndakanaka uye handina mhosva. 
Job33:10 Asi Mwari awana mhosva neni; anonditi muvengi wake. 
Job33:11 Anosunga makumbo angu nezvisungo; anocherechedza nzira dzangu dzose.’ 
Job33:12 “Asi ndinokuudza kuti pachinhu ichi hauna kururama, nokuti Mwari mukuru kukunda munhu." 
Job33:13 Seiko uchimunyunyutira kuti haasi kupindura mashoko omunhu? 
Job33:14 Nokuti Mwari anotaura zvino neimwe nzira, pane imwe nguva neimwe nzira, kunyange munhu asingazvioni." 
Job33:15 Mukurota, uye muchiratidzo chousiku, hope huru padzinowira vanhu, pavanotsimwaira pamibhedha yavo," 
Job33:16 angangotaura munzeve dzavo uye agovavhundutsa neyambiro zhinji," 
Job33:17 kuti adzore munhu pakuita zvakaipa, uye nokuita kuti arege kuzvikudza," 
Job33:18 kuti achengetedze mweya wake pagomba, uye kuti upenyu hwake hurege kuparadzwa nomunondo." 
Job33:19 Kana kuti munhu angarangwa panhoo yokurwadziwa, achiramba achitambudzika mumapfupa ake," 
Job33:20 saka upenyu hwake chaihwo hunosemburwa nezvokudya, uye mweya wake unosema zvokudya zvakaisvonaka." 
Job33:21 Anoonda kusvikira apera, uye mapfupa ake, akanga asingaonekwi, zvino obuda kunze." 
Job33:22 Mweya wake unoswedera kugomba, uye upenyu hwake kunhume dzorufu." 
Job33:23 “Asi kana kurutivi rwake kuine mutumwa somurevereri, mumwe kubva pakati muchiuru, kuti audze munhu zvakamunakira," 
Job33:24 kuti amunzwire tsitsi agoti, ‘Murwirei kuti arege kuenda kugomba; ndamuwanira dzikinuro,’" 
Job33:25 ipapo nyama yake inovandudzwa ikafanana neyomwana; inovandudzwa ikaita sapamazuva oujaya hwake. 
Job33:26 Anonyengetera kuna Mwari agowana nyasha kwaari, anoona chiso chaMwari agopembera nomufaro; anodzoserwazve kururama kwake naMwari." 
Job33:27 Ipapo anosvika kuvanhu agoti, ‘Ndakatadza, uye ndakaminamisa zvakanga zvakarurama, asi handina kuwana zvaindikodzera." 
Job33:28 Akadzikinura mweya wangu pakupinda mugomba, uye ndichararama ndichifadzwa nechiedza.’" 
Job33:29 “Mwari anoita zvinhu zvose izvi kumunhu, kaviri, kunyange katatu," 
Job33:30 kudzora mweya wake pakupinda mugomba, kuti chiedza choupenyu chivhenekere paari." 
Job33:31 “Chinzwa, Jobho, uye urerekere nzeve dzako kwandiri; nyarara, uye ini ndichataura." 
Job33:32 Kana unacho chokureva, ndipindure; taurisa, nokuti ndinoda kuti ururamisirwe." 
Job33:33 Asi kana zvisakadaro, chinzwa zvino kwandiri; nyarara, uye ndichakudzidzisa uchenjeri.”" 
Job34:1 Ipapo Erihu akati: 
Job34:2 “Inzwai mashoko angu, imi vanhu vakachenjera; nditeererei, imi vanhu vedzidzo." 
Job34:3 Nokuti nzeve inoedza mazwi sokuravira kunoita rurimi chokudya. 
Job34:4 Ngatinzverei pachedu kuti chakarurama ndechipi; ngatidzidzei pamwe chete kuti chakanaka ndechipi. 
Job34:5 “Jobho anoti, ‘Handina mhosva, asi Mwari anoramba kundiruramisira." 
Job34:6 Kunyange ndakarurama, ndinonzi ndiri murevi wenhema; kunyange ndisina mhaka, miseve yake inobaya ronda risingarapiki.’" 
Job34:7 Ndianiko munhu akaita saJobho, anonwa kushorwa semvura?" 
Job34:8 Anofambidzana navanoita zvakaipa; anowirirana navanhu vakaipa. 
Job34:9 Nokuti anoti, ‘Munhu haana chaanobatsirwa nacho, paanoedza kufadza Mwari.’" 
Job34:10 “Saka nditeererei, imi vanhu vokunzwisisa. Mwari haangatongoiti zvakaipa, Wamasimba Ose haangatongokanganisi." 
Job34:11 Iye anoripira munhu pane zvaanenge aita; anomupisa pamusoro pake zvakakodzera mafambiro ake. 
Job34:12 Hazvingatongogoni kuti Mwari angaita zvakaipa, kuti Wamasimba Ose angaminamisa kururamisira." 
Job34:13 Ndianiko akamugadza pamusoro penyika? Ndianiko akamuita mutariri wepasi pose? 
Job34:14 Kana kwaiva kufunga kwake, uye akatora mweya wake nokufema kwake," 
Job34:15 marudzi ose avanhu aiparara pamwe chete, uye munhu aizodzokerazve kuguruva." 
Job34:16 “Kana uchinzwisisa teerera izvi; chinzwa zvandinoreva. 
Job34:17 Ko, munhu anovenga kururamisira angatonga here? Ko, muchapomera akarurama uye ane simba here?" 
Job34:18 Ko, haazi iye oga anoti kumadzimambo, ‘Hamubatsiri imi,’ uye kumakurukota, ‘Makaipa imi,’" 
Job34:19 asingaitiri machinda zvakanaka nokuti machinda, uye asingaitiri zvakanaka vapfumi kupfuura varombo, nokuti vose ibasa ramaoko ake." 
Job34:20 Vanofa kamwe kamwe, pakati pousiku; vanhu vanovhundutswa vagoparara; vane simba vanobviswa zvisingaitwi noruoko rwomunhu." 
Job34:21 “Meso ake ari panzira dzavanhu; anoona nhambwe imwe neimwe yavo. 
Job34:22 Hakuna nzvimbo ine rima, hakuna mumvuri worufu, pangavanda vaiti vezvakaipa." 
Job34:23 Mwari haanei nezvokuedzazve vanhu, kuti vauye vamire pamberi pake vagotongwa." 
Job34:24 Anoparadza vane simba asina kumbobvunza, agogadza vamwe panzvimbo yavo." 
Job34:25 Nokuti anocherechedza mabasa avo, anovabvisa usiku ivo ndokupwanyika." 
Job34:26 Anovaranga nokuda kwokuipa kwavo, pavanoonekwa nomunhu wose," 
Job34:27 nokuti vakatsauka pakumutevera uye havana kuva nehanya kana neimwe yenzira dzake. 
Job34:28 Vakakonzera kuchema kwavarombo kuti kusvike pamberi pake, saka akanzwa kuchema kwavanoshayiwa." 
Job34:29 Asi kana akaramba anyerere ndiani angamupa mhosva? Kana akavanza chiso chake, ndianiko angamuona? Zvakadaro iye ari pamusoro pazvose, munhu nendudzi," 
Job34:30 kuti abvise munhu asina Mwari pakutonga, kuti asaisira vanhu misungo." 
Job34:31 “Ngatiti munhu oti kuna Mwari, ‘Ndine mhaka asi handichatadzizve." 
Job34:32 Ndidzidzisei zvandisingagoni kuona; kana ndakaita zvakaipa, handichazviitizve.’" 
Job34:33 Ko, Mwari angafanira kukupa mubayiro sezvaunoda iwe here, zvaunoramba kutendeuka? Unofanira kusarudza iwe, kwete ini; saka nditaurire zvaunoziva." 
Job34:34 “Imi vanhu vokunzwisisa taurai, vanhu vakachenjera munondinzwa muti kwandiri," 
Job34:35 ‘Jobho anotaura asina zivo; mashoko ake haana uchenjeri.’ 
Job34:36 Haiwa, dai Jobho aedzwa kusvikira pakupedzisira, nokuti anopindura somunhu akaipa!" 
Job34:37 Pachivi chake anowedzera kumukira; anouchira maoko ake pakati pedu sezvisina basa, uye anowedzera mashoko ake okurwa naMwari.’" 
Job35:1 Ipapo Erihu akati: 
Job35:2 “Munofunga kuti izvi zvakarurama here? Iwe zvaunoti, ‘Ndicharuramisirwa naMwari.’" 
Job35:3 Kunyange zvakadaro unomubvunza uchiti, ‘Zvinondibatsirei, uye ndinowaneiko kana nokusatadza.’" 
Job35:4 “Ndinoda kupindura iwe neshamwari dzako dzaunadzo. 
Job35:5 Tarira kumusoro kudenga uone; nan'anidza makore akakwirira kumusoro. 
Job35:6 Kana ukatadza, zvinomurwadza zvakadiniko? Kana zvivi zvako zvakawanda, zvinoita sei kwaari?" 
Job35:7 Kana wakarurama, unomupeiko iye, kana kuti anogamuchireiko kubva muruoko rwako?" 
Job35:8 Kuipa kwako kunongobata munhu akaita sewe, uye kururama kwako ndokwavanakomana vavanhu chete." 
Job35:9 “Vanhu vanoridza mhere vari pasi pomutoro wokumanikidzwa; vanokumbira kusunungurwa kubva muruoko rwoune simba. 
Job35:10 Asi hakuna munhu anoti, ‘Aripiko Mwari muiti wangu, anopa nziyo panguva yousiku," 
Job35:11 anodzidzisa zvakawanda kwatiri kupfuura mhuka dzenyika nokutiita vakachenjera kupfuura shiri dzedenga.’ 
Job35:12 Haapinduri kana vanhu vachiridza mhere, nokuda kwokuzvikudza kwavakaipa." 
Job35:13 Zvirokwazvo, Mwari haateereri chikumbiro chavo chisina maturo; Wamasimba Ose haazviteereri izvozvo." 
Job35:14 Ndoda, zvino, achateerera here zvaunoti hauzi kumuona, uye mhaka yako iri pamberi pake here zvokuti unofanira kumumirira," 
Job35:15 uyezve, kuti kutsamwa kwake hakumborangi, uye haana hanya zvake nezvakaipa?" 
Job35:16 Saka Jobho anoshamisa muromo wake achitaura zvisina maturo; anowanza mashoko ake asingazivi.” 
Job36:1 Erihu akaenderera mberi achiti: 
Job36:2 “Imbondiitirai mwoyo murefu kwechimwezve chinguva, ipapo ndichakuratidzai kuti pane zvimwe zvakawanda zvokutaura, ndakamiririra Mwari." 
Job36:3 Ndinowana zivo yangu kure; ndichataura kururama kuMuiti wangu. 
Job36:4 Muzive kuti mashoko angu haasi enhema; mumwe akakwana pazivo anemi. 
Job36:5 “Mwari ane simba asi haazvidzi vanhu; ane simba, uye haabvi pane zvaakafunga." 
Job36:6 Haaregi vakaipa vari vapenyu, asi anopa vanotambudzika kodzero dzavo." 
Job36:7 Haabvisi meso ake pana vakarurama; anovasimudzira nokusingaperi. 
Job36:8 Asi kana vanhu vakasungwa nengetani, vakabatwa zvakasimba netambo dzokutambudzika," 
Job36:9 iye anovaudza zvavanenge vaita, kuti vatadza nokuzvikudza zvikuru." 
Job36:10 Anovaita kuti vateerere kurayirwa, uye anovarayira kuti vatendeuke pane zvakaipa zvavo." 
Job36:11 Kana vakateerera uye vakamushandira, vachapedza mazuva avo ose mukubudirira uye makore avo vari mukugutsikana." 
Job36:12 Asi kana vasingateereri, vachapera nomunondo, uye vachafa vasina zivo." 
Job36:13 “Vasina Mwari mumwoyo yavo vanochengeta pfundipfundi, kunyange paanovasunga, havaridzi mhere kuti vabatsirwe." 
Job36:14 Vanofa panguva yeujaya hwavo, pakati pezvifeve zvechirume zvepashongwe." 
Job36:15 Asi vaya vanotambudzika anovarwira pakutambudzika kwavo; anotaura kwavari panguva yokurwadziwa kwavo. 
Job36:16 “Iye ari kukukwezvai kubva pamuromo wenhamo, kuti akuisei panzvimbo yakasununguka isina zvipinganidzo, kuzvivaraidzo zvokutafura yenyu izere nezvokudya zvakaisvonaka." 
Job36:17 Asi zvino maremedzwa nokutonga kwakafanira vakaipa; kutonga uye kururamisira zvakubatai imi. 
Job36:18 Muchenjerere kuti parege kuva nomunhu anokunyengerai nepfuma; musarega fufuro huru ichikutsausai. 
Job36:19 Ko, pfuma yenyu kana kushingaira kwesimba renyu kungakutsigirai kuti murege kutambudzika here?" 
Job36:20 Regai kushuva usiku, kuti mukwekweredzere vanhu kure nemisha yavo." 
Job36:21 Chenjerai kuti murege kudzokera kune zvakaipa, izvo zvamunoda pachinzvimbo chokutambudzika." 
Job36:22 “Mwari anokudzwa musimba rake. Ndianiko mudzidzisi akafanana naye? 
Job36:23 Ndianiko akamurayira nzira dzake, kana kuti kwaari, ‘Makanganisa imi?’" 
Job36:24 Rangarirai kukudza basa rake, iro rakarumbidzwa navanhu munziyo." 
Job36:25 Marudzi ose avanhu akariona; vanhu vanoritarisa vari kure. 
Job36:26 Haiwa Mwari mukuru kupfuura kunzwisisa kwedu! Kuwanda kwamakore ake hakuverengeki. 
Job36:27 “Anokwevera madonhwe emvura kumusoro, iwo anoshanduka achinaya semvura kuhova;" 
Job36:28 makore anodurura unyoro hwawo uye mvura yakawanda inonaya pamusoro pavanhu. 
Job36:29 Ndianiko anganzwisisa kuparadzira kwaanoita makore, namatinhiriro aanoita ari mumba make?" 
Job36:30 Tarirai maparadziro aanoita mheni yake pamativi ake, ichituhwina makadzika megungwa." 
Job36:31 Ndiyo nzira yaanotanga nayo ndudzi neyaanodziriritira nayo nezvokudya zvakawanda. 
Job36:32 Anozadza maoko ake nemheni agorayira kuti irove paanoda. 
Job36:33 Kutinhira kwake kunozivisa dutu remvura riri kuuya; kunyange mombe dzinoratidza kusvika kwaro. 
Job37:1 “Hana yangu inorova nokuda kwezvizvi, uye mwoyo wangu unotomuka uchibva panzvimbo yawo." 
Job37:2 Teererai! Teererai kutinhira kwenzwi rake, nokuunga kunobva pamuromo wake." 
Job37:3 Anosunungura mheni yake pasi pedenga rose, agoituma kumigumo yenyika." 
Job37:4 Shure kwaizvozvo inzwi rokutinhira kwake rinosvika; anotinhira nenzwi roumambo hwake. 
Job37:5 Inzwi raMwari rinotinhira nenzira dzinoshamisa; iye anoita zvinhu zvikuru zvinopfuura kunzwisisa kwedu. 
Job37:6 Iye anoti kuchando, ‘Donhera panyika,’ uye kumvura inonaya, ‘Naya nesimba.’" 
Job37:7 Kuitira kuti vanhu vose vaakasika vazive basa rake, iye anoita kuti munhu mumwe nomumwe ambomira kushanda." 
Job37:8 Mhuka dzinovanda; dzinoramba dziri mumapako adzo. 
Job37:9 Dutu rinobuda pakamuri yaro, chando chinobva pakuvhuvhuta kwemhepo." 
Job37:10 Kufema kwaMwari kunobudisa mazaya echando, uye mvura zhinji inooma kuita chando." 
Job37:11 Anozadza makore nounyoro; anoparadzira mheni yake nomumakore. 
Job37:12 Anoafambisa sezvaanoda pamusoro penyika yose, kuti aite zvose zvaanoarayira." 
Job37:13 Anouyisa makore kuzoranga vanhu, kana kuzodiridza nyika yake uye kuti aratidze rudo rwake." 
Job37:14 “Teerera izvi, Jobho, imbomira ugorangarira zvishamiso zvaMwari." 
Job37:15 Unoziva here kudzorwa kwamakore naMwari nokupenyesa kwaanoita mheni yake? 
Job37:16 Unoziva maturikirwo akaitwa makore here, izvo zvishamiso zvaiye akakwana muruzivo?" 
Job37:17 Iyemi munopiswa nenguo dzenyu panonyaradza nyika nemhepo yezasi," 
Job37:18 ko, mungagona kubatana naye pakutatamura matenga here, iwo akaoma kunge chionioni chendarira yakaumbwa." 
Job37:19 “Tiudzei zvatingareva kwaari; hatigoni kureva mhaka yedu nokuda kwerima redu. 
Job37:20 Ko, anofanira kuudzwa kuti ndinoda kutaura here? Ko, pano munhu angakumbira kumedzwa here?" 
Job37:21 Zvino hakuna munhu angatarira kuzuva, nokuvhenekera kwaro riri mumatenga, mushure mokunge mhepo yaachenesa." 
Job37:22 Anouya nokubwinya kunoyevedza achibva nokumusoro; Mwari anouya nokubwinya kunotyisa. 
Job37:23 Wamasimba Ose haanzwisisiki uye anokudzwa nesimba; iye haamanikidzi nokuda kwokururamisira uye nokururama kwake kukuru. 
Job37:24 Naizvozvo, vanhu vanomutya, ko, haana hanya navose vakachenjera pamwoyo here?”" 
Job38:1 Ipapo Jehovha akapindura Jobho ari mudutu akati: 
Job38:2 “Ndianiko uyo anodzima zano rangu namashoko asina zivo? 
Job38:3 Chizvisunga somurume; ini ndichakubvunza, uye iwe uchandipindura." 
Job38:4 “Iwe wakanga uripi pandakaisa nheyo dzenyika? Ndiudze, kana uchinzwisisa." 
Job38:5 Ndianiko akatara miganhu yacho? Zvirokwazvo unozviziva! Ndianiko akaiyera nerwodzi? 
Job38:6 Ko, nheyo dzayo dzakanga dzimire pai, kana kuti ndianiko akaisa ibwe rapakona," 
Job38:7 panguva yaiimba nyeredzi dzamangwanani pamwe chete, uye vatumwa vose vachipembera nomufaro?" 
Job38:8 “Ndianiko akapfigira gungwa mikova parakatsemuka richibva muchizvaro," 
Job38:9 pandakaita makore kuti ave nguo yaro, uye ndikariputira murima guru," 
Job38:10 pandakariisira miganhu yaro, uye ndikaisa magoni aro namazariro panzvimbo yawo," 
Job38:11 pandakati, ‘Apa ndipo paunosvika uye haungapfuuri; pano ndipo panoguma kuzvikudza kwamafungu ako’?" 
Job38:12 “Wakambopa mutemo kumangwanani here, kana kuratidza mambakwedza nzvimbo yawo," 
Job38:13 kuti abate magumo enyika, uye azungunuse vakaipa kuti vabve mairi?" 
Job38:14 Nyika inoumbika sevhu pasi pechisimbiso; mamiriro ayo anoita senguo. 
Job38:15 Vakaipa vanonyimwa chiedza chavo, uye ruoko rwavo rwakasimudzwa rwavhunika." 
Job38:16 “Wakamboshanyira zvitubu zvegungwa here, kana kufamba kwakanyarara kwokwakadzika?" 
Job38:17 Ko, masuo orufu wakamboaratidzwa here? Wakamboona masuo omumvuri worufu here?" 
Job38:18 Wati wanzwisisa upamhi hwenzvimbo dzenyika here? Ndiudze kana uchiziva zvose izvi. 
Job38:19 “Ko, nzira inoenda kunogara chiedza ndeipi? Ko, rima rinogarepi?" 
Job38:20 Ungagona kuzviisa kunzvimbo yazvo here? Unoziva nzira inoenda kwazvinogara here? 
Job38:21 Zvirokwazvo iwe unoziva, nokuti wakangova waberekwa? Wararama kwamakore mazhinji kwazvo." 
Job38:22 “Wakambopinda mudura rechando here, kana kuona dura rechimvuramabwe," 
Job38:23 zvandakachengetera nguva dzokutambudzika, mazuva ehondo nookurwa?" 
Job38:24 Ko, nzira inoenda kunogoverwa mheni ndeipi, kana nzvimbo inoparadzirwa pamusoro penyika mhepo dzokumabvazuva?" 
Job38:25 Ndianiko anodziura mugero wemvura zhinji, uye nzira yechimvuramabwe," 
Job38:26 kuti zvidiridze nyika isingagarwi nomunhu, gwenga risina munhu mariri," 
Job38:27 kugutsa nyika yakaparadzwa nokuita kuti imere uswa? 
Job38:28 Ko, mvura ina baba here? Ndianiko baba vamadonhwe edova?" 
Job38:29 Chando chinobva muchizvaro chaaniko? Ndianiko anobereka mazaya echando achibva kudenga," 
Job38:30 panooma mvura ikaita sedombo, pamusoro pokwakadzika pachioma nechando?" 
Job38:31 “Ungagona kusunga nyeredzi dzechimutanhatu here? Iwe ungasunungura mabote eOrioni here? 
Job38:32 Ungabudisa mapoka enyeredzi panguva yadzo here, kana kutungamirira Akuturo navana vayo?" 
Job38:33 Unoziva mitemo yokumatenga here? Ungagona kumisa umambo hwaMwari pamusoro penyika here? 
Job38:34 “Ko, iwe ungasvitsa inzwi rako kumakore here, nokuzvifukidza namafashamu emvura?" 
Job38:35 Ko, iwe unotuma mheni panzira yayo here? Ko, zvinodzoka kuzokuzivisa iwe here kuti isu tiri pano?" 
Job38:36 Ndianiko akaisa uchenjeri mumwoyo, kana kupa kunzwisisa kundangariro?" 
Job38:37 Ndianiko ane uchenjeri hwokuverenga makore? Ndianiko angagona kuteura matende emvura okudenga," 
Job38:38 kana guruva raoma, uye mavhinga enyika anamatirana?" 
Job38:39 “Ko, iwe ungavhimira shumbakadzi chokudya here, uye ungagutsa shumba panzara yadzo here," 
Job38:40 kana dzichitsivama mumapako adzo kana dzakavandira mudenhere? 
Job38:41 Ndianiko anopa gunguo zvokudya kana vana varo vachichema kuna Mwari, uye vachidzungaira pose pose nokushayiwa zvokudya?" 
Job39:1 “Iwe unoziva nguva inobereka ngururu here? Unocherechedza kana nondo dzichibereka vana vadzo here? 
Job39:2 Unoverenga mwedzi kusvikira dzabereka here? Unoziva nguva yadzinobereka here? 
Job39:3 Dzinotsivama pasi dzogobereka vana vadzo; kurwadziwa kwadzo kwapera. 
Job39:4 Vana vadzo vanowanda vagokura vakasimba musango; vanoenda uye havadzokizve. 
Job39:5 “Ndianiko akaregedza mbizi ichienda? Ndianiko akasunungura tambo dzayo? 
Job39:6 Ndakaipa renje kuti uve musha wayo, nyika yomunyu sougaro hwayo." 
Job39:7 Inoseka bope riri muguta; hainzwi kudaidzira kwomuchairi. 
Job39:8 Inoita zvikomo mafuro ayo uye inotsvaka zvinhu zvose zvinenge zviri zvinyoro. 
Job39:9 “Ko, nyati ingatenda kukushandira here? Ko, ichagara mudanga rako usiku here?" 
Job39:10 Ko, ungagona kuifambisa mumafaro namahanisi here? Ko, ingarima makoronga mushure mako here?" 
Job39:11 Ungavimba nesimba rayo guru here? Ko, ungaisiyira basa rako rinorema here?" 
Job39:12 Ungavimba nayo kuti ikuvigire zviyo zvako uye igozviunganidza paburiro rako here? 
Job39:13 “Mapapiro emhou anobhururuka nomufaro mukuru, asi haangazvienzanisi namapapiro uye neminhenga yedambira murove." 
Job39:14 Inokandira mazai ayo muvhu ndokuarega achidziyirwa mujecha," 
Job39:15 isina hanya kuti rutsoka rungaapwanya, kuti mhuka dzesango dzingaatsika." 
Job39:16 Inobata vana vayo noukasha, kunge vasati vari vayo; haina hanya kuti yakatambudzika pasina," 
Job39:17 nokuti Mwari haana kuisa njere mairi kana kuipa mugove wepfungwa dzakanaka. 
Job39:18 Asi kana ikatambanudza mapapiro ayo kuti imhanye, inoseka bhiza nomutasvi varo." 
Job39:19 “Iwe unopa bhiza simba raro kana kushongedza mutsipa waro nezenze rinopepereka here? 
Job39:20 Ndiwe unoita kuti rikwakuke semhashu, richivhundutsira nokupfeza, kwokuzvikudza kwaro here?" 
Job39:21 Rinoteta risingatyi, richifarira simba raro, rigobuda richienda kundorwa." 
Job39:22 Rinoseka kutya, harina charinotya; haritizi munondo." 
Job39:23 Gaba rinorira naparutivi paro, pamwe chete nepfumo rinovaima uye bakatwa." 
Job39:24 Neshungu rinodya ivhu; harigoni kumira rakadzikama kana richinzwa kurira kwehwamanda. 
Job39:25 Pakurira kwehwamanda rinopfeza, roti, ‘Hekani!’ Iro rinofembedza hwema hwehondo ichiri kure, kudanidzira kwavakuru vehondo uye mheremhere yehondo." 
Job39:26 “Ko, rukodzi runobhururuka nouchenjeri hwako here parunotambanudza mapapiro arwo rwakananga zasi?" 
Job39:27 Ko, gondo rinobhururuka nokuda kwokurayira kwako here richindovaka dendere raro pakakwirira?" 
Job39:28 Rinogara pamawere uye rinovatapo usiku; shongwe yedombo ndiyo nhare yaro. 
Job39:29 Riri ipapo rinotsvaka zvokudya zvaro; meso aro anozviona zvichiri kure. 
Job39:30 Vana varo vanodya ropa, uye pane chakaurayiwa ndipo pariri.”" 
Job40:1 Jehovha akati kuna Jobho: 
Job40:2 “Ko, munhu anokakavadzana naWamasimba Ose angamurayira here? Anopomera Mwari mhosva ngaamupindure!”" 
Job40:3 Ipapo Jobho akapindura Jehovha akati: 
Job40:4 “Ini handina maturo, ndingakupindurai seiko? Ndafumbira muromo wangu." 
Job40:5 Ndakataura kamwe chete, asi handina mhinduro, kaviri, asi handichapamhidzizve.”" 
Job40:6 Ipapo Jehovha akataura naJobho ari mudutu akati: 
Job40:7 “Chizvisunga somurume; ini ndichakubvunza, uye iwe uchandipindura." 
Job40:8 ‘Ko, iwe unoda kukanganisa kururamisira kwangu here? Ko, unondipomera kuti uzviruramise here?" 
Job40:9 Uno ruoko rwakaita sorwaMwari here, uye inzwi rako ringatinhira serake here?" 
Job40:10 Chizvishongedza zvino nokukudzwa uye nokubwinya, uye zvishongedze nokuremekedzwa uye noumambo." 
Job40:11 Bvisa ukasha hwehasha dzako, utarire munhu mumwe nomumwe anozvikudza ugomuderedza," 
Job40:12 tarira murume mumwe nomumwe anozvikudza ugomuninipisa, pwanya vakaipa ipapo pavamire." 
Job40:13 Uvavige vose pamwe chete muguruva; usunge zviso zvavo muguva. 
Job40:14 Ipapo ini pachangu ndichabvuma kwauri kuti ruoko rwako rworudyi rungakuponesa. 
Job40:15 “Tarisa kumvuu, yandakaita pamwe chete newe uye inofura uswa senzombe." 
Job40:16 Simba rainaro muchiuno chayo, kusimba kwayo kuri mumakakava edumbu rayo." 
Job40:17 Muswe wayo unotsvikidza somusidhari; marunda ezvidya zvayo akasonanidzwa. 
Job40:18 Mapfupa ayo ipombi dzendarira, miromo yayo yakaita setsvimbo dzesimbi." 
Job40:19 Iyo iri pachinzvimbo chokutanga pakati pamabasa aMwari, asi Muiti wayo anogona kusvika pairi nomunondo wake." 
Job40:20 Zvikomo zvinoivigira zvibereko zvayo, uye zvikara zvose zvesango zvinotambira pedyo nayo." 
Job40:21 Inovata pasi pemiti yemirotasi yakavanda pakati petsanga munhope. 
Job40:22 Mirotasi inoivanza pamimvuri yayo; mikonachando iri mijinga morukova inoipoteredza. 
Job40:23 Panozara rwizi, iyo haivhunduki; inodekara zvayo, kunyange Jorodhani rukapfachukira kumuromo wayo." 
Job40:24 Pano munhu angagona kuibata neziso, kana kuiteya uye nokuibaya pamhino yayo here?" 
Job41:1 “Ungagona kukweva ngwena nechiredzo, kana kusunga rurimi rwayo netambo here?" 
Job41:2 Ungagona kupinza mukaro mumhino dzayo, kana kuboora rushaya rwayo nechiredzo here?" 
Job41:3 Ko, ingaramba ichikumbira kunzwirwa ngoni newe here? Ko, ingataura kwauri mashoko manyoro here?" 
Job41:4 Ko, ingaita chitenderano newe here kuti iwe uitore senhapwa kwoupenyu hwayo hwose?" 
Job41:5 Ungagona kuipfuwa seshiri here kana kuisunga kuti vanasikana vako vatambe nayo? 
Job41:6 Ko, vatengesi vangaitsinhanisa here? Ko, vangaigoverana pakati pavashambadziri here?" 
Job41:7 Ungagona kuzadza dehwe rayo nemiseve yenzeve here, kana kuzadza musoro wayo namapfumo okuredzesa hove?" 
Job41:8 Kana ukaisa ruoko rwako pairi uchazorangarira kurwisana kwako nayo uye haungazozvipamhizve! 
Job41:9 Tariro ipi zvayo yokuitonga ndeyenhema; kungoiona bedzi kunopedza simba. 
Job41:10 Hakuna munhu anotyisa zvokuti angaidenha. Ndianiko zvino anogona kumisidzana neni? 
Job41:11 Ndianiko wandakatorera chinhu wandinofanira kuripira? Zvinhu zvose zviri pasi pedenga ndezvangu. 
Job41:12 “Handingakonewi kutaura zvemitezo yayo, simba rayo uye chimiro chayo chakanaka." 
Job41:13 Ndianiko angabvisa dehwe rayo? Ndianiko angasvika kwairi namatomu? 
Job41:14 Ndianiko anotsunga kuzarura mikova yomuromo wayo, iwo wakakomberedzwa nameno ayo anotyisa?" 
Job41:15 Musana wayo une mitsara yamakwande yakanyatsonamirwa pamwe chete; 
Job41:16 rimwe nerimwe riri pedyo pedyo nerimwe, zvokuti hakuna mhepo inopinda napakati." 
Job41:17 Akanyatsobatanidzwa pane rimwe nerimwe; akanamatirana pamwe chete uye haagoni kuparadzaniswa. 
Job41:18 Kuhotsira kwayo kunoita mamvari omoto; meso ayo akaita sehwerazuva hwamambakwedza. 
Job41:19 Mazhenje omoto anoyerera achibva mumuromo mayo; zvimvari zvomoto zvinobarikira kunze. 
Job41:20 Utsi hunobuda mumhino dzayo sepahari inovira pamusoro pomoto weshanga. 
Job41:21 Kufema kwayo kunopfutidza mazimbe omoto, uye murazvo unobuda mumuromo mayo." 
Job41:22 Simba rinogara pamutsipa wayo; kuvhundutsa kuri pamberi payo. 
Job41:23 Nhindi dzenyama yayo dzakabatanidzwa zvakasimba; dzakasimba uye hadzizungunuswi. 
Job41:24 Chipfuwa chayo chakaoma sebwe, chakaoma sapasi peguyo." 
Job41:25 Painosimuka, vane simba vanovhundutswa, vanodududzira shure isati yarova mvura." 
Job41:26 Munondo unosvika kwairi hauna simba, uye pfumo kana museve kana pfumo guru hazvina simba." 
Job41:27 Simbi inoita samashanga kwairi, uye ndarira sedanda rakaora." 
Job41:28 Miseve haingaiti kuti itize zvimviriri zvakaita sehundi kwairi. 
Job41:29 Tsvimbo inoita kunge chidimbu cheshanga kwairi; inoseka panorira bakatwa. 
Job41:30 Pasi payo pakaita sezvaenga zvehari, inosiya muhwezva mumatope sechirei chinokwevewa." 
Job41:31 Inoita kuti mvura yakadzika ivire segate rinovhaira, uye inokurunga gungwa sehari yamafuta." 
Job41:32 Shure kwayo inosiya muhwezva unopenya; mumwe munhu angafunga kuti mvura yakadzika yava nevhudzijena. 
Job41:33 Hapana chakaenzana nayo munyika, chisikwa chisingatyi." 
Job41:34 Inotarisira pasi zvose zvinozvikudza; ndiyo mambo pamusoro pezvose zvinozvikudza.” 
Job42:1 Ipapo Jobho akapindura kuna Jehovha akati: 
Job42:2 “Ndinoziva kuti imi munogona kuita zvose; hapana urongwa hwenyu hungakoneswa. 
Job42:3 Mabvunza kuti, ‘Ndianiko uyu anodzikatira zano rangu iye asina zivo?’ Zvirokwazvo ndakataura pamusoro pezvinhu zvandisinganzwisisi, zvinhu zvinoshamisa kwazvo kuti ini ndizvizive." 
Job42:4 “Mati imi, ‘Chinzwa zvino, uye ini ndichataura; ndichakubvunza iwe, uye iwe uchandipindura.’" 
Job42:5 Nzeve dzangu dzakanga dzanzwa nezvenyu, asi zvino meso angu akuonai imi." 
Job42:6 Naizvozvo ndinozvishora pachangu, uye ndinotendeuka hangu muguruva nomumadota.”" 
Job42:7 Jehovha akati areva zvinhu izvi kuna Jobho, akati kuna Erifazi muTemani, “Ndakakutsamwira iwe neshamwari dzako mbiri, nokuti hamuna kutaura zvakarurama pamusoro pangu, sezvakaitwa nomuranda wangu Jobho." 
Job42:8 Saka zvino chitorai hando nomwe namakondohwe manomwe mugoenda kumuranda wangu Jobho mundozvibayira sechipiriso chenyu chinopiswa. Muranda wangu Jobho achakunyengetererai, uye ini ndichagamuchira munyengetero wake ndigorega kukuitirai zvakafanira upenzi hwenyu. Hamuna kutaura zvakarurama pamusoro pangu, somuranda wangu Jobho.”" 
Job42:9 Saka Erifazi muTemani, Bhiridhadhi muShuhi naZofari muNamaati vakaita zvavakaudzwa naJehovha; uye Jehovha akagamuchira munyengetero waJobho." 
Job42:10 Shure kwokunge Jobho anyengeterera shamwari dzake, Jehovha akaita kuti abudirirezve akamupa zvakapetwa kaviri kupfuura zvaakanga anazvo kare." 
Job42:11 Vanun'una vake vose nehanzvadzi dzake navose vaimuziva vakauya vakadya pamwe chete naye mumba make. Vakamuvaraidza uye vakamunyaradza pamusoro pamatambudziko akanga aiswa naJehovha pamusoro pake, uye mumwe nomumwe wavo akamupa chidimbu chesirivha nemhete yegoridhe." 
Job42:12 Jehovha akaropafadza kupedzisira kwoupenyu hwaJobho kupfuura kutanga. Akanga ana makwai zviuru gumi nezvina, zviuru zvitanhatu zvengamera, nenzombe dzingasungwa pamajoko chiuru nembongoro chiuru." 
Job42:13 Uye akazovawo navanakomana vanomwe navanasikana vatatu. 
Job42:14 Mwanasikana wake wokutanga akamutumidza zita rokuti Jemima, wechipiri akamuti Kezia uye wechitatu akamutumidza kuti Kereni-Hapuki." 
Job42:15 Panyika yose hapana kuwanikwa vakadzi vakanaka kupinda vanasikana vaJobho, uye baba vavo vakavapa nhaka pamwe chete nehanzvadzi dzavo." 
Job42:16 Shure kwaizvozvi, akazorarama makore zana namakumi mana; akaona vana vake navana vavana vake kusvikira parudzi rwechina." 
Job42:17 Nokudaro akafa, akwegura ava namakore mazhinji." 
Psalms1:1 Akaropafadzwa munhu asingafambi panorangana vakaipa, asingamiri panzira yavatadzi, asingagari pachigaro chavadadi." 
Psalms1:2 Asi anofarira murayiro waJehovha, uye anofungisisa murayiro wake masikati nousiku." 
Psalms1:3 Akafanana nomuti wakasimwa pahova dzemvura, unobereka michero yawo nenguva yawo, uye mashizha awo haasvavi. Chinhu chipi nechipi chaanoita chinoendeka." 
Psalms1:4 Vakaipa havana kudaro! Vakafanana nehundi inopepereswa nemhepo. 
Psalms1:5 Naizvozvo vakaipa havangamiri pakutongwa, kana vatadzi paungano yavakarurama." 
Psalms1:6 Nokuti Jehovha anotarira nzira yavakarurama, asi nzira yavakaipa ichaparadzwa." 
Psalms2:1 Ndudzi dzinoitireiko bope? Uye vanhu vanorangarireiko zvisina maturo? 
Psalms2:2 Madzimambo enyika azvigadzirira uye vabati vanoungana pamwe chete kuti vazorwa naJehovha, uye kuti vazorwisa Muzodziwa Wake." 
Psalms2:3 Vanoti, “Ngatidamburei ngetani dzavo, tigorasha mabote avo.”" 
Psalms2:4 Iye agere pachigaro choushe chokudenga anoseka; Ishe anovadadira. 
Psalms2:5 Ipapo anovatuka mukutsamwa kwake uye anovavhundutsa muhasha dzake, achiti," 
Psalms2:6 “Ndakagadza Mambo wangu paZioni, gomo rangu dzvene.”" 
Psalms2:7 Ndichaparidza chirevo chaJehovha, ndichiti: Iye akati kwandiri, “Ndiwe Mwanakomana wangu; nhasi ndava Baba vako." 
Psalms2:8 Kumbira kwandiri, uye ndichaita kuti ndudzi dzive nhaka yako, migumo yenyika ive yako." 
Psalms2:9 Uchavatonga netsvimbo yesimbi; uchavaputsa kuita zvimedu zvimedu sehari.” 
Psalms2:10 Naizvozvo, imi madzimambo, ngwarai; munyeverwe, imi vabati venyika." 
Psalms2:11 Shumirai Jehovha nokutya, uye mufare nokudedera." 
Psalms2:12 Tsvodai Mwanakomana, kuti arege kutsamwa mukazoparadzwa munzira yenyu, nokuti hasha dzake dzingakurumidza kumuka. Vakaropafadzwa vose vanovanda maari." 
Psalms3:1 Pisarema raDhavhidhi. Panguva yaakatiza Abhusaromu mwanakomana wake. [1] Haiwa Jehovha, vadzivisi vangu vakawanda sei! Vakawanda sei vanondimukira!" 
Psalms3:2 	Vazhinji vanoti kwandiri, “Mwari haangamudzikinuri.” Sera" 
Psalms3:3 Asi imi Jehovha, muri nhoo yakandipoteredza; munoisa rukudzo pandiri uye munosimudza musoro wangu." 
Psalms3:4 	Kuna Jehovha ndinodana nenzwi guru, uye iye anondipindura ari pagomo rake dzvene. Sera" 
Psalms3:5 Ndinovata pasi ndigokotsira; ndinomukazve, nokuti Jehovha anonditsigira." 
Psalms3:6 Handizotyi makumi ezviuru vakandikomba kuti vandirwise. 
Psalms3:7 Simukai, imi Jehovha! Ndirwirei, imi Mwari wangu! Rovai vavengi vangu vose pashaya; gurai meno avakaipa." 
Psalms3:8 	Rusununguko runobva kuna Jehovha. Maropafadzo enyu ngaave pamusoro pavanhu venyu. Sera 
Psalms4:1 Kumutungamiri wenziyo nemitengeranwa. Pisarema raDhavhidhi. [1] Ndipindurei pandinodana kwamuri, imi Mwari wangu akarurama. Ndisunungurei pakutambudzika kwangu; ndinzwirei ngoni uye munzwe munyengetero wangu." 
Psalms4:2 	Nhai imi vanhu, muchashandura kukudzwa kwangu kukava chinyadziso kusvikira riniko? Muchada kutsauswa nokutsvaka vamwari venhema kusvikira riniko? Sera" 
Psalms4:3 Zivai kuti Jehovha akazvitsaurira vanomuda; Jehovha achandinzwa pandinodana kwaari. 
Psalms4:4 	Pakutsamwa kwenyu, regai kutadza; pamunenge muri pamibhedha yenyu, nzverai mwoyo yenyu uye munyarare. Sera" 
Psalms4:5 Ipai zvibayiro zvakarurama uye muvimbe naJehovha. 
Psalms4:6 Vazhinji vanobvunza vachiti, “Ndianiko angatiratidza chakanaka?” Chiedza chechiso chenyu ngachipenye pamusoro pedu, imi Jehovha." 
Psalms4:7 Makazadza mwoyo wangu nomufaro mukuru kupfuura zviyo zvavo newaini yavo itsva yakawanda. 
Psalms4:8 Ndichavata pasi ndigokotsira norugare, nokuti imi moga, Jehovha, munoita kuti ndigare pakasimba." 
Psalms5:1 Kumutungamiri wokuimba. Nenyere. Pisarema raDhavhidhi. [1] Rerekerai nzeve yenyu kumashoko angu, imi Jehovha. Rangarirai chikumbiro changu." 
Psalms5:2 Teererai inzwi rokuchema kwangu, Mambo wangu naMwari wangu, nokuti ndinonyengetera kwamuri." 
Psalms5:3 Mangwanani, munonzwa inzwi rangu, imi Jehovha; mangwanani ndinoisa zvikumbiro zvangu pamberi penyu uye ndichimirira netariro." 
Psalms5:4 Imi hamuzi Mwari anofarira zvakaipa; munhu akaipa haangagari nemi. 
Psalms5:5 Munhu anozvikudza haangamiri pamberi penyu; munovenga vose vanoita zvakaipa. 
Psalms5:6 Munoparadza vose vanoreva nhema; vanoteura ropa navanhu vanonyengera, Jehovha anovasema." 
Psalms5:7 Asi ini, nenyasha dzenyu huru, ndichapinda mumba menyu; norukudzo, ndichakotamira pasi pamberi penyu, ndakatarira kutemberi yenyu tsvene." 
Psalms5:8 Nditungamirirei, imi Jehovha, mukururama kwenyu nokuda kwavavengi vangu, ruramisai nzira yenyu pamberi pangu." 
Psalms5:9 Hakuna shoko rinobva mumuromo mavo ringavimbwa naro; mwoyo yavo izere nokuparadza. Huro dzavo iguva rakashama; vanotaura zvinonyengera norurimi rwavo. 
Psalms5:10 Haiwa Mwari, vapei mhosva! Ngavawisirwe pasi nerangano dzavo. Vabvisei nokuda kwezvivi zvavo zvizhinji, nokuti vakakumukirai." 
Psalms5:11 Asi vose vanovanda mamuri ngavafare; ngavagare vachiimba nomufaro. Tambanudzirai pamusoro pavo kudzivirira kwenyu, kuitira kuti vaya vanoda zita renyu vafare mamuri." 
Psalms5:12 Nokuti zvirokwazvo, imi Jehovha, munoropafadza vakarurama; munovakomberedza nenyasha dzenyu sokunge nenhoo." 
Psalms6:1 Kumutungamiri wokuimba nemitengeranwa. Sezvinoitwa kusheminiti. Pisarema raDhavhidhi. [1] Haiwa Jehovha, regai kundirayira pakutsamwa kwenyu, kana kundiranga muhasha dzenyu." 
Psalms6:2 Ndinzwirei ngoni, Jehovha, nokuti ndava kuziya; haiwa Jehovha, ndiporesei, nokuti mapfupa angu ava kurwadza." 
Psalms6:3 Mweya wangu uri kurwadziwa. Haiwa Jehovha, kusvikira riniko, kusvikira riniko?" 
Psalms6:4 Dzokai, imi Jehovha, mugondirwira; ndiponesei nokuda kworudo rwenyu rusingaperi." 
Psalms6:5 Hakuna anokurangarirai kana afa. Ndiani anokurumbidzai kubva muguva? 
Psalms6:6 Ndaneta nokugomera; ndinonyorovesa mubhedha wangu nemisodzi ndichichema usiku hwose, ndinonyorovesa uvato hwangu nemisodzi." 
Psalms6:7 Meso angu aneta nokuchema; haachaoni nokuda kwavavengi vangu vose. 
Psalms6:8 Ibvai pandiri, imi mose munoita zvakaipa, nokuti Jehovha anzwa kuchema kwangu." 
Psalms6:9 Jehovha anzwa kukumbira kwangu nyasha; Jehovha anogamuchira munyengetero wangu. 
Psalms6:10 Vavengi vangu vose vachanyadziswa uye vachavhunduswa; vachadzokera shure pakarepo mukunyadziswa. 
Psalms7:1 Rwiyo rwaDhavhidhi, rwaakaimbira Jehovha pamusoro paKushi, muBenjamini. [1] Haiwa Jehovha, Mwari wangu, ndinovanda mamuri; ndipone uye mundirwire pana vose vanondidzinganisa," 
Psalms7:2 kuti varege kundibvambura seshumba nokundibvambura-bvambura pasina anondinunura. 
Psalms7:3 Haiwa Jehovha, Mwari wangu, kana ndichinge ndakaita izvi uye ndine mhosva pamaoko angu," 
Psalms7:4 kana ndakaita zvakaipa kuno uya akanga ane rugare neni kana kupamba muvengi wangu pasina mhaka," 
Psalms7:5 ipapo muvengi wangu ngaandidzinganise andibate; ngaatsike-tsike upenyu hwangu muvhu uye andivatise muguruva. 
Psalms7:6 Simukai, imi Jehovha pakutsamwa kwenyu; simukai murwise hasha dzavavengi vangu. Simukai, Mwari wangu; rayirai kururamisira." 
Psalms7:7 Ndudzi dzakaungana ngadziungane dzakakupoteredzai. Vatongei imi muri kumusoro; 
Psalms7:8 Jehovha ngaatonge marudzi. Nditongei, imi Jehovha, zvakafanira kururama kwangu, Zvakafanira kukwaniswa kwangu, imi Wokumusoro-soro." 
Psalms7:9 Haiwa, Mwari akarurama, iyemi munonzvera ndangariro nomwoyo, gumisai kuita nesimba kwavakaipa mugoita kuti vakarurama vagare zvakanaka." 
Psalms7:10 Nhoo yangu ndimi Mwari Wokumusoro-soro, iye anoponesa vane mwoyo yakarurama." 
Psalms7:11 Mwari ndiye mutongi akarurama, iye Mwari anoratidza hasha dzake zuva nezuva." 
Psalms7:12 Kana munhu asingatendeuki, iye acharodza munondo wake; achakunga uta hwake nokuhugadzira." 
Psalms7:13 Agadzirira zvombo zvake zvinouraya; anozvigadzirira miseve yake inopisa. 
Psalms7:14 Iye ane mimba yezvakaipa akatakura mimba yokutambudzika achabereka nhema. 
Psalms7:15 Uyo anochera gomba, akaridzikisa achawira mugomba raachera." 
Psalms7:16 Zvakashata zvake zvichadzokera pamusoro wake; uye kumanikidza kwake kuchauya pamusoro wake. 
Psalms7:17 Ndichatenda Jehovha nokuda kwokururama kwake, uye ndichaimbira zita raJehovha woWokumusoro-soro nziyo dzokurumbidza." 
Psalms8:1 Kumutungamiri wokuimba negititi. Pisarema raDhavhidhi. [1] Haiwa Jehovha, Ishe wedu, zita renyu rakaisvonaka sei panyika yose! Makaisa kubwinya kwenyu kudenga kumusoro." 
Psalms8:2 Pamiromo yavana navacheche makaisa rumbidzo nokuda kwavavengi venyu, kuti munyaradze muvengi nomutsivi." 
Psalms8:3 Kana ndichifunga matenga enyu, iro basa reminwe yenyu, mwedzi nenyeredzi, zvamakarongedza panzvimbo yazvo," 
Psalms8:4 munhu chiiko zvamunomufunga, kana mwanakomana womunhu zvamune hanya naye?" 
Psalms8:5 Makamuita muduku zvishoma pazvisikwa zvokudenga, uye mukamushongedza korona yokubwinya nokukudzwa." 
Psalms8:6 Makamuita mutongi pamusoro pebasa ramaoko enyu; mukaisa zvinhu zvose pasi petsoka dzake: 
Psalms8:7 makwai ose nemombe, nemhuka dzesango," 
Psalms8:8 neshiri dzedenga, nehove dzegungwa, zvose zvinofamba munzira dzomugungwa." 
Psalms8:9 Haiwa Jehovha, Ishe wedu, zita renyu rakaisvonaka sei panyika yose!" 
Psalms9:1 Kumutungamiri wokuimba namaimbiro o“Kufa Kwomwanakomana.” Pisarema raDhavhidhi. [1] Ndichakurumbidzai, imi Jehovha, nomwoyo wangu wose; ndichataura pamusoro pezvishamiso zvenyu zvose." 
Psalms9:2 Ndichafara nokufarisisa mamuri; ndichaimbira zita renyu nziyo dzokurumbidza, imi Wokumusoro-soro." 
Psalms9:3 Vavengi vangu vanodzokera shure; vanogumburwa uye vanoparara pamberi penyu. 
Psalms9:4 Nokuti makatsigira kodzero yangu nemhosva yangu; makagara pachigaro chenyu choushe, muchitonga zvakarurama kwazvo." 
Psalms9:5 Makatuka ndudzi mukaparadza vakaipa; makadzima zita ravo nokusingaperi. 
Psalms9:6 Kuparadzwa kusina magumo kwakakunda muvengi, makadzura maguta avo; kunyange chiyeuchidzo chavo chakaparara." 
Psalms9:7 Jehovha anotonga nokusingaperi; akasimbisa chigaro chake choushe kuti atonge. 
Psalms9:8 Achatonga nyika nokururama; achatonga marudzi nokururamisira. 
Psalms9:9 Jehovha ndiye nhare yavakamanikidzwa, nhare yakasimba panguva yokutambudzika." 
Psalms9:10 Vanoziva zita renyu vachavimba nemi, nokuti imi, Jehovha hamuna kumbosiya avo vanokutsvakai." 
Psalms9:11 Imbirai Jehovha nziyo dzokurumbidza, iye agere pachigaro choushe muZioni; paridzai zvaakaita pakati pendudzi." 
Psalms9:12 Nokuti iye anotsiva ropa anorangarira; haashayiri hanya kuchema kwavanotambudzwa. 
Psalms9:13 Haiwa Jehovha, onai kuti vavengi vangu vanonditambudza sei! Ndinzwirei ngoni mundisimudze pamasuo orufu," 
Psalms9:14 kuti ndiparidze kurumbidzwa kwenyu mumasuo oMwanasikana weZioni, apo pandichafara muruponeso rwenyu." 
Psalms9:15 Ndudzi dzakawira mugomba radzakachera; tsoka dzavo dzakabatwa nemimbure yavakaviga. 
Psalms9:16 	Jehovha anozivikanwa nokururamisira kwake; vakaipa vakateyiwa namabasa amaoko avo. Higayoni Sera 
Psalms9:17 Vakaipa vanodzokera kuguva, idzo ndudzi dzose dzinokanganwa Mwari." 
Psalms9:18 Asi vanoshayiwa havangagari vachikanganwikwa, uye tariro yavanotambudzwa haingaparari." 
Psalms9:19 Simukai, Jehovha, munhu ngaarege kukunda; ndudzi ngadzitongwe pamberi penyu." 
Psalms9:20 	Varovei nokutyisa imi Jehovha; ndudzi ngadzizive kuti vanongova vanhu zvavo. Sera 
Psalms10:1 Munomirireiko kure, imi Jehovha? Munozvivanzireiko panguva yokutambudzika?" 
Psalms10:2 Pakuzvikudza kwake munhu akaipa anovhima vasina simba, vanobatwa namano okufunga kwake." 
Psalms10:3 Anozvirumbidza pamusoro pezvinopangwa nomwoyo wake; anoropafadza vanokara uye anozvidza Jehovha. 
Psalms10:4 Pakuzvikudza kwake wakaipa haamutsvaki; mundangariro dzake dzose hamuna nzvimbo yaMwari. 
Psalms10:5 Nzira dzake dzinobudirira nguva dzose; anozvikudza uye mirayiro yenyu iri kure naye; anodadira vavengi vake vose. 
Psalms10:6 Anoti pakufunga kwake, “Hakuna chichandizunungusa; ndichagara ndakafara uye handingatongotambudziki.”" 
Psalms10:7 Muromo wake uzere nokutuka nokureva nhema, uye nokutyisidzira; matambudziko nezvakaipa zviri pasi porurimi rwake." 
Psalms10:8 Anovandira ari pedyo nemisha; pakuvandira uku anouraya vasina mhosva, ari panzvimbo yakavanzika anotarira vaachaparadza." 
Psalms10:9 Anovandira seshumba iri panzvimbo yayo; anovandira kuti abate vasina anovabatsira; anobata vasina anobatsira uye anovakweva achienda navo mumumbure wake. 
Psalms10:10 Vabatwa vake anovapwanya, vanowa; vanowira pasi pesimba rake." 
Psalms10:11 Anoti mumwoyo make, “Mwari akanganwa; akafukidza chiso chake uye haazoonizve.”" 
Psalms10:12 Simukai, imi Jehovha! Simudzai ruoko rwenyu, imi Mwari. Regai kukanganwa vanomanikidzwa." 
Psalms10:13 Munhu akaipa anozvidzireiko Mwari? Seiko achiti mumwoyo make, “Haazondibvunzi?”" 
Psalms10:14 Asi imi, iyemi Mwari, munoona kutambudzika nokusuwa; munokutarisisa kuti mukupedze. Asina simba anozviisa kwamuri; muri mubatsiri wenherera." 
Psalms10:15 Vhunai ruoko rwowakaipa norwomunhu akaipa; ngaazvidavirire pazvakaipa zvake zvakanga zvisingazoonekwi. 
Psalms10:16 Jehovha ndiye Mambo nokusingaperi-peri; ndudzi dzichaparara munyika yake. 
Psalms10:17 Munonzwa henyu, imi Jehovha, zvishuvo zvavanotambura; munovakurudzira, uye munoteerera kuchema kwavo," 
Psalms10:18 muchiruramisira nherera nevakamanikidzwa, kuti munhu wenyika, arege kuramba achingovhundutsa." 
Psalms11:1 Kumutungamiri wokuimba. Pisarema raDhavhidhi. [1] Ndinovanda muna Jehovha. Mungareva seiko kwandiri muchiti, “Tizira kugomo rako seshiri." 
Psalms11:2 Nokuti tarira, vakaipa vanowembura uta hwavo; vanogadzirira miseve yavo parukungiso, kuti vapfure vari murima, uyo akarurama pamwoyo." 
Psalms11:3 Kana nheyo dzaparadzwa, akarurama angaiteiko?”" 
Psalms11:4 Jehovha ari mutemberi yake tsvene; Jehovha ari pachigaro chake choushe chokudenga. Anocherechedza vanakomana vavanhu; meso ake anovaedza. 
Psalms11:5 Jehovha anoedza vakarurama, asi vakaipa navanoda zvechisimba mweya wake unovavenga." 
Psalms11:6 Pane vakaipa anonayisa mazimbe omoto nesafuri inopfuta; mhepo inopisa ndiwo uchava mugove wavo. 
Psalms11:7 Nokuti Jehovha akarurama, anoda kururamisira; vanhu vakarurama vachaona chiso chake." 
Psalms12:1 Kumutungamiri wokuimba. Nesheminiti. Pisarema raDhavhidhi. [1] Batsirai, imi Jehovha, nokuti vanoda Mwari hapachina; vakatendeka vapera pakati pavanhu." 
Psalms12:2 Mumwe nomumwe anorevera wokwake nhema; miromo yavo inobata kumeso nokutaura zvinonyengera. 
Psalms12:3 Jehovha ngaagure miromo yose inobata kumeso, norurimi rumwe norumwe runozvikudza" 
Psalms12:4 ruchiti, “Tichakunda nendimi dzedu; miromo ndeyedu, tenzi wedu ndiani?”" 
Psalms12:5 “Nokuda kwokumanikidzwa kwavasina simba nokugomera kwavarombo, ndichasimuka zvino,” ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha. “Ndichavadzivirira kuna avo vanovaparadza.”" 
Psalms12:6 Uye mashoko aJehovha haana chaangapomerwa, sesirivha yakacheneswa muchoto chevhu, yakanatswa kanomwe." 
Psalms12:7 Imi Jehovha, muchatichengeta murugare uye muchatidzivirira kubva kuvanhu vakadai nokusingaperi." 
Psalms12:8 Vakaipa vanofamba-famba vakasununguka kana zvakashata zvichikudzwa pakati pavanhu. 
Psalms13:1 Kumutungamiri wokuimba. Pisarema raDhavhidhi. [1] Kusvikira riniko, nhai Jehovha? Muchandikanganwa nokusingaperi here? Muchasvika riniko makandivanzira chiso chenyu?" 
Psalms13:2 Ndichaita mutsimba nepfungwa dzangu kusvikira riniko, uye ndine shungu mumwoyo mangu zuva rimwe nerimwe? Muvengi wangu achandikurira kusvikira riniko?" 
Psalms13:3 Tarirai kwandiri mugondipindura, imi Jehovha Mwari wangu. Vhenekerai meso angu, kana kuti ndichafa ndakarara;" 
Psalms13:4 muvengi wangu achati, “Ndamukurira ndamukunda,” uye vadzivisi vangu vachapembera kana ndawa." 
Psalms13:5 Asi ini ndinovimba norudo rwenyu rusingaperi; mwoyo wangu unofarira ruponeso rwenyu. 
Psalms13:6 Ndichaimbira Jehovha, nokuti akandinakira." 
Psalms14:1 Kumutungamiri wokuimba. Pisarema raDhavhidhi. [1] Benzi rinoti mumwoyo maro, “Hakuna Mwari.” Vakaora, mabasa avo akashata; hakuna anoita zvakanaka." 
Psalms14:2 Jehovha ari kudenga anotarira pasi pamusoro pavanakomana vavanhu, kuti aone kana aripo anonzwisisa, naani zvake anotsvaka Mwari." 
Psalms14:3 Vose vakatsauka, vose pamwe chete vakasvibiswa; hakuna anoita zvakanaka, kunyange nomumwe." 
Psalms14:4 Ko, vaiti vezvakaipa havadzidziwo here, ivo vanodya vanhu vangu savanhu vanodya chingwa, uye vasingadani kuna Jehovha?" 
Psalms14:5 Pavari ipapo, vakazara nokutya, nokuti Mwari ari paungano yavakarurama." 
Psalms14:6 Imi vaiti vezvakaipa, munokanganisa urongwa hwavarombo, asi Jehovha ndiye utiziro hwavo." 
Psalms14:7 Haiwa, dai ruponeso rwaIsraeri rwaibuda muZioni! Kana Jehovha achidzosazve nhaka yavanhu vake, Jakobho ngaapembere uye Israeri ngaafare." 
Psalms15:1 Pisarema raDhavhidhi. [1] Jehovha, ndiani angagara munzvimbo yenyu tsvene?" 
Psalms15:2 Iye anofamba asina chaanopomerwa uye anoita zvakarurama, anotaura chokwadi zvichibva pamwoyo wake," 
Psalms15:3 uye asina makuhwa parurimi rwake, asingaitiri wokwake zvakaipa uye asingatuki waagere naye," 
Psalms15:4 anozvidza munhu akaipa asi anokudza vaya vanotya Jehovha, anochengeta mhiko yake kunyange kana zvichirwadza," 
Psalms15:5 anokweretesa mari yake asingarevi mhindu uye asingagamuchiri fufuro pamusoro pousina mhosva. Munhu anoita izvi haangatongozungunuswi. 
Psalms16:1 Mikitami raDhavhidhi. [1] Ndichengetei zvakanaka, imi Mwari, nokuti ndinovanda mamuri." 
Psalms16:2 Ndakati kuna Jehovha, “Ndimi Ishe wangu; kunze kwenyu handina chinhu chakanaka.”" 
Psalms16:3 Kana vari vatsvene vari panyika, ndivo vakaisvonaka vandinofarira chose." 
Psalms16:4 Kuchema kuchawedzerwa, kwaavo vanomhanyira vamwe vamwari. Handichazodiri zvipiriso zvavo zveropa zvinodururwa kana kuisa mazita avo pamiromo yangu." 
Psalms16:5 Jehovha, makandigovera mugove wangu nomukombe wangu; mukaita kuti mugove wangu uchengetedzeke." 
Psalms16:6 Ndakayererwa miganhu panzvimbo yakanaka; zvirokwazvo ndine nhaka inofadza. 
Psalms16:7 Ndicharumbidza Jehovha, anondipa zano; kunyange usiku mwoyo wangu unondirayira." 
Psalms16:8 Ndakaisa Jehovha pamberi pangu nguva dzose. Nokuti ari kurudyi rwangu, handingatongozungunuswi." 
Psalms16:9 Naizvozvo mwoyo wangu unofara uye rurimi rwangu runopururudza; muviri wanguwo uchazorora zvakanaka," 
Psalms16:10 nokuti imi hamuzondisiyi muguva, kana kurega Mutsvene wenyu achiona kuora." 
Psalms16:11 Makandizivisa nzira youpenyu; muchandizadza nomufaro uri pamberi penyu, nezvinofadza zvisingaperi muruoko rwenyu rworudyi." 
Psalms17:1 Munyengetero waDhavhidhi. [1] Inzwai, imi Jehovha, mukumbiro wangu wakarurama; inzwai kuchema kwangu. Rerekerai nzeve yenyu kumunyengetero wangu, usingabvi pamiromo inonyengera." 
Psalms17:2 Kururamiswa kwangu ngakubve kwamuri; meso enyu ngaaone zvakarurama. 
Psalms17:3 Kunyange mukaedza mwoyo wangu nokundiongorora usiku, kunyange mukandiedza, hamungawani chinhu; ndakazvisunga kuti muromo wangu urege kutadza." 
Psalms17:4 Kana ari mabasa avanhu, neshoko remiromo yenyu, ndakanzvenga nzira dzouyo anoita nechisimba." 
Psalms17:5 Nhambwe dzangu dzakarambira panzira dzenyu; tsoka dzangu hadzina kutedzemuka. 
Psalms17:6 Haiwa Mwari, ndinodana kwamuri, nokuti muchandipindura; rerekerai nzeve yenyu kwandiri, munzwe munyengetero wangu." 
Psalms17:7 Ratidzai kushamisa kworudo rwenyu rukuru, imi munoponesa noruoko rwenyu rworudyi, avo vanovanda vavengi vavo mamuri." 
Psalms17:8 Ndichengetei semboni yeziso renyu; ndivanzei pasi pomumvuri wamapapiro enyu," 
Psalms17:9 kubva kuno wakaipa anondirwisa, kubva kuvavengi vangu, vanoda kundiuraya, vakandikomberedza." 
Psalms17:10 Vanodzivira mwoyo yavo yakavangarara, uye miromo yavo inotaura nokuzvikudza." 
Psalms17:11 Vakandironda, zvino vandikomba, vanocherechedza nameso avo kuti vandiwisire pasi." 
Psalms17:12 Vakaita seshumba ine nzara yechokudya, seshumba huru yakavandira pakavanda." 
Psalms17:13 Haiwa, Jehovha, simukai, mirai pamberi pavo, vawisirei pasi; ndirwirei nomunondo wenyu pano wakaipa." 
Psalms17:14 Haiwa, Jehovha, ndiponesei noruoko rwenyu kubva kuvanhu vakadai, kubva kuvanhu venyika ino vano mubayiro uri muupenyu huno. Munopedza nzara yaavo vamunoda; vanakomana vavo vane zvakawanda, uye vanounganidzira vana vavo pfuma." 
Psalms17:15 Zvino ini mukururama, ndichaona chiso chenyu; pandinomuka, ndichagutswa nokuona mufananidzo wenyu." 
Psalms18:1 Kumutungamiri wokuimba. Pisarema raDhavhidhi muranda waJehovha. Akaimbira Jehovha mashoko orwiyo urwu paakarwirwa naJehovha kubva mumaoko avavengi vake vose nomuruoko rwaSauro. Akati: [1] Ndinokudai, imi Jehovha, simba rangu." 
Psalms18:2 Jehovha ndiye dombo rangu, nhare yangu, murwiri wangu; Mwari wangu ndiye dombo rangu, wandinovanda maari. Ndiye nhoo yangu norunyanga rworuponeso rwangu, shongwe yangu." 
Psalms18:3 Ndinodana kuna Jehovha, iye akafanira kurumbidzwa, uye ndinoponeswa kubva kuvavengi vangu." 
Psalms18:4 Mabote orufu akandipinganidza; mvura zhinji inoparadza yakandifukidza. 
Psalms18:5 Mabote eguva akandimonera; misungo yorufu yakanangana neni. 
Psalms18:6 Pakutambudzika kwangu ndakadana kuna Jehovha; ndakadana kuna Mwari wangu kuti ndibatsirwe. Akanzwa inzwi rangu ari mutemberi yake; kuchema kwangu kwakasvika pamberi pake munzeve dzake. 
Psalms18:7 Nyika yakadedera ikadengenyeka, uye nheyo dzamakomo dzakazunguzika;" 
Psalms18:8 Utsi hwakakwira huchibva mumhino dzake; moto unoparadza wakabuda mumuromo make, mazimbe anopisa akabuda mauri achipfuta." 
Psalms18:9 Akatsemura matenga akauya pasi; makore erima akanga ari pasi petsoka dzake. 
Psalms18:10 Akatasva makerubhi akabhururuka; akabhururuka pamapapiro emhepo. 
Psalms18:11 Akaita rima chifukidzo chake, denga rake rakamupoteredza, iwo makore matema emvura okudenga." 
Psalms18:12 Nokupenya kwaibva pamberi pake, makore akabuda akafamba, nechimvuramabwe nokupenya kwemheni." 
Psalms18:13 Jehovha akatinhira kudenga; inzwi roWokumusoro-soro rikanzwika. 
Psalms18:14 Akapfura miseve yake akaparadzira vavengi vake, kupenya kukuru kwemheni kukavavhundutsa." 
Psalms18:15 Mipata yegungwa yakaiswa pachena, uye nheyo dzenyika dzakaiswa pachena pakutuka kwenyu, imi Jehovha, nokufema kwemhino dzenyu." 
Psalms18:16 Akadzika pasi achibva kumusoro akanditora; akandibudisa pamvura zhinji yakadzika. 
Psalms18:17 Akandinunura kubva kuvavengi vangu vane simba, kubva kuvadzivisi vangu, vakanga vakasimba zvikuru kwandiri." 
Psalms18:18 Vakandinanga nezuva renjodzi yangu, asi Jehovha akanga ari mutsigiri wangu." 
Psalms18:19 Akandibudisa akandiisa panzvimbo yakafarikana; akandinunura nokuti akanga achindifarira. 
Psalms18:20 Jehovha akandiitira zvakafanira kururama kwangu; nokuchena kwamaoko angu. 
Psalms18:21 Nokuti ndakachengeta nzira dzaJehovha; handina kuita zvakaipa nokubva pana Mwari wangu. 
Psalms18:22 Mirayiro yake yose iri pamberi pangu; handina kutsauka pazvirevo zvake. 
Psalms18:23 Ndakanga ndisina chandingapomerwa pamberi pake, uye ndakazvichengeta kuti ndigare kure nechivi." 
Psalms18:24 Jehovha akandipa mubayiro zvakaringana nokururama kwangu, zvakaringana nokuchena kwamaoko angu pamberi pake."
