Psalms18:25 Kuna vakatendeka munoratidza kutendeka kwenyu, kuna vasina chavangapomerwa munoratidza kusapomerwa kwenyu," 
Psalms18:26 kuna vakachena munoratidza kuchena kwenyu, asi kuna vakatsauka munoratidza hasha dzenyu." 
Psalms18:27 Munoponesa vanozvininipisa, asi muchideredza vane meso anozvikudza." 
Psalms18:28 Imi, iyemi Jehovha, munoita kuti mwenje wangu urambe uchipfuta; Mwari wangu anoshandura rima rangu richiva chiedza." 
Psalms18:29 Norubatsiro rwenyu ndichaenda kundorwa hondo; naMwari wangu ndinogona kukwira rusvingo. 
Psalms18:30 Kana ari Mwari, nzira yake yakakwana; shoko raJehovha harina charingapomerwa. Ndiye nhoo yavose vanovanda maari." 
Psalms18:31 Nokuti ndianiko Mwari kunze kwaJehovha? Uye ndianiko Dombo kunze kwaMwari wedu? 
Psalms18:32 NdiMwari anondishongedza nesimba uye anokwanisa nzira yangu. 
Psalms18:33 Anoita tsoka dzangu kuti dzive setsoka dzenondo; anoita kuti ndigone kumira pakakwirira. 
Psalms18:34 Anodzidzisa maoko angu kurwa; maoko angu anowembura uta hwendarira. 
Psalms18:35 Munondipa nhoo yenyu yokukunda, uye ruoko rwenyu rworudyi runonditsigira; munokotama pasi kuti mundiite mukuru." 
Psalms18:36 Munondiitira nzira yakapamhama pasi pangu, kuitira kuti zvitsitsinho zvangu zvirege kutedzemuka." 
Psalms18:37 Ndakatevera vavengi vangu ndikavabata; handina kudzokera shure kusvikira vaparadzwa. 
Psalms18:38 Ndakavapwanya kuti vakoniwe kusimuka; vakawira pasi petsoka dzangu. 
Psalms18:39 Makandishongedza nesimba rokurwa; makaita kuti vadzivisi vangu vapfugame patsoka dzangu. 
Psalms18:40 Makaita kuti vavengi vangu vatize, uye ndakaparadza vavengi vangu." 
Psalms18:41 Vakachemera kubatsirwa, asi hakuna akavaponesa, kunyange kuna Jehovha, asi haana kuvapindura." 
Psalms18:42 Ndakavapura vakatsetseka seguruva ratakurwa nemhepo; ndakavadururira pasi sedope renzira dzomumusha. 
Psalms18:43 Makandirwira pakurwisa kwavanhu; makandiita musoro wendudzi; vanhu vandakanga ndisingazivi vava varanda vangu. 
Psalms18:44 Pavanongondinzwa, vanonditeerera; vatorwa vanokotama pamberi pangu." 
Psalms18:45 Vose vanoora mwoyo; vanouya vachibva panhare dzavo vachidedera. 
Psalms18:46 Jehovha mupenyu! Dombo rangu ngarirumbidzwe! Ngaakudzwe Mwari Muponesi wangu! 
Psalms18:47 Ndiye Mwari anonditsivira, anoisa ndudzi pasi pangu," 
Psalms18:48 anondiponesa pavavengi vangu. Makandisimudzira pamusoro pavavengi vangu. Makandinunura kubva kuvanhu vechisimba. 
Psalms18:49 Naizvozvo ndichakurumbidzai pakati pendudzi, imi Jehovha; ndichaimbira zita renyu nziyo dzokurumbidza." 
Psalms18:50 Anopa mambo wake kukunda kukuru; anoratidza unyoro hwake husingaperi kumuzodziwa wake, kuna Dhavhidhi nokuvana vake nokusingaperi." 
Psalms19:1 Kumutungamiri wokuimba. Pisarema raDhavhidhi. [1] Matenga anotaura kubwinya kwaMwari; matenga anoparidza mabasa amaoko ake. 
Psalms19:2 Zuva nezuva anotaura; usiku nousiku anoratidza zivo. 
Psalms19:3 Hakuna mutauro kana rurimi kusinganzwiki inzwi ravo. 
Psalms19:4 Inzwi razvo rinosvika panyika yose, mashoko azvo kumagumo apasi. Mumatenga imomo, akadzika tende rezuva," 
Psalms19:5 rakaita sechikomba chinobuda mumba, seshasha inopemberera kumhanya nhangemutange." 
Psalms19:6 Rinobuda kuno rumwe rutivi rwedenga richitenderera kusvikira kuno rumwe rutivi; hakuna chinhu chakavanzika kubva pakupisa kwaro. 
Psalms19:7 Murayiro waJehovha wakakwana, unomutsiridza mweya. Zvirevo zvaJehovha zvakavimbika, zvinopa njere kuna vasina mano." 
Psalms19:8 Zvirevo zvaJehovha zvakarurama, zvinopa mufaro kumwoyo. Murayiro waJehovha unopenya, unopa chiedza kumaziso." 
Psalms19:9 Kutya Jehovha kwakanaka, kunogara nokusingaperi. Zvakatongwa naJehovha ndezvechokwadi uye zvose zvakarurama." 
Psalms19:10 Zvinokosha kupfuura goridhe, kupfuura goridhe rakanatswa; zvinotapira kupfuura uchi, kupinda uchi hwabva muzinga." 
Psalms19:11 Muranda wenyu anoyambirwa nazvo; pakuzvichengeta pano mubayiro mukuru. 
Psalms19:12 Ndianiko angaziva kukanganisa kwake? Ndikanganwirei mhosva dzangu dzakavanzika. 
Psalms19:13 Dzorai muranda wenyu kubva pakutadza nobwoni; ngazvirege kuva nesimba pamusoro pangu. Ipapo handizovi nemhosva, ndisina mhaka yokudarika kukuru." 
Psalms19:14 Mashoko omuromo wangu nokurangarira kwomwoyo wangu ngazvifadze pamberi penyu, imi Jehovha, Dombo rangu noMudzikinuri wangu." 
Psalms20:1 Kumutungamiri wokuimba. Pisarema raDhavhidhi. [1] Jehovha ngaakupindure paunotambudzika; zita raMwari waJakobho ngarikudzivirire. 
Psalms20:2 Ngaakutumire rubatsiro runobva panzvimbo tsvene, uye akupe rutsigiro runobva kuZioni." 
Psalms20:3 	Ngaarangarire zvibayiro zvako zvose uye agogamuchira zvibayiro zvako zvinopiswa. Sera 
Psalms20:4 Ngaakupe zvinodikanwa nomwoyo wako, uye aite kuti urongwa hwako hwose hubudirire." 
Psalms20:5 Tichadanidzira nomufaro pakukunda kwako, uye tichasimudza mireza yedu muzita raMwari wedu. Jehovha ngaakupe zvose zvawakakumbira." 
Psalms20:6 Zvino ndava kuziva kuti Jehovha anoponesa muzodziwa wake; anomupindura ari kudenga rake dzvene, nesimba rokuponesa kworuoko rwake rworudyi." 
Psalms20:7 Vamwe vanovimba nengoro, vamwe namabhiza, asi isu tinovimba nezita raJehovha Mwari wedu." 
Psalms20:8 Vanowisirwa pasi namabvi avo vagowa, asi isu tinosimuka tigomira takasimba." 
Psalms20:9 Haiwa Jehovha, ponesai mambo! Tipindurei patinodana!" 
Psalms21:1 Kumutungamiri wokuimba. Pisarema raDhavhidhi. [1] Haiwa Jehovha, mambo anofara musimba renyu. Mufaro wake mukuru sei pakukunda kwamunomupa!" 
Psalms21:2 	Makamupa zvinodikanwa nomwoyo wake, uye hamuna kumunyima zvaikumbirwa nomuromo wake. Sera" 
Psalms21:3 Makamugamuchira nemikomborero yakapfuma, uye makadzika pamusoro pake korona yegoridhe yakachena." 
Psalms21:4 Akakukumbirai upenyu, mukamupa mazuva mazhinji, nokusingaperi-peri." 
Psalms21:5 Kubudikidza nokukunda kwamakamupa, kukudzwa kwake kukuru; makaisa pamusoro pake kubwinya nokukudzwa." 
Psalms21:6 Zvirokwazvo makamupa maropafadzo anogara nokusingaperi, mukamufadza nomufaro pamberi penyu." 
Psalms21:7 Nokuti mambo anovimba naJehovha; nokuda kworudo rusingaperi rwoWokumusoro-soro, iye haangazungunuswi." 
Psalms21:8 Ruoko rwenyu ruchabata vavengi venyu vose; ruoko rwenyu rworudyi ruchabata vavengi venyu. 
Psalms21:9 Panguva yokuonekwa kwenyu muchavaita sevira romoto. Jehovha achavamedza nehasha dzake, uye moto wake uchavaparadza." 
Psalms21:10 Muchaparadza zvizvarwa zvavo kubva panyika, vana vavo kubva pakati pavanhu." 
Psalms21:11 Kunyange vachirangana zvakaipa pamusoro penyu nokufunga mano akaipa, havangagoni kubudirira;" 
Psalms21:12 nokuti muchaita kuti vafuratire, pamuchavananga nouta hwakavhomorwa." 
Psalms21:13 Simudzirwai, imi Jehovha, musimba renyu; tichaimba uye ticharumbidza simba renyu." 
Psalms22:1 Kumutungamiri wokuimba. Namaimbirwo e“Nondo yamangwanani.” Pisarema raDhavhidhi. [1] Mwari wangu, Mwari wangu, mandisiyireiko? Sei muri kure zvakadai nokundiponesa, kure zvakadai namashoko okugomera kwangu?" 
Psalms22:2 Haiwa Mwari wangu, ndinodanidzira masikati, asi hamundipinduri, nousiku, uye handinyarari." 
Psalms22:3 Asi imi makagadzwa saIye Mutsvene; ndimi rumbidzo yaIsraeri. 
Psalms22:4 Madzibaba edu akavimba nemi; vakavimba, uye mukavarwira." 
Psalms22:5 Vakachema kwamuri, vakaponeswa; vakavimba nemi uye havana kunyadziswa." 
Psalms22:6 Asi ini ndiri honye kwete munhu, ndinozvidzwa navanhu uye ndinoshorwa namarudzi." 
Psalms22:7 Vose vanondiona vanondiseka; vanoshamisa miromo yavo vachindituka, vachidzungudza misoro yavo vachiti," 
Psalms22:8 “Anovimba naJehovha; Jehovha ngaamununure. Ngaamuponese, sezvo achimufarira.”" 
Psalms22:9 Asi ndimi makandibudisa mudumbu; mukaita kuti ndivimbe nemi ndichiri pachipfuva chamai vangu. 
Psalms22:10 Kubva pakuzvarwa kwangu, ndakaiswa kwamuri; kubva mudumbu ramai vangu, makanga muchingova Mwari wangu." 
Psalms22:11 Regai kuva kure neni, nokuti dambudziko riri pedyo uye hakuna angabatsira." 
Psalms22:12 Hando zhinji dzakandikomba; hando dzine simba dzeBhashani dzakandipoteredza. 
Psalms22:13 Shumba dzinoomba dzichibvambura nyama, dzinondishamira miromo yadzo." 
Psalms22:14 Ndadururwa semvura, uye mapfupa angu ose abva asvodogoka. Mwoyo wangu washanduka ukava namo; wanyungudika mukati mangu." 
Psalms22:15 Simba rangu raoma sechaenga, uye rurimi rwangu runonamatira kumusoro kwomuromo wangu; munondiradzika muguruva rorufu." 
Psalms22:16 Imbwa dzakandikomba; boka ravanhu vakaipa rakandipoteredza, vakabvoora maoko angu netsoka dzangu." 
Psalms22:17 Ndinokwanisa kuverenga mapfupa angu ose; vanhu vanondinananidza uye vanofarira kutambudzika kwangu. 
Psalms22:18 Vanogovana nguo dzangu pakati pavo vanokanda mijenya panguo yangu. 
Psalms22:19 Asi imi, Jehovha, regai kuva kure neni; imi simba rangu, kurumidzai kundibatsira." 
Psalms22:20 Rwirai upenyu hwangu pamunondo, ihwo upenyu hwangu hunokosha, kubva pasimba rembwa." 
Psalms22:21 Ndinunurei pamuromo weshumba; ndiponesei panyanga dzenyati. 
Psalms22:22 Ndichaparidza zita renyu kuhama dzangu; ndichakurumbidzai paungano. 
Psalms22:23 Imi munotya Jehovha, murumbidzei! Imi mose zvizvarwa zvaJakobho, mukudzei! Mutyei, imi mose zvizvarwa zvaIsraeri!" 
Psalms22:24 Nokuti haana kuzvidza kana kusema chibayiro chaiye akatambudzwa; haana kumuvanzira chiso chake, asi akanzwa kuchemera kwake rubatsiro." 
Psalms22:25 Kwamuri ndiko kunobva dingindira rerumbidzo yangu paungano huru; ndichazadzisa mhiko dzangu pamberi pavanokutyai. 
Psalms22:26 Varombo vachadya uye vagoguta; vanotsvaka Jehovha vachamurumbidza, mwoyo yenyu ngairarame nokusingaperi!" 
Psalms22:27 Migumo yose yenyika icharangarira igodzokera kuna Jehovha, uye mhuri dzendudzi dzose dzichapfugama pamberi pake," 
Psalms22:28 nokuti ushe ndohwaJehovha uye anotonga pamusoro pendudzi. 
Psalms22:29 Vapfumi vose venyika vachadya uye vachamunamata; vose vanoburukira muguruva vachapfugama pamberi pake, navose vasingagoni kuzviraramisa." 
Psalms22:30 Vana vake vachamushumira; marudzi anotevera achaudzwa nezvaIshe. 
Psalms22:31 Vachaparidza kururama kwake kuvanhu vasati vaberekwa, nokuti akazviita." 
Psalms23:1 Pisarema raDhavhidhi. [1] Jehovha ndiye mufudzi wangu, hapana chandingashayiwa." 
Psalms23:2 Anondivatisa pasi pamafuro manyoro, anondisesedza pamvura inozorodza," 
Psalms23:3 anoponesa mweya wangu. Anondifambisa panzira dzakarurama nokuda kwezita rake. 
Psalms23:4 Kunyange ndikafamba nomumupata womumvuri worufu, handingatyi zvakaipa, nokuti imi muneni; tsvimbo yenyu nomudonzvo wenyu zvinondinyaradza." 
Psalms23:5 Munondigadzirira tafura pamberi pavavengi vangu. Munozodza musoro wangu namafuta; mukombe wangu unopfachukira. 
Psalms23:6 Zvirokwazvo unyoro hwenyu norudo rwenyu zvichanditevera, mazuva ose oupenyu hwangu, uye ndichagara mumba maJehovha nokusingaperi." 
Psalms24:1 Pisarema raDhavhidhi. [1] Nyika ndeyaJehovha, nezvose zviri mairi, nyika, navose vanogaramo;" 
Psalms24:2 nokuti akaiteya pamusoro pamakungwa uye akaisimbisa pamusoro pemvura zhinji. 
Psalms24:3 Ndianiko angakwira pachikomo chaJehovha? Ndianiko angamira panzvimbo yake tsvene? 
Psalms24:4 Uyo ana maoko akachena nomwoyo wakanaka, asingasimudziri mwoyo wake kuzvifananidzo, kana kupika nhema." 
Psalms24:5 Iye achagamuchira mukomborero unobva kuna Jehovha nokururamiswa kunobva kuna Mwari woruponeso rwake. 
Psalms24:6 	Ivava ndivo rudzi rwaavo vanomutsvaka, ivo vanotsvaka chiso chenyu, imi Mwari waJakobho. Sera" 
Psalms24:7 Simudzai misoro yenyu, imi masuo; musimudzwe, imi makonhi akare, kuti Mambo wokubwinya apinde." 
Psalms24:8 Ndianiko uyu Mambo wokubwinya? Ndiye Jehovha ane simba noumhare, Jehovha ane simba pakurwa." 
Psalms24:9 Simudzai misoro yenyu, imi masuo; muasimudze, imi makonhi akare, kuti Mambo wokubwinya apinde." 
Psalms24:10 	Ndianiko, uyu Mambo wokubwinya? Jehovha Wamasimba Ose, ndiye Mambo wokubwinya. Sera" 
Psalms25:1 Pisarema raDhavhidhi. [1] Jehovha, ndinosimudzira mwoyo wangu kwamuri;" 
Psalms25:2 haiwa Mwari wangu, ndinovimba nemi. Musandirega ndichinyadziswa, uye musarega vavengi vangu vachindikunda." 
Psalms25:3 Hapana munhu ane tariro mamuri achanyadziswa, asi vachanyadziswa avo vanonyengera pasina chikonzero." 
Psalms25:4 Ndiratidzei nzira dzenyu, imi Jehovha, ndidzidzisei nzira dzenyu;" 
Psalms25:5 nditungamirirei muzvokwadi yenyu mugondidzidzisa, nokuti ndimi Mwari Muponesi wangu, uye tariro yangu iri pamuri zuva rose." 
Psalms25:6 Rangarirai, imi Jehovha, ngoni dzenyu huru norudo, nokuti zvakabvira kare." 
Psalms25:7 Regai kurangarira zvivi zvouduku hwangu, nenzira dzangu dzandaikumukirai nadzo; ndirangarirei nokuda kworudo rwenyu, nokuti makanaka, imi Jehovha." 
Psalms25:8 Jehovha akanaka uye akarurama; naizvozvo anodzidzisa vatadzi nzira dzake. 
Psalms25:9 Anotungamirira vanozvininipisa mune zvakarurama, uye anovadzidzisa nzira yake." 
Psalms25:10 Nzira dzose dzaJehovha ndedzorudo nokutendeka, kuna avo vanochengeta zvirevo zvesungano yake." 
Psalms25:11 Nokuda kwezita renyu, imi Jehovha, kanganwirai chakaipa changu, kunyange chiri chikuru." 
Psalms25:12 Ndiani, zvino, munhu anotya Jehovha? Achamudzidzisa nzira yaakasarudzirwa." 
Psalms25:13 Achararama upenyu hwake mukubudirira, uye zvizvarwa zvake zvichagara nhaka yenyika." 
Psalms25:14 Jehovha anogara pakati pavanomutya; anozivisa sungano yake kwavari. 
Psalms25:15 Meso angu anoramba achitarira kuna Jehovha, nokuti ndiye chete anosunungura tsoka dzangu pamusungo." 
Psalms25:16 Dzokerai kwandiri uye mundinzwire nyasha, nokuti ndiri ndoga uye ndinotambudzika." 
Psalms25:17 Matambudziko omwoyo wangu awanda; ndisunungurei pakurwadziwa kwangu. 
Psalms25:18 Tarirai kutambudzika kwangu nenhamo yangu, mugobvisa zvivi zvangu zvose." 
Psalms25:19 Tarirai kuwanda kwaita vavengi vangu, uye kuti vanondivenga zvakakura sei!" 
Psalms25:20 Rindai upenyu hwangu mugondinunura; ndirege kunyadziswa, nokuti ndinovanda mamuri." 
Psalms25:21 Kusanyengera nokururama ngazvindichengete, nokuti tariro yangu iri mamuri." 
Psalms25:22 Dzikinurai Israeri, imi Mwari, kuti vabve mumatambudziko avo ose!" 
Psalms26:1 Pisarema raDhavhidhi. [1] Nditongerei, imi Jehovha, nokuti ndakararama upenyu husina chahungapomerwa; ndakavimba naJehovha ndisingazungunuki." 
Psalms26:2 Ndiedzei, imi Jehovha, ndinzverei, nzverai mwoyo wangu nendangariro dzangu;" 
Psalms26:3 nokuti rudo rwenyu rwuri pamberi pangu nguva dzose, uye ndinogara ndichifamba muzvokwadi yenyu." 
Psalms26:4 Handigari navanhu vanonyengera, kana kufambidzana navanyengeri;" 
Psalms26:5 ndinovenga ungano yavaiti vezvakaipa, uye ndinoramba kugara navakaipa." 
Psalms26:6 Ndinoshamba maoko angu ndisina mhaka, uye ndinofamba-famba paaritari yenyu, imi Jehovha," 
Psalms26:7 ndichiparidza rumbidzo yenyu nenzwi guru, nokureva zvamabasa enyu ose anoshamisa." 
Psalms26:8 Ndinoda imba yamunogara, imi Jehovha, nzvimbo inogara kubwinya kwenyu." 
Psalms26:9 Regai kubatanidza mweya wangu navatadzi, noupenyu hwangu navanoteura ropa," 
Psalms26:10 vana maoko akabata zvakaipa, vazere nefufuro mumaoko avo orudyi." 
Psalms26:11 Asi ini ndinogara upenyu husina chahungapomerwa; ndidzikinurei uye mundinzwire ngoni. 
Psalms26:12 Tsoka dzangu dzimire pakati chechetere; ndicharumbidza Jehovha paungano huru. 
Psalms27:1 Pisarema raDhavhidhi. [1] Jehovha ndiye chiedza changu noruponeso rwangu, ndichagotya aniko? Jehovha ndiye nhare youpenyu hwangu, ndianiko wandingatya?" 
Psalms27:2 Vanhu vakaipa pavakauya kwandiri kuzodya nyama yangu, vavengi navadzivisi vangu pavanondirwisa, vanogumburwa ndokuwa." 
Psalms27:3 Kunyange hondo ikandikomba, mwoyo wangu haungazotyi; kunyange hondo ikamuka kuzondirwisa, ipapo ndichavimba naJehovha." 
Psalms27:4 Chinhu chimwe chete chandinokumbira kuna Jehovha, ndicho chandinotsvaka: kuti ndigare mumba maJehovha mazuva ose oupenyu hwangu, kuti nditarire kunaka kwaJehovha uye ndimutsvake mutemberi yake." 
Psalms27:5 Nokuti zuva rokutambudzika achandichengeta zvakanaka munzvimbo yaanogara; achandiviga mudumba retabhenakeri yake, agondikwidza pamusoro pedombo." 
Psalms27:6 Ipapo musoro wangu uchasimudzirwa pamusoro pavavengi vakandipoteredza; ndichamubayira zvibayiro patabhenakeri yake nomufaro mukuru; ndichaimba ndigoimbira Jehovha nziyo. 
Psalms27:7 Inzwai inzwi rangu kana ndichidana, imi Jehovha; ndinzwirei ngoni mugondipindura." 
Psalms27:8 Mwoyo wangu unoti kwandiri, “Tsvaka chiso chake!” Chiso chenyu, Jehovha, ndichachitsvaka." 
Psalms27:9 Regai kundivanzira chiso chenyu, musadzinga muranda wenyu mukutsamwa; makanga muri mubatsiri wangu. Regai kundiramba kana kundisiya, imi Mwari Muponesi wangu." 
Psalms27:10 Kunyange baba vangu namai vangu vakandisiya, Jehovha achandigamuchira." 
Psalms27:11 Ndidzidzisei nzira yenyu, imi Jehovha; ndisesedzei munzira yakarurama nokuda kwavamanikidzi vangu." 
Psalms27:12 Regai kundisundira kuzvido zvavavengi vangu, nokuti zvapupu zvenhema zvinondimukira, vachifemedzeka nehasha." 
Psalms27:13 Ndichine chokwadi neizvi zvokuti: ndichaona kunaka kwaJehovha munyika yavapenyu. 
Psalms27:14 Rindira Jehovha; iva nesimba, utsunge mwoyo ugomirira Jehovha." 
Psalms28:1 Pisarema raDhavhidhi. [1] Ndinodana kwamuri, imi Jehovha Dombo rangu; musandinyararira. Nokuti kana mukaramba munyerere, ini ndichaita savaya vakaburukira kugomba." 
Psalms28:2 Inzwai kuchemera ngoni kwangu, sezvo ndichichemera rubatsiro kwamuri, sezvo ndichisimudza maoko angu ndakatarira kunzvimbo yenyu Tsvenetsvene." 
Psalms28:3 Musandikwekweredzera kure pamwe chete navakaipa, naavo vanoita zvakaipa, vanotaura rugare navavakidzani vavo asi vakaviga zvakaipa mumwoyo yavo." 
Psalms28:4 Vatsivei pamabasa avo napabasa ravo rakaipa, vatsivei pane zvakaitwa namaoko avo; mugodzosera pamusoro pavo zvakavafanira." 
Psalms28:5 Sezvo vasina hanya namabasa aJehovha uye nezvakaitwa namaoko ake, achavaputsira pasi akasavavakazve." 
Psalms28:6 Jehovha ngaarumbidzwe, nokuti akanzwa kuchemera kwangu ngoni." 
Psalms28:7 Jehovha ndiye simba rangu nenhoo yangu; mwoyo wangu unovimba naye, uye ndinobatsirwa. Mwoyo wangu unokwakuka nomufaro uye ndichamuvonga nenziyo." 
Psalms28:8 Jehovha ndiye simba ravanhu vake, nhare yoruponeso yomuzodziwa wake." 
Psalms28:9 Ponesai vanhu venyu uye muropafadze nhaka yenyu; ivai mufudzi wavo uye muvatakure nokusingaperi. 
Psalms29:1 Pisarema raDhavhidhi. [1] Ipai kuna Jehovha, imi mune simba ipai kuna Jehovha rukudzo nesimba." 
Psalms29:2 Ipai kuna Jehovha rukudzo rwakafanira zita rake; namatai Jehovha mukubwinya kwoutsvene hwake. 
Psalms29:3 Inzwi raJehovha riri pamusoro pemvura zhinji. Mwari wokubwinya anotinhira, Jehovha anotinhira ari pamusoro pemvura zhinji." 
Psalms29:4 Inzwi raJehovha rine simba; inzwi raJehovha rinokudzwa. 
Psalms29:5 Inzwi raJehovha rinovhuna misidhari, Jehovha anovhunavhuna misidhari yeRebhanoni." 
Psalms29:6 Anoita kuti Rebhanoni ikwakuke semhuru, neSirioni senzombe yenyati." 
Psalms29:7 Inzwi raJehovha rinorova nokuvaima kwemheni. 
Psalms29:8 Inzwi raJehovha rinozungunusa gwenga; Jehovha anozungunusa Gwenga reKadheshi. 
Psalms29:9 Inzwi raJehovha rinomonyorora miouki uye rinosvuura sango rigosara rati hwe-e. Uye mutemberi yake zvose zvinodana zvichiti, “Kubwinya!”" 
Psalms29:10 Jehovha anogara pachigaro choushe chamafashamu emvura; Jehovha anogara ari Mambo nokusingaperi. 
Psalms29:11 Jehovha anopa simba kuvanhu vake; Jehovha anoropafadza vanhu vake norugare. 
Psalms30:1 Pisarema. Rwiyo rwokukumikidza temberi. Pisarema raDhavhidhi. [1] Ndichakukudzai imi Jehovha, nokuti makandisimudza kubva pakadzika, uye hamuna kutendera vavengi vangu kuti vafare pamusoro pangu." 
Psalms30:2 Haiwa Jehovha Mwari wangu, ndakachemera rubatsiro kwamuri uye mukandiporesa." 
Psalms30:3 Haiwa Jehovha, makandibudisa muguva; mukandirwira kuti ndirege kupinda mugomba." 
Psalms30:4 Imbirai Jehovha imi vatsvene vake; rumbidza zita rake dzvene. 
Psalms30:5 Nokuti kutsamwa kwake ndokwenguva duku, asi nyasha dzake ndedzoupenyu hwose; kuchema kungangovapo usiku. Asi mufaro unouya mangwanani." 
Psalms30:6 Pandakanzwa kugadzikana, ndakati, “Handingatongozungunuswi.”" 
Psalms30:7 Haiwa Jehovha, pamakandinzwira tsitsi, makaita kuti gomo rangu rimire rakasimba; asi pamakavanza chiso chenyu, ini ndakavhunduka." 
Psalms30:8 Ndakadana kwamuri, imi Jehovha; ndakachemera nyasha kuna Jehovha ndichiti," 
Psalms30:9 “Chiiko chinowanikwa pakuparadzwa kwangu, napakupinda kwangu mugomba? Ko, guruva richakurumbidzai here? Richaparidza kutendeka kwenyu here?" 
Psalms30:10 Inzwai, imi Jehovha, mundinzwire ngoni; imi Jehovha, ivai mubatsiri wangu.”" 
Psalms30:11 Imi makashandura kuungudza kwangu kukava kutamba; makabvisa nguo dzangu dzamasaga mukandishongedza nomufaro," 
Psalms30:12 kuti mwoyo wangu ukuimbirei ugorega kunyarara. Haiwa Jehovha Mwari wangu, ndichakuvongai nokusingaperi." 
Psalms31:1 Kumutungamiri wokuimba. Pisarema raDhavhidhi. [1] Ndinovanda mamuri, imi Jehovha; itai kuti ndisatombonyadziswa; ndirwirei mukururama kwenyu." 
Psalms31:2 Rerekerai nzeve yenyu kwandiri, kurumidzai kundinunura; ivai dombo rangu rokuvanda, nhare yakasimba inondiponesa." 
Psalms31:3 Sezvo murimi dombo rangu nenhare yangu, nditungamirirei uye mundisesedze nokuda kwezita renyu." 
Psalms31:4 Ndisunungurei pamusungo wandakadzikirwa, nokuti imi muri utiziro hwangu." 
Psalms31:5 Ndinoisa mweya wangu mumaoko enyu; ndidzikinurei, imi Jehovha, Mwari wechokwadi." 
Psalms31:6 Ndinovenga vanonamatira kuzvifananidzo zvisina maturo; ndinovimba naJehovha. 
Psalms31:7 Ndichafara nokufarisisa murudo rwenyu, nokuti makaona kutambudzika kwangu mukaziva kurwadziwa kwomwoyo wangu." 
Psalms31:8 Hamuna kundiisa kumuvengi, asi makamisa tsoka dzangu panzvimbo yakafarikana." 
Psalms31:9 Haiwa Jehovha, ndinzwirei ngoni nokuti ndine nhamo; meso angu aneta nokuchema, mwoyo wangu nomuviri wangu zvarwadziwa." 
Psalms31:10 Upenyu hwangu hwopera nokurwadziwa, uye namakore angu nokugomera; simba rangu rapera nokuda kwokutambudzika kwangu, uye mapfupa angu arukutika." 
Psalms31:11 Nokuda kwavavengi vangu, ndava chinhu chinovengwa navavakidzani vangu; ndava chinhu chinotyisa kushamwari dzangu; vanondiona munzira dzomumisha vanonditiza." 
Psalms31:12 Ndakanganwikwa navo sendakafa; ndafanana nehari yakaputsika," 
Psalms31:13 nokuti ndinonzwa guhwa ravazhinji; kumativi ose kune zvinotyisa; vanorangana pamusoro pangu uye vanoronga kundiuraya. 
Psalms31:14 Asi ndinovimba nemi, imi Jehovha; ndinoti, “Ndimi Mwari wangu.”" 
Psalms31:15 Nguva dzangu dziri mumaoko enyu; ndirwirei kuvavengi vangu nokuna avo vanonditeverera. 
Psalms31:16 Chiso chenyu ngachipenye pamusoro pomuranda wenyu; ndiponesei norudo rwenyu rusingaperi. 
Psalms31:17 Haiwa Jehovha, itai kuti ndisanyadziswa, nokuti ndakadana kwamuri; asi vakaipa ngavanyadziswe uye vavate vakati mwiro muguva." 
Psalms31:18 Miromo yavo inoreva nhema ngainyaradzwe, nokuti vanotaura namanyawi nokuzvikudza pamusoro pavakarurama." 
Psalms31:19 Haiwa, kunaka kwenyu kukuru sei, kwamakachengetera vaya vanokutyai, kwamunoisa pamberi pavanhu, pamusoro paivo vanovanda mamuri." 
Psalms31:20 Mudumba pamberi penyu munovavanza kubva parangano dzavanhu; munovachengeta zvakanaka pamunogara kubva pandimi dzinopomera. 
Psalms31:21 Jehovha ngaarumbidzwe, nokuti akaratidza rudo rwake runoshamisa kwandiri pandakanga ndiri muguta rakakombwa." 
Psalms31:22 Mukuvhunduka kwangu, ndakati, “Ndabviswa pamberi penyu!” Asi makanzwa kuchemera nyasha kwangu pandakadanidzira kwamuri ndichida rubatsiro." 
Psalms31:23 Idai Jehovha, imi vatsvene mose! Jehovha anochengetedza vakatendeka, asi anotsiva zvizere vanozvikudza." 
Psalms31:24 Simbai uye mutsunge mwoyo, imi mose munorindira Jehovha." 
Psalms32:1 Pisarema raDhavhidhi neMasikiri. [1] Akaropafadzwa uyo akakanganwirwa kudarika kwake, akafukidzirwa zvivi zvake." 
Psalms32:2 Akaropafadzwa munhu asingaverengerwi zvivi zvake naJehovha, uye asina kunyengera mumwoyo make." 
Psalms32:3 Pandakanyarara, mapfupa angu akarukutika nokuda kwokugomera kwangu zuva rose." 
Psalms32:4 	Nokuti masikati nousiku ruoko rwenyu rwakanga ruchirema pamusoro pangu; simba rangu rakasvetwa sezvinoita kupisa kwechirimo. Sera 
Psalms32:5 	Ipapo ndakazivisa chivi changu kwamuri uye handina kuvanza chakaipa changu. Ndakati, “Ndichareurura kudarika kwangu kuna Jehovha,” uye makandiregerera mhosva yechivi changu. Sera" 
Psalms32:6 Naizvozvo vose vanoda Mwari ngavanyengetere kwamuri muchiri kuwanikwa; zvirokwazvo mvura zhinji ine simba painokwira, haingasviki kwaari." 
Psalms32:7 	Ndimi nzvimbo yangu yokuvanda; muchandidzivirira panhamo uye muchandipoteredza nenziyo dzorusununguko. Sera 
Psalms32:8 Ndichakurairidza uye ndichakudzidzisa nzira yaunofanira kufamba nayo; ndichakupa zano uye ndichakurinda. 
Psalms32:9 Rega kuva sebhiza kana sehesera, zvisinganzwisisi asi zvinofanira kupingudzwa nomukaro kana namatomu, kana kuti hazvingauyi kwauri." 
Psalms32:10 Wakaipa ana matambudziko mazhinji, asi rudo rusingaperi rwaJehovha runopoteredza munhu anovimba naye." 
Psalms32:11 Farai muna Jehovha uye mufarisise, imi vakarurama; imbai, imi mose makarurama pamwoyo!" 
Psalms33:1 Imbirai Jehovha, mufarisise, imi vakarurama; zvakanaka kuti vakarurama vamurumbidze." 
Psalms33:2 Rumbidzai Jehovha nembira; muimbirei nziyo nomutengeranwa une hungiso gumi. 
Psalms33:3 Muimbirei rwiyo rutsva; muridze zvakanaka, mugopururudza nomufaro." 
Psalms33:4 Nokuti shoko raJehovha rakarurama uye nderechokwadi; iye akatendeka pane zvose zvaanoita. 
Psalms33:5 Jehovha anoda kururama nokururamisira; nyika izere norudo rwake rusingaperi. 
Psalms33:6 Kudenga denga kwakaitwa neshoko raJehovha, hondo dzenyeredzi dzoko, nokufema kwomuromo wake." 
Psalms33:7 Anounganidza mvura zhinji yegungwa muzvirongo; anoisa kwakadzika mumatura. 
Psalms33:8 Nyika yose ngaitye Jehovha; marudzi ose enyika ngaamuremekedze. 
Psalms33:9 Nokuti iye akataura, zvikaitika; akarayira, zvikamira zvakasimba." 
Psalms33:10 Jehovha anokonesa urongwa hwendudzi; anopinganidza mifungo yendudzi. 
Psalms33:11 Asi urongwa hwaJehovha hunomira hwakasimba nokusingaperi, nendangariro dzomwoyo wake kusvikira kumarudzi namarudzi." 
Psalms33:12 Rwakaropafadzwa rudzi rwakaita Jehovha Mwari warwo, vanhu vaakasarudza kuti vave nhaka yake." 
Psalms33:13 Jehovha anotarira pasi ari kudenga uye anoona marudzi ose avanhu; 
Psalms33:14 ari pachigaro chake anotarira vose vagere panyika," 
Psalms33:15 iye akaumba mwoyo yavose, anofungisisa zvose zvavanoita." 
Psalms33:16 Hapana mambo anoponeswa nokukura kwehondo yake; hapana murwi anopunyuka nokuda kwesimba rake guru. 
Psalms33:17 Bhiza itariro isina maturo pakurwirwa; harigoni kuponesa kunyange rine simba guru. 
Psalms33:18 Asi meso aJehovha ari pamusoro paavo vanomutya, napamusoro paavo vakaisa tariro yavo murudo rwake rusingaperi," 
Psalms33:19 kuti avarwire parufu nokuvararamisa panzara. 
Psalms33:20 Tinomirira Jehovha netariro; ndiye mubatsiri wedu nenhoo yedu. 
Psalms33:21 Mwoyo yedu inofara maari, nokuti tinovimba nezita rake dzvene." 
Psalms33:22 Rudo rwenyu rusingaperi ngarugare pamusoro pedu, imi Jehovha, kunyange sezvatakaisa tariro yedu mamuri." 
Psalms34:1 Pisarema raDhavhidhi. Paakaita seanopenga pamberi paAbhimereki; uyo akamudzinga, iye akaenda hake. [1] Ndinorumbidza Jehovha nguva dzose; kurumbidzwa kwake kucharamba kuri pamiromo yangu." 
Psalms34:2 Mwoyo wangu uchazvirumbidza muna Jehovha; vanotambudzika ngavanzwe vafare. 
Psalms34:3 Kudzai Jehovha pamwe chete neni; ngatikudzei zita rake pamwe chete. 
Psalms34:4 Ndakachema kuna Jehovha akandipindura; akandisunungura pakutya kwangu kwose. 
Psalms34:5 Vanotarira kwaari vanopenya; zviso zvavo hazvingambofukidzwi nenyadzi. 
Psalms34:6 Murombo uyu akadana, uye Jehovha akamunzwa; akamuponesa pakutambudzika kwake kwose." 
Psalms34:7 Mutumwa waJehovha anokomberedza avo vanomutya, uye anovasunungura." 
Psalms34:8 Ravirai henyu muone kuti Jehovha akanaka; akaropafadzwa munhu anovanda maari. 
Psalms34:9 Ityai Jehovha, imi vatsvene vake, nokuti vanomutya havana chavanoshayiwa." 
Psalms34:10 Shumba dzinopera simba uye dzinofa nenzara, asi avo vanotsvaka Jehovha havashayiwi chinhu chakanaka." 
Psalms34:11 Uyai, vana vangu, nditeererei; ndichakudzidzisai kutya Jehovha." 
Psalms34:12 Ani naani wenyu anoda upenyu, uye uchida kuona mazuva akawanda," 
Psalms34:13 dzora rurimi rwako pane zvakaipa nemiromo yako pakureva nhema. 
Psalms34:14 Ibva pane zvakaipa ugoita zvakanaka; tsvaka rugare uye urutevere. 
Psalms34:15 Meso aJehovha ari pamusoro pavakarurama uye nzeve dzake dzinonzwa kuchema kwavo; 
Psalms34:16 chiso chaJehovha chinovenga avo vanoita zvakaipa, kuti abvise chiyeuchidzo chavo panyika." 
Psalms34:17 Vakarurama vanodanidzira, uye Jehovha anovanzwa; anovarwira pakutambudzika kwavo kwose." 
Psalms34:18 Jehovha ari pedyo navane mwoyo yakaputsika uye anoponesa avo vakapwanyika pamweya. 
Psalms34:19 Akarurama angava namatambudziko mazhinji, asi Jehovha anomurwira paari ose;" 
Psalms34:20 anochengetedza mapfupa ake ose, hakuna nerimwe rawo richavhunika." 
Psalms34:21 Zvakaipa zvichauraya vakaipa; vavengi vavakarurama vachapiwa mhosva. 
Psalms34:22 Jehovha anodzikinura varanda vake; hapana kana mumwe anovanda maari achapiwa mhosva. 
Psalms35:1 Pisarema raDhavhidhi. [1] Haiwa Jehovha, kakavadzanai navanokakavadzana neni; rwisai avo vanondirwisa." 
Psalms35:2 Torai nhoo huru neduku; simukai, uye uyai mundibatsire." 
Psalms35:3 Vheyesai pfumo guru nepfumo diki murwise avo vanonditevera. Muti kumweya wangu, “Ndini ruponeso rwako.”" 
Psalms35:4 Vanotsvaka kundiuraya ngavazvidzwe uye vanyadziswe; vanorangana kuparadzwa kwangu ngavadzoserwe shure vachitya. 
Psalms35:5 Ngavaite sehundi pamberi pemhepo, mutumwa waJehovha achivasundira kure;" 
Psalms35:6 nzira yavo ngaisvibe uye itsvedze, mutumwa waJehovha achivateverera." 
Psalms35:7 Sezvo vakandivanzira mimbure yavo ndisina mhosva, uye vakandicherera gomba ndisina mhosva," 
Psalms35:8 kuparadzwa ngakuvawire pakarepo, mumbure wavakavanza ngauvapinge ivo, ngavawire mugomba ravo vaparare." 
Psalms35:9 Ipapo mweya wangu uchafara muna Jehovha, uye uchafarira ruponeso rwake." 
Psalms35:10 Zvandiri zvose zvichadanidzira zvichiti: “Ndianiko akaita semi, Jehovha? Munonunura varombo kubva kuna avo vane simba kupinda ravo.”" 
Psalms35:11 Zvapupu zvino utsinye zvinouya mberi; zvinondibvunza pamusoro pezvinhu zvandisingazivi. 
Psalms35:12 Vanotsiva zvakanaka zvangu nezvakaipa, uye vanosiya mweya wangu uchidzungaira." 
Psalms35:13 Asi pavairwara, ndakafuka nguo dzamasaga ndikazvininipisa nokutsanya. Munyengetero wangu pawakadzokera kwandiri usina mhinduro," 
Psalms35:14 ndakafamba-famba ndichichema kunge ndinochemera shamwari yangu kana hama yangu. Ndakakotamisa musoro wangu ndichichema, sokunge ndinochema mai vangu." 
Psalms35:15 Asi pandakagumburwa, vakaungana vachifara; varwi vakaungana kuzondirwisa ndisingazivi. Vakandireva vasingaregi." 
Psalms35:16 Savanhu vasina Mwari vakandiseka muruvengo rwavo; vakandirumanyira meno avo. 
Psalms35:17 Haiwa Jehovha, muchasvika riniko makangotarira? nunurai upenyu hwangu kubva pakuparadza kwavo, noupenyu hwangu hunokosha kubva pashumba idzi." 
Psalms35:18 Ndichakuvongai paungano huru; ndichakurumbidzai pakati pavanhu vazhinji. 
Psalms35:19 Ngavarege kufara pamusoro pangu avo vanondivenga ndisina mhosva; vanondivenga ndisina mhosva ngavarege kuchonyerana meso avo mukundivenga. 
Psalms35:20 Havatauri norugare, asi vanofunga kupomera mhosva pamusoro pavanogara norunyararo munyika." 
Psalms35:21 Vanondishamira miromo yavo vachiti, “Hekani waro! Hekani waro! Tazviona nameso edu.”" 
Psalms35:22 Haiwa Jehovha, mazviona izvi; regai kunyarara. Regai kuva kure neni, imi Ishe." 
Psalms35:23 Mukai uye simukai mundirwire! Ndirwirei, Mwari wangu naIshe wangu." 
Psalms35:24 Ndiruramisirei mukururama kwenyu, imi Jehovha Mwari wangu; musarega vachifara pamusoro pangu." 
Psalms35:25 Musarega vachifunga mumwoyo mavo vachiti, “Hekani waro ndizvo zvatanga tichida!” kana kuti vati, “Tamumedza chose.”" 
Psalms35:26 Vose vanofarira kutambudzika kwangu ngavanyadziswe uye vanyonganiswe; vose vanozvisimudzira pamusoro pangu ngavafukidzwe nenyadzi nokuzvidzwa. 
Psalms35:27 Vose vanofarira kururamisirwa kwangu ngavapembere nomufaro nokufarisisa; ngavarambe vachiti, “Jehovha ngaakudzwe, iye anofarira kugara zvakanaka kwavaranda vake.”" 
Psalms35:28 Rurimi rwangu ruchataura zvokururama kwenyu, uye nezvokurumbidzwa kwenyu zuva rose." 
Psalms36:1 Kumutungamiri wokuimba. Pisarema raDhavhidhi muranda waJehovha. [1] Shoko riri mumwoyo mangu pamusoro pokutadza kwavakaipa rinoti: Hakuna kutya Mwari pamberi pake. 
Psalms36:2 Pamaonero ake anozvirumbidza, nokuti anozvibata kumeso kwazvo pakuona kwake, zvokuti anotadza kuona kana kuvenga chivi chake." 
Psalms36:3 Mashoko omuromo wake akaipa uye anonyengera; haachisiri munhu akachenjera kana anoita zvakanaka. 
Psalms36:4 Kunyange panhoo yake anofunga zvakaipa; anozvifambisa panzira yezvakaipa uye haarambi chakaipa. 
Psalms36:5 Rudo rwenyu, imi Jehovha, runosvika kudenga denga, kutendeka kwenyu kunosvika kumakore." 
Psalms36:6 Kururama kwenyu kwakaita segomo guru guru, kururamisira kwenyu sepakadzika dzika. Haiwa Jehovha, imi munochengetedza zvose munhu nemhuka." 
Psalms36:7 Haiwa rudo rwenyu rusingatongoperi runokosha sei! Vose vakuru navaduku pakati pavanhu vanovanda mumumvuri wamapapiro enyu. 
Psalms36:8 Vanogutswa nezvakawanda zvomumba menyu; munovanwisa kubva parwizi rwenyu runofadza. 
Psalms36:9 Nokuti kwamuri ndiko kune chitubu choupenyu; muchiedza chenyu tinoona chiedza. 
Psalms36:10 Rambai muchiitira rudo kuna avo vanokuzivai, uye kururama kwenyu kuna vane mwoyo yakarurama." 
Psalms36:11 Rutsoka rwounozvikudza ngarurege kusvika kwandiri, kunyange ruoko rwowakaipa ngarurege kundidzingira kure." 
Psalms36:12 Tarirai vaiti vezvakaipa kuti vawa sei, vakandwa pasi, havagoni kumuka." 
Psalms37:1 Pisarema raDhavhidhi. [1] Usava neshungu nokuda kwavanhu vakaipa, uye usaitira godo avo vanoita zvakaipa;" 
Psalms37:2 nokuti souswa vachaoma nokukurumidza, somuriwo wakasvibira vachakurumidza kuoma." 
Psalms37:3 Vimba naJehovha uite zvakanaka; gara panyika ufarikane pamafuro manyoro. 
Psalms37:4 Farikana muna Jehovha, uye iye achakupa zvinodikanwa nomwoyo wako." 
Psalms37:5 Isa nzira yako kuna Jehovha; uvimbe naye uye iye achaita izvi; 
Psalms37:6 achaita kuti kururama kwako kupenye samambakwedza, nokururamisirwa kwako sezuva ramasikati." 
Psalms37:7 Nyarara pamberi paJehovha, umurindire unyerere; usava neshungu kana vanhu vachibudirira panzira dzavo, pavanoita mano avo akaipa avakaronga." 
Psalms37:8 Rega kutsamwa, uzvidzore pahasha; usava neshungu zvinokutungamirira mune zvakaipa." 
Psalms37:9 Nokuti vasakarurama vachagurwa, asi avo vanomirira Jehovha vachagara nhaka yenyika." 
Psalms37:10 Chinguva chidukuduku, vakaipa havachazovapozve; kunyange ukavatsvaka, havazowanikwi." 
Psalms37:11 Asi vanyoro vachagara nhaka yenyika, uye vachafarikana norugare rukuru." 
Psalms37:12 Vakaipa vanofungira vakarurama mano akaipa, uye vanovarumanyira meno avo." 
Psalms37:13 Asi Ishe anoseka vakaipa nokuti anoziva kuti zuva ravo riri kuuya. 
Psalms37:14 Vakaipa vanovhomora munondo uye vanowembura uta kuti vawisire pasi varombo navanoshayiwa, kuti vauraye avo vane nzira dzakarurama." 
Psalms37:15 Asi minondo yavo ichabaya mwoyo yavo pachavo, uye uta hwavo huchavhunika." 
Psalms37:16 Zvishoma zvowakarurama zviri nani kupinda pfuma yavakaipa vazhinji; 
Psalms37:17 nokuti simba ravakaipa richavhuniwa, asi Jehovha anotsigira vakarurama." 
Psalms37:18 Mazuva avakarurama anozivikanwa naJehovha, uye nhaka yavo ichagara nokusingaperi." 
Psalms37:19 Panguva yenjodzi, havanganyadziswi; mumazuva enzara ivo vachava nezvakawanda." 
Psalms37:20 Asi vakaipa vachaparara: vavengi vaJehovha vachafanana norunako rweminda, vachanyangarika soutsi." 
Psalms37:21 Vakaipa vanokwereta uye havadzori, asi vakarurama vanopa zvakawanda;" 
Psalms37:22 avo vanoropafadzwa naJehovha vachagara nhaka yenyika, asi avo vanotuka vachaparadzwa." 
Psalms37:23 Kana Jehovha achifarira nzira yomunhu, anosimbisa mafambiro ake;" 
Psalms37:24 kunyange akagumburwa, haangawi, nokuti Jehovha anomutsigira noruoko rwake." 
Psalms37:25 Ndakanga ndiri muduku uye zvino ndakwegura, asi handina kumboona vakarurama vachisiyiwa, kana vana vavo vachipemha chingwa." 
Psalms37:26 Vanogara vachingopa vamwe, uye vachikweretesa pasina muripo; vana vavo vacharopafadzwa." 
Psalms37:27 Dzoka pane zvakaipa ugoita zvakanaka; ipapo uchagara panyika nokusingaperi. 
Psalms37:28 Nokuti Jehovha anoda vanoruramisira uye haangazosiyi vanhu vake vakatendeka. Vachadzivirirwa nokusingaperi; asi vana vowakaipa vachaparadzwa; 
Psalms37:29 vakarurama vachagara nhaka yenyika uye vachagara mairi nokusingaperi. 
Psalms37:30 Muromo womunhu akarurama unotaura uchenjeri, uye rurimi rwake runotaura kururamisira." 
Psalms37:31 Murayiro waMwari wake uri pamwoyo wake; tsoka dzake hadzitedzemuki. 
Psalms37:32 Vakaipa vanovandira vakarurama, vachitsvaka upenyu hwavo chaihwo;" 
Psalms37:33 asi Jehovha haangavasiyi vari musimba ravo, kana kuvarega vachipomerwa kana vamira pakutongwa." 
Psalms37:34 Rindira Jehovha, uye uchengete nzira yake. Achakusimudzira kuti ugare nhaka yenyika; kana vakaipa voparadzwa, iwe uchazviona." 
Psalms37:35 Ndakaona munhu akaipa uye ano utsinye achibudirira somuti munyoro pavhu romunyika yawo," 
Psalms37:36 asi nokukurumidza akapfuura uye akasazovapozve; kunyange ndakamutsvaka, haana kuzowanikwa." 
Psalms37:37 Cherechedza asina mhosva, ongorora akarurama; ane ramangwana rakanaka munhu worugare." 
Psalms37:38 Asi vatadzi vose vachaparadzwa; ramangwana rowakaipa richagurwa. 
Psalms37:39 Ruponeso rwavakarurama runobva kuna Jehovha; ndiye nhare yavo panguva yamatambudziko. 
Psalms37:40 Jehovha anovabatsira uye anovanunura; anovanunura kubva kuna vakaipa uye anovaponesa, nokuti vanovanda maari." 
Psalms38:1 Pisarema raDhavhidhi. Chikumbiro. [1] Haiwa Jehovha, musandirayira mukutsamwa kwenyu kana kundiranga muhasha dzenyu." 
Psalms38:2 Nokuti miseve yenyu yandibaya, uye ruoko rwenyu rwawira pamusoro pangu." 
Psalms38:3 Mumuviri mangu hamuchina utano nokuda kwehasha dzenyu; mapfupa angu apera simba nokuda kwechivi changu. 
Psalms38:4 Mhosva yangu yandiremera somutoro unorema kwazvo kuutakura. 
Psalms38:5 Maronda angu aora uye anosemesa nokuda kwoupenzi hwokutadza kwangu. 
Psalms38:6 Ndakotamiswa uye ndaderedzwa kwazvo; ndinofamba ndichichema zuva rose. 
Psalms38:7 Musana wangu wazara nokupisa kunorwadza; muviri wangu hauchina utano. 
Psalms38:8 Ndarukutika uye ndapwanyika chose; ndiri kugomera nokurwadza kwomwoyo. 
Psalms38:9 Haiwa Ishe, zvose zvandinoshuva zviri pachena pamberi penyu, kugomera kwangu hakuna kuvanzika kwamuri." 
Psalms38:10 Hana yangu inorova, simba rangu rapera; kunyange nechiedza chabva pameso angu." 
Psalms38:11 Shamwari dzangu navafambidzani vondinzvenga nokuda kwamaronda angu; vavakidzani vangu vanogara kure neni. 
Psalms38:12 Avo vanotsvaka kundiuraya vanonditeya nemisungo yavo, avo vanoda kundikuvadza vanotaura nezvokuparadzwa kwangu; zuva rose vanorangana zvounyengeri." 
Psalms38:13 Ini ndafanana nematsi, isinganzwi, sembeveve, isingagoni kushamisa muromo wayo;" 
Psalms38:14 ndava somunhu asinganzwi, ano muromo usingapinduri." 
Psalms38:15 Haiwa Jehovha, ndakakumirirai; muchapindura, imi Ishe Mwari wangu." 
Psalms38:16 Nokuti ndakati, “Musavarega vachifarira kutambudzika kwangu kana kuzvisimudzira pamusoro pangu, rutsoka rwangu parunotedzemuka.”" 
Psalms38:17 Nokuti ndava pedyo nokuwa, uye kurwadziwa kwangu kunogara neni." 
Psalms38:18 Ndinoreurura chivi changu; chivi changu chinonditambudza. 
Psalms38:19 Vavengi vangu vane simba vazhinji; vanondivenga ndisina mhosva vakawanda. 
Psalms38:20 Ivavo vanotsiva zvakanaka zvangu nezvakaipa, vanondireva pandinotevera zvakanaka." 
Psalms38:21 Haiwa Jehovha, regai kundisiya; regai kuva kure neni, imi Mwari wangu." 
Psalms38:22 Haiwa Ishe Muponesi wangu, kurumidzai kuuya kuzondibatsira." 
Psalms39:1 Kumutungamiri wokuimba kuna Jedhutuni. Pisarema raDhavhidhi. [1] Ndakati, “Ndichangwarira nzira dzangu nokuchengeta rurimi rwangu pachivi; ndichaisa matomu pamuromo wangu kana vakaipa vari pamberi pangu.”" 
Psalms39:2 Asi pandakanga ndinyerere uye ndakadzikama, ndisingatauri kana chakanaka zvacho, kurwadziwa kwangu kwakawedzerwa." 
Psalms39:3 Mwoyo wangu wakapisa mukati mangu, uye pandakafungisisa, moto ukapisa; ipapo ndakataura norurimi rwangu ndikati:" 
Psalms39:4 “Ndiratidzei, imi Jehovha, magumo oupenyu hwangu nokuwanda kwamazuva angu; ndizivisei kupfuura kwoupenyu hwangu." 
Psalms39:5 Makaita mazuva angu soupamhi hwechanza changu; kuwanda kwamakore angu kwakaita sechinhu chisipo pamberi penyu. Upenyu hwomunhu mumwe nomumwe mweya bedzi. 
Psalms39:6 	Munhu anongori mumvuri zvaanofamba-famba hake: anofamba nomufaro mukuru, asi zvinongova pasina; anounganidza pfuma, asingazivi achazoitora." 
Psalms39:7 “Asi zvino, Ishe, ndakamirireiko? Tariro yangu iri mamuri." 
Psalms39:8 Ndiponesei pakudarika kwangu kwose; regai kundiita chiseko chamapenzi. 
Psalms39:9 Ndakanga ndinyerere; handina kushamisa muromo wangu, nokuti ndimi makaita izvi." 
Psalms39:10 Bvisai shamhu yenyu kwandiri; ndakundwa nokurova kworuoko rwenyu. 
Psalms39:11 	Munorayira uye munoranga vanhu nokuda kwezvivi zvavo, munoparadza pfuma yavo sechipfukuto, munhu mumwe nomumwe mweya zvawo. Sera" 
Psalms39:12 “Inzwai munyengetero wangu, imi Jehovha, rerekerai nzeve yenyu pandinochemera rubatsiro; regai kuva matsi pakuchema kwangu. Nokuti ndigere nemi somutorwa, somweni, sezvakanga zvakaita madzibaba angu ose." 
Psalms39:13 Ringirai kure neni, kuti ndimbofarazve ndisati ndabva uye ndisisipo.”" 
Psalms40:1 Kumutungamiri wokuimba. Pisarema raDhavhidhi. [1] Ndakamirira Jehovha nomwoyo murefu; iye akatendeukira kwandiri akanzwa kuchema kwangu. 
Psalms40:2 Akandibudisa mugomba rakadzika, kunze kwamatope netsvina; akamisa tsoka dzangu padombo akandipa nzvimbo yakasimba kuti ndimirepo." 
Psalms40:3 Akaisa rwiyo rutsva mumuromo mangu, rwiyo rwokurumbidza Mwari wedu. Vazhinji vachaona, uye vachatya uye vachaisa ruvimbo rwavo muna Jehovha." 
Psalms40:4 Akaropafadzwa munhu akaita Jehovha chivimbo chake, asingatariri kuna vanozvikudza, kuna avo vanotsaukira kuna vamwari venhema." 
Psalms40:5 Haiwa Jehovha, Mwari wangu, zvizhinji zvishamiso zvamakaita. Zvinhu zvamakatitongera hakuna angazvirondedzera kwamuri; dai ndingataura nokureva pamusoro pazvo, zvaizowandisa kuzvizivisa." 
Psalms40:6 Hamuna kufarira zvibayiro nezvipo, asi nzeve dzangu makadziboora; zvibayiro zvinopiswa nezvipiriso zvezvivi hamuna kuzvireva." 
Psalms40:7 Ipapo ndakati, “Ndiri pano hangu, ndauya, zvakanyorwa mubhuku pamusoro pangu." 
Psalms40:8 Ndinofarira kuita kuda kwenyu, imi Mwari wangu; murayiro wenyu uri mukati momwoyo wangu.”" 
Psalms40:9 Ndinoparidza kururama paungano huru; handidziviri miromo yangu, sokuziva kwenyu, imi Jehovha." 
Psalms40:10 Handivanzi kururama kwenyu mumwoyo mangu; ndinotaura nezvokutendeka kwenyu noruponeso rwenyu. Handivanzi rudo rwenyu nechokwadi chenyu paungano huru. 
Psalms40:11 Regai kundinyima ngoni dzenyu, imi Jehovha; rudo rwenyu nechokwadi chenyu ngazvindidzivirire nguva dzose." 
Psalms40:12 Nokuti matambudziko asingaverengeki akandikomberedza; zvivi zvangu zvakandibata, uye handigoni kuona. Zvakawanda kupfuura bvudzi romumusoro mangu, uye mwoyo wangu waneta mukati mangu." 
Psalms40:13 Haiwa Jehovha, kundiponesa ngakukufadzei; haiwa Jehovha, kurumidzai kundibatsira." 
Psalms40:14 Vose vanotsvaka kutora upenyu hwangu ngavanyadziswe uye vanyonganiswe; vose vanoda kuparadzwa kwangu ngavadzoserwe shure vanyadziswe. 
Psalms40:15 Avo vose vanoti kwandiri, “Hekani waro! Hekani waro!” ngavavhundutswe nokuda kwenyadzi dzavo." 
Psalms40:16 Asi vose vanokutsvakai ngavafare uye vafarisise mamuri; avo vanoda ruponeso rwenyu ngavarambe vachiti, “Jehovha ngaakudzwe!”" 
Psalms40:17 Asi ndiri murombo nomushayiwi; dai Ishe vandifungawo. Ndimi mubatsiri wangu nomununuri wangu; haiwa Mwari wangu, musanonoka henyu." 
Psalms41:1 Kumutungamiri wokuimba. Pisarema raDhavhidhi. [1] Akaropafadzwa uyo ane hanya navasina simba; Jehovha anomurwira panguva dzokutambudzika. 
Psalms41:2 Jehovha achamudzivirira uye achachengetedza upenyu hwake; achamuropafadza panyika uye haangamuisi kuchido chavavengi vake. 
Psalms41:3 Jehovha achamuraramisa panhoo yake yourwere uye achamuponesa panhoo yake yourwere. 
Psalms41:4 Ini ndakati, “Haiwa Jehovha, ndinzwirei ngoni; ndiporesei, nokuti ndakakutadzirai.”" 
Psalms41:5 Vavengi vangu vachindigodora vanoti, “Achafa riniko uye zita rake rigoparara?”" 
Psalms41:6 Kana mumwe achiuya kuzondiona, anotaura zvenhema, mwoyo uchiunganidza makuhwa; ipapo anobuda ondozviparadzira kumwe." 
Psalms41:7 Vavengi vangu vose vanoita zevezeve pamwe chete pamusoro pangu; vanondifungira zvakaipisisa, vachiti," 
Psalms41:8 “Chirwere chakaipa chakamubata, haachambomukizve panzvimbo paakarara.”" 
Psalms41:9 Kunyange neshamwari yangu yapedyo yandaivimba nayo, yandaigovana zvokudya nayo, yandisimudzira chitsitsinho chayo." 
Psalms41:10 Asi imi, iyemi Jehovha, mune tsitsi neni, ndisimudzei, kuti ndivatsive." 
Psalms41:11 Ndinoziva kuti munofadzwa neni, nokuti muvengi wangu haandikundi." 
Psalms41:12 Munonditsigira pakutendeka kwangu, uye munondiisa pamberi penyu nokusingaperi." 
Psalms41:13 Kurumbidzwa ngakuve kuna Jehovha, Mwari waIsraeri, kubva pakusingaperi kusvikira nokusingaperi. Ameni naAmeni." 
Psalms42:1 Kumutungamiri wokuimba. Rwiyo rweMasikiri rwaVanakomana vaKora. [1] Senondo inotakwairira hova dzemvura, saizvozvo mweya wangu unokutakwairirai, imi Mwari." 
Psalms42:2 Mweya wangu une nyota kuna Mwari, nyota yaMwari mupenyu. Ndingaenda riniko kundosangana naMwari?" 
Psalms42:3 Misodzi yangu yanga iri zvokudya zvangu masikati nousiku, asi zuva rose vanhu vanoti kwandiri, “Mwari wako aripiko?”" 
Psalms42:4 Ndinorangarira zvinhu izvi pandinodurura mweya wangu, mafambiro andaiita navazhinji ndichitungamirira mudungwe wavanhu kuimba yaMwari, nokupembera nomufaro uye nokuvonga pakati pavazhinji pamutambo." 
Psalms42:5 Wakasuwireiko, nhai mweya wangu? Unotambudzwa neiko mukati mangu? Isa tariro yako muna Mwari, nokuti ndichamurumbidzazve, Muponesi wangu naMwari wangu." 
Psalms42:6 Mweya wangu wakaneta mukati mangu; naizvozvo ndichakurangarirai ndiri kunyika yeJorodhani, pamatunhu akakwirira eHeremoni, kubva paGomo reMizari." 
Psalms42:7 Pakadzika panodana pakadzika mukutinhira kwamapopopo emvura; mafungu enyu ose namapoporodzi akapfuura napamusoro pangu. 
Psalms42:8 Masikati, Jehovha anorayira rudo rwake, pausiku rwiyo rwake runeni, munyengetero kuna Mwari woupenyu hwangu." 
Psalms42:9 Ndinoti kuna Mwari Dombo rangu, “Mandikanganwireiko? Ndinofambireiko ndichichema ndakadzvinyirirwa nomuvengi?”" 
Psalms42:10 Mapfupa angu atambura nokurwadza kworufu, sezvo vavengi vangu vachindizvidza zuva rose vachiti kwandiri, “Mwari wako aripiko?”" 
Psalms42:11 Wakasuwireiko, nhai mweya wangu? Unotambudzwa neiko mukati mangu? Isa tariro yako muna Mwari, nokuti ndichamurumbidzazve. Muponesi wangu naMwari wangu." 
Psalms43:1 Ndiruramisirei, imi Mwari, uye mundireverere mhaka yangu parudzi rusina Mwari; ndinunurei pavanhu vanonyengera navakaipa." 
Psalms43:2 Ndimi Mwari nhare yangu. Mandirambireiko? Ndinofambireiko pose ndichichema ndichidzvinyirirwa navavengi? 
Psalms43:3 Tumirai chiedza chenyu nechokwadi chenyu, ngazvinditungamirire; ngazvindisvitse kugomo renyu dzvene, kunzvimbo yamunogara." 
Psalms43:4 Ipapo ndichaenda kuaritari yaMwari, kuna Mwari, iye mufaro wangu nomudikani wangu. Ndichakurumbidzai nembira, imi Mwari, Mwari wangu." 
Psalms43:5 Wakasuwireiko, nhai mweya wangu? Unotambudzwa neiko mukati mangu? Isa tariro yako muna Mwari, nokuti ndichamurumbidzazve, Muponesi wangu naMwari wangu." 
Psalms44:1 Kumutungamiri wokuimba waVanakomana vaKora. Masikiri. [1] Haiwa Mwari, takanzwa nenzeve dzedu; madzibaba edu akatiudza zvamakaita pamazuva avo, pamazuva ekare." 
Psalms44:2 Noruoko rwenyu makadzinga ndudzi uye mukasima madzibaba edu; makapwanya marudzi mukaita kuti madzibaba edu abudirire. 
Psalms44:3 Havana kuzviwanira nyika nomunondo wavo, uye ruoko rwavo haruna kuvakundisa; rwakanga rwuri ruoko rwenyu rworudyi, irwo ruoko rwenyu, nokupenya kwechiso chenyu, nokuti imi makavada." 
Psalms44:4 Ndimi Mambo wangu naMwari wangu, anorayira kukunda kwaJakobho." 
Psalms44:5 Kubudikidza nemi, tinosunda vavengi vedu shure; kubudikidza nezita renyu, tinotsika vavengi vedu netsoka dzedu." 
Psalms44:6 Handivimbi nouta hwangu, munondo wangu haundivigiri kukunda;" 
Psalms44:7 asi imi munotipa kukunda pamusoro pavavengi vedu, munonyadzisa vadzivisi vedu." 
Psalms44:8 	Tinozvirumbidza muna Mwari zuva rose, uye ticharumbidza zita renyu nokusingaperi. Sera" 
Psalms44:9 Asi zvino matiramba uye matininipisa; hamuchabudi nehondo dzedu. 
Psalms44:10 Makaita kuti tidududze pamberi pavavengi vedu, uye vadzivisi vedu vakatipamba." 
Psalms44:11 Makatiramwira kumudyi samakwai uye makatiparadzira pakati pendudzi. 
Psalms44:12 Makatengesa vanhu venyu pasina, hamuna kuwana kana chinhu pakuvatengesa." 
Psalms44:13 Makatiita chiseko kuvavakidzani vedu, chinozvidzwa nechinosekwa chaavo vakatipoteredza." 
Psalms44:14 Makatiita tsumo pakati pendudzi; vanhu vanotidzungudzira misoro. 
Psalms44:15 Kunyadziswa kwangu kuri pamberi pangu zuva rose, uye chiso changu chafukidzwa nenyadzi" 
Psalms44:16 pakuseka kwaavo vanondizvidza nokundirwisa, nokuda kwomuvengi, agarira kutsiva." 
Psalms44:17 Zvose izvi zvakaitika kwatiri kunyange takanga tisina kukukanganwai, kana kuva vasina kutendeka kusungano yenyu." 
Psalms44:18 Mwoyo yedu yakanga isati yafuratira; tsoka dzedu dzakanga dzisati dzatsauka panzira yenyu. 
Psalms44:19 Asi makatipwanya mukatiita nzvimbo yamakava uye mukatifukidza nerima guru. 
Psalms44:20 Dai takanga takanganwa zita raMwari wedu, kana kutambanudzira maoko edu kuna mwari wavatorwa," 
Psalms44:21 Mwari haaizviziva here, sezvo achiziva zvakavanzika zvomwoyo?" 
Psalms44:22 Asi nokuda kwenyu takatarisana norufu zuva rose; tinotorwa samakwai anobayiwa. 
Psalms44:23 Mukai, imi Ishe! Munovatireiko? Zvisimudzei! Regai kutiramba nokusingaperi." 
Psalms44:24 Ko, munovanzirei chiso chenyu muchikanganwa kutambudzika nokudzvinyirirwa kwedu?" 
Psalms44:25 Takawisirwa muguruva; miviri yedu inonamatira pavhu. 
Psalms44:26 Simukai mutibatsire; tidzikinurei nokuda kworudo rwenyu rusingaperi. 
Psalms45:1 Kumutungamiri wokuimba waVanakomana vaKora. Masikiri nomuimbirwo wa “Maruva aMahapa.” Rwiyo rwoMuchato. [1] Mwoyo wangu unobvongodzwa nedingindira rakanaka, pandinodetembera mambo ndima dzangu; rurimi rwangu chinyoreso chomunyori anogona." 
Psalms45:2 Imi makanakisisa pavanhu vose uye miromo yenyu yakazadzwa nenyasha, sezvo Mwari akakuropafadzai nokusingaperi." 
Psalms45:3 Sungai munondo wenyu parutivi, imi wamasimba, zvishongedzei nokubwinya noumambo." 
Psalms45:4 Paumambo hwenyu kwirai mukunde kwazvo, makamirira chokwadi, kuzvininipisa nokururama; ruoko rwenyu rworudyi ngaruratidze mabasa enyu anotyisa." 
Psalms45:5 Miseve yenyu inopinza ngaibaye mwoyo yavavengi vamambo; ndudzi ngadziputsikire pasi petsoka dzenyu. 
Psalms45:6 Chigaro chenyu, imi Mwari, chichagara nokusingaperi-peri; tsvimbo yokururamisira ichava tsvimbo youmambo hwenyu." 
Psalms45:7 Imi munoda kururama uye munovenga zvakaipa; naizvozvo Mwari, Mwari wenyu, akakuisai pamusoro peshamwari dzenyu nokukuzodzai namafuta omufaro." 
Psalms45:8 Nguo dzenyu dzose dzinonhuwirira mura, arosi nekasia, zvinobva kumizinda yamadzimambo yakashongedzwa nenyanga dzenzou, kurira kwehungiso kunokufadzai." 
Psalms45:9 Vanasikana vamadzimambo vari pakati pavakadzi vanokudzwa; kuruoko rwenyu rworudyi kuno mwenga akashongedzwa negoridhe reOfiri. 
Psalms45:10 Teerera, iwe mwanasikana, rangarira, uye urereke nzeve yako: Kanganwa vanhu vako neimba yababa vako." 
Psalms45:11 Mambo ayevedzwa norunako rwako; mukudze, nokuti ndiye Ishe wako." 
Psalms45:12 Mwanasikana weTire achauya nechipo, vanhu vakapfuma vachatsvaka nyasha kwauri." 
Psalms45:13 Mwanasikana wamambo akanaka kwazvo mukati meimba yake; nguo yake yakarukirirwa negoridhe. 
Psalms45:14 Akapfeka nguo dzakashongedzwa achaperekedzwa kuna mambo; shamwari dzake idzo mhandara dzinomutevera uye vanouyiswa kwamuri. 
Psalms45:15 Vanoperekedzwa vachapinda nomufaro nokufarisisa; vanopinda mumuzinda wamambo. 
Psalms45:16 Vanakomana venyu vachatsiva nzvimbo yamadzibaba enyu; muchavaita machinda panyika yose. 
Psalms45:17 Ndichaita kuti kurangarirwa kwenyu kurambe kuripo, kusvikira kumarudzi ose; naizvozvo ndudzi dzichakurumbidzai nokusingaperi-peri." 
Psalms46:1 Kumutungamiri wokuimba waVanakomana vaKora. Namaimbirwo earamoti. Rwiyo. [1] Mwari ndiye utiziro hwedu nesimba redu, ndiye mubatsiri anogara aripo panguva yokutambudzika." 
Psalms46:2 Naizvozvo hatizotyi, kunyange nyika ikashanduka, uye makomo akawira mukatikati megungwa," 
Psalms46:3 	kunyange mvura yaro ikatinhira uye ikapupuma furo, uye makomo akadengenyeswa namafungu aro. Sera" 
Psalms46:4 Pane rwizi ruripo rune hova dzinofadza guta raMwari, nzvimbo tsvene yoWokumusoro-soro." 
Psalms46:5 Mwari ari mukati maro, haringawiri pasi; Mwari acharibatsira panguva yemambakwedza." 
Psalms46:6 Ndudzi dzinoita bope, umambo hunoondomoka; anotaura nenzwi guru, nyika yonyongodeka." 
Psalms46:7 	Jehovha Wamasimba Ose anesu; Mwari waJakobho ndiye nhare yedu. Sera 
Psalms46:8 Uyai muone mabasa aJehovha, kuparadza kwaakaita panyika." 
Psalms46:9 Anoita kuti hondo dzigume kusvikira kumagumo enyika; anovhuna uta uye anovhuna-vhuna mapfumo, anopisa nhoo nomoto." 
Psalms46:10 “Nyararai, uye muzive kuti ndini Mwari; ndichakudzwa pakati pendudzi, ndichasimudzirwa panyika.”" 
Psalms46:11 	Jehovha Wamasimba Ose anesu; Mwari waJakobho ndiye nhare yedu. Sera 
Psalms47:1 Kumutungamiri wokuimba waVanakomana vaKora. Pisarema. [1] Uchirai maoko, imi vanhu vose; pururudzai kuna Mwari nokudanidzira kwomufaro." 
Psalms47:2 Jehovha Wokumusoro-soro anotyisa sei, iye Mambo mukuru pamusoro penyika yose!" 
Psalms47:3 Akaisa ndudzi dzavanhu pasi pedu, marudzi pasi petsoka dzedu." 
Psalms47:4 	Akatitsaurira nhaka yedu, iyo pfuma yaJakobho, waakada. Sera" 
Psalms47:5 Mwari akakwira pakati pokudanidzira kwomufaro, Jehovha pakati pokurira kwehwamanda." 
Psalms47:6 Imbirai Mwari nziyo dzokurumbidza, murumbidzei nenziyo. Imbirai Mambo wedu nziyo dzokurumbidza, murumbidzei nenziyo." 
Psalms47:7 Nokuti Mwari ndiye Mambo wenyika yose; muimbirei pisarema rokurumbidza. 
Psalms47:8 Mwari anotonga pamusoro pendudzi dzose; Mwari agere pamusoro pechigaro chake chitsvene. 
Psalms47:9 Makurukota amarudzi aungana savanhu vaMwari waAbhurahama, nokuti madzimambo enyika ndeaMwari; iye anokudzwa zvikuru kwazvo." 
Psalms48:1 Rwiyo. Pisarema raVanakomana vaKora. [1] Jehovha mukuru, uye anofanira kurumbidzwa kwazvo, muguta raMwari wedu, mugomo rake dzvene." 
Psalms48:2 Rakanaka pakukwirira kwaro, mufaro wenyika yose. Sokumusoro-soro kweZafoni, ndizvo zvakaita Gomo reZioni, guta raMambo Mukuru." 
Psalms48:3 Mwari ari munhare dzaro; akazviratidza kwariri kuti ndiye nharirire yaro. 
Psalms48:4 Madzimambo akati abatanidza mauto, vakati vafamba pamwe chete kundorwa," 
Psalms48:5 vakariona vakashamiswa; vakatiza nokutya. 
Psalms48:6 Vakabatwa nokudedera ipapo, nokurwadziwa sokwomukadzi wosununguka." 
Psalms48:7 Makavaparadza sezvakaitwa zvikepe zveTashishi, zvakaputswa-putswa nemhepo yokumabvazuva." 
Psalms48:8 	Sezvatakanzwa, ndizvo zvataona, muguta raJehovha Wamasimba Ose, muguta raMwari wedu: Mwari anorisimbisa nokusingaperi. Sera" 
Psalms48:9 Tiri mukati metemberi yenyu, imi Mwari, tinofungisisa nezvorudo rwenyu rusingaperi." 
Psalms48:10 Sezvakaita zita renyu, imi Mwari, kurumbidzwa kwenyu kunosvika kumagumo enyika; ruoko rwenyu rworudyi ruzere nokururama." 
Psalms48:11 Gomo reZioni rinofara, misha yeJudha inofarisisa nokuda kwokutonga kwenyu." 
Psalms48:12 Famba-fambai muZioni, ripoteredzei, verengai shongwe dzaro," 
Psalms48:13 fungisisai zvakanaka nezvamasvingo aro, cherechedzai nhare dzaro, kuti mugotaura nezvazvo kurudzi runotevera." 
Psalms48:14 Nokuti Mwari uyu ndiye Mwari wedu nokusingaperi-peri; iye achava muperekedzi wedu kusvikira kumagumo. 
Psalms49:1 Kumutungamiri wokuimba, waVanakomana vaKora. Pisarema. [1] Inzwai izvi, imi vanhu mose; teererai imi mose mugere panyika," 
Psalms49:2 vapasi navapamusoro, vapfumi navarombo pamwe chete." 
Psalms49:3 Muromo wangu uchataura nouchenjeri; kutaura kunobva pamwoyo wangu kuchapa kunzwisisa. 
Psalms49:4 Ndicharerekera nzeve yangu kuchirevo; nembira ndichadudzira shoko rangu rakavanzika. 
Psalms49:5 Ndinotyireiko kana mazuva akaipa achiuya, kana vanyengeri vakaipa vandikomberedza," 
Psalms49:6 vaya vanovimba nepfuma yavo vanozvikudza nepfuma yavo zhinji? 
Psalms49:7 Hakuna munhu angadzikinura upenyu hwomumwe kana kupa Mwari rudzikinuro rwake," 
Psalms49:8 rudzikinuro rwoupenyu runokosha, hakuna muripo unoringana nahwo," 
Psalms49:9 kuti ararame nokusingaperi uye kuti asaona kuora. 
Psalms49:10 Nokuti vose vanogona kuona kuti vanhu vakachenjera vanofa; mapenzi navasina pfungwa zvimwe chetezvo vanofa, uye vanosiyira vamwe pfuma yavo." 
Psalms49:11 Marinda avo achagara ari dzimba dzavo nokusingaperi, nougaro hwavo kusvikira kumarudzi asingaperi, kunyange vakanga vakapa nyika mazita avo." 
Psalms49:12 Asi munhu, kunyange ane pfuma yake, haagari; akafanana nemhuka dzinofa." 
Psalms49:13 	Ndiwo magumo aivavo vanovimba nezvavanoita, namagumo avateveri vavo, vanotenda zvavanotaura. Sera" 
Psalms49:14 Samakwai vakatarirwa kuenda kuguva, uye rufu ruchavadya. Vakarurama vachavatonga mangwanani; chimiro chavo chichaora murinda, kure nedzimba dzavo dzoumambo." 
Psalms49:15 	Asi Mwari achadzikinura upenyu hwangu kubva muguva, zvirokwazvo achanditora iye. Sera" 
Psalms49:16 Usanyanya kutya kana munhu apfuma, kana kubwinya kweimba yake kwawedzerwa;" 
Psalms49:17 nokuti haana chaachatora paanofa; kubwinya kwake hakungaburukiri naye murinda. 
Psalms49:18 Kunyange paairarama aizviti akaropafadzwa, uye vanhu vachirumbidza munhu paanobudirira," 
Psalms49:19 achabatana norudzi rwamadzibaba ake, vasingazoonizve chiedza choupenyu." 
Psalms49:20 Munhu ane pfuma zhinji asinganzwisisi akaita semhuka dzinofa. 
Psalms50:1 Pisarema raAsafi. [1] Iye Wamasimba, Mwari, Jehovha, anotaura uye anodana nyika kubva pakubuda kwezuva kusvikira kwarinovirira." 
Psalms50:2 Kubva kuZioni, rakakwana parunako, Mwari anopenya." 
Psalms50:3 Mwari wedu anouya uye haanganyarari; moto unoparadza pamberi pake, uye dutu rine hasha rakamupoteredza." 
Psalms50:4 Anodana matenga kumusoro, uye nenyika, kuti atonge vanhu vake achiti:" 
Psalms50:5 “Ndiunganidzirei vatsvene vangu, vakaita sungano neni nechibayiro.”" 
Psalms50:6 	Uye matenga anoparidza kururama kwake, nokuti Mwari amene ndiye mutongi. Sera" 
Psalms50:7 “Inzwai, imi vanhu vangu, uye ndichataura, imi Israeri, uye ndichapupura pamusoro penyu: Ndini Mwari, Mwari wenyu." 
Psalms50:8 Handikutukei nokuda kwezvibayiro zvenyu, kana zvipiriso zvenyu zvinopiswa, zvinogara zviri pamberi pangu." 
Psalms50:9 Handisi kuda hando inobva mudanga rako, kana mbudzi inobva muzvirugu zvako," 
Psalms50:10 nokuti mhuka dzose dzesango ndedzangu, nemombe pamakomo chiuru." 
Psalms50:11 Ndinoziva shiri dzose dziri mumakomo, uye zvisikwa zvose zvesango ndezvangu." 
Psalms50:12 Kana dai ndaiva nenzara, handaikuudza iwe, nokuti nyika ndeyangu, nezvose zviri mairi." 
Psalms50:13 Ko, ndinodya nyama yehando kana kunwa ropa rembudzi here?" 
Psalms50:14 Bayirai zvibayiro zvokuvonga kuna Mwari, zadzisai zvamakapikira Wokumusoro-soro," 
Psalms50:15 uye mudane kwandiri pazuva rokutambudzika; ndichakurwirai, uye imi muchandikudza.”" 
Psalms50:16 Asi kuna vakaipa, Mwari anoti, “Ko, une mvumo ipiko iwe yokuti ududzire mutemo wangu, kana kuisa sungano yangu pamiromo yako?" 
Psalms50:17 Unovenga kurayira kwangu, uye unorasira mashoko angu shure kwako." 
Psalms50:18 Paunoona mbavha, unowadzana nayo; unogoverana nemhombwe mugove wako." 
Psalms50:19 Unoshandisa muromo wako kuita zvakaipa, uye unorovedza rurimi rwako kukunyengera." 
Psalms50:20 Unogara uchipomera hama yako nokuitira mwanakomana wamai vako makuhwa. 
Psalms50:21 	Zvinhu izvi wakazviita ini ndikaramba ndinyerere; wakafunga kuti ndakafanana newe. Asi ndichakutsiura uye ndichaisa mhosva iyi pamberi pako. 
Psalms50:22 “Fungai izvi, imi vanokanganwa Mwari, kuti ndirege kukubvambura-bvamburai mukashaya angakununurai:" 
Psalms50:23 Munhu anobayira chibayiro chokuvonga ndiye anondikudza, uye anogadzira nzira kuitira kuti ndimuratidze ruponeso rwaMwari.”" 
Psalms51:1 Kumutungamiri wokuimba. Pisarema raDhavhidhi. Panguva yakauya muprofita Natani kwaari shure kwokuita upombwe kwaDhavhidhi naBhatishebha. [1] Ndinzwirei tsitsi, imi Mwari, nokuda kworudo rwenyu rusingaperi; dzimai kudarika kwangu nokuda kwengoni dzenyu huru." 
Psalms51:2 Shambidzai zvakaipa zvangu zvose uye mundinatse kubva pachivi changu. 
Psalms51:3 Nokuti ndinoziva kudarika kwangu, uye chivi changu chinogara chiri pamberi pangu." 
Psalms51:4 Ndakakutadzirai imi, iyemi moga nokuita chinhu chakaipa pamberi penyu, kuti munzi makarurama pamunotaura uye musapomerwa mhosva pakutonga kwenyu." 
Psalms51:5 Zvirokwazvo ndakanga ndiri mutadzi pandakaberekwa, ndiri mutadzi kubva pandakaumbwa mudumbu ramai vangu." 
Psalms51:6 Zvirokwazvo imi munoda chokwadi pakati pomwoyo; munondidzidzisa uchenjeri panzvimbo yomukatikati. 
Psalms51:7 Ndinatsei nehisopi, ipapo ndichachena; ndishambidzei, ipapo ndichachena sechando." 
Psalms51:8 Ndiitei kuti ndinzwe mufaro nokufarisisa; itai kuti mapfupa amakapwanya afare. 
Psalms51:9 Vanzai chiso chenyu pazvivi zvangu uye mudzime zvakaipa zvangu zvose. 
Psalms51:10 Sikai mukati mangu mwoyo wakachena, imi Mwari, uye muvandudze mweya wakarurama mukati mangu." 
Psalms51:11 Regai kundirasa pamberi penyu kana kubvisa Mweya wenyu Mutsvene kwandiri. 
Psalms51:12 Dzoreraizve kwandiri mufaro woruponeso rwenyu, uye mundipe mweya unoda, kuti undiraramise." 
Psalms51:13 Ipapo ndichadzidzisa vadariki nzira dzenyu, uye vatadzi vachatendeukira kwamuri." 
Psalms51:14 Ndiponesei pamhosva yeropa, imi Mwari, iyemi Mwari anondiponesa, ipapo rurimi rwangu ruchaimba zvokururama kwenyu." 
Psalms51:15 Haiwa Ishe, zarurai miromo yangu, ipapo muromo wangu uchaparidza rumbidzo yenyu." 
Psalms51:16 Hamufariri chibayiro, ndingadai ndakuvigirai, imi hamufariri zvipiriso zvinopiswa." 
Psalms51:17 Zvibayiro zvaMwari mweya wakaputsika; mwoyo wakaputsika nowakapwanyika, imi Mwari hamuzoushori." 
Psalms51:18 Pamufaro wenyu wakanaka, itai kuti Zioni ribudirire; muvake masvingo eJerusarema." 
Psalms51:19 Ipapo pachava nezvibayiro zvakarurama, zvipiriso zvinopiswa zvakazara zvinokufadzai; ipapo hando dzichabayirwa paaritari yenyu." 
Psalms52:1 Kumutungamiri wokuimba. Rwiyo rweMasikiri rwaDhavhidhi. Dhoegi muEdhomu paakanga aenda kuna Sauro akamuudza kuti: “Dhavhidhi aenda kumba kwaAhimereki.” [1] Ko, unozvikudzirei pane zvakaipa, iwe murume wesimba? Unozvikudzirei zuva rose, iyewe unonyadzisa pamberi paMwari?" 
Psalms52:2 Rurimi rwako runofarira zvokuparadza; rwakaita sechisvo chakarodzwa, iyewe unogara uchingonyengera." 
Psalms52:3 	Unoda zvakaipa pachinzvimbo chezvakanaka, kureva nhema pachinzvimbo chokutaura chokwadi. Sera" 
Psalms52:4 Unoda shoko rimwe nerimwe rinoparadza, iwe rurimi runonyengera!" 
Psalms52:5 	Zvirokwazvo Mwari achakuburutsira kukuparadzwa kusingaperi: Achakubvuta agokubvisa mutende rako; achakudzura kubva munyika yavapenyu. Sera 
Psalms52:6 Vakarurama vachazviona uye vachatya; vachamuseka vachiti," 
Psalms52:7 “Houno zvino munhu asina kuita Mwari nhare yake, asi aivimba nepfuma yake zhinji, uye aisimba nokuparadza vamwe!”" 
Psalms52:8 Asi ini ndakaita somuti womuorivhi unokura zvakanaka mumba maMwari; ndinovimba norudo rusingaperi rwaMwari, nokusingaperi-peri." 
Psalms52:9 Ndichakurumbidza, nokusingaperi nokuda kwezvamakaita; ndichavimba nezita renyu, nokuti zita renyu rakanaka. Ndichakurumbidzai pamberi pavatsvene venyu." 
Psalms53:1 Kumutungamiri wokuimba. Namaimbirwo eMaharati. Rwiyo rweMasikiri rwaDhavhidhi. [1] Benzi rinoti mumwoyo maro, “Mwari hakuna.” Vakaora, uye nzira dzavo dzakaipa; hakuna anoita zvakanaka." 
Psalms53:2 Mwari anotarira ari kudenga, pavanakomana vavanhu, kuti aone kana aripo anonzwisisa, kana aripo anotsvaka Mwari." 
Psalms53:3 Mumwe nomumwe wavo akadzokera shure, vakava vakaora pamwe chete; hakuna anoita zvakanaka, kunyange nomumwe." 
Psalms53:4 Ko, vaiti vezvakaipa havangadzidzi here, vaya vanodya vanhu vangu savanhu vanodya chingwa, uye vasingadani kuna Mwari?" 
Psalms53:5 Havo, vakazadzwa nokutya, ipo pasina chavangatya. Mwari akaparadzira mapfupa avanhu vaikurwisa; makavanyadzisa, nokuti Mwari akavazvidza." 
Psalms53:6 Haiwa, dai ruponeso rwaIsraeri rwabuda kubva muZioni; Mwari paachadzosera nhaka yavanhu vake; Jakobho ngaafarisise uye Israeri ngaafarisise!" 
Psalms54:1 Kumutungamiri wokuimba nomitengeranwa ine hungiso. Rwiyo rweMasikiri rwaDhavhidhi. VaZefati pavakaenda kuna Sauro kundoti, “Ko, Dhavhidhi haana kuvanda pakati pedu here?” [1] Ndiponesei, imi Mwari, nezita renyu; ndiruramisirei nesimba renyu." 
Psalms54:2 Inzwai munyengetero wangu, imi Mwari; teererai kumashoko omuromo wangu." 
Psalms54:3 	Vatorwa vanondirwisa; vanhu vane utsinye vanotsvaka upenyu hwangu, vanhu vasingazivi Mwari. Sera" 
Psalms54:4 Zvirokwazvo Mwari ndiye mubatsiri wangu; ishe ndiye anonditsigira. 
Psalms54:5 Zvakaipa ngazvimonere pana avo vanondireva; muvaparadze pakutendeka kwenyu. 
Psalms54:6 Ndichakubayirai chipiriso chokungopa; ndicharumbidza zita renyu, imi Jehovha, nokuti rakanaka." 
Psalms54:7 Nokuti akandirwira pamatambudziko angu ose, uye mukukunda, meso angu akatarisa vavengi vangu." 
Psalms55:1 Kumutungamiri wokuimba nemitengeranwa ine hungiso. Rwiyo rweMasikiri rwaDhavhidhi. [1] Rerekerai nzeve yenyu kumunyengetero wangu, imi Mwari; regai kushaya hanya nokukumbira kwangu;" 
Psalms55:2 ndinzwei, uye ndipindureiwo. Pfungwa dzangu dzinondinetsa uye ndiri kushushikana," 
Psalms55:3 pandinonzwa inzwi romuvengi wangu, pandinodzvokorwa navakaipa; nokuti vanodururira matambudziko pamusoro pangu, uye vanondituka mukutsamwa kwavo." 
Psalms55:4 Mwoyo wangu unorwadziwa mukati mangu; kutyisa kworufu kunondiwira. 
Psalms55:5 Kutya nokudedera zvakandibata; kutya kukuru kwakandifukidza. 
Psalms55:6 Ini ndakati, “Haiwa, dai ndina mapapiro enjiva! Ndaibhururukira kure ndikandozorora hangu," 
Psalms55:7 	ndaitizira kure kwazvo, ndikandogara mugwenga; Sera" 
Psalms55:8 ndaikurumidza kundovanda panzvimbo yangu, kure nemafungu nedutu.”" 
Psalms55:9 Nyonganisai vakaipa, imi Ishe, kanganisai mutauro wavo, nokuti ndinoona mhirizhonga nokurwa muguta." 
Psalms55:10 Masikati nousiku vanopoterera masvingo aro chinyararire; utsinye nokumanikidza zviri mukati maro. 
Psalms55:11 Masimba okuparadza azere muguta; kutyisidzira nenhema hazvibvi munzira dzaro. 
Psalms55:12 Dai ndatukwa nomuvengi, ndaigona kushinga hangu; dai muvengi aindimukira, ndaigona kumuvanda hangu." 
Psalms55:13 Asi ndiwe, munhu akaita seni, mumwe wangu, shamwari yangu yapedyo," 
Psalms55:14 yandaimbofarira kuwadzana nayo pataifamba navazhinji mumba maMwari. 
Psalms55:15 Rufu ngaruwane vavengi vangu vasingafungiri; ngavaburukire muguva vari vapenyu, nokuti kuipa kwakawana pokugaro pakati pavo." 
Psalms55:16 Asi ini ndinodana kuna Mwari, uye Jehovha anondiponesa." 
Psalms55:17 Madekwana, mangwanani namasikati ndinochema mukushushikana, uye iye anonzwa inzwi rangu." 
Psalms55:18 Anondidzikinura ndisina kukuvara kubva pahondo inondirwisa, kunyange zvazvo vazhinji vachindipikisa." 
Psalms55:19 	Mwari, agere pachigaro choushe nokusingaperi, achavanzwa agovaninipisa, Sera ivo vanhu vasingamboshanduri nzira dzavo, uye vasingatyi Mwari." 
Psalms55:20 Mumwe wangu anorova shamwari dzake; anoputsa sungano yake. 
Psalms55:21 Mutauro wake unotsvedzerera samafuta, asi kurwa kuri mumwoyo make; mashoko ake anopfavisa kukunda mafuta, asi minondo yakavhomorwa." 
Psalms55:22 Kanda kufunganya kwako pana Jehovha uye iye achakusimbisa; haazombotenderi vakarurama kuti vawire pasi. 
Psalms55:23 Asi imi, iyemi Mwari, muchaburutsira vakaipa pasi mugomba rokuora; vanhu vanokarira ropa navanyengeri havangararami hafu yamazuva avo. Asi kana ndirini, ndinovimba nemi." 
Psalms56:1 Kumutungamiri wokuimba. Namaririro e“Njiva pamiOuki iri kure.” Pisarema raDhavhidhi. Rwiyo rweMikitami. Paakabatwa navaFiristia paGati. [1] Ndinzwirei ngoni, imi Mwari, nokuti vanhu vanondidzinganisa nehasha; zuva rose vanorwa neni." 
Psalms56:2 Vavengi vangu vanondidzinganisa zuva rose; vazhinji vanorwa neni mukuzvikudza kwavo. 
Psalms56:3 Pandinenge ndotya, ndichavimba nemi." 
Psalms56:4 Muna Mwari, iye ane shoko randinorumbidza, muna Mwari ndinovimba; handichazotyi. Ko, munhu anofa angandiitei?" 
Psalms56:5 Zuva rose vanomonyorora mashoko angu; vanogara vachirangana kundikuvadza. 
Psalms56:6 Vanorangana, vanovandira, vanocherechedza mafambiro angu, vachishuva kundiuraya." 
Psalms56:7 Ngavasapukunyuka savasina mhaka; koromorerai ndudzi pasi mukutsamwa kwenyu imi Mwari. 
Psalms56:8 Nyorai kuchema kwangu; isai misodzi yangu parugwaro rwenyu, ko, hazvina kuiswa muzvinyorwa zvenyu here?" 
Psalms56:9 Ipapo vavengi vangu vachadzokera shure pandinodanidzirai kuti ndibatsirwe. Nechinhu ichi, ndichaziva kuti Mwari ari kurutivi rwangu." 
Psalms56:10 Muna Mwari, iye ane shoko randinorumbidza, muna Jehovha, ane shoko randinorumbidza," 
Psalms56:11 muna Mwari ndinovimba; handichazotyi chinhu. Ko, munhu angandiitei?" 
Psalms56:12 Ndinosungwa nemhiko kwamuri, imi Mwari; ndichakuvigirai zvipo zvangu zvokuvonga." 
Psalms56:13 Nokuti makandirwira parufu, uye netsoka dzangu pakugumburwa, kuti ndifambe pamberi penyu muchiedza choupenyu." 
Psalms57:1 Kumutungamiri wokuimba namaimbirwo okuti, “Musaparadza.” Pisarema raDhavhidhi. Rwiyo rweMikitami. Paakatiza kubva kuna Sauro akapinda mubako. [1] Ndinzwirei ngoni, imi Mwari, ndinzwirei ngoni, nokuti mweya wangu unovanda mamuri. Ndichavanda mumumvuri wamapapiro enyu, kusvikira njodzi yapfuura." 
Psalms57:2 Ndinodanidzira kuna Mwari Wokumusoro-soro, kuna Mwari anozadzisa chinangwa chake kwandiri." 
Psalms57:3 	Anotuma kubva kudenga agondiponesa, achituka vaya vanondidzingirira nehasha; Sera Mwari anotumira rudo rwake nokutendeka kwake." 
Psalms57:4 Ndiri pakati peshumba; ndinovata pakati pemhuka dzinokara, ivo vanhu vana meno amapfumo nemiseve, vane ndimi dzinopinza seminondo." 
Psalms57:5 Kudzwai, imi Mwari, pamusoro pamatenga; kubwinya kwenyu ngakuve pamusoro penyika yose." 
Psalms57:6 	Vanowaririra tsoka dzangu mimbure, ndakakotamiswa pasi nenhamo. Vakachera gomba panzira yangu, asi vakawiramo vamene. Sera" 
Psalms57:7 Mwoyo wangu wakasimba, imi Mwari, mwoyo wangu wakasimba; ndichaimba uye ndichaimba rwiyo." 
Psalms57:8 Chimuka iwe mweya wangu! Mukai imi mutengeranwa nembira! Ini ndichamutsa mambakwedza. 
Psalms57:9 Ndichakurumbidzai imi, iyemi Ishe, pakati pendudzi; ndichakuimbirai pakati pamarudzi." 
Psalms57:10 Nokuti rudo rwenyu rukuru, runosvika kudenga denga; kutendeka kwenyu kunosvika kumusoro." 
Psalms57:11 Kudzwai, imi Mwari, pamusoro pamatenga; kubwinya kwenyu ngakuve pamusoro penyika yose." 
Psalms58:1 Kumutungamiri wokuimba namaimbiro okuti, “Musaparadza.” Pisarema raDhavhidhi. Rwiyo rweMikitami. [1] Ko, imi vatongi munotaura kururamisira here? Munotonga pakati pavanhu nokururamisira here?" 
Psalms58:2 Kwete, munofunga kusaruramisira mumwoyo menyu, uye maoko enyu anomanikidza panyika." 
Psalms58:3 Kunyange kubvira pakuberekwa, vakaipa vanofamba mukutsauka; kubva mudumbu ramai, vakaipa uye vanoreva nhema." 
Psalms58:4 Uturu hwavo hwakaita souturu hwenyoka, vakafanana nemhakure yadzivira nzeve dzayo," 
Psalms58:5 isingateereri maimbiro en'anga kunyange zvazvo achiimba nouchenjeri hukuru. 
Psalms58:6 Vhunai mazino mumiromo yavo, imi Mwari; bvisai, imi Jehovha, mazino marefu eshumba!" 
Psalms58:7 Ngavatsakatike semvura yapera kuerera; pavanowembura uta, miseve yavo ngaigomare." 
Psalms58:8 Vafanane nehozhwa inonyakatika painofamba, kufanana negambemwedzi, ngavarege kuona zuva." 
Psalms58:9 Hari dzenyu dzisati dzanzwa kupisa kweminzwa pamoto, ingava minyoro kana yakaoma, vakaipa vachakukurwa." 
Psalms58:10 Vakarurama vachafara pavachatsivirwa, pavachashambidza tsoka dzavo muropa ravakaipa." 
Psalms58:11 Ipapo vanhu vachati, “Zvirokwazvo vakarurama vachiri kungowana mubayiro; zvirokwazvo Mwari ariko anotonga nyika.”" 
Psalms59:1 Kumutungamiri wokuimba nomuimbiro unoti, “Musaparadza.” Pisarema raDhavhidhi. Rwiyo rweMikitami. Sauro paakanga atuma varume kundorinda imba yaDhavhidhi kuti amuuraye. [1] Ndirwirei pavavengi vangu, imi Mwari; Ndidzivirirei kubva kuna avo vanondimukira." 
Psalms59:2 Ndirwirei pavaiti vezvakaipa, uye mundiponese pavanhu vanokarira kuteura ropa." 
Psalms59:3 Tarirai kundivandira kwavakaita! Vanhu vanotyisa vanondirangana pasina mhosva yandapara kana chivi, nhai Jehovha." 
Psalms59:4 Handina chandakakanganisa, asi ivo vagadzirira kundirwisa. Simukai mundibatsire; tarirai dambudziko rangu!" 
Psalms59:5 	Haiwa Jehovha, Mwari Wamasimba Ose, Mwari waIsraeri, mukai murange ndudzi dzose; musanzwira ngoni vakaipa navapanduki. Sera" 
Psalms59:6 Vanodzoka madekwana, vachihon'a sembwa, uye vachinyahwaira muguta." 
Psalms59:7 Onai zvavanorutsa mumiromo yavo: vanorutsa minondo kubva pamiromo yavo, uye vanoti, “Ndiani angatinzwa?”" 
Psalms59:8 Asi imi, iyemi Jehovha, munovaseka; munodadira ndudzi dzose." 
Psalms59:9 Haiwa imi simba rangu, ndinokurindirai; imi, iyemi Mwari, ndimi nhare yangu," 
Psalms59:10 Mwari anondida achanditungamirira. uye achanditendera kuti ndifare pamusoro pavanondireva. 
Psalms59:11 Asi musavauraya, imi Ishe nhoo yedu, zvimwe vanhu vangu vangakanganwa. Musimba renyu itai kuti vadzungaire, uye muvaderedze." 
Psalms59:12 Nokuda kwezvivi zvemiromo yavo, nokuda kwamashoko emiromo yavo, ngavabatwe pakuzvikudza kwavo. Nokuda kwokutuka nenhema dzavanotaura," 
Psalms59:13 	vaparadzei nehasha dzenyu, vaparadzei kusvikira vapera. Ipapo zvichazivikanwa kumigumo yenyika kuti Mwari anotonga pamusoro paJakobho. Sera" 
Psalms59:14 Vanodzoka madekwana, vachihon'a sembwa, uye vachinyahwaira muguta." 
Psalms59:15 Vanodzungaira vachitsvaka zvokudya, uye vanohuhudza kana vasina kuguta." 
Psalms59:16 Asi ini ndichaimba nezvesimba renyu, ndichaimba nezvorudo rwenyu mangwanani; nokuti imi muri nhare yangu, utiziro hwangu panguva dzokutambudzika." 
Psalms59:17 Haiwa imi simba rangu, ndinokuimbirai nziyo dzokurumbidza; imi, iyemi Mwari, ndimi nhare yangu, Mwari anondida." 
Psalms60:1 Kumutungamiri wokuimba nomuimbiro we“Ruva reMahapa reSungano.” Rwiyo rweMikitami rwaDhavhidhi. Rwokudzidzisa. Paakarwa neAramu Naharaimi neAramu Zobha, uye panguva yakadzoka Joabhu akaparadza zviuru gumi nezviviri zvavaEdhomu muMupata woMunyu. [1] Makatiramba, imi Mwari, uye mukatirwisa; makanga makatsamwa, zvino tidzorei henyu!" 
Psalms60:2 Makazungunusa nyika mukaitsemura napakati; gadzirai henyu mitswe yayo, nokuti iri kudengenyeka." 
Psalms60:3 Makaratidza vanhu venyu nguva dzakaoma; makatipa waini inotidzedzeresa. 
Psalms60:4 	Asi kuna vanokutyai, makasimudza mureza kuti urege kupfaranyurwa neuta. Sera" 
Psalms60:5 Tiponesei uye tibatsirei noruoko rwenyu rworudyi, kuti avo vamunoda varwirwe." 
Psalms60:6 Mwari akataura ari muimba yake tsvene achiti: “Ndichaganhura Shekemu nesimba uye ndichayera Mupata weSukoti. 
Psalms60:7 Gireadhi nderangu, uye Manase ndowangu; Efuremu inguwani yangu yakasimba, Judha itsvimbo yangu." 
Psalms60:8 Moabhu ndiwo mudziyo wangu wokushambira, pamusoro paEdhomu ndipo pandinokanda shangu yangu; pamusoro paFiristia ndinopururudza mukukunda.”" 
Psalms60:9 Ndianiko achandiisa kuguta rakakomberedzwa? Ndianiko achanditungamirira kuenda kuEdhomu? 
Psalms60:10 Hamusimi, iyemi Mwari, iyemi makatiramba here, uye mukarega kubuda nehondo dzedu?" 
Psalms60:11 Tibatsirei pavavengi vedu, nokuti rubatsiro rwavanhu haruna maturo." 
Psalms60:12 NaMwari wedu, tichakunda, uye achatsikira vavengi vedu pasi." 
Psalms61:1 Kumutungamiri wokuimba, nomutengeranwa une hungiso. Pisarema raDhavhidhi. [1] Inzwai kuchema kwangu, imi Mwari; rerekerai nzeve yenyu kumunyengetero wangu." 
Psalms61:2 Kubva kumigumo yenyika, ndinodanidzira kwamuri, ndinodana sezvo mwoyo wangu woziya; nditungamirirei kudombo rakareba kundipfuura." 
Psalms61:3 Nokuti imi makanga muri utiziro hwangu, shongwe yakasimba pamusoro pavavengi vangu." 
Psalms61:4 	Ndinopanga kugara mutende renyu nokusingaperi, uye nokuvanda mumumvuri wamapapiro enyu. Sera" 
Psalms61:5 Nokuti makanzwa mhiko dzangu, imi Mwari; makandipa nhaka yaavo vanotya zita renyu." 
Psalms61:6 Wedzerai mazuva oupenyu hwamambo, makore ake kumarudzi namarudzi." 
Psalms61:7 Ngaagare pachigaro choushe pamberi paMwari nokusingaperi; gadzai rudo nokutendeka kwenyu kuti zvimudzivirire. 
Psalms61:8 Ipapo ndichagara ndichirumbidza zita renyu nenziyo, uye ndichazadzisa mhiko dzangu zuva nezuva." 
Psalms62:1 Kumutungamiri wokuimba, Jedhutuni. Pisarema raDavhidhi. [1] Mweya wangu unozorora muna Mwari oga; ruponeso rwangu runobva kwaari." 
Psalms62:2 Iye oga ndiye dombo rangu noruponeso rwangu; ndiye nhare yangu, handingambozungunuswi." 
Psalms62:3 Muchasvika kupiko muchingorova munhu? Ko, imi mose muchamukanda pasi here, iyeyu rusvingo rwakarereka, noruzhowa rwuri kuwa?" 
Psalms62:4 	Vanofunga kwazvo zvokumuwisira pasi kubva panzvimbo yake yakakwirira; vanofarira nhema. Vanoropafadza nemiromo yavo, Asi vachituka mumwoyo yavo. Sera" 
Psalms62:5 Iwe mweya wangu, zviwanire zororo muna Mwari oga; tariro yangu inobva kwaari." 
Psalms62:6 Ndiye oga dombo rangu noruponeso rwangu; ndiye nhare yangu, handingazungunuswi." 
Psalms62:7 Ruponeso rwangu nokukudzwa kwangu zvinobva kuna Mwari; ndiye dombo rangu guru, noutiziro hwangu." 
Psalms62:8 	Vimbai naye nguva dzose, imi vanhu; dururai mwoyo yenyu kwaari, nokuti Mwari ndiye utiziro hwedu. Sera" 
Psalms62:9 Vanhu vasina maturo vanongova mweya zvawo, asi vanokudzwa inhema bedzi; kana vakayerwa havaremi, havazi chinhu; vose pamwe chete vanongova mweya." 
Psalms62:10 Regai kuvimba noupambi kana kuzvikudza nezvinhu zvokuba; kunyange pfuma yenyu ichiwanda, regai kuisa mwoyo yenyu pairi." 
Psalms62:11 Chinhu chimwe chakataurwa naMwari, zvinhu zviviri zvandakanzwa: Kuti imi, iyemi Mwari, mune simba," 
Psalms62:12 uye kuti imi, iyemi Ishe, mune rudo. Zvirokwazvo muchapa mubayiro kumunhu mumwe nomumwe maererano nezvaakaita." 
Psalms63:1 Pisarema raDhavhidhi paakanga ari murenje reJudha. [1] Haiwa Mwari, ndimi Mwari wangu, ndinokutsvakai nomwoyo wose; mwoyo wangu une nyota kwamuri, muviri wangu unokupangai, munyika yakaoma uye yasakara isina mvura." 
Psalms63:2 Ndakakuonai munzvimbo yenyu tsvene, uye ndikaona simba renyu nokubwinya kwenyu." 
Psalms63:3 Nokuti rudo rwenyu runokunda upenyu, miromo yangu ichakurumbidzai." 
Psalms63:4 Ndichakurumbidzai ndichiri mupenyu, uye ndichasimudza maoko angu muzita renyu." 
Psalms63:5 Mweya wangu uchagutswa kunge wadya zvakakora kwazvo; muromo wangu uchakurumbidzai nemiromo inofara kwazvo. 
Psalms63:6 Ndinokurangarirai ndiri pamubhedha wangu; ndinokufungai panguva dzose dzousiku. 
Psalms63:7 Nokuti muri mubatsiri wangu, ndinoimba ndiri mumumvuri wamapapiro enyu." 
Psalms63:8 Mweya wangu unonamatira kwamuri; ruoko rwenyu rworudyi runonditsigira. 
Psalms63:9 Vanotsvaka upenyu hwangu vachaparadzwa; vachaburukira kwakadzika kwepasi. 
Psalms63:10 Vachaiswa kumunondo vagova zvokudya zvamakava. 
Psalms63:11 Asi mambo achafara muna Mwari; vose vanopika nezita raMwari vachamurumbidza, asi miromo yavanoreva nhema ichafumbirwa." 
Psalms64:1 Kumutungamiri wokuimba. Pisarema raDhavhidhi. [1] Ndinzweiwo, imi Mwari, pandinotaura chichemo changu; dzivirirai upenyu hwangu pakutyisidzira kwavavengi." 
Psalms64:2 Ndivanzei pakurangana kwavakaipa, ndibve pazhowezhowe yeungano yavaiti vezvakaipa." 
Psalms64:3 Vanorodza ndimi dzavo seminondo, uye vanonanga namashoko avo semiseve inouraya." 
Psalms64:4 Vanopfura vari pakavanda munhu asina mhosva; vanomupfura pakarepo, vasingatyi." 
Psalms64:5 Vanokurudzira mumwe nomumwe wavo pakufunga zvakaipa, vanotaura pamusoro pokuteya misungo yavo, uye vanoti, “Ndianiko achaiona?”" 
Psalms64:6 Vanorangana kusaruramisira vachiti, “Tafunga zano rakakwana!” Zvirokwazvo mwoyo nomurangariro womunhu zvinonyengera." 
Psalms64:7 Asi Mwari achavapfura nemiseve; pakarepo vachawira pasi. 
Psalms64:8 Achaita kuti ndimi dzavo dzivashandukire, uye achavaisa pakuparadzwa; vose vanovaona vachavadzungudzira misoro vachivaseka." 
Psalms64:9 Marudzi ose avanhu achatya; achaparidza mabasa aMwari, uye achafungisisa zvaakaita."
