Psalms64:10 Vakarurama ngavafare muna Jehovha uye vavande maari; vose vakarurama mumwoyo ngavamurumbidze! 
Psalms65:1 Kumutungamiri wokuimba. Pisarema raDhavhidhi. Rwiyo. [1] Kurumbidzwa kwakakumirirai, imi Mwari, muZioni; kwamuri mhiko dzedu dzichazadziswa." 
Psalms65:2 Haiwa, imi munonzwa munyengetero, vanhu vose vachauya kwamuri." 
Psalms65:3 Patakanga takafukidzwa nezvivi, makakanganwira kudarika kwedu." 
Psalms65:4 Vakaropafadzwa avo vamunosarudza navamunoswededza pedyo kuti vagare pavanze dzenyu! Takagutswa nezvinhu zvakanaka zveimba yenyu, zvetemberi yenyu tsvene." 
Psalms65:5 Munotipindura namabasa okururama anotyisa, imi Mwari Muponesi wedu, tariro yemigumo yepasi pose namakungwa ari kure kure," 
Psalms65:6 iyemi makaumba makomo nesimba renyu, makazvishongedza nesimba," 
Psalms65:7 iyemi makanyaradza kutinhira kwamakungwa, iko kutinhira kwamafungu aro, nokupopota kwendudzi." 
Psalms65:8 Vanogara kure kure vanotya zvishamiso zvenyu; uko kunobuda mambakwedza uye madekwana achipera, munodanidzira nziyo dzomufaro." 
Psalms65:9 Mune hanya nenyika uye munoidiridza; munoipfumisa kwazvo. Hova dzaMwari dzizere nemvura kuti dzivigire vanhu zviyo, nokuti saizvozvo ndimi makazvirayira." 
Psalms65:10 Munozadza mihoronga yacho nemvura, uye munoenzanisa mihomba yacho; munoinyorovesa nemvura inopfunha munoropafadza zvibereko zvayo." 
Psalms65:11 Munoshongedza gore nekorona yezvakawanda zvenyu, uye ngoro dzenyu dzinopfachukira nezvakawanda." 
Psalms65:12 Uswa hwomurenje hwopfachukira; zvikomo zvakafukidzwa nomufaro. 
Psalms65:13 Mafuro azara namapoka emakwai, uye mipata yafukidzwa nezviyo; zvinodanidzira nomufaro uye zvinoimba." 
Psalms66:1 Kumutungamiri wokuimba. Rwiyo. Pisarema. [1] Danidzirai nomufaro kuna Mwari, imi nyika yose!" 
Psalms66:2 Imbirai mukurumbira wezita rake; murumbidze zvikuru kukudzwa kwake! 
Psalms66:3 Muti kuna Mwari, “Mabasa enyu anotyisa sei! Simba renyu iguru zvokuti vavengi venyu vanodedera pamberi penyu." 
Psalms66:4 	Nyika yose inokukotamirai; vanokuimbirai nziyo dzokurumbidza, vanoimba nziyo dzokurumbidza zita renyu.” Sera" 
Psalms66:5 Uyai muone zvaitwa naMwari, mabasa ake anotyisa sei pakati pavanhu!" 
Psalms66:6 Akashandura gungwa rikava nyika yakaoma, vakafamba nomumvura zhinji netsoka dzavo, uyai, ngatifarei maari." 
Psalms66:7 	Anotonga nokusingaperi nesimba rake, meso ake anocherechedza ndudzi, vanomumukira ngavarege kumisidzana naye. Sera" 
Psalms66:8 Rumbidzai Mwari wedu, imi vanhu, inzwi rokurumbidzwa kwake ngarinzwike;" 
Psalms66:9 iye akachengetedza upenyu hwedu netsoka dzedu kuti dzirege kutedzemuka. 
Psalms66:10 Nokuti imi, iyemi Mwari, makatiedza; mukatinatsa sesirivha." 
Psalms66:11 Makatipinza mutorongo mukatitakudza mitoro pamisana yedu. 
Psalms66:12 Makabvumira vanhu kukwira pamisoro yedu; takapinda mumoto nomumvura, asi makatiisa kunzvimbo ine zvakawanda." 
Psalms66:13 Ndichauya nezvibayiro zvinopiswa kutemberi yenyu, ndigozadzisa mhiko dzangu kwamuri," 
Psalms66:14 mhiko dzandakavimbisa nemiromo yangu, uye muromo wangu wakataura pandakanga ndiri munhamo." 
Psalms66:15 	Ndichakubayirai mhuka dzakakora nechipiriso chamakondohwe; ndichabayirawo hando nembudzi. Sera 
Psalms66:16 Uyai munzwe, imi mose munotya Mwari; regai ndikuudzei zvaakandiitira." 
Psalms66:17 Ndakachema kwaari nomuromo wangu; rumbidzo yake yaiva parurimi rwangu. 
Psalms66:18 Dai ndakanga ndaviga chivi mumwoyo mangu, Ishe aidai asina kundinzwa;" 
Psalms66:19 asi zvirokwazvo Mwari akateerera akanzwa inzwi rangu mumunyengetero. 
Psalms66:20 Mwari ngaarumbidzwe, iye asina kuramba munyengetero wangu. Kana kudzivisa rudo rwake kwandiri!" 
Psalms67:1 Kumutungamiri wokuimba nomutengeranwa une hungiso. Pisarema. Rwiyo. [1] Mwari ngaatinzwire tsitsi atiropafadze, uye apenyese chiso chake pamusoro pedu, Sera" 
Psalms67:2 kuti nzira dzenyu dzizivikanwe panyika, ruponeso rwenyu pakati pendudzi dzose." 
Psalms67:3 Marudzi ngaakurumbidzei, imi Mwari; marudzi ose ngaakurumbidzei." 
Psalms67:4 	Ndudzi ngadzifare uye dziimbe nomufaro, nokuti munotonga marudzi nokururamisira, uye munotungamirira ndudzi dzenyika. Sera" 
Psalms67:5 Marudzi ngaakurumbidzei, imi Mwari; marudzi ose ngaakurumbidzei." 
Psalms67:6 Ipapo nyika ichabereka mukohwo wayo, uye Mwari, Mwari wedu, achatiropafadza." 
Psalms67:7 Mwari achatiropafadza, uye migumo yose yepasi ichamutya." 
Psalms68:1 Mutungamiri mukuru wokuimba. Pisarema raDhavhidhi. Rwiyo. [1] Mwari ngaasimuke, vavengi vake ngavaparadzirwe; vavengi vake ngavatize pamberi pake." 
Psalms68:2 Sokupeperetswa kunoitwa utsi nemhepo, saizvozvo vapeperetsei; sokunyauka kunoita namo pamberi pomoto, vakaipa ngavaparare pamberi paMwari." 
Psalms68:3 Asi vakarurama ngavafare, uye vafarisise pamberi paMwari; ngavafare uye vapembere." 
Psalms68:4 Imbirai Mwari, imbirai zita rake nziyo dzokurumbidza, murumbidzei zvikuru iye anofamba pamusoro pamakore, zita rake ndiJehovha, uye farai pamberi pake." 
Psalms68:5 Baba venherera, mudziviriri wechirikadzi, ndiye Mwari ari paugaro hwake utsvene." 
Psalms68:6 Vakanga vari voga Mwari akavagarisa mumhuri, anosesedza vasungwa vachiimba; asi mhandu dzinogara panyika yatsva nezuva." 
Psalms68:7 	Pamakatungamirira vanhu venyu, imi Mwari, pamakafamba napakati perenje, Sera" 
Psalms68:8 nyika yakazungunuka, matenga akadurura mvura, pamberi paMwari, iye weSinai, pamberi paMwari, iye Mwari waIsraeri." 
Psalms68:9 Imi Mwari, makanayisa mvura zhinji; mukaita kuti nhaka yenyu yakaneta ifefeterwe." 
Psalms68:10 Vanhu venyu vakagaramo, uye imi Mwari, kubva pane, zvakawanda zvenyu, makariritira varombo." 
Psalms68:11 Ishe akataura shoko, vakadzi vakaparidza shoko vaiva vazhinji kwazvo:" 
Psalms68:12 “Madzimambo navarwi vakakurumidza kutiza; mumisasa, vanhu vakagovana zvakapambwa." 
Psalms68:13 Kunyange pamunenge makavata pakati pemoto yemisasa, mapapiro enjiva yangu akafukidzwa nesirivha, minhenga yayo negoridhe rinovaima.”" 
Psalms68:14 Wamasimba Ose paakaparadzira madzimambo munyika, zvakanga zvakaita sechando chawira pamusoro peZarimoni." 
Psalms68:15 Makomo eBhashani makomo oushe; makomo eBhashani akati twi. 
Psalms68:16 Munotaririreiko negodo, imi makomo akati twi, pagomo rakasarudzwa naMwari kuti atongepo, pachagarwa naJehovha pachake nokusingaperi?" 
Psalms68:17 Ngoro dzaMwari dzinosvika makumi ezviuru nezviuru zvezviuru; Ishe akasvika panzvimbo yake tsvene achibva kuSinai. 
Psalms68:18 Pamakakwira kumusoro, makatungamirira vatapwa mumudungwe wenyu; mukagamuchira zvipo zvaibva kuvanhu, kunyange zvaibva kuna vakapanduka, kuti imi, iyemi Jehovha Mwari, mugarepo." 
Psalms68:19 	Ishe ngaarumbidzwe, Mwari Muponesi wedu, anotakura mitoro yedu zuva nezuva. Sera" 
Psalms68:20 Mwari wedu ndiMwari anoponesa; kupunyuka parufu kunobva kuna Ishe Jehovha. 
Psalms68:21 Zvirokwazvo Mwari achapwanya misoro yavavengi vake, panhongonya dzine vhudzi dzaavo vanorambira muzvivi zvavo." 
Psalms68:22 Ishe anoti, “Ndichavabvisa kubva kuBhashani; ndichavabudisa kubva kwakadzika kwegungwa," 
Psalms68:23 kuti unyike tsoka dzako muropa ravavengi vako, ndimi dzembwa dzako dzichiwanawo mugove wadzo.”" 
Psalms68:24 Mudungwe wenyu wakaonekwa, imi Mwari, mudungwe waMwari wangu naMambo achipinda munzvimbo tsvene." 
Psalms68:25 Mberi kuna vaimbi, vachiteverwa navaridzi vemitengeranwa; pamwe chete navarandakadzi vachiridza matambureni." 
Psalms68:26 Rumbidzai Mwari paungano huru; rumbidzai Mwari pagungano raIsraeri. 
Psalms68:27 Tarirai, rudzi ruduku rwaBhenjamini runovatungamirira, hawo machinda mazhinji aJudha, uye hawo machinda aZebhuruni neaNafutari." 
Psalms68:28 Danai simba renyu, imi Mwari; tiratidzei simba renyu, imi Mwari, sezvamakaita kare." 
Psalms68:29 Nokuda kwetemberi yenyu paJerusarema, madzimambo achakuvigirai zvipo." 
Psalms68:30 Tukai mhuka dziri pakati petsanga, mapoka ehando ari pakati pemhuru dzendudzi. Ngaiuye nesirivha, yakazvininipisa. Paradzirai ndudzi dzinofarira kurwa." 
Psalms68:31 Nhume dzichabva kuIjipiti; Etiopia ichazviisa pasi paMwari. 
Psalms68:32 	Imbirai Mwari, imi ushe hwepasi, rumbidzai Ishe nenziyo, Sera" 
Psalms68:33 kuna iye anotasva matenga akare kumusoro, iye anobudisa inzwi rake, inzwi rine simba." 
Psalms68:34 Paridzai simba raMwari, iye ano ushe huri pamusoro peIsraeri, ane simba riri kudenga denga." 
Psalms68:35 Munotyisa imi Mwari, muri panzvimbo yenyu tsvene; Mwari waIsraeri anopa ushe nesimba kuvanhu vake. Mwari ngaarumbidzwe!" 
Psalms69:1 Kumutungamiri wokuimba namaimbirwo a“Maruva eMahapa.” Pisarema raDhavhidhi. [1] Ndiponesei, imi Mwari, nokuti mvura zhinji yakwira kusvikira pamutsipa wangu." 
Psalms69:2 Ndinonyura munhope yakadzika, pasina pangatsika makumbo angu. Ndapinda mumvura yakadzika; ndafukidzwa namafashamu." 
Psalms69:3 Ndaneta nokuridza mhere yokuti ndibatsirwe; huro dzangu dzaoma, meso angu aneta, nokumirira Mwari wangu." 
Psalms69:4 Vanondivenga ndisina mhosva vakawanda kupfuura bvudzi romusoro wangu; vanondivenga ndisina mhosva vazhinji, avo vanotsvaka kundiparadza. Ndinomanikidzwa kudzosera zvandisina kuba." 
Psalms69:5 Munoziva upenzi hwangu, imi Mwari; mhaka yangu haina kuvanzika kwamuri." 
Psalms69:6 Vaya vane tariro mamuri ngavarege kunyadziswa nokuda kwangu, haiwa Ishe, Jehovha Wamasimba Ose; vanokutsvakai ngavarege kunyadziswa nokuda kwangu, haiwa Mwari waIsraeri." 
Psalms69:7 Nokuti ndinotsunga kusekwa hangu nokuda kwenyu, uye nyadzi dzafukidza chiso changu." 
Psalms69:8 Ndiri mutorwa kuhama dzangu, nomweni kuvanakomana vamai vangu;" 
Psalms69:9 nokuti kushingairira imba yenyu kwandipedza, uye kutuka kwaavo vanokutukai kunowira pamusoro pangu." 
Psalms69:10 Pandinochema nokutsanya, ndinofanira kushinga pakusekwa;" 
Psalms69:11 pandinofuka nguo dzamasaga, vanhu vanondiita shumo." 
Psalms69:12 Vaya vanogara pasuo vanondiseka, uye ndiri rwiyo rwezvidhakwa." 
Psalms69:13 Asi ndinonyengetera kwamuri, imi Mwari, panguva inokufadzai; murudo rwenyu rukuru, imi Mwari, ndipindurei noruponeso rwenyu rwechokwadi." 
Psalms69:14 Ndinunurei mumatope, musandirega ndichinyura; ndirwirei kuna vanondivenga, napamvura zhinji yakadzika." 
Psalms69:15 Musatendera mvura yamafashamu kuti indifukidze, kana kwakadzika kuti kundimedze kana kuti gomba rizarure muromo waro pamusoro pangu." 
Psalms69:16 Ndipindurei, imi Jehovha, zvichibva pakunaka kworudo rwenyu; dzokerai henyu kwandiri nokuda kwetsitsi dzenyu huru." 
Psalms69:17 Regai kuvanzira muranda wenyu chiso chenyu; ndipindurei nokukurumidza, nokuti ndava mudambudziko." 
Psalms69:18 Swederai pedyo mundinunure; ndidzikinurei nokuda kwavavengi vangu. 
Psalms69:19 Munoziva kusekwa kwangu, kunyadziswa nokusakudzwa kwangu; vavengi vangu vose vari pamberi penyu." 
Psalms69:20 Kusekwa kwaputsa mwoyo wangu, uye kwandisiya ndisisina chingandibatsira; Ndakatsvaka vangandinzwira ngoni, asi ndakavashaya, vangandinyaradza, asi ndakavashayazve." 
Psalms69:21 Vakaisa nduru mune zvokudya zvangu, uye vakandipa vhiniga pandaiva nenyota." 
Psalms69:22 Tafura yagadzirwa pamberi pavo ngaive musungo; ngaive shamhu yokuranga neriva. 
Psalms69:23 Meso avo ngaapofumadzwe kuti varege kuona, uye misana yavo iminame nokusingaperi." 
Psalms69:24 Dururirai hasha dzenyu pamusoro pavo; kutsamwa kwenyu kunotyisa ngakuvakurire. 
Psalms69:25 Nzvimbo yavo ngaisiyiwe; ngaparege kuva nomunhu anogara mumatende avo. 
Psalms69:26 Nokuti vanotambudza vaya vamakarova, uye vanotaura pamusoro pokurwadziwa kwavakakuvadzwa nemi." 
Psalms69:27 Vapei mhosva pamusoro pemhosva; ngavarege kuva nomugove woruponeso rwenyu. 
Psalms69:28 Ngavadzimwe mubhuku roupenyu, uye varege kuverengwa pamwe chete navakarurama." 
Psalms69:29 Ndiri pakurwadziwa nenhamo; ruponeso rwenyu imi Mwari, ngarundidzivirire." 
Psalms69:30 Ndicharumbidza zita raMwari norwiyo, uye ndichamukudza nokuvonga." 
Psalms69:31 Izvi zvichafadza Jehovha kukunda nzombe, kupfuura hando nenyanga dzayo, namahwanda ayo." 
Psalms69:32 Varombo vachazviona uye vachafara, imi vanotsvaka Mwari, mwoyo yenyu ngairarame!" 
Psalms69:33 Jehovha anonzwa vanoshayiwa uye haashori vanhu vake vakatapwa. 
Psalms69:34 Denga nenyika ngazvimurumbidze, makungwa nezvose zvinofamba, imomo," 
Psalms69:35 nokuti Mwari achaponesa Zioni agovakazve maguta aJudha. Ipapo vanhu vachagarako, vagoritora;" 
Psalms69:36 Vana vavaranda vake vacharipiwa senhaka, uye avo vanoda zita rake vachagara ikoko." 
Psalms70:1 Kurumidzai kundiponesa, imi Mwari; Haiwa Jehovha kurumidzai kuuya mundibatsire." 
Psalms70:2 Vanotsvaka upenyu hwangu ngavanyadziswe uye vakanganiswe; vose vanofarira kuparara kwangu ngavadzorwe shure vanyare. 
Psalms70:3 Vanoti kwandiri, “Hekani waro! Hekani waro!” ngavadzorerwe shure nokuda kwenyadzi dzavo." 
Psalms70:4 Asi vose vanokutsvakai ngavafare nokufarisisa mamuri; vanoda ruponeso rwenyu ngavagare vachiti, “Mwari ngaakudzwe!”" 
Psalms70:5 Asi ndiri murombo nomushayiwi; uyai nokukurumidza kwandiri, imi Mwari. Imi muri mubatsiri wangu nomurwiri wangu; Haiwa Jehovha, musanonoka." 
Psalms71:1 Ndinovanda mamuri, imi Jehovha; ngandirege kutongonyadziswa." 
Psalms71:2 Ndinunurei uye mundirwire mukururama kwenyu; rerekerai nzeve yenyu kwandiri uye mundiponese. 
Psalms71:3 Ivai bako rangu rokuvanda kwandingaramba ndichienda; rayirai kuti ndiponeswe, nokuti ndimi dombo rangu nenhare yangu." 
Psalms71:4 Haiwa Mwari wangu, ndirwirei, paruoko rwowakaipa, pakubatwa navanhu vakaipa uye vane utsinye." 
Psalms71:5 Nokuti muri tariro yangu, imi Ishe Jehovha, ndakavimba nemi kubva pauduku hwangu." 
Psalms71:6 Ndakazendamira pamuri kubva pakuberekwa kwangu; ndimi makandibudisa mudumbu ramai vangu. Ndicharamba ndichikurumbidzai. 
Psalms71:7 Ndava sechishamiso kuvazhinji, asi imi muri utiziro hwangu hwakasimba." 
Psalms71:8 Muromo wangu uzere nerumbidzo yenyu, ndinoparidza kubwinya kwenyu zuva rose." 
Psalms71:9 Regai kundirasa pandinenge ndakwegura; musandisiya kana simba rangu rapera. 
Psalms71:10 Nokuti vavengi vangu vanotaura zvakaipa pamusoro pangu; avo vakamirira kundiuraya vanorangana pamwe chete. 
Psalms71:11 Vanoti, “Mwari amusiya; muteverei mumubate, nokuti hakuna achamununura.”" 
Psalms71:12 Regai kuva kure neni, imi Mwari; uyai nokukurumidza, imi Mwari wangu, mundibatsire." 
Psalms71:13 Vapomeri vangu ngavaparare vanyadziswe; vaya vanoda kundikuvadza ngavafukidzwe nokusekwa nokunyadziswa. 
Psalms71:14 Asi kana ndirini, ndichagara ndine tariro; ndicharamba ndichikurumbidzai zvakanyanya." 
Psalms71:15 Muromo wangu uchareva zvokururama kwenyu, nezvoruponeso rwenyu zuva rose, kunyange ndisingazivi chiyero charwo." 
Psalms71:16 Ndichauya ndichiparidza mabasa enyu makuru, imi Ishe Jehovha; ndichaparidza kururama kwenyu, iyemi moga." 
Psalms71:17 Kubva pauduku hwangu, imi Mwari, makandidzidzisa, nanhasi uno ndinoparidza mabasa enyu anoshamisa." 
Psalms71:18 Kunyange pandinenge ndakwegura uye bvudzi rachena, musandisiya, imi Mwari, kusvikira ndaparidza simba renyu kurudzi runotevera, nesimba renyu kuna vose vari kuzouya." 
Psalms71:19 Kururama kwenyu kunosvika kudenga kumusoro, imi Mwari, iyemi makaita zvinhu zvikuru. Haiwa Mwari, ndiani akafanana nemi?" 
Psalms71:20 Kunyange imi makandiratidza matambudziko mazhinji uye anorwadza, muchadzosa upenyu hwangu zvakare; kubva kwakadzika kwepasi muchandibudisazve." 
Psalms71:21 Muchawedzera kukudzwa kwangu, uye muchandinyaradzazve." 
Psalms71:22 Ndichakurumbidzai nembira nokuda kwokutendeka kwenyu, imi Mwari wangu; ndichakurumbidzai nenziyo nomutengeranwa, imi Mutsvene woga waIsraeri." 
Psalms71:23 Miromo yangu ichadanidzira nomufaro pandinokurumbidzai nenziyo, iyeni, wamakadzikinura." 
Psalms71:24 Rurimi rwangu ruchataura nezvamabasa enyu akarurama zuva rose, nokuti avo vaida kundikuvadza vanyadziswa uye vakanganiswa." 
Psalms72:1 Pisarema raSoromoni. [1] Shongedzai Mambo nokururamisira kwenyu, imi Mwari, mwanakomana wamambo nokururama kwenyu." 
Psalms72:2 Iye achatonga vanhu venyu nokururama, navanonetswa venyu nokururamisira." 
Psalms72:3 Makomo achavigira vanhu kubudirira, nezvikomo, chibereko chokururama." 
Psalms72:4 Achadzivirira vanonetswa pakati pavanhu, uye achaponesa vana vavanoshayiwa; achapwanya mudzvinyiriri." 
Psalms72:5 Achashinga sokuvapo kwezuva, sokuvapo kwomwedzi, kusvikira kumarudzi ose anotevera," 
Psalms72:6 achafanana nemvura inonaya pamunda une uswa hwakachekererwa, seguti rinonyorovesa nyika." 
Psalms72:7 Pamazuva ake vakarurama vachakura zvakanaka; kubudirira kuchawanda kusvikira mwedzi waguma. 
Psalms72:8 Achatonga kubva kugungwa kusvikira kugungwa, uye kubva paRwizi kusvikira kumagumo enyika." 
Psalms72:9 Marudzi omugwenga achapfugama pamberi pake, uye vavengi vake vachananzva guruva." 
Psalms72:10 Madzimambo eTashishi navari kumahombekombe ari kure vachamuvigira mutero; madzimambo eShebha neSebha vachamupa zvipo. 
Psalms72:11 Madzimambo ose achamupfugamira uye ndudzi dzose dzichamushandira. 
Psalms72:12 Nokuti acharwira vanoshayiwa vanodanidzira; vanonetswa vasina anovabatsira. 
Psalms72:13 Achanzwira ngoni vasina simba navanoshayiwa, uye achaponesa vanoshayiwa kubva parufu." 
Psalms72:14 Achavanunura pakudzvinyirirwa nokuitirwa chisimba, nokuti ropa ravo rinokosha pamberi pake." 
Psalms72:15 Iye ngaararame upenyu hurefu! goridhe rinobva kuShebha ngaripiwe kwaari. Vanhu ngavarambe vachimunyengeterera uye vamuropafadze zuva rose. 
Psalms72:16 Zviyo ngazviwande munyika yose; ngazvizengaire pamusoro pezvikomo. Zvibereko zvazvo ngazvikure zvakanaka seRebhanoni; ngazvibukire sebundo romusango. 
Psalms72:17 Zita rake ngarigare nokusingaperi; ngarirambe riripo sokuvapo kwezuva. Ndudzi dzose dzicharopafadzwa kubudikidza naye, uye vachamuti, ano mufaro." 
Psalms72:18 Jehovha Mwari ngaarumbidzwe, Mwari waIsraeri, iye oga anoita mabasa anoshamisa." 
Psalms72:19 Zita rake rinobwinya ngarirumbidzwe nokusingaperi; nyika yose ngaizadzwe nokubwinya kwake. Ameni naAmeni. 
Psalms72:20 Ndipo panoperera minyengetero yaDhavhidhi, mwanakomana waJese." 
Psalms73:1 Pisarema raAsafi. [1] Zvirokwazvo Mwari akanaka kuna Israeri, kuna avo vakachena pamwoyo." 
Psalms73:2 Asi kana ndirini, tsoka dzangu dzakapotsa dzatsvedza; ndakasara paduku kupunzika." 
Psalms73:3 Nokuti ndakaitira shanje vanozvikudza, pandakaona kubudirira kwavakaipa." 
Psalms73:4 Havatambudziki; miviri yavo ino utano uye vakasimba. 
Psalms73:5 Vakasununguka pamitoro inowanikwa muvanhu; havatambudzwi nezvinotambudza vanhu. 
Psalms73:6 Naizvozvo kuzvikudza ndiko ruketani rwemitsipa yavo; vanozvishongedza nechisimba. 
Psalms73:7 Mumwoyo yavo makasindimara munobuda chitadzo; mifungo yakaipa yendangariro dzavo haina magumo. 
Psalms73:8 Vanoseka, uye vanotaura noutsinye mukuzvikudza kwavo, vanoti vachadzvinyirira vamwe." 
Psalms73:9 Miromo yavo inoti denga nderavo, uye ndimi dzavo dzinotora nyika." 
Psalms73:10 Naizvozvo vanhu vavo vanodzokera kwavari, uye vanonwa mvura yakawanda." 
Psalms73:11 Vanoti, “Mwari angazviziva sei? Ko, Wokumusoro-soro ane ruzivo here?”" 
Psalms73:12 Ndizvo zvakaita vakaipa, havana hanya nguva dzose, vanowedzera pfuma yavo." 
Psalms73:13 Zvirokwazvo ndakanatsa mwoyo wangu, asi pasina; ndakashamba maoko angu ndisina mhosva, asi pasina." 
Psalms73:14 Zuva rose ndanga ndichitambudzwa; ndinorangwa mangwanani ose. 
Psalms73:15 Dai ndakanga ndati, “Ndichataura zvakadai,” ndingadai ndakapandukira vana venyu." 
Psalms73:16 Pandakaedza kunzwisisa izvi zvose, zvakandiremera kwazvo" 
Psalms73:17 kusvikira ndapinda munzvimbo tsvene yaMwari; ipapo ndikazonzwisisa magumo avo. 
Psalms73:18 Zvirokwazvo makavaisa munzira inotsvedza; makavakanda pasi kuti vaparare. 
Psalms73:19 Haiwa, vanoparadzwa kamwe kamwe, vanopedzwa chose nezvinotyisa!" 
Psalms73:20 Sezvakaita kurota panopepuka munhu, saizvozvo pamunomuka, imi Ishe, muchavashora savanhu vanorotomoka." 
Psalms73:21 Mwoyo wangu pawakachema uye mweya wangu ukashungurudzika," 
Psalms73:22 ndakanga ndava benzi uye ndisingazivi; ndakanga ndava mhuka inotyisa pamberi penyu. 
Psalms73:23 Kunyange zvakadaro ndinogara nemi nguva dzose; munondibata noruoko rwenyu rworudyi. 
Psalms73:24 Munondisesedza nezano renyu, uye pashure muchazonditora mondipinza mukubwinya kwenyu." 
Psalms73:25 Ndianiko wandinaye kudenga kana musirimi? Uye nyika haina chandinoshuva kunze kwenyu. 
Psalms73:26 Nyama yangu nomwoyo wangu zvingapera hazvo, asi Mwari isimba romwoyo wangu nomugove wangu nokusingaperi." 
Psalms73:27 Avo vari kure nemi vachaparara; munoparadza vose vasina kutendeka kwamuri. 
Psalms73:28 Asi kana ndirini, zvakanaka kuva pedyo naMwari. Ndakaita Ishe Jehovha utiziro hwangu; ndichataura zvamabasa enyu ose." 
Psalms74:1 Masikiri raAsafi. [1] Haiwa Mwari, makatirambireiko nokusingaperi? Kutsamwa kwenyu kwapfungairireiko pamusoro pamakwai anofudzwa nemi?" 
Psalms74:2 Rangarirai vanhu vamakatenga kare, rudzi rwenhaka yenyu, ivo vamakadzikinura, Gomo reZioni, pamaigara." 
Psalms74:3 Dzorai nhambwe dzenyu mutarise matongo asingaperi, kuparadza ikoku kwose kwakauya nomuvengi pamusoro penzvimbo yenyu tsvene." 
Psalms74:4 Vavengi venyu vakaomba panzvimbo yamakasangana nesu; vakamisa mireza yavo sechiratidzo. 
Psalms74:5 Vakaita savanhu vanosimudza matemo kuti vateme dondo remiti. 
Psalms74:6 Vakaputsa zvose zvakavezwa namatemo avo nembezo. 
Psalms74:7 Vakapisira pasi nzvimbo yenyu tsvene; vakamhura ugaro hweZita renyu. 
Psalms74:8 Vakati mumwoyo yavo, “Tichavaputsa zvachose!” Vakapisa nzvimbo dzose dzokunamatira Mwari munyika." 
Psalms74:9 Hatichaoni zviratidzo zvinoshamisa; hakuna muprofita akasara, pakati pedu hapana munhu anoziva kuti zvicharamba zvakadaro kusvikira rini." 
Psalms74:10 Haiwa Mwari, muvengi acharamba achikushorai kusvikira riniko? Ko, muvengi acharamba achimhura zita renyu nokusingaperi here?" 
Psalms74:11 Munodzoserereiko ruoko rwenyu shure, irwo ruoko rwenyu rworudyi? Rubvisei pamupendero wenguo yenyu muvaparadze!" 
Psalms74:12 Asi imi, iyemi Mwari, ndimi mambo wangu kubva nakare; imi munouyisa ruponeso panyika." 
Psalms74:13 Ndimi makaganhura gungwa napakati nesimba renyu; makaputsa misoro yechikara chomumvura. 
Psalms74:14 Ndimi makapwanya misoro yaRevhiatani, mukamuita chokudya chezvisikwa zvomugwenga." 
Psalms74:15 Ndimi makazarura zvitubu nehova; mukapwisa nzizi dzaigara dzichierera. 
Psalms74:16 Zuva nderenyu, uye usiku ndohwenyuwo; makasimbisa zuva nomwedzi." 
Psalms74:17 Ndimi makatara miganhu yose yenyika; mukaita zvose zhizha nechando. 
Psalms74:18 Rangarirai kuti muvengi akakushorai sei, imi Jehovha, uye kuti mapenzi akamhura sei zita renyu." 
Psalms74:19 Regai kuisa upenyu hwenjiva yenyu kumhuka dzesango; regai kukanganwa nokusingaperi upenyu hwavanhu venyu vanonetswa. 
Psalms74:20 Ivai nehanya nesungano yenyu, nokuti mweya wokurwisana wazadza nzvimbo dzerima munyika." 
Psalms74:21 Musarega vakadzvinyirirwa vachidududza shure nenyadzi; varombo navanoshayiwa ngavarumbidze zita renyu. 
Psalms74:22 Simukai, imi Mwari, mutsigire mhaka yenyu; rangarirai kuti mapenzi anokushorai sei zuva rose." 
Psalms74:23 Regai kushayira hanya ruzha rwavadzivisi venyu, bope ravavengi venyu, rinoramba richikwira." 
Psalms75:1 Kumutungamiri wokuimba namaimbiro okuti, “Regai kuparadza.” Pisarema raAsafi. Rwiyo. [1] Tinokuvongai, imi Mwari, tinokuvongai, nokuti Zita renyu riri pedyo; vanhu vanotaura nezvamabasa enyu anoshamisa." 
Psalms75:2 Imi munoti, “Ndinosarudza nguva yakatarwa; ndini ndinotonga zvakarurama." 
Psalms75:3 	Panozununguka nyika yose navanhu vayo, ini ndini ndinobata mbiru dzayo zvakasimba. Sera" 
Psalms75:4 Kuna vanozvikudza ndinoti, ‘Regai kuzvikudzazve,’ uye kuna vakaipa, ndinoti, ‘Regai kusimudza nyanga dzenyu." 
Psalms75:5 Regai kusimudzira nyanga dzenyu kudenga; regai kutaura nemitsipa mikukutu.’ ” 
Psalms75:6 Hakuna munhu anobva kumabvazuva kana kumavirira, kana anobva kugwenga angasimudzira munhu." 
Psalms75:7 Asi Mwari ndiye anotonga: Anoderedza mumwe, achisumudzira mumwe." 
Psalms75:8 Muruoko rwaJehovha mune mukombe uzere newaini inopupuma, yakavhenganiswa nezvinonhuwira; anoidururira pasi, uye vakaipa vose vapanyika vanoinwa kusvikira pamasese ayo." 
Psalms75:9 Kana ndirini, ndichaparidza izvi nokusingaperi; ndichaimbira Mwari waJakobho rwiyo rwokurumbidza." 
Psalms75:10 Ndichagura nyanga dzavakaipa vose, asi nyanga dzavakarurama dzichasimudzirwa kumusoro." 
Psalms76:1 Kumutungamiri wokuimba nomutengeranwa une hungiso. Pisarema raAsafi. Rwiyo. [1] Mwari anozivikanwa muJudha; zita rake iguru muIsraeri. 
Psalms76:2 Tende rake riri muSaremu, ugaro hwake paZioni." 
Psalms76:3 	Ndipo paakavhuna miseve inovaima, nhoo neminondo, izvo zvombo zvokurwa. Sera" 
Psalms76:4 Imi makashongedzwa nechiedza, kupfuura makomo akapfuma nemhuka." 
Psalms76:5 Varume vakashinga vakavata pasi vapambwa, vakavata hope dzavo dzokupedzisira; hakuna mumwe wavarwi angasimudza maoko ake." 
Psalms76:6 Pakutuka kwenyu, imi Mwari waJakobho, zvose bhiza nengoro zvinovata zvakati mwiro." 
Psalms76:7 Imi moga ndimi munofanira kutyiwa. Mukatsamwa, ndianiko angamira pamberi penyu?" 
Psalms76:8 Muri kudenga makazivisa kutonga kwenyu, uye nyika yakatya ikanyarara," 
Psalms76:9 	haiwa Mwari, pamakasimuka kuti mutonge, kuti muponese vanonetswa vose venyika. Sera" 
Psalms76:10 Zvirokwazvo hasha dzenyu pamusoro pavanhu dzinokuvigirai kurumbidzwa, uye vanosara pahasha dzenyu vachadziviswa." 
Psalms76:11 Itai mhiko kuna Jehovha Mwari wenyu mugodzizadzisa; nyika dzose dzakakupoteredzai ngadzivigire zvipo kuna Iye anofanira kutyiwa. 
Psalms76:12 Anoputsa mweya yavatongi; anotyiwa namadzimambo enyika. 
Psalms77:1 Kumutungamiri wokuimba zveJedhutuni. Pisarema raAsafi. [1] Ndakadanidzira kuna Mwari kuti andibatsire; ndakadana kuna Mwari kuti andinzwe. 
Psalms77:2 Pandakanga ndiri pakutambudzika, ndakatsvaka Ishe; panguva yousiku ndakatambanudza maoko angu asinganeti, uye mweya wangu wakaramba kunyaradzwa." 
Psalms77:3 	Haiwa Mwari, ndakakurangarirai, uye ndikagomera; ndakafungisisa, mweya wangu ukaziya. Sera" 
Psalms77:4 Makakonesa meso angu kutsinzina; ndakatambudzika zvokuti ndakatadza kutaura. 
Psalms77:5 Ndakarangarira mazuva ekare, makore ekare kare;" 
Psalms77:6 ndakarangarira nziyo dzangu panguva yousiku. Mwoyo wangu wakafungisisa uye mweya wangu wakabvunza ukati," 
Psalms77:7 “Ko, Ishe acharamba nokusingaperi here? haachazombonzwiri ngonizve here?" 
Psalms77:8 	Ko, rudo rwake rusingaperi rwakabva nokusingaperi here? chipikirwa chake chakakona nokusingaperi here? Sera" 
Psalms77:9 Ko, Mwari akanganwa kuva nenyasha here? mukutsamwa kwake haachaitira tsiye dzake nyoro here?”" 
Psalms77:10 Ipapo ndakafunga ndikati, “Ndichakumbira hangu pana izvozvi: makore oruoko rworudyi rwoWokumusorosoro.”" 
Psalms77:11 Ndicharangarira mabasa aJehovha; hongu, ndicharangarira zvishamiso zvenyu zvakare kare." 
Psalms77:12 Ndichafungisisa pamusoro pamabasa enyu ose, uye ndicharangarira mabasa enyu makuru." 
Psalms77:13 Haiwa Mwari, nzira dzenyu itsvene. Ndoupiko mwari mukuru saMwari wedu?" 
Psalms77:14 Muri Mwari anoita zvishamiso; munoratidza simba renyu pakati pavanhu. 
Psalms77:15 	Noruoko rwenyu rune simba, makadzikinura vanhu venyu, izvo zvizvarwa zvaJakobho naJosefa. Sera" 
Psalms77:16 Mvura zhinji yakakuonai, imi Mwari, mvura zhinji yakakuonai ikatya; kwakadzika chaiko kwakabvunda." 
Psalms77:17 Makore akadurura mvura, kumatenga kwakaunga nomutinhiro; miseve yenyu yakapenya kuno nokoko." 
Psalms77:18 Kutinhira kwenyu kwakanzwika muchamupupuri, kupenya kwenyu kwakavhenekera nyika; nyika yakadedera ikadengenyeka." 
Psalms77:19 Gwara renyu rakapinda nomugungwa, nzira yenyu ikapinda nomumvura zhinji zhinji, kunyange zvazvo tsoka dzenyu dzakanga dzisingaonekwi." 
Psalms77:20 Makatungamirira vanhu venyu seboka ramakwai noruoko rwaMozisi naAroni. 
Psalms78:1 Masikiri raAsafi. [1] Haiwa vanhu vangu, inzwai kudzidzisa kwangu; teererai mashoko omuromo wangu." 
Psalms78:2 Ndichashamisa muromo wangu nditaure nomufananidzo, ndichataura zvinhu zvakavanzika, zvinhu zvakare kare," 
Psalms78:3 zvatakanzwa nezvatakaziva, zvatakaudzwa namadzibaba edu." 
Psalms78:4 Hatingazozvivanziri vana vavo; tichaudza rudzi runotevera mabasa angarumbidzwa aJehovha, simba rake, nezvishamiso zvaakaita." 
Psalms78:5 Akatema zvirevo zvaJakobho akasimbisa murayiro muIsraeri, waakarayira madzitateguru edu kuti vadzidzise vana vavo," 
Psalms78:6 kuti rudzi runotevera ruzvizive, kunyange vana vachazoberekwa, naivo vagozoudzawo vana vavo." 
Psalms78:7 Ipapo vachavimba naMwari wavo uye havangazokanganwi mabasa ake asi vachazochengeta mirayiro yake. 
Psalms78:8 Havazofanani namadzitateguru avo, rudzi rwakanga rwakasindimara uye rwaimumukira, mwoyo yavo yakanga isingateereri Mwari, mweya yavo yakanga isina kutendeka kwaari." 
Psalms78:9 Vanhu vokwaEfuremu, kunyange vakanga vakapakata uta, vakadzokera shure pazuva rokurwa;" 
Psalms78:10 havana kuchengeta sungano yaMwari, uye vakaramba kufamba maererano nomurayiro wake." 
Psalms78:11 Vakakanganwa zvaakaita, zvishamiso zvaakavaratidza." 
Psalms78:12 Akaita zviratidzo pamberi pamadzibaba avo munyika yeIjipiti, mudunhu reZoani." 
Psalms78:13 Akapamura gungwa akavayambutsa napakati; akaita kuti mvura imire yakasimba sorusvingo. 
Psalms78:14 Akavatungamirira negore masikati, uye nechiedza chomoto usiku hwose." 
Psalms78:15 Akapamura ruware mugwenga akavapa mvura yakawanda seyamakungwa; 
Psalms78:16 akabudisa hova dzemvura paruware akaita kuti iyerere seyenzizi. 
Psalms78:17 Asi vakaramba vachingomutadzira, vachimukira Wokumusoro-soro mugwenga." 
Psalms78:18 Vakaedza Mwari nobwoni vachimugombedzera kuti avape zvokudya zvavaipanga. 
Psalms78:19 Vakapopotera Mwari, vachiti, “Ko, Mwari angawadzira tafura mugwenga here?" 
Psalms78:20 Paakarova dombo, mvura yakatubuka, uye hova dzakayerera mvura zhinji. Asi angagona kutipawo zvokudya here? Angavigira vanhu vake nyama here?”" 
Psalms78:21 Jehovha akati avanzwa, akatsamwa zvikuru kwazvo; moto wake ukaveserwa Jakobho, uye hasha dzake dzikamukira Israeri," 
Psalms78:22 nokuti havana kutenda muna Mwari kana kuvimba nokurwira kwake. 
Psalms78:23 Asi akarayira matenga kumusoro akazarura magonhi okumatenga; 
Psalms78:24 akanayisa mana kuti vanhu vadye, akavapa zviyo zvokudenga." 
Psalms78:25 Vanhu vakadya chingwa chavatumwa; akavatumira zvokudya zvose zvavaigona kudya. 
Psalms78:26 Akazarura mhepo yokumabvazuva kubva kudenga, uye akafambisa mhepo yakabva zasi nesimba rake." 
Psalms78:27 Akavanayisira nyama pamusoro pavo seguruva, shiri dzinobhururuka dzakaita sejecha rokumhenderekedzo yegungwa." 
Psalms78:28 Akaita kuti dziburukire mumisasa yavo, dzakapoteredza matende avo ose." 
Psalms78:29 Vakadya kusvikira vaguta kwazvo, nokuti akanga avapa zvavakanga vachipanga." 
Psalms78:30 Asi vasati vafuratira chokudya chavaikarira, kunyange pachakanga chichiri pamiromo yavo," 
Psalms78:31 kutsamwa kwaMwari kwakavamukira; akauraya vakanga vakanyanya kusimba pakati pavo, akaparadza majaya eIsraeri." 
Psalms78:32 Kunyange zvakadaro, vakaramba vachingotadza; kunyange zvazvo zviratidzo zvake izvi zvaivapo, havana kutenda." 
Psalms78:33 Saka akagumisa mazuva avo nezvisina maturo, uye makore avo mukutya." 
Psalms78:34 Pose pavairayiwa naMwari, ndipo pavaimutsvaka; vaishingairira kudzokerazve kwaari." 
Psalms78:35 Vakarangarira kuti Mwari ndiye Dombo ravo, kuti Mwari Wokumusoro-soro ndiye Mudzikinuri wavo." 
Psalms78:36 Asizve vaingomubata kumeso nemiromo yavo, vachimurevera nhema nendimi dzavo;" 
Psalms78:37 mwoyo yavo yakanga isina kutendeka kwaari, vakanga vasina kutendeka pasungano yake." 
Psalms78:38 Kunyange zvakadaro iye akavanzwira tsitsi; akavakanganwira kuipa kwavo akasavaparadza. Nguva nenguva akadzora kutsamwa kwake, uye haana kumutsa hasha dzake dzose." 
Psalms78:39 Akarangarira kuti ivo vaingova nyama bedzi, mhepo inopfuura isingadzoki." 
Psalms78:40 Vakamumukira mugwenga kazhinji sei, uye vakamuitisa shungu murenje!" 
Psalms78:41 Vakaedza Mwari vamuedzazve; vakagumbusa Iye Mutsvene waIsraeri. 
Psalms78:42 Havana kurangarira simba rake, zuva raakavadzikinura kubva pamudzvinyiriri," 
Psalms78:43 zuva raakaratidza zviratidzo zvake zvinoshamisa muIjipiti, zvishamiso zvake mudunhu reZoani." 
Psalms78:44 Akashandura nzizi dzavo dzikava ropa; havana kugona kunwa muhova dzavo. 
Psalms78:45 Akavatumira mapupira enhunzi dzikavaparadza, uye matatya akavaparadza zvikuru." 
Psalms78:46 Akapa zviyo zvavo kumagutaguta nezvibereko zvavo kumhashu. 
Psalms78:47 Akaparadza mazambiringa avo nechimvuramabwe, uye namaonde emionde yavo nechando." 
Psalms78:48 Mombe dzavo akadziisa kuchimvuramabwe, nezvipfuwo zvavo kukurova kwemheni." 
Psalms78:49 Akaregedzera kutsamwa kwake kukuru pamusoro pavo, hasha dzake, shungu dzake noukasha hwake, boka ravatumwa vokuparadza." 
Psalms78:50 Akagadzira nzira yokutsamwa kwake; haana kuponesa mweya yavo parufu asi akavaisa kudenda. 
Psalms78:51 Akauraya matangwe ose eIjipiti, chibereko chokutanga chomurume pamatende aHamu." 
Psalms78:52 Asi akabudisa vanhu vake seboka ramakwai; akavatungamirira samakwai nomugwenga. 
Psalms78:53 Akavafambisa norugare, asi gungwa rakamedza vavengi vavo." 
Psalms78:54 Saizvozvo akavasvitsa kumuganhu wenyika yake tsvene, kunyika yamakomo yaakatora noruoko rwake rworudyi." 
Psalms78:55 Akadzinga ndudzi mberi kwavo, akagovera nyika yavo kwavari senhaka; akagarisa rudzi rwaIsraeri mudzimba dzavo." 
Psalms78:56 Asi vakaedza Mwari uye vakamukira Wokumusoro-soro; vakasachengeta zvirevo zvake. 
Psalms78:57 Vakanga vasingazvirereki uye vasina kutendeka samadzibaba avo, vasingavimbiki souta hunonyengera." 
Psalms78:58 Vakamutsamwisa nenzvimbo dzavo dzakakwirira; vakamutsa godo rake nokuda kwezvifananidzo zvavo. 
Psalms78:59 Mwari akati avanzwa akatsamwa zvikuru kwazvo; akaramba Israeri zvachose. 
Psalms78:60 Akasiya tabhenakeri yeShiro, iyo tende yaakanga amisa pakati pavanhu." 
Psalms78:61 Akaendesa areka yesimba rake kuutapwa, kubwinya kwake mumaoko omuvengi." 
Psalms78:62 Akaisa vanhu vake kumunondo; akatsamwira nhaka yake zvikuru kwazvo. 
Psalms78:63 Moto wakaparadza majaya avo, uye varandakadzi vavo vakashayiwa nziyo dzesvitsa;" 
Psalms78:64 vaprista vavo vakanga vaiswa kumunondo, uye chirikadzi dzavo hadzina kugona kuchema." 
Psalms78:65 Ipapo Ishe akamuka somunhu anga akakotsira, somunhu amuka pakubatwa newaini." 
Psalms78:66 Akarova vavengi vake vakadzokera shure; akavanyadzisa nokusingaperi. 
Psalms78:67 Ipapo akaramba matende aJosefa, haana kusarudza rudzi rwaEfuremu;" 
Psalms78:68 asi akasarudza rudzi rwaJudha, Gomo reZioni, raakada." 
Psalms78:69 Akavaka nzvimbo yake tsvene senhare yakakwirira, senyika yaakasimbisa nokusingaperi." 
Psalms78:70 Akasarudza Dhavhidhi muranda wake, akamutora kumatanga amakwai;" 
Psalms78:71 akamubvisa pakufudza makwai kuti ave mufudzi wavanhu vake Jakobho, vaIsraeri nhaka yake." 
Psalms78:72 Uye Dhavhidhi akavafudza nokururama kwomwoyo; akavatungamirira namaoko ouchenjeri. 
Psalms79:1 Pisarema raAsafi. [1] Haiwa Mwari, ndudzi dzapinda panhaka yenyu; vakasvibisa temberi yenyu tsvene, Jerusarema varideredza rikava marara." 
Psalms79:2 Vakapa mitumbi yavaranda venyu sezvokudya zveshiri dzedenga, nyama yavatsvene venyu kuzvikara zvenyika." 
Psalms79:3 Vakateura ropa kunge mvura paJerusarema rose, uye hakuna munhu anoviga zvitunha." 
Psalms79:4 Tiri chinhu chinoshorwa navatigere navo, chinosekwa nechinozvidzwa kuna avo vakatipoteredza." 
Psalms79:5 Haiwa Jehovha, mucharamba makatitsamwira nokusingaperi kusvikira riniko? Godo renyu richapisa somoto kusvikira riniko?" 
Psalms79:6 Dururirai hasha dzenyu pamusoro pendudzi dzisingakuzive, napaushe husingadani kuzita renyu;" 
Psalms79:7 nokuti vakapedza Jakobho uye vakaparadza nyika yokwake. 
Psalms79:8 Regai kuverengera pamusoro pedu zvivi zvamadzibaba; tsitsi dzenyu ngadzikurumidze kuuya kuzosangana nesu, nokuti tiri pakutambudzika." 
Psalms79:9 Tibatsirei, imi Mwari Muponesi wedu, nokuda kwokukudzwa kwezita renyu; tirwirei mutiregerere zvivi zvedu nokuda kwezita renyu." 
Psalms79:10 Ndudzi dzichataurireiko dzichiti, “Mwari wavo aripi?” Zivisai pakati pendudzi, pamberi pedu, kuti munotsiva ropa ravaranda venyu rakateurwa." 
Psalms79:11 Kugomera kwavasungwa ngakusvike pamberi penyu; nesimba roruoko rwenyu chengetedzai avo vakatongerwa rufu. 
Psalms79:12 Mutsive kanomwe pamabvi avavakidzani vedu, kutuka kwavakaita zita renyu, imi Ishe." 
Psalms79:13 Ipapo vanhu venyu, makwai amafuro enyu, vachakurumbidza nokusingaperi; kubva kuno rumwe rudzi kusvikira kuno rumwe rudzi, ticharondedzera nezvokurumbidzwa kwenyu." 
Psalms80:1 Kumutungamiri wokuimba nomuimbiro wa “Maruva amahapa esungano.” Pisarema raAsafi. [1] Tinzwei, imi Mufudzi weIsraeri, imi makatungamirira Josefa seboka ramakwai; iyemi munogara pachigaro choushe pakati pamakerubhi, penyai" 
Psalms80:2 pamberi peEfuremu, Bhenjamini naManase. Mutsai simba renyu; uyai mutiponese." 
Psalms80:3 Tidzorei, imi Mwari, penyesai chiso chenyu pamusoro pedu, kuti tiponeswe." 
Psalms80:4 Haiwa Jehovha Mwari Wamasimba Ose, kutsamwa kwenyu kucharamba kuchipisa pamusoro peminyengetero yavanhu venyu kusvikira riniko?" 
Psalms80:5 Makavapa chingwa chemisodzi kuti vadye; makaita kuti vanwe misodzi yakawanda. 
Psalms80:6 Makatiita mavambo enharo kuna vatigere navo, uye vavengi vedu vanotiseka." 
Psalms80:7 Tidzorei, imi Mwari Wamasimba Ose; penyesai chiso chenyu pamusoro pedu, kuti tiponeswe." 
Psalms80:8 Makabudisa muzambiringa kubva muIjipiti; makadzinga ndudzi mukaudyara. 
Psalms80:9 Makaukurira nzvimbo, uye ukava nemidzi ukazadza nyika." 
Psalms80:10 Makomo akanga akafukidzwa nomumvuri wawo, nemisidhari mikuru namatavi awo." 
Psalms80:11 Wakatandavadza matavi awo kusvikira kuGungwa, namabukira awo kusvikira kuRwizi." 
Psalms80:12 Seiko makaputsa masvingo awo kuti vose vanopfuura napo vanonge mazambiringa awo? 
Psalms80:13 Nguruve dzinobva musango dzinouparadza, uye zvisikwa zvesango zvinoudya." 
Psalms80:14 Dzokerai kwatiri, imi Mwari Wamasimba Ose! Tarirai muri kudenga muone! Rindai muzambiringa uyu," 
Psalms80:15 iwo mudzi wakasimwa noruoko rwenyu rworudyi, mwanakomana wamakazvirerera." 
Psalms80:16 Muzambiringa wenyu watemerwa pasi, wapiswa nomoto; pakutuka kwenyu, vanhu venyu vanofa." 
Psalms80:17 Ruoko rwenyu rworudyi ngarugare pamusoro pomunhu ari kurudyi kwenyu, mwanakomana womunhu wamakazvirerera." 
Psalms80:18 Ipapo hatingazobvi kwamuri; timutsiridzei, tigodana kuzita renyu." 
Psalms80:19 Tidzorei, imi Mwari Wamasimba Ose; penyesai chiso chenyu pamusoro pedu, kuti tiponeswe." 
Psalms81:1 Kumutungamiri wokuimba. namaimbirwo egititi. Pisarema raAsafi. [1] Imbirai Mwari nomufaro iye simba redu; danidzirai kuna Mwari waJakobho! 
Psalms81:2 Vambai rwiyo, muridze tambureni, ridzai mbira dzinonakidza nomutengeranwa." 
Psalms81:3 Ridzai runyanga rwehwai paKugara kwoMwedzi, uye pakuchena kwomwedzi, pazuva roMutambo wedu;" 
Psalms81:4 ichi ndicho chirevo chaIsraeri, chakatarwa naMwari waJakobho." 
Psalms81:5 Akachisimbisa somutemo wakanyorwa waJosefa panguva yaakandorwa neIjipiti, uko kwatakanzwa mutauro watakanga tisinganzwisisi." 
Psalms81:6 Iye akati, “Ndakabvisa mutoro pamapfudzi avo; maoko avo akasunungurwa padengu." 
Psalms81:7 	Pakutambudzika kwako wakadana ini ndikakununura, ndakakupindura ndiri mugore romutinhiro; ndakakuedza pamvura zhinji yeMeribha. Sera" 
Psalms81:8 Inzwai, imi vanhu vangu, uye ndichakuyambirai, kana mukada chete kunditeerera, imi Israeri!" 
Psalms81:9 Pakati penyu ngaparege kuva namwari wavatorwa, musapfugamira mwari wokumwe." 
Psalms81:10 	Ndini Jehovha Mwari wako, akakubudisa kubva munyika yeIjipiti. Shamisa muromo wako kwazvo, ndigouzadza." 
Psalms81:11 “Asi vanhu vangu havana kuda kundinzwa, Israeri haana kuda kuzviisa pasi pangu." 
Psalms81:12 	Saka ndakavaregera paukukutu hwemwoyo yavo, kuti vatevere mano avo." 
Psalms81:13 “Kana vanhu vangu vakada kunditeerera, kana Israeri akada kutevera nzira dzangu," 
Psalms81:14 ndaikurumidza kukunda sei vavengi vavo nokurova vavengi vavo noruoko rwangu! 
Psalms81:15 Vaya vanovenga Jehovha vachatya pamberi pake, uye kurangwa kwavo kuchagara nokusingaperi." 
Psalms81:16 Asi imi muchagutswa nezviyo zvakaisvonaka; uye ndichakugutsai nouchi hunobva padombo.” 
Psalms82:1 Pisarema raAsafi. [1] Mwari anogara paungano huru; anotonga pakati pa“vamwari” achiti," 
Psalms82:2 	“Muchasvika riniko muchirwira vasakarurama uye muchisanangura vanhu vakaipa? Sera 
Psalms82:3 Tongai mhaka dzavasina simba nenherera; chengetedzai kodzero dzavarombo navakadzvinyirirwa. 
Psalms82:4 	Nunurai vasina simba navanoshayiwa; varwirei paruoko rwowakaipa. 
Psalms82:5 	“Havana chavanoziva, havana chavanonzwisisa. Vanongofamba-famba murima; nheyo dzose dzenyika dzinozungunuswa." 
Psalms82:6 “Ndakati, ‘Muri vamwari; imi mose muri vanakomana voWokumusorosoro.’" 
Psalms82:7 Asi muchafa savanhuwo zvavo; muchawa savatongi vose.” 
Psalms82:8 Simukai, imi Mwari, mutonge nyika, nokuti ndudzi dzose inhaka yenyu." 
Psalms83:1 Rwiyo. Pisarema raAsafi. [1] Haiwa Mwari, regai kunyarara; musanyarara, imi Mwari, musati mwiro." 
Psalms83:2 Tarirai kumutswa kwaitwa vavengi venyu, namasimudziro avaita misoro yavo." 
Psalms83:3 Vakarangana nounyengeri pamusoro pavanhu venyu; vanorangana pamusoro paavo vomunochengeta zvakanaka. 
Psalms83:4 Ivo vanoti, “Uyai, ngativaparadzei sorudzi, kuti zita raIsraeri rirove.”" 
Psalms83:5 Vanorangana pamwe chete nomwoyo mumwe chete; vanoita sungano yokuzorwa nemi," 
Psalms83:6 matende eEdhomu nevaIshumaeri, neMoabhu navaHagari," 
Psalms83:7 Gebha, Amoni neAmareki, Firistia, navanhu veTire." 
Psalms83:8 	Kunyange neAsiria yabatana navo kuti vasimbise zvizvarwa zvaRoti. Sera 
Psalms83:9 Muvaitire sezvamakaitira vaMidhia, sezvamakaita kuna Sisera naJabhini paRwizi Kishoni," 
Psalms83:10 ivo vakafira paEndori uye vakava sendove pamusoro pevhu. 
Psalms83:11 Muite makurukota avo saOrebhu naZibhi, machinda avo ose saZebha naZarumuna," 
Psalms83:12 ivo vakati, “Handei tindotora mafuro aMwari.”" 
Psalms83:13 Haiwa Mwari wangu, vaitei sendira, sehundi inodzingwa nemhepo." 
Psalms83:14 Somoto unopisa sango kana moto unoririma mugomo," 
Psalms83:15 saka vateverei nedutu renyu mugovavhundutsa nomutinhiro wenyu. 
Psalms83:16 Fukidzai zviso zvavo nenyadzi kuti vanhu vagotsvaka zita renyu, imi Jehovha." 
Psalms83:17 Ngavarambe vachinyadziswa uye vavhundutswe; ngavafire munyadzi dzavo. 
Psalms83:18 Ngavazive kuti imi, mune zita rinonzi Jehovha, ndimi moga Wokumusoro-soro ari pamusoro penyika yose." 
Psalms84:1 Kumutungamiri wokuimba namaimbirwo egititi. Pisarema ravanakomana vaKora. [1] Ugaro hwenyu hwakanaka sei, imi Jehovha Wamasimba Ose!" 
Psalms84:2 Mweya wangu unopanga, kunyange kuziya chaiko, nokuda kwevanze dzaJehovha; mwoyo wangu nenyama yangu zvinodana kuna Mwari mupenyu." 
Psalms84:3 Kunyange shiri diki yakazviwanira imba, nenyenganyenga yakazviwanirawo dendere kwaingachochonyera vana vayo, iyo nzvimbo iri pedyo nearitari yenyu, imi Jehovha Wamasimba Ose, Mambo wangu naMwari wangu." 
Psalms84:4 	Vakaropafadzwa avo vanogara mumba menyu; vanogara vachikurumbidzai. Sera 
Psalms84:5 Vakaropafadzwa avo vane simba ravo mamuri, vakaisa mwoyo yavo parwendo rweZioni." 
Psalms84:6 Pavanopfuura nomuMupata weBhaka, vanouita nzvimbo yamatsime; mvura yomuzhizha inouzadzawo namadziva." 
Psalms84:7 Vanowedzera simba pasimba, kusvikira mumwe nomumwe wavo amira pamberi paMwari muZioni." 
Psalms84:8 	Inzwai munyengetero wangu, imi Jehovha Mwari Wamasimba Ose; rerekerai nzeve yenyu kwandiri, imi Mwari waJakobho. Sera" 
Psalms84:9 Haiwa Mwari, tariraiwo nhoo yedu; ringirai nenyasha dzenyu pamuzodziwa wenyu." 
Psalms84:10 Zviri nani kuva pavazhe dzenyu kwezuva rimwe chete, kupfuura mazuva zviuru ndiri kumwe; ndingada zvangu kuva murindi womukova weimba yaMwari wangu kukunda kugara mumatende avakaipa." 
Psalms84:11 Nokuti Jehovha Mwari ndiye zuva nenhoo; Jehovha anopa nyasha nokukudzwa; hapana chinhu chakanaka chaanganyima avo vanofamba zvakarurama. 
Psalms84:12 Haiwa Jehovha Wamasimba Ose, akaropafadzwa munhu anovimba nemi." 
Psalms85:1 Kumutungamiri wokuimba waVanakomana vaKora. Pisarema. [1] Makanzwira nyasha nyika yenyu, imi Jehovha; makadzosera Jakobho nhaka yake." 
Psalms85:2 	Makakanganwira kutadza kwavanhu venyu, uye mukafukidza zvivi zvavo zvose. Sera" 
Psalms85:3 Makaisa parutivi hasha dzenyu dzose, mukadzoka pakutsamwa kwenyu kunotyisa." 
Psalms85:4 Tidzoreizve, imi Mwari Muponesi wedu, mugoisa kure nemi kusafara kwenyu pamusoro pedu." 
Psalms85:5 Mucharamba makatitsamwira nokusingaperi here? Mucharega kutsamwa kwenyu kuripo kusvikira kumarudzi namarudzi here? 
Psalms85:6 Ko, hamungatimutsiridzizve here, kuti vanhu venyu vagofara mamuri?" 
Psalms85:7 Tiratidzei ngoni dzenyu, imi Jehovha, mugotipawo ruponeso rwenyu." 
Psalms85:8 Ndichateerera zvichataurwa naJehovha Mwari; anovimbisa rugare kuvanhu vake, vatsvene vake, asi ngavasadzokerazve kuupenzi." 
Psalms85:9 Chokwadi, ruponeso rwake rwuri pedyo navanomutya, kuti kubwinya kwake kugogara munyika yedu." 
Psalms85:10 Rudo nokutendeka zvinosangana pamwe chete; kururama norugare zvinosvetana. 
Psalms85:11 Kutendeka kunomera panyika, kururama kunotarira pasi kuri kudenga." 
Psalms85:12 Chokwadi, Jehovha achapa zvinhu zvakanaka, uye nyika yedu ichabereka mukoho wayo." 
Psalms85:13 Kururama kuchamutungamirira, uye kuchamugadzirira nzira yetsoka dzake." 
Psalms86:1 Munyengetero waDhavhidhi. [1] Inzwai, imi Jehovha, uye mundipindure, nokuti ndiri murombo nomushayiwi." 
Psalms86:2 Chengetai upenyu hwangu, nokuti ndakazvipa kwamuri. Muri Mwari wangu; ponesai muranda wenyu anovimba nemi." 
Psalms86:3 Ndinzwirei ngoni, imi Ishe, nokuti ndinodana kwamuri zuva rose." 
Psalms86:4 Vigirai muranda wenyu mufaro, nokuti kwamuri, imi Ishe, ndinosimudzira mweya wangu." 
Psalms86:5 Imi munokanganwira uye makanaka, imi Ishe, muzere norudo kuna vose vanodana kwamuri." 
Psalms86:6 Inzwai munyengetero wangu, imi Jehovha; inzwai kuchemera kwangu ngoni dzenyu." 
Psalms86:7 Ndichadana kwamuri pazuva rokutambudzika kwangu, nokuti muchandipindura." 
Psalms86:8 Haiwa Ishe, hakuna akafanana nemi pakati pavamwari; hakuna mabasa akaita seenyu." 
Psalms86:9 Ndudzi dzose dzamakaita dzichauya kuzonamata pamberi penyu, imi Ishe; dzicharumbidza zita renyu." 
Psalms86:10 Nokuti imi muri mukuru uye munoita zvinhu zvinoshamisa; imi moga ndimi Mwari. 
Psalms86:11 Haiwa Jehovha, ndidzidzisei nzira yenyu, uye ndichafamba muzvokwadi yenyu; ndipei mwoyo mumwe, kuti ndigotya zita renyu." 
Psalms86:12 Ndichakurumbidzai, imi Ishe Mwari wangu, nomwoyo wangu wose; ndicharumbidza zita renyu nokusingaperi." 
Psalms86:13 Nokuti rudo rwenyu rukuru kwandiri; makandirwira paguva rakadzika. 
Psalms86:14 Haiwa Mwari, vanozvikudza vari kundirwisa; boka ravanhu vane utsinye rinotsvaka upenyu hwangu, vanhu vasina hanya nemi." 
Psalms86:15 Asi, imi Ishe, mune tsitsi uye muri Mwari ane nyasha, anononoka kutsamwa, azere norudo nokutendeka." 
Psalms86:16 Dzokerai kwandiri mundinzwire ngoni; ipai simba renyu kumuranda wenyu, uye muponese mwanakomana womurandakadzi wenyu." 
Psalms86:17 Ndipei chiratidzo chokunaka kwenyu, kuti vavengi vangu vazvione vagonyadziswa, nokuti imi, Jehovha makandibatsira uye mukandinyaradza."

Psalms87:2 Jehovha anoda masuo eZioni kupfuura pose panogara Jakobho. 
Psalms87:3 	Zvinhu zvakaisvonaka zvinotaurwa pamusoro pako, iwe guta raMwari: Sera" 
Psalms87:4 “Ndichanyora nezvaRahabhi neBhabhironi pakati pavanondiziva, neFiristiawo neTire, pamwe chete neEtiopia, uye vachati, “Uyu akaberekerwa muZioni.”" 
Psalms87:5 Zvirokwazvo, pamusoro peZioni vachati, “Uyu nowoyo vakaberekerwamo, uye Wokumusoro-soro pachake acharisimbisa.”" 
Psalms87:6 	Jehovha achanyora panonyorwa mazita amarudzi, kuti, “Uyu akaberekerwa muZioni.” Sera" 
Psalms87:7 Pavanoimba, vachaimba vachiti, “Matsime angu ose ari mamuri.”" 
Psalms88:1 Rwiyo. Pisarema ravanakomana vaKora. Kumutungamiri wokuimba namaimbiro emaharati reanoti. Masikiri raHemani muEzrahi. [1] Haiwa Jehovha, Mwari anondiponesa, ndakachema masikati nousiku pamberi penyu." 
Psalms88:1 Rwiyo. Pisarema ravanakomana vaKora. Kumutungamiri wokuimba namaimbiro emaharati reanoti. Masikiri raHemani muEzrahi. [1] Haiwa Jehovha, Mwari anondiponesa, ndakachema masikati nousiku pamberi penyu." 
Psalms88:2 Munyengetero wangu ngausvike pamberi penyu; rerekerai nzeve yenyu kukuchema kwangu. 
Psalms88:3 Nokuti mweya wangu uzere nokutambudzika, uye upenyu hwangu hwaswedera pedyo neguva." 
Psalms88:4 Ndinoverengwa pakati paavo vakaburukira kugomba; ndava somunhu asina simba. 
Psalms88:5 Ndakatsaurwa pamwe chete navakafa, savakaurayiwa vavete muguva, vamusingacharangaririzve, vakagurwa kubva pakuchengeta kwenyu." 
Psalms88:6 Makandiisa mugomba rakadzika dzika, murima guru makadzika dzika." 
Psalms88:7 	Hasha dzenyu dzinorema kwazvo pamusoro pangu, makandifukidza namafungu enyu ose. Sera" 
Psalms88:8 Makanditorera shamwari dzangu dzapedyo, uye mukandiita chinhu chinonyangadza. Ndakapfigirwa uye handingatongopunyuki;" 
Psalms88:9 meso angu asviba neshungu. Ndinodana kwamuri, imi Jehovha, mazuva ose; ndinotambanudzira maoko angu kwamuri." 
Psalms88:10 	Ko, munoratidza zvishamiso zvenyu kuna vakafa here? Ko, vakafa vanomuka vachikurumbidzai here? Sera" 
Psalms88:11 Ko, rudo rwenyu runoparidzwa muguva, nokutendeka kwenyu mukuparadzwa here?" 
Psalms88:12 Ko, zvishamiso zvenyu zvinozivikanwa munzvimbo yerima, kana mabasa akarurama enyu munyika yokukanganwa here?" 
Psalms88:13 Asi ndinochemera rubatsiro kwamuri, imi Jehovha; mangwanani, munyengetero wangu unosvika pamberi penyu." 
Psalms88:14 Seiko, imi Jehovha, muchindiramba uye muchindivanzira chiso chenyu?" 
Psalms88:15 Kubvira pauduku hwangu, ndakatambudzika zvokutosvika pedyo norufu; ndatambudzika nokutyisa kwenyu uye handisisina tariro." 
Psalms88:16 Hasha dzenyu dzakapfuura napamusoro pangu; kutyisa kwenyu kwandiparadza. 
Psalms88:17 Zuva rose zvakandipoteredza samafashamu; ndakaputirwa nazvo chose. 
Psalms88:18 Makanditorera shamwari dzangu navadikani vangu; rima ndiyo shamwari yangu iri pedyo. 
Psalms89:1 Masikiri raEtani muErahi. [1] Ndichaimba nezvorudo rukuru rwaJehovha nokusingaperi; ndichazivisa kutendeka kwenyu nomuromo wangu kumarudzi namarudzi. 
Psalms89:2 Ndichaparidza kuti rudo rwenyu runomira rwakasimba nokusingaperi, uye kuti muchasimbisa kutendeka kwenyu kudenga chaiko." 
Psalms89:3 Imi makati, “Ndakaita sungano nomusanangurwa wangu, ndakapika kuna Dhavhidhi muranda wangu, ndichiti," 
Psalms89:4 	‘Ndichasimbisa imba yako nokusingaperi, uye ndichasimbisa chigaro chako choushe kumarudzi namarudzi.’ ” Sera" 
Psalms89:5 Matenga anorumbidza zvishamiso zvenyu, imi Jehovha, kutendeka kwenyuwo muungano yavatsvene." 
Psalms89:6 Nokuti ndianiko kudenga kumusoro angaenzaniswa naJehovha? Ndianiko akaita saJehovha pakati pezvisikwa zvokudenga? 
Psalms89:7 Mwari anotyiwa zvikuru paungano yavatsvene; iye anotyisa kwazvo kupfuura vose vakamupoteredza. 
Psalms89:8 Haiwa Jehovha Mwari Wamasimba Ose, ndianiko akaita semi? Mune simba, imi Jehovha, uye kutendeka kwenyu kunokupoteredzai." 
Psalms89:9 Munotonga pamusoro pokusunda kwegungwa; mafungu aro paanosimuka, munoanyaradza." 
Psalms89:10 Makapwanya Rahabhi somumwe wavakaurayiwa; makaparadzira vavengi venyu noruoko rwenyu rune simba. 
Psalms89:11 Matenga ndeenyu, nenyika ndeyenyuwo; makavamba nyika nezvose zviri mairi." 
Psalms89:12 Ndimi makasika kumusoro nezasi; Tabhori neHerimoni zvinoimbira zita renyu nomufaro. 
Psalms89:13 Ruoko rwenyu rwakazara nesimba; chanza chenyu chine simba, ruoko rwenyu rworudyi rwakasimudzwa." 
Psalms89:14 Kururama nokururamisira ndidzo nheyo dzechigaro chenyu choushe; rudo nokutendeka zvinokutungamirirai. 
Psalms89:15 Vakaropafadzwa avo vakadzidza kukurumbidzai, vanofamba muchiedza pamberi penyu, imi Jehovha." 
Psalms89:16 Vanofara muzita renyu zuva rose; vanofara mukururama kwenyu. 
Psalms89:17 Nokuti imi ndimi kubwinya nesimba ravo, uye nenyasha dzenyu munosimudzira runyanga rwedu." 
Psalms89:18 Zvirokwazvo, nhoo yedu ndeyaJehovha, mambo wedu, iye Mutsvene oga waIsraeri." 
Psalms89:19 Ipapo makataura muchiratidzo, mukati, kuvanhu venyu vakatendeka: “Ndakaisa simba pamusoro pemhare; ndakasimudzira jaya pakati pavanhu." 
Psalms89:20 Ndakawana Dhavhidhi muranda wangu; ndakamuzodza namafuta matsvene. 
Psalms89:21 Ruoko rwangu ruchamutsigira; zvirokwazvo chanza changu chichamusimbisa. 
Psalms89:22 Hakuna muvengi achamuripisa mutero; hakuna munhu akaipa achamudzvinyirira. 
Psalms89:23 Ndichapwanya vavengi vake pamberi pake, uye ndicharovera pasi vadzivisi vake." 
Psalms89:24 Rudo rwangu rwakatendeka ruchava naye, uye runyanga rwake ruchasimudzirwa muzita rangu." 
Psalms89:25 Ndichaisa ruoko rwake pamusoro pegungwa, ruoko rwake rworudyi pamusoro penzizi." 
Psalms89:26 Iye achadana kwandiri, achiti, ‘Ndimi Baba vangu, Mwari wangu, Dombo noMuponesi wangu.’" 
Psalms89:27 Ndichamugadzawo kuti ave dangwe rangu, iye anokudzwa zvikuru pamadzimambo enyika." 
Psalms89:28 Ndichachengetedza rudo rwangu kwaari nokusingaperi, uye sungano yangu naye haitongoperi." 
Psalms89:29 	Ndichasimbisa imba yake nokusingaperi, chigaro chake choushe chero matenga achingovapo." 
Psalms89:30 “Kana vana vake vakasiya murayiro wangu, uye vakasatevera zvandakatema," 
Psalms89:31 kana vakazvidza mitemo yangu, uye vakakoniwa kuchengeta mirayiro yangu," 
Psalms89:32 ndicharanga chivi chavo neshamhu, uye kuipa kwavo nokurova kukuru;" 
Psalms89:33 asi handizobvisi rudo rwangu kwavari, kana kuzombopandukira kutendeka kwangu." 
Psalms89:34 Handizozvidzi sungano yangu kana kushandura zvakarehwa nemiromo yangu. 
Psalms89:35 Kamwe chete, ndakapika noutsvene hwangu, uye handingarevi nhema kuna Dhavhidhi," 
Psalms89:36 kuti imba yake icharamba iripo nokusingaperi uye chigaro chake choushe chichagara pamberi pangu sezuva; 
Psalms89:37 	chichasimbiswa nokusingaperi somwedzi, chapupu chakatendeka chiri kudenga.” Sera" 
Psalms89:38 Asi imi makaramba, makavenga, makatsamwira kwazvo muzodziwa wenyu." 
Psalms89:39 Makaparadza sungano yomuranda wenyu uye mukasvibisa korona yake muguruva. 
Psalms89:40 Makaputsa masvingo ake ose mukaita nhare dzake matongo. 
Psalms89:41 Vose vanopfuura napo vanomupamba; ava chiseko chavavakidzani vake. 
Psalms89:42 Makasimudzira ruoko rworudyi rwavavengi vake; makaita kuti vavengi vake vose vafare. 
Psalms89:43 Makadzosera shure munondo wake unopinza, uye hamuna kumutsigira pakurwa." 
Psalms89:44 Makagumisa kubwinya kwake, mukawisira pasi chigaro chake choushe." 
Psalms89:45 	Makatapudza mazuva oujaya hwake; makamufukidza nejasi renyadzi. Sera 
Psalms89:46 Haiwa Jehovha kusvikira riniko? Muchazvivanza nokusingaperi here? Hasha dzenyu dzichapisa somoto kusvikira riniko? 
Psalms89:47 Rangarirai kuti upenyu hwangu hunopfuura sei. Nokuti makasikira vanhu vose zvisina maturo! 
Psalms89:48 	Ko, munhu ndoupi angararama akasaona rufu, kana angazviponesa pasimba reguva? Sera" 
Psalms89:49 Haiwa Ishe, rudo rwenyu rukuru rwekare ruripiko, irwo rwamakapika nokutendeka kwenyu kuna Dhavhidhi?" 
Psalms89:50 Rangarirai, Ishe kuti muranda wenyu aisekwa sei, kuti ndaitakura sei muchipfuva changu kutuka kwendudzi dzose," 
Psalms89:51 	kutuka uko vavengi venyu vaikusekai nako, imi Jehovha, pavaiseka nhambwe imwe neimwe yomuzodziwa wenyu." 
Psalms89:52 Jehovha ngaarumbidzwe nokusingaperi! Ameni naAmeni. 
Psalms90:1 Munyengetero waMozisi munhu waMwari. [1] Jehovha, imi makanga muri ugaro hwedu kubva kumarudzi namarudzi." 
Psalms90:2 Makomo asati azvarwa uye musati mabudisa nyika nepasi rose, kubva pakusingaperi kusvikira pakusingaperi muri Mwari." 
Psalms90:3 Munodzosera vanhu kuguruva zvakare, muchiti, “Dzokerai kuguruva, imi vanakomana vavanhu.”" 
Psalms90:4 Nokuti pamberi penyu makore chiuru akangofanana nezuva richangopfuura, kana senguva yokurinda usiku." 
Psalms90:5 Munokukura vanhu pakuvata kworufu; vakaita sebundo idzva ramangwanani," 
Psalms90:6 kunyange richimera riri idzva mangwanani, nenguva yamadekwana rinenge raoma uye rasvava." 
Psalms90:7 Tapera nokutsamwa kwenyu uye tinovhundutswa nehasha dzenyu. 
Psalms90:8 Makaisa zvakaipa zvedu pamberi penyu, zvivi zvedu zvakavanzika muchiedza chokuvapo kwenyu." 
Psalms90:9 Mazuva edu ose anopfuura napasi pehasha dzenyu; tinopedza makore edu nokuchema. 
Psalms90:10 Uwandu hwamazuva edu hunosvika makore makumi manomwe, kana makumi masere, kana tiine simba; kunyange zvakadaro uwandu hwawo hunongova nhamo nokusuwa, nokuti anokurumidza kupfuura, uye isu tobhururuka." 
Psalms90:11 Ndianiko anoziva simba rokutsamwa kwenyu? Nokuti hasha dzenyu dzakakura sokutyiwa kwakakufanirai imi. 
Psalms90:12 Tidzidzisei kuverenga mazuva edu zvakanaka, kuti tiwane mwoyo wouchenjeri." 
Psalms90:13 Dzokai, imi Jehovha! Zvichadaro kusvikira riniko? Ivai netsitsi pamusoro pavaranda venyu." 
Psalms90:14 Tigutsei mangwanani norudo rwenyu rusingaperi, kuti tigoimba nomufaro tigofara mazuva edu ose." 
Psalms90:15 Tifadzei zvinoenzana namazuva amakatitambudza, samakore mazhinji atakaona nhamo." 
Psalms90:16 Mabasa enyu ngaaratidzwe kuvaranda venyu, nokubwinya kwenyu kuvana vavo." 
Psalms90:17 Nyasha dzaIshe Mwari wedu ngadzive pamusoro pedu; tisimbisirei mabasa amaoko edu, hongu, simbisai basa ramaoko edu." 
Psalms91:1 Uyo anogara panzvimbo yokuvanda yoWokumusoro-soro achazorora mumumvuri woWamasimba Ose. 
Psalms91:2 Ndichati pamusoro paJehovha, “Ndiye utiziro hwangu nenhare yangu, Mwari wangu, wandinovimba naye.”" 
Psalms91:3 Zvirokwazvo achakuponesa parugombe rwomuteyi napadenda rinouraya. 
Psalms91:4 Achakufukidza neminhenga yake, uye uchawana utiziro pasi pamapapiro ake; kutendeka kwake kuchava nhoo yako norusvingo rwako." 
Psalms91:5 Haungatyiswi nokuvhundusa kwousiku, kana museve unopfurwa masikati," 
Psalms91:6 kana hosha inofamba murima, kana denda rinoparadza masikati." 
Psalms91:7 Chiuru chingawa parutivi rwako, zviuru gumi kurudyi rwako, asi hazvingaswederi kwauri." 
Psalms91:8 Uchangozviona nameso ako chete, uye uchaona kurangwa kwavakaipa." 
Psalms91:9 Kana ukaita Wokumusoro-soro ugaro hwako, kunyange Jehovha, iye utiziro hwangu," 
Psalms91:10 ipapo hapana chakaipa chichakuwira, hakuna njodzi ichasvika patende rako." 
Psalms91:11 Nokuti acharayira vatumwa vake pamusoro pako, kuti vakuchengete panzira dzako dzose;" 
Psalms91:12 vachakusimudza mumaoko avo, kuti rutsoka rwako rurege kugumburwa padombo." 
Psalms91:13 Uchatsika pamusoro peshumba napamusoro pechiva; uchatsika-tsika shumba huru nenyoka. 
Psalms91:14 “Nokuti anondida,” ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha, “neni ndichamununura; ndichamudzivirira, nokuti anoziva zita rangu." 
Psalms91:15 Achadana kwandiri, uye ndichamupindura; ndichava naye pakutambudzika, ndichamurwira uye ndichamukudza." 
Psalms91:16 Ndichamugutsa noupenyu hurefu, uye ndichamuratidza ruponeso rwangu.”" 
Psalms92:1 Pisarema. Rwiyo rweSabata. [1] Zvakanaka kurumbidza Jehovha nokuimbira zita renyu nziyo, imi Wokumusoro-soro," 
Psalms92:2 kuparidza rudo rwenyu mangwanani nokutendeka kwenyu usiku," 
Psalms92:3 nechiridzwa chine hungiso gumi namaririro akanaka embira. 
Psalms92:4 Nokuti munondifadza namabasa enyu, imi Jehovha; ndinoimba nomufaro nokuda kwamabasa amaoko enyu." 
Psalms92:5 Haiwa Jehovha, mabasa enyu makuru seiko, ndangariro dzenyu dzakadzika sei!" 
Psalms92:6 Munhu asina njere haazivi, mapenzi haanzwisisi," 
Psalms92:7 kuti kunyange vakaipa vachimera souswa, uye vaiti vezvakaipa vose vachikura, vachaparadzwa nokusingaperi." 
Psalms92:8 Asi imi, iyemi Jehovha, munosimudzirwa nokusingaperi." 
Psalms92:9 Nokuti zvirokwazvo vavengi venyu, imi Jehovha, zvirokwazvo vavengi venyu vachaparadzwa; vaiti vezvakaipa vose vachaparadzirwa." 
Psalms92:10 Makasimudzira runyanga rwangu sorwenyati; mafuta akaisvonaka akadururirwa pamusoro pangu. 
Psalms92:11 Meso angu akaona kukundwa kwavadzivisi vangu; nzeve dzangu dzakanzwa kuparadzwa kwavavengi vangu vakaipa. 
Psalms92:12 Vakarurama vachakura kwazvo somuchindwe, vachakura somusidhari weRebhanoni;" 
Psalms92:13 wakadyarwa muimba yaJehovha, vachakura kwazvo muvanze dzaMwari wedu." 
Psalms92:14 Vacharamba vachibereka zvibereko pakukwegura kwavo, vachagara vari vanyoro uye vari vatsva." 
Psalms92:15 Vachiparidza kuti, “Jehovha akarurama; ndiye Dombo rangu, uye maari hamuna chakaipa.”" 
Psalms93:1 Jehovha anobata ushe, akashongedzwa noumambo; Jehovha akashongedzwa noumambo uye akafukidzwa nesimba. Nyika yakateyiwa zvakasimba; haingazungunuswi." 
Psalms93:2 Chigaro chenyu choushe chakasimbiswa kare kare; imi muripo nokusingaperi. 
Psalms93:3 Haiwa Jehovha, makungwa akasimudza, makungwa akasimudza manzwi awo; makungwa akasimudza mafungu anotinhira." 
Psalms93:4 Mukuru kukunda mutinhiro wemvura zhinji, mukuru kukunda mafungu egungwa, Jehovha ari kumusoro ndiye mukuru." 
Psalms93:5 Zvirevo zvenyu hazvishanduki; utsvene hunofukidza imba yenyu imi Jehovha, kwamazuva asingaperi." 
Psalms94:1 Haiwa Jehovha, imi Mwari anotsiva, haiwa Mwari iyemi munotsiva, penyai." 
Psalms94:2 Simukai, imi Mutongi wenyika; tsivai zvakafanira vanozvikudza." 
Psalms94:3 Haiwa Jehovha, vakaipa vachasvika riniko, vachasvika riniko vakaipa vachingofara?" 
Psalms94:4 Vanodurura mashoko okuzvikudza; vose vanoita zvakaipa vazere nokuzvirumbidza. 
Psalms94:5 Vanopwanya vanhu venyu, imi Jehovha, vanodzvinyirira nhaka yenyu." 
Psalms94:6 Vanouraya chirikadzi nomweni; vanoponda nherera. 
Psalms94:7 Vanoti, “Jehovha haaoni; Mwari waJakobho haana hanya.”" 
Psalms94:8 Nzwisisai, imi vasina njere pakati pavanhu; imi mapenzi, muchava vakachenjera riniko?" 
Psalms94:9 Ko, iye akasima nzeve, haanganzwi here? Iye akaumba ziso haangaoni here?" 
Psalms94:10 Ko, iye anoranga ndudzi haangarangi here? Anodzidzisa vanhu angashayiwa zivo here?" 
Psalms94:11 Jehovha anoziva mirangariro yavanhu; anoziva kuti haina maturo. 
Psalms94:12 Akaropafadzwa munhu anorangwa nemi, iyemi Jehovha, munhu wamunodzidzisa pamurayiro wenyu;" 
Psalms94:13 munomuzorodza pamazuva enhamo, kusvikira akaipa achererwa gomba." 
Psalms94:14 Nokuti Jehovha haangarambi vanhu vake; haangambosiyi nhaka yake. 
Psalms94:15 Kutonga kuchawanikwazve pamusoro pavakarurama, uye vose vakarurama pamwoyo vachakutevera." 
Psalms94:16 Ndianiko achandirwira pane vakaipa? Ndianiko achandibatsira pavaiti vezvakaipa? 
Psalms94:17 Dai Jehovha asina kundibatsira, ndingadai ndakakurumidza kugara parunyararo rworufu." 
Psalms94:18 Pandakati, “Rutsoka rwangu rwotedzemuka,” rudo rwenyu, imi Jehovha, rwakanditsigira." 
Psalms94:19 Pandakava nokufunganya kukuru mandiri, kunyaradza kwenyu kwakandivigira mufaro kumweya wangu." 
Psalms94:20 Ko, chigaro choushe chino uori chingashamwaridzana nemi here, icho chinouyisa kutambudzika muzvirevo zvacho?" 
Psalms94:21 Vanobatana pamwe chete kuti varwise vakarurama, vachipomera mhosva yorufu kuna vasina mhosva." 
Psalms94:22 Asi Jehovha ndiye ava nhare yangu, uye Mwari wangu ndiye dombo randinotizira." 
Psalms94:23 Iye achavatsiva nokuda kwezvivi zvavo, uye achavaparadza nokuda kwezvakaipa zvavo; Jehovha Mwari wedu achavaparadza." 
Psalms95:1 Uyai, tiimbire Jehovha nomufaro; ngatidanidzirei kuDombo roruponeso rwedu." 
Psalms95:2 Ngatisvikei pamberi pake nokuvonga uye timukudze nenziyo. 
Psalms95:3 Nokuti Jehovha ndiye Mwari mukuru, Mambo mukuru pamusoro pavamwari vose." 
Psalms95:4 Nzvimbo dzakadzika dzapanyika dziri muruoko rwake, uye misoro yamakomo ndeyake." 
Psalms95:5 Gungwa nderake, nokuti ndiye akariita, uye maoko ake akaumba nyika yakaoma." 
Psalms95:6 Uyai tikotame, tinamate, ngatipfugamei pamberi paJehovha Muiti wedu;" 
Psalms95:7 nokuti ndiye Mwari wedu, uye isu tiri vanhu vanofudzwa naye, makwai anochengetwa naye. Nhasi kana muchinzwa inzwi rake," 
Psalms95:8 musaomesa mwoyo yenyu sezvamakaita paMeribha, sezvamakaita pazuva riya paMasa mugwenga," 
Psalms95:9 pandakaedzwa namadzibaba enyu kunyange vakanga vaona zvandakanga ndaita. 
Psalms95:10 Ndakatsamwira rudzi urwu kwamakore makumi mana; ndakati, “Ava vanhu vane mwoyo yakatsauka, uye havana kuziva nzira dzangu.”" 
Psalms95:11 Saka ndakapika pakutsamwa kwangu ndikati, “Havangazombopindi pazororo rangu.”" 
Psalms96:1 Imbirai Jehovha rwiyo rutsva; imbirai Jehovha, nyika yose." 
Psalms96:2 Imbirai Jehovha, rumbidzai zita rake; paridzai ruponeso rwake zuva nezuva." 
Psalms96:3 Paridzai kubwinya kwake pakati pendudzi, namabasa ake anoshamisa pakati pamarudzi." 
Psalms96:4 Nokuti Jehovha mukuru uye anofanira kurumbidzwa, iye anofanira kutyiwa pamusoro pavamwari vose." 
Psalms96:5 Nokuti vamwari vose vendudzi zvifananidzo, asi Jehovha akaita matenga." 
Psalms96:6 Kubwinya noumambo zviri pamberi pake; simba nokubwinya zviri munzvimbo yake tsvene. 
Psalms96:7 Remekedzai Jehovha, imi mhuri dzavanhu, ipai rukudzo nesimba kuna Jehovha." 
Psalms96:8 Ipai kuna Jehovha rukudzo rwakafanira zita rake; uyai nechipiriso mugopinda pavanze dzake. 
Psalms96:9 Namatai Jehovha mukubwinya kwoutsvene hwake; dederai pamberi pake, imi nyika dzose." 
Psalms96:10 Muti pakati pendudzi, “Jehovha ndiye anobata ushe.” Nyika yakanyatsosimbiswa, haingazungunuswi; uye achatonga marudzi nokururama." 
Psalms96:11 Kudenga denga ngakufare, nyika ngaifarisise; gungwa ngaritinhire, nezvose zviri mariri;" 
Psalms96:12 masango ngaafare, nezvose zviri maari. Ipapo miti yose yesango ichaimba nomufaro." 
Psalms96:13 ichaimba pamberi paJehovha, nokuti anouya, anouya kuzotonga nyika. Achatonga nyika nokururama, uye vanhu nechokwadi chake." 
Psalms97:1 Jehovha anobata ushe, nyika ngaifare; zviwi zviri kure ngazvifare." 
Psalms97:2 Makore nerima guru zvakamukomberedza; kururama nokururamisira ndidzo nheyo dzechigaro chake choushe. 
Psalms97:3 Moto unoenda mberi kwake uchipisa vavengi vake kumativi ose. 
Psalms97:4 Mheni yake inovhenekera pasi; nyika inozviona igodedera. 
Psalms97:5 Makomo anonyungudika senamo pamberi paJehovha, pamberi paIshe wenyika yose." 
Psalms97:6 Kudenga denga kunoparidza kururama kwake, uye vanhu vose vanoona kubwinya kwake." 
Psalms97:7 Vose vanonamata zvifananidzo vanonyadziswa, avo vanozvirumbidza nezvifananidzo, munamatei, imi vamwari vose!" 
Psalms97:8 Zioni rinonzwa rigofara uye misha yeJudha inofara nokuda kwezvamakatonga, imi Jehovha." 
Psalms97:9 Nokuti imi, iyemi Jehovha, ndimi Wokumusoro-soro pasi pose; makasimudzirwa kupfuura vamwari vose." 
Psalms97:10 Vanoda Jehovha ngavavenge zvakaipa, nokuti anorinda upenyu kwavanhu vake vakatendeka uye anovarwira muruoko rwowakaipa." 
Psalms97:11 Chiedza chinovhenekera pamusoro pavakarurama, nomufaro pamusoro pavane mwoyo yakarurama." 
Psalms97:12 Farai muna Jehovha, imi vakarurama, uye mukudze zita rake dzvene." 
Psalms98:1 Pisarema. [1] Imbirai Jehovha rwiyo rutsva, nokuti akaita zvinhu zvinoshamisa; ruoko rwake rworudyi nechanza chake chitsvene zvakamukundisa." 
Psalms98:2 Jehovha akazivisa ruponeso rwake uye akaratidza kururama kwake kundudzi," 
Psalms98:3 Akarangarira rudo rwake nokutendeka kwake kuimba yaIsraeri; migumo yose yenyika yakaona ruponeso rwaMwari wedu. 
Psalms98:4 Danidzirai nomufaro kuna Jehovha, imi nyika yose, imbai nziyo mupembere nomufaro;" 
Psalms98:5 imbirai Jehovha nembira, nembira nenzwi rokuimba," 
Psalms98:6 nehwamanda nokurira kworunyanga rwegondohwe, danidzirai nomufaro pamberi paJehovha, iye Mambo." 
Psalms98:7 Gungwa ngaritinhire, nezvose zviri mariri, nenyika, navose vanogaramo." 
Psalms98:8 Nzizi ngadziuchire maoko adzo, makomo ngaaimbe pamwe chete nomufaro;" 
Psalms98:9 ngaaimbe pamberi paJehovha, nokuti anouya kuzotonga nyika. Achatonga nyika zvakarurama navanhu nokururamisira." 
Psalms99:1 Jehovha anobata ushe, ndudzi ngadzidedere; anogara pachigaro choushe chiri pakati pamakerubhi, nyika ngaizungunuke." 
Psalms99:2 Jehovha mukuru paZioni; iye akasimudzirwa pamusoro pendudzi dzose. 
Psalms99:3 Ngavarumbidze zita renyu guru rinotyisa, iye mutsvene." 
Psalms99:4 Mambo mukuru, anoda kururamisira, imi makasimbisa kururama; muna Jakobho makaita kururamisira nokururama." 
Psalms99:5 Kudzai Jehovha Mwari wedu nokunamata pachitsiko chetsoka dzake; iye mutsvene. 
Psalms99:6 Mozisi naAroni vakanga vari pakati pavaprista vake, Samueri akanga ari pakati paavo vaidana kuzita rake, vakadana kuna Jehovha akavapindura." 
Psalms99:7 Akataura kwavari ari mushongwe yegore; vakachengeta zvipupuriro zvake nemitemo yaakavapa. 
Psalms99:8 Haiwa Jehovha Mwari wedu, imi makavapindura; makanga muri Mwari anokanganwira kuna Israeri, kunyange makavaranga pane zvavakaita." 
Psalms99:9 Kudzai Jehovha Mwari wedu mumunamate pagomo rake dzvene, nokuti Jehovha Mwari wedu ndiye mutsvene." 
Psalms100:1 Pisarema rokuvonga. [1] Danidzirai nomufaro kuna Jehovha, imi nyika dzose." 
Psalms100:2 Shumirai Jehovha nomufaro; uyai pamberi pake nenziyo dzomufaro. 
Psalms100:3 Zivai kuti Jehovha ndiye Mwari. Ndiye akatiita, uye tiri vake; tiri vanhu vake, namakwai anofudzwa naye." 
Psalms100:4 Pindai pamasuo ake nokuvonga nomuvanze dzake nokurumbidza; chimuvongai uye murumbidze zita rake. 
Psalms100:5 Nokuti Jehovha akanaka uye rudo rwake runogara nokusingaperi; kutendeka kwake kunoramba kuripo kumarudzi namarudzi. 
Psalms101:1 Pisarema raDhavhidhi. [1] Ndichaimba nezvorudo rwenyu nokururamisira kwenyu; kwamuri, imi Jehovha, ndichaimba nziyo dzokurumbidza." 
Psalms101:2 Ndichangwarira kurarama upenyu husina chahungapomerwa. muchauya riniko kwandiri? Ndichafamba mumba mangu nomwoyo usina chaungapomerwa. 
Psalms101:3 Handingaisi chinhu chakaipa pamberi pangu. Ndinovenga mabasa avanhu vasingatendi; haanganamatiri kwandiri. 
Psalms101:4 Vanhu vane mwoyo yakatsauka vachava kure neni; handichazovi nechokuita nechakaipa. 
Psalms101:5 Ani naani anoitira muvakidzani wake makuhwa pakavanda, iyeye ndiye wandichaita kuti anyarare; ani naani ane meso anozvikudza nomwoyo unozvikudza, iyeye handingamuregi akadaro." 
Psalms101:6 Meso angu achava pamusoro pavakatendeka vari munyika, kuti vagare neni; iye ane mafambiro asina chaangapomerwa, achandishumira." 
Psalms101:7 Hakuna munhu anonyengera achagara mumba mangu; hakuna munhu anotaura nhema achamira pamberi pangu. 
Psalms101:8 Mangwanani oga oga ndichaita kuti vanyarare, vakaipa vose vari panyika; ndichauraya vaiti vezvakaipa vose, vabve muguta raJehovha." 
Psalms102:1 Munyengetero womunhu anotambudzika. Paanenge aziya uye odurura kuchema kwake pamberi paJehovha. [1] Inzwai munyengetero wangu, imi Jehovha; kuchemera kwangu rubatsiro ngakusvike kwamuri." 
Psalms102:2 Regai kundivanzira chiso chenyu pandinenge ndichitambudzika. Rerekerai nzeve yenyu kwandiri; pandinokudanai, ndipindurei nokukurumidza." 
Psalms102:3 Nokuti mazuva angu anopera soutsi; mapfupa angu anopisa samazimbe anopfuta. 
Psalms102:4 Mwoyo wangu warohwa uye waoma souswa; ndinokanganwa kudya zvokudya zvangu. 
Psalms102:5 Nokuda kwokugomera kwangu kukuru ndaonda zvokuti ganda rangu ranamatira pamapfupa. 
Psalms102:6 Ndafanana nezizi romugwenga, sezizi riri pakati pamatongo." 
Psalms102:7 Ndinovata ndakasvinura, ndava seshiri iri yoga pamusoro pedenga." 
Psalms102:8 Zuva rose vavengi vangu vanondituka; avo vanondipengera vanoshandisa zita rangu sechituko. 
Psalms102:9 Nokuti ndinodya madota sechokudya changu, uye ndinovhenganisa zvokunwa zvangu nemisodzi," 
Psalms102:10 nokuda kwehasha dzenyu huru, nokuti makandisimudza mukandikanda parutivi." 
Psalms102:11 Mazuva angu akaita somumvuri wamadekwana; ndinosvava souswa. 
Psalms102:12 Asi imi, iyemi Jehovha, munogara pachigaro choushe nokusingaperi; mukurumbira wenyu uripo kusvikira kumarudzi namarudzi." 
Psalms102:13 Imi muchasimuka mugonzwira Zioni tsitsi, nokuti ndiyo nguva yokurinzwira nyasha; nguva yakatarwa yasvika." 
Psalms102:14 Nokuti matombo aro anokosha kuvaranda venyu; guruva raro chairo rinovaendesa kugomba. 
Psalms102:15 Ndudzi dzichatya zita raJehovha, madzimambo ose enyika achatya kubwinya kwenyu." 
Psalms102:16 Nokuti Jehovha achavakazve Zioni, agozviratidza pakubwinya kwake." 
Psalms102:17 Achadavira minyengetero yavanotambura; haangazvidzi chikumbiro chavo. 
Psalms102:18 Izvi ngazvinyorerwe marudzi amangwana, kuti vanhu vasati vasikwa vagorumbidza Jehovha vachiti," 
Psalms102:19 “Jehovha akatarira pasi ari panzvimbo yake tsvene yakakwirira, ari kudenga akacherechedza pasi," 
Psalms102:20 kuti anzwe kugomera kwavasungwa agosunungura avo vakatongerwa rufu.” 
Psalms102:21 Saka zita raJehovha richaparidzwa muZioni, nokurumbidzwa kwake muJerusarema," 
Psalms102:22 panoungana marudzi noushe kuti vanamate Jehovha. 
Psalms102:23 Panguva youpenyu hwangu akatapudza simba rangu; akapfupisa mazuva angu. 
Psalms102:24 Saka ndakati, “Regai kundibvisa, imi Mwari wangu, pakati pamazuva angu; makore enyu anoramba aripo kusvikira kumarudzi namarudzi." 
Psalms102:25 Pamavambo makateya nheyo dzenyika, uye kudenga denga ndiro basa ramaoko enyu." 
Psalms102:26 Izvo zvichaparara, asi imi munogara muripo; zvose zvichasakara senguo. Senguo muchavabvisa uye vacharaswa." 
Psalms102:27 Asi imi mucharamba makadaro, uye makore enyu haatongogumi." 
Psalms102:28 Vana vavaranda venyu vachagara pamberi penyu; zvizvarwa zvavo zvichasimbiswa pamberi penyu.” 
Psalms103:1 Pisarema raDhavhidhi. [1] Rumbidza Jehovha, iwe mweya wangu; zvose zviri mukati mangu, ngazvirumbidze zita rake dzvene." 
Psalms103:2 Rumbidza Jehovha, iwe mweya wangu, uye urege kukanganwa mikomborero yake," 
Psalms103:3 iye anokanganwira zvivi zvako zvose, uye anoporesa kurwara kwako kwose," 
Psalms103:4 anodzikinura upenyu hwako kubva pagomba, uye anokushongedza korona yorudo netsitsi," 
Psalms103:5 anogutsa zvido zvako nezvinhu zvakanaka, kuti uduku hwako huvandudzwe sohwegondo." 
Psalms103:6 Jehovha anoita zvakarurama, uye anoruramisira vose vakadzvinyirirwa." 
Psalms103:7 Akazivisa nzira dzake kuna Mozisi, namabasa ake kuvanhu veIsraeri:" 
Psalms103:8 Jehovha ane tsitsi nenyasha, anononoka kutsamwa, azere norudo." 
Psalms103:9 Haangarambi achipomera mhosva, uye haangarambi akatsamwa nokusingaperi;" 
Psalms103:10 haatiitiri sezvakafanira zvivi zvedu, kana kutipa mubayiro sezvakafanira zvakaipa zvedu." 
Psalms103:11 Nokuti sokukwirira kwaakaita kudenga kumusoro kwenyika, ndizvo zvakaita kukura kworudo rwake kuna vanomutya;" 
Psalms103:12 sokuva kure kwamabvazuva namavirira, saizvozvo akabvisa kudarika kwedu kwatiri." 
Psalms103:13 Sokunzwira tsitsi kunoita baba vana vavo, saizvozvo Jehovha ane tsitsi pamusoro pavanomutya;" 
Psalms103:14 nokuti anoziva kuti takaumbwa sei, anorangarira kuti tiri guruva." 
Psalms103:15 Kana ari munhu zvake, mazuva ake akaita souswa, anokura seruva resango;" 
Psalms103:16 mhepo inorova napamusoro paro onei raenda, uye nzvimbo yaranga riri haicharirangaririzve." 
Psalms103:17 Asi kubva pakusingaperi kusvikira pakusingaperi, rudo rwaJehovha rwuri pana avo vanomutya, nokururama kwake kuvana vavana vavo," 
Psalms103:18 naavo vanochengeta sungano yake uye vanorangarira zvaakatema. 
Psalms103:19 Jehovha akasimbisa chigaro chake choushe kudenga, uye ushe hwake hunotonga zvinhu zvose." 
Psalms103:20 Rumbidzai Jehovha, imi vatumwa vake, nemi vane simba vanoita zvaakarayira, vanoteerera shoko rake." 
Psalms103:21 Rumbidzai Jehovha, imi hondo dzose dzokudenga, imi varanda vake vanoita kuda kwake." 
Psalms103:22 Rumbidzai Jehovha, imi mabasa ake ose kwose kwose kuno umambo hwake. Rumbidza Jehovha, mweya wangu." 
Psalms104:1 Rumbidza Jehovha, mweya wangu. Haiwa Jehovha Mwari wangu, muri mukuru kwazvo; makashongedzwa nokubwinya noumambo." 
Psalms104:2 Iye anozviputira muchiedza saanozviputira nenguo; anotatamura matenga kunge tende 
Psalms104:3 uye anogadzika matanda edzimba dzake pamusoro pemvura yadzo zhinji. Anoita makore ngoro dzake, uye anokwira pamapapiro emhepo." 
Psalms104:4 Anoita mhepo nhume dzake, namazhenje omoto varanda vake." 
Psalms104:5 Anoteya nyika pamusoro penheyo dzayo; haingatongozungunuswi. 
Psalms104:6 Makaifukidza nokwakadzika somunofukidza nenguo; mvura zhinji yakamira pamusoro pamakomo. 
Psalms104:7 Asi pakutuka kwenyu mvura zhinji yakatiza, pakunzwa mutinhiro wenyu iyo yakatiza;" 
Psalms104:8 yakayerera napamusoro pamakomo, ikadzika nomumipata, ichienda kunzvimbo yamakairayira." 
Psalms104:9 Makatara muganhu waisingadariki; haichazombofukidzizve nyika. 
Psalms104:10 Anoita kuti matsime adire mvura mumipata; inoyerera napakati pamakomo. 
Psalms104:11 Anonwisa mhuka dzose dzesango mvura; mbizi dzinopedza nyota yadzo. 
Psalms104:12 Shiri dzedenga dzinovaka matendere adzo pedyo nemvura; dzinorira dziri pakati pamatavi. 
Psalms104:13 Anodiridza makomo ari padzimba dzake dzapamusoro; nyika inogutswa nezvibereko zvebasa rake. 
Psalms104:14 Anomeresa uswa hwemombe, nembeu kuti vanhu vasakure, achibudisa zvokudya kubva pasi:" 
Psalms104:15 iyo waini inofadza mwoyo womunhu, namafuta anopenyesa chiso chake, nechingwa chinosimbisa mwoyo wake." 
Psalms104:16 Miti yaJehovha inodiridzwa zvakanaka, iyo misidhari yeRebhanoni yaakasima." 
Psalms104:17 Shiri dzinoruka matendere adzo ipapo; dambiramurove rakaita imba yaro mumiti yomupaini. 
Psalms104:18 Makomo marefu ndeengururu; mapako ndiwo utiziro hwembira. 
Psalms104:19 Mwedzi unotara nguva, uye zuva rinoziva nguva yokuvira kwaro." 
Psalms104:20 Munouyisa rima, usiku hugovapo, uye zvikara zvose zvesango zvinobuda kundovhima." 
Psalms104:21 Shumba dzinoomba dzichitsvaka nyama, uye dzinotsvaka zvokudya zvadzo kubva kuna Mwari." 
Psalms104:22 Kana zuva robuda, idzo dzinoenda kure; dzinodzokera dzondovata mumapako adzo." 
Psalms104:23 Ipapo munhu anobuda oenda kubasa rake, kumushando wake kusvikira madekwana." 
Psalms104:24 Haiwa Jehovha, mabasa enyu manganiko! Makaaita ose nenjere; nyika izere nezvisikwa zvenyu." 
Psalms104:25 Hero gungwa, rakakura uye rakapamhamha, rine zvisikwa zvisingagoni kuverengwa, zvipenyu zvikuru nezviduku." 
Psalms104:26 Hezvo zvikepe zvinofamba-famba, nengwena, yamakaumba kuti itambemo." 
Psalms104:27 Zvose izvi zvinotarira kwamuri kuti muzvipe zvokudya zvazvo nenguva yakafanira. 
Psalms104:28 Pamunozvipa, zvinozviunganidza; pamunozarura ruoko rwenyu, izvo zvinogutswa nezvinhu zvakanaka." 
Psalms104:29 Pamunovanza chiso chenyu, izvo zvinovhundutswa; pamunozvitorera mweya, izvo zvinofa uye zvinodzokera kuguruva." 
Psalms104:30 Pamunotuma Mweya wenyu, izvo zvinosikwa, uye munovandudza chiso chenyika." 
Psalms104:31 Kubwinya kwaJehovha ngakugare nokusingaperi; Jehovha ngaafare nebasa rake," 
Psalms104:32 iye anotarira nyika, yobva yabvunda, iye anobata makomo obva apwititika utsi." 
Psalms104:33 Ndichaimbira Jehovha upenyu hwangu hwose; ndichaimbira Mwari wangu nziyo dzokurumbidza ndichiri mupenyu. 
Psalms104:34 Kurangarira kwangu ngakumufadze, pandinofara muna Jehovha." 
Psalms104:35 Asi vatadzi ngavaparadzwe panyika, uye vakaipa ngavarege kuzovapozve. Rumbidza Jehovha, mweya wangu. Rumbidzai Jehovha." 
Psalms105:1 Vongai Jehovha, danai kuzita rake; zivisai zvaakaita pakati pendudzi." 
Psalms105:2 Muimbirei, muimbirei nziyo dzokurumbidza; rondedzerai mabasa ake ose anoshamisa." 
Psalms105:3 Zvirumbidzei muzita rake dzvene; mwoyo yavanotsvaka Jehovha ngaifare. 
Psalms105:4 Tarirai kuna Jehovha nokusimba rake; tsvakai chiso chake nguva dzose. 
Psalms105:5 Rangarirai zvishamiso zvaakaita, mabasa ake, nezvaakatonga zvaakareva," 
Psalms105:6 imi vana vaAbhurahama muranda wake, haiwa vanakomana vaJakobho, vasanangurwa vake." 
Psalms105:7 Ndiye Jehovha Mwari wedu; kutonga kwake kuri munyika yose. 
Psalms105:8 Anorangarira sungano yake nokusingaperi, iro shoko raakarayira, kumarudzi ane chiuru," 
Psalms105:9 sungano yaakaita naAbhurahama, mhiko yaakapika kuna Isaka." 
Psalms105:10 Akaisimbisa kuna Jakobho somutemo, nokuna Israeri sesungano isingaperi achiti," 
Psalms105:11 “Ndichapa nyika yeKenani kwauri somugove wenhaka yako.” 
Psalms105:12 Pavaiva vashoma pakuwanda, zvirokwazvo vari vashoma, uye vari vaeni mairi," 
Psalms105:13 vakadzungaira vachibva kuno rumwe rudzi kusvikira kuno rumwe rudzi. Kubva kuno humwe ushe vachienda kuno humwe. 
Psalms105:14 Haana kutendera munhu kuvadzvinyirira; akatuka madzimambo nokuda kwavo achiti," 
Psalms105:15 “Musabata vazodziwa vangu; musaitira vaprofita vangu zvakaipa.” 
Psalms105:16 Akadana nzara panyika ikaparadza zvose zvaiuyisa zvokudya; 
Psalms105:17 uye akatuma munhu pamberi pavo, iye Josefa, akatengeswa senhapwa." 
Psalms105:18 Vakakuvadza tsoka dzake nezvisungo mutsipa wake ukaiswa mumatare esimbi," 
Psalms105:19 kusvikira zvaakareva zvazadziswa, kusvikira shoko raJehovha raratidza kutendeka kwake." 
Psalms105:20 Mambo akatuma shoko kuti asunungurwe, vatongi vavanhu vakamuregedza." 
Psalms105:21 Iye akamuita tenzi weimba yake, nomutongi wepfuma yake yose," 
Psalms105:22 kuti arayire machinda ake sezvaaida uye adzidzise vakuru vake njere. 
Psalms105:23 Ipapo Israeri akapinda muIjipiti; Jakobho akagara somweni munyika yaHamu. 
Psalms105:24 Jehovha akawanza vanhu vake chose; akavaita vazhinji kwazvo kupinda vavengi vavo,"
