Psalms105:25 avo vaakashandura mwoyo yavo kuti ivenge vanhu vake, kuti varangane pamusoro pavaranda vake." 
Psalms105:26 Akatuma Mozisi muranda wake, naAroni, waakanga asarudza." 
Psalms105:27 Vakaita zviratidzo zvinoshamisa pakati pavo, izvo zvishamiso zvake munyika yaHamu." 
Psalms105:28 Akatumira rima akaita kuti nyika ive murima, nokuti havana kumukira shoko rake here?" 
Psalms105:29 Akashandura mvura yavo zhinji ikava ropa, zvikaita kuti hove dzavo dzife." 
Psalms105:30 Nyika yavo yakazara namatatya, akapinda mudzimba dzamadzimambo avo." 
Psalms105:31 Iye akataura mapupira enhunzi akauya, nenda munyika yavo yose." 
Psalms105:32 Akashandura mvura yavo ikava chimvuramabwe, nemheni munyika yavo yose;" 
Psalms105:33 akarova mizambiringa yavo nemionde yavo, akaparadza miti yomunyika yavo." 
Psalms105:34 Akataura, mhashu dzikauya, namagutaguta asingaverengeki;" 
Psalms105:35 zvakadya miriwo minyoro yose munyika yavo, zvikadya zvibereko zvevhu ravo." 
Psalms105:36 Ipapo akarova matangwe munyika yavo, zvibereko zvokutanga zvesimba roujaya hwavo." 
Psalms105:37 Akabudisa Israeri akaremerwa nesirivha negoridhe, kwakanga kusina akagumburwa pakati pamarudzi avo." 
Psalms105:38 Ijipiti yakafara pavakabva, nokuti kutya vaIsraeri kwakanga kwavabata." 
Psalms105:39 Akatatamura gore rikava chifukidzo, uye moto kuti uvhenekere usiku." 
Psalms105:40 Vakakumbira, iye akavauyisira zvihuta, uye akavagutsa nechingwa chakabva kudenga." 
Psalms105:41 Akazarura dombo, mvura ikatubuka; ikayerera mugwenga sorwizi." 
Psalms105:42 Nokuti akarangarira mhiko yake tsvene yaakapa Abhurahama muranda wake. 
Psalms105:43 Akabudisa vanhu vake nomufaro, vasanangurwa vake nokupembera kwomufaro;" 
Psalms105:44 akavapa nyika dzendudzi, vakagara nhaka yakanga yatamburirwa navamwe," 
Psalms105:45 kuti vachengete zvaakatema uye vacherechedze mirayiro yake. Rumbidzai Jehovha. 
Psalms106:1 Rumbidzai Jehovha. Vongai Jehovha, nokuti akanaka; nokuti ngoni dzake dzinogara nokusingaperi." 
Psalms106:2 Ndianiko angaparidza mabasa aJehovha esimba, kana kureva kurumbidzwa kwake kwose?" 
Psalms106:3 Vakaropafadzwa vanochengeta kururamisira, vanogara vachiita zvakarurama." 
Psalms106:4 Ndirangarirei, imi Jehovha, pamunoratidza nyasha kuvanhu venyu, pamunovaponesa, mundibatsirewo," 
Psalms106:5 kuti ndifadzwe nokubudirira kwavasanangurwa venyu, kuti ndigovane pamufaro wavanhu venyu, uye ndibatane nenhaka yenyu pakurumbidza." 
Psalms106:6 Takatadza, sezvakaita madzibaba edu; takaita zvakaipa uye takaita mabasa akaipa." 
Psalms106:7 Madzibaba edu paakanga ari muIjipiti, havana kumbofunga nezvezvishamiso zvenyu; havana kurangarira tsitsi dzenyu zhinji, asi vakakumukirai pagungwa, iro Gungwa Dzvuku." 
Psalms106:8 Kunyange zvakadaro akavaponesa nokuda kwezita rake, kuti simba rake guru rizivikanwe." 
Psalms106:9 Akarayira Gungwa Dzvuku iro rikapwa; uye akavafambisa napakadzika sevanopfuura nomugwenga. 
Psalms106:10 Akavaponesa kubva muruoko rwomuvengi; akavadzikinura kubva muruoko rwomuvengi. 
Psalms106:11 Mvura zhinji yakafukidza vadzivisi vavo; hakuna mumwe wavo akapona. 
Psalms106:12 Ipapo vakatenda vimbiso dzake vakaimba vachimurumbidza. 
Psalms106:13 Asi vakakurumidza kukanganwa zvaakanga aita, uye vakasamirira kurayira kwake." 
Psalms106:14 Havana kuzvidzora pakukara kwavo mugwenga; vakaedza Mwari murenje. 
Psalms106:15 Saka akavapa zvavakakumbira, asi akatuma mweya wokuonda pamusoro pavo." 
Psalms106:16 Vakaitira Mozisi godo mumusasa, naAroni, akanga akatsaurirwa kuna Jehovha." 
Psalms106:17 Nyika yakazaruka ikamedza Dhatani; ikaviga boka raAbhiramu. 
Psalms106:18 Moto wakapfuta pakati pavateveri vavo; murazvo ukaparadza vakaipa. 
Psalms106:19 Vakaumba mhuru paHorebhi, vakanamata chifananidzo chakaumbwa." 
Psalms106:20 Vakatsinhanhisa kubwinya kwavo nomufananidzo wehando, inodya uswa." 
Psalms106:21 Vakakanganwa Mwari akavaponesa, uyo akanga aita zvinhu zvikuru muIjipiti," 
Psalms106:22 mabasa anoshamisa munyika yaHamu namabasa anotyisa paGungwa Dzvuku. 
Psalms106:23 Saka akati, achavaparadza, dai Mozisi, musanangurwa wake, asina kumira pamberi pake kuti adzore hasha dzake pakuvaparadza." 
Psalms106:24 Ipapo vakazvidza nyika inofadza; havana kutenda zvaakavimbisa. 
Psalms106:25 Vakanyunyuta vari mumatende avo vakasateerera Jehovha. 
Psalms106:26 Saka akapika akasimudza ruoko rwake kuti achavaparadza murenje," 
Psalms106:27 achaparadza zvizvarwa zvavo pakati pendudzi, agovaparadzira munyika dzose." 
Psalms106:28 Vakazvibatanidza pamwe chete naBhaari wePeori, uye vakadya zvibayiro zvakabayirwa vamwari vakafa." 
Psalms106:29 Vakatsamwisa Jehovha namabasa avo akaipa, uye denda rikavapo pakati pavo." 
Psalms106:30 Asi Finehasi akasimuka, akaita zvakarurama, denda rikaguma." 
Psalms106:31 Izvozvo zvakanzi kwaari kururama kusvikira kumarudzi namarudzi nokusingaperi. 
Psalms106:32 Vakatsamwisa Jehovha pamvura zhinji yeMeribha, uye Mozisi akaoneswa nhamo nokuda kwavo;" 
Psalms106:33 nokuti vakamukira Mweya waMwari, Mozisi akataura nehasha nomuromo wake." 
Psalms106:34 Havana kuparadza marudzi sokurayirwa kwavakaitwa naJehovha," 
Psalms106:35 asi vakavhengana nendudzi, vakatora tsika dzavo." 
Psalms106:36 Vakanamata zvifananidzo zvavo, izvo zvakazova musungo kwavari." 
Psalms106:37 Vakabayira vanakomana vavo navanasikana vavo kumadhimoni. 
Psalms106:38 Vakateura ropa risina mhosva, iro ropa ravanakomana vavo neravanasikana vavo, vavakabayira kuzvifananidzo zveKenani, nyika ikasvibiswa neropa ravo." 
Psalms106:39 Vakazvisvibisa nezvavakaita; vakazviitisa ufeve namabasa avo. 
Psalms106:40 Naizvozvo Jehovha akatsamwira vanhu vake, akasema nhaka yake." 
Psalms106:41 Akavaisa mumaoko endudzi, uye vakatongwa navavengi vavo." 
Psalms106:42 Vavengi vavo vakavadzvinyirira, uye vakavaisa pasi pesimba ravo." 
Psalms106:43 Akavarwira kakawanda, asi ivo vakanga vakarerekera pakumumukira vakaparadzwa muchivi chavo." 
Psalms106:44 Asi akatarisa kutambudzika kwavo paakanzwa kuchema kwavo; 
Psalms106:45 akarangarira sungano yake nokuda kwavo, uye akazvidemba nokuda kworudo rwake rukuru." 
Psalms106:46 Akaita kuti vanzwirwe tsitsi navose vakavatapa. 
Psalms106:47 Tiponesei, imi Jehovha Mwari wedu, uye mutiunganidze kubva kundudzi, kuti tigovonga zita renyu dzvene. Tigofara mukurumbidzwa kwenyu." 
Psalms106:48 Jehovha ngaarumbidzwe, iye Mwari waIsraeri, kubva pakusingaperi kusvikira pakusingaperi. Vanhu vose ngavati, “Ameni!” Rumbidzai Jehovha." 
Psalms107:1 Vongai Jehovha, nokuti akanaka; rudo rwake runogara nokusingaperi." 
Psalms107:2 Vakadzikinurwa naJehovha ngavadaro, vaakadzikinura muruoko rwomuvengi," 
Psalms107:3 avo vaakaunganidza kubva panyika dzose, kubva kumabvazuva nokumavirira, nokumusoro nezasi." 
Psalms107:4 Vamwe vakadzungaira murenje nomugwenga, vachishayiwa nzira yokuenda kuguta rwavangagara." 
Psalms107:5 Vakanga vava vane nzara nenyota, uye upenyu hwavo hwakanga hwoparara." 
Psalms107:6 Ipapo vakachema kuna Jehovha pakutambudzika kwavo, akavarwira pakutambura kwavo." 
Psalms107:7 Akavafambisa nenzira yakarurama kuenda kuguta ravaizogara. 
Psalms107:8 Vanhu ngavavonge Jehovha nokuda kworudo rwake rusingaperi, uye nokuda kwamabasa anoshamisa aakavaitira," 
Psalms107:9 nokuti anogutsa vane nyota, uye vane nzara anovazadza nezvakanaka." 
Psalms107:10 Vamwe vakagara murima nokusviba kwakadzika dzika, vari vasungwa vanotambudzika muzvisungo zvamatare," 
Psalms107:11 nokuti vakanga vamukira mashoko aMwari uye vakazvidza kurayira kwoWokumusorosoro. 
Psalms107:12 Saka akaita kuti vashande zvinorwadza; vakagumburwa, uye pakanga pasina anovabatsira." 
Psalms107:13 Ipapo vakachema kuna Jehovha pakutambudzika kwavo, uye akavaponesa pakutambura kwavo." 
Psalms107:14 Akavabudisa murima nomukusviba kwakadzika dzika, uye akadambura ngetani dzavo." 
Psalms107:15 Vanhu ngavavonge Jehovha nokuda kworudo rwake rusingaperi, uye namabasa ake anoshamisa aakavaitira," 
Psalms107:16 nokuti anopwanya masuo endarira, uye akagura mazariro esimbi." 
Psalms107:17 Vamwe vakava mapenzi nokuda kwenzira dzavo dzokumukira, uye vakatambudzwa kwazvo nokuda kwezvakaipa zvavo." 
Psalms107:18 Vakasema zvokudya zvose, uye vakaswedera pamasuo orufu." 
Psalms107:19 Ipapo vakachema kuna Jehovha pakutambudzika kwavo, uye akavaponesa pakutambura kwavo." 
Psalms107:20 Akatuma shoko rake uye akavaporesa; akavanunura kubva paguva. 
Psalms107:21 Vanhu ngavavonge Jehovha nokuda kworudo rwake rusingaperi, uye namabasa ake anoshamisa aakavaitira." 
Psalms107:22 Ngavabayire zvibayiro zvokuvonga, uye vareve zvamabasa ake nenziyo dzomufaro." 
Psalms107:23 Vamwe vakafamba rwendo pagungwa nezvikepe; vakanga vari vashambadziri pamvura zhinji. 
Psalms107:24 Vakaona mabasa aJehovha, mabasa ake anoshamisa pakadzika." 
Psalms107:25 Nokuti akataura uye akamutsa dutu rikasimudza mafungu. 
Psalms107:26 Vakaenda kumusoro kumatenga vakaendawo pasi kwakadzika; mukutambudzika kwavo kushinga kwavo kwakanyongodeka. 
Psalms107:27 Vakandeya vakadzedzereka savanhu vadhakwa; vakasvika pamagumo amano avo. 
Psalms107:28 Ipapo vakachema kuna Jehovha pakutambudzika kwavo, uye akavabudisa pakutambura kwavo." 
Psalms107:29 Akanyaradza dutu remhepo nezevezeve; mafungu egungwa akanyarara kuti mwiro. 
Psalms107:30 Vakafara parakadzikama, uye akavatungamirira pakadzikama pavaida." 
Psalms107:31 Ngavavonge Jehovha nokuda kworudo rwake rusingaperi, uye namabasa ake anoshamisa aakaitira vanhu." 
Psalms107:32 Ngavamukudze paungano yavanhu, uye vamurumbidze pagungano ramakurukota." 
Psalms107:33 Akashandura nzizi dzikava gwenga, hova dzinoerera dzikava nyika ine nyota," 
Psalms107:34 uye nyika yezvibereko ikava gwenga romunyu, nokuda kwezvakaipa zvavaigaramo." 
Psalms107:35 Akashandura gwenga rikava madziva emvura, nenyika yakaoma ikava zvitubu zvinoerera;" 
Psalms107:36 ndipo paakagarisa vane nzara. uye vakavaka guta ravangagara. 
Psalms107:37 Vakadyara minda, uye vakasima minda yemizambiringa, ikabereka mukohwo wakanaka;" 
Psalms107:38 akavaropafadza, uye akavawanza zvikuru, uye haana kutendera zvipfuwo zvavo kuparara." 
Psalms107:39 Ipapo vakava vashoma, uye vakaninipiswa vakadzvinyirirwa, nenjodzi uye nokusuwa;" 
Psalms107:40 iye anodurura kuzvidzwa pamusoro pamakurukota, akaita kuti vadzungaire musango risina nzira." 
Psalms107:41 Akasimudza vanoshayiwa kubva mukutambudzika kwavo, uye akawedzera mhuri dzavo samapoka amakwai." 
Psalms107:42 Vakarurama vanozviona vagofara, asi vakaipa vose vanodzivirwa miromo yavo." 
Psalms107:43 Ani naani akachenjera ngaachengete zvinhu izvi, uye arangarire rudo rukuru rwaJehovha." 
Psalms108:1 Rwiyo. Pisarema raDhavhidhi. [1] Mwoyo wangu wakasimba, Mwari imi; ndichaimba uye ndichaimba zvakanaka nomwoyo wangu wose." 
Psalms108:2 Muka iwe mutengeranwa nembira! Ndichamutsa mambakwedza. 
Psalms108:3 Haiwa Jehovha ndichakurumbidzai pakati pendudzi; ndichaimba nezvenyu pakati pamarudzi. Kutendeka kwenyu kunosvika kumatenga. 
Psalms108:4 Nokuti rudo rwenyu rukuru, kupfuura kudenga denga;" 
Psalms108:5 Kudzwai, imi Mwari, kumusoro kwokudenga, uye kurumbidzwa kwenyu ngakuve pamusoro penyika yose." 
Psalms108:6 Tiponesei uye mutibatsire noruoko rwenyu rworudyi, kuti vamunoda varwirwe." 
Psalms108:7 Mwari akataura ari panzvimbo yake tsvene achiti, “Pakukunda kwangu ndichaganhura Shekemu, uye ndigoyera Mupata weSukoti." 
Psalms108:8 Gireadhi ndeyangu, Manase ndowangu; Efuremu inguwani yangu, Judha itsvimbo yangu." 
Psalms108:9 Moabhu ndiwo mudziyo wangu wokugezera, pamusoro paEdhomu ndichapotsera shangu dzangu; pamusoro paFiristia ndichapembera mukukunda.”" 
Psalms108:10 Ndianiko achandiuyisa muguta rakakomberedzwa namasvingo? Ndianiko achanditungamirira kuEdhomu? 
Psalms108:11 Ko, hamuzimi here, imi Mwari, iyemi makatiramba uye mukasazobudazve kuenda nehondo dzedu?" 
Psalms108:12 Tibatsirei pamuvengi wedu, nokuti rubatsiro rwomunhu haruna maturo." 
Psalms108:13 Tichapiwa kukunda naMwari, uye achatsika-tsika vavengi vedu." 
Psalms109:1 Kumutungamiri wokuimba. Pisarema raDhavhidhi. [1] Haiwa Mwari, imi wandinorumbidza, regai kunyarara," 
Psalms109:2 nokuti vanhu vakaipa vanonyengera vakandishamira miromo yavo; vakataura nhema pamusoro pangu nendimi dzavo. 
Psalms109:3 Vakandikomba namashoko okuvenga; vanorwa neni pasina mhosva. 
Psalms109:4 Pachinzvimbo choushamwari hwangu navo, vanondipa mhosva, asi ini ndiri munhu wokunyengetera." 
Psalms109:5 Vanonditsivira zvakaipa pane zvakanaka, uye vanondivengera ushamwari hwangu." 
Psalms109:6 Tumai munhu akaipa kuti apikisane naye; mupomeri ngaamire kuruoko rwake rworudyi. 
Psalms109:7 Paanotongwa, ngaawanikwe ane mhosva, uye minyengetero yake ngaimupe mhaka." 
Psalms109:8 Mazuva ake ngaave mashoma; mumwe ngaatore nzvimbo youkuru hwake. 
Psalms109:9 Vana vake ngavave nherera, uye mukadzi wake ave chirikadzi." 
Psalms109:10 Vana vake ngavave vapemhi vanodzungaira; ngavadzingwe vabve mumatongo emisha yavo. 
Psalms109:11 Waakakwereta ngaatore zvose zvaanazvo; vatorwa ngavapambe zvose zvaakashandira. 
Psalms109:12 Ngakurege kuva neanomunzwira ngoni kana kunzwira tsitsi nherera dzake. 
Psalms109:13 Zvizvarwa zvake ngazvirove, mazita avo adzimwe parudzi runotevera." 
Psalms109:14 Mhosva yamadzibaba ake ngairangarirwe pamberi paJehovha; chivi chamai vake ngachirege kumbodzimwa. 
Psalms109:15 Zvivi zvavo ngazvirambe zviri pamberi paJehovha, kuti aparadze chirangaridzo chavo panyika." 
Psalms109:16 Nokuti haana kumbofunga kuita zvakanaka, asi akavhima varombo kusvika parufu, vanoshayiwa navane mwoyo yakaputsika." 
Psalms109:17 Aifarira kutaura chituko, ngachichiuya pamusoro pake; iye asina kufadzwa nokuropafadza, ngakuve kure naye." 
Psalms109:18 Aifuka kutuka senguo yake; zvakapinda mumuviri wake semvura, nomumapfupa ake samafuta." 
Psalms109:19 Ngazvive sejasi rakamonerwa paari, sebhanhire rakasungirirwa paari nokusingaperi." 
Psalms109:20 Uyu ngauve muripo waJehovha kuvapomeri vangu, kuna avo vanotakura zvakaipa pamusoro pangu." 
Psalms109:21 Asi imi, Ishe Jehovha, ndiitirei zvakanaka nokuda kwezita renyu; ndirwirei, kubudikidza nokunaka kworudo rwenyu." 
Psalms109:22 Nokuti ndiri murombo uye ndinoshayiwa, uye mwoyo wangu wakuvara mukati mangu." 
Psalms109:23 Ndinopera somumvuri wamadekwana; ndinozunzwa semhashu. 
Psalms109:24 Mabvi angu apera simba nokutsanya; muviri wangu waonda uye ndaonda kwazvo. 
Psalms109:25 Ndiri chinhu chinosekwa navapomeri vangu; pavanondiona, vanodzungudza misoro yavo." 
Psalms109:26 Ndibatsirei, imi Jehovha Mwari wangu; ndiponesei zvakafanira rudo rwenyu." 
Psalms109:27 Ngavazive kuti ndirwo ruoko rwenyu, kuti imi, iyemi Jehovha, makazviita." 
Psalms109:28 Ivo vangatuka havo, asi imi mucharopafadza; vachanyadziswa pavanorwisa, asi muranda wenyu achafara." 
Psalms109:29 Vapomeri vangu vachafukidzwa nenyadzi, uye vachaputirwa nokunyara sokunge nejasi." 
Psalms109:30 Ndicharumbidza Jehovha nomuromo wangu zvikuru; paungano huru, ndichamurumbidza." 
Psalms109:31 Nokuti anomira kuruoko rworudyi rwouyo anoshayiwa, kuti amuponese pane avo vanomupomera mhosva." 
Psalms110:1 Pisarema raDhavhidhi [1] Jehovha akati kuna She wangu, “Gara kuruoko rwangu rworudyi, kusvikira ndaita vavengi vako chitsiko chetsoka dzako.”" 
Psalms110:2 Jehovha achatambanudza tsvimbo yesimba rako kubva muZioni; uchatonga pakati pavavengi vako. 
Psalms110:3 Mauto ako achazvipira pazuva rako rehondo. Wapfekedzwa nguo youshe, utsvene, kubva pachizvaro chamambakwedza uchagamuchira dova roujaya hwako." 
Psalms110:4 Jehovha akapika, uye haangashanduki, achiti, “Iwe uri muprista nokusingaperi, worudzi rwaMerekizedheki.”" 
Psalms110:5 Jehovha ari kuruoko rwako rworudyi; achaparadza madzimambo pazuva rehasha dzake. 
Psalms110:6 Achatonga ndudzi, achiunganidza vakafa, uye achiparadza vatongi venyika yose." 
Psalms110:7 Achanwa parukova rwuri parutivi penzira; naizvozvo achasimudza musoro wake. 
Psalms111:1 Rumbidzai Jehovha. Ndicharumbidza Jehovha nomwoyo wangu wose, paungano yavakarurama napagungano." 
Psalms111:2 Mabasa aJehovha makuru; anorangarirwa navose vanofara maari. 
Psalms111:3 Mabasa ake ndeokukudzwa noumambo, uye kururama kwake kunogara nokusingaperi." 
Psalms111:4 Akaita kuti zvishamiso zvake zvirangarirwe; Jehovha ane nyasha nengoni. 
Psalms111:5 Anopa zvokudya kuna avo vanomutya; anorangarira sungano yake nokusingaperi. 
Psalms111:6 Akaratidza vanhu vake simba ramabasa ake, achivapa nyika dzedzimwe ndudzi." 
Psalms111:7 Mabasa amaoko ake akatendeka uye akarurama, mitemo yake yose yakavimbika." 
Psalms111:8 Yakasimba kusvika nokusingaperi-peri, yakaitwa mukutendeka nokururama." 
Psalms111:9 Anopa dzikinuro kuvanhu vake; akarayira sungano yake nokusingaperi. 
Psalms111:10 Kutya Jehovha ndiwo mavambo enjere; vose vanotevera mitemo yake vanonzwisisa. Kurumbidzwa ndokwake nokusingaperi. 
Psalms112:1 Rumbidzai Jehovha. Akaropafadzwa munhu anotya Jehovha, anofarira mirayiro yake zvikuru." 
Psalms112:2 Vana vake vachava nesimba panyika; zvizvarwa zvavakarurama zvicharopafadzwa. 
Psalms112:3 Pfuma nezvakawanda zviri mumba make, uye kururama kwake kunogara nokusingaperi." 
Psalms112:4 Kunyange murima akarurama anobudirwa nechiedza, iye munhu ane nyasha nengoni uye akarurama." 
Psalms112:5 Zvakanaka zvinouya kumunhu anopa zvizhinji uye anokweretesa pachena, anofambisa nzira dzake nokururamisira." 
Psalms112:6 Zvirokwazvo, haangatongozungunuswi; munhu akarurama acharangarirwa nokusingaperi." 
Psalms112:7 Haangatyi mashoko akaipa; mwoyo wake wakasimba, anovimba naJehovha." 
Psalms112:8 Mwoyo wake wakachengetedzeka, haangatyi chinhu; pakupedzisira achatarira nokukunda kuvavengi vake." 
Psalms112:9 Akaparadzira kure zvipo zvake kuvarombo, kururama kwake kunogara nokusingaperi; runyanga rwake ruchasimudzwa mudenga mukukudzwa." 
Psalms112:10 Akaipa achazviona uye acharwadziwa, acharumanya meno ake uye achaonda; kushuva kwowakaipa kuchava pasina." 
Psalms113:1 Rumbidzai Jehovha. Rumbidzai, imi varanda vaJehovha, rumbidzai zita raJehovha." 
Psalms113:2 Zita raJehovha ngarirumbidzwe, kubva zvino kusvikira narini." 
Psalms113:3 Kubva pakubuda kwezuva kusvikira pakuvira kwaro, zita raJehovha rinofanira kurumbidzwa." 
Psalms113:4 Jehovha anosimudzirwa pamusoro pendudzi dzose; kubwinya kwake kuri pamusoro pamatenga. 
Psalms113:5 Ndianiko akaita saJehovha Mwari wedu, iye anogara pachigaro choushe chokumusorosoro," 
Psalms113:6 anokotamira pasi kuti aone zviri kudenga napanyika? 
Psalms113:7 Anosimudza murombo muguruva, uye anosimudza vanoshayiwa kubva padurunhuru ramadota;" 
Psalms113:8 anovagadza namachinda, namachinda avanhu vavo." 
Psalms113:9 Anogarisa mukadzi asingabereki mumba make, samai vavana vanofara. Rumbidzai Jehovha." 
Psalms114:1 Israeri akati abuda muIjipiti, imba yaJakobho ichibva kurudzi runo mutauro wokumwe," 
Psalms114:2 Judha akava imba tsvene yaMwari, Israeri ushe hwake." 
Psalms114:3 Gungwa rakazviona rikatiza, Jorodhani rwakadzokera shure;" 
Psalms114:4 makomo akakwakuka samakondohwe, zvikomo samakwayana." 
Psalms114:5 Haiwa gungwa, wakatizeiko, iwe Jorodhani zvawakadzokera shure," 
Psalms114:6 imi makomo zvamakakwakuka samakondohwe, nemi zvikomo, samakwayana?" 
Psalms114:7 Dedera, iwe nyika pamberi paShe, pamberi paMwari waJakobho," 
Psalms114:8 akashandura dombo rikava dziva, dombo rakaoma rikava matsime emvura." 
Psalms115:1 Kwete kwatiri, Jehovha, kwete kwatiri, asi kukudzwa ngakupiwe kuzita renyu, nokuda kworudo rwenyu nokutendeka kwenyu." 
Psalms115:2 Sei ndudzi dzichiti, “Mwari wavo aripiko?”" 
Psalms115:3 Mwari wedu ari kudenga; anoita zvose zvinomufadza. 
Psalms115:4 Asi zvifananidzo zvavo isirivha negoridhe, zvakaitwa namaoko avanhu." 
Psalms115:5 Zvine miromo, asi hazvigoni kutaura, zvina meso, asi hazvigoni kuona;" 
Psalms115:6 zvine nzeve, asi hazvigoni kunzwa mhino, asi hazvigoni kunhuwidza;" 
Psalms115:7 zvina maoko, asi hazvigoni kubata, tsoka, asi hazvigoni kufamba; uye hazvitauri napahuro pazvo." 
Psalms115:8 Vanozviita vachafanana nazvo, navose vanovimba nazvo." 
Psalms115:9 Haiwa imba yaIsraeri, vimbai naJehovha, ndiye mubatsiri wavo nenhoo yavo." 
Psalms115:10 Imi imba yaAroni, vimbai naJehovha, ndiye mubatsiri wavo nenhoo yavo." 
Psalms115:11 Imi vanomutya, vimbai naJehovha, ndiye mubatsiri wavo nenhoo yavo." 
Psalms115:12 Jehovha anotirangarira uye achatiropafadza: Acharopafadza imba yaIsraeri, acharopafadza imba yaAroni," 
Psalms115:13 acharopafadza vanotya Jehovha, vaduku navakuru zvakafanana." 
Psalms115:14 Jehovha ngaakuwanzei, mose iwe navana vako." 
Psalms115:15 Jehovha ngaakuropafadze, iye muiti wedenga napasi." 
Psalms115:16 Kudenga denga kumusoro ndokwaJehovha, asi nyika akaipa kuvanhu." 
Psalms115:17 Vakafa havazivo vanorumbidza Jehovha, avo vanoburukira kwakanyarara;" 
Psalms115:18 asi tisu tinokudza Jehovha, kubva zvino kusvikira narini. Rumbidzai Jehovha." 
Psalms116:1 Ndinoda Jehovha, nokuti akanzwa inzwi rangu; akandinzwira tsitsi pakuchema kwangu." 
Psalms116:2 Nokuti akarerekera nzeve yake kwandiri, ndichadana kwaari mazuva ose oupenyu hwangu." 
Psalms116:3 Misungo yorufu yakandipinganidza, kurwadza kweguva kwakauya pamusoro pangu; ndakakundwa nenhamo nokusuwa." 
Psalms116:4 Ipapo ndakadana kuzita raJehovha ndikati, “Haiwa Jehovha, ndiponesei!”" 
Psalms116:5 Jehovha ane nyasha uye akarurama; Mwari wedu azere netsitsi. 
Psalms116:6 Jehovha anodzivirira vakatendeka pamwoyo; pandakanga ndiri pakushayiwa kukuru, iye akandiponesa." 
Psalms116:7 Haiwa mweya wangu, chizorora zvakare, nokuti Jehovha akakuitira zvakanaka." 
Psalms116:8 Nokuti imi, iyemi Jehovha, makarwira mweya wangu parufu, meso angu pamisodzi, uye makumbo angu pakugumburwa," 
Psalms116:9 kuti ndifambe pamberi paJehovha munyika yavapenyu. 
Psalms116:10 Ndakatenda; naizvozvo ndakati, “Ndiri kutambudzika kwazvo.”" 
Psalms116:11 Uye pakuvhunduka kwangu ndakati, “Vanhu vose vanoreva nhema.”" 
Psalms116:12 Ndingaripira seiko Jehovha pamusoro pokunaka kwake kwose kwandiri? 
Psalms116:13 Ndichasimudza mukombe woruponeso ndigodana kuzita raJehovha. 
Psalms116:14 Ndichazadzisa mhiko dzangu kuna Jehovha, pamberi pavanhu vake vose." 
Psalms116:15 Chinhu chinokosha pamberi paJehovha ndirwo rufu rwavatsvene vake. 
Psalms116:16 Haiwa Jehovha, zvirokwazvo ndiri muranda wenyu; ndiri muranda wenyu, mwanakomana womurandakadzi wenyu; makandisunungura pangetani dzangu." 
Psalms116:17 Ndichabayira chipo chokuvonga kwamuri, uye ndichadana kuzita raJehovha." 
Psalms116:18 Ndichazadzisa mhiko dzangu kuna Jehovha, pamberi pavanhu vake vose," 
Psalms116:19 pavanze dzeimba yaJehovha, mukati mako, iwe Jerusarema. Rumbidzai Jehovha." 
Psalms117:1 Rumbidzai Jehovha, imi ndudzi dzose; Mukudzei, imi marudzi ose." 
Psalms117:2 Nokuti rudo rwake kwatiri rukuru, uye kutendeka kwaJehovha kunogara nokusingaperi. Rumbidzai Jehovha." 
Psalms118:1 Vongai Jehovha, nokuti akanaka; rudo rwake runogara nokusingaperi." 
Psalms118:2 Israeri ngaati, “Rudo rwake runogara nokusingaperi.”" 
Psalms118:3 Imba yaAroni ngaiti, “Rudo rwake runogara nokusingaperi.”" 
Psalms118:4 Avo vanotya Jehovha ngavati, “Rudo rwake runogara nokusingaperi.”" 
Psalms118:5 Mukurwadziwa kwangu ndakadana kuna Jehovha, uye akandipindura nokundisunungura." 
Psalms118:6 Jehovha aneni; handingatyi. Munhu angandiiteiko? 
Psalms118:7 Jehovha aneni; ndiye mubatsiri wangu. Ndichatarira vavengi vangu nokukunda. 
Psalms118:8 Zviri nani kutizira kuna Jehovha pano kuvimba nomunhu. 
Psalms118:9 Zviri nani kutizira kuna Jehovha pano kuvimba namachinda. 
Psalms118:10 Ndudzi dzose dzakandikomba, asi ndakavaparadza muzita raJehovha." 
Psalms118:11 Vakandikomba pamativi ose, asi ndakavaparadza muzita raJehovha." 
Psalms118:12 Vakandimomotera senyuchi, asi vakakurumidza kufa seminzwa inotsva, ndakavaparadza muzita raJehovha." 
Psalms118:13 Ndakasundidzirwa shure uye ndikada kuwa, asi Jehovha akandibatsira." 
Psalms118:14 	Jehovha ndiye simba rangu norwiyo rwangu; ndiye ava ruponeso rwangu. 
Psalms118:15 Kupembera kwomufaro nokukunda kunonzwika mumatende avakarurama kuchiti: “Ruoko rworudyi rwaJehovha rwakaita zvinhu zvikuru! 
Psalms118:16 Ruoko rworudyi rwaJehovha rwakasimudzirwa kumusoro; ruoko rworudyi rwaJehovha rwakaita zvinhu zvikuru!” 
Psalms118:17 Handingafi asi ndichararama, uye ndichaparidza zvakaitwa naJehovha." 
Psalms118:18 	Jehovha akandiranga kwazvo, asi haana kundiisa kurufu." 
Psalms118:19 Ndizarurireiwo masuo okururama; ndichapinda ndigovonga Jehovha. 
Psalms118:20 Iri ndiro suo raJehovha panopinda navakarurama. 
Psalms118:21 Ndichakuvongai, nokuti makandipindura; makava ruponeso rwangu." 
Psalms118:22 Dombo rakarambwa navavaki ndiro rakazova musoro wekona; 
Psalms118:23 Jehovha akaita izvi, uye zvinoshamisa pamberi pedu." 
Psalms118:24 	Iri ndiro zuva rakaitwa naJehovha; ngatifarei kwazvo tifarisise mariri. 
Psalms118:25 Haiwa Jehovha, tiponesei; haiwa Jehovha, tipeiwo kubudirira." 
Psalms118:26 Akaropafadzwa uyo anouya muzita raJehovha. Tiri mumba maJehovha tinokuropafadzai. 
Psalms118:27 	Jehovha ndiye Mwari, uye akaita kuti chiedza chake chivhenekere pamusoro pedu. Namatavi muruoko, pinda mumudungwe ubatane navamwe vari kuenda kunyanga dzearitari." 
Psalms118:28 	Imi muri Mwari wangu, uye ndichakuvongai; ndimi Mwari wangu, uye ndichakukudzai." 
Psalms118:29 Vongai Jehovha, nokuti akanaka; rudo rwake runogara nokusingaperi." 
Psalms119:1 Arefi [1] Vakaropafadzwa avo vane nzira isina chaingapomerwa, vanofamba mumurayiro waJehovha." 
Psalms119:2 Vakaropafadzwa avo vanochengeta zvaakatema, vanomutsvaka nomwoyo wavo wose." 
Psalms119:3 Havaiti chinhu chakaipa; vanofamba munzira yake. 
Psalms119:4 Imi makaisa zvirevo zvinofanira kuteererwa. 
Psalms119:5 Haiwa, dai nzira dzangu dzakasimba pakuteerera zvirevo zvenyu!" 
Psalms119:6 Ipapo handaizonyadziswa pandinorangarira mirayiro yenyu. 
Psalms119:7 Ndichakurumbidzai nomwoyo wakarurama, sezvo ndichidzidza mirayiro yenyu yakarurama." 
Psalms119:8 	Ndichateerera mitemo yenyu; regai kundirasa zvachose. Bheti 
Psalms119:9 Ko, jaya ringanatsa nzira yaro nei? Nokurarama sezvinoreva shoko renyu." 
Psalms119:10 Ndinokutsvakai nomwoyo wangu wose; musandirega ndichitsauka pamirayiro yenyu. 
Psalms119:11 Shoko renyu ndakariviga mumwoyo mangu, kuti ndirege kukutadzirai." 
Psalms119:12 Imi munofanira kukudzwa, Jehovha; ndidzidzisei mitemo yenyu." 
Psalms119:13 Nemiromo yangu ndichataurazve mirayiro yose inobva pamuromo wenyu. 
Psalms119:14 Ndinofarira kutevera zvirevo zvenyu, somunhu anofarira pfuma huru." 
Psalms119:15 Ndinofungisisa zvirevo zvenyu, uye ndinorangarira nzira dzenyu." 
Psalms119:16 	Ndinofarira mitemo yenyu; handingakanganwi shoko renyu. Gimeri 
Psalms119:17 Itirai muranda wenyu zvakanaka, ndigorarama; ndichateerera shoko renyu." 
Psalms119:18 Ndisvinudzei meso angu kuti ndione. Zvinhu zvinoshamisa zviri pamurayiro wenyu. 
Psalms119:19 Ndiri mutorwa panyika; regai kundivanzira mirayiro yenyu. 
Psalms119:20 Mweya wangu wapedzwa nokushuva mitemo yenyu nguva dzose. 
Psalms119:21 Munotsiura vanozvikudza, avo vakatukwa, uye vanotsauka kubva pamirayiro yenyu." 
Psalms119:22 Bvisai kwandiri kushorwa nokuzvidzwa, nokuti ndinochengeta zvirevo zvenyu." 
Psalms119:23 Kunyange vatongi vachigara pamwe chete vachindireva, muranda wenyu achafungisisa mitemo yenyu." 
Psalms119:24 	Ndinofadzwa nezvirevo zvenyu; ndizvo zvinondipanga mazano. Dhareti 
Psalms119:25 Ndakaradzikwa pasi muguruva; chengetedzai upenyu hwangu sezvinoreva shoko renyu. 
Psalms119:26 Ndakarevazve nzira dzangu imi mukandipindura; ndidzidzisei mitemo yenyu. 
Psalms119:27 Itai kuti ndinzwisise zvirevo zvenyu; ipapo ndichafungisisa pamusoro pezvishamiso zvenyu. 
Psalms119:28 Mweya wangu waziya nokusuwa; ndisimbisei sezvinoreva shoko renyu. 
Psalms119:29 Ndibvisei panzira dzokunyengera; ndinzwirei nyasha kubudikidza nomurayiro wenyu. 
Psalms119:30 Ndakasarudza nzira yechokwadi; ndakaisa mwoyo wangu pamurayiro wenyu. 
Psalms119:31 Haiwa Jehovha, ini ndichabatirira pazvirevo zvenyu; musandirega ndichinyadziswa." 
Psalms119:32 	Ndinomhanya munzira yomurayiro wenyu, nokuti makasunungura mwoyo wangu. He" 
Psalms119:33 Ndidzidzisei, imi Jehovha, kutevera mitemo yenyu; ipapo ndichazvichengeta kusvikira kumagumo." 
Psalms119:34 Ndipei kunzwisisa, ndigochengeta murayiro wenyu uye ndigouteerera nomwoyo wangu wose." 
Psalms119:35 Nditungamirirei munzira yemirayiro yenyu, nokuti imomo ndinowana mufaro." 
Psalms119:36 Dzorerai mwoyo wangu pane zvamakatema kwete pakuchiva kwenyama. 
Psalms119:37 Dzorai meso angu pazvinhu zvisina maturo; chengetedzai upenyu hwangu sezvinoreva shoko renyu. 
Psalms119:38 Zadzisai zvamakapikira muranda wenyu, kuti mugotyiwa." 
Psalms119:39 Bvisai kunyadziswa kwandaitya, nokuti mitemo yenyu yakanaka." 
Psalms119:40 	Ndinoshuva zvirevo zvenyu sei! Chengetedzai upenyu hwangu mukururama kwenyu. Wawu 
Psalms119:41 Rudo rwenyu rusingaperi ngaruuye kwandiri, Jehovha, noruponeso rwenyu sezvamakavimbisa;" 
Psalms119:42 ipapo ndichapindura vanondishora, nokuti ndinovimba neshoko renyu." 
Psalms119:43 Regai kubvisa shoko rechokwadi pamuromo pangu, nokuti ndakaisa tariro yangu mumurayiro wenyu." 
Psalms119:44 Ndichagara ndichiteerera murayiro wenyu, nokusingaperi-peri." 
Psalms119:45 Ndichafamba-famba ndakasununguka, nokuti ndakatsvaka zvirevo zvenyu." 
Psalms119:46 Ndichataura zvamakatema pamberi pamadzimambo, uye handinganyadziswi," 
Psalms119:47 nokuti ndinofarira mirayiro yenyu nokuti ndinoida. 
Psalms119:48 	Ndinosimudzira maoko angu kumirayiro yenyu yandinoda, uye ndinofungisisa zvirevo zvenyu. Zayini" 
Psalms119:49 Rangarirai shoko renyu kumuranda wenyu, nokuti makandipa tariro." 
Psalms119:50 Zvinondinyaradza pakutambura kwangu ndezvizvi: Vimbiso yenyu inochengetedza upenyu hwangu. 
Psalms119:51 Vanozvikudza vanondiseka vasingaregi, asi ini handitsauki pamurayiro wenyu." 
Psalms119:52 Ndinorangarira mirayiro yenyu yekare, imi Jehovha, uye ndinonyaradzwa mairi." 
Psalms119:53 Shungu dzinondibata nokuda kwavakaipa, vakasiya murayiro wenyu." 
Psalms119:54 Mitemo yenyu ndiro dingindira rorwiyo rwangu pose pandinogara. 
Psalms119:55 Haiwa, Jehovha, ndinorangarira zita renyu usiku, uye ndichachengeta murayiro wenyu." 
Psalms119:56 	Aya ndiwo anga ari maitiro angu: Ndinoteerera zvirevo zvenyu. Heti 
Psalms119:57 Haiwa, Jehovha, ndimi mugove wangu; ndakavimbisa kuteerera mashoko enyu." 
Psalms119:58 Ndakatsvaka chiso chenyu nomwoyo wangu wose; ndinzwirei nyasha sezvamakavimbisa. 
Psalms119:59 Ndakacherechedza nzira dzangu ndikadzorera tsoka dzangu kune zvamakatema. 
Psalms119:60 Ndichakurumidza uye handinganonoki kuteerera mirayiro yenyu. 
Psalms119:61 Kunyange vakaipa vakandisunga namabote, handizokanganwi murayiro wenyu." 
Psalms119:62 Ndinomuka pakati pousiku ndichikuvongai nokuda kwemirayiro yenyu yakarurama. 
Psalms119:63 Ndiri shamwari yavose vanokutyai, nokuna vose vanotevera zvirevo zvenyu." 
Psalms119:64 	Haiwa Jehovha, nyika izere norudo rwenyu, ndidzidzisei zvirevo zvenyu. Teti" 
Psalms119:65 Makaitira muranda wenyu zvakanaka, imi Jehovha, sezvakafanira shoko renyu." 
Psalms119:66 Ndidzidzisei zivo nokutonga kwakanaka, nokuti ndakatenda mirayiro yenyu." 
Psalms119:67 Pandakanga ndisati ndatambudzika, ndakatsauka, asi zvino ndinoteerera shoko renyu." 
Psalms119:68 Imi makanaka, uye munoita zvakanaka; ndidzidzisei mitemo yenyu." 
Psalms119:69 Kunyange vanozvikudza vakandipomera nhema, ndinochengeta zvamakatema nomwoyo wangu wose." 
Psalms119:70 Mwoyo yavo yakasindimara uye hainzwisisi, asi ndinofarira murayiro wenyu." 
Psalms119:71 Zvakanga zvakanaka kuti nditambudzike, kuitira kuti ndigodzidza mitemo yenyu." 
Psalms119:72 	Murayiro unobva pamuromo wenyu unokosha kwandiri, kupfuura zviuru zvezvimedu zvesirivha negoridhe. Yodhi" 
Psalms119:73 Maoko enyu akandiita nokundiumba; ndipei kunzwisisa kuti ndigodzidza mirayiro yenyu. 
Psalms119:74 Avo vanokutyai ngavafare pavanondiona, nokuti ndakaisa tariro yangu pashoko renyu." 
Psalms119:75 Haiwa Jehovha, ndinoziva kuti mirayiro yenyu yakarurama, uye kuti makanditambudza mukutendeka kwenyu." 
Psalms119:76 Rudo rwenyu rusingaperi ngarutinyaradze, maererano nechivimbiso chenyu kumuranda wenyu." 
Psalms119:77 Tsitsi dzenyu ngadziuye kwandiri kuti ndirarame, nokuti murayiro wenyu ndiwo mufaro wangu." 
Psalms119:78 Vanozvikudza ngavanyadziswe pakundikanganisira ndisina mhaka, asi ini ndichafungisisa zvirevo zvenyu." 
Psalms119:79 Vanokutyai ngavadzokere kwandiri, ivo vanonzwisisa zvamakatema." 
Psalms119:80 	Mwoyo wangu ngaushaye chaungapomerwa pamitemo yenyu, kuti ndirege kunyadziswa. Kafi" 
Psalms119:81 Mweya wangu unoziva nokushuva ruponeso rwenyu, asi ndakaisa tariro yangu pashoko renyu." 
Psalms119:82 Meso angu aneta nokutsvaga chivimbiso chenyu; ndinoti, “Muchandinyaradza riniko?”" 
Psalms119:83 Kunyange ndakaita sehomwe yewaini ndiri muutsi, handikanganwi mitemo yenyu." 
Psalms119:84 Muranda wenyu acharindira kusvikira riniko? Mucharanga vatambudzi vangu riniko? 
Psalms119:85 Vanozvikudza vakandicherera makomba, zvinopesana nomurayiro wenyu." 
Psalms119:86 Mirayiro yenyu yose yakavimbika, ndibatsirei, nokuti vanhu vanonditambudza ndisina mhaka." 
Psalms119:87 Vakanga voda kundibvisa panyika, asi handina kusiya zvamakatema." 
Psalms119:88 	Chengetedzai upenyu hwangu zvakafanira rudo rwenyu, uye ini ndichateerera zvirevo zvomuromo wenyu. Ramedhi" 
Psalms119:89 Haiwa Jehovha, shoko renyu rinogara nokusingaperi; rinomira rakasimba kudenga denga." 
Psalms119:90 Kutendeka kwenyu kunoramba kuripo kusvikira kumarudzi namarudzi; makasimbisa nyika uye inogara nokusingaperi. 
Psalms119:91 Mirayiro yenyu iripo kusvikira iye nhasi, nokuti zvinhu zvose zvinokushumirai." 
Psalms119:92 Dai murayiro wenyu wanga usiri mufaro wangu, ndingadai ndakafira mumatambudziko angu." 
Psalms119:93 Handichazokanganwi zvamakatema, nokuti nazvo makachengetedza upenyu hwangu." 
Psalms119:94 Ndiponesei, nokuti ndiri wenyu; ndakatsvaka zvamakatema." 
Psalms119:95 Vakaipa vakarindira kundiparadza, asi ini ndichafunga zvirevo zvenyu." 
Psalms119:96 	Ndinoona kuguma kwezvose zvakakwana, asi mirayiro yenyu haina magumo. Memu" 
Psalms119:97 Haiwa, ndinoda murayiro wenyu sei! Ndinoufungisisa zuva rose." 
Psalms119:98 Mirayiro yenyu inoita kuti ndive akachenjera kupfuura vavengi vangu, nokuti inogara neni nguva dzose." 
Psalms119:99 Ndinonzwisisa zvakawanda kupfuura vadzidzisi vangu, nokuti ndinofungisisa pamusoro pezvamakatema." 
Psalms119:100 Ndinonzwisisa zvikuru kupfuura vakuru, nokuti ndinoteerera zvirevo zvenyu." 
Psalms119:101 Ndakadzora tsoka dzangu panzira dzose dzakaipa kuti nditeerere shoko renyu. 
Psalms119:102 Handina kubva pamirayiro yenyu, nokuti imi pachenyu makandidzidzisa." 
Psalms119:103 Mashoko enyu anotapira seiko pakuaravira, anotapira kukunda uchi mumukanwa mangu!" 
Psalms119:104 	Ndinowana kunzwisisa kubva pazvirevo zvenyu; naizvozvo ndinovenga nzira dzose dzakaipa. Nuni 
Psalms119:105 Shoko renyu ndiwo mwenje wetsoka dzangu, nechiedza chenzira yangu." 
Psalms119:106 Ndakaita mhiko ndikaisimbisa, kuti ndichatevera mirayiro yenyu yakarurama." 
Psalms119:107 Ndakatambudzika kwazvo; chengetedzai upenyu hwangu, imi Jehovha, zvakafanira shoko renyu." 
Psalms119:108 Haiwa Jehovha, gamuchirai henyu kurumbidza kwomuromo wangu, mugondidzidzisa mirayiro yenyu." 
Psalms119:109 Kunyange ndichiramba ndakabata upenyu hwangu mumaoko angu, handizokanganwi murayiro wenyu." 
Psalms119:110 Vakaipa vakanditeya nomusungo, asi handina kutsauka pazvirevo zvenyu." 
Psalms119:111 Zvirevo zvenyu inhaka yangu nokusingaperi; ndizvo mufaro womwoyo wangu. 
Psalms119:112 	Mwoyo wangu wakagarira kuchengeta zvirevo zvenyu, kusvikira kumagumo. Sameki" 
Psalms119:113 Ndinovenga vanhu vane mwoyo miviri, asi ndinoda murayiro wenyu." 
Psalms119:114 Imi muri utiziro hwangu nenhoo yangu; ndakaisa tariro yangu pashoko renyu. 
Psalms119:115 Ibvai kwandiri, imi vaiti vezvakaipa, kuti ndichengete mirayiro yaMwari wangu!" 
Psalms119:116 Nditsigirei sezvamakavimbisa, ipapo ndichararama; musarega tariro yangu ichidzimwa." 
Psalms119:117 Nditsigirei, ipapo ndicharwirwa; ndicharamba ndine hanya nemitemo yenyu." 
Psalms119:118 Munoramba vose vanotsauka pamitemo yenyu, nokuti kunyengera kwavo hakuna maturo." 
Psalms119:119 Vakaipa vose venyika munovaita sengura; naizvozvo ndinoda zvamakatema. 
Psalms119:120 	Nyama yangu inodedera nokuda kwokukutyai; ndinomira ndichitya mirayiro yenyu. Ayini 
Psalms119:121 Ndakaita zvakarurama nokururamisira; musandisiya mumaoko avadzvinyiriri vangu. 
Psalms119:122 Itai kuti muranda wenyu agare zvakanaka; musarega vanozvikudza vachimudzvinyirira. 
Psalms119:123 Meso angu aneta nokutsvaka ruponeso rwenyu, ndichitsvaga vimbiso yenyu yakarurama." 
Psalms119:124 Itirai muranda wenyu zvinoringana norudo rwenyu, uye ndidzidzisei mitemo yenyu." 
Psalms119:125 Ndiri muranda wenyu; ndipeiwo kunzvera kuti ndigonzwisisa zvamakatema. 
Psalms119:126 Haiwa Jehovha, inguva yenyu yokubata; murayiro wenyu uri kuputswa." 
Psalms119:127 Nokuti ndinoda mirayiro yenyu kupfuura goridhe, kupfuura goridhe rakanatswa," 
Psalms119:128 	uye nokuti ndinoti zvirevo zvenyu zvose zvakarurama, ndinovenga nzira dzose dzakaipa. Pe" 
Psalms119:129 Zvirevo zvenyu zvinoshamisa; naizvozvo ndinozviteerera. 
Psalms119:130 Kuzarurwa kweshoko renyu kunopa chiedza; kunopa kunzwisisa kuna vasina mano. 
Psalms119:131 Ndinoshamisa muromo wangu ndigodokwaira, ndichishuva mirayiro yenyu." 
Psalms119:132 Dzokerai kwandiri mugondinzwira ngoni, sezvamunogara muchiita kuna avo vanoda zita renyu." 
Psalms119:133 Rayirai nhambwe dzetsoka dzangu zviri maererano neshoko renyu; chivi ngachirege kunditonga. 
Psalms119:134 Ndidzikinurei pakudzvinyirira kwavanhu, kuti ndigoteerera zvirevo zvenyu." 
Psalms119:135 Chiso chenyu ngachipenye pamusoro pomuranda wenyu, uye ndidzidzisei mitemo yenyu." 
Psalms119:136 	Hova dzemisodzi dzinoerera dzichibva mumeso angu, nokuti murayiro wenyu hausi kuteererwa. Tsadhe" 
Psalms119:137 Haiwa Jehovha, imi makarurama, uye mirayiro yenyu yakarurama." 
Psalms119:138 Zvirevo zvenyu zvamakadzika zvakarurama; zvakavimbika kwazvo. 
Psalms119:139 Kushingaira kwangu kunondipedza, nokuti vavengi vangu havana hanya namashoko enyu." 
Psalms119:140 Vimbiso dzenyu dzakaedzwa chose, uye muranda wenyu anodzida." 
Psalms119:141 Kunyange ndakaderedzwa uye ndichizvidzwa hangu, handikanganwi zvirevo zvenyu." 
Psalms119:142 Kururama kwenyu kunogara nokusingaperi, uye murayiro wenyu ndowezvokwadi." 
Psalms119:143 Nhamo namatambudziko zviri pamusoro pangu, asi mirayiro yenyu ndiwo mufaro wangu." 
Psalms119:144 	Zvirevo zvenyu zvinogara zvakarurama; ndipeiwo kunzwisisa kuti ndirarame. Kofi 
Psalms119:145 Ndinodana nomwoyo wangu wose; haiwa Jehovha ndipindureiwo, uye ndichateerera mitemo yenyu." 
Psalms119:146 Ndinodanidzira kwamuri, ndiponesei uye ndichachengeta zvamakatema." 
Psalms119:147 Ndinomuka mambakwedza asati asvika ndigochemera kubatsirwa; ndakaisa tariro yangu pashoko renyu. 
Psalms119:148 Meso angu anogara akasvinura panguva dzose dzousiku, kuti ndifungisise pamusoro pevimbiso dzenyu." 
Psalms119:149 Inzwai inzwi rangu sezvakafanira rudo rwenyu; haiwa Jehovha, chengetedzai upenyu hwangu zviri maererano nemirayiro yenyu." 
Psalms119:150 Vanoita mano akaipa vari pedyo, asi vari kure nomurayiro wenyu." 
Psalms119:151 Asi imi muri pedyo, Jehovha, uye mirayiro yenyu yose ndeyezvokwadi." 
Psalms119:152 	Ndakadzidza pane zvamakatema kare, kuti makazvisimbisa kuti zvigare nokusingaperi. Reshi" 
Psalms119:153 Tarirai kutambudzika kwangu mugondirwira, nokuti handina kukanganwa murayiro wenyu." 
Psalms119:154 Miririrai mhosva yangu uye mundidzikinure; chengetedzai upenyu hwangu maererano nevimbiso yenyu. 
Psalms119:155 Ruponeso rwuri kure navakaipa, nokuti havatsvaki mitemo yenyu." 
Psalms119:156 Haiwa Jehovha, tsitsi dzenyu ihuru; chengetedzai upenyu hwangu maererano nemirayiro yenyu." 
Psalms119:157 Vavengi vangu navanonditambudza vazhinji, asi handina kutsauka pane zvamakatema." 
Psalms119:158 Ndinotarira kuna vasingatendi ndichisema, nokuti havateereri shoko renyu." 
Psalms119:159 Tarirai madiro andinoita zvirevo zvenyu; haiwa Jehovha, chengetedzai upenyu hwangu, maererano norudo rwenyu." 
Psalms119:160 	Mashoko enyu ose ndeechokwadi; mirayiro yenyu yose yakarurama ndeyokusingaperi. Sini neShini 
Psalms119:161 Vatongi vanonditambudza ndisina mhaka, asi mwoyo wangu unodedera pashoko renyu." 
Psalms119:162 Ndinofarira vimbiso yenyu kufanana nouyowana zvakapambwa zvizhinji. 
Psalms119:163 Ndinovenga uye ndinosema nhema, asi ndinoda murayiro wenyu." 
Psalms119:164 Ndinokurumbidzai kanomwe pazuva, nokuda kwemirayiro yenyu yakarurama." 
Psalms119:165 Vanoda murayiro wenyu vano rugare rukuru, uye hakuna chingavagumbusa." 
Psalms119:166 Haiwa Jehovha, ndakamirira ruponeso rwenyu, uye ndinotevera mirayiro yenyu." 
Psalms119:167 Ndinoteerera zvirevo zvenyu, nokuti ndinozvida zvikuru." 
Psalms119:168 	Ndinoteerera zvirevo zvenyu nezvamakatema, nokuti nzira dzangu dzose dzinozivikanwa nemi. Tawu" 
Psalms119:169 Dai kuchema kwangu kwasvika pamberi penyu, imi Jehovha; ndipeiwo kunzwisisa maererano neshoko renyu." 
Psalms119:170 Kukumbira kwangu dai kwasvika pamberi penyu; ndirwirei maererano nevimbiso yenyu. 
Psalms119:171 Miromo yangu dai yafashukira nerumbidzo, nokuti munondidzidzisa mitemo yenyu." 
Psalms119:172 Rurimi rwangu dai rwaimba nezveshoko renyu, nokuti mirayiro yenyu yose yakarurama." 
Psalms119:173 Ruoko rwenyu dai rwagadzirira kundibatsira, nokuti ndakasarudza zvirevo zvenyu." 
Psalms119:174 Haiwa Jehovha, ndinoshuva ruponeso rwenyu, uye murayiro wenyu ndiwo mufaro wangu." 
Psalms119:175 Regai ndirarame kuti ndigokurumbidzai, uye dai mirayiro yenyu yandibatsira." 
Psalms119:176 Ndakatsauka segwai rakarasika. Tsvakai muranda wenyu, nokuti handina kukanganwa mirayiro yenyu." 
Psalms120:1 Rwiyo rworwendo. [1] Ndinodana kuna Jehovha mukutambudzika kwangu, uye anondipindura." 
Psalms120:2 Haiwa Jehovha, ndiponesei pamiromo inoreva nhema, nendimi dzinonyengera." 
Psalms120:3 Achaiteiko kwauri, uye chimwe chiiko kunze kwezvizvi, iwe rurimi runonyengera?" 
Psalms120:4 Achakuranga nemiseve yakapinza yemhare, namazimbe anopfuta omuti womurara." 
Psalms120:5 Ndine nhamo ini ndinogara muMesheki, kuti ndinogara pakati pamatende eKedhari!" 
Psalms120:6 Ndakagara nguva refu pakati pavanovenga rugare. 
Psalms120:7 Ndiri munhu worugare; asi pandinotaura, ivo ndevehondo." 
Psalms121:1 Rwiyo rworwendo. [1] Ndinosimudzira meso angu kumakomo, kubatsirwa kwangu kunobvepiko?" 
Psalms121:2 Rubatsiro rwangu runobva kuna Jehovha, muiti wokudenga napasi." 
Psalms121:3 Haangatenderi rutsoka rwako kuti rutedzemuke, muchengeti wako haangakotsiri;" 
Psalms121:4 zvirokwazvo, muchengeti waIsraeri haangakotsiri kana kuvata." 
Psalms121:5 Jehovha anokurinda, Jehovha ndiye mumvuri paruoko rwako rworudyi;" 
Psalms121:6 zuva haringakubayi masikati, kana mwedzi usiku." 
Psalms121:7 Jehovha achakuchengeta pane zvose zvinokuvadza, iye acharinda upenyu hwako;" 
Psalms121:8 Jehovha achakurinda pakubuda kwako napakupinda kwako, kubva zvino uye nokusingaperi." 
Psalms122:1 Rwiyo rworwendo rwaDhavhidhi. [1] Ndakafara pavakati kwandiri, “Handei kumba yaJehovha.”" 
Psalms122:2 	Tsoka dzedu dzimire mukati mamasuo ako, iwe Jerusarema." 
Psalms122:3 Jerusarema rakavakwa seguta rakapakata kwazvo. 
Psalms122:4 Ndiko kunokwira marudzi, iwo marudzi aJehovha, kundorumbidza zita raJehovha maererano nezvakatemerwa Israeri." 
Psalms122:5 	Zvigaro zvokutonga zvimire ikoko, zvigaro zvoushe zveimba yaDhavhidhi." 
Psalms122:6 Nyengetererai rugare rweJerusarema: “Vanokuda dai vagara zvakanaka. 
Psalms122:7 Dai mukati mamasvingo ako maita rugare, nokuchengetedzeka mukati menhare dzako.”" 
Psalms122:8 Nokuda kwehama neshamwari dzangu, ndichati, “Rugare ngaruve mukati mako.”" 
Psalms122:9 Nokuda kweimba yaJehovha Mwari wedu, ndichatsvaka kubudirira kwako." 
Psalms123:1 Rwiyo rworwendo. [1] Ndinosimudzira meso angu kwamuri, kunemi mune chigaro choushe kudenga." 
Psalms123:2 Sokutarira kunoita meso enhapwa kuna vatenzi vadzo, sezvinoita meso omurandakadzi achitarira ruoko rwatenzikadzi wake, saizvozvo meso edu anotarira kuna Jehovha Mwari wedu, kusvikira atinzwira ngoni." 
Psalms123:3 Tinzwirei ngoni, imi Jehovha, tinzwirei ngoni, nokuti takatsunga pakuzvidzwa kwakawanda." 
Psalms123:4 Takatsunga zvikuru pakumhurwa kunobva kuna vanozvikudza, nokuzvidzwa kuzhinji kunobva kuna vanozvikudza." 
Psalms124:1 Rwiyo rworwendo rwaDhavhidhi. [1] Dai Jehovha akanga asiri kurutivi rwedu, Israeri ngavati," 
Psalms124:2 dai Jehovha akanga asiri kurutivi rwedu patakarwiswa navanhu," 
Psalms124:3 apo kutsamwa kwavo kwakatimukira, vangadai vakatimedza tiri vapenyu;" 
Psalms124:4 mafashamu angadai akatifukidza, mvura zhinji ingadai yakatikukura," 
Psalms124:5 mvura zhinji ine hasha ingadai yakatirasira kure. 
Psalms124:6 Jehovha ngaarumbidzwe, asina kutendera kuti tibvamburwe nameno avo." 
Psalms124:7 Tapunyuka seshiri yabva parugombe rwomuteyi; rugombe rwadamburwa uye tapunyuka. 
Psalms124:8 Kubatsirwa kwedu kuri muzita raJehovha, Muiti wedenga nenyika." 
Psalms125:1 Rwiyo rworwendo. [1] Vanovimba naJehohva vakafanana neGomo reZioni, risingazungunuswi asi rinogara nokusingaperi." 
Psalms125:2 Sokupoteredzwa kwakaitwa Jerusarema namakomo, saizvozvo Jehovha anopoteredza vanhu vake kubva zvino nokusingaperi." 
Psalms125:3 Tsvimbo yavasakarurama haingagari pamusoro penyika yakagoverwa vakarurama, nokuti ipapo vakarurama vangazotambanudzira maoko avo kuita zvakaipa." 
Psalms125:4 Haiwa Jehovha, itirai zvakanaka, kuna avo vakanaka, kuna avo vane mwoyo yakarurama." 
Psalms125:5 Asi avo vanotsaukira kunzira dzakaminama, Jehovha achavaparadza pamwe chete navaiti vezvakaipa. Rugare ngaruve pana Israeri." 
Psalms126:1 Rwiyo rwoRwendo. [1] Jehovha paakadzosa vatapwa kuZioni, takanga tava savanhu vairota." 
Psalms126:2 Miromo yedu yakanga izere nokuseka, ndimi dzedu dzizere nenziyo dzomufaro. Ipapo zvakanzi pakati pendudzi, “Jehovha akavaitira zvinhu zvikuru.”" 
Psalms126:3 Jehovha atiitira zvinhu zvikuru, uye tazara nomufaro." 
Psalms126:4 Tidzorereizve nhaka yedu, imi Jehovha, sehova dzeNegevhi." 
Psalms126:5 Avo vanodyara nemisodzi vachakohwa nenziyo dzomufaro. 
Psalms126:6 Uyo anobuda achichema, akatakura mbeu yokudyara, achadzoka nenziyo dzomufaro, akatakura zvisote." 
Psalms127:1 Rwiyo rworwendo rwaSoromoni. [1] Kana Jehovha asingavaki imba, vavaki vayo vanoshandira pasina. Kana Jehovha asingachengeti guta, varindi vanomira vakarinda pasina." 
Psalms127:2 Hazvina maturo kumuka mangwanani nokunonoka kuvata, uchitambudzikira zvokudya, nokuti anopa hope kuna vaanoda." 
Psalms127:3 Vanakomana inhaka inobva kuna Jehovha, vana mubayiro unobva kwaari." 
Psalms127:4 Semiseve mumaoko emhare ndizvo zvakaita vanakomana voujaya. 
Psalms127:5 Akaropafadzwa murume ane goba rizere navo. Havanganyadziswi pavanokakavadzana navavengi vavo pasuo. 
Psalms128:1 Rwiyo rworwendo. [1] Vakaropafadzwa vose vanotya Jehovha, vanofamba munzira dzake." 
Psalms128:2 Uchadya chibereko chokushanda kwako; maropafadzo nokubudirira zvichava zvako. 
Psalms128:3 Mukadzi wako achava somuzambiringa unobereka, pakati peimba yako; vanakomana vako vachaita samabukira omuorivhi, vakakomberedza tafura yako." 
Psalms128:4 Ndizvo zvakaita munhu akaropafadzwa, anotya Jehovha." 
Psalms128:5 Dai Jehovha akuropafadzai kubva kuZioni, mazuva ose oupenyu hwenyu; dai maona henyu kubudirira kweJerusarema," 
Psalms128:6 uye mararama kuti muone vana vavana venyu. Rugare ngaruve pana Israeri. 
Psalms129:1 Rwiyo rworwendo. [1] Vakandidzvinyirira zvikuru kubva pauduku hwangu, Israeri ngaati," 
Psalms129:2 “Vakandidzvinyirira zvikuru kubva pauduku hwangu, asi havana kundikunda." 
Psalms129:3 Varimi vakarima musana wangu vakaita miforo yavo mirefu.” 
Psalms129:4 Asi Jehovha akarurama; akandisunungura pamabote avakaipa. 
Psalms129:5 Dai vose vanovenga Zioni vadzorerwa shure nenyadzi. 
Psalms129:6 Dai vaita souswa pamusoro pedenga remba, hunooma husati hwakura;" 
Psalms129:7 mukohwi haangazadzi maoko ake nahwo, uye anounganidza haangazadzi maoko ake." 
Psalms129:8 Dai vanopfuura napo varega kuti, “Maropafadzo aJehovha ngaave pamusoro pako; tinokuropafadza muzita raJehovha.”" 
Psalms130:1 Rwiyo rworwendo. [1] Ndakadanidzira kwamuri Jehovha, ndiri pakadzika;" 
Psalms130:2 haiwa Jehovha, inzwai inzwi rangu. Nzeve dzenyu ngadzinzwe kuchemera kwangu ngoni." 
Psalms130:3 Dai imi, iyemi Jehovha, maironda zvakaipa zvangu, haiwa Jehovha, ndianiko aimira?" 
Psalms130:4 Asi kukanganwira kuri kwamuri; naizvozvo imi munotyiwa. 
Psalms130:5 Ndinorindira Jehovha, mweya wangu unorindira, uye tariro yangu iri mushoko rake." 
Psalms130:6 Mweya wangu unorindira Ishe kupfuura varindi vanomirira rungwanani. 
Psalms130:7 Haiwa Israeri, isa tariro yako pana Jehovha, nokuti Jehovha ane rudo rusingaperi uye kwaari kune dzikinuro izere." 
Psalms130:8 Uye achadzikinura Israeri kubva pazvivi zvavo zvose. 
Psalms131:1 Rwiyo rworwendo rwaDhavhidhi. [1] Haiwa Jehovha, mwoyo wangu hauzvikudzi, meso angu haana manyawi; handina hanya nezvinhu zvikuru kana zvinhu zvinonyanya kushamisa." 
Psalms131:2 Asi ndakadzikamisa uye ndakanyaradza mweya wangu; somwana akarumurwa namai vake, somwana akarumurwa, ndizvo zvakaita mweya wangu mandiri." 
Psalms131:3 Haiwa Israeri, isai tariro yenyu pana Jehovha, kubva zvino nokusingaperi." 
Psalms132:1 Rwiyo rworwendo. [1] Haiwa Jehovha, rangarirai Dhavhidhi namatambudziko ake ose aakakunda." 
Psalms132:2 Akapika mhiko kuna Jehovha, akaita mhiko kuna Wamasimba waJakobho achiti," 
Psalms132:3 “Handingapindi mumba mangu kana kuenda kundovata pamubhedha wangu," 
Psalms132:4 handingatenderi hope mumaziso angu, kana kutsumwaira mumeso angu," 
Psalms132:5 kusvikira ndawana nzvimbo yaJehovha, nzvimbo yokugara yoWamasimba waJakobho.”" 
Psalms132:6 Takazvinzwa muEfurata, takasangana nazvo muminda yeJaari tikati," 
Psalms132:7 “Ngatiendei kunzvimbo yake yokugara; ngatinamatei pachitsiko chetsoka dzake," 
Psalms132:8 haiwa Jehovha, simukai muuye kunzvimbo yenyu yokuzorora, imi neareka yesimba renyu." 
Psalms132:9 Vaprista venyu dai vafukidzwa nokururama; dai vatsvene venyu vaimba nomufaro.” 
Psalms132:10 Nokuda kwaDhavhidhi muranda wenyu, musaramba muzodziwa wenyu." 
Psalms132:11 Jehovha akapika mhiko kuna Dhavhidhi, mhiko yechokwadi yaasingagoni kushandura achiti, “Mumwe wechizvarwa chako ndichamugadza pachigaro chako choushe," 
Psalms132:12 	kana vanakomana vako vakachengeta sungano yangu nezvandakatema zvandakavadzidzisa, ipapo vanakomana vavo vachagara pachigaro chako choushe nokusingaperi-peri.”" 
Psalms132:13 Nokuti Jehovha akasarudza Zioni, akarida kuti huve ugaro hwake achiti," 
Psalms132:14 “Iyi ndiyo nzvimbo yangu yokuzorora nokusingaperi-peri; ipapa ndipo pandichagara samambo, nokuti ndakapada," 
Psalms132:15 ndichariropafadza nezvakawanda; ndichagutsa varombo varo nezvokudya. 
Psalms132:16 	Ndichafukidza vaprista varo noruponeso, uye vatsvene varo vachagara vachiimba nomufaro." 
Psalms132:17 “Pano ndipo pandichameresa nyanga yaDhavhidhi, uye ndichatungidza mwenje womuzodziwa wangu." 
Psalms132:18 Ndichafukidza vavengi vake nenyadzi, asi korona yake ichabwinya kwazvo.”" 
Psalms133:1 Rwiyo rworwendo rwaDhavhidhi. [1] Zvakanaka uye zvinofadza sei kana hama dzichigara pamwe chete mukubatana! 
Psalms133:2 Zvakafanana namafuta anokosha adururirwa pamusoro, anoerera kundebvu, anoerera kundebvu dzaAroni, anoburukira kusvikira pamipendero yenguo dzake." 
Psalms133:3 Zvinoita sokuti dova reHerimoni riri kuwira pamusoro peGomo reZioni. Nokuti ndipo pakaiswa kuropafadza kwaJehovha, ihwo upenyu husingaperi-peri." 
Psalms134:1 Rwiyo rworwendo. [1] Rumbidzai Jehovha, imi varanda vose vaJehovha, vanoshumira usiku muimba yaJehovha." 
Psalms134:2 Simudzai maoko enyu munzvimbo tsvene, murumbidze Jehovha." 
Psalms134:3 Dai Jehovha, iye Muiti wedenga napasi, akuropafadzai kubva paZioni." 
Psalms135:1 Rumbidzai Jehovha. Rumbidzai zita raJehovha; murumbidzei, imi varanda vaJehovha," 
Psalms135:2 imi munoshumira muimba yaJehovha, muvanze dzeimba yaMwari wedu." 
Psalms135:3 Rumbidzai Jehovha, nokuti Jehovha akanaka; imbirai zita rake nziyo dzokurumbidza, nokuti ndizvo zvakanaka." 
Psalms135:4 Nokuti Jehovha akasarudza Jakobho kuti ave wake, naIsraeri kuti ave pfuma yake." 
Psalms135:5 Ndinoziva kuti Jehovha mukuru, uye kuti Ishe wedu mukuru kupfuura vamwari vose." 
Psalms135:6 Jehovha anoita zvose zvinomufadza, kudenga napasi, nomumakungwa napakadzika pose." 
Psalms135:7 Anoita kuti makore akwire kubva kumagumo enyika; anotumira mheni nemvura, uye anobudisa mhepo kubva mumatura ake." 
Psalms135:8 Ndiye akaparadza matangwe eIjipiti, matangwe avanhu neemhuka." 
Psalms135:9 Akatumira zviratidzo nezvishamiso zvake mukati mako, iwe Ijipiti, pamusoro paFaro navaranda vake vose." 
Psalms135:10 Akaparadza ndudzi dzakawanda uye akauraya madzimambo ane simba," 
Psalms135:11 Sihoni mambo weAmori, Ogi mambo weBhashani namadzimambo ose eKenani," 
Psalms135:12 akapa nyika yavo kuti ive nhaka, nhaka yavanhu vake Israeri." 
Psalms135:13 Haiwa Jehovha, zita renyu rinogara nokusingaperi, mukurumbira wenyu, imi Jehovha, kumarudzi namarudzi." 
Psalms135:14 Nokuti Jehovha achapupurira vanhu vake uye achava nenyasha pamusoro pavaranda vake. 
Psalms135:15 Zvifananidzo zvendudzi isirivha negoridhe, zvakaitwa namaoko avanhu." 
Psalms135:16 Zvine miromo, asi hazvigoni kutaura, zvina meso, asi hazvigoni kuona;" 
Psalms135:17 nenzeve, asi hazvigoni kunzwa, uye hamuna kufema mumuromo mazvo." 
Psalms135:18 Vaya vanozviita vachafanana nazvo, saizvozvowo, naivo vanovimba nazvo." 
Psalms135:19 Haiwa imi imba yaIsraeri, rumbidzai Jehovha; haiwa imba yaAroni, rumbidzai Jehovha;" 
Psalms135:20 Haiwa imi imba yaRevhi, rumbidzai Jehovha; imi vanomutya, rumbidzai Jehovha." 
Psalms135:21 Jehovha ngaarumbidzwe kubva kuZioni, iye agere muJerusarema. Rumbidzai Jehovha." 
Psalms136:1 Vongai Jehovha, nokuti akanaka: nokuti ngoni dzake dzinogara nokusingaperi." 
Psalms136:2 Vongai Mwari wavamwari: nokuti ngoni dzake dzinogara nokusingaperi. 
Psalms136:3 Vongai Ishe wamadzishe: nokuti ngoni dzake dzinogara nokusingaperi; 
Psalms136:4 iye oga anoita zvinoshamisa zvikuru, nokuti ngoni dzake dzinogara nokusingaperi;" 
Psalms136:5 iye akaita matenga nokunzwisisa kwake, nokuti ngoni dzake dzinogara nokusingaperi;" 
Psalms136:6 iye akatambanudza nyika pamusoro pemvura zhinji, nokuti ngoni dzake dzinogara nokusingaperi;" 
Psalms136:7 iye akaita zviedza zvikuru, nokuti ngoni dzake dzinogara nokusingaperi;" 
Psalms136:8 zuva kuti ribate ushe masikati, nokuti ngoni dzake dzinogara nokusingaperi;" 
Psalms136:9 mwedzi nenyeredzi kuti zvibate ushe usiku, nokuti ngoni dzake dzinogara nokusingaperi;" 
Psalms136:10 iye akarova matangwe eIjipiti, nokuti ngoni dzake dzinogara nokusingaperi;" 
Psalms136:11 uye akabudisa Israeri kubva pakati pavo, nokuti ngoni dzake dzinogara nokusingaperi;" 
Psalms136:12 noruoko rune simba uye noruoko rwakatambanudzwa, nokuti ngoni dzake dzinogara nokusingaperi;" 
Psalms136:13 iye akaparadzanisa Gungwa Dzvuku napakati, nokuti ngoni dzake dzinogara nokusingaperi;" 
Psalms136:14 uye akayambutsa Israeri nomukati maro, nokuti ngoni dzake dzinogara nokusingaperi;" 
Psalms136:15 asi akakukura Faro nehondo yake muGungwa Dzvuku, nokuti ngoni dzake dzinogara nokusingaperi;" 
Psalms136:16 iye akatungamirira vanhu vake nomugwenga, nokuti ngoni dzake dzinogara nokusingaperi;" 
Psalms136:17 akarova madzimambo makuru, nokuti ngoni dzake dzinogara nokusingaperi;" 
Psalms136:18 uye akauraya madzimambo ane simba, nokuti ngoni dzake dzinogara nokusingaperi;" 
Psalms136:19 Sihoni mambo wavaAmori, nokuti ngoni dzake dzinogara nokusingaperi;" 
Psalms136:20 naOgi mambo weBhashani, nokuti ngoni dzake dzinogara nokusingaperi;" 
Psalms136:21 akavapa nyika yavo senhaka, nokuti ngoni dzake dzinogara nokusingaperi;" 
Psalms136:22 nhaka kumuranda wake Israeri, nokuti ngoni dzake dzinogara nokusingaperi;" 
Psalms136:23 iye akatirangarira paurombo hwedu, nokuti ngoni dzake dzinogara nokusingaperi;" 
Psalms136:24 uye akatisunungura kubva pavavengi vedu, nokuti ngoni dzake dzinogara nokusingaperi;" 
Psalms136:25 uye anopa zvokudya kuzvisikwa zvose, nokuti ngoni dzake dzinogara nokusingaperi." 
Psalms136:26 Vongai Mwari wokudenga, nokuti ngoni dzake dzinogara nokusingaperi." 
Psalms137:1 Panzizi dzeBhabhironi takagarapo tikachema, patakarangarira Zioni." 
Psalms137:2 Pamikonachando apo ndipo patakaturika mbira dzedu," 
Psalms137:3 nokuti ipapo avo vakatitapa vakatikumbira nziyo, vatambudzi vedu vakatigombedzera kuti tiimbe nziyo dzomufaro, vakati, “Tiimbirei rumwe rwiyo rweZioni!”" 
Psalms137:4 Tingaimba seiko nziyo dzaJehovha tiri munyika yokumwe? 
Psalms137:5 Kana ndikakukanganwa, iwe Jerusarema, ruoko rwangu rworudyi ngarukanganwe umhizha hwarwo." 
Psalms137:6 Rurimi rwangu ngarunamatire kumusoro kwomuromo wangu, kana ndikasakurangarira iwe, kana ndisingafungi Jerusarema, iwo mufaro wangu wapamusoro-soro." 
Psalms137:7 Haiwa Jehovha, rangarirai henyu zvakaitwa navaEdhomu, pazuva rakawa Jerusarema. Vakati, “Rikoromorei! Rikoromorei kusvikira panheyo dzaro!”" 
Psalms137:8 Haiwa Mwanasikana weBhabhironi, watongerwa kuparadzwa, achafara munhu uyo achatsiva kwauri zvawakaita kwatiri," 
Psalms137:9 iye achatora pwere dzako agodzirovera pamatombo. 
Psalms138:1 Pisarema raDhavhidhi. [1] Ndichakurumbidzai, imi Jehovha, nomwoyo wangu wose; ndichaimba nziyo dzokukurumbidzai pamberi pa“vamwari.”" 
Psalms138:2 Ndichakotamira pasi ndakatarisa kutemberi yenyu tsvene, uye ndicharumbidza zita renyu nokuda kworudo rwenyu nokutendeka kwenyu, nokuti makakudza zita renyu neshoko renyu pamusoro pezvinhu zvose." 
Psalms138:3 Pandakadana, imi makandipindura; makandishingisa nomwoyo wakasimba." 
Psalms138:4 Madzimambo ose enyika ngaakurumbidzei, imi Jehovha, pavanonzwa mashoko omuromo wenyu." 
Psalms138:5 Ngavaimbe pamusoro penzira dzaJehovha, nokuti kubwinya kwaJehovha kukuru." 
Psalms138:6 Kunyange Jehovha ari kumusoro, anoona vanozvininipisa, asi vanozvikudza anovaziva vari kure." 
Psalms138:7 Kunyange ndikafamba pakati penhamo, munochengetedza upenyu hwangu; munotambanudza ruoko rwenyu pamusoro pehasha dzavavengi vangu, munondiponesa noruoko rwenyu rworudyi." 
Psalms138:8 Jehovha achazadzisa zvirongwa zvake neni; rudo rwenyu, imi Jehovha, runogara nokusingaperi, musasiya mabasa amaoko enyu." 
Psalms139:1 Kumutungamiri wokuimba. Pisarema raDhavhidhi. [1] Haiwa Jehovha, makandinzvera uye munondiziva." 
Psalms139:2 Munoziva nguva yandinogara neyandinosimuka; munonzwisisa pfungwa dzangu muri kure. 
Psalms139:3 Munonzvera kubuda kwangu nokuvata kwangu pasi; munoziva nzira dzangu dzose. 
Psalms139:4 Shoko risati rava parurimi rwangu, tarirai, imi Jehovha, munoriziva rose." 
Psalms139:5 Munondikomberedza shure nemberi; makaisa ruoko rwenyu pamusoro pangu. 
Psalms139:6 Kuziva kwakadai kunondishamisa, kwakanyanya kukwirira zvokuti handingasvikiri." 
Psalms139:7 Ndingaendepiko ndibve paMweya wenyu? Ndingatizirepiko ndibve pamberi penyu? 
Psalms139:8 Kana ndikakwira kumatenga, imi muriko; kana ndikawarira mubhedha wangu kwakadzika, imi muriko." 
Psalms139:9 Kana ndikasimuka namapapiro amambakwedza, kana ndikandogara kumagumo egungwa," 
Psalms139:10 kunyange ipapo ruoko rwenyu runondisesedza, ruoko rwenyu rworudyi runondimbundikira." 
Psalms139:11 Kana ndikati, “Zvirokwazvo rima richandivanza, uye chiedza chinondikomberedza chichava usiku kwandiri,”" 
Psalms139:12 kunyange rima haringavi rima kwamuri; usiku huchapenya samasikati, nokuti rima rakaita samasikati kwamuri." 
Psalms139:13 Nokuti imi makasika zvomukati-kati mangu; makandiruka ndiri mudumbu ramai vangu. 
Psalms139:14 Ndinokurumbidzai nokuti ndakaitwa nomutoo unotyisa uye unoshamisa; mabasa enyu anoshamisa, ndinonyatsozviziva kwazvo." 
Psalms139:15 Mapfupa angu akanga asina kuvanzika kwamuri, pandakanga ndaiswa munzvimbo yakavanda. Pandakarukwa ndiri pakadzika penyika," 
Psalms139:16 meso enyu akaona muviri usati waumbwa. Mazuva ose andakarongerwa akanga akanyorwa mubhuku renyu, rimwe rawo risati ravapo." 
Psalms139:17 Mirangariro yenyu inokosha sei kwandiri, imi Mwari! Yakakura sei pakuverengwa kwayo!" 
Psalms139:18 Dai ndaiverenga, ingadai yaikunda tsanga dzejecha pakuwanda. Pandinopepuka, ndinenge ndinemi." 
Psalms139:19 Dai mukangouraya vakaipa, imi Mwari! Endai kure neni, imi vanhu vokuteura ropa!" 
Psalms139:20 Ivo vanotaura nemi nomurangariro wakaipa; vadzivisi venyu vanoshandisa zita renyu zvakaipa. 
Psalms139:21 Ko, ini handivengi vanokuvengai here, imi Jehovha, nokusema vaya vanokumukirai?" 
Psalms139:22 Handina chimwe chinhu asi kuvavenga ivo; ndinovati vavengi vangu. 
Psalms139:23 Ndinzverei, imi Mwari, mugoziva mwoyo wangu; ndiedzei mugoziva kushuva kwendangariro dzangu." 
Psalms139:24 Muone kana musina nzira yakaipa mandiri, mugondifambisa munzira isingaperi." 
Psalms140:1 Kumutungamiri wokuimba. Pisarema raDhavhidhi. [1] Ndirwirei, imi Jehovha, pavanhu vakaipa; ndidzivirirei pavanhu vanoita nechisimba." 
Psalms140:2 Ivo vanofunga urongwa hwakaipa mumwoyo yavo, uye vanomutsa hondo mazuva ose." 
Psalms140:3 	Vanorodza ndimi dzavo kuti dzipinze sedzenyoka; uturu hwenyoka yechiva huri pamiromo yavo. Sera 
Psalms140:4 Ndichengetei, imi Jehovha, kubva mumaoko avakaipa; ndidzivirirei pavanhu vanoita nechisimba vanoronga kupinga tsoka dzangu." 
Psalms140:5 	Vanhu vanozvikudza vakandivanzira musungo; vakatambanudza mabote emimbure yavo uye vakateya ugombe munzira yandinofamba nayo. Sera 
Psalms140:6 Haiwa Jehovha, ndinoti kwamuri, “Ndimi Mwari wangu.” Haiwa Jehovha, inzwai kuchemera nyasha kwangu." 
Psalms140:7 Haiwa Ishe Jehovha, imi mudzikinuri wangu ane simba, anofukidza musoro wangu pazuva rehondo," 
Psalms140:8 	regai kupa vakaipa zvavanoda, imi Jehovha; musarega urongwa hwavo huchibudirira, kuti varege kuzvikudza. Sera" 
Psalms140:9 Misoro yaavo vakandipoteredza ngaifukidzwe nenhamo yakaparwa nemiromo yavo. 
Psalms140:10 Mazimbe anopfuta ngaawire pamusoro pavo; ngavakandwe mumoto, mumakomba amatope, vasambomukazve." 
Psalms140:11 Vana makuhwa ngavarege kusimbiswa panyika; njodzi ngaivhime vanhu vanoita nechisimba. 
Psalms140:12 Ndinoziva kuti Jehovha akachengetera varombo kururamisirwa kwavo, uye anotsigira vanoshayiwa pamhaka dzavo." 
Psalms140:13 Zvirokwazvo vakarurama vacharumbidza zita renyu, uye vakarurama vachagara pamberi penyu." 
Psalms141:1 Pisarema raDhavhidhi. [1] Haiwa Jehovha, ndinodana kwamuri; kurumidzai kuuya kwandiri. Inzwai inzwi rangu pandinodana kwamuri." 
Psalms141:2 	Munyengetero wangu ngauiswe pamberi penyu sezvinonhuwira; kusimudzwa kwamaoko angu ngakuite sechibayiro chamadekwana. 
Psalms141:3 Isai murindi pamuromo wangu, imi Jehovha; chengetai mukova wemiromo yangu." 
Psalms141:4 	Mwoyo wangu ngaurege kukweverwa kune zvakaipa, kuti ndiitewo mabasa akaipa navanhu vanoita zvakaipa; ngandirege kudya zvinozipa zvavo." 
Psalms141:5 Akarurama ngaandirove, ndidzo tsitsi; ngaanditsiure, ndiwo mafuta pamusoro wangu. Musoro wangu hauzorambi izvozvo. Asi munyengetero wangu unorwisa mabasa avaiti vezvakaipa nguva dzose." 
Psalms141:6 Vatongi vavo vachakandwa kumawere, uye vakaipa vachadzidza kuti mashoko angu akanga akanaka kwazvo." 
Psalms141:7 	Ivo vachati, “Sezvinoita anorima achiparura pasi, saizvozvo mapfupa edu akaparadzirwa pamuromo weguva.”" 
Psalms141:8 Asi meso angu anotarira kwamuri, imi Ishe Jehovha; ndinotizira kwamuri, regai kundiisa kurufu." 
Psalms141:9 Ndichengetei pamisungo yavakanditeya nayo, napaugombe hwakadzikwa navaiti vezvakaipa." 
Psalms141:10 Vakaipa ngavawire mumimbure yavo, ini ndichipfuura napo norugare." 
Psalms142:1 Masikiri raDhavhidhi. Paakanga ari mubako. Munyengetero. [1] Ndinodanidzira nenzwi guru kuna Jehovha; ndinosimudzira inzwi rangu kuna Jehovha, kuti andinzwire nyasha." 
Psalms142:2 Ndinodurura kugunun'una kwangu pamberi pake; ndinotaura nhamo dzangu pamberi pake. 
Psalms142:3 Mweya wangu paunoziya mandiri, imi ndimi munoziva nzira yangu. Munzira mandinofamba, vanhu vakandivanzira misungo." 
Psalms142:4 Tarirai kurudyi rwangu mugoona; hakuna ane hanya nemi. Handina utiziro; hakuna ane hanya noupenyu hwangu. 
Psalms142:5 Ndinochema kwamuri, imi Jehovha; ndinoti, “Ndimi utiziro hwangu, nomugove wangu munyika yavapenyu.”" 
Psalms142:6 Teererai kuchema kwangu, nokuti ndiri pakushayiwa kukuru; ndinunurei kuna avo vanondidzinganisa, nokuti vanondikurira simba." 
Psalms142:7 Ndibudisei mutorongo, kuti ndirumbidze zita renyu. Ipapo vakarurama vachandipoteredza nokuda kwokunaka kwenyu kwandiri." 
Psalms143:1 Pisarema raDhavhidhi. [1] Haiwa Jehovha, inzwai munyengetero wangu, ndinzwirei nyasha pakuchema kwangu; uyai mundisunungure nokutendeka uye nokururama kwenyu." 
Psalms143:2 Musauyisa muranda wenyu mukutongwa, nokuti hakuna mupenyu akarurama pamberi penyu." 
Psalms143:3 Muvengi anondidzinganisa, anondipwanyira pasi; anondiita kuti ndigare murima savaya vakafa kare." 
Psalms143:4 Saizvozvo mweya wangu unoziya mukati mangu; mwoyo wangu unovhundutswa mukati mangu. 
Psalms143:5 Ndinorangarira mazuva akare kare; ndinofungisisa pamusoro pamabasa enyu ose, uye ndinofunga zvakaitwa namaoko enyu." 
Psalms143:6 	Ndinotambanudzira maoko angu kwamuri; mweya wangu unokushuvai senyika yakaoma. Sera 
Psalms143:7 Haiwa Jehovha, kurumidzai kundipindura; mweya wangu woziya. Regai kundivanzira chiso chenyu nokuti ndingazova savaya vakaburukira mugomba." 
Psalms143:8 Mangwanani ngaandivigire shoko rorudo rwenyu rusingaperi, nokuti ndinovimba nemi. Ndiratidzei nzira yandinofanira kufamba nayo, nokuti ndinosimudzira mweya wangu kwamuri." 
Psalms143:9 Ndinunurei kubva kuvavengi vangu, imi Jehovha, nokuti ndinozvivanza mamuri." 
Psalms143:10 Ndidzidzisei kuita kuda kwenyu, nokuti muri Mwari wangu; mweya wenyu wakanaka ngaunditungamirire panzira yakati chechetere." 
Psalms143:11 Haiwa Jehovha, chengetedzai upenyu hwangu nokuda kwezita renyu; ndibudisei panhamo, mukururama kwenyu." 
Psalms143:12 Nyaradzai vavengi vangu, murudo rwenyu rusingaperi; paradzai vavengi vangu vose, nokuti ndiri muranda wenyu." 
Psalms144:1 Pisarema raDhavhidhi. [1] Jehovha Dombo rangu ngaarumbidzwe, iye anodzidzisa maoko angu kurwa." 
Psalms144:2 Ndiye Mwari anondida uye nhare yangu, shongwe yangu nomudzikinuri wangu, nenhoo yangu uye ndinovanda maari, iye anoisa marudzi pasi pangu." 
Psalms144:3 Haiwa Jehovha, munhu chiiko zvamune hanya naye? Kana mwanakomana womunhu zvamunomufunga?" 
Psalms144:4 Munhu akafanana nomweya; mazuva ake akaita somumvuri unopfuura. 
Psalms144:5 Zarurai matenga enyu, imi Jehovha, uye muburuke; batai makomo, kuti apfungaire utsi." 
Psalms144:6 Tumirai mheni mugoparadzira vavengi; pfurai miseve yenyu mugovapedza. 
Psalms144:7 Tambanudzai ruoko rwenyu kubva kumusoro; ndirwirei uye mundinunure kubva pamvura zhinji ine simba, kubva mumaoko avatorwa" 
Psalms144:8 vane miromo izere nenhema, maoko avo orudyi anonyengera." 
Psalms144:9 Haiwa Mwari, ndichakuimbirai rwiyo rutsva; ndichakuimbirai nziyo dzokurumbidza nomutengeranwa une hungiso gumi," 
Psalms144:10 iye anopa kukunda kumadzimambo, anorwira muranda wake Dhavhidhi kubva pamunondo unouraya." 
Psalms144:11 Ndirwirei uye mundinunure kubva pamaoko avatorwa, vane miromo izere nenhema, vane maoko orudyi anonyengera." 
Psalms144:12 Ipapo vanakomana vedu pauduku hwavo vachava semiti yakakura zvakanaka, uye vanasikana vedu vachava sembiru dzakavezwa kuti dzishongedze muzinda wamambo." 
Psalms144:13 Matura edu achazadzwa nemhando dzose dzezviyo. Makwai edu achawanda nezviuru, nezviuru gumi mumafuro edu;" 
Psalms144:14 nzombe dzedu dzichatakura mitoro inorema. Hapachazovi nokuputswa kwamasvingo, hapangavi nokuenda muutapwa, hapangavi nokuchema nenhamo munzira dzedu dzomumisha." 
Psalms144:15 Vakaropafadzwa vanhu avo vachaitirwa saizvozvi; vakaropafadzwa vanhu avo vana Mwari wavo Jehovha. 
Psalms145:1 Pisarema rokurumbidza, raDhavhidhi. [1] Ndichakukudzai, Mwari wangu Mambo; ndicharumbidza zita renyu nokusingaperi-peri." 
Psalms145:2 Ndichakurumbidzai mazuva ose, uye ndichakudza zita renyu nokusingaperiperi." 
Psalms145:3 Jehovha mukuru uye akafanira kurumbidzwa; ukuru hwake hahunganzverwi nomunhu. 
Psalms145:4 Rumwe rudzi rucharumbidza mabasa enyu kuno rumwe; vachareva zvamabasa enyu esimba. 
Psalms145:5 Vachataura nezvokunaka kwokubwinya kwoumambo hwenyu, uye ndichafungisisa pamusoro pemabasa enyu anoshamisa." 
Psalms145:6 Vanhu vachataura nezvesimba ramabasa enyu anotyisa, uye ndichaparidza mabasa enyu makuru." 
Psalms145:7 Vachapemberera kuwanda kwokunaka kwenyu, uye vachaimba nomufaro pamusoro pokururama kwenyu." 
Psalms145:8 Jehovha ane nyasha uye ane tsitsi, anononoka kutsamwa uye azere norudo." 
Psalms145:9 Jehovha akanaka kuna vose; uye ane nyasha pamusoro pezvose zvaakaita. 
Psalms145:10 Zvose zvamakaita zvichakurumbidzai, imi Jehovha; vatsvene venyu vachakukudzai." 
Psalms145:11 Vachataura nezvokubwinya kwoumambo hwenyu, uye vachataura nezvesimba renyu," 
Psalms145:12 kuitira kuti vanhu vose vazive nezvamabasa enyu makuru, nokunaka kwokubwinya kwoumambo hwenyu." 
Psalms145:13 Umambo hwenyu umambo hwokusingaperi, uye ushe hwenyu hunogara kusvikira kumarudzi ose. Jehovha akatendeka pavimbiso dzake dzose, uye ane rudo kuzvinhu zvose zvaakaita." 
Psalms145:14 Jehovha anotsigira vose vanowa, uye anosimudza vose vakakotamiswa pasi." 
Psalms145:15 Meso avose anotarira kwamuri, uye munovapa zvokudya zvavo nenguva yakafanira." 
Psalms145:16 Munozarura ruoko rwenyu, uye munogutsa zvisikwa zvipenyu zvose nezvazvinoda." 
Psalms145:17 Jehovha akarurama panzira dzake dzose, uye ane rudo kuzvinhu zvose zvaakaita." 
Psalms145:18 Jehovha ari pedyo navose vanodana kwaari, kuna vose vanodana kwaari muchokwadi." 
Psalms145:19 Anozadzisa zvido zvaavo vanomutya; anonzwa kuchema kwavo uye anovaponesa. 
Psalms145:20 Jehovha anochengeta vose vanomuda, asi achaparadza vakaipa vose." 
Psalms145:21 Muromo wangu uchataura kurumbidzwa kwaJehovha. Zvisikwa zvose ngazvirumbidze zita rake dzvene nokusingaperi-peri. 
Psalms146:1 Rumbidza Jehovha. Rumbidza Jehovha, iwe mweya wangu." 
Psalms146:2 Ndicharumbidza Jehovha mazuva ose oupenyu hwangu; ndichaimbira Mwari wangu nziyo dzokurumbidza ndichiri mupenyu. 
Psalms146:3 Regai kuvimba namachinda, navanhu vanofa, vasingagoni kuponesa." 
Psalms146:4 Mweya yavo painoenda, ivo vanodzokera kuvhu; pazuva racho iroro urongwa hwavo hunova pasina." 
Psalms146:5 Akaropafadzwa munhu uyo ano mubatsiri wake Mwari waJakobho, tariro yake iri muna Jehovha Mwari wake," 
Psalms146:6 Muiti wedenga nenyika, gungwa uye nezvose zviri mariri, iye Jehovha, anogara akatendeka nokusingaperi." 
Psalms146:7 Anotsigira mhaka yavakadzvinyirirwa, uye anopa zvokudya vane nzara. Jehovha anosunungura vasungwa." 
Psalms146:8 Jehovha anosvinudza mapofu, Jehovha anosimudza avo vakakotamiswa pasi, Jehovha anoda vakarurama." 
Psalms146:9 Jehovha anorinda vatorwa uye anotsigira nherera nechirikadzi, asi anokonesa nzira dzavakaipa." 
Psalms146:10 Jehovha anotonga nokusingaperi, Mwari wako, iwe Zioni, kumarudzi namarudzi. Rumbidza Jehovha." 
Psalms147:1 Rumbidzai Jehovha. Zvakanaka sei kuimbira Mwari wedu nziyo dzokurumbidza, zvinofadza uye zvakafanira sei kumurumbidza!" 
Psalms147:2 Jehovha anovaka Jerusarema; anounganidza vakadzingwa vaIsraeri. 
Psalms147:3 Anoporesa vane mwoyo yakaputsika, uye anosunga maronda avo." 
Psalms147:4 Anotara kuwanda kwenyeredzi, anodana imwe neimwe nezita rayo." 
Psalms147:5 Ishe wedu mukuru uye ane simba guru; kunzwisisa kwake hakuperi. 
Psalms147:6 Jehovha anotsigira vanozvininipisa, asi anowisira pasi vakaipa." 
Psalms147:7 Imbirai Jehovha nokuvonga; muimbire Mwari wedu nziyo dzokurumbidza nembira. 
Psalms147:8 Anofukidza denga namakore; anopa nyika mvura, uye anomeresa uswa pazvikomo." 
Psalms147:9 Anopa mombe zvokudya navana vamakunguwo pavanochema. 
Psalms147:10 Mufaro wake hausi musimba rebhiza, uye mufaro wake hausi pamakumbo omunhu;" 
Psalms147:11 Jehovha anofadzwa naavo vanomutya, vanoisa tariro yavo parudo rwake rusingaperi." 
Psalms147:12 Kudza Jehovha, iwe Jerusarema; rumbidza Mwari wako, iwe Zioni," 
Psalms147:13 nokuti anosimbisa mazariro amasuo ako, uye anoropafadza vanhu vako vari mauri." 
Psalms147:14 Anopa rugare pamiganhu yako, uye anokugutsa nezviyo zvakaisvonaka." 
Psalms147:15 Anotuma murayiro wake kunyika; shoko rake rinomhanya kwazvo. 
Psalms147:16 Anowarira chando samakushe, uye anoparadzira chando samadota." 
Psalms147:17 Anokanda chimvuramabwe pasi sezvimedu. Ndianiko angamira kana chando chake charova? 
Psalms147:18 Anotuma shoko rake rigozvinyungudisa; anomutsa mhepo yake, mvura zhinji igoerera." 
Psalms147:19 Akazarurira Jakobho shoko rake, mirayiro yake nezvirevo zvake kuna Israeri." 
Psalms147:20 Haana kumboita izvi kuno rumwe rudzi; havazivi mirayiro yake. Rumbidzai Jehovha. 
Psalms148:1 Rumbidzai Jehovha. Rumbidzai Jehovha kubva kumatenga, murumbidzei panzvimbo dzokumusoro-soro." 
Psalms148:2 Murumbidzei, imi vatumwa vake vose, murumbidzei, imi hondo dzake dzose dzokudenga." 
Psalms148:3 Murumbidzei, imi zuva nomwedzi, murumbidzei, imi nyeredzi dzose dzinopenya." 
Psalms148:4 Murumbidzei, imi matenga ari kumusoro-soro, nemi mvura zhinji iri pamusoro pamatenga." 
Psalms148:5 Ngazvirumbidze zita raJehovha, nokuti akarayira, izvo zvikasikwa." 
Psalms148:6 Akazviisa panzvimbo yazvo nokusingaperi-peri, akapa chirevo chisingazombopfuuri." 
Psalms148:7 Rumbidzai Jehovha imi nyika, imi zvisikwa zvikuru zvegungwa nokwakadzika kwenyanza," 
Psalms148:8 nemi mheni nechimvuramabwe, chando namakore, dutu remhepo rinoita zvaakareva," 
Psalms148:9 imi makomo nemi zvikomo zvose, miti inobereka nemisidhari yose," 
Psalms148:10 mhuka dzesango nemombe dzose, zvisikwa zvidiki neshiri dzinobhururuka," 
Psalms148:11 Madzimambo enyika nendudzi dzose, imi machinda nemi vatongi vose panyika," 
Psalms148:12 majaya nemhandara, vatana navana." 
Psalms148:13 Ngavarumbidze zita raJehovha, nokuti zita rake iye oga iguru; kubwinya kwake kuri pamusoro penyika namatenga." 
Psalms148:14 Akasimudzira vanhu vake runyanga, iyo rumbidzo yavatsvene vake vose, yaIsraeri, vanhu vari pedyo nomwoyo wake. Rumbidzai Jehovha." 
Psalms149:1 Rumbidzai Jehovha. Imbirai Jehovha rwiyo rutsva, rumbidzo yake paungano yavatsvene." 
Psalms149:2 Israeri ngavafarire Muiti wavo; vanhu veZioni ngavafarire Mambo wavo. 
Psalms149:3 Ngavarumbidze zita rake vachitamba, uye vamuridzire nziyo namatambureni nembira." 
Psalms149:4 Nokuti Jehovha anofarira vanhu vake; vanozvininipisa anovashongedza korona noruponeso. 
Psalms149:5 Vatsvene ngavafare nokukudzwa kwake, uye vaimbe nomufaro vari panhoo dzavo." 
Psalms149:6 Kurumbidzwa kwaMwari ngakuve pamiromo yavo, nomunondo unocheka kwose, mumaoko avo," 
Psalms149:7 kuti vatsive pamusoro pendudzi, uye varange marudzi avanhu," 
Psalms149:8 vasunge madzimambo avo nengetani, namakurukota avo nezvisungo zvamatare," 
Psalms149:9 kuti vaite zvavakatongwa nazvo, zvakanyorwa pamusoro pavo. Ndiko kukudzwa kwavatsvene vose. Rumbidzai Jehovha." 
Psalms150:1 Rumbidzai Jehovha. Rumbidzai Mwari munzvimbo yake tsvene; murumbidzei mumatenga esimba rake. 
Psalms150:2 murumbidzei nokuda kwamabasa ake esimba; murumbidzei nokuda kwoukuru hwake hunokunda zvose. 
Psalms150:3 Murumbidzei nenzwi rehwamanda, murumbidzei nembira nomutengeranwa." 
Psalms150:4 Murumbidzei nematambureni muchitamba, murumbidzei norudimbwa nenyere." 
Psalms150:5 Murumbidzei namakandira anorira, murumbidzei namakandira anorira kwazvo." 
Psalms150:6 Zvinhu zvose zvinofema, ngazvirumbidze Jehovha. Rumbidzai Jehovha." 
Proverbs1:1 Zvirevo zvaSoromoni mwanakomana waDhavhidhi, mambo weIsraeri:" 
Proverbs1:2 kuti uwane uchenjeri nokurayirwa; nokunzwisisa mashoko enjere; 
Proverbs1:3 kuti uve noupenyu hwokuzvibata hune uchenjeri uchiita zvakarurama nokururamisira uye nokuenzanisira; 
Proverbs1:4 kuti vasina mano vapiwe uchenjeri, jaya ripiwe ruzivo namano," 
Proverbs1:5 vakachenjera ngavanzwe uye vagowedzera pakudzidza kwavo, uye vanonzvera ngavawane kutungamirirwa," 
Proverbs1:6 kuti vanzwisise zvirevo nemifananidzo, mashoko nezvirahwe zvavakachenjera." 
Proverbs1:7 Kutya Jehovha ndiwo mavambo ezivo, asi mapenzi anoshora uchenjeri nokurayirwa." 
Proverbs1:8 Mwanakomana wangu teerera, kurayira kwababa vako, uye usarasa kudzidzisa kwamai vako." 
Proverbs1:9 Zvichava chishongo chakanaka pamusoro wako nouketani hunoshongedza mutsipa wako. 
Proverbs1:10 Mwanakomana wangu, kana vatadzi vachikukwezva, usabvuma zvavari kuda kuti uite." 
Proverbs1:11 Kana vakati, “Handei tose; ngativandirei munhu timuuraye; ngativandirei mweya usina mhosva;" 
Proverbs1:12 ngativamedzei vari vapenyu, seguva, uye vakakwana kudaro savaya vanodzika mugomba;" 
Proverbs1:13 tichawana marudzi ose ezvinhu zvinokosha tigozadza dzimba dzedu nezvatichapamba; 
Proverbs1:14 isa zvinhu zvako pamwe chete nesu, tigova nechikwama chimwe chete,”" 
Proverbs1:15 mwanakomana wangu, usabvumirana navo, usaisa rutsoka panzira dzavo;" 
Proverbs1:16 nokuti tsoka dzavo dzinomhanyira muchivi, vanokurumidza kundodeura ropa." 
Proverbs1:17 Hazvibatsiri sei kutambanudza mumbure shiri dzose dzichinyatsoona! 
Proverbs1:18 Varume ava vanovandira ropa ravo vamene; vanozvivandira ivo pachavo! 
Proverbs1:19 Aya ndiwo magumo avaya vanotsvaka pfuma nenzira yakaipa; inouraya vaya vanoiwana. 
Proverbs1:20 Uchenjeri hunodanidzira nenzwi guru mumugwagwa, hunokwidza inzwi rahwo pachivara;" 
Proverbs1:21 kumusoro kwemigwagwa ine ruzha hunodanidzira, pamasuo eguta hunotaura shoko rahwo huchiti:" 
Proverbs1:22 “Kusvikira riniko imi vasina mano, muchingoda kugara musina mano? Kusvikira riniko vaseki vachifarira kuseka, uye mapenzi achivenga zivo?" 
Proverbs1:23 Dai makateerera kutsiura kwangu, ndingadai ndakadurura mwoyo wangu kwamuri uye ndakazivisa pfungwa dzangu kwamuri." 
Proverbs1:24 Asi sezvo makandiramba pandakakudanai uye pasina kana mumwe akateerera pandakatambanudza ruoko rwangu," 
Proverbs1:25 sezvo makashaya hanya nokurayira kwangu," 
Proverbs1:26 iniwo ndichaseka panguva yenjodzi yenyu; ndichaseka dambudziko parichakusvikirai," 
Proverbs1:27 dambudziko parichakukundai sedutu, njodzi paichavhuvhuta pamusoro penyu sechamupupuri, nhamo namatambudziko pazvichakukundai." 
Proverbs1:28 “Ipapo vachadana kwandiri asi ini handingavapinduri; vachanditsvaka asi havangandiwani. 
Proverbs1:29 Sezvo vakavenga zivo uye vakasasarudza kutya Jehovha," 
Proverbs1:30 sezvo vasina kugamuchira yambiro yangu, uye vakashora kutsiura kwangu," 
Proverbs1:31 vachadya zvibereko zvenzira dzavo uye vachazadzwa nezvibereko zvemano avo. 
Proverbs1:32 Nokuti kusateerera kwavasina mano kuchavaurayisa, uye kushaya hanya kwamapenzi kuchavaparadza;" 
Proverbs1:33 asi ani naani achanditeerera achagara murugare, uye achagara akasununguka, asingatyi kuparadzwa.”" 
Proverbs2:1 Mwanakomana wangu, kana ukagamuchira mashoko angu, ukachengeta mirayiro yangu mauri," 
Proverbs2:2 ukarerekera nzeve yako kuuchenjeri uye ukaisa mwoyo wako pakunzwisisa," 
Proverbs2:3 uye kana ukadanidzira kuti uwanze njere uye ukadanidzira nenzwi guru kuti uwane kunzwisisa," 
Proverbs2:4 uye kana ukahutsvaka sounotsvaka sirivha nokuhutsvaka sounotsvaka pfuma yakavanzwa," 
Proverbs2:5 ipapo uchanzwisisa kutya Jehovha uye uchawana ruzivo rwaMwari. 
Proverbs2:6 Nokuti Jehovha anopa uchenjeri, uye mumuromo make munobuda zivo nokunzwisisa." 
Proverbs2:7 Anochengetera vakarurama kukunda, iye ndiye nhoo kuna avo vane mufambiro usina chaunopomerwa," 
Proverbs2:8 nokuti anochengetedza nzira yavakarurama, uye anodzivirira nzira yavakatendeka vake." 
Proverbs2:9 Ipapo uchanzwisisa zvakarurama, kururamisira nokuenzanisira nzira dzose dzakanaka." 
Proverbs2:10 Nokuti uchenjeri huchapinda mumwoyo mako, uye ruzivo ruchafadza mweya wako." 
Proverbs2:11 Kungwara kuchakuchengetedza, uye kunzwisisa kuchakurinda." 
Proverbs2:12 Uchenjeri huchakuponesa panzira dzavanhu vakaipa, vanhu vane mashoko asakarurama," 
Proverbs2:13 vanosiya nzira yakarurama kuti vafambe munzira dzerima," 
Proverbs2:14 vanofarira kuita zvakaipa uye vanofarira kusarurama kwezvakaipa," 
Proverbs2:15 vane nzira dzakaminama uye vanonyengera pamaitiro avo. 
Proverbs2:16 Zvichakuponesazve pamukadzi chifeve, kubva pamudzimai asingazvibati, anokwezva namashoko ake," 
Proverbs2:17 uyo akasiya murume woumhandara hwake uye akashaya hanya nesungano yaakaita pamberi paMwari. 
Proverbs2:18 Nokuti imba yake inoenda kurufu, uye nzira dzake kumweya yavakafa." 
Proverbs2:19 Hakuna anoenda kwaari achidzoka kana kuzowana nzira dzoupenyu. 
Proverbs2:20 Naizvozvo iwe uchafamba munzira dzavanhu vakanaka uye ucharamba uri munzira dzavakarurama.
