Proverbs30:9 Zvichida, ndingava nezvakawanda kwazvo ndikasakukudzai, uye ndikazoti, ‘Jehovha ndianiko?’ Kana kuti zvimwe ndingava murombo ndikaba, uye ndikasaremekedza zita raMwari wangu." 
Proverbs30:10 “Usareva muranda kuna tenzi wake, nokuti achakutuka, uye uchazviripira izvozvo." 
Proverbs30:11 “Kuna avo vanotuka madzibaba avo uye vasingaropafadzi vanamai vavo; 
Proverbs30:12 vaya vanozviti vakachena pamaonero avo asi vasina kusukwa tsvina yavo; 
Proverbs30:13 vaya vane meso anozvikudza nguva dzose, vane matarisiro okushora;" 
Proverbs30:14 vaya vane meno anenge minondo nameno eshaya dzavo anenge mapanga kuti vaparadze varombo panyika, navanoshayiwa kubva pakati pavanhu." 
Proverbs30:15 “Chikwevaropa chine vanasikana vaviri. Vanodanidzira vachiti, ‘Tipei! Tipei!’ “Kune zvinhu zvitatu zvisingatongoguti, zvina zvisingamboti, ‘Zvaringana!’:" 
Proverbs30:16 guva, chizvaro chisingabereki, pasi pasingaguti mvura, nomoto usingamboti, ‘Zvaringana!’" 
Proverbs30:17 Ziso rinotuka baba, rinoshora kuteerera mai, richanongorwa namakunguo omumupata, richadyiwa namagora." 
Proverbs30:18 “Pane zvinhu zvitatu zvinondishamisa kwazvo, zvina zvandisinganzwisisi, zvinoti:" 
Proverbs30:19 nzira yegondo riri mudenga, nenzira yenyoka paruware, nenzira yechikepe pagungwa, uye nzira yomurume ane musikana." 
Proverbs30:20 “Iyi ndiyo nzira yomukadzi chifeve: Anodya agopukuta muromo wake uye agoti, ‘Hapana chinhu chakaipa chandaita ini.’" 
Proverbs30:21 “Nyika inodedera nokuda kwezvinhu zvitatu, zvinhu zvina zvaisingadi kuona:" 
Proverbs30:22 muranda anozova mambo, benzi rine zvokudya zvizhinji," 
Proverbs30:23 mukadzi akaroorwa asi asingadiwi, nomurandakadzi anotorera vatenzi vake murume." 
Proverbs30:24 “Panyika pane zvinhu zvina zvidiki, asi zvakachenjera kwazvo:" 
Proverbs30:25 Majuru zvipuka zvine simba duku asi anounganidza zvokudya zvawo muzhizha: 
Proverbs30:26 mbira zvipuka zvisina simba guru, asi dzinoita imba yadzo mumatombo;" 
Proverbs30:27 mhashu hadzina mambo, asi dzinofamba pamwe chete mumapoka adzo;" 
Proverbs30:28 dzvinyu rinogona kubatwa namaoko, asi rinowanikwa mumizinda yamadzimambo." 
Proverbs30:29 “Kune zvinhu zvitatu zvino kufamba kunokudzwa kwazvo, zvina zvino kufamba kunokudzwa kwazvo;" 
Proverbs30:30 shumba, ine simba pakati pezvikara, isingadududzi pamberi pechikara chipi zvacho;" 
Proverbs30:31 mafambiro okuzvikudza ejongwe, nenhongo yembudzi, uye namambo akakomberedzwa navarwi vake." 
Proverbs30:32 “Kana uchinge waita upenzi nokuzvirumbidza pachako, kana kuti waronga zvakaipa, bata muromo wako noruoko rwako!" 
Proverbs30:33 Nokuti somukaka warozva unobudisa ruomba, uye sokudzvinyirira mhino kunobudisa ropa, nokudaro kumutsa hasha kunobudisa kukakavara.”" 
Proverbs31:1 Zvirevo zvaMambo Remueri, zvirevo zvaakadzidziswa namai vake:" 
Proverbs31:2 “Nhaiwe mwanakomana wangu, iwe mwanakomana wokubereka, iwe mwanakomana wemhiko dzangu," 
Proverbs31:3 usapedzera simba rako pavakadzi, nenzira dzako pane avo vanoparadza madzimambo." 
Proverbs31:4 “Hazvisi zvamadzimambo, nhaiwe Remueri, hazvina kufanira madzimambo kunwa waini, hazvina kufanira vabati kukara doro," 
Proverbs31:5 nokuti vangazonwa vakakanganwa zvakatemwa nomurayiro, uye vakazotadza kururamisira kodzero dzavanomanikidzwa vose." 
Proverbs31:6 Ipai doro kuna avo vari kuparara, newaini kuna avo vari mukurwadziwa:" 
Proverbs31:7 regai vanwe vakanganwe urombo hwavo, uye varege kuzorangarirazve kutambudzika kwavo." 
Proverbs31:8 “Taurai pachinzvimbo chaavo vasingagoni kuzvitaurira, pamusoro pekodzero dzavose vanoshayiwa." 
Proverbs31:9 Taura utonge zvakanaka; udzivirire kodzero dzavarombo navanoshayiwa.” 
Proverbs31:10 Mudzimai ane unhu hwakanaka ndiani angamuwana? Mutengo wake unopfuura nokure matombo anokosha emarubhi. 
Proverbs31:11 Murume wake anovimba naye zvizere, uye haana chaanoshayiwa chinokosha." 
Proverbs31:12 Anomuitira zvakanaka, kwete zvakaipa, mazuva ose oupenyu hwake." 
Proverbs31:13 Anosarudza wuru neshinda uye anoshanda namaoko anoshingaira. 
Proverbs31:14 Akafanana nezvikepe zvavatengesi, anondotora zvokudya zvake kure." 
Proverbs31:15 Anomuka kuchakasviba; agotsvagira mhuri yake zvokudya nokupa varandakadzi vake basa ravo. 
Proverbs31:16 Anonan'anidza munda agoutenga; anosima munda wemizambiringa nezvaakawana namaoko ake. 
Proverbs31:17 Anoita basa rake nesimba; kuti aite maoko ake akasimba mabasa ake. 
Proverbs31:18 Anoona kuti kushambadzira kwake kunobatsira, uye mwenje wake haudzimi pausiku." 
Proverbs31:19 Muruoko rwake anobata chirukiso, uye anobata chirukwa neminwe yake." 
Proverbs31:20 Anotambanudzira maoko ake kuvarombo, uye anotandavadzira maoko ake kune vanoshayiwa." 
Proverbs31:21 Kana kwotonhora, haatyire mhuri yake; nokuti vose vakapfeka nguo dzinodziya." 
Proverbs31:22 Anozvigadzirira zvokuwaridza panhoo yake; anozvipfekedza nguo yomucheka wakaisvonaka, uye nomucheka wepepuru." 
Proverbs31:23 Murume wake anoremekedzwa pasuo reguta, kana agere pakati pavakuru venyika." 
Proverbs31:24 Anoita nguo dzemicheka yakanaka agodzitengesa, uye anotengesera vanotengesa micheka yokumonera muhuro." 
Proverbs31:25 Simba nokukudzwa ndizvo nguo dzake; anofara akatarisana namazuva anouya. 
Proverbs31:26 Anotaura nouchenjeri, uye kurayira kwakatendeka kuri parurimi rwake." 
Proverbs31:27 Anotarira zvakanaka mararamiro emhuri yake, uye haadyi zvokudya zvousimbe." 
Proverbs31:28 Vana vake vanosimuka vagomuti akaropafadzwa, murume wakewo, anomurumbidza:" 
Proverbs31:29 “Vakadzi vazhinji vanoita zvinhu zvakanaka, asi iwe unovakunda vose.”" 
Proverbs31:30 Zvinofadza zvinonyengera, uye runako runopera; asi mukadzi anotya Jehovha anofanira kurumbidzwa." 
Proverbs31:31 Mupeiwo mubayiro wake waakashandira, uye mabasa ake ngaamupe kurumbidzwa pasuo reguta." 
Ecclesiastes1:1 Mashoko oMuparidzi, mwanakomana waDhavhidhi, mambo muJerusarema:" 
Ecclesiastes1:2 Zvanzi noMuparidzi, “Hazvina maturo! Hazvina maturo! Hazvina maturo chose! Zvose hazvina maturo.”" 
Ecclesiastes1:3 Munhu achawaneiko kubva pakushanda kwake kwose kwaanoita nesimba pasi pezuva? 
Ecclesiastes1:4 Marudzi anouya uye marudzi anoenda, asi nyika inogara nokusingaperi." 
Ecclesiastes1:5 Zuva rinobuda uye zuva rinovira, uye rinokurumidza kudzokerazve kwarinobudira." 
Ecclesiastes1:6 Mhepo inovhuvhuta ichienda zasi, yozodzokera kumusoro; inotenderera nokutenderera ichingodzokerazve pagwara rayo." 
Ecclesiastes1:7 Nzizi dzose dzinodira mugungwa, kunyange zvakadaro gungwa harizari. Kunzvimbo kwadzinobva nzizi, ikoko ndiko kwadzinodzokerazve." 
Ecclesiastes1:8 Zvinhu zvose zvinonetesa, zvisina ani angazvitaura. Ziso hariguti kuona, uye nzeve haizari nokunzwa." 
Ecclesiastes1:9 Chakanga chiripo, chichazovapozve, chakamboitwa chichaitwazve; hapana chitsva pasi pezuva." 
Ecclesiastes1:10 Chiripo here chinhu chinganzi nomunhu, “Tarira! Chinhu ichi chitsva?” Chakanga chichingovapo, kare kare; chakanga chiripo isu tisati tavapo." 
Ecclesiastes1:11 Marudzi akapfuura haacharangarirwi; uye marudzi achazotevera, haangatongorangarirwi navanozotevera." 
Ecclesiastes1:12 Ini muparidzi ndakanga ndiri mambo weIsraeri muJerusarema. 
Ecclesiastes1:13 Ndakazvipira kunzvera nokutsvaka nouchenjeri zvose zvinoitwa pasi pedenga. Ibasa rinotambudza rakapiwa vanakomana vavanhu naMwari kuti vazvitambudze naro. 
Ecclesiastes1:14 Ndakaona zvinhu zvose zvinoitwa pasi pezuva; zvose hazvo hazvina maturo, kudzingana nemhepo bedzi." 
Ecclesiastes1:15 Chakakombamiswa hachingatwasanudzwi; chinoshayikwa hachingaverengwi. 
Ecclesiastes1:16 Ndakafunga mumwoyo mangu ndikati, “Tarira, ndazviwanira uchenjeri hwakawanda kupfuura vose vakanditangira kutonga muJerusarema; ndava nouchenjeri uye noruzivo rwakawanda.”" 
Ecclesiastes1:17 Ipapo ndakazvipira kutsvaka kunzwisisa uchenjeri uyezve noupengo noupenzi, asi ndakadzidzawo zvakare kuti, naizvozviwo kudzingana nemhepo." 
Ecclesiastes1:18 Nokuti muuchenjeri huzhinji muno kusuwa kuzhinji; kuwanda kwezivo, kuwandawo kwokuchema." 
Ecclesiastes2:1 Ndakati mumwoyo mangu, “Uya zvino, ndichakuedza nomufaro kuti uzive chakanaka.” Asi naizvozviwo hazvina maturo." 
Ecclesiastes2:2 Ndakati, “Kuseka upenzi, uyezve mafaro anobatsireiko?”" 
Ecclesiastes2:3 Ndakaedza kuzvifadza newaini, uye kumbundikira upenzi, pfungwa dzangu dzichinditungamirira nouchenjeri. Ndaida kuona kuti chii chakafanira kuti vanhu vaite pasi pedenga mumazuva mashoma oupenyu hwavo." 
Ecclesiastes2:4 Ndakaita mabasa makuru; ndakazvivakira dzimba ndikazvirimira minda yemizambiringa. 
Ecclesiastes2:5 Ndakazvigadzirira mapindu, neminda yemiti uye ndikasimamo miti yemichero yendudzi dzose." 
Ecclesiastes2:6 Ndakavaka madhamu kuti ndidiridzire sango remiti yaikura. 
Ecclesiastes2:7 Ndakatenga varandarume navarandakadzi, uye ndaiva navamwe varanda vakaberekerwa mumba mangu. Ndaivawo nepfuma zhinji yemombe namakwai, kupfuura ani zvake akanditangira kuvapo paJerusarema." 
Ecclesiastes2:8 Ndakazviunganidzira sirivha negoridhe, uye nepfuma yamadzimambo uye neyamatunhu. Ndakatsvaka vaimbi, varume navakadzi, uye nezviridzwa, nezvinofadza vanakomana vavanhu, navarongowo vazhinji." 
Ecclesiastes2:9 Saka ndakava mukuru kwazvo kupfuura ani zvake akanditangira paJerusarema. Mune izvi zvose uchenjeri hwangu hwakaramba huneni. 
Ecclesiastes2:10 Handina kuzvirambidza zvinhu zvaidiwa nameso angu, handina kurambidza mwoyo wangu mufaro. Mwoyo wangu wakafadzwa nebasa rangu rose, uye uyu ndiwo wakava mubayiro wokushanda kwangu kwose." 
Ecclesiastes2:11 Asi pandakaongorora mabasa ose akanga aitwa namaoko angu uye zvandakatambudzikira kuti ndiwane, zvose zvakanga zvisina maturo, kwaingova kudzingana nemhepo; hapana chaibatsira pasi pezuva." 
Ecclesiastes2:12 Naizvozvo ndakapindura pfungwa dzangu kuti ndicherechedze uchenjeri, noupengowo uye noupenzi. Chii chimwe chingaitwa nomunhu anotevera mumwe paumambo kunze kwezvakatoitwa kare?" 
Ecclesiastes2:13 Ndakaona kuti uchenjeri huri nani pano upenzi, sezvo chiedza chiri nani pane rima." 
Ecclesiastes2:14 Meso omunhu akachenjera ari mumusoro make, uku benzi richifamba murima; asi ndakasvika pakuziva kuti vose vanowirwa nedambudziko rimwe chete." 
Ecclesiastes2:15 Ipapo ndakafunga mumwoyo mangu ndikati, “Magumo ebenzi achandiwanawo neni. Chii zvino chandinowana pakuva munhu akachenjera?” Ndakati mumwoyo mangu, “Izviwo hazvina maturo.”" 
Ecclesiastes2:16 Nokuti munhu akachenjera akafanana nebenzi pakusarangarirwa; mumazuva anouya vose vachazokanganwikwa. Kufanana nebenzi, akachenjera anofanira kufawo!" 
Ecclesiastes2:17 Saka ndakavenga upenyu, nokuti basa rinoitwa pasi pezuva rakandirwadza kwazvo. Zvose hazvo hazvina maturo, kudzingana nemhepo." 
Ecclesiastes2:18 Ndakavenga zvinhu zvose zvandakashingairira pasi pezuva, nokuti ndinofanira kuzvisiyira anonditevera." 
Ecclesiastes2:19 Uye ndiani angaziva kana achizova akachenjera kana benzi? Kunyange zvakadaro achava nesimba pamusoro pebasa rose randakatamburira nesimba nounyanzvi hwangu pasi pezuva. Izviwo hazvina maturo. 
Ecclesiastes2:20 Saka mwoyo wangu wakatanga kushungurudzika pamusoro pokutambudzika nokushanda kwangu pasi pezuva. 
Ecclesiastes2:21 Nokuti munhu angaite basa rake nouchenjeri, noruzivo uye nounyanzvi, zvino ipapo ozofanira kusiya zvose zvaanazvo kuno mumwe asina kuzvishandira. Naizvozviwo hazvina maturo uye chinhu chakaipa kwazvo." 
Ecclesiastes2:22 Munhu anowanei pakushanda kwose nokushingaira kwomwoyo nokuda kwokushanda kwake pasi pezuva? 
Ecclesiastes2:23 Mazuva ake ose basa rake kurwadziwa nokusuwa; kunyange nousiku pfungwa dzake hadzizorori. Naizvozviwo hazvina maturo. 
Ecclesiastes2:24 Munhu haana chaangaita chinopfuura kudya nokunwa kuti awane kugutswa pakushanda kwake. Naizvozviwo, ndinoona kuti zvinobva muruoko rwaMwari," 
Ecclesiastes2:25 nokuti kana pasina iye, ndiani angadye kana kuwana mufaro?" 
Ecclesiastes2:26 Kuno munhu anomufadza, Mwari anopa uchenjeri, nezivo nomufaro asi kuno mutadzi, anopa basa rokuunganidza nokuchengetera upfumi kuti agozvipa uyo anofadza Mwari. Naizvozviwo hazvina maturo, kudzingana nemhepo." 
Ecclesiastes3:1 Chinhu chimwe nechimwe chine nguva yacho, uye basa rimwe nerimwe rine nguva yaro pasi pedenga:" 
Ecclesiastes3:2 nguva yokuberekwa nenguva yokufa, nguva yokusima nenguva yokudzura;" 
Ecclesiastes3:3 nguva yokuuraya nenguva yokuporesa, nguva yokuputsa nenguva yokuvaka;" 
Ecclesiastes3:4 nguva yokuchema nenguva yokuseka, nguva yokuungudza nenguva yokudzana;" 
Ecclesiastes3:5 nguva yokurasa mabwe nenguva yokuaunganidza pamwe chete, nguva yokumbundikira nenguva yokurega;" 
Ecclesiastes3:6 nguva yokutsvaka nenguva yokurega zvirasike, nguva yokuchengeta nenguva yokurasa;" 
Ecclesiastes3:7 nguva yokubvarura nenguva yokusona, nguva yokunyarara nenguva yokutaura;" 
Ecclesiastes3:8 nguva yokuda nenguva yokuvenga, nguva yehondo nenguva yorugare." 
Ecclesiastes3:9 Ko, mushandi anowanei kubva mukushanda kwake kwose?" 
Ecclesiastes3:10 Ndakaona mutoro wakapiwa vanhu naMwari. 
Ecclesiastes3:11 Akaita chinhu chimwe nechimwe chakanaka nenguva yacho. Akaisawo zvisingaperi mumwoyo yavanhu; kunyange zvakadaro havangagoni kunzwisisa zvakaitwa naMwari kubva pakutanga kusvika pakupedzisira. 
Ecclesiastes3:12 Ndinoziva kuti hakuna chinhu chakanakira munhu kupfuura kuti afare uye kuti aite zvakanaka achiri mupenyu. 
Ecclesiastes3:13 Kuti munhu wose adye uye anwe uye azviwanire kugutsikana kubva pakushanda kwake kwose, ichi ndicho chipo chaMwari." 
Ecclesiastes3:14 Ndinoziva kuti zvose zvinoitwa naMwari zvichagara nokusingaperi; hapana chingawedzerwa pazviri uye hapana chingabviswa pazviri. Mwari anozviita kuti vanhu vamukudze. 
Ecclesiastes3:15 Chipi nechipi chiripo zvino, chakagara chiripo kare, uye zvichazovapo zvakatovapo kare; uye Mwari anotsvakazve zvakapfuura." 
Ecclesiastes3:16 Uyezve ndakaona chimwe chinhu pasi pezuva: Panzvimbo yokururamisira, zvakaipa zvakanga zviripo, panzvimbo yokururama, zvakaipa zvakanga zviripo." 
Ecclesiastes3:17 Ndakafunga mumwoyo mangu ndikati, “Mwari achatonga vose vakarurama nevakaipa, nokuti pachava nenguva yebasa rimwe nerimwe.”" 
Ecclesiastes3:18 Ndakatizve, “Kana vari vanhu, Mwari anovaedza kuti vaone kuti vakangofanana nemhuka." 
Ecclesiastes3:19 Zvinoitika kumunhu zvakafanana nezvinoitika kumhuka; zvose zvinoitirwa zvimwe chetezvo: sokufa kunoita chimwe, chimwe chinofawo. Zvose zvinofema mweya mumwe; munhu hapana paanopfuura mhuka. Zvose hazvina maturo." 
Ecclesiastes3:20 Zvose zvinoenda kunzvimbo imwe chete; zvose zvinobva kuvhu, uye kuvhu zvose zvinodzokera." 
Ecclesiastes3:21 Ndiani angaziva kana mweya womunhu uchikwira kuenda kumusoro uye kana mweya wemhuka uchidzika pasi?” 
Ecclesiastes3:22 Saka ndakaona kuti hapana chingapfuure ichi, kuti munhu afadzwe nebasa rake, nokuti uyu ndiwo mugove wake. Nokuti ndiani achazomudzosazve kuti aone zvichazoitika shure kwake?" 
Ecclesiastes4:1 Ndakatarirazve ndikaona udzvinyiriri hwose hwaiitika pasi pezuva: Ndakaona misodzi yavanodzvinyirirwa, uye havana munyaradzi; simba raiva kudivi ravadzvinyiriri vavo, uye havana munyaradzi." 
Ecclesiastes4:2 Ndakati vakafa, vakanguri vafa kare, vano mufaro kupfuura vapenyu, vachiri kurarama." 
Ecclesiastes4:3 Asi ari nani kupfuura vose ndiye uyo asati atombovapo, uyo asati amboona zvakaipa zvinoitwa pasi pezuva." 
Ecclesiastes4:4 Uye ndakaona kuti kushanda kwose nokuwana kwose kwomunhu kunobva pakuchiva muvakidzani wake. Izviwo hazvina maturo, kudzinganisana nemhepo." 
Ecclesiastes4:5 Benzi rinopeta maoko aro, rozviparadza." 
Ecclesiastes4:6 Tsama imwe yorugare inopfuura tsama mbiri dzokutambudzika nokudzingana nemhepo. 
Ecclesiastes4:7 Zvino ndakaona chinhu chisina maturo pasi pezuva. 
Ecclesiastes4:8 Kwaiva nomunhu aigara ari oga; akanga asina mwanakomana, kana munun'una. Kushanda kwake kwakanga kusina magumo, kunyange zvakadaro meso ake haana kugutswa nepfuma yake. Akabvunza akati, “Ndinotambudzikira aniko, uye sei ndichizvinyima mafaro?” Naizvozviwo hazvina maturo, basa rokutambura!" 
Ecclesiastes4:9 Vaviri vari nani pano mumwe chete, nokuti vano mugove wakanaka pakushanda kwavo:" 
Ecclesiastes4:10 Kana mumwe akawira pasi, shamwari yake inogona kumubatsira kuti amire zvakare. Asi ane nhamo munhu anowira pasi, asina anomusimudza!" 
Ecclesiastes4:11 Uyezve kana vaviri vachivata pamwe chete, vachadziyirwa. Asi mumwe chete angadziyirwa sei?" 
Ecclesiastes4:12 Munhu mumwe chete angakurirwa simba, asi vaviri vanozvidzivirira. Rwodzi rwakakoswa mutatu harungakurumidzi kudamburwa." 
Ecclesiastes4:13 Jaya murombo asi rakachenjera riri nani kupfuura mambo mutana nebenzi, asisazivi kuteerera kana achipiwa yambiro." 
Ecclesiastes4:14 Jaya ringava rakabva mutorongo rikazova mambo, kana angava akaberekwa ari muurombo, muushe hwokwake." 
Ecclesiastes4:15 Ndakaona kuti vose vapenyu vakafamba pasi pezuva vakatevera jaya, rakazotevera panzvimbo yamambo." 
Ecclesiastes4:16 Vakanga vasingaverengeki vanhu vose vaaitonga. Asi vakazouya pashure havana kufadzwa neakange achitonga panzvimbo yamambo. Naizvozviwo hazvina maturo, kudzinganisana nemhepo." 
Ecclesiastes5:1 Chenjerera rutsoka rwako kana uchienda kuimba yaMwari. Enda pedyo undonzwa pano kuti upe chibayiro chamapenzi, vasingazivi kuti vanoita zvakaipa." 
Ecclesiastes5:2 Usakurumidza nomuromo wako, usakurumidza mumwoyo mako kutaura chipi zvacho chinhu pamberi paMwari. Mwari ari kudenga uye iwe uri pasi, saka mashoko ako ngaave mashoma." 
Ecclesiastes5:3 Sokuuya kwechiroto kana pane matambudziko akawanda ndizvowo zvinoita kutaura kwebenzi kana pane mashoko mazhinji. 
Ecclesiastes5:4 Kana waita mhiko kuna Mwari, usanonoka kuizadzisa. Iye haafariri mapenzi; zadzisa mhiko yako." 
Ecclesiastes5:5 Zviri nani kurega kupika pano kuita mhiko wozorega kuizadzisa. 
Ecclesiastes5:6 Usaregera muromo wako uchikutungamirira mukutadza. Uye usapikisa mutumwa wetemberi uchiti, “Ndakakanganisa pakupika.” Mwari achatsamwireiko pamusoro pezvaunotaura, uye agoparadza basa ramaoko ako?" 
Ecclesiastes5:7 Kurota kuzhinji namashoko mazhinji hazvina maturo. Naizvozvo mira utye Mwari. 
Ecclesiastes5:8 Kana ukaona murombo achidzvinyirirwa mudunhu uye achinyimwa kururamisirwa nekodzero, usashamiswa nezvinhu zvakadai; nokuti mumwe mukuru anotarirwa nomumwe ari pamusoro pake, uye pamusoro pavo vose pane vamwe vakavakurirawo." 
Ecclesiastes5:9 Zvinowanikwa kubva panyika zvinotorwa navose; iye mambo ane zvaanowana kubva kuminda. 
Ecclesiastes5:10 	Uyo zvake anoda mari haazombowani mari yakakwana; ani zvake anoda pfuma haazombogutswi nezvaanowana. Naizvozviwo hazvina maturo. 
Ecclesiastes5:11 	Nokuwanda kunoita pfuma, ndiko kuwanda kunoitawo vanoidya. Uye zvinobatsireiko kumuridzi wayo kunze kwokungogutsa meso ake nayo?" 
Ecclesiastes5:12 Hope dzomushandi dzakanaka, hazvinei kuti adya zvishoma kana zvizhinji, asi kuwanda kwezvinhu zvomupfumi hakumuwanisi hope." 
Ecclesiastes5:13 Ndakaona chinhu chakaipisisa pasi pezuva: pfuma inounganidzwa nomwene wayo, ichimuonesa nhamo," 
Ecclesiastes5:14 kana pfuma inorasika nokuda kwechinhu chakaipa chinomuwira, kuti kana abereka mwana mukomana anoshaya chaanomusiyira." 
Ecclesiastes5:15 Munhu sezvaanobuda mudumbu ramai vake, uye sokuuya kwake, saizvozvowo anoenda. Haana chaanotakura chinobva pabasa rake, chaangaenda nacho muruoko rwake." 
Ecclesiastes5:16 Ichi zvakare chinhu chakaipa kwazvo: Sokuuya kunoita munhu saizvozvowo anoenda, uye chii chaangawana, iye achishandira mhepo?" 
Ecclesiastes5:17 Pamazuva ake ose anodyira murima, nokudzungaira kukuru, kutambudzika uye nehasha." 
Ecclesiastes5:18 Ipapo ndakaziva kuti zvakanaka uye zvakafanira kuti munhu adye uye anwe, uye kuti azviwanire kugutsikana mukushanda kwake kwaakabata pasi pezuva pamazuva ake mashoma oupenyu aakapiwa naMwari, nokuti uyu ndiwo mugove wake." 
Ecclesiastes5:19 Pamusoro pezvo, Mwari paanopa munhu upi zvake mari nezvinhu, uye achiita kuti akwanise kuti afadzwe nazvo kuti agamuchire mugove wake uye kuti afadzwe nebasa rake, ichi chipo chinobva kuna Mwari." 
Ecclesiastes5:20 Haawanzofunga pamusoro poupenyu hwake, nokuti Mwari anopindura zvinofadza mwoyo wake." 
Ecclesiastes6:1 Ndakaona chimwe chinhu chakaipa pasi pezuva, uye chinoremedza vanhu zvikuru:" 
Ecclesiastes6:2 Mwari anopa munhu mari nezvinhu zvakawanda uye nokukudzwa, zvokuti haana chaangashayiwa pazvinhu zvinodiwa nomwoyo wake, asi Mwari haazomutenderi kuti afadzwe nazvo, uye mutorwa ndiye anozofadzwa nazvo panzvimbo yake. Izvi hazvina maturo, chinhu chakaipa chinorwadza." 
Ecclesiastes6:3 Munhu angava navana zana agorarama makore akawanda, asi hazvinei kuti ararama nguva yakareba sei, kana akasafara nezvaanowana uyezve akasavigwa zvakanaka, ndinoti mwana aberekwa ari gavamwedzi ari nani pana iye." 
Ecclesiastes6:4 Anouya asina zvaanoreva anoendazve murima, uye murima zita rake rinofukidzirwa." 
Ecclesiastes6:5 Kunyange asina kumboona zuva kana kuziva chinhu, ane zororo rinopfuura munhu iyeyu," 
Ecclesiastes6:6 kunyange akararama makore anokwana zviuru zviviri, asi akatadza kufadzwa nezvaanowana. Ko, vose havaendi kunzvimbo imwe chete here?" 
Ecclesiastes6:7 Kushingaira kwose kwomunhu kunoitirwa muromo wake, kunyange zvakadaro kuda kwake zvokudya hakugutswi." 
Ecclesiastes6:8 Ko, akachenjera anokurira benzi pachii? Ko, murombo anowanei nokuziva kuzvibata pamberi pavamwe?" 
Ecclesiastes6:9 Zviri nani zvinoonekwa nameso pane kutsvaka-tsvaka kwomwoyo. Izviwo hazvina maturo, kudzinganisana nemhepo." 
Ecclesiastes6:10 Chinhu chipi nechipi chiripo chakapiwa zita kare, uye munhu zvaari zvakazivikanwa kare; hakuna munhu anorwisana nomunhu anomupfuura pasimba." 
Ecclesiastes6:11 Kuwanda kwamashoko ndikowo kuwanda kwezvisina maturo, uye zvingabatsira aniko zvakadai?" 
Ecclesiastes6:12 Zvino ndiani angaziva zvakanakira munhu muupenyu, pamazuva mashoma uye asina maturo anopfuura somumvuri? Nokuti ndiani angaudza munhu zvinozomutevera mushure mokunge iye aenda?" 
Ecclesiastes7:1 Zita rakanaka rinopfuura mafuta anonhuwira zvakanaka kwazvo, uye zuva rokufa rinopfuura zuva rokuzvarwa." 
Ecclesiastes7:2 Zviri nani kuenda kuimba yokuchema pano kuenda kuimba yamabiko, nokuti rufu ndiwo mugumo womunhu wose; vapenyu ngavazviise izvi pamwoyo." 
Ecclesiastes7:3 Kusuwa kunopfuura kuseka, nokuti chiso chinopunyaira chakanakira mwoyo." 
Ecclesiastes7:4 Mwoyo womuchenjeri uri mumba yokuchema, asi mwoyo yamapenzi iri kuimba yamafaro." 
Ecclesiastes7:5 Zviri nani kuteerera kutsiura kwomunhu akachenjera, pano kuteerera rwiyo rwamapenzi." 
Ecclesiastes7:6 Sokuputika kweminzwa pasi pehari, ndizvo zvakaita kuseka kwamapenzi. Naizvozviwo hazvina maturo." 
Ecclesiastes7:7 Udzvinyiriri hunoshandura muchenjeri achiva benzi, uye fufuro inosvibisa mwoyo." 
Ecclesiastes7:8 Magumo echinhu anopfuura mavambo acho, uye mwoyo murefu unopfuura kuzvikudza." 
Ecclesiastes7:9 Usakurumidza kutsamwa pamweya wako nokuti kutsamwa kunogara muchipfuva chamapenzi. 
Ecclesiastes7:10 Usati, “Sei mazuva akare ari nani kupfuura azvino?” Nokuti hazvina kuchenjera kubvunza mibvunzo yakadaro." 
Ecclesiastes7:11 Uchenjeri chinhu chakanaka senhaka, uye hunobatsira avo vanoona zuva." 
Ecclesiastes7:12 Uchenjeri hunodzivirira sokudzivirira kunoita mari, asi kunakisa kworuzivo ndokuku: kuti uchenjeri hunochengetedza upenyu hwomunhu anahwo." 
Ecclesiastes7:13 Cherechedza zvakaitwa naMwari: Ndiani angatwasanudza zvaakagonyanisa? 
Ecclesiastes7:14 Kana zvinhu zvakanaka, fara; asi kana nguva dzakaipa, rangarira kuti: Mwari ndiye akaita izvozvo zvose zviri zviviri. Naizvozvo, munhu haagoni kuziva chinhu pamusoro peramangwana rake." 
Ecclesiastes7:15 Muupenyu hwangu husina maturo ndakaona zvose izvi: akarurama achiparara mukururama kwake, nowakaipa achirarama nguva refu mukuipa kwake." 
Ecclesiastes7:16 Usava munhu akanyanyisa kururama, kana munhu akanyanyisa kuchenjera, uchazviparadzireiko?" 
Ecclesiastes7:17 Usava munhu akanyanyisa kuipa, uye usava benzi. Ungada kufa nguva yako isati yakwana?" 
Ecclesiastes7:18 	Zvakanaka kubatisisa chimwe chinhu, uye usingaregedzi chimwe chacho chichienda. Munhu anotya Mwari acharega kuita zvinopfurikidza." 
Ecclesiastes7:19 Uchenjeri hunoita kuti mumwe munhu akachenjera ave nesimba guru kupfuura vatariri gumi vari muguta. 
Ecclesiastes7:20 Hapana munhu akarurama panyika, anoita zvakanaka uye asingatadzi." 
Ecclesiastes7:21 Usava nehanya namashoko ose anotaurwa navanhu, zvichida ungangonzwa muranda wako achikutuka," 
Ecclesiastes7:22 nokuti unoziva mumwoyo mako kuti nguva zhinji iwe pachako wakambotuka vamwe. 
Ecclesiastes7:23 Zvose izvi ndakazviedza nouchenjeri ndikati, “Ndakazvipira kuva munhu akachenjera,” asi izvi zvaiva kure neni." 
Ecclesiastes7:24 Chii zvacho chingava uchenjeri, chiri kure kwazvo uye chakadzama, ndiani angachiwana?" 
Ecclesiastes7:25 	Saka ndakashandura pfungwa dzangu ndikatanga kutsvaka kunzwisisa, kuti ndiongorore uye nditsvakisise uchenjeri nourongwa hwezvinhu, uye kuti ndinzwisise upenzi hwokuipa nomupengo hwoupenzi." 
Ecclesiastes7:26 Ndakawana chinhu chinovava kupfuura rufu, mukadzi anova musungo, mwoyo wake uri hunza uye maoko ake ari ngetani. Munhu anofadza Mwari achapunyuka kwaari, asi mutadzi achabatwa naye." 
Ecclesiastes7:27 Muparidzi anoti, “Tarira, izvi ndizvo zvandakawana: “Ndichisanganisa chimwe nechimwe kuti ndiwane marongerwo ezvinhu," 
Ecclesiastes7:28 pandakanga ndichiri kutsvaka asi ndisina chandinowana, ndakawana murume mumwe chete akarurama pakati pechiuru, asi handina kuwana mukadzi mumwe chete akarurama pakati pavo vose." 
Ecclesiastes7:29 Chinhu ichi chete ndicho chandakawana chokuti: Mwari akaita vanhu vakarurama, asi vanhu vakaenda kundotsvaka mano mazhinji.”" 
Ecclesiastes8:1 Ndiani akafanana nomunhu akachenjera? Ndiani anoziva tsananguro yezvinhu? Uchenjeri hunobwinyisa chiso chomunhu uye hunoshandura kuomarara kwechiso. 
Ecclesiastes8:2 Ndinoti, teerera murayiro wamambo, nokuti wakaita mhiko pamberi paMwari." 
Ecclesiastes8:3 Usakurumidza kubva pamberi pamambo. Usamiririra zvinhu zvakaipa, nokuti iye achaita chinhu chipi zvacho chinomufadza." 
Ecclesiastes8:4 Sezvo shoko ramambo riri pamusoro pamashoko ose, ndiani angati kwaari, “Munoiteiko?”" 
Ecclesiastes8:5 Ani naani zvake achateerera murayiro wake haangawani chinomukuvadza, uye mwoyo wakachenjera uchaziva nguva yakafanira namaitiro akafanira." 
Ecclesiastes8:6 Nokuti kune nguva yakafanira namaitiro akafanira pazvinhu zvose, kunyange nhamo yomunhu ichimuremera zvikuru." 
Ecclesiastes8:7 Sezvo pasina munhu anoziva ramangwana, ndiani angamuzivisa zvichauya?" 
Ecclesiastes8:8 Hakuna munhu ane simba pamusoro pemhepo kuti aitonge; saizvozvowo hakuna munhu ane simba pamusoro pezuva rokufa kwake. Sezvo kusinawo munhu anoregedzeswa kurwa panguva yehondo, saizvozvowo zvakaipa hazvingaregedzi uyo anozviita." 
Ecclesiastes8:9 Zvose izvi ndakazviona, pandakaisa pfungwa dzangu pane zvose zvinoitwa pasi pezuva. Pane nguva yokuti mumwe munhu anenge ane simba pamusoro pavamwe, asi achizvikuvadza pachake." 
Ecclesiastes8:10 Zvino ndakaonazve vakaipa vachivigwa mumakuva, vose vaisiuya nokuenda kubva kunzvimbo tsvene uye vachirumbidzwa muguta mavaiitira izvi. Naizvozviwo hazvina maturo." 
Ecclesiastes8:11 Kana mhosva ikarega kukurumidza kutongwa, mwoyo yavanhu ichazara nezvirongwa zvokuita zvakaipa." 
Ecclesiastes8:12 Kunyange munhu akaipa akapara mhosva dzinosvika zana agorarama nguva refu, ndinoziva kuti zvichava nani kuna vanhu vanotya Mwari, avo vanokudza Mwari." 
Ecclesiastes8:13 Asi nokuti vakaipa havatyi Mwari, hazvizovanakira, uye mazuva avo haangarebi somumvuri." 
Ecclesiastes8:14 Pane chimwezve chinhu chisina maturo chinoitika panyika: Vanhu vakarurama vanoitirwa zvakafanira kuitirwa vakaipa, uye vanhu vakaipa vanowana zvakafanira kuwanikwa navakarurama. Naizvozviwo ndinoti hazvina maturo." 
Ecclesiastes8:15 Saka ndinokurudzira vanhu kuti vafadzwe noupenyu, nokuti hapana chinhu chiri nani kumunhu pasi pezuva kupfuura kudya nokunwa nokufara. Ipapo mufaro uchamutevera mubasa rake mazuva ose oupenyu hwaakapiwa naMwari pasi pezuva." 
Ecclesiastes8:16 Pandakaisa pfungwa dzangu kuti ndizive uchenjeri nokuongorora mabasa omunhu panyika, maziso ake asingawani hope usiku namasikati," 
Ecclesiastes8:17 ipapo ndakaona zvose zvakaitwa naMwari. Hapana munhu angazvinzwisisa zvinoitika pasi pezuva. Hazvinei kuti munhu anoedza sei kuzvitsvaka, munhu haangagoni kuziva zvazvinoreva. Kunyange munhu akachenjera akati anozviziva haangakwanisi kunyatsozvinzwisisa." 
Ecclesiastes9:1 Nokudaro ndakafunga pamusoro pezvose izvi uye ndikapedzisira nokuti vakarurama navakachenjera, nezvavanoita zviri mumaoko aMwari, asi hakuna munhu anoziva kuti rudo here kana ruvengo zvakamumirira." 
Ecclesiastes9:2 Vose vane mugumo wakafanana, akarurama neakaipa, akanaka nomutadzi, akachena neakasviba, avo vanobayira zvibayiro neavo vasingabayiri. Sezvazvakaita nomunhu akanaka, ndizvozvowo nomutadzi; sezvazvakaita neavo vanoita mhiko, ndizvozvowo neavo vanotya kuita mhiko." 
Ecclesiastes9:3 Ichi ndicho chinhu chakaipa pane zvose zvinoitika pasi pezuva: Vose vane mugumo mumwe chete. Pamusoro pezvo, mwoyo yavanhu izere nezvakaipa uye mumwoyo yavo mune upenzi panguva yokurarama kwavo, uye shure kwaizvozvo vanobatana navakafa." 
Ecclesiastes9:4 Ani naani ari pakati pavapenyu ane tariro; kunyange imbwa mhenyu iri nani kupfuura shumba yakafa! 
Ecclesiastes9:5 Nokuti vapenyu vanoziva kuti vachafa, asi vakafa havana chavanoziva; havachinazve mumwe mubayiro, uye nokurangarirwa kwavo kwakanganikwa." 
Ecclesiastes9:6 Rudo rwavo, ruvengo rwavo negodo zvakanguri zvapera kare; havachazovizve nechikamu, pane zvose zvinoitika pasi pezuva." 
Ecclesiastes9:7 Enda, undodya zvokudya zvako nomufaro, unwe waini nomwoyo wakafara, nokuti ndiye zvino Mwari paari kufadzwa namabasa ako." 
Ecclesiastes9:8 Nguva dzose upfeke nguo chena, uye ugare wakazodza musoro wako namafuta." 
Ecclesiastes9:9 Fadzwa noupenyu hwako nomukadzi wako waunoda, mazuva ose oupenyu huno husina maturo Mwari hwaakakupa pasi pezuva, mazuva ose asina maturo. Nokuti uyu ndiwo mugove wako muupenyu uye mukushanda kwako nesimba pasi pezuva." 
Ecclesiastes9:10 Zvose zvinowanikwa noruoko rwako kuti ruzviite, zviite nesimba rako rose, nokuti muguva, mauri kuenda, hamuna kushanda kana kuronga, kana ruzivo kana uchenjeri." 
Ecclesiastes9:11 Ndakaona chimwe chinhuzve pasi pezuva: Anomhanyisa haasi iye anokunda uye ane simba haasi iye anokunda pakurwa, uye akachenjera haasi iye ane zvokudya, uye vane njere havasi ivo vane pfuma, uye vakadzidza havasi ivo vanodiwa navanhu; asi vose vanowirwa nenguva nezvinoitika." 
Ecclesiastes9:12 Pamusoro pezvo hakuna munhu anoziva nguva yake painosvika: Sehove dzinobatwa murutava rwakaipa, kana shiri dzinobatwa murugombe, saizvozvowo vanhu vanobatwa nenguva dzakaipa dzinovawira vasingatarisire." 
Ecclesiastes9:13 Ndakaonazve pasi pezuva muenzaniso uyu wouchenjeri wakandifadza zvikuru: 
Ecclesiastes9:14 Kwakanga kune guta duku, raiva navanhu vashoma mariri. Mumwe mambo ane simba akarimukira, akarikomba, akarivakira masvingo makuru okurirwisa." 
Ecclesiastes9:15 Zvino muguta umu maigara mumwe murume akanga ari murombo asi akachenjera, uye akaponesa guta iri nouchenjeri hwake. Asi hakuna munhu akarangarira murombo uya." 
Ecclesiastes9:16 Saka ndakati, “Uchenjeri hunopfuura simba.” Asi uchenjeri hwomurombo hunoshorwa uye mashoko ake haangateererwi." 
Ecclesiastes9:17 Mashoko manyoro omuchenjeri anoteererwa kupfuura kudanidzira kwomunhu anobata ushe pakati pamapenzi. 
Ecclesiastes9:18 Uchenjeri hunopfuura zvombo zvehondo, asi mutadzi mumwe anoparadza zvakanaka zvizhinji." 
Ecclesiastes10:1 Nhunzi dzakafa dzinonhuwisa mafuta akanaka, saizvozvowo upenzi hushoma hunorema kukunda uchenjeri nokukudzwa." 
Ecclesiastes10:2 Mwoyo womunhu akachenjera unosimbira kurudyi, asi mwoyo webenzi unosimbira kuruboshwe." 
Ecclesiastes10:3 Kunyange richifamba pamugwagwa, benzi rinoshayiwa njere uye rinoratidza vanhu vose upenzi hwaro." 
Ecclesiastes10:4 Kana kutsamwa kwomubati kukakumukira, usabva panzvimbo yako; unyoro hunonyaradza mhosva huru." 
Ecclesiastes10:5 Kune chinhu chakaipa chandakaona pasi pezuva, kutadza kunobva kuvabati:" 
Ecclesiastes10:6 Mapenzi anoiswa munzvimbo zhinji dzapamusoro, ipapo vapfumi vachitora nzvimbo dzakaderera." 
Ecclesiastes10:7 	Ndakaona varanda vakatasva mabhiza, ipapo machinda achifamba pasi netsoka savaranda." 
Ecclesiastes10:8 Ani naani anochera gomba angangowira mariri; ani naani anopwanya naparusvingo angangorumwa nenyoka. 
Ecclesiastes10:9 	Ani naani anopwanya matombo angangokuvadzwa nawo; ani naani anotsemura matanda angangozviisa panjodzi nawo. 
Ecclesiastes10:10 	Kana demo rakagomara uye rikasarodzwa, panodiwa simba rakawanda, asi unyanzvi hunouyisa kubudirira." 
Ecclesiastes10:11 	Kana nyoka ikaruma isati yabviswa uturu, murapi haachabatsiri." 
Ecclesiastes10:12 Mashoko anobva mumuromo momunhu akachenjera ane unyoro, asi benzi rinomedzwa nomuromo waro." 
Ecclesiastes10:13 Kutanga kwamashoko ake upenzi; nokuguma kwokutaura kwake mupengo wakashata. 
Ecclesiastes10:14 	Uye benzi rinowanza mashoko. Hapana munhu anoziva zvichauya, ndiani angamuudza zvichaitika shure kwake?" 
Ecclesiastes10:15 	Basa rebenzi rinomunetesa; haazivi nzira inoenda kuguta. 
Ecclesiastes10:16 Une nhamo iwe nyika ina mambo ava muranda uye ina machinda anoita mabiko mangwanani. 
Ecclesiastes10:17 	Wakaropafadzwa iwe nyika ina mambo akaberekwa mukukudzwa uye ina machinda anodya panguva yakafanira, kuti vasimbiswe kwete kuti vadhakwe." 
Ecclesiastes10:18 	Kana munhu ari simbe, denga remba rinosakara; kana achigarira maoko, imba inobvinza." 
Ecclesiastes10:19 	Mabiko anoitirwa kuseka, uye waini inofadza upenyu, asi mari imhinduro kune zvose." 
Ecclesiastes10:20 Usatuka mambo kunyange mupfungwa dzako, kana kutuka mupfumi paimba yako yokuvata, nokuti shiri yedenga ingangotakura mashoko ako, uye china mapapiro chingangozivisa zvawataura." 
Ecclesiastes11:1 Kanda chingwa chako pamusoro pemvura zhinji, nokuti mushure mamazuva mazhinji uchachiwanazve." 
Ecclesiastes11:2 Govera vanomwe, kunyange navaserewo; nokuti hauzivi kuti idambudziko rakadii richauya panyika." 
Ecclesiastes11:3 Kana makore azara nemvura anonayisa mvura panyika. Hazvinei kuti muti wawira zasi kana kumusoro, panzvimbo paunowira, ndipo paucharara." 
Ecclesiastes11:4 Ani naani anotarira mhepo haangadyari; ani naani anotarira makore haangakohwi. 
Ecclesiastes11:5 Sezvo usingazivi nzira yemhepo, kana magadzirirwo omuviri mudumbu ramai, saizvozvowo haunganzwisisi basa raMwari, Muiti wezvose." 
Ecclesiastes11:6 Kusha mbeu dzako mangwanani, uye madekwana urege kugarira maoko ako, nokuti hauzivi kuti chichabudirira ndechipi, chingava ichi kana icho, kana kuti zvose zviri zviviri zvichafanana pakunaka." 
Ecclesiastes11:7 Chiedza chakanaka, uye zvinofadza meso kuona zuva." 
Ecclesiastes11:8 Kunyange zvazvo munhu akararama makore mazhinji, ngaafadzwe nawo ose. Asi ngaarangarire mazuva erima, nokuti achava mazhinji. Zvose zvichazouya hazvina maturo." 
Ecclesiastes11:9 Fara zvako jaya, pauduku hwako, uye mwoyo wako ngaukupe mufaro pamazuva ouduku hwako. Tevera nzira dzomwoyo wako, nezvose zvingaonekwe nameso ako, asi uzive kuti pazvinhu zvose izvi Mwari achakusvitsa pakutongwa." 
Ecclesiastes11:10 Saka zvino dzinga zvinonetsa pamwoyo wako ugobvisa zvinotambudza pamuviri wako, nokuti uduku nesimba hazvina maturo." 
Ecclesiastes12:1 Rangarira Musiki wako pamazuva ouduku hwako, mazuva okutambudzika asati auya, namakore asati aswedera pauchati, “Handioni zvinofadza maari,”" 
Ecclesiastes12:2 zuva nechiedza uye nomwedzi nenyeredzi zvisati zvadzima, uye makore asati adzoka mushure mokunaya kwemvura;" 
Ecclesiastes12:3 kana vatariri vemba vodedera, navarume vakasimba vokotama, kana vakuyi vorega nokuti vashoma, uye vaya vanotarira napamawindo voonera madzerere;" 
Ecclesiastes12:4 kana mikova yokunzira ichinge yapfigwa uye maungira okukuya oderera; kana vanhu vomutswa nokuimba kweshiri asi nziyo dzavo dzose dzisisanzwiki zvakanaka; 
Ecclesiastes12:5 kana vanhu votya nzvimbo dzakakwirira nenjodzi mumigwagwa; kana muamanda wotumbuka nemhashu yozvikwekweredza uye kuda kwose kwapera. Ipapo munhu anoenda kumusha wake usingaperi, uye vanochema vachafamba-famba munzira." 
Ecclesiastes12:6 Murangarirei, rwodzi rwesirivha rusati rwadambuka; uye mbiya yegoridhe isati yaputswa; chirongo chisati chapwanyika pachitubu, uye vhiri risati raputswa patsime," 
Ecclesiastes12:7 uye guruva risati radzokera kuvhu kwarakabva, nomweya usati wadzokera kuna Mwari akaupa." 
Ecclesiastes12:8 Muparidzi anoti, “Hazvina maturo! Hazvina maturo! Zvose hazvina maturo!”" 
Ecclesiastes12:9 Muparidzi akanga asina kuchenjera chete asi akadzidzisawo zivo kuvanhu. Akarangarira akaongorora uye akaronga zvirevo zvizhinji. 
Ecclesiastes12:10 Muparidzi akatsvaka kuti awane mashoko akanaka chete, uye zvaakanyora zvakarurama uye ndezvechokwadi." 
Ecclesiastes12:11 Mashoko avachenjeri akafanana nezvibayiso, mashoko avo akaunganidzwa akasimbiswa sembambo dzakarovererwa kwazvo, akapiwa noMufudzi mumwe chete." 
Ecclesiastes12:12 Yambirwa, mwanakomana wangu, kuti pasava nechinhu chipi zvacho chichawedzerwa pazviri. Zvokunyora mabhuku mazhinji hazvina magumo, uye kudzidza zvizhinji kunonetesa muviri." 
Ecclesiastes12:13 Zvino zvose zvanzwikwa; houno mugumo wenyaya yacho: Itya Mwari uchengete mirayiro yake, nokuti iri ndiro basa rose romunhu." 
Ecclesiastes12:14 Nokuti Mwari achatonga basa rimwe nerimwe kusanganisira nezvakavanzika zvose, zvakanaka kana zvakaipa." 
SongOfSongs1:1 Rwiyo Rukuru rwaSoromoni: 
SongOfSongs1:2 Ngaanditsvode hake nokutsvoda kwomuromo wake. Nokuti rudo rwako runofadza kupfuura waini. 
SongOfSongs1:3 Kunhuwirira kwamafuta enyu kunofadza; zita renyu rakafanana namafuta anonhuwirira adururwa. Hazvishamisi kuti mhandara dzinokudai! 
SongOfSongs1:4 Nditorei muende neni, ngatikurumidzei. Mambo ngaandipinze mudzimba dzake dzomukati. Tinokupembererai nokukufarirai, ticharumbidza rudo rwenyu kupfuura waini. Regai zvenyu mhandara dzikudei!" 
SongOfSongs1:5 Kusviba ndakasviba zvangu, vanasikana veJerusarema, asi ndakanaka hangu, ndakasviba samatende eKedhari, kana kuti samaketeni apamawindo eimba yaSoromoni." 
SongOfSongs1:6 Musanditarisisa nokuda kwoutema hwangu, nokuti ndakasvibiswa nezuva. Vanakomana vamai vangu vakanditsamwira vakandiita kuti ndichengete minda yemizambiringa; munda wangu chaiwo wemizambiringa ndakaushayira nguva." 
SongOfSongs1:7 Ndiudze, iwe mudiwa wangu, kwaunofudzira makwai ako nokwaunozorodzera makwai ako masikati. Ko, ndichaitirei somukadzi akafukidza chiso chake pedyo namakwai eshamwari dzako?" 
SongOfSongs1:8 Kana usingazivi, iwe mukadzi akanaka kukunda vamwe, chitevera makwara amakwai ugondofudzira mbudzana dzako pedyo namatende avafudzi." 
SongOfSongs1:9 Ndinokufananidza, iwe mudiwa wangu, nebhiza rakasungwa pane imwe yengoro dzaFaro." 
SongOfSongs1:10 Matama ako akashongedzwa zvakanaka nemhete, mutsipa wako nezvuma zvamatombo anokosha." 
SongOfSongs1:11 Tichakugadzirira mhete dzenzeve dzegoridhe nesirivha. 
SongOfSongs1:12 Mambo paakanga agere patafura yake, munhuwi wamafuta andainge ndazora wakapararira." 
SongOfSongs1:13 Mudiwa wangu, kwandiri akaita sakahomwe kemura kanogara pakati pamazamu angu." 
SongOfSongs1:14 Mudiwa wangu, kwandiri akaita sesumbu ramaruva machena anobva mubindu remizambiringa yeEni Gedhi." 
SongOfSongs1:15 Kunaka here kwawakaita uku, mudiwa wangu! Aa, wakazonaka! Meso ako injiva chaidzo!" 
SongOfSongs1:16 Wakanaka sei, mudiwa wangu! Aa, unofadza! Uye uvato hwedu hwakasvibira." 
SongOfSongs1:17 Nhungo dzeimba yedu ndedzomusidhari; mbariro dzacho ndedzomupaini. 
SongOfSongs2:1 Ndiri ruva reSharoni, ruva romumipata." 
SongOfSongs2:2 Seruva riri pakati peminzwa, ndizvo zvakaita mudiwa wangu pakati pemhandara." 
SongOfSongs2:3 Somuti womuapuro pakati pemiti yesango, ndizvo zvawakaita mudiwa wangu pakati pamajaya. Ndinofarira kugara mumumvuri wake, uye muchero wake unondinakira kuudya." 
SongOfSongs2:4 Akaenda neni kuimba yamabiko, uye mureza wake pamusoro pangu ndirwo rudo." 
SongOfSongs2:5 Ndisimbise namazambiringa akaomeswa, ndisimbise namaapuro; nokuti ndoziya norudo." 
SongOfSongs2:6 Ruoko rwake rworuboshwe rwuri pasi pomusoro wangu, uye ruoko rwake rworudyi rwakandimbundikira." 
SongOfSongs2:7 Imi vanasikana veJerusarema ndinokupikirai nemhara uye nenondo dzesango: Musazunguza kana kumutsa rudo kusvikira irwo rwada rwoga. 
SongOfSongs2:8 Inzwai! Inzwi romudiwa wangu! Tarirai! Hoyo ouya achiuruka nomumakomo, achikwakuka nomuzvikomo." 
SongOfSongs2:9 Mudiwa wangu akafanana nemhara kana netsvana yenondo. Tarirai! Hoyo amira seri kworusvingo rwedu, akatarira napamawindo achidongorera napamaburi apamawindo." 
SongOfSongs2:10 Mudiwa wangu akataura kwandiri akati, “Simuka, mudiwa wangu, iwe munakunaku wangu, uya tiende tose." 
SongOfSongs2:11 Tarira! Nguva yechando yapera; mvura yapera; uye haichanayi. 
SongOfSongs2:12 Maruva oonekwa panyika; nguva yokuimba yasvika, kurira kwenjiva kwonzwikwa munyika yedu." 
SongOfSongs2:13 Muonde wobereka michero yawo yokutanga; uye mizambiringa yotunga maruva ayo anonhuwira kwazvo. Simuka, uya, mudiwa wangu; munakunaku wangu, uya tiende tose.”" 
SongOfSongs2:14 Njiva yangu iri mumikaha yedombo, munzvimbo dzokuvanda mumativi egomo, ndiratidze chiso chako, ndinoda kunzwa inzwi rako; nokuti inzwi rako rinotapira, uye chiso chako chinoyevedza." 
SongOfSongs2:15 Tibatirei makava, ivo vana vemakava anoparadza minda yemizambiringa, iyo mizambiringa yedu yotunga maruva." 
SongOfSongs2:16 Mudiwa wangu ndowangu uye ndiri wake; anofamba-famba pakati pamaruva omubani. 
SongOfSongs2:17 Kusvikira zuva rabuda uye mimvuri yatiza, pinduka, mudiwa, ubva waita semhara kana tsvana pamusoro pezvikomo." 
SongOfSongs3:1 Usiku hwose ndiri pamubhedha wangu ndakatsvaka uyo anodiwa nomwoyo wangu; ndakamutsvaka asi handina kumuwana. 
SongOfSongs3:2 Ndichasimuka zvino ndinofamba-famba muguta, mumigwagwa yaro nomuzvivara zvaro; ndichatsvaka iye anodiwa nomwoyo wangu. Saka ndakamutsvaka asi handina kumuwana." 
SongOfSongs3:3 Varindi vakandiona pavaiva pabasa ravo rokufamba-famba vachichengetedza guta. “Ko, mamboona here iye anodiwa nomwoyo wangu?”" 
SongOfSongs3:4 Ndichingopfuudzana navo ndakabva ndamuwana, iye anodiwa nomwoyo wangu. Ndakamubata ndikasamuregedza kusvikira ndaenda naye kumba kwamai vangu, kuimba yaavo vakandibereka." 
SongOfSongs3:5 Vanasikana veJerusarema, ndinokurayirai nemhara kana nenondo dzesango kuti: usazunguza kana kumutsa rudo kusvikira irwo rwada rwoga." 
SongOfSongs3:6 Ndianiko uyo ari kuuya achibva nokurenje seshongwe youtsi ine munhuwi wemura, nezvimwe zvinonhuwira zvakagadzirwa nezvikuyiwa zvinonhuwira zvavashambadzi?" 
SongOfSongs3:7 Tarirai! Ndiyo ngoro yaSoromoni, yakachengetedzwa nemhare makumi matanhatu dzamachinda, apamusoro-soro omuIsraeri." 
SongOfSongs3:8 Mumwe nomumwe wavo ane munondo parutivi rwake, vakagadzirira kutarisana nezvinotyisa usiku." 
SongOfSongs3:9 Mambo Soromoni akazvigadzirira ngoro; akaigadzira nemiti yokuRebhanoni. 
SongOfSongs3:10 Mbiru dzacho akadzigadzira nesirivha, pokuzembera musana pakagadzirwa negoridhe. Pokugara pakashongedzwa nejira repepuru, mukati mayo makashongedzwa norudo navanasikana veJerusarema." 
SongOfSongs3:11 Budai imi vanasikana veZioni, muzoona Mambo Soromoni akapfeka korona, korona yaakapfekedzwa namai vake musi wesvitsa, zuva iro mwoyo wake wakafara." 
SongOfSongs4:1 Wakanaka sei, mudiwa wangu! A, wakazonaka! Meso ako uri mumumbure injiva chaidzo. Bvudzi rako rakaita sedanga rembudzi riri kuburuka kubva muGomo reGireadhi." 
SongOfSongs4:2 Meno ako akafanana neboka ramakwai achangobva mukuveurwa, ari kubva kundoshambidzwa. Rimwe nerimwe riine rarakafanana naro, pasina riri roga zvaro." 
SongOfSongs4:3 Miromo yako yakafanana nomucheka mutsvuku; muromo wako wakaisvonaka. Matama ako uri mumumbure wako akaita sezvikamu zviviri zvedamba. 
SongOfSongs4:4 Mutsipa wako wakafanana neshongwe yaDhavhidhi yakavakwa zvinoyevedza. Mairi makaturikwa nhoo dzine chiuru dzose dziri nhoo dzemhare. 
SongOfSongs4:5 Mazamu ako ari maviri akafanana netsvana mbiri dzemhara, mapatya emhara dzinofura pamwe chete pakati pamaruva." 
SongOfSongs4:6 Kusvikira zuva rabuda uye mimvuri yotiza, ndichaenda kugomo remura nokuchikomo chezvinonhuwira." 
SongOfSongs4:7 	Wakaisvonaka iwe, mudiwa wangu; mauri hamuna kana chinongo." 
SongOfSongs4:8 Ngatiendei tose kuRebhanoni, iwe mwenga wangu, ngatiendei tose kuRebhanoni. Buruka kubva pamusoro-soro peAmana, kubva pamusoro peSeniri, panhongonya peHerimoni, kubva kumapako eshumba nokumakomo anofamba-famba mbada." 
SongOfSongs4:9 Watora mwoyo wangu hanzvadzi yangu, mwenga wangu; ndatorwa mwoyo nokungondiringa kwawaita kamwe chete, uye nedombo rimwe rinokosha rechishongo chomutsipa wako." 
SongOfSongs4:10 Rudo rwako kwandiri runondifadza sei, hanzvadzi yangu, mwenga wangu! Rudo rwako runofadza sei kukunda waini. Uye kunhuwira kwamafuta ako okuzora vkunokunda zvose zvinonhuwira." 
SongOfSongs4:11 Miromo yako inodonhesa zvinotapira sezinga rouchi, mwenga wangu; uchi nomukaka zviri pasi porurimi rwako. Kunhuwira kwenguo dzako kwakafanana nokweRebhanoni." 
SongOfSongs4:12 Wakaita sebindu rakapfigwa, hanzvadzi yangu, mwenga wangu. Wakaita setsime rakakomberedzwa nechisipiti chakavakirirwa." 
SongOfSongs4:13 Miti yako ibindu ramatamba nemimwe michero yakaisvonaka, hena nenaridhi," 
SongOfSongs4:14 naridhi nesafuroni, karamusi, nesinamoni, nemiti yose inogadziriswa zvinonhuwira nemura negavakava, uye zvose zvinonhuwira zvakanakisisa." 
SongOfSongs4:15 Uri chitubu chomubindu, tsime remvura inoerera, inoerera ichibva kuRebhanoni." 
SongOfSongs4:16 Muka iwe mhepo yokumusoro, uye uya iwe mhepo yezasi! Vhuvhuta napabindu rangu kuti kunhuwirira kwezvirimo kuparadzirwe kwose kwose. Rega mudiwa wangu apinde mubindu rake, agoravira michero yaro yakaisvonaka, sepaanodira." 
SongOfSongs5:1 Ndauya zvangu mubindu rangu, hanzvadzi yangu, iwe mwenga wangu; ndaunganidza mura yangu pamwe chete nezvinonhuwira zvangu. Ndadya zinga rangu rouchi nouchi hwangu; ndanwa waini yangu nomukaka wangu. Idyai, imi shamwari, uye munwe; Inwai mugute, imi vadiwa." 
SongOfSongs5:2 Ndakavata asi mwoyo wangu wakanga wakasvinura. Inzwai! Mudiwa wangu ari kugogodza. Anoti, “Ndizarurire, hanzvadzi yangu, mudiwa wangu, njiva yangu, wangu asina chinongo. Musoro wangu wanyorova nedova, bvudzi rangu ranyoroveswa nounyoro hwousiku.”" 
SongOfSongs5:3 Ndabvisa nguo yangu, ndoipfekazve here? Ndashambidza tsoka dzangu, ndingagodzisvibisazve here?" 
SongOfSongs5:4 Mudiwa wangu akapinza ruoko rwake nepahwangwadza yomukova; mwoyo wangu wakatanga kumudokwairira. 
SongOfSongs5:5 Ndakasimuka kuti ndizarurire mudiwa wangu, maoko angu akadonha mura, mimwe yangu ichiyerera mura, pazvibato zvechizarira." 
SongOfSongs5:6 Ndakazarurira mudiwa wangu, asi mudiwa wangu akanga abva; akanga atoenda. Mwoyo wangu wakarwadziwa nokuenda kwake. Ndakamutsvaka asi handina kumuwana. Ndakamudana asi haana kupindura." 
SongOfSongs5:7 Varindi vakandiona pavaiva pabasa ravo rokufamba-famba vachichengetedza guta. Vakandirova, vakandikuvadza; vakanditorera jasi rangu, ivava varindi vamasvingo!" 
SongOfSongs5:8 Imi vanasikana veJerusarema, ndinokurayirai, kana mukaona mudiwa wangu, muchamuudzeiko? Mumuudze kuti ndinorwara norudo." 
SongOfSongs5:9 Mudiwa wako akanaka kukunda vamwe pakudii, iwe zvako wakanaka kukunda vamwe vakadzi? Mudiwa wako akanaka kukunda vamwe pakudii, zvaunotirayira kudaro?" 
SongOfSongs5:10 Mudiwa wangu akanaka uye mutsvuku, anokunda vane zviuru gumi." 
SongOfSongs5:11 Musoro wake igoridhe chairo; bvudzi rake rinoyevedza uye rakasviba segunguo. 
SongOfSongs5:12 Meso ake akafanana nenjiva dziri pahova dzemvura, dzakashambidzwa mumukaka, akarongwa nezvishongo." 
SongOfSongs5:13 Matama ake akaita semihomba yezvinonhuwira. inobereka zvinonhuwira. Miromo yake yakaita samaruva anodonha mura. 
SongOfSongs5:14 Maoko ake itsvimbo dzegoridhe dzakaiswa mabwe anokosha. Muviri wake wakaita senyanga dzenzou dzinobwinya dzakashongedzwa nesafiri. 
SongOfSongs5:15 Makumbo ake imbiru dzamabwe machena akamiswa pazvigadziko zvegoridhe rakanatswa. Chimiro chake chakaita seRebhanoni, chakanakisisa semisidhari yayo." 
SongOfSongs5:16 Muromo wake inhapitapi pachayo; zvirokwazvo akaisvonaka. Uyu ndiye mudiwa wangu, ndiye shamwari yangu, imi vanasikana veJerusarema." 
SongOfSongs6:1 Ko, mudiwa wako aendepiko, iwe zvako wakanaka kukunda vamwe vakadzi? Mudiwa wako aenda nokupiko, kuti tigomutsvaka pamwe chete newe?" 
SongOfSongs6:2 Mudiwa wangu adzika kubindu rake, kumihomba yezvinonhuwirira, kuti andomema mumapindu nokutanha maruva." 
SongOfSongs6:3 Ini ndiri womudiwa wangu uye mudiwa wangu ndowangu; anomema pakati pamaruva. 
SongOfSongs6:4 Wakanaka iwe mudiwa wangu, seTiriza, unoyevedza seJerusarema, unoremekedzeka samauto ane mireza." 
SongOfSongs6:5 Bvisa meso ako pandiri; anondikunda. Bvudzi rako rakaita sedanga rembudzi riri kuburuka muGireadhi. 
SongOfSongs6:6 Meno ako akafanana neboka ramakwai achangobva mukushambidzwa. Rimwe nerimwe rine rarakafanana naro, pasina riri roga zvaro." 
SongOfSongs6:7 Matama ako uri mumumbure wako akaita sezvikamu zviviri zvedamba. 
SongOfSongs6:8 Kungava navanamambokadzi makumi matanhatu, navarongo makumi masere nemhandara dzisingaverengeki;" 
SongOfSongs6:9 Asi njiva yangu, iye akakwana wangu, ndiwe mumwe oga, mwanasikana mumwe oga wamai vake, iye woga anodikanwa naiye akamubereka. Mhandara dzakamuona dzikamuti akaropafadzwa. Vanamambokadzi navarongo vakamurumbidza." 
SongOfSongs6:10 Ko, ndiani uyo anotaridzika samambakwedza, akanaka somwedzi, anopenya sezuva, akanaka senyeredzi dziri mumudungwe?" 
SongOfSongs6:11 Ndakadzika kusango remiti yemipfura kundoona zvitsva zvakamera mumupata, kundoona kana mizambiringa yainge yabukira, kana kuti mitamba yainge yava namaruva." 
SongOfSongs6:12 Ndisati ndambodii, mwoyo wangu wakandiisa pakati pengoro dzoumambo dzavanhu vangu." 
SongOfSongs6:13 Dzoka, dzoka iwe muShurami; dzoka, dzoka kuti timbokuona! Ko, munodirei kuona muShurami sezvamunoita mutambo weMahanaimi?" 
SongOfSongs7:1 Dzakanaka sei tsoka dzako dzakapfekedzwa shangu, iwe mwanasikana womuchinda! Makumbo ako akanakisisa akaita sezvishongo, basa ramaoko emhizha." 
SongOfSongs7:2 Guvhu rako rakatenderera somukombe unogara uine waini yakasanganiswa zvakanaka. Chiuno chako murwi wegorosi wakakomberedzwa namaruva. 
SongOfSongs7:3 Mazamu ako akaita setsvana mbiri, mapatya emhara." 
SongOfSongs7:4 Mutsipa wakaita seshongwe yakagadzirwa nenyanga dzenzou. Meso ako ndiwo madziva eHeshibhoni pasuo reBhati Rabhimi. Mhuno yako yakaita seshongwe yeRebhanoni yakatarisa kudivi reDhamasiko. 
SongOfSongs7:5 Musoro wako unokushongedza nekorona seGomo reKarimeri. Bvudzi rako rakaita sezvirukwa zvomumba mamambo; mwoyo wamambo wakabatwa nokugadzirwa kwebvudzi rako. 
SongOfSongs7:6 Wakanaka uye unofadza sei, iwe mudiwa nezvinofadza zvako!" 
SongOfSongs7:7 Chimiro chako chakaita somuti womuchindwi; uye mazamu ako samasumbu omuchero. 
SongOfSongs7:8 Ndakati, “Ndichakwira muchindwi uyu, ndigobata muchero wawo.” Mazamu ako ngaaite samasumbu omuzambiringa, munhuwi wokufema kwako uite samaapuro," 
SongOfSongs7:9 muromo wako ugoita sewaini yakanakisisa. Waini ngaiendeswe kumudiwa wangu chaiko, igoyerera zvinyoronyoro, napamiromo yake nameno ake." 
SongOfSongs7:10 Ini ndiri womudiwa wangu, uye iye anondishuva." 
SongOfSongs7:11 Uya, mudiwa wangu, ngatiendei kumunda, tigozopedza usiku hwose kumamisha." 
SongOfSongs7:12 Ngatimukirei kuminda yemizambiringa tindoona kana mizambiringa yakabukira, uye kana maruva awo azaruka, uye kana mitamba yatumbuka yava namaruva, ikoko ndiko kwandichakupa rudo rwangu." 
SongOfSongs7:13 Miti yemidiwadiwa inopa kunhuwira kwayo, uye pamusuo pedu pane zvinonaka zvose, zvose zvitsva nezvitsaru, zvandakachengetera iwe, mudiwa wangu." 
SongOfSongs8:1 Dai chete wakanga uri sehanzvadzi kwandiri, akanwa pamazamu amai vangu! Ipapo kana ndaikuwana panze, ndaikutsvoda uye hapana aizondishora." 
SongOfSongs8:2 Ndaizokutora ndouya newe kumba kwamai vangu, ivo vakandidzidzisa. Ndaikupa waini yakaiswa zvinonhuwira kuti unwe, nomukume wemitamba yangu." 
SongOfSongs8:3 Ruoko rwake rworuboshwe rwuri pasi pomusoro wangu, uye ruoko rwake rworudyi rwakandimbundikira." 
SongOfSongs8:4 Imi vanasikana veJerusarema ndinokurayirai: Musazunguza kana kumutsa rudo kusvikira irwo rwada rwoga. 
SongOfSongs8:5 Ndianiko uyo ari kuuya achibva kurenje akazendamira pamudiwa wake? Pasi pomuti womuapuro ndakakumutsa; ipapo mai vako vakakubereka, ipapo ivo vairwadziwa vakakubereka." 
SongOfSongs8:6 Ndiise pamwoyo pako sechisimbiso, sechisimbiso paruoko rwako; nokuti rudo rwakasimba sorufu godo rarwo, seguva harishanduki. Runopisa serimi romoto, somurazvo mukuru kwazvo." 
SongOfSongs8:7 Mvura zhinji haigoni kudzima rudo; nzizi hadzigoni kurukukura. Kunyange munhu akapa pfuma yose yemba yake kuti awane rudo, zvingazvidzwa chose." 
SongOfSongs8:8 Tine hanzvadzi yedu duku uye mazamu ake haasati akura. Tichaitireiko hanzvadzi yedu pazuva rokukumbirwa kwayo kuti iwanikwe? 
SongOfSongs8:9 Kana ari rusvingo, tichavaka shongwe dzesirivha paari. Kana ari musuo, tichamukomberedza namapuranga omusidhari." 
SongOfSongs8:10 Ndiri rusvingo, mazamu angu akaita seshongwe. Ndizvo zvandava pamberi pake, somunhu anouyisa kugutsikana." 
SongOfSongs8:11 Soromoni aiva nomunda wemizambiringa muBhaari Hamoni; akapa munda wake wemizambiringa kuvanhu vairima vachimuripira. Mumwe nomumwe wavo pachibereko chawo aiuya namashekeri chiurua esirivha. 
SongOfSongs8:12 Asi munda wangu wemizambiringa ndowangu kuti ndiupe; Chiuru chamashekeri esirivha ndechako, iwe Soromoni, asi mazana mavirib ndeevanochengeta michero yawo." 
SongOfSongs8:13 Iwe unogara mumapindu unoshandirwa neshamwari, rega ndinzwe inzwi rako!" 
SongOfSongs8:14 Handei mudiwa wangu, uite semhara kana setsvana pamusoro pamaakomo azere zvinonhuwira." 
Isaiah1:1 Chiratidzo chaIsaya mwanakomana waAmozi, chaakaona pamusoro peJudha neJerusarema pamazuva aUziya naJotamu, naAhazi naHezekia, madzimambo eJudha." 
Isaiah1:2 Inzwai imi matenga! Teerera iwe nyika! Nokuti Jehovha akataura achiti, “Ndakarera vana ndikavakudza, asi ivo vakandimukira." 
Isaiah1:3 Nzombe inoziva vatenzi vayo, nembongoro inoziva chidyiro chomwene wayo, asi Israeri haizivi, vanhu vangu havanzwisisi.”" 
Isaiah1:4 	Haiwa, rudzi runotadza, vanhu vakaremerwa nezvakaipa, vana vavaiti vezvakaipa, vana vanoita zvakaora! Vakasiya Jehovha; vakashora Mutsvene waIsraeri vakamufuratira." 
Isaiah1:5 Mucharambireiko muchingorohwa? Munorambireiko muchimukira Jehovha? Musoro wenyu wose wakuvadzwa, mwoyo wenyu wose warwadziwa." 
Isaiah1:6 	Kubvira pasi porutsoka rwako kusvikira panhongonya yomusoro wako hapana pakukutu, anongova maronda nokurwadziwa namavanga akazaruka, asina kusukwa kana kusungwa kana kuzorwa mafuta." 
Isaiah1:7 Nyika yenyu yaparadzwa, Maguta enyu apiswa nomoto; minda yenyu iri kutorwa navatorwa pamberi penyu chaipo, nyika yaparadzwa sapanoparadza vatorwa." 
Isaiah1:8 Mwanasikana weZioni asiyiwa sedumba mumunda wemizambiringa, seimba mumunda wamanwiwa, seguta rakakombwa." 
Isaiah1:9 	Dai Jehovha Wamasimba Ose asina kutisiyira vakapukunyuka, tingadai takafanana neSodhomu, tingadai takaita seGomora." 
Isaiah1:10 Inzwai shoko raJehovha, imi vabati veSodhomu; teererai kumurayiro waMwari wedu, imi vanhu veGomora!" 
Isaiah1:11 “Zvibayiro zvenyu zvizhinji, zvinyiko kwandiri?” ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha. “Zvibayiro zvinopiswa zvawandisa, zvamakondohwe namafuta ezvipfuwo zvakakodzwa; Handifadzwi neropa renzombe, ramakwayana nerembudzi." 
Isaiah1:12 Pamunouya kuzozviratidza pamberi pangu, ndianiko akambokukumbirai izvi kwamuri, naikoku kutsika-tsika pavazhe dzangu?" 
Isaiah1:13 Regai kuuya nezvipiriso zvisina maturo! Zvinonhuwira zvenyu zvinondinyangadza. Nguva dzoKugara kwoMwedzi, maSabata nenguva dzekokorodzano, handigoni kufarira ungano dzenyu dzakaipa." 
Isaiah1:14 Mitambo yenyu yoKugara kwoMwedzi nemitambo yenyu yakatsaurwa inovengwa nomweya wangu. Zvava mutoro kwandiri; ndaneta nokuzvitakura. 
Isaiah1:15 Pamunotambanudza maoko enyu muchinyengetera, ini ndichakuvanzirai chiso changu; kunyange mukawanza munyengetero, handisi kuzokunzwai. Maoko enyu azere neropa;" 
Isaiah1:16 shambai muzvinatse. Bvisai mabasa enyu akaipa pamberi pangu! Regai kuita zvakaipa," 
Isaiah1:17 	dzidzai kuita zvakarurama. Tsvakai kururamisira, kurudzirai vakamanikidzwa. Dzivirirai nherera, mukumbirire chirikadzi." 
Isaiah1:18 “Chiuyai zvino titaurirane,” ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha. “Kunyange zvivi zvenyu zviri zvitsvuku zvichachena sechando; kunyange zviri zvishava somuti mushava, zvichaita samakushe amakwai." 
Isaiah1:19 Kana muchida uye muchiteerera muchadya zvakanakisa zvenyika; 
Isaiah1:20 	asi kana muchiramba uye muchindimukira, muchaparadzwa nomunondo.” Nokuti muromo waJehovha wazvitaura." 
Isaiah1:21 Tarirai guta rakatendeka rava chifeve sei! Iro rakanga rizere nokururamisira; kururama kwaigara mariri, asi zvino mogara mhondi!" 
Isaiah1:22 Sirivha yako yava nengura, waini yako yakavhenganiswa nemvura." 
Isaiah1:23 Machinda ako vapanduki, ishamwari dzembavha; vose vanoda fufuro, uye vanomhanyira zvipo. Havana hanya nokudzivirira nherera; mhaka yechirikadzi haiuyiswi pamberi pavo." 
Isaiah1:24 Naizvozvo Ishe, Jehovha Wamasimba Ose, Anesimba waIsraeri, anotaura achiti, “Haiwa, ndichadurura hasha dzangu pamusoro pavadzivisi vangu, nokuzvitsivira vavengi vangu." 
Isaiah1:25 Ndichatambanudzira ruoko rwangu kwauri; ndichapedza chose ngura yako ndigobvisa kusachena kwako kwose. 
Isaiah1:26 	Ndichadzosera vatongi vako samazuva akare, namachinda ako samazuva okutanga. Shure kwaizvozvo uchanzi Guta Rokururama, Guta Rakatendeka.”" 
Isaiah1:27 Zioni richadzikinurwa nokururamiswa, navanotendeuka varo, nokururama." 
Isaiah1:28 	Asi vapanduki navatadzi vachaparadzwa vose, uye vose vanosiya Jehovha vachaparara." 
Isaiah1:29 “Nokuti muchanyadziswa nokuda kwemiti yomuouki yamunoeresa, yamunofadzwa nayo; muchanyadziswa nokuda kwamapindu amakasarudza." 
Isaiah1:30 Muchafanana nomuouki wasvava mashizha, sebindu risina mvura." 
Isaiah1:31 Murume ane simba achava serwodzi nebasa rake sesasaradzi; zvose zvichatsva pamwe chete, pasina achadzima moto.”" 
Isaiah2:1 Izvi ndizvo zvakaonekwa naIsaya mwanakomana waAmozi, pamusoro peJudha neJerusarema:" 
Isaiah2:2 Mumazuva okupedzisira, gomo retemberi yaJehovha richasimbiswa, richava guru pakati pamakomo; richakwiridzirwa pamusoro pezvikomo, uye ndudzi dzose dzichamhanyira kwariri." 
Isaiah2:3 Ndudzi zhinji dzichauya dzichiti, “Uyai ngatiendei kugomo raJehovha, kuimba yaMwari waJakobho Iye achatidzidzisa nzira dzake, kuitira kuti tigofamba mumakwara ake.” Nokuti murayiro uchabva paZioni, shoko raJehovha richabva kuJerusarema." 
Isaiah2:4 	Iye achatonga pakati pendudzi nokupedzera marudzi mazhinji gakava. Vachapfura minondo yavo vachiita mapadza, namapfumo avo vachiaita mapanga okuchekerera miti. Rudzi rumwe harungazosimudziri munondo kuno rumwe rudzi, kana kuzodzidzirazve kurwa." 
Isaiah2:5 Uyai, imi imba yaJakobho, ngatifambei muchiedza chaJehovha." 
Isaiah2:6 Nokuti makasiya vanhu venyu, ivo imba yaJakobho. Vakazara nezvinamato zvokuMabvazuva; vanoita zvokuvuka kufanana navaFiristia, vachibatana maoko navahedheni." 
Isaiah2:7 Nyika yavo izere nesirivha negoridhe; pfuma yavo haiperi. Nyika yavo izere namabhiza; ngoro dzavo hadziperi. 
Isaiah2:8 Nyika yavo izere nezvifananidzo; vanopfugamira mabasa amaoko avo, kuzvinhu zvakaitwa neminwe yavo." 
Isaiah2:9 	Naizvozvo munhu achaderedzwa uye marudzi avanhu achaninipiswa, musavakanganwira." 
Isaiah2:10 Pinda mumapako, uvande muguruva, ubve mukutyisa kwaJehovha nokubwinya kwoumambo hwake!" 
Isaiah2:11 	Meso omunhu anozvikudza achaninipiswa, uye kuzvikudza kwavanhu kuchaderedzwa; asi Jehovha oga ndiye achakudzwa pazuva iro." 
Isaiah2:12 Nokuti Jehovha Wamasimba Ose ane zuva raakachengetera avo vose vanozvikudza navanodada, navose vanokudzwa (uye vachaninipiswa)," 
Isaiah2:13 nemisidhari yose yeRebhanoni, yakareba neyakakwirira, nemiouki yose yeBhashani," 
Isaiah2:14 namakomo ose akakwirira, nezvikomo zvose zvakakwirira," 
Isaiah2:15 neshongwe dzose dzakakwirira, namasvingo ose akasimba," 
Isaiah2:16 nezvikepe zvose zveTashishi, nemidziyo yose yakanaka." 
Isaiah2:17 Kuzvikudza kwomunhu kuchaderedzwa, uye kuzvikudza kwavanhu kuchaninipiswa; Jehovha oga ndiye achakudzwa pazuva iro," 
Isaiah2:18 	uye zvifananidzo zvichapera zvachose. 
Isaiah2:19 Vanhu vachatizira kumapako amatombo, nokumwena yapasi nokuda kwaJehovha anotyisa, uye nokubwinya kwoumambo hwake, paanosimuka achizungunutsa nyika." 
Isaiah2:20 Pazuva iro vanhu vacharasira kumakonzo nokuzviremwaremwa, zvifananidzo zvavo zvesirivha nezvifananidzo zvegoridhe, zvavakaita kuti vazvinamate." 
Isaiah2:21 	Vachatizira kumapako amatombo nokumikaha yakarembera, nokuda kwokutya Jehovha, uye nokubwinya kwoumambo hwake, paanosimuka kuti azungunutse nyika." 
Isaiah2:22 Regai kuvimba nomunhu, anongova nokufema mumhino dzake. Anobatsireiko?" 
Isaiah3:1 Tarirai zvino, Ishe Jehovha Wamasimba Ose ava kuda kutora zvose rutsigiro nomudonzvo, kubva kuJerusarema neJudha; rutsigiro rwose rwezvokudya norutsigiro rwose rwemvura," 
Isaiah3:2 mhare nomurwi, mutongi nomuprofita, muvuki nomukuru," 
Isaiah3:3 mukuru wamakumi mashanu nomunhu anokudzwa, muchinda nomurume wemhizha, nomuvuki anoziva." 
Isaiah3:4 Ndichaita kuti majaya ave vabati vavo; vana vadiki ndivo vachavatonga. 
Isaiah3:5 	Vanhu vachadzvinyirirana, munhu nomunhu, muvakidzani nomuvakidzani. Vadiki vachamukira vakuru, nounozvidza achamukira anokudzwa." 
Isaiah3:6 Murume achabata mumwe wavanun'una vake paimba yababa vake achiti, “Ndiwe une nguo, chiva mutungamiri wedu; iva mutariri wedutu roungwandangwanda uhu!”" 
Isaiah3:7 	Asi pazuva iro achadanidzira achiti, “Handigoni kugadzirisa zvinhu. Handina chokudya kana chokufuka mumba mangu; musandiita mutungamiri wavanhu.”" 
Isaiah3:8 Jerusarema rozungunuka, Judha riri kuwa; mashoko avo nezviito zvavo zvinopesana naJehovha, vachizvidza kuvapo kwake kunobwinya." 
Isaiah3:9 	Zvinoonekwa pazviso zvavo zvinovapupurira; vanoburitsa chivi chavo pachena seSodhomu; havambochivanzi. Vane nhamo! Vanouyisa njodzi pamusoro pavo. 
Isaiah3:10 Udzai vakarurama kuti zvichavanakira, nokuti vachanakirwa nezvibereko zvamabasa avo." 
Isaiah3:11 	Vane nhamo vakaipa! Njodzi yava kuda kuvawira! Vacharipirwa zvakabatwa namaoko avo. 
Isaiah3:12 	Vadiki vanomanikidza vanhu vangu, vakadzi vanovatonga. Haiwa, vanhu vangu, vatungamiri venyu vanokutsausai; vanokubvisai munzira." 
Isaiah3:13 Jehovha anotora nzvimbo yake muimba yokutonga; anosimuka kuti atonge vanhu. 
Isaiah3:14 Jehovha anopinda mukutonga vakuru navatungamiri vavanhu vake achiti, “Ndimi makaparadza munda wangu womuzambiringa; zvakapambwa zvinobva kuvarombo zviri mudzimba dzenyu." 
Isaiah3:15 	Munoreveiko zvamunopwanya vanhu vangu, nokukuya zviso zvavarombo?” ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha Wamasimba Ose." 
Isaiah3:16 Jehovha anoti, “Vakadzi veZioni vanozvikudza, vanofamba vakamisa mitsipa yavo. Vachichonya nameso avo, nokufamba vachinzenzeta, vaine zvishongo zvinorira muzviziso zvamakumbo avo." 
Isaiah3:17 Naizvozvo Jehovha achauyisa maronda pamisoro yavakadzi veZioni; Jehovha achaitisa misoro yavo mhanza.” 
Isaiah3:18 Pazuva iro Jehovha achabvisa pazviziso zvamakumbo avo: mabhenguro, nezvishongo zvomusoro, nezvishongo zvomutsipa. zvinon'aima," 
Isaiah3:19 nemhete dzenzeve, nezvingetani zvomumaoko, namavhoiri" 
Isaiah3:20 nezvishongo zvebvudzi, nezvingetani zvomuzviziso zvamakumbo, nemasikavha, namabhodhoro amafuta anonhuwira, namazango," 
Isaiah3:21 nemhete, noukomba hwemhino," 
Isaiah3:22 nenguo dzakanaka dzomutambo, nezvijasi, namakepesi namajasi nezvikwama," 
Isaiah3:23 nezvionioni, nenguo dzomucheka wakaisvonaka, nezvishongo namashaweri." 
Isaiah3:24 Pachinzvimbo chezvinonhuwira, pachava nokunhuwa; pachinzvimbo chesikavha, pachava netambo; pachinzvimbo chebvudzi rakashongedzwa zvakanaka, pachava nemhanza; pachinzvimbo chembatya dzakaisvonaka, pachava nechipfeko chesaga; pachinzvimbo chorunako, pachava nokupiswa." 
Isaiah3:25 Varume venyu vachafa nomunondo, varwi venyu vachafa muhondo." 
Isaiah3:26 Masuo eZioni achaungudza nokuchema; nokutambura kwavo, achagara pasi." 
Isaiah4:1 Pazuva iro vakadzi vanomwe vachabata murume mumwe vachiti, “Tichadya zvokudya zvedu nokuzvitsvakira zvokufuka; Tinongoda kudanwa nezita rako bedzi. Bvisa kunyadziswa kwedu!”" 
Isaiah4:2 Pazuva iro, davi raJehovha richava rakanaka uye richabwinya, uye zvibereko zvenyika zvichava chidadiso nokukudzwa kwavakapunyuka muIsraeri." 
Isaiah4:3 Vaya vakasara muZioni, navakasara muJerusarema, vachanzi vatsvene, navose vakanyorwa pakati pavapenyu muJerusarema." 
Isaiah4:4 Jehovha achashambidza tsvina yevakadzi veZioni; achanatsa makwapa eropa kubva muJerusarema nomweya wokutonga uye mweya womoto. 
Isaiah4:5 Ipapo Jehovha achasika pamusoro pegomo rose reZioni napamusoro pavose vanoungana ikoko gore routsi masikati nezhenje romoto unopfuta usiku; pamusoro pokubwinya kwose pachava nechidzitiro. 
Isaiah4:6 Chichava chifukidzo nomumvuri kubva pakupisa kwezuva, noutiziro, nenzvimbo yokuvanda kubva padutu nemvura inonaya." 
Isaiah5:1 Ndichaimbira mudiwa wangu rwiyo pamusoro pomunda wake wemizambiringa: Mudiwa wangu akanga ane munda wake wemizambiringa, pachikomo chakaorera." 
Isaiah5:2 Akautimbira akabvisa mabwe akasimamo mazambiringa akaisvonaka. Akavaka shongwe mukati mawo uye akauchererawo chisviniro chewaini. Ipapo akatarisa kuti awane zvibereko zvamazambiringa akanaka, asi iwo wakangobereka muchero wakaipa chete." 
Isaiah5:3 “Zvino imi vagari vomuJerusarema nemi varume veJudha, chitongai pakati pangu nomunda wemizambiringa wangu." 
Isaiah5:4 Chiiko chimwezve chaifanira kuitirwa munda wangu wemizambiringa chandisina kuuitira? Pandakatsvaka mazambiringa akanaka, wakagoberekerei akaipa oga?" 
Isaiah5:5 Zvino ndichakuudzai zvandichaitira munda wangu wemizambiringa: Ndichabvisa ruzhowa rwawo, iwo ugoparadzwa; ndichaputsa rusvingo rwawo, uye uchatsikwatsikwa." 
Isaiah5:6 	Ndichauita nzvimbo yamarara, hauzochekererwi kana kusakurirwa, uye minzwa norukato zvichakuramo. Ndicharayira makore kuti arege kunayisa mvura pamusoro pawo.”" 
Isaiah5:7 Munda womuzambiringa waJehovha Wamasimba Ose ndiwo imba yaIsraeri, uye varume veJudha ndivo bindu rake rinomufadza. Zvino akatarisira kururamisira asi akaona kuteuka kweropa; akatsvaka kururuma, asi akanzwa kuchema kwokutambudzika." 
Isaiah5:8 Mune nhamo imi munowedzera dzimba nedzimba uye munobatanidza munda nomunda, kusvikira pasisina nzvimbo yasara uye mugogara moga munyika." 
Isaiah5:9 Jehovha Wamasimba Ose akataura ndichinzwa akati, “Zvirokwazvo dzimba zhinji dzichava matongo, dzimba huru dzakanaka dzichashaya vanogaramo." 
Isaiah5:10 	Maeka gumi omunda wemizambiringa achabereka bhati rimwe chetea rewaini, uye homerib rembeu richabereka efac imwe chete rezviyo.”" 
Isaiah5:11 Vane nhamo avo vanomuka mangwanani kuti vatsvake doro rinodhaka, vanogara kusvikira usiku, kusvikira vapengeswa newaini." 
Isaiah5:12 Vanenge vane rudimbwa, nemitengeranwa pamabiko avo, namatambureni, nenyere newaini, asi havana hanya namabasa aJehovha, havana rukudzo nebasa ramaoko ake." 
Isaiah5:13 Naizvozvo vanhu vangu vachapinda muutapwa, nokuda kwokushayiwa zivo; vanokudzwa vavo vachafa nenzara, uye vazhinji vavo vachafa nenyota." 
Isaiah5:14 Naizvozvo gehena rakawedzera kukara kwaro, uye rakazarura muromo waro zvinodarika mwero; mariri muchaburukira vanokudzwa vavo nevoruzhinji, navose vanokakavara vavo navanofara vavo." 
Isaiah5:15 Naizvozvo munhuwo zvake achadzikiswa, marudzi avanhu achaninipiswa, nameso avanozvikudza achaninipiswa." 
Isaiah5:16 Asi Jehovha Wamasimba Ose achakudzwa, nokuda kwokururamisira kwake, uye Mwari, mutsvene achazviratidza pachake kuti mutsvene, mukururama kwake." 
Isaiah5:17 	Ipapo makwai achafura saari mumafuro awo; makwayana achadya pakati pamatongo avapfumi. 
Isaiah5:18 Vane nhamo avo vanokweva chivi nerwodzi rwokunyengera, uye zvakaipa sezvinenge mabote engoro," 
Isaiah5:19 	kuna vanoti, “Mwari ngaakurumidze, ngaachimbidzike nebasa rake kuti tirione. Ngarisvike, urongwa hwoMutsvene waIsraeri ngahuuye, kuti tihuzive.”" 
Isaiah5:20 Vane nhamo avo vanoti zvakaipa ndizvo zvakanaka, uye zvakanaka ndizvo zvakaipa, vanoisa rima panzvimbo yechiedza nechiedza panzvimbo yerima, vanoisa zvinovava panzvimbo yezvinotapira, nezvinotapira panzvimbo yezvinovava." 
Isaiah5:21 Vane nhamo avo vanoti vakachenjera pameso avo, uye vakangwara pakuona kwavo." 
Isaiah5:22 Vane nhamo avo vanova mhare pakunwa waini, uye shasha pakuvhenganisa zvokunwa zvinodhaka," 
Isaiah5:23 vanopembedza ane mhosva nokuda kwefufuro, asi vanoramba kururamisira vasina mhosva." 
Isaiah5:24 Naizvozvo, samarimi omoto anonanzva mashanga, uye souswa hwakaoma hunomedzwa nemirazvo yemoto, naizvozvo midzi yavo ichaora uye maruva avo achapepereswa seguruva; nokuti vakaramba murayiro waJehovha Wamasimba Ose, uye vakazvidza shoko roMutsvene waIsraeri." 
Isaiah5:25 	Naizvozvo kutsamwa kwaJehovha kwopfuta pamusoro pavanhu vake; ruoko rwake rwasimudzwa uye anovarovera pasi. Makomo anozungunuka, uye mitumbi yavakafa yaita samarara mumigwagwa. Kunyange zvakadaro nokuda kwezvose izvi, kutsamwa kwake hakuna kudzorwa, ruoko rwake rwaramba rwakasimudzwa." 
Isaiah5:26 Anosimudzira ndudzi dziri kure mureza, anoridzira muridzo kuna avo vari kumigumo yenyika. Havo vouya, nokukurumidza uye nokuchimbidzika!" 
Isaiah5:27 Hapana kana mumwe wavo anoneta kana kugumburwa, hapana kana mumwe wavo achakotsira kana kuvata; hapana kana bhanire richasunungurwa pachiuno, hapana kana rukanda rweshangu rwakadambuka." 
Isaiah5:28 Miseve yavo inopinza, uta hwavo hwose hwakakungwa; mahwanda amabhiza avo anenge omusarasara, mavhiri engoro dzavo akaita sechamupupuri." 
Isaiah5:29 Kuomba kwavo kwakaita sokweshumba, vanoomba kufanana neshumba diki; vanodzvova pavanobata mhuka yavo vagoitakura pasina kana angairwira." 
Isaiah5:30 Pazuva iro vachaomba pamusoro payo, sokutinhirwa kwegungwa. Uye kana mumwe akatarisa panyika, achaona rima nokutambudzika; kunyange chiedza chichasvibiswa namakore." 
Isaiah6:1 Mugore rakafa Mambo Uziya, ndakaona Ishe agere pachigaro choushe, chirefu chakakwirira uye mupendero wenguo dzake wakazadza temberi." 
Isaiah6:2 Kumusoro kwake kwaiva neserafimi, imwe neimwe yaiva namapapiro matanhatu: namapapiro maviri, dzakafukidza uso hwadzo, namaviri dzakafukidza makumbo adzo, uye namaviri dzakanga dzichibhururuka." 
Isaiah6:3 Zvino imwe yaidanidzira kune imwe ichiti: “Mutsvene, mutsvene, mutsvene, iye Jehovha Wamasimba Ose; nyika yose izere nokubwinya kwake.”" 
Isaiah6:4 Nomutinhiro wamanzwi adzo, nheyo dzezvikumbaridzo zvakazungunuka uye temberi yakazadzwa noutsi." 
Isaiah6:5 Ipapo ndakachema ndichiti, “Ndine nhamo! Ndaparara! Nokuti ndiri munhu ane miromo ine tsvina uye ndigere pakati pavanhu vane miromo ine tsvina uye meso angu aona Mambo, Jehovha Wamasimba Ose.”" 
Isaiah6:6 Ipapo imwe yesarafimi yakabhururukira kwandiri ine zimbe romoto muruoko rwayo, rayakanga yatora nembato kubva paaritari." 
Isaiah6:7 Yakagunzva muromo wangu nawo ikati, “Tarira, zimbe iri ragunzva miromo yako; mhosva yako yabviswa uye chivi chako chadzikinurwa.”" 
Isaiah6:8 Ipapo ndakanzwa inzwi raJehovha richiti, “Ndiani wandichatuma? Uye ndiani achatiendera?” Ini ndakati, “Ndiri pano! Nditumei!”" 
Isaiah6:9 Iye akati, “Enda undoudza vanhu ava uti, “ ‘Munogara muchinzwa, asi hamumbonzwisisi; munogara muchiona, asi hamuonesesi.’" 
Isaiah6:10 Ita kuti mwoyo yavanhu ava isindimare; ita kuti nzeve dzavo dzisanzwisise uye vatsinzine meso avo. Nokuti vangaona nameso avo, nokunzwa nenzeve dzavo, vakanzwisisa nemwoyo yavo, vakadzoka vakaporeswa.”" 
Isaiah6:11 Ipapo ndakati, “Haiwa, Ishe, kusvikira riniko?” iye akapindura achiti, “Kusvikira maguta ava matongo uye pasisina anogaramo, kusvikira dzimba dzasiyiwa dzisina vanhu, neminda yaparadzwa zvachose," 
Isaiah6:12 kusvikira Jehovha adzingira vanhu kure, uye nyika yasiyiwa zvachose." 
Isaiah6:13 Uye kunyange kukasara chegumi munyika, naichowo chichaparadzwa. Asi somuterabhiniti nomuouki zvichasara zvava zvigutsa pazvinotemwa, saizvozvo rudzi rutsvene ruchavawo sechigutsa munyika.”" 
Isaiah7:1 Zvino Ahazi mwanakomana waJotamu, mwanakomana waUziya, paakanga ari mambo weJudha, Mambo Rezini weAramu naPeka mwanakomana waRamaria mambo weIsraeri vakauya kuzorwa neJerusarema, asi havana kugona kurikunda." 
Isaiah7:2 Zvino imba yaDhavhidhi yakaudzwa kuti, “Aramu yabatana neEfuremu;” saka mwoyo waAhazi nemwoyo yavanhu vake yakazungunuswa, sokuzungunuswa kunoitwa miti yesango nemhepo." 
Isaiah7:3 Ipapo Jehovha akati kuna Isaya, “Buda, iwe nomwanakomana wako Sheari-Jashubhi, unosangana naAhazi kumucheto womugero weDziva Rokumusoro, mumugwagwa unoenda kuMunda woMusuki." 
Isaiah7:4 Uti kwaari, ‘Chenjera, dzikama hako, uye usatya. Usaora mwoyo nokuda kwamatsiga maviri ehuni, nokuda kwokutsamwa kunotyisa kwaRezini naAramu uye nekwomwanakomana waRemaria." 
Isaiah7:5 Aramu naEfuremu nomwanakomana waRemaria vakarangana kukuparadza vachiti," 
Isaiah7:6 “Handei tindorwa neJudha; ngatiribvarurei tigorigovana pakati pedu, tigogadza Tabheeri kuti ave mambo pamusoro paro.”" 
Isaiah7:7 Asi zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, “ ‘Izvi hazvingamiri, hazvingaitiki, nokuti musoro weAramu iDhamasiko," 
Isaiah7:8 uye musoro weDhamasiko iRezini bedzi. Makore makumi matanhatu namashanu asati apera, vaEfuremu vachaputswa-putswa zvokusazova rudzizve." 
Isaiah7:9 Musoro weEfuremu iSamaria, uye musoro weSamaria mwanakomana waRamaria bedzi. Kana usingamiri zvakasimba mukutenda kwako, hauchazomiri zvachose.’ ”" 
Isaiah7:10 Jehovha akataurazve kuna Ahazi akati," 
Isaiah7:11 “Kumbira chiratidzo kuna Jehovha Mwari wako, kunyange pakadzikadzika kana pamusoro-soro.”" 
Isaiah7:12 Asi Ahazi akati, “Handizokumbiri; handingaedzi Jehovha.”" 
Isaiah7:13 Ipapo Isaya akati, “Inzwai zvino, imi imba yaDhavhidhi! Hazvina kuringana here kuedza mwoyo murefu wavanhu? Ko, imi muchaedzawo mwoyo murefu waMwari wangu here?" 
Isaiah7:14 Naizvozvo Jehovha pachake achakupai chiratidzo: Mhandara ichava nemimba uye ichabereka mwanakomana igomutumidza kuti Imanueri. 
Isaiah7:15 Iye achadya ruomba nouchi paachaziva zvakakwana kuti arambe zvakaipa achisarudza zvakarurama. 
Isaiah7:16 Asi mwana asati anyatsoziva kuramba zvakaipa nokusarudza zvakanaka, nyika yamadzimambo maviri aunotya ichava dongo." 
Isaiah7:17 Jehovha achauyisa pamusoro pako napamusoro pavanhu vako napamusoro peimba yababa vako nguva isina kumbovapo kubva nguva iya yaakazvipatsanura kubva kuna Judha, achauyisa mambo weAsiria.”" 
Isaiah7:18 Pazuva iroro Jehovha acharidzira muridzo kunhunzi dzichibva kuhova dziri kure dzeIjipiti nokunyuchi dzichibva kunyika yeAsiria. 
Isaiah7:19 Dzichauya dzose dzigogara mumawere emipata nomumikaha yamatombo, nomumakwenzi ose eminzwa uye napamadziva ose." 
Isaiah7:20 Pazuva iro Jehovha achashandisa chisvo chakakumbirwa kubva mhiri kwoRwizi, kuna mambo weAsiria, kuti avevure misoro yenyu nemvere dzomumakumbo enyu, uye kuti abvisewo ndebvu dzenyu." 
Isaiah7:21 Pazuva iro, murume achapfuwa mhou duku imwe chete nembudzi mbiri." 
Isaiah7:22 Uye nokuda kwokuwanda kwomukaka wadzinopa, achadya ruomba. Vose vachasara munyika vachadya ruomba nouchi." 
Isaiah7:23 Pazuva iro munzvimbo imwe neimwe maimbova nemizambiringa inokwana chiuru yaitengwa namashekeri anokwana chiurua esirivha, pachazova norukato neminzwa chete." 
Isaiah7:24 Varume vachaendako neuta nemiseve, nokuti nyika ichange yafukidzwa norukato neminzwa." 
Isaiah7:25 Kana ari makomo ose aichimbosakurirwa nebadza, hakuna achada kuendako nokuda kwokutya rukato neminzwa; dzichava nzvimbo dzokusundira mombe nokunomhanyirwa namakwai." 
Isaiah8:1 Jehovha akati kwandiri, “Tora hwendefa huru unyore pamusoro payo nechinyoreso: pamusoro paMaheri-Sharari-Hashi-Bhazi." 
Isaiah8:2 Ndichadana Uriya muprista naZekaria mwanakomana waJebherekia sezvapupu zvakatendeka kwandiri.” 
Isaiah8:3 Ipapo ndakaenda kumuprofitakadzi, iye akatora pamuviri akabereka mwanakomana. Zvino Jehovha akati kwandiri, “Mutumidze kuti MaheriSharari-Hashi-Bhazi;" 
Isaiah8:4 nokuti mwana asati aziva kuti, ‘Baba vangu’ kana kuti, ‘Mai vangu,’ pfuma yeDhamasiko nezvakapambwa zveSamaria zvichatakurwa namambo weAsiria.”" 
Isaiah8:5 Jehovha akataurazve kwandiri akati," 
Isaiah8:6 “Nokuti vanhu ava vakaramba mvura inoyerera zvinyoronyoro yeShiroa, uye vanofarira Rezini nomwanakomana waRemaria," 
Isaiah8:7 naizvozvo Jehovha ava kuda kuuyisa pamusoro pavo mafashamu makuru oRwizi, mambo weAsiria nokukudzwa kwake kwose. Ruchapfachukira hova dzarwo dzose, uye rugopfachukira kumahombekombe arwo ose," 
Isaiah8:8 	ruchakukura kusvikira kuJudha, ruchipafuma nomukati mayo, rugopfuura nomairi ruchisvika muhuro. Kutandavara kwamapapiro arwo kuchafukidza upamhi hwenyika yako, iwe Imanueri!”" 
Isaiah8:9 Ridzai mhere yehondo, imi ndudzi, mugoputswaputswa! Teererai, imi nyika dzose dziri kure. Gadzirirai kurwa, mugoputswa-putswa!" 
Isaiah8:10 Gadzirirai urongwa hwenyu, asi huchakona; Taurai zvourongwa hwenyu, asi hauzomiri, nokuti Mwari anesu." 
Isaiah8:11 Jehovha akataura kwandiri ruoko rwake rune simba rwuri pamusoro pangu, achindiyambira kuti ndirege kutevera nzira yavanhu ava, akati," 
Isaiah8:12 “Musati irangano zvinhu zvose zvinonzi navanhu ava irangano; musatya zvavanotya, musazvivhunduka." 
Isaiah8:13 Jehovha Wamasimba Ose ndiye wamunofanira kuita mutsvene, ndiye wamunofanira kuvhunduka," 
Isaiah8:14 ndiye achava nzvimbo tsvene; asi padzimba dzose dzaIsraeri achava dombo rinoita kuti vanhu vagumburwe; nedombo rinoita kuti vapunzike. Uye kuvanhu veJerusarema iye achava musungo norugombe. 
Isaiah8:15 	Vazhinji vavo vachagumburwa; vachawa vagovhunika, vachateyiwa vagobatwa.”" 
Isaiah8:16 Sungai chipupuriro mugosimbisa murayiro pakati pavadzidzi vangu. 
Isaiah8:17 Ndichamirira Jehovha, iye ari kuvanzira imba yaJakobho chiso chake. Ndichaisa ruvimbo rwangu maari." 
Isaiah8:18 Ndiri pano, navana vandakapiwa naJehovha. Tiri zviratidzo nemifananidzo muIsraeri inobva kuna Jehovha Wamasimba Ose paGomo reZioni." 
Isaiah8:19 Kana vanhu vachiti kwamuri bvunzai masvikiro navavuki, vanozevezera nokunguruma, ko, vanhu havangabvunzi kuna Mwari wavo here? Munobvunzirei vakafa pamusoro pavapenyu?" 
Isaiah8:20 Endai kumurayiro nokuzvipupuriro! Kana vasingatauri maererano neshoko iri havana chiedza chamambakwedza. 
Isaiah8:21 Vanotambudzika, navane nzara vachafamba-famba nenyika; pavanotambu-dzika vachava neshungu, uye vachatarira kudenga, vagotuka mambo wavo naMwari wavo." 
Isaiah8:22 Ipapo vachatarira pasi vagoona nhamo chete nerima nokusafara kunotyisa, uye vachakandirwa kurima guru." 
Isaiah9:1 Kunyange zvakadaro, hakuchazovizve, nerima kuna avo vakanga vari munhamo. Pamazuva akare akaninipisa nyika yeZebhuruni nenyika yeNafutari, asi panguva inouya achakudza Garirea ravaHedheni, nenzira yokugungwa mhiri kwaJorodhani." 
Isaiah9:2 Vanhu vaifamba murima vakaona chiedza chikuru; avo vaigara munyika yomumvuri worufu, chiedza chakavavhenekera." 
Isaiah9:3 Makakurisa rudzi mukawedzera mufaro wavo; vanofara pamberi penyu savanhu vanofara panguva yokukohwa, sokufara kwavarume, kana vachigoverana zvakapambwa." 
Isaiah9:4 Nokuti sapamazuva okukundwa kwavaMidhia, vamakaparadzira joko raivaremera, nedanda raichinjika mafudzi avo, iyo tsvimbo yavamanikidzi vavo." 
Isaiah9:5 Shangu imwe neimwe yomurwi yakashandiswa muhondo, nenguo imwe neimwe yakaumburudzwa muropa, zvichapiswa, zvichava huni dzomoto." 
Isaiah9:6 Nokuti takazvarirwa mwana, takapiwa mwanakomana, uye umambo huchava pamapfudzi ake. Uye achanzi Gota Rinoshamisa, Mwari Ane Simba, Baba Vokusingaperi, Muchinda woRugare." 
Isaiah9:7 Kukura kwoumambo hwake nekworugare rwake hazvizovi namagumo. Achatonga pachigaro choushe chaDhavhidhi napamusoro poumambo hwake, achihusimbisa nokuhutsigira, nokururamisira uye nokururama, kubva panguva iyoyo kusvikira nokusingaperi. Kushingaira kwaJehovha Wamasimba Ose kuchazviita." 
Isaiah9:8 Jehovha akatuma shoko pamusoro paJakobho; richawira pamusoro paIsraeri. 
Isaiah9:9 Vanhu vose vachariziva, Efuremu navagari vomuSamaria, ivo vanoti nokuzvikudza kwavo uye namanyawi emwoyo," 
Isaiah9:10 “Zvidhinha zvakoromokera pasi, asi tichavakazve namatombo; mionde yatemerwa pasi, asi tichaitsiva nemisidhari.”" 
Isaiah9:11 Naizvozvo Jehovha akamutsira Rezini vadzivisi akakurudzira vavengi vavo. 
Isaiah9:12 	VaAramu vachibva nokumabvazuva navaFiristia vachibva nokumavirira vakapedza vaIsraeri nomuromo wakashama. Kunyange zvakadaro, kutsamwa kwake hakuna kudzorwa, asi ruoko rwake ruchatongotambanudzwa."
