Ezekiel17:15 Asi mambo akamupandukira nokutuma nhume dzake kuIjipiti kundotorako mabhiza nehondo huru. Achabudirira here? Ko, iye anoita zvinhu zvakadaro angapukunyuka here? Achaputsa chibvumirano akazopukunyuka here?" 
Ezekiel17:16 “ ‘Zvirokwazvo noupenyu hwangu, ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha, iye achafira muBhabhironi, munyika yamambo akamugadza pachigaro choushe, ane mhiko yaakazvidza uye chibvumirano chaakaputsa." 
Ezekiel17:17 Faro nehondo yake ine simba neboka rake guru hazvizombobatsiri kwaari muhondo, kana vakavaka mirwi kana kuvaka nhare dzokuparadza vanhu vazhinji." 
Ezekiel17:18 Akashora mhiko nokuputsa kwaakaita sungano. Nokuti akanga aisa ruoko rwake pakupika uku ndokuzoita zvinhu zvose izvi, haangapukunyuki." 
Ezekiel17:19 “ ‘Naizvozvo zvanzi naIshe Jehovha: Zvirokwazvo noupenyu hwangu, ndichauyisa pamusoro pake mhiko yangu yaakazvidza nesungano yangu yaakaputsa." 
Ezekiel17:20 Ndichamuteya nomumbure wangu, uye achabatwa nomusungo wangu. Ndichamuuyisa kuBhabhironi ndigomutongerako nokuti akanga asina kutendeka kwandiri." 
Ezekiel17:21 Mauto ake anotiza achaurayiwa nomunondo, uye vakasara vavo vachaparadzirwa kunobva mhepo dzose. Ipapo uchaziva kuti ndini Jehovha ndazvitaura." 
Ezekiel17:22 “ ‘Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha: Ini iyeni ndichatora bukira rinobva pamusoro chaipo pomusidhari ndigorisima; ndichavhuna davi nyoro kubva pabukira rapamusoro-soro ndigorisima pamusoro pegomo refu rakakwirira. 
Ezekiel17:23 Pamusoro-soro pamakomo eIsraeri ndipo pandicharisima; richibudisa matavi ndokubereka muchero ugova musidhari unoyevedza. Shiri dzemhando dzose dzicharukira matendere adzo pauri; dzichawana ugaro pamumvuri wamatavi awo. 
Ezekiel17:24 Miti yose yomusango ichaziva kuti ini Jehovha ndinodzikisa miti yakareba nokuita kuti miti mipfupi irebe. Ndinoomesa muti munyoro uye nokukurisa muti wakaoma. “ ‘Ini Jehovha ndazvitaura, uye ndichazviita.’ ”" 
Ezekiel18:1 Shoko raJehovha rakasvika kwandiri richiti," 
Ezekiel18:2 “Munoreveiko vanhu imi zvamunotaura tsumo iyi pamusoro penyika yeIsraeri, muchiti, “ ‘Madzibaba akadya mazambiringa anovava, uye meno avana akaita ugugu’?" 
Ezekiel18:3 “Zvirokwazvo noupenyu hwangu, ndizvo zvinotaura Jehovha, hamuchazotaurizve tsumo iyi muIsraeri." 
Ezekiel18:4 Nokuti mweya mupenyu mumwe nomumwe ndowangu, baba pamwe chete nomwanakomana vose saizvozvo ndevangu. Mweya unotadza ndiwo uchafa." 
Ezekiel18:5 “Ngatiti pane munhu akarurama anoita nokururamisira uye nokururama. 
Ezekiel18:6 Haadyiri pashongwe dzamakomo kana kutarira kuzvifananidzo zveimba yaIsraeri. Haasvibisi mukadzi womuvakidzani wake, kana kuvata nomukadzi ari kumwedzi." 
Ezekiel18:7 Haamanikidzi mumwe munhu, asi anodzorera rubatso rwaakatora pachikwereti. Haaiti zvougororo, asi anopa zvokudya zvake kune vane nzara." 
Ezekiel18:8 Haarevi chimbadzo paanokweretesa kana kutora mhindu yakakurisa. Anodzivisa ruoko rwake kuita zvakaipa, uye anotonga zvakarurama pakati pomunhu nomunhu." 
Ezekiel18:9 Anotevera mitemo yangu, uye anochengeta mirayiro akatendeka. Munhu uyo akarurama; zvirokwazvo achararama, ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel18:10 Ngatiti ane mwanakomana anoita zvechisimba, anoteura ropa kana chimwe chezvinhu izvi" 
Ezekiel18:11 (kunyange baba vake vasina kumboita chimwe chazvo): “Anodya pashongwe dzamakomo Anochinya mukadzi womuvakidzani wake. 
Ezekiel18:12 Anomanikidza varombo navanoshayiwa. Anoita zvougororo. Haadzoreri zvaakakwereta. Anotarisira kuzvifananidzo. Anoita zvinonyangadza. 
Ezekiel18:13 Anokweretesa achireva chimbadzo uye anotora mhindu yakakura. Munhu akadaro achararama here? Kwete, haangararami! Nokuda kwokuti akaita zvinhu izvi zvinonyangadza, achafa, zvirokwazvo, uye ropa rake richava pamusoro pake." 
Ezekiel18:14 “Asi ngatimboti, mwanakomana uyu ano mwanakomana anoona zvivi zvose zvinoitwa nababa vake, uye kunyange achivaona, haaiti zvinhu zvakadai:" 
Ezekiel18:15 “Haadyi pashongwe dzamakomo kana kutarisira kuzvifananidzo zveimba yaIsraeri. Haachinyi mukadzi womuvakidzani wake. 
Ezekiel18:16 Haamanikidzi munhu upi zvake kana kureva rubatso pachikwereti. Haaiti ugororo, asi anopa zvokudya zvake kuna vaya vane nzara, uye anopfekedza vanoshaya zvipfeko." 
Ezekiel18:17 Anodzivisa ruoko rwake kutadza uye haarevi chimbadzo kana mhindu yakakura. Anochengeta mirayiro yangu nokutevera mitemo yangu. Haangafi nokuda kwechivi chababa vake; zvirokwazvo achararama. 
Ezekiel18:18 Asi baba vake vachafa nokuda kwechivi chavo, nokuti vaiita zvinhu nokumanikidza, vakapamba munun'una wavo uye vakaita zvakaipa pakati pavanhu vavo." 
Ezekiel18:19 “Kunyange zvakadaro munobvunza muchiti, ‘Mwanakomana anoregereiko kuva nemhosva yezvakaipa zvababa vake?’ Sezvo mwanakomana akaita nokururamisira uye nokururama uye kuti akanga akangwaririra kuchengeta mitemo yangu, iye achararama zvirokwazvo." 
Ezekiel18:20 Mweya unotadza ndiwo uchafa. Mwanakomana haangagovani nababa vake pamhosva yavo, uye baba havangagovani mhosva yavo nomwanakomana. Kururama kwowakarurama kuchava pamusoro pake, uye kuipa kwowakaipa kuchava pamusoro powakaipa." 
Ezekiel18:21 “Asi kana akaipa akatendeuka kubva pazvivi zvaakaita uye akachengeta mitemo yangu uye akaita nokururamisira uye nokururama, zvirokwazvo achararama; haangafi zvirokwazvo." 
Ezekiel18:22 Kudarika kwake kwose kwaakaita hakungarangarirwi. Nokuda kwezvinhu zvakarurama zvaakaita, iye achararama." 
Ezekiel18:23 Ko, ndingafarira rufu rwowakaipa here? Ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha. Asi handifari here pavanotendeuka kubva panzira dzavo kuti vararame?" 
Ezekiel18:24 “Asi kana munhu akarurama akatsauka pakururama kwake akaita chivi uye akaitawo zvinonyangadza zvinoitwa nomunhu akaipa, angararama here? Zvakarurama zvaakaita hazvizorangarirwi. Nokuda kwemhosva yokusatendeuka kwaanako uye nokuda kwezvivi zvaakaita, iye achafa zvirokwazvo." 
Ezekiel18:25 “Asi munoti, ‘Nzira yaJehovha haina kururama.’ Haiwa imi imba yaIsraeri: Nzira yangu haina kururama here? Ko, hadzisi nzira dzenyu imi dzisakarurama here?" 
Ezekiel18:26 Kana munhu akarurama akatsauka akaita chivi, achafa nokuda kwechivi chake; nokuda kwechivi chaakaita achafa." 
Ezekiel18:27 Asi kana munhu akaipa akadzoka pane zvakaipa zvake zvaakaita akaita zvakarurama nokururamisira, achaponesa mweya wake." 
Ezekiel18:28 Nokuti anorangarira kudarika kwake kwose kwaakaita uye anotendeuka kubva panzira dzake, zvirokwazvo achararama; haangafi." 
Ezekiel18:29 Asi imba yaIsraeri inoti, ‘Nzira yaJehovha haina kururama.’ Nzira dzangu hadzina kururama here, imi imba yaIsraeri? Ko, hadzisi nzira dzenyu dzisakarurama here?" 
Ezekiel18:30 “Naizvozvo, imi imba yaIsraeri, ndichakutongai, mumwe nomumwe zvakafanira nzira dzake, ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha. Tendeukai! Dzokai pakudarika kwenyu kwose; ipapo chivi hachingakuwisirii pasi." 
Ezekiel18:31 Rasai kudarika kwenyu kwamakaita, mufuke mwoyo mutsva nomweya mutsva. Ko, muchafirei, imi imba yaIsraeri?" 
Ezekiel18:32 Nokuti handifariri rufu rwomunhu upi zvake, ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha. Tendeukai murarame!" 
Ezekiel19:1 “Chema urire pamusoro pamachinda eIsraeri 
Ezekiel19:2 uti: “ ‘Mai vako vaiva shumbakadzi yakadii pakati peshumba! Yaivata pasi pakati peshumba duku uye yairera vana vayo. 
Ezekiel19:3 Yakarera mumwe mwana wayo, ikava shumba yakasimba. Yakadzidza kubvambura nyama, uye yaidya vanhu." 
Ezekiel19:4 Ndudzi dzakanzwa nezvayo, dzikaibata muhunza yadzo. Vakaenda nayo nezvikokovono kunyika yeIjipiti." 
Ezekiel19:5 “ ‘Yakati ichiona kuti tariro yayo haina kuzadziswa, yarasikirwa nezvayakanga yakatarisira, Yakatora mumwe wevana vayo ndokumuita shumba yakasimba." 
Ezekiel19:6 Yakafamba ichinyahwaira pakati peshumba, nokuti yakanga yava shumba ine simba zvino. Yakadzidza kubvambura chayabata uye yaidya vanhu." 
Ezekiel19:7 Yakakoromora nhare dzavo uye ikaparadza maguta avo. Nyika navose vaivamo vakavhundutswa nokuomba kwayo. 
Ezekiel19:8 Ipapo ndudzi dzakarwisana nayo, vaya vaibva kumatunhu akapoteredza. Vakaikandira mambure, iyo ndokubatwa muhunza yavo." 
Ezekiel19:9 Vakaipinza muchizarira nezvikokovono ndokundoiisa kuna mambo weBhabhironi. Vakaiisa mutorongo, saka kuomba kwayo hakuna kuzonzwikwazve pamakomo aIsraeri." 
Ezekiel19:10 “ ‘Mai vako vakanga vakaita somuzambiringa mumunda wako womuzambiringa, wakasimwa pane mvura; wakanga une zvibereko uye uzere namatavi nokuda kwemvura zhinji." 
Ezekiel19:11 Matavi awo akanga akasimba, akanakira kuva tsvimbo yomutongi. Wakanga wakareba kwazvo pamusoro pamatavi makobvu akapfumvutira, waionekera kumusoro-soro nokuda kwourefu hwawo, uye nokuda kwamatavi awo mazhinji." 
Ezekiel19:12 Asi wakadzurwa nehasha ndokukandwa pasi. Mhepo yokumabvazuva yakauomesa, ukazunzwa michero yawo; matavi awo akasimba akaoma, uye moto ukaapisa." 
Ezekiel19:13 Zvino wakasimwa mugwenga, munyika yakaoma ine nyota." 
Ezekiel19:14 Moto wakapambira uchibva kune rimwe davi rawo guru ndokupisa michero yawo. Hapana davi rakasimba rakasara pauri rakanakira kuva tsvimbo yomutongi.’ Uku ndiko kuchema uye kunofanira kushandiswa pakuchema.” 
Ezekiel20:1 Mugore rechinomwe, nomwedzi wechishanu pazuva regumi, vamwe vavakuru vavaIsraeri vakauya kuzobvunza Jehovha, vakagara pasi pamberi pangu." 
Ezekiel20:2 Ipapo shoko raJehovha rakasvika kwandiri richiti," 
Ezekiel20:3 “Mwanakomana womunhu, taura kuvakuru veIsraeri uti kwavari, ‘Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha: Mauya kuzondibvunza ini here? Zvirokwazvo noupenyu hwangu, handisi kuzobvuma kuti mundibvunze imi, ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha.’" 
Ezekiel20:4 “Ungavatonga here? Ungavatonga here, iwe mwanakomana womunhu? Zvino chivazivisa mabasa anonyangadza amadzibaba avo," 
Ezekiel20:5 uti kwavari, ‘Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha: Pazuva randakasarudza Israeri, ndakapika ndakasimudzira ruoko kuzvizvarwa zveimba yaJakobho ndikazviratidza kwavari muIjipiti. Ndakasimudza ruoko rwangu, ndikati kwavari, “Ndini Jehovha Mwari wenyu.”" 
Ezekiel20:6 Pazuva iro ndakapika kwavari kuti ndichavabudisa munyika yeIjipiti ndigovapinza munyika yandakavatsvakira, nyika inoyerera mukaka nouchi, nyika yakanakisisa panyika dzose." 
Ezekiel20:7 Uye ndakati kwavari, “Mumwe nomumwe wenyu ngaarase zviumbwa zvenyu zvinonyangadza zvamakaringira kwazviri, uye murege kuzvisvibisa nezvifananidzo zveIjipiti. Ndini Jehovha Mwari wenyu.”" 
Ezekiel20:8 “ ‘Asi vakandimukira vakasada kunditeerera; havana kuda kurasa zvifananidzo zvavairingira kwazviri nameso avo, kana kusiya zvifananidzo zveIjipiti. Saka ndakati ndichadurura hasha dzangu pamusoro pavo ndigopedzera kutsamwa kwangu pamusoro pavo muIjipiti." 
Ezekiel20:9 Asi nokuda kwezita rangu, ndakaita zvaichengetedza zita rangu kuti rirege kusvibiswa pamberi pendudzi idzo vaigara pakati padzo uye avo vandakanga ndazviratidza pamberi pavo kuvaIsraeri nokuvabudisa muIjipiti." 
Ezekiel20:10 Naizvozvo ndakavabudisa muIjipiti ndikaenda navo kugwenga. 
Ezekiel20:11 Ndakavapa mitemo yangu ndikavazivisa mirayiro yangu, nokuti munhu achaiteerera achararama nayo." 
Ezekiel20:12 Uyezve ndakavapa maSabata angu sechiratidzo pakati pedu, kuti vagoziva kuti ini Jehovha ndini ndinovaita vatsvene." 
Ezekiel20:13 “ ‘Asi vanhu veIsraeri vakandimukira mugwenga. Havana kutevera mitemo yangu asi vakaramba mirayiro yangu, kunyange munhu anoiteerera achizorarama nayo, uye vakazvidza chose maSabata angu. Saka ndakati kwavari ndichadurura hasha dzangu pamusoro pavo ndigovaparadza mugwenga." 
Ezekiel20:14 Asi nokuda kwezita rangu ndakaita zvaichengetedza zita rangu kuti rirege kusvibiswa pamberi pendudzi idzo dzandakavabudisa kubva madziri pamberi padzo. 
Ezekiel20:15 Uyezve ndakavapikira mugwenga noruoko rwakasimudzwa ndichiti handizovaisi munyika yandakavapa, nyika inoyerera mukaka nouchi, nyika yakanakisisa panyika dzose," 
Ezekiel20:16 nokuti vakaramba mirayiro yangu uye havana kutevera mitemo yangu, vakasvibisa maSabata angu. Nokuti mwoyo yavo yakanga yakazvipira kuzvifananidzo zvavo." 
Ezekiel20:17 Kunyange zvakadaro hazvo, ndakavatarisa ndikavanzwira tsitsi ndikasavaparadza kana kuvapedza chose mugwenga." 
Ezekiel20:18 Ndakati kuvana vavo mugwenga, “Regai kutevera mitemo yamadzibaba enyu kana kuchengeta mirayiro yavo kana kuzvisvibisa nezvifananidzo zvavo." 
Ezekiel20:19 Ndini Jehovha Mwari wenyu; teverai mitemo yangu uye muchenjerere kuchengeta mirayiro yangu. 
Ezekiel20:20 Chengetai maSabata angu ave matsvene, kuti ave chiratidzo pakati pedu. Ipapo muchaziva kuti ndini Jehovha Mwari wenyu.”" 
Ezekiel20:21 “ ‘Asi vana vakandimukira: havana kutevera mitemo yangu, vakanga vasina kuchenjerera kuchengeta mirayiro yangu, kunyange zvazvo munhu anoiteerera achizorarama nayo, uye vakasvibisa maSabata angu. Saka ndakati ndichadurura hasha dzangu pamusoro pavo uye ndigopedzera kutsamwa kwangu pamusoro pavo mugwenga." 
Ezekiel20:22 Asi ndakadzora ruoko rwangu, uye nokuda kwezita rangu ndakaita zvairichengetedza kuti rirege kusvibiswa pamberi pendudzi dzandakavabudisa pamberi padzo." 
Ezekiel20:23 Uyezve, ndakasimudza ruoko, ndikapika mugwenga kuti ndichavaparadzira pakati pendudzi nokuvadzingira kunyika dzose." 
Ezekiel20:24 Nokuti vakanga vasina kuteerera mirayiro yangu asi vakanga varamba mitemo yangu uye vakasvibisa maSabata angu, uye meso avo akachiva zvifananidzo zvamadzibaba avo." 
Ezekiel20:25 Ndakavapawo mitemo yakanga isina kunaka uye nemirayiro yavakanga vasingagoni kurarama nayo," 
Ezekiel20:26 ndakaita kuti vasvibiswe nezvipo zvavo, zvibayiro zvamatangwe ose, kuti ndivazadze nokutya kukuru kuti vagoziva kuti ndini Jehovha.’" 
Ezekiel20:27 “Naizvozvo, mwanakomana womunhu, taura kuvanhu veIsraeri uti kwavari, ‘Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha: Muna izvozviwo madzibaba enyu akandimhura nokundisiya:" 
Ezekiel20:28 Pandakavauyisa munyika yandakanga ndapika kuti ndichavapa uye vakaona chikomo chipi zvacho chakakwirira kana muti upi zvawo una mashizha, vakabayira zvibayiro zvavo ipapo, vakapa zvipiriso zvakanditsamwisa, vachipa zvinonhuwira zvavo uye vakadurura zvipiriso zvavo zvinonwiwa ipapo." 
Ezekiel20:29 Ipapo ndakati kwavari: Ko, nzvimbo iyi yakakwirira yamunoenda kwairi ndeyei?’ ” (Zita rayo inonzi Bhama kusvikira zuva ranhasi.)" 
Ezekiel20:30 “Naizvozvo uti kuimba yaIsraeri, ‘Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha: Muchazvisvibisa sezvakaita madzibaba enyu here nokuchiva zvifananidzo zvavo zvinonyangadza?" 
Ezekiel20:31 Pamunopa zvipo zvenyu, zvibayiro zvavanakomana venyu mumoto, munoramba muchizvisvibisa nezvifananidzo zvenyu kusvikira nhasi. Ini ndingatenda kubvunzwa nemi here imi imba yaIsraeri? Zvirokwazvo noupenyu hwangu, ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha, handizombokutenderei kuti mundibvunze." 
Ezekiel20:32 “ ‘Imi munoti, “Tinoda kufanana nendudzi, savanhu vedzimwe nyika, vanoshumira matanda namatombo.” Asi zviri mundangariro dzenyu hazvimboitiki." 
Ezekiel20:33 Zvirokwazvo noupenyu hwangu, ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha, ndichakutonga nechanza chine simba, noruoko rwakatambanudzwa uye nehasha dzakadururwa." 
Ezekiel20:34 Ndichakudzosai kubva kundudzi ndigokuunganidzai kubva kunyika dzamakanga makaparadzirwa kwadziri, nechanza chine simba uye noruoko rwakatambanudzwa uye nehasha dzakadururwa." 
Ezekiel20:35 Ndichakuyisai kurenje rendudzi ndigokutongai ikoko takatarisana chiso nechiso. 
Ezekiel20:36 Sokutonga kwandakaita madzibaba enyu mugwenga renyika yeIjipiti, saizvozvo ndichakutongai imi, ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel20:37 Ndichakuverengai pamunopfuura napasi petsvimbo yangu, uye ndichakuisai muchisungo chesungano." 
Ezekiel20:38 Ndichakubvisirai vaya vanondipandukira navaya vanondimukira. Kunyange hazvo ndichizovabudisa munyika yavagere, asi havangapindi munyika yeIsraeri. Ipapo muchaziva kuti ndini Jehovha." 
Ezekiel20:39 “ ‘Asi kana murimi, iyemi imba yaIsraeri, zvanzi naIshe Jehovha: Endai mundoshumira zvifananidzo zvenyu, mumwe nomumwe wenyu! Asi shure kwazvo zvirokwazvo muchanditeerera uye hamungazosvibisizve zita rangu dzvene nezvipo zvenyu nezvifananidzo zvenyu." 
Ezekiel20:40 Nokuti pagomo rangu dzvene, iro gomo refu raIsraeri, ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha, imba yose yaIsraeri ichashumira ipapo, uye ndichavagamuchira ipapo. Ndipo pandichada zvipiriso zvenyu nezvipo zvenyu zvokuzvidira pamwe chete nezvibayiro zvenyu zvitsvene." 
Ezekiel20:41 Ndichakugamuchirai somunhuwi unonhuwira pandichakubudisai kubva kundudzi nokukuunganidzai muchibva kunyika dzamakanga makaparadzirwa kwadziri uye ndichazviratidza kuti ndiri mutsvene kwamuri pamberi pendudzi. 
Ezekiel20:42 Ipapo muchaziva kuti ndini Jehovha, kana ndakuisai munyika yeIsraeri, nyika yandakapikira kupa madzibaba enyu noruoko rwakasimudzwa." 
Ezekiel20:43 Mucharangarira mafambiro enyu ikoko nezviito zvose zvamakazvisvibisa nazvo uye muchazvisema pachenyu nokuda kwezvakaipa zvose zvamakaita. 
Ezekiel20:44 Muchaziva kuti ndini Jehovha, pandichakuitirai izvozvo nokuda kwezita rangu kwete nokuda kwenzira dzenyu dzakaipa nezvakaora zvamakaita imi imba yaIsraeri, ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha.’ ”" 
Ezekiel20:45 Shoko raJehovha rakasvika kwandiri richiti," 
Ezekiel20:46 “Mwanakomana womunhu, rinzira chiso chako kurutivi rwezasi; uparidze pamusoro porutivi rwezasi uye uprofite pamusoro pesango renyika yezasi." 
Ezekiel20:47 Uti kusango rezasi, ‘Inzwa shoko raJehovha. Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha: Ndava pedyo nokukupisa nomoto, uye uchaparadza miti yako yose, zvose minyoro neyakaoma. Kuririma kwomurazvo hakungadzimwi, uye zviso zvose kubva kurutivi rwezasi kusvikira kurutivi rwokumusoro zvichapiswa nawo." 
Ezekiel20:48 Mumwe nomumwe achaona kuti ini Jehovha ndini ndaubatidza; haungadzimwi.’ ” 
Ezekiel20:49 Ipapo ndakati, “Haiwa, Ishe Jehovha! Vanoti pamusoro pangu, ‘Ko, haasi kungotaura mifananidzo here?’ ”" 
Ezekiel21:1 Shoko raJehovha rakasvika kwandiri richiti," 
Ezekiel21:2 “Mwanakomana womunhu, rinzira chiso chako kuJerusarema uparidze pamusoro penzvimbo tsvene. Profita pamusoro penyika yeIsraeri," 
Ezekiel21:3 uti kwairi, ‘Zvanzi naJehovha: Ndiri kuzokurwisa. Ndichavhomora munondo wangu kubva mumuhara wawo ndigouraya pakati penyu vose vakarurama navakaipa." 
Ezekiel21:4 Nokuti ndichaparadza vakarurama navakaipa, munondo wangu uchabuda mumuhara kundorwa navose kubva kurutivi rwezasi kusvikira kurutivi rwokumusoro." 
Ezekiel21:5 Ipapo vanhu vose vachaziva kuti ini Jehovha ndavhomora munondo wangu kubva mumuhara wawo; hauchazodzokerimozve.’ 
Ezekiel21:6 “Naizvozvo, gomera, mwanakomana womunhu! Gomera pamberi pavo nomwoyo wakapwanyika uye nokuchema neshungu." 
Ezekiel21:7 Zvino pavanokubvunza vachiti, ‘Unogomereiko?’ iwe uchati kwavari, ‘Nemhaka yamashoko ari kuuya. Mwoyo mumwe nomumwe uchanyauka uye ruoko rumwe norumwe rucharemara, mweya mumwe nomumwe uchaziya uye ibvi rimwe nerimwe richarukutika semvura.’ Zviri kuuya! Zvirokwazvo zvichaitika, ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha.”" 
Ezekiel21:8 Shoko raJehovha rakasvika kwandiri richiti," 
Ezekiel21:9 “Mwanakomana womunhu, profita uti, ‘Zvanzi naJehovha, “Munondo, munondo, wakarodzwa uye wakapukutwa," 
Ezekiel21:10 wakarodzerwa kuuraya, wakapukutirwa kuti upenye semheni! “ ‘Tichagofara here netsvimbo youshe yomwanakomana wangu Judha? Munondo unozvidza zvimiti zvose zvakadai." 
Ezekiel21:11 “ ‘Munondo wakagadzirirwa kuti upukutwe, kuti ubatwe noruoko; wakarodzwa nokupukutwa, wakagadzirirwa kuiswa muruoko rwomuurayi." 
Ezekiel21:12 Chema uye uungudze, mwanakomana womunhu, nokuti unorwa navanhu vangu; unorwa namachinda ose aIsraeri. Vakakandwa kumunondo, pamwe chete navanhu vangu. Naizvozvo uzvirove chipfuva." 
Ezekiel21:13 “ ‘Kuedzwa kuri kuuya zvirokwazvo. Ko, kana tsvimbo youshe yaJudha, iyo inozvidzwa nomunondo, ikasaenderera mberi chii chinoitika? ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha.’" 
Ezekiel21:14 “Saka zvino, mwanakomana womunhu, profita uye urovanise maoko ako pamwe chete. Rega munondo ubaye kaviri, kunyange katatu. Ndiwo munondo wokuuraya, iwo munondo wokuuraya kukuru, uri kuuya kwavari kubva kumativi ose." 
Ezekiel21:15 Kuti mwoyo inyauke uye vanowa vawande, munondo ndakauyisa pamasuo avo ose kuti uuraye. Haiwa wakagadzirirwa kuti upenye semheni, wakabatwa kuti uuraye." 
Ezekiel21:16 Haiwa, iwe munondo, cheka kurudyi, ugochekawo kuruboshwe, kwose kunorerekera chisvo chako." 
Ezekiel21:17 Neniwo ndicharovanya maoko angu pamwe chete, uye hasha dzangu dzichaserera. Ini Jehovha ndazvitaura.”" 
Ezekiel21:18 Shoko raJehovha rakasvika kwandiri richiti: 
Ezekiel21:19 “Mwanakomana womunhu, tara migwagwa miviri yomunondo wamambo weBhabhironi yaachafamba nayo, yose iri miviri ichitangira munyika imwe chete. Uite chikwangwari panoparadzana mugwagwa uchipinda muguta." 
Ezekiel21:20 Utare mugwagwa mumwe chete womunondo unouya kuzorwa neRabha ravaAmoni uye mumwe uchizorwa neJudha neJerusarema rakakomberedzwa. 
Ezekiel21:21 Nokuti mambo weBhabhironi achamira pamharadzano dzemugwagwa, pamharadzano dzemigwagwa miviri, kuti atsvake shuramanenji: Achakanda mijenya nemiseve, achabvunza zvifananidzo zvake, achaongorora chiropa." 
Ezekiel21:22 Muruoko rwake rworudyi muchava nomujenya weJerusarema, umo maachamisa zvokugumura, kuti varayire nezvokuuraya, nokudanidzira zvehondo, nokuisa zvokugumura pamasuo, nokuvaka mirwi yokurwa nokuvaka nhare." 
Ezekiel21:23 Zvichange zvakaita seshuramanenji yenhema kuna vaya vakange vapikira kumuteerera, asi iye achavarangaridza nezvemhosva yavo agovatora kuti avaite nhapwa." 
Ezekiel21:24 “Naizvozvo zvanzi naJehovha, ‘Nemhaka yokuti imi vanhu makandiyeuchidza mhosva yenyu nokundimukira pachena, muchiratidza pachena zvivi zvenyu pazvinhu zvose zvamunoita, nokuda kwokuti makaita izvi, muchaitwa nhapwa." 
Ezekiel21:25 “ ‘Haiwa, iwe muchinda waIsraeri akaipa uye anozvidza, ane zuva rasvika, ane nguva yokurangwa kwake yasvika pakupedzisira," 
Ezekiel21:26 Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha: Bvisai ngowani youprista, bvisai korona. Hazvichazorambi zviri sezvazvaiva: vanozvidzwa vachasimudzirwa uye vanokudzwa vachaninipiswa." 
Ezekiel21:27 Dongo! Dongo! Ndichariita dongo! Harichazovandudzwizve kusvikira mwene waro auya; ndiye wandichapa.’ 
Ezekiel21:28 “Uye iwe, mwanakomana womunhu, profita uti, ‘Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha pamusoro pavaAmoni nokutuka kwavo: “ ‘Munondo, munondo, wavhomorwa kuti uuraye, wapukutwa kuti uparadze uye kuti upenye semheni!" 
Ezekiel21:29 Kunyange vakaona zviratidzo zvenhema pamusoro pako, vakauka zvenhema pamusoro pako, zvichaiswa pamitsipa yavakashata vachazourayiwa, vane zuva ravo rasvika, ivo vane nguva yokurangwa yasvika pokupedzisira." 
Ezekiel21:30 Chidzosera munondo mumuhara wawo. Panzvimbo yawakasikwa uri, munyika yamadzitateguru ako, ndipo pandichakutongera." 
Ezekiel21:31 Ndichadurura hasha dzangu pamusoro pako, uye ndigofuridzira kutsamwa kwangu kunotyisa pamusoro pako; ndichakuisa kuvanhu vane utsinye, vanhu vanoziva kuparadza." 
Ezekiel21:32 Uchava huni dzomoto, ropa rako richateurwa munyika yako, hauchazorangarirwizve; nokuti ini Jehovha ndazvitaura.’ ”" 
Ezekiel22:1 Shoko raJehovha rakasvika kwandiri richiti," 
Ezekiel22:2 “Mwanakomana womunhu, ucharitonga here? Ucharitonga here guta iri rokudeura ropa? Ipapo urizivise mabasa aro ose anonyangadza" 
Ezekiel22:3 uti, “Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha: Haiwa iwe guta rinozvitsvakira kuparadzwa nokuda kwokuteura ropa pakati paro, nokuzvisvibisa nokuita zvifananidzo," 
Ezekiel22:4 wava nemhosva nokuda kweropa rawakateura uye wakasvibiswa nokuda kwezvifananidzo zvawakaita. Wakasvitsa mazuva ako pamagumo, uye magumo amakore ako asvika. Naizvozvo ndichakuita chinhu chinoshorwa nendudzi nechinosekwa nenyika dzose." 
Ezekiel22:5 Vari pedyo newe navari kure vachakuseka, iwe guta rinonyadza, rizere nebope." 
Ezekiel22:6 “ ‘Tarira uone muchinda mumwe nomumwe waIsraeri ari pakati pako mateuriro aanoita ropa achishandisa simba rake. 
Ezekiel22:7 Vakazvidza baba namai vari mauri; vakamanikidza mutorwa uye nherera nechirikadzi dziri mukati mako havana kudzibata zvakanaka. 
Ezekiel22:8 Iwe wakashora zvinhu zvangu zvitsvene uye wakasvibisa maSabata angu. 
Ezekiel22:9 Mukati mako mune vanhu vane makuhwa, vanofarira pakuteura ropa; mukati mako muna vanhu vanodyira kushongwe dzokumakomo uye vanoita mabasa eunzenza." 
Ezekiel22:10 Mukati mako muna vanhu vasingakudzi nhoo dzamadzibaba avo, mukati mako muna vanhu vanochinya vakadzi panguva yavanenge vari kumwedzi, pavanenge vasina kuchena." 
Ezekiel22:11 Mukati mako mune mumwe munhu anoita zvinonyangadza nomukadzi womuvakidzani wako, mumwe anochinya mukadzi womwana wake zvinonyadzisa, uye mumwe anochinya hanzvadzi yake, mwanasikana wababa vake chaivo." 
Ezekiel22:12 Mukati mako muna varume vanogamuchira fufuro kuti vateure ropa; unotora mhindu inopfuura mwero, uchizviwanira pfuma yokubiridzira kubva kuvavakidzani vako. Uye wakandikanganwa ini, ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel22:13 “ ‘Zvirokwazvo ndicharovanisa maoko angu pamwe chete pamusoro pepfuma isakarurama yawakaita uye neropa rawakateura pakati pako. 
Ezekiel22:14 Ko, kushinga kwako kucharamba kuripo here kana kusimba kwamaoko ako pazuva randichakutonga? Ini Jehovha ndakazvitaura, uye ndichazvitaura." 
Ezekiel22:15 Ndichakuparadzira pakati penyika; uye ndichagumisa kusachena kwako. 
Ezekiel22:16 Muchaziva kuti ndini Jehovha, pamuchasvibiswa pamberi pendudzi.’ ”" 
Ezekiel22:17 Ipapo shoko raJehovha rakasvika kwandiri richiti," 
Ezekiel22:18 “Mwanakomana womunhu, imba yaIsraeri yaita samarara kwandiri; vose indarira, netini, nesimbi nedare romutobvu rakasarira muvira romoto. Vakaita samarara esirivha." 
Ezekiel22:19 Naizvozvo zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ‘Nemhaka yokuti mose mava marara, ndichakuunganidzai muJerusarema." 
Ezekiel22:20 Somunhu anounganidza muvira romoto kuti zvinyungudiswe nokupiswa nezhenje, saizvozvo ndichakuunganidzai pakutsamwa kwangu nehasha dzangu ndigokuyisai mukati meguta ndigokunyautsai." 
Ezekiel22:21 Ndichakuunganidzai nokukufuridzai nokupisa kwehasha dzangu uye muchanyautswa mukati maro. 
Ezekiel22:22 Sokunyautswa kwesirivha iri muvira romoto, saizvozvo muchanyautswa mukati maro, uye muchaziva kuti ini Jehovha ndadurura hasha dzangu pamusoro penyu.’ ”" 
Ezekiel22:23 Shoko raJehovha rakasvikazve kwandiri richiti," 
Ezekiel22:24 “Mwanakomana womunhu, uti kunyika, ‘Iwe uri nyika isina kuwana mvura kana guti pazuva rehasha dzangu.’" 
Ezekiel22:25 Pane rangano yamachinda vari pakati payo vanoomba seshumba iri kubvamburanya chayabata; vanodya vanhu, vanotora pfuma nezvinhu zvinokosha uye vanoita kuti chirikadzi dzivande mukati mayo." 
Ezekiel22:26 Vaprista vayo vanogutsa mirayiro yangu uye vanosvibisa zvinhu zvangu zvitsvene; havaoni mutsauko pakati pechinhu chitsvene nechinhuwo zvacho; vanodzidzisa kuti hapana mutsauko pakati pezvisakachena nezvakachena; uye vanotsinzina meso avo kuti varege kuchengeta maSabata angu, saka ini ndakasvibiswa pakati pavo." 
Ezekiel22:27 Machinda ari mukati maro akaita samapumhi ari kubvamburanya chaabata; vanoteura ropa nokuuraya vanhu kuti vawane pfuma yokusarurama. 
Ezekiel22:28 Vaprofita vayo vanofukidza mabasa avo aya nezviratidzo zvenhema nokuvuka kwenhema. Vanoti, ‘Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha,’ izvo Jehovha haana kutaura." 
Ezekiel22:29 Vanhu vomunyika vanotora mari nokumanikidzira uye vanoita ugororo; vanomanikidza varombo navanoshayiwa uye vanoitira vatorwa zvakaipa, vachiramba kuvaruramisira." 
Ezekiel22:30 “Ndakatsvaka munhu pakati pavo angavaka rusvingo nokumira pamberi pangu, pakakoromoka achimirira nyika kuti ndirege kuparadza, asi ndakashayiwa kana mumwe." 
Ezekiel22:31 Saka ndichadurura kutsamwa kwangu pamisoro pavo ndigovaparadza nokutsamwa kwangu, ndichiburutsira pamisoro yavo zvavakaita zvose, ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha.”" 
Ezekiel23:1 Shoko raJehovha rakasvika kwandiri richiti," 
Ezekiel23:2 “Mwanakomana womunhu, kwakanga kuna vakadzi vaviri, vanasikana vamai vamwe chete." 
Ezekiel23:3 Ivo vakava zvifeve muIjipiti, vakaita ufeve vachiri vadiki. Munyika imomo, mazamu oumhandara hwavo akabatwa-batwa uye zvipfuva zvavo zvakabatwa-batwa." 
Ezekiel23:4 Zita romukoma rakanga richinzi Ohora, uye munun'una wake ainzi Ohoribha. Ivo vakanga vari vangu uye vakabereka vanakomana navanasikana. Ohora ndiye Samaria uye Ohoribha ndiye Jerusarema." 
Ezekiel23:5 “Ohora akaita ufeve iye achiri wangu; akachiva zvikomba zvake, ivo vaAsiria, varwi" 
Ezekiel23:6 vakanga vakapfeka nguo dzebhuruu, vabati navatungamiri vehondo, vakanga vari majaya akanaka chose, uye vari vatasvi vamabhiza." 
Ezekiel23:7 Iye akaita ufeve navapamusoro-soro vose veAsiria uye akazvisvibisa nezvifananidzo zvose zvavose vaaichiva. 
Ezekiel23:8 Haana kurega ufeve hwaakatangira kuIjipiti, paakavata navarume achiri muduku, vakabata-bata chipfuva choumhandara hwake uye vakadurura ruchiva rwavo pamusoro pake." 
Ezekiel23:9 “Naizvozvo ndakamuisa kuzvikomba zvake, ivo vaAsiria, vaakanga achichiva." 
Ezekiel23:10 Vakamubvisa nguo akasara asina, ashama, vakatora vanakomana vake navanasikana ndokubva vamuuraya nomunondo. Akabva ava shumo pakati pavakadzi uye akarangwa." 
Ezekiel23:11 “Munun'una wake Ohoribha akazviona izvozvo, asi nokuda kworuchiva rwake noufeve hwake, akanyanya ufeve kupfuura mukoma wake." 
Ezekiel23:12 Iye akachivawo vaAsiria, vatongi navatungamiri vehondo, varwi vakapfeka zvakakwana, vatasvi vaifamba namabhiza, namajaya akanaka ose." 
Ezekiel23:13 Ndakaona kuti naiyewo akazvisvibisa; vose vari vaviri vakafamba nenzira imwe cheteyo. 
Ezekiel23:14 “Asi akaenderera mberi noufeve hwake. Akaona mifananidzo yavarume pamadziro, mifananidzo yavaKaradhea mitsvuku," 
Ezekiel23:15 vana mabhandi akamonera muzviuno zvavo nengowani dzemicheka dzairembera pamisoro yavo; vakaita samachinda engoro dzeBhabhironi, vagari veKaradhea." 
Ezekiel23:16 Paakangovaona, akabva avachiva ndokutumira nhume kwavari muKaradhea." 
Ezekiel23:17 Ipapo vaBhabhironi vakauya kwaari, kunhoo yorudo, mukuchiva kwavo, vakamusvibisa. Shure kwokusvibiswa kwake navo, akavafuratira kwazvo." 
Ezekiel23:18 Paakaenderera mberi noufeve hwake pachena uye akaratidza kushama kwake, ndakamufuratira zvandisembura, sokufuratira kwandakanga ndaita mukoma wake." 
Ezekiel23:19 Asi akaramba achiwedzera unzenza hwake achirangarira mazuva ouduku hwake, paakanga ari chifeve muIjipiti." 
Ezekiel23:20 Akachiva zvikomba zvake ikoko, vane mitezo yakaita sembongoro uye zvinobuda mavari zvakaita sezvamabhiza." 
Ezekiel23:21 Saka wakapanga unzenza hwouduku hwako, pawaiva muIjipiti chipfuva chako chakabatwa-batwa uye mazamu ouduku hwako akabatwa-batwa." 
Ezekiel23:22 “Naizvozvo, Ohoribha, zvanzi naIshe Jehovha: Ndichakumutsira zvikomba zvako kuti zvikurwise, ivo vawakasemburwa navo ukavafuratira, ndichavauyisa kuzorwa newe vachibva kumativi ose," 
Ezekiel23:23 vaBhabhironi navaKaradhea vose, varume vePekodhi neveShowa neKowa, uye vaAsiria vose pamwe chete navo, majaya akanaka, vose vari vabati nevatungamiri vamauto, namachinda engoro navarume vezvigaro zvapamusoro, vose vakatasva mabhiza." 
Ezekiel23:24 Vachauya kuzorwa newe vaine zvombo, nengoro uye neboka ravanhu vazhinji, vachagadzirira kuti varwe newe kumativi ose nenhoo huru neduku uye nenguwani dzokurwa nadzo. Ndichakudzorera kwavari kuti urangwe, uye vachakuranga sezvakafanira mitemo yavo." 
Ezekiel23:25 Ndichamutsa godo rangu kuti ndirwe newe, uye ivo vachakurwisa nehasha. Vachagura mhino yako nenzeve dzako, uye vakasara venyu vachaurayiwa nomunondo. Vachakutorerai vanakomana venyu navanasikana venyu, uye vachasara venyu vachaparadzwa nomoto." 
Ezekiel23:26 Vachakubvisai nguo dzenyu nokukutorerai ukomba hwenyu hwakaisvonaka. 
Ezekiel23:27 Saka ndichagumisa unzenza hwenyu noufeve hwamakatangira muIjipiti. Hamuchazotariri zvinhu izvi muchizvishuva kana kuzorangarira Ijipiti zvakare. 
Ezekiel23:28 “Nokuti zvanzi naIshe Jehovha: Ndava kuzokuisa mumaoko avanhu vaunovenga, kuna avo vawakafuratira wasemburwa navo." 
Ezekiel23:29 Ivo vachakuitira ruvengo vagokutorera zvinhu zvose zvawakashandira. Vachakusiya usina kupfeka wakashama, uye kunyadzisa kwoufeve hwako kuchaiswa pachena. Unzenza hwako nokupata kwako" 
Ezekiel23:30 zvakaisa izvi pamusoro pako, nokuti iwe wakachiva ndudzi ndokuzvisvibisa nezvifananidzo zvadzo." 
Ezekiel23:31 Wakafamba nenzira yomunun'una wako; saka ndichaisa mukombe wake muruoko rwako. 
Ezekiel23:32 “Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha: Uchanwa mukombe womukoma wako, mukombe mukuru wakadzika; uchakuvigira kusekwa nokumhurwa, nokuti une zvakawanda." 
Ezekiel23:33 Uchazadzwa nokudhakwa nokusuwa, mukombe wokuparadza nokuputsa, mukombe womukoma wako Samaria." 
Ezekiel23:34 Uchanwa zvokupedza kuti tsvai; uchauputsa ukava zvaenga uye uchacheka mazamu ako. Ndini ndazvitaura, ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel23:35 “Naizvozvo zvanzi naIshe Jehovha: Sezvo wakandikanganwa ukandirashira shure kwako, unofanira kuzvitakurira matambudziko ounzenza hwako noufeve hwako.”" 
Ezekiel23:36 Jehovha akati kwandiri, “Mwanakomana womunhu unganditongerewo Ohora naOhoribha here? Ipapo uvazivise zvinonyangadza zvavanoita," 
Ezekiel23:37 nokuti vakaita ufeve uye ropa riri mumaoko avo. Vakaita ufeve nezvifananidzo zvavo; vakasvika pakubayira vana vavo, vavakandiberekera ini, kuti zvive zvokudya zvavo." 
Ezekiel23:38 Vakaitawo izvi kwandiri: Panguva imwe cheteyo vakasvibisa nzvimbo yangu tsvene vakasvibisa maSabata angu. 
Ezekiel23:39 Pazuva ravakabayira vana vavo, kuzvifananidzo zvavo, vakapinda munzvimbo yangu tsvene vakaisvibisa. Ndizvo zvavakaita mumba mangu." 
Ezekiel23:40 “Vakatuma kunyange nenhume kundodana varume uye pavakasvika iwe wakazvishambidza nokuda kwavo, ukazodza meso ako ndokuzvishongedza noukomba." 
Ezekiel23:41 Wakagara panhoo yakaisvonaka ine tafura yakagadzikwa pamberi payo pawakanga wakaisa zvinonhuwira namafuta akanga ari angu. 
Ezekiel23:42 “Mheremhere yavanhu vakanga vasina hanya yakanga yakamukomberedza: VaSabhea vakaunzwa kubva kugwenga pamwe chete navarume vaibva pamhomho yavanhu vezhowezhowe, uye vakashongedza mabhenguro mumaoko omukadzi nomunun'una wake nekorona dzakaisvonaka pamisoro yavo." 
Ezekiel23:43 Ipapo ndakati pamusoro paiye akanga apera noufeve, ‘Zvino ngavamushandise sechifeve, nokuti ndizvo zvaari.’" 
Ezekiel23:44 Ipapo vakavata naye. Sokuvata kunoita varume nechifeve, saizvozvo vakavata navakadzi nzenza, ivo vana Ohora naOhoribha." 
Ezekiel23:45 Asi vanhu vakarurama vachavatonga nechirango chinopiwa vakadzi vanoita ufeve nokuteura ropa, nokuti ivo zvifeve uye ropa riri pamaoko avo." 
Ezekiel23:46 “Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha: Uyai neboka ravarwi vazovarwisa muvatyise nokuvapamba. 
Ezekiel23:47 Mhomho ichavatema namabwe nokuvabaya neminondo; vachauraya vanakomana vavo navanasikana vavo vagopisa dzimba dzavo. 
Ezekiel23:48 “Saka ndichagumisa unzenza panyika, kuti vakadzi vose vayambirwe vagorega kutevedzera." 
Ezekiel23:49 Ucharangwa nokuda kwounzenza hwako uye uchatakura mubayiro wezvivi zvokufeva kwako. Ipapo uchaziva kuti ndini Ishe Jehovha.” 
Ezekiel24:1 Mugore rechipfumbamwe, nomwedzi wegumi pazuva regumi, shoko raJehovha rakasvika kwandiri richiti," 
Ezekiel24:2 “Mwanakomana womunhu, nyora zita rezuva iri, zuva iro rino chairo, nokuti mambo weBhabhironi akomba Jerusarema pazuva irori." 
Ezekiel24:3 Taurira imba yokumukira iyi mufananidzo, uti kwavari, ‘Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, “ ‘Gadza hadyana; igadze ugodira mvura mairi." 
Ezekiel24:4 Uise mairi nhindi dzenyama, nhindi dzakanaka, gumbo nebandauko. Uizadze namapfupa akaisvonaka aya;" 
Ezekiel24:5 utore gwai rakasanangurwa. Uise huni pasi payo kuitira mapfupa; uivirise ugobika mapfupa imomo. 
Ezekiel24:6 “ ‘Nokuti zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, “ ‘Rine nhamo guta rinoteura ropa, nehadyana ine ngura, mukati mayo, ine ngura isingabvi. Budisai nhindi imwe neimwe musingakandi mijenya nokuda kwadzo." 
Ezekiel24:7 “ ‘Nokuti ropa rarakateura riri pakati paro: Rakaridururira paruware pasina chinhu; harina kuriteurira pavhu, paringafukidzwa neguruva." 
Ezekiel24:8 Kuti ndimutse hasha dzangu ndigotsiva ndakaisa ropa raro paruware pasina chinhu kuti rirege kufukidzwa. 
Ezekiel24:9 “ ‘Naizvozvo zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, “ ‘Rine nhamo guta rinoteura ropa! Neniwo, ndichaunganidza huni dzakawanda." 
Ezekiel24:10 Saka tutira huni ugobatidza moto. Ubike nyama zvakanaka, uchisanganisa nezvinonhuwira; uye urege mapfupa atsve." 
Ezekiel24:11 Ipapo ugoisa hadyana isina chinhu pamazimbe kusvikira yapisa ndarira yayo yan'aima kuti kusachena kwayo kunyauke uye tsvina yayo itsve yose. 
Ezekiel24:12 Zvakunda kushingaira kwangu kwose; tsvina yayo zhinji haina kubviswa, kunyange nomoto chaiwo." 
Ezekiel24:13 “ ‘Zvino kusachena kwako ndihwo unzenza hwako. Nokuti ndakaedza kukunatsa asi hauna kunatswa pakusachena kwako, hauchazonatswizve kusvikira hasha dzangu dzabva pamusoro pako." 
Ezekiel24:14 “ ‘Ini Jehovha ndakazvitaura. Nguva yangu yokuzviita yasvika. Handingaregi; handiganzwiri ngoni, uye handingazvidembi. Uchatongwa zvakafanira mabasa ako namafambiro ako, ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha.’ ”" 
Ezekiel24:15 Shoko raJehovha rakasvika kwandiri richiti," 
Ezekiel24:16 “Mwanakomana womunhu, ndava kuzokutorera uyo anofadza meso ako kamwe chete. Asi usaungudza kana kuchema kana kubudisa misodzi." 
Ezekiel24:17 Gomera chinyararire; usachema akafa. Gara wakasunga ngowani yako zvakasimba uye neshangu dziri mumakumbo ako; urege kufumbira zasi kwouso hwako kana kudya zvokudya zvavanochema.” 
Ezekiel24:18 Saka mangwanani ndakataura kuvanhu, uye mukadzi wangu akafa madekwana. Fume mangwana, ndakaita zvandakanga ndarayirwa." 
Ezekiel24:19 Ipapo vanhu vakandibvunza vachiti, “Haungatiudzi kuti zvinhu izvi zvinorevei kwatiri here?”" 
Ezekiel24:20 Saka ndakati kwavari, “Shoko raJehovha rakasvika kwandiri richiti," 
Ezekiel24:21 Uti kuimba yaIsraeri, ‘Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha: Ndava pedyo nokusvibisa nzvimbo yangu tsvene, iyo nhare yamunozvirumbidza nayo, iwo mufaro wamaziso enyu, nechinhu chamunoda. Vanakomana navanasikana vamakasiya vachaurayiwa nomunondo." 
Ezekiel24:22 Uye imi muchaita sezvandakaita. Hamungazofumbiri zasi kwezviso zvenyu kana kudya zvokudya zvavanochema. 
Ezekiel24:23 Mucharega ngowani dzenyu dziri mumisoro yenyu neshangu dziri mumakumbo enyu. Hamungaungudzi kana kuchema asi muchaonda nokuda kwezvivi zvenyu uye muchagomera pakati penyu. 
Ezekiel24:24 Ezekieri achava chiratidzo kwamuri; muchaita sezvaakaita. Panoitika izvi, imi muchaziva kuti ndini Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel24:25 “Uye iwe, mwanakomana womunhu, pazuva randichavatorera nhare dzavo mufaro wavo nokukudzwa kwavo, mufaro wamaziso avo, chishuvo chemwoyo yavo, uye vanakomana navanasikana vavowo." 
Ezekiel24:26 Pazuva iro mutizi achauya kuzokuudza nhau. 
Ezekiel24:27 Panguva iyoyo muromo wako uchazaruka; uchataura naye uye hauchazonyararizve. Saka iwe uchava chiratidzo kwavari, uye vachaziva kuti ndini Jehovha.”" 
Ezekiel25:1 Shoko raJehovha rakasvika kwandiri richiti," 
Ezekiel25:2 “Mwanakomana womunhu, ringira chiso chako pamusoro pavaAmoni uprofite pamusoro pavo." 
Ezekiel25:3 Uti kwavari, ‘Inzwai shoko raIshe Jehovha. Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha: Nokuda kwokuti imi makati, “Toko waro!” pamusoro penzvimbo yangu tsvene panguva yayakasvibiswa napamusoro penyika yeIsraeri payakaparadzwa, napamusoro pavanhu veJudha pavakaenda kuutapwa," 
Ezekiel25:4 naizvozvo ndichakuisai kuvanhu vokuMabvazuva kuti muve vavo. Vachadzika misasa yavo nokumisa matende avo pakati penyu; vachadya michero yenyu nokunwa mukaka wenyu. 
Ezekiel25:5 Ndichashandura Rabha rikava mafuro engamera uye Amoni kuti ive nzvimbo inozororera makwai. Ipapo muchaziva kuti ndini Jehovha. 
Ezekiel25:6 Nokuti zvanzi naIshe Jehovha: Nokuda kwokuti makauchira maoko enyu mukadzana-dzana netsoka dzenyu muchifara noruvengo rwose rwemwoyo yenyu rwamunovenga narwo nyika yeIsraeri," 
Ezekiel25:7 naizvozvo ndichatambanudza ruoko rwangu pamusoro penyu ndigokupai kuti mupambwe nendudzi. Ndichakubvisai chose kubva kundudzi nokukupedzai munyika dzose. Ndichakuparadzai; uye muchaziva kuti ndini Jehovha.’ ” 
Ezekiel25:8 “Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ‘Nokuda kwokuti Moabhu neSeiri vakati, “Tarirai, imba yaJudha yafanana nedzimwe ndudzi,”" 
Ezekiel25:9 naizvozvo ndichaisa pachena rutivi rwaMoabhu, kutangira pamavambo maguta okumuganhu anoti Bheti Jeshimoti, Bhaari Meoni neKiriataimi iko kukudzwa kwenyika iyoyo." 
Ezekiel25:10 Ndichapa Moabhu pamwe chete navaAmoni kuvanhu vokuMabvazuva kuti vave vavo, kuti vaAmoni varege kuzorangarirwa pakati pendudzi;" 
Ezekiel25:11 uye ndicharanga Moabhu. Ipapo vachaziva kuti ndini Jehovha.’ ” 
Ezekiel25:12 “Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ‘Nokuda kwokuti Edhomu akatsiva pamusoro peimba yaJudha vakava nemhosva huru pakuita izvozvo," 
Ezekiel25:13 naizvozvo zvanzi naIshe Jehovha: Ndichatambanudza ruoko rwangu pamusoro peEdhomu ndigouraya vanhu vose varo nezvipfuwo zvavo. Ndichariparadza uye kubva kuTemani kusvika kuDhedhani vachaurayiwa nomunondo. 
Ezekiel25:14 Ndichatsiva Edhomu noruoko rwavanhu vangu, uye vachaitira Edhomu zvakafanira kutsamwa kwangu nehasha dzangu; vachaziva kutsiva kwangu, ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha.’ ”" 
Ezekiel25:15 “Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, ‘Nokuda kwokuti vaFiristia vakazvitsivira vakatsiva noruvengo mumwoyo yavo, uye noruvengo rwamakore namakore vakatsvaka kuparadza Judha," 
Ezekiel25:16 naizvozvo zvanzi naIshe Jehovha: Ndava pedyo nokutambanudza ruoko rwangu pamusoro pavaFiristia, uye ndichauraya vaKereti ndigoparadza vaya vakasara pamhenderekedzo." 
Ezekiel25:17 Ndichatsiva nokutsiva kukuru pamusoro pavo uye ndichavaranga muhasha dzangu. Ipapo vachaziva kuti ndini Jehovha, pandichatsiva pamusoro pavo.’ ”" 
Ezekiel26:1 Mugore regumi nerimwe, pazuva rokutanga romwedzi, shoko raJehovha rakasvika kwandiri richiti," 
Ezekiel26:2 “Mwanakomana womunhu, nokuda kwokuti Tire yakati kuJerusarema, ‘Toko waro! Suo rokundudzi raputsika, uye makonhi aro azarukira kwandiri; zvino zvarava dongo ini ndichabudirira," 
Ezekiel26:3 naizvozvo zvanzi naIshe Jehovha: Ndiri kukurwisa, iwe Tire, uye ndichauyisa marudzi mazhinji kuti azorwa newe, segungwa rinorasa mafungu aro." 
Ezekiel26:4 Vachaparadza masvingo eTire nokuondomora shongwe dzaro; ndichatsvairira marara aro kure ndigoriita dombo risina chinhu. 
Ezekiel26:5 Richava nzvimbo yokuruka mimbure yehove kugungwa ikoko, nokuti ndakazvitaura, ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha. Richava chinhu chinopambwa chendudzi," 
Ezekiel26:6 uye ugaro hwaro hwokumaruwa huchaparadzwa nomunondo. Ipapo vachaziva kuti ndini Jehovha. 
Ezekiel26:7 “Nokuti zvanzi naIshe Jehovha: Ndichauyisira Tire Nebhukadhinezari mambo weBhabhironi, mambo wamadzimambo, achibva nechokumusoro, ana mabhiza nengoro, navatasvi vamabhiza nehondo huru." 
Ezekiel26:8 Iye achaparadza ugaro hwamaruwa ako nomunondo, achakuvakira nhare dzokurwa newe, uye achavaka mirwi yokurwa pamasvingo ako agosimudza nhoo dzokukurwisa nadzo." 
Ezekiel26:9 Achatuma zvokugumura pamasvingo ako agokoromora shongwe dzako nezvombo zvake. 
Ezekiel26:10 Mabhiza ake achawanda kwazvo zvokuti muchafukidzwa neguruva rawo. Masvingo ako achadengenyeka nomubvumo wamabhiza ehondo, nengoro dzamavhiri mana nengoro dzamavhiri maviri paanenge achipinda pamasuo ako somunhu anopinda muguta rina masvingo akaondomoka." 
Ezekiel26:11 Mahwanda amabhiza ake achatsika-tsika nzira dzako dzomumisha dzose; achauraya vanhu vako nomunondo, uye mbiru dzako dzakasimba dzichawira pasi." 
Ezekiel26:12 Vachapamba pfuma yako uye vachaba zvaunotengesa: vachakoromorera pasi masvingo ako uye vachaputsa dzimba dzako dzakaisvonaka nokurasa matombo ako nematanda namarara ako mukati megungwa. 
Ezekiel26:13 Ndichagumisa mheremhere yenziyo dzako, nokurira kwembira dzako hakuchazonzwikwizve." 
Ezekiel26:14 Ndichakuita dombo risina chinhu, uye uchava nzvimbo yokuyanika mimbure yehove. Hauchazovakwizve, nokuti ini Jehovha ndakazvitaura, ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel26:15 “Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha kuTire: Ko, zviwi hazvichadengenyeki here pakunzwa mubvumo wokuwa kwako, vakakuvadzwa pavanenge vachigomera uye kuuraya kuchiitika mauri here?" 
Ezekiel26:16 Ipapo machinda ose omuzviwi achaburuka pazvigaro zvawo zvoushe vagoisa nhumbi dzavo dzoushe parutivi uye vagobvisa vachidedera nguva dzose, vashamiswa newe." 
Ezekiel26:17 Ipapo vachaita mariro pamusoro pako vagoti kwauri: “ ‘Wakaparadzwa sei, iwe guta romukurumbira, wakanga uzere navanhu vomugungwa! Wakanga uri simba pamusoro pamakungwa, iwe navanhu vako; wakaisa kutya kwako pamusoro pavo vose vaigara ikoko." 
Ezekiel26:18 Zvino zviwi zvinodengenyeka pazuva rokuwa kwako; zviwi zviri mugungwa zvavhundutswa nokuwa kwako.’ 
Ezekiel26:19 “Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha: Pandichaita kuti guta rako rive dongo, samamwe maguta asingachagarwi uye pandinouyisa kudzika kwegungwa pamusoro pako uye mvura zhinji dzaro dzikakufukidza," 
Ezekiel26:20 ipapo ndichakuburutsa pamwe chete navaya vanoburukira kugomba, kuvanhu vakarekare." 
Ezekiel26:21 Ndichakusvitsa kumagumo anotyisa uye hauchazovepozve. Uchatsvakwa, asi haungawanikwizve, ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha.”" 
Ezekiel27:1 Shoko raJehovha rakasvika kwandiri richiti," 
Ezekiel27:2 “Mwanakomana womunhu, ita mariro pamusoro peTire." 
Ezekiel27:3 Uti kuTire, riri pamusoro unopinda kugungwa, mushambadziri wavanhu vamarudzi ose pazviwi zvizhinji, “Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, “ ‘Unoti, iwe Tire, “Ini ndakakwana parunako.”" 
Ezekiel27:4 Simba rako rakanga riri pamakungwa makuru; vavaki vako vakaita kuti runako rwako rusvike pakukwana. 
Ezekiel27:5 Vakaita mapuranga ako ose emiti yemipaini inobva kuSeniri; vakatora musidhari waibva kuRebhanoni, kuti vakuitirei danda rokutsigira maseiri muchikepe." 
Ezekiel27:6 Vakaita matanda okukwasva nawo omuouki aibva kuBhashani; namapuranga omusipuresi aibva kuzviwi zveSaipurasi vakaita uriri hwako namapuranga, ane nyanga dzenzou mukati." 
Ezekiel27:7 Maseiri ako akanga ari omucheka wakaisvonaka wakarukwa waibva kuIjipiti, uye wakashandiswa somureza wako; zvifukidzo zvako zvamatende zvakanga zviri bhuruu nepepuru, zvaibva kuzviwi zveErisha." 
Ezekiel27:8 Varume veSidhoni neArivhadhi ndivo vakanga vari vakwasvi vako; mhizha dzako, iwe Tire dzakanga dzirimo savafambisi vako vechikepe." 
Ezekiel27:9 Mhare dzoumhizha dzeGebhari vakanga varimo, savavaki vechikepe kuti vagadzirire vakwasvi vako. Zvikepe zvose zvegungwa navafambisi vazvo vakauya kuzotengeserana newe zvawakagadzira." 
Ezekiel27:10 “ ‘Vanhu vokuPezhia, neRidhia nePuti vakashanda savarwi muhondo yako. Vakarembedza nhoo dzavo nenguwani pamasvingo ako, vachikuvigira mbiri." 
Ezekiel27:11 Vanhu vokuArivhadhi nevokuHereki vakakomba masvingo ako kumativi ose; vanhu vokuGamadhi vakanga vari mushongwe dzako. Vakaturika nhoo dzavo pamasvingo ako; vakaita kuti runako rwako rukwane. 
Ezekiel27:12 “ ‘Tashishi yakatengeserana newe nokuda kwepfuma yako huru yenhumbi; vakatsinhanisa sirivha, nesimbi, netini nedare zvokushambadzira zvako." 
Ezekiel27:13 “ ‘Girisi, Tubhari neMesheki dzakatengeserana newe; vakatsinhanisa nhapwa nezvinhu zvendarira zvezvigadzirwa zvako." 
Ezekiel27:14 “ ‘Varume veBheti Togarima vakatsinhanhisa mabhiza ebasa namabhiza ehondo namanyurusi kuti uzvishambadzire. 
Ezekiel27:15 “ ‘Varume vokuRodhe vakatengeserana newe, uye zviwi zvizhinji zvakanga zviri nzvimbo dzako dzokutengesera; vaikuripira nenyanga dzenzou nomuti womuvanga." 
Ezekiel27:16 “ ‘Aramu yakatengeserana newe nokuda kwezvibereko zvako zvizhinji; vakatsinhanisa matombo eturikoise nemicheka yepepuru, nezvakarukwa, nemicheka yakaisvonaka, nekorari namatombo amarubhi zvokutengesa zvako." 
Ezekiel27:17 “ ‘Judha neIsraeri vakatengeserana newe, vakatsinhanisa gorosi neMiniti nezvinotapira, nouchi, namafuta nebhasami nezvigadzirwa zvako." 
Ezekiel27:18 “ ‘Dhamasiko, rakatengeserana newe nokuda kwezvigadzirwa zvako zvizhinji nepfuma yenhumbi newaini yaibva kuHeribhoni newuru yaibva kuZahari." 
Ezekiel27:19 “ ‘VaDhani navaGiriki vaibva kuUzari vakatenga zvawaishambadzira; vakatsinhanisa simbi yakabikwa, nekasia, nekaramo zvigadzirwa zvako." 
Ezekiel27:20 “ ‘Dhedhani akatengeserana newe machira okugarira pamabhiza. 
Ezekiel27:21 “ ‘Arabhia namachinda ose eKedhari vakanga vachikutengera; vakatengeserana newe namakwayana, namakondohwe nembudzi." 
Ezekiel27:22 “ ‘Vashambadziri vokuShebha neRama vakatengeserana newe; pane zvawaishambadzira iwe ivo vakatsinhanisa namarudzi ezvinonhuwira ose uye namabwe anokosha, negoridhe." 
Ezekiel27:23 “ ‘Harani, neKane neEdheni navashambadziri vokuShebha, Ashuri neKirimadhi vakatengesarana newe." 
Ezekiel27:24 Vakatengeserana newe munzvimbo dzokutengesera nguo dzakaisvonaka, dzemicheka yebhuruu, nezvakarukwa, namachira amavara namabote akakoswa uye ana mafundo akasimba." 
Ezekiel27:25 “ ‘Zvikepe zveTashishi zvakashanda pakutakura zvigadzirwa zvako. Iwe wakazadzwa nezvitakurwa zvinorema, ipo pamwoyo wegungwa." 
Ezekiel27:26 Vakwasvi vako vanokutora voenda newe kumakungwa makuru. Asi mhepo yokumabvazuva ichakuputsa-putsa mumwoyo megungwa chaimo. 
Ezekiel27:27 Pfuma yako, nenhumbi dzokutengesa nezvakagadzirwa, varairi navafambisi vako vezvikepe navagadziri vazvo, vashambadziri vako nevarwi vako vose, uye vose varimo vachanyura pakati pomwoyo wegungwa, pazuva rokuparadzwa kwechikepe chako." 
Ezekiel27:28 Nyika dzokumahombekombe dzichadengenyeka nokudanidzira kwavafambisi vako vezvikepe. 
Ezekiel27:29 Vose vanobata matanda okukwasva vachasiya zvikepe zvavo; vachairi nevafambisi vako vezvikepe vachandomira kumahombekombe. 
Ezekiel27:30 Vachadanidzira namanzwi avo vagochema zvikuru pamusoro pako; vachakushira guruva pamisoro yavo vagoumburuka mumadota. 
Ezekiel27:31 Vachaveura misoro yavo nokuda kwako, uye vachapfeka nguo dzamasaga. Vachachema pamusoro pako nokurwadza kwomwoyo, uye nokuchema kukuru." 
Ezekiel27:32 Pavanoungudza nokuchema pamusoro pako, vachaita mariro pamusoro pako vachiti, “Ndianiko akashaya rokureva seTire, rakakomberedzwa negungwa?”" 
Ezekiel27:33 Pakabuda vashambadziri vako vachienda kugungwa, wakagutisa ndudzi zhinji, nepfuma yako huru uye nenhumbi dzako, wakapfumisa madzimambo enyika." 
Ezekiel27:34 Zvino wakaputsanyiwa negungwa mumvura zhinji yakadzika; nhumbi dzako navanhu vako vose zvakanyura pamwe chete newe. 
Ezekiel27:35 Vose vanogara muzviwi vanoshamiswa pamusoro pako; madzimambo avo anodedera nokutya, uye zviso zvavo zvakanganiswa nokutya." 
Ezekiel27:36 Vashambadziri vari pakati pendudzi vanokuridzira muridzo; wasvika pamagumo anonyangadza uye hauchazovapozve.’ ” 
Ezekiel28:1 Shoko raJehovha rakasvika kwandiri richiti," 
Ezekiel28:2 “Mwanakomana womunhu, uti kumubati weTire, ‘Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, “ ‘Mukuzvikudza kwomwoyo wako iwe wakati, “Ini ndiri mwari; ndinogara pachigaro choushe chamwari, pakati pomwoyo wamakungwa.” Asi uri munhu zvako uye hauzi mwari, kunyange uchifunga kuti wakachenjera samwari." 
Ezekiel28:3 Ko, iwe wakachenjera kukunda Dhanieri here? Ko, hauna chakavanzika chausingazivi here?" 
Ezekiel28:4 Wakazviwanira pfuma nouchenjeri hwako nokunzwisisa kwako, uye wakazviunganidzira goridhe nesirivha muzvivigiro zvepfuma yako." 
Ezekiel28:5 Wakawanza pfuma yako nouchenjeri hwako hwokutengesa, uye nokuda kwepfuma yako mwoyo wako wakazvikudza." 
Ezekiel28:6 “ ‘Naizvozvo zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, “ ‘Nokuda kwokuti unofunga kuti wakangwara, sokungwara kwamwari," 
Ezekiel28:7 ndava kuzouyisa vatorwa kuti vazokurwisa, rudzi rwakaipisisa pakati pendudzi dzose, vachavhomora minondo yavo kuti varwise kunaka nokuchenjera kwako, vagosvibisa kupenya kwokubwinya kwako." 
Ezekiel28:8 Vachakuburutsira kugomba, uye uchafa rufu runorwadza pakati pomwoyo wamakungwa." 
Ezekiel28:9 Ipapo uchati here, “Ndiri mwari,” pamberi pavanokuuraya? Uchava munhu chete, kwete mwari, mumaoko aivo vanokuuraya." 
Ezekiel28:10 Uchafa rufu rwomunhu asina kudzingiswa pamaoko avatorwa. Ndazvitaura, ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha.’ ”" 
Ezekiel28:11 Shoko raJehovha rakasvika kwandiri richiti," 
Ezekiel28:12 “Mwanakomana womunhu, itira mambo weTire mariro ugoti kwaari, ‘Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, “ ‘Iwe wakanga uri muenzaniso wokukwana, uzere nouchenjeri wakakwana parunako." 
Ezekiel28:13 Wakanga uri muEdheni, bindu raMwari; wakashongedzwa namatombo ose anokosha anoti: rubhi, tapazi neemeraridhi, krisorite, onikisi, jasipa, safuri, turikoise nebheriri. Urongwa nezvitsigiro zvako zvakanga zvakagadzirwa negoridhe; zvakagadzirwa pazuva rokusikwa kwako." 
Ezekiel28:14 Iwe wakazodzwa sekerubhi rinorinda, nokuda kwaizvozvo ndakakugadza. Wakanga uri pamusoro pegomo dzvene raMwari; wakanga uchifamba pakati pamabwe omoto." 
Ezekiel28:15 Wakanga usina chaungapomerwa panzira dzako, kubva pazuva rawakasikwa kusvikira kuipa pakwazowanikwa mauri." 
Ezekiel28:16 Nokuwanda kwokushambadzira kwako wakabva wazara nechisimba, ndokubva watadza. Saka ndakakudzinga mukunyadziswa kubva pagomo raMwari, uye ndakakudzinga, iwe kerubhi rokurinda, kuti ubve pakati pamabwe omoto." 
Ezekiel28:17 Mwoyo wako wakazvikudza nokuda kworunako rwako, uye wakaodza uchenjeri hwako nokuda kwokubwinya kwako. Saka ndakakukandira kunyika; ndakakuita chinhu chinosekwa pamberi pamadzimambo." 
Ezekiel28:18 Nokuda kwokuwanda kwezvivi zvako, uye nokubiridzira kwako mukushambadzira, wakazvidza nzvimbo dzako tsvene. Saka ndakabudisa moto mukati mako, ukakuparadza, uye ndakakupisa kusvikira wava madota panyika, pamberi pavose vaikuona." 
Ezekiel28:19 Ndudzi dzose dzinokuziva dzinoshamiswa newe; wasvika pamagumo akaipisisa uye hauchazovapozve.’ ” 
Ezekiel28:20 Shoko raJehovha rakasvika kwandiri richiti," 
Ezekiel28:21 “Mwanakomana womunhu, rinzira chiso chako pamusoro peSidhoni; uprofite pamusoro paro," 
Ezekiel28:22 uti, ‘Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, “Ndine mhaka newe, iwe Sidhoni, uye ndichazviwanira kukudzwa mukati mako. Vachaziva kuti ndini Jehovha, pandichariranga nokuzviratidza kuti ndiri mutsvene mariri." 
Ezekiel28:23 Ndichatuma denda pamusoro paro uye ndichaita kuti ropa riyerere munzira dzaro. Vakaurayiwa vachawira mariri, nomunondo uchirirwisa kumativi ose. Ipapo vachaziva kuti ndini Jehovha." 
Ezekiel28:24 “ ‘Vanhu veIsraeri havachazovizve navavakidzani vanovagodora vachivarwadzisa sorukato runopinza. Ipapo vachaziva kuti ndini Ishe Jehovha. 
Ezekiel28:25 “ ‘Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha: Pandinounganidza vanhu veIsraeri kubva kundudzi kwavakanga vakaparadzirwa, ndichazviratidza kuti ndiri mutsvene pakati pavo pamberi pendudzi. Ipapo vachagara munyika yavo pachavo, yandakapa muranda wangu Jakobho." 
Ezekiel28:26 Vachagaramo norugare uye vachavaka dzimba nokusima minda yemizambiringa; vachagara norugare pandicharanga vavakidzani vavo vose vanovagodora. Ipapo vachaziva kuti ndini Jehovha Mwari wavo.’ ” 
Ezekiel29:1 Mugore regumi, mumwedzi wegumi pazuva regumi namaviri, shoko raJehovha rakasvika kwandiri richiti," 
Ezekiel29:2 “Mwanakomana womunhu, rinzira chiso chako pamusoro paFaro mambo weIjipiti." 
Ezekiel29:3 Taura kwaari kuti, ‘Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, “ ‘Ndine mhaka newe, iwe Faro mambo weIjipiti, iyewe shato huru uvete pakati pehova dzako. Iwe unoti, “Nairi ndorwangu; ndakazvigadzirira pachangu.”" 
Ezekiel29:4 Asi ndichaisa zvikokovono mushaya dzako, uye ndichaita kuti hove dzomuhova dzako dzinamatire pamakwati ako. Ndichakukwevera kunze ubve pakati pehova dzako, nehove dzose dzakanamatira pamakwati ako." 
Ezekiel29:5 Ndichakusiya mugwenga, iwe nehove dzose dzomuhova dzako. Uchawira pasi pabani pachena zvapo, uye haungaunganidzwi kana kunongwa. Ndichakupa sechokudya kuzvikara zvenyika neshiri dzedenga." 
Ezekiel29:6 Ipapo vose vagere muIjipiti vachaziva kuti ndini Jehovha. “ ‘Wakanga uri tsvimbo yorutsanga kuimba yaIsraeri. 
Ezekiel29:7 Vakati vachikubata namaoko avo, iwe ukatsemuka uye ukabvarura mapfudzi avo; pavakasendamira pauri, wakavhunika misana yavo ndokuminama." 
Ezekiel29:8 “ ‘Naizvozvo zvanzi naIshe Jehovha: Ndichauyisa munondo kuzokurwisa nokuuraya vanhu vako nezvipfuwo zvavo. 
Ezekiel29:9 Ijipiti richava dongo rakaparadzwa. Ipapo vachaziva kuti ndini Jehovha. “ ‘Nemhaka yokuti iwe wakati, “Nairi ndorwangu; ndini ndakaruita,”" 
Ezekiel29:10 naizvozvo ndine mhaka newe nehova dzako, uye ndichaita kuti nyika yeIjipiti iparadzwe uye ive dongo kubva kuMigidhori kusvikira kuAswani, kundosvika kumuganhu weEtiopia." 
Ezekiel29:11 Hakuna rutsoka kana rwemhuka ruchapfuura nomo; hakuna achagaramo kwamakore makumi mana. 
Ezekiel29:12 Nyika yeIjipiti ndichaiita dongo pakati penyika dzakaparadzwa, uye maguta ayo achava matongo kwamakore makumi mana pakati pamaguta akaitwa matongo. Uye ndichaparadzira vaIjipita pakati pendudzi nokuvadzingira munyika dzose." 
Ezekiel29:13 “Asi zvanzi naIshe Jehovha: Mushure mamakore makumi mana ndichaunganidza vaIjipita kubva kundudzi dzandakanga ndavadzingira. 
Ezekiel29:14 Ndichavadzosa kubva kuutapwa ndigovadzosera kunyika yePatirosi, nyika yamadzitateguru avo. Vachava ushe hwakazvidzwa ikoko." 
Ezekiel29:15 Huchava ushe hwakazvidzika chose uye hahuchazozvisimudzirizve pamusoro pedzimwe ndudzi. 
Ezekiel29:16 Ijipiti haichazombovizve chivimbo chavanhu veIsraeri asi ichava chirangaridzo chechivi chavo chokucheukira kwairi kuti vabatsirwe. Ipapo vachaziva kuti ndini Ishe Jehovha.’ ” 
Ezekiel29:17 Mugore ramakumi maviri namanomwe, nomwedzi wokutanga pazuva rokutanga, shoko rakasvika kwandiri richiti," 
Ezekiel29:18 “Mwanakomana womunhu, Nebhukadhinezari mambo weBhabhironi akabatisa hondo yake basa guru rokurwa neTire; musoro mumwe nomumwe wakasvuurwa uye pfudzi rimwe nerimwe rakasvotorwa. Kunyange zvakadaro iye nehondo yake havana kuwana mubayiro pamusoro pebasa ravakaita achirwa naro." 
Ezekiel29:19 Naizvozvo zvanzi naIshe Jehovha: Ndiri kuzopa nyika yeIjipiti kuna Nebhukadhinezari mambo weBhabhironi, uye iye achatapa pfuma yayo. Achapamba nokutora nyika somuripo wehondo yake." 
Ezekiel29:20 Ndakamupa Ijipiti somubayiro wokushingaira kwake nokuti iye nehondo yake vakandibatira ini, ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel29:21 “Pazuva iro ndichameresa runyanga rweimba yaIsraeri, uye ndichazarura muromo wako pakati pavo. Ipapo vachaziva kuti ndini Jehovha.”" 
Ezekiel30:1 Shoko raJehovha rakasvika kwandiri richiti," 
Ezekiel30:2 “Mwanakomana womunhu, profita uti, ‘Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha: “ ‘Ungudza uti, “Haiwa, zuva iro!”" 
Ezekiel30:3 Nokuti zuva rava pedyo, zuva raJehovha rava pedyo, zuva ramakore, nguva yokuparadzwa kwendudzi." 
Ezekiel30:4 Munondo uchauya pamusoro peIjipiti, uye kurwadziwa kuchauya pamusoro paEtiopia. Vakaurayiwa pavachawa muIjipiti, pfuma yake ichatakurwa ichienda kure uye nheyo dzayo dzichakoromorwa." 
Ezekiel30:5 Etiopia nePuti, Ridhia neArabhia yose, Ribhiya navanhu venyika yesungano vachaurayiwa nomunondo pamwe chete neIjipiti." 
Ezekiel30:6 “ ‘Zvanzi naJehovha, “ ‘Vanotsigira Ijipiti vachawa uye kuzvikudza kwesimba rayo kuchapera. Kubva kuMigidhori kusvikira kuAswani, vachaurayiwa nomunondo pakati pake, ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel30:7 “ ‘Vachaparadzwa pakati penyika dzakaparadzwa, uye maguta avo achava pakati pamaguta akaitwa matongo." 
Ezekiel30:8 Ipapo vachaziva kuti ndini Jehovha, pandichatungidza moto kuIjipiti uye vabatsiri vayo vose vachaparadzwa." 
Ezekiel30:9 “ ‘Pazuva iro, nhume dzichabva kwandiri dziri muzvikepe kuti dzindotyisidzira Etiopia kuti abve pakuvarairwa kwake. Ucharwadziwa pazuva rokuparadzwa kweIjipiti, nokuti zvirokwazvo rinouya." 
Ezekiel30:10 “ ‘Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, “ ‘Ndichagumisa vanhu vose veIjipiti noruoko rwaNebhukadhinezari mambo weBhabhironi." 
Ezekiel30:11 Iye nehondo yake, rudzi rwakaipisisa pakati pendudzi, achauyisa kuti azoparadza nyika. Vachavhomora minondo yavo kuti varwise Ijipiti, uye vachazadza nyika navakaurayiwa." 
Ezekiel30:12 Ndichaomesa hova dzeNairi, uye ndichatengesa nyika kuvanhu vakaipa; namaoko avatorwa ndichaparadza nyika nezvose zviri mairi. Ini Jehovha ndazvitaura." 
Ezekiel30:13 “ ‘Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, “ ‘Ndichaparadza zvifananidzo nokugumisa mifananidzo yeMemufisi, muIjipiti hamuchazovizve nomuchinda, uye ndichaparadzira kutya munyika yose." 
Ezekiel30:14 Ndichaita kuti Patirosi ive dongo, ndichapisa Zoani, uye ndicharanga Tebhesi." 
Ezekiel30:15 Ndichadururira hasha dzangu pamusoro pePerusiami, iyo nhare yeIjipiti, uye ndichaparadza vanhu vose veTebhesi." 
Ezekiel30:16 Ndichapisa Ijipiti; Perusiami ichazvonyongoka nokurwadziwa. Tebhesi richakukurwa nedutu; Memufisi ichagara iri munhamo. 
Ezekiel30:17 Majaya okuHerioporisi neokuBhubhastisi achaurayiwa nomunondo, uye maguta achatapwa." 
Ezekiel30:18 Rima ndiro richava masikati paTapanhesi, pandichavhuna joko reIjipiti; kuzvikudza kwesimba raro kuchapera ipapo. Richafukidzwa namakore, uye misha yaro ichaenda muutapwa." 
Ezekiel30:19 Saka ndicharanga Ijipiti, uye vachaziva kuti ndini Jehovha.’ ”" 
Ezekiel30:20 Mugore regumi nerimwe, mumwedzi wokutanga pazuva rechinomwe shoko raJehovha rakasvika kwandiri richiti," 
Ezekiel30:21 “Mwanakomana womunhu, ndavhuna ruoko rwaFaro mambo weIjipiti. Haruna kusungwa kuti rupore kana kuiswa chiseketo kuti ruve nesimba rokubata munondo." 
Ezekiel30:22 Naizvozvo zvanzi naIshe Jehovha: Ndine mhaka naFaro mambo weIjipiti. Ndichavhuna maoko ake ose ari maviri, ruoko rwakanaka norwakavhunika, ndigoita kuti munondo uwe kubva muruoko rwake." 
Ezekiel30:23 Ndichaparadzira vaIjipita pakati pendudzi ndigovadzingira munyika dzose. 
Ezekiel30:24 Ndichasimbisa ruoko rwamambo weBhabhironi uye ndichaisa munondo wangu muruoko rwake, asi ndichavhuna maoko aFaro, uye achagomera pamberi pake somunhu akuvadzwa zvokuti achafa." 
Ezekiel30:25 Ndichasimbisa maoko amambo weBhabhironi, asi maoko aFaro acharembera pasi. Ipapo vachaziva kuti ndini Jehovha, pandichaisa munondo muruoko rwamambo weBhabhironi agouvheyesa kuti arwise Ijipiti." 
Ezekiel30:26 Ndichaparadzira vaIjipiti pakati pendudzi ndigovadzingira munyika dzose. Ipapo vachaziva kuti ndini Jehovha.” 
Ezekiel31:1 Mugore regumi nerimwe, mumwedzi wechitatu pazuva rokutanga, shoko raJehovha rakasvika kwandiri richiti," 
Ezekiel31:2 “Mwanakomana womunhu, uti kuna Faro mambo weIjipiti navanhu vake vose: “ ‘Ndianiko angaenzaniswa newe paushe?" 
Ezekiel31:3 Rangarira Asiria, yaimbova musidhari muRebhanoni, wakanga una matavi akaisvonaka akanga akafukidzira dondo; wakareba kwazvo, munhengenya wawo uri pamusoro pamashizha akapfumvutira." 
Ezekiel31:4 Mvura zhinji yakaukwira, zvitubu zvakadzika zvakaita kuti urebe, hova dzazvo dzakayerera dzichipoteredza hunde yacho, uye dzinotumira mironga yadzo kumiti yose yesango." 
Ezekiel31:5 Saka wakareba kwazvo kupfuura miti yose yesango, mativi awo akawanda uye matavi awo akareba, achitandavara nokuda kwemvura zhinji." 
Ezekiel31:6 Shiri dzose dzedenga dzakavakira matendere adzo pamatavi awo, mhuka dzose dzesango dzakaberekera pasi pamatavi awo; ndudzi dzose huru dzakagara pamumvuri wawo." 
Ezekiel31:7 Wakanga uchiyevedza parunako, namatavi awo akatandavara, nokuti midzi yawo yaidzika pasi kune mvura zhinji." 
Ezekiel31:8 Misidhari yomubindu raMwari yakanga isingagoni kuukunda, uye miti yomupaini yakanga isingaenzani namatavi awo, uye miti yemipaini hayaienzaniswa namatavi awo, hakuna muti mubindu raMwari waienzana nawo pakunaka." 
Ezekiel31:9 Ndakaita kuti uve unoyevedza una matavi akawanda, zvikagodora miti yose yomuEdheni mubindu raMwari." 
Ezekiel31:10 “ ‘Naizvozvo zvanzi naIshe Jehovha: Nemhaka yokuti wakareba kwazvo, uchisimudzira manhengenya awo pamatavi akapfumvutira, uye nemhaka yokuti wakazvikudza nokuda kwokureba kwawo," 
Ezekiel31:11 ndakauisa kumutongi wendudzi, kuti vamuitire zvakafanira kuipa kwawo. Ndakaukanda padivi," 
Ezekiel31:12 uye rudzi rwakaipisisa kundudzi dzavatorwa rwakautemera pasi ndokuusiya. Matavi awo akawira pamakomo nomumipata yose; matavi awo ose akavhunira muhova dzose dzenyika. Ndudzi dzose dzomunyika dzakabva pasi pomumvuri wawo dzikausiya. 
Ezekiel31:13 Shiri dzose dzedenga dzakamhara pamuti wakawa, uye mhuka dzose dzenyika dzakanga dziri pakati pamatavi awo." 
Ezekiel31:14 Naizvozvo hakuna mimwe miti iri pamvura zhinji ichareba kwazvo ichizvikudza, ichizvisimudzira manhengenya ayo pamusoro pamatavi akapfumvutira. Hakuna mimwe miti inowana mvura yakadai ichazombosvika paurefu hwakadai; yose ichafa, nokuti nyika iri pasi, pakati pavanhu vanofa, navaya vanoburukira kugomba." 
Ezekiel31:15 “ ‘Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha: Pazuva rawakaburusirwa muguva ndakafukidza matsime akadzika kuti aungudze nokuda kwawo ndikamisa hova dzawo, uye mvura yawo zhinji yakadziviswa. Nemhaka yawo ndakafukidza Rebhanoni nokusuwa, uye miti yose yesango yakasvava." 
Ezekiel31:16 Ndakaita kuti ndudzi dzidedere padzakanzwa kuwa kwako pandakuburusira muguva navaya vanoenda mugomba nawo. Ipapo miti yose yemuEdheni, yakasarudzika uye neyakanakisa muRebhanoni, miti yose yakanga ichiwana mvura yakakwana, yakanyaradzwa panyika dzapasi." 
Ezekiel31:17 Vaya vaigara mumumvuri wawo, navaya vavaibatana navo pakati pendudzi, vakanga vaburukirawo muguva nawo, vachiva pamwe navaya vakaurayiwa nomunondo." 
Ezekiel31:18 “ ‘Ndeipiko miti yeEdheni ingaenzaniswa newe pakubwinya noushe? Kunyange zvakadaro, newewo, uchaburutswa pamwe chete nemiti yeEdheni panyika pasi; ucharara pakati pavasina kudzingiswa, navaya vakaurayiwa nomunondo. “ ‘Ndiye Faro navanhu vake vazhinji, ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha.’ ”" 
Ezekiel32:1 Mugore regumi namaviri, nomwedzi wegumi namaviri pazuva rokutanga, shoko raJehovha rakasvika kwandiri richiti," 
Ezekiel32:2 “Mwanakomana womunhu, itira Faro mambo weIjipiti mariro uti kwaari: “ ‘Iwe wakafanana neshumba pakati pendudzi; wakaita seshato mukati mamakungwa uchibvongodzabvongodza mukati mehova dzako, ukabvongodza mvura netsoka dzako uye ukasvibisa hova." 
Ezekiel32:3 “ ‘Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, “ ‘Neboka ravanhu vazhinji ndichakanda mambure angu pamusoro pako, uye vachakukweva mumumbure wangu." 
Ezekiel32:4 Ndichakukanda panyika ndichakurasira pamhene. Ndichamharisa shiri dzose dzedenga pamusoro pako, uye zvikara zvose zvomunyika zvichagutswa newe." 
Ezekiel32:5 Ndichayanika nyama yako pamakomo, ndigozadza mipata nezvitunha zvako." 
Ezekiel32:6 Ndichadiridza nyika neropa rako rinenge richiyerera kusvikira kumakomo, uye nzizi dzichazadzwa nenyama yako." 
Ezekiel32:7 Pandichakudzima, ndichafukidza matenga uye ndichasvibisa nyeredzi; ndichafukidza zuva mugore, uye mwedzi haungabudisi chiedza chawo." 
Ezekiel32:8 Zviedza zvose zvinopenya zvedenga ndichazvidzima pamusoro pako; ndichauyisa rima pamusoro penyika yako, ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel32:9 Ndichatambudza mwoyo yavanhu vazhinji, pandichauyisa kuparadzwa kwako pakati pendudzi, pakati penyika dzausina kumboziva." 
Ezekiel32:10 Ndichaita kuti vanhu vazhinji vashamisike pamusoro pako, uye madzimambo avo achadedera nokutya nokuda kwako, pandichavheyesa munondo wangu pamberi pavo. Pazuva rokuwa kwako mumwe nomumwe wavo achadedera nguva dzose, nokuda kwoupenyu hwake." 
Ezekiel32:11 “ ‘Nokuti zvanzi naIshe Jehovha, “ ‘Munondo wamambo weBhabhironi uchauya kuzokurwisa." 
Ezekiel32:12 Ndichaita kuti vanhu vako vazhinji vave neminondo yavane simba, vanhu vakaipisisa pandudzi dzose. Vachaparadza kuzvikudza kweIjipiti, uye vanhu vayo vazhinji vachakundwa." 
Ezekiel32:13 Ndichaparadza mombe dzayo dzose dziri panhivi dzemvura zhinji, hakuchazovi norutsoka rwomunhu ruchaibvongodza, kana namahwanda emombe achaibvongodza." 
Ezekiel32:14 Ipapo ndichaita kuti mvura yavo igadzikane, uye ndichaita kuti hova dzayo dziyerere samafuta, ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel32:15 Pandichaita Ijipiti kuti ive dongo uye pandichabvisa zvose zviri mairi, pandichauraya vose vanogaramo, ipapo vachaziva kuti ndini Jehovha.’" 
Ezekiel32:16 “Aya ndiwo mariro avachaiimbira. Vanasikana vendudzi vachaimba; nokuda kweIjipiti navanhu vayo vose vazhinji vachaimba, ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha.”" 
Ezekiel32:17 Mugore regumi namaviri, pazuva regumi namashanu romwedzi, shoko raJehovha rakasvika kwandiri richiti," 
Ezekiel32:18 “Mwanakomana womunhu, ungudza nokuda kwavanhu vazhinji veIjipiti uye uvawisire pasi zvose iyo nyika navanasikana vendudzi dzine simba, pamwe chete navaya vanoburukira kugomba." 
Ezekiel32:19 Uti kwavari, ‘Ko, imi munonyanya kudikanwa kupfuura vamwe here? Burukai mundoradzikwa pakati pavasina kudzingiswa.’" 
Ezekiel32:20 Vachava pakati pavakaurayiwa nomunondo. Munondo wavhomorwa; ngaakweverwe kunze pamwe chete navanhu vake vazhinji. 
Ezekiel32:21 Vatungamiri vane simba vari mukati meguva, vachati pamusoro peIjipiti navabatsiri vayo, ‘Vaburukira kuno uye vavete pamwe chete navasina kudzingiswa, navaya vakaurayiwa nomunondo.’" 
Ezekiel32:22 “Asiria iriko nehondo yayo yose; yakakomberedzwa namakuva avakaurayiwa vayo vose, vose vakaurayiwa nomunondo.’" 
Ezekiel32:23 Makuva ayo ari pasi pasi mugomba uye hondo yayo ivete yakakomberedza rinda rayo. Vose vakanga vaparadzira kutya munyika yavapenyu vakaurayiwa vakafa nomunondo. 
Ezekiel32:24 “Eramu iriko, pamwe chete navanhu vayo vazhinji vose vakapoteredza rinda rayo. Vose vakaurayiwa, vakafa nomunondo. Vose vakanga vatyisidzira vamwe munyika yavapenyu vakaburukira panyika pasi vasina kudzingiswa. Vakatakura nyadzi dzavo navaya vanoburukira kugomba." 
Ezekiel32:25 Yakawaridzirwa mubhedha pakati pavakaurayiwa, nevanhu vayo vazhinji vakakomberedza rinda rayo. Vose havana kudzingiswa, vaiurayiwa nomunondo. Nemhaka yokuti kutyisidzira kwavo kwakanga kwapararira munyika yavapenyu, vanotakura nyadzi dzavo navaya vanoburukira kugomba, vakaradzikwa pakati pavakaurayiwa." 
Ezekiel32:26 “Mesheki neTubhari dziripo, navanhu vadzo vazhinji vakakomba marinda adzo. Vose havana kudzingiswa, vaurayiwa nomunondo nokuti vakatyisidzira vanhu munyika yavapenyu." 
Ezekiel32:27 Ko, havana kuvata navamwe varwi vasina kudzingiswa here, ivo vakafa, vakaburukira muguva vane zvombo zvavo zvehondo, uye minondo yavo yakaiswa pasi pemisoro yavo? Kurangwa nokuda kwezvivi zvavo kuri pamusoro pamapfupa avo, kunyange kutyisidzira kwavanhu ava kwakanga kwapararira munyika yavapenyu." 
Ezekiel32:28 “Newewo, iwe Faro, uchavhunwa uye uchavata pakati pavasina kudzingiswa." 
Ezekiel32:29 “Edhomu iriko namadzimambo ayo namachinda ayo ose; kunyange ane simba, vakaradzikwa navaya vakaurayiwa nomunondo. Vakavata navasina kudzingiswa, navaya vanoburukira kugomba." 
Ezekiel32:30 “Machinda ose okumusoro navaSidhoni variko; vakadzika navakaurayiwa mukunyadziswa kunyange simba ravo raityisa. Vakavata vasina kudzingiswa pamwe chete navakaurayiwa nomunondo vakatakura kunyadziswa kwavo pamwe chete navaya vanoburukira kugomba. 
Ezekiel32:31 “Faro, iye nehondo yake, achavaona agonyaradzwa nokuda kwavanhu vake vazhinji vakaurayiwa nomunondo, ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel32:32 Kunyange ndakamurega achityisidzira vamwe munyika yavapenyu, Faro navanhu vake vazhinji vacharadzikwa pakati pavasina kudzingiswa, navaya vakaurayiwa nomunondo, ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha.”" 
Ezekiel33:1 Shoko raJehovha rakasvika kwandiri richiti," 
Ezekiel33:2 “Mwanakomana womunhu, taura kuvanhu venyika yako uti kwavari: kana ndikauyisa munondo pamusoro penyika, uye vanhu venyika iyo vakasarudza mumwe wavo vakamuita nharirire yavo," 
Ezekiel33:3 uye iye akaona munondo uchiuya kuzorwa nenyika uye akaridza hwamanda kuti anyevere vanhu," 
Ezekiel33:4 ipapo ani naani kana akanzwa hwamanda asi akasava nehanya nenyevero uye munondo ukasvika ukamuuraya, ropa rake richava pamusoro wake." 
Ezekiel33:5 Sezvo akanzwa kurira kwehwamanda asi akashaya hanya, ropa rake richava pamusoro wake. Dai akateerera kunyeverwa, angadai akaponesa upenyu hwake." 
Ezekiel33:6 Asi kana nharirire ikaona munondo uchiuya uye ikasaridza hwamanda kuti iyambire vanhu uye munondo ukasvika ukabvisa upenyu hwomumwe wavo, munhu uyo achabviswa hake nokuda kwechivi chake, asi ndichabvunza ropa rake kunharirire.’" 
Ezekiel33:7 “Mwanakomana womunhu, ndakakuita nharirire yeimba yaIsraeri; saka inzwa shoko randinotaura ugovaudza yambiro inobva kwandiri." 
Ezekiel33:8 Kana ndikati kuno wakaipa, ‘Iwe munhu wakaipa, uchafa zvirokwazvo,’ uye iwe ukasamutaurira kuti umunyevere panzira dzake, munhu uyo akaipa achafa nokuda kwechivi chake, asi ropa rake ndicharibvunza kwauri." 
Ezekiel33:9 Asi iwe kana ukanyevera munhu wakaipa uyu kuti adzoke kubva panzira dzake, iye akasaita izvozvo, achafa nokuda kwechivi chake, asi iwe unenge waponesa upenyu hwako." 
Ezekiel33:10 “Mwanakomana womunhu, uti kuimba yaIsraeri, ‘Izvi ndizvo zvamunoreva muchiti, “Kutadza kwedu nezvivi zvedu zvinotiremera, uye tapera nokuda kwazvo. Zvino tingararama seiko?”’" 
Ezekiel33:11 Uti kwavari, ‘Zvirokwazvo noupenyu hwangu, ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha, handitongofariri rufu rwowakaipa, asi kuti vatendeuke kubva panzira dzavo vagorarama. Tendeukai! Tendeukai pazvakaipa zvenyu! Muchafireiko, imi imba yaIsraeri?’" 
Ezekiel33:12 “Naizvozvo, mwanakomana womunhu, uti kuvanhu venyika yako, ‘Kururama kwowakarurama hakugoni kumuponesa kana asingateereri, uye kuipa kwomunhu akaipa hakungamuiti kuti awe kana akatendeuka kubva pakuri. Munhu akarurama, kana akatadza, haangatenderwi kuti ararame nokuda kwokururama kwaaiva nako kare.’" 
Ezekiel33:13 Kana ndikaudza munhu akarurama kuti achafa zvirokwazvo, asi zvino iye ovimba nokururama kwake, ndokuita zvakaipa, hakuna zvinhu zvakarurama zvaakaita kare zvicharangarirwa; achafa nokuda kwezvakaipa zvaakaita." 
Ezekiel33:14 Uye kana ndikati kumunhu akaipa, ‘Iwe uchafa zvirokwazvo,’ asi zvino iye akatendeuka pachivi chake uye akaita zvakanaka nezvakarurama," 
Ezekiel33:15 kana akadzorera zvaakatora norubatso sechikwereti, akadzosa zvaakaba, akatevera mitemo youpenyu, akasaita zvakaipa, zvirokwazvo achararama; haangafi." 
Ezekiel33:16 Hakuna zvivi zvaakaita zvicharangarirwa pamusoro pake. Akaita zvakanaka uye zvakarurama; achararama zvirokwazvo. 
Ezekiel33:17 “Kunyange zvakadaro, vanhu venyika yako vanoti, ‘Nzira yaShe haina kururama.’ Asi nzira yavo ndiyo isina kururama." 
Ezekiel33:18 Kana munhu akarurama akatsauka pakururama kwake, akaita zvakaipa, achafa nokuda kwazvo." 
Ezekiel33:19 Uye munhu akaipa akatendeuka pazvakaipa zvake akaita zvakanaka uye zvakarurama, achararama nazvo." 
Ezekiel33:20 Kunyange zvakadaro, imi imba yaIsraeri, munoti, ‘Nzira yaShe haina kururama.’ Asi ndichatonga mumwe nomumwe wenyu zvakafanira nzira dzake.”" 
Ezekiel33:21 Mugore regumi namaviri rokutapwa kwedu, nomwedzi wegumi pazuva reshanu, munhu akanga apunyuka paJerusarema akasvika kwandiri achiti, “Guta rawa!”" 
Ezekiel33:22 Zvino madekwana munhu uya asati asvika, ruoko rwaJehovha rwakanga rwuri pamusoro pangu, uye akashamisa muromo wangu munhu uya asati asvika kwandiri mangwanani. Saka muromo wangu wakazarurwa ndikasazonyararazve." 
Ezekiel33:23 Ipapo shoko raJehovha rakasvika kwandiri richiti," 
Ezekiel33:24 “Mwanakomana womunhu, vanhu vanogara mumatongo ayo munyika yaIsraeri vari kuti, “Abhurahama akange achingori munhu mumwe chete kunyange zvakadaro akatora nyika. Asi isu tiri vazhinji; zvirokwazvo nyika yakapiwa kwatiri senhaka yedu.’" 
Ezekiel33:25 Naizvozvo uti kwavari, ‘Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha: Sezvo muchidya nyama neropa rayo uye muchitarira kuzvifananidzo zvenyu uye muchiteura ropa, zvino mungatora nyika here?" 
Ezekiel33:26 Imi munovimba nomunondo wenyu, muchiita zvinhu zvinonyangadza, uye mumwe nomumwe wenyu achisvibisa mukadzi wehama yake. Zvino mungatora nyika here?’" 
Ezekiel33:27 “Taura kwavari kuti, ‘Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha: Zvirokwazvo noupenyu hwangu, vaya vakasara mumatongo vachaurayiwa nomunondo, vaya vari kumamisha, ndichavapa kuzvikara zvesango kuti zvivadye, uye vaya vari munhare nomumapako vachafa nehosha." 
Ezekiel33:28 Nyika ndichaiita dongo rakaparadzwa, uye simba rokuzvikudza kwayo kuchasvika kumagumo, uye makomo aIsraeri achaparadzwa zvokuti hakuna achaadarika." 
Ezekiel33:29 Ipapo vachaziva kuti ndini Jehovha, pandichashandura nyika ikava dongo rakaparadzwa nokuda kwezvinonyangadza zvavakaita.’" 
Ezekiel33:30 “Asi kana uriwe, mwanakomana womunhu, vanhu venyika yako vanotaurirana pamwe chete pamusoro pako pamasvingo uye napamikova yedzimba, vachiti kuno mumwe nomumwe wavo. ‘Uyai munzwe shoko rabva kuna Jehovha.’" 
Ezekiel33:31 Vanhu vangu vanouya kwauri, sezvavanosiita, ndokugara pamberi pako kuti vateerere kumashoko ako, asi havaaiti. Vanondirumbidza nemiromo yavo, asi mwoyo yavo inokarira pfuma yokusarurama." 
Ezekiel33:32 Zvirokwazvo, iwe wakaita somunhu anoimba rwiyo rworudo kwavari nezwi rakaisvonaka nokuridza chiridzwa zvakanaka, nokuti vanonzwa mashoko ako asi havaaiti." 
Ezekiel33:33 “Panoitika izvi zvose, uye zvichaitika zvirokwazvo, ipapo vachaziva kuti muprofita akanga ari pakati pavo.”" 
Ezekiel34:1 Shoko raJehovha rakasvika kwandiri richiti," 
Ezekiel34:2 “Mwanakomana womunhu, profita pamusoro pavafudzi vaIsraeri; profita uti kwavari, ‘Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha: Vane nhamo vafudzi vaIsraeri vanongova nehanya yokuzvifudza pachavo! Ko, vafudzi havafaniri kufudza makwai here?" 
Ezekiel34:3 Munodya ruomba, munozvifukidza namakushe muchiuraya makwai akakora, asi hamuna hanya namakwai." 
Ezekiel34:4 Hamuna kusimbisa asina simba kana kurapa anorwara kana kusunga akakuvara. Hamuna kutsvaka akarasika kana kudzosa akadzingwa. Makaabata nehasha noutsinye. 
Ezekiel34:5 Saka akapararira nokuti kwakanga kusina mufudzi, uye paakapararira akava zvokudya zvezvikara zvesango." 
Ezekiel34:6 Makwai angu akadzungaira pamusoro pamakomo napazvikomo zvose. Akaparadzirwa panyika yose, uye hakuna akaaronda kana kuatsvaka." 
Ezekiel34:7 “ ‘Naizvozvo, imi vafudzi, inzwai shoko raJehovha:" 
Ezekiel34:8 Zvirokwazvo noupenyu hwangu, ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha, nokuda kwokuti makwai angu ashayiwa mufudzi, nokudaro akapambwa akava zvokudya zvemhuka dzose dzesango, uye nemhaka yokuti vafudzi vangu havana kuatsvaka asi kuti vakazvifudza vamene pachinzvimbo chamakwai angu," 
Ezekiel34:9 naizvozvo imi vafudzi, inzwai shoko raJehovha:" 
Ezekiel34:10 Zvanzi naIshe Jehovha: Ndine mhaka navafudzi uye vachazvidavirira pamusoro pamakwai angu. Ndichavabvisa pakufudza makwai angu kuitira kuti vafudzi varege kuzozvifudza pachavo. Ndicharwira makwai angu pamiromo yavo, uye haachazovi chokudya chavo." 
Ezekiel34:11 “ ‘Nokuti zvanzi naIshe Jehovha: Ini pachangu ndichazvitsvakira makwai angu nokuatarira. 
Ezekiel34:12 Somufudzi anotarira makwai ake akapararira paanenge anawo, saizvozvo neni ndichatarira makwai angu. Ndichaarwira kubva panzvimbo dzose dzaanga akapararira pazuva ramakore nerima." 
Ezekiel34:13 Ndichaabudisa kubva kundudzi ndigoaunganidza kubva kunyika dzose, uye ndigoauyisa munyika yawo. Ndichaafudzira pamakomo aIsraeri, muhova, nomunzvimbo dzokugara dzose dzenyika." 
Ezekiel34:14 Ndichaafudzira mumafuro akanaka, uye pamusoro pamakomo aIsraeri ndipo paachafura. Acharara pasi pamafuro akanaka ikoko, uye achafura pabumhudza rakanaka ikoko kumakomo eIsraeri." 
Ezekiel34:15 Ini pachangu ndichafudza makwai angu nokuavatisa pasi, ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha." 
Ezekiel34:16 Ndichatsvaka akarasika nokudzosa akadzingwa. Ndichasunga akakuvara nokusimbisa asina simba, asi akakora naane simba ndichaaparadza." 
Ezekiel34:17 “ ‘Asi kana murimi, boka rangu, zvanzi naIshe Jehovha: Ndichatonga pakati pegwai nerimwe gwai, uye pakati pamakondohwe nembudzi." 
Ezekiel34:18 Ko, hazvina kuringana kwamuri here kuti mudye pamafuro akanaka? Zvakafanira here kuti mutsike netsoka dzenyu mafuro enyu akasara? Ko, hazvina kuringana here kuti munwe mvura yakachena? Ko, zvakafanira here kuti musvibise mvura yakasara namakumbo enyu?" 
Ezekiel34:19 Ko, makwai angu angafanirwa nokudya kana kunwa zvamakabvongodza netsoka dzenyu here?" 
Ezekiel34:20 “ ‘Naizvozvo zvanzi naIshe Jehovha kwavari: Tarira, ini ndimene ndichatonga pakati paakakora namakwai akaonda." 
Ezekiel34:21 Nokuda kwokuti munosunda norutivi nepfudzi, muchitunga makwai asina simba nenyanga dzenyu kusvikira maadzingira kure," 
Ezekiel34:22 ini ndicharwira makwai angu, uye haangazopambwizve. Ndichatonga pakati pehwai neimwe hwai." 
Ezekiel34:23 Ndichaisa pamusoro pawo mufudzi mumwe chete, muranda wangu Dhavhidhi uye achaafudza; iye achaafudza agova mufudzi wawo." 
Ezekiel34:24 Ini Jehovha ndichava Mwari wavo, uye muranda wangu Dhavhidhi achava muchinda pakati pawo. Ini Jehovha ndazvitaura." 
Ezekiel34:25 “ ‘Ndichaita sungano yorugare navo uye ndichadzinga zvikara panyika kuti vagogara mugwenga vagovata zvakanaka musango. 
Ezekiel34:26 Ndichaaropafadza nenzvimbo dzakapoteredza chikomo changu. Ndichanayisa mvura nenguva yayo; pachava nemibvumbi yamaropafadzo. 
Ezekiel34:27 Miti yesango ichabereka michero yayo uye ivhu richabereka zvibereko zvaro; vanhu vachagara zvakanaka panyika yavo. Vachaziva kuti ndini Jehovha, pandichavhuna mazariro amajoko avo ndigovanunura kubva mumaoko aavo vanovaita nhapwa." 
Ezekiel34:28 Havachazopambwizve nendudzi, uye zvikara zvesango hazvingavadyizve. Vachagara zvakanaka, uye hakuna angavatyisa." 
Ezekiel34:29 Ndichavapa nyika inozivikanwa nokuda kwezvibereko zvayo, uye havangazovi nedambudziko renzara munyika kana kuva chinhu chinosekwa nendudzi." 
Ezekiel34:30 Ipapo vachaziva kuti ini, Jehovha Mwari wavo, ndinavo uye kuti ivo, imba yaIsraeri, ndivo vanhu vangu, ndizvo zvinotaura Ishe Jehovha."
